Description: The Assembly of European Regions is the largest independent political network of regions in wider Europe, gathering regions from 30 countries and 15 interregional organisations. Since 1985, AER is the political voice of its members and a forum for interregional co-operation.

Name: Fraktion Bündnis 90/ Die Grünen im Deutschen Bundestag
Description:
Ob beim Klimaschutz, Sozialer Gerechtigkeit, Demokratie oder Europa – wir wollen mit Dir die Zukunft anpacken. Denn: Uns geht's ums Ganze.

Mit 118 Abgeordneten erarbeiten, ändern und beschließen wir Gesetze, die unser Miteinander prägen und unsere Zukunft gestalten. Hier erfährst Du mehr über das, was uns bewegt - von Politik hin bis zu unserer Arbeitskultur.

Du willst mitwirken? Check unsere Stellenanzeigen: https://www.gruene-bundestag.de/fraktion/jobs

Name: BL - Danmarks Almene Boliger
Description: BL - Danmarks Almene Boliger er interesse- og brancheorganisation for cirka 550 almene boligorganisationer, der drives på et non-profit grundlag. 1 mio. danskere bor alment i mere end en halv million boliger - eller næsten hver femte danske bolig er en almen bolig. Følg med her på siden for nyt om arkitektur, boligudvikling og politik på området.

Name: Confindustria Piemonte
Description:
Confindustria Piemonte supporta le Associazioni Territoriali e, attraverso queste, le imprese associate e le rappresenta nei rapporti con la Regione, le istituzioni locali, nazionali e comunitarie.
Attraverso un coordinamento con le Associazioni Territoriali, elabora le linee strategiche di politica industriale e mette in atto gli interventi idonei per partecipare alla programmazione ed alla crescita economica e sociale della regione. Tramite il confronto e la condivisione di idee degli imprenditori opera per creare le condizioni per lo sviluppo del sistema "impresa", rafforzandone la competitività.

Name: National Democratic Training Committee
Description:
The National Democratic Training Committee offers free, interactive online training for Democratic candidates running for office. 

It doesn't matter how big or small your race may be. We want to help. 
There is no litmus test. We do not take stances on issues or make endorsements. 

We aim to empower any Democrat who wants to be involved in local politics the tools needed to be successful.

We believe by working with local candidates, we can accomplish three goals: improve the performance of every Democrat up and down the ticket, elect more Democrats to office, and create a deeper bench of qualified candidates for higher office.

Name: Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP)
Description: Bharatiya Janata Party, founded in 1980, is the world's largest political party with over 11 crore members. We have evolved as the most vibrant and transformative movement in India’s political, cultural, and societal history since our inception as Bharatiya Jana Sangh. Since India's independence, we have heralded many new and alternative ideas like ‘cultural nationalism’ and ‘development for all, appeasement for none’, which have become the core of our national identity today. We firmly believe in the ideology of 'Antyodaya' or serving the very last person in the society that was propounded by Pandit Deendayal Upadhyaya. We are committed to building 'Ek Bharat, Shreshtha Bharat’ and all our karyakartas are working dedicatedly and tirelessly towards achieving it. We currently lead the National Democratic Alliance (NDA), which is governing India under the charismatic leadership of Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi.

Name: Kulturpolitische Gesellschaft e. V.
Description: Die Kulturpolitische Gesellschaft e. V. engagiert sich als kulturpolitischer Spitzenverband bereits seit 1976 für die zukunftsweisende Transformation kultureller Infrastrukturen: https://kupoge.de/antrag/

Name: Rede de Ação Política pela Sustentabilidade - RAPS
Description: A Rede de Ação Política pela Sustentabilidade – RAPS é uma organização apartidária criada em 2012 com a missão de contribuir para a melhoria da democracia e do processo político brasileiro e de disseminar o compromisso com a sustentabilidade e o desenvolvimento sustentável na política institucional. Nós fazemos isso por meio de apoio, conexão e desenvolvimento de lideranças políticas, de diferentes partidos políticos, origens e ideologias, capazes de colocar as diferenças de lado para dialogar e atuar conjuntamente na busca de soluções concretas para nossos principais desafios econômicos, sociais, ambientais e políticos.

Name: 2030-secretariat
Description:
Our goal is to ensure that CO2 emissions from the Swedish transport sector decreases with 70 % by 2030 compared to 2010. The target is part of Sweden’s climate goal but in order to succeed we need to include actors from both corporate sector, science, politics and – of course – effect the behaviour and mindset of our citizens in everyday life.

With partners and connections within the corporate sector, NGO:s, science and politics we offer a platform for dialog, leverage, policy and exchange of experience. As a “coalition of the willing” lead by experts of the subject, the 2030-secretariat is one of the most influential Swedish NGO:s committed to decarbonize the transport sector.

Name: Regional Cooperation Council (RCC)
Description:
Regional Cooperation Council serves regional cooperation in South East Europe to spark development and growth for the benefit of the people. 

RCC focuses on promotion and enhancement of regional cooperation in South East Europe (SEE). It was officially launched at the meeting of the Ministers of Foreign Affairs of the South-East European Cooperation Process (SEECP) in Sofia, on 27 February 2008, as the successor of the Stability Pact for SEE.

Name: Zukunft Fahrrad
Description: Wir sind die Lobby der innovativen #Fahrradwirtschaft. Als Bundesverband vertreten wir über 100 Mitglieder, vom Start-up bis zum Global Player mit einem gemeinsamen Ziel: der nachhaltigen #Mobilitätswende.

Name: VOX
Description: VOX es la tercera fuerza política de España, un partido creado para defender el sentido común y las verdaderas demandas de los españoles. Somos como tú, profesionales, autónomos, jubilados, emprendedores, empleados, trabajadores, funcionarios, estudiantes, etc., que concebimos la política como una herramienta al servicio de la Patria. Defendemos lo que nadie se atreve a defender y decimos en voz alta lo que nadie se atreve a decir, que es lo que piensan cada vez más españoles, hartos de los viejos partidos y del consenso fijado por la izquierda.

Name: Horizons
Description:
Voir loin pour faire bien, c’est ce que mérite la France. 
Signez le manifeste sur https://horizonsleparti.fr

Name: Sundsvalls kommun
Description:
Välkommen till Sundsvalls kommun. Sidan bevakas under vardagar och vårt mål är att återkoppla så snart som möjligt. Sundsvalls kommun är personuppgiftsansvarig för personuppgifter som behandlas i kommentarsfält och i meddelanden. Tänk på att inte lägga upp information som avslöjar personliga förhållanden. Vi rekommenderar telefon eller brev för sådana ärenden. Dina inlägg blir tillgängliga för andra användare och inlägg kan bli allmänna handlingar. 

Syftet med att Sundsvall kommun finns på Linkedin är att förstärka dialogen mellan kommunen, medarbetare och intressenter för Sundsvall. Vi vill kommunicera med dig som har intresse av Sundsvall. Här kan du ta del av information, få tips och svar på dina frågor.  

På denna sida hanterar vi personuppgifter. Den rättsliga grunden är journalistiska ändamål. 

Läs mer om hur vi hanterar personuppgifter på Sundsvall.se
https://sundsvall.se/kommun-och-politik/overklaga-beslut-rattssakerhet/behandling-av-personuppgifter

Name: SGP
Description: De SGP is een politieke partij die zich inzet voor bescherming van kwetsbaar leven, zich sterk maakt voor de belangen van het klassieke gezin en voor een veilig en zorgzaam Nederland. Christelijk, politiek met een geopende Bijbel, conservatief, barmhartig als het kan, streng en rechtvaardig als het moet.

Name: les Républicains
Description:
Notre projet repose sur des valeurs fondatrices qui inspirent et guident notre engagement : Liberté, Responsabilité, Solidarité, notre Nation, l'Europe.
Nous affirmons deux principes pour restaurer la confiance des Français dans l'action publique : écouter les citoyens, agir avec eux et pour eux.

http://www.u-m-p.org
http://twitter.com/ump
youtube.com/ump

Name: The Innovation in Politics Institute
Description: The Innovation in Politics Institute is an internationally active, non-partisan organisation that identifies, develops and applies innovations in politics - with the aim of strengthening democracy in Europe. The Institute has its headquarters in Vienna and partner offices in 14 other countries. The Institute develops projects and programmes for politicians and political institutions to make democratic politics more successful, such as the Innovation in Politics Awards, Act Now and the European Capital of Democracy. We provide these programmes to politicians, institutions, civil society and citizens, to create impact for the primary mission – to improve democratic politics. As of today, we have established a community of more than 5,000 politicians throughout Europe, who participate in our programmes and provide their know-how and experience to their peers. In all our activities, we apply our unique method: identify best practice, develop core insights and localise them, and implement innovative political work for specific tasks.

Name: Maskinmestrenes Forening
Description:
Maskinmestrenes Forening er en professionel forening for uddannet såvel som studerende maskinmestre, teknisk manager og dual purpose skibsofficerer. Foreningen er partipolitisk neutral og økonomisk uafhængig.

Maskinmestrenes Forening har mere end 14.500 medlemmer og repræsenterer medarbejdere, ledere, selvstændige og pensionister. Alle med en interesse for løn og beskæftigelse, arbejdsmarkedet, miljø, karriereplanlægning og udvikling, netværk, brancheråd m.v.. 

Formand for Maskinmestrenes Forening er Lars Have Hansen.

Name: BDE Bundesverband der Deutschen Entsorgungs-, Wasser- und Kreislaufwirtschaft e. V.
Description:
Der BDE Bundesverband der Deutschen Entsorgungs-, Wasser- und  Kreislaufwirtschaft e. V. wurde 1961 gegründet und ist der Branchenverband der Kreislauf- und Ressourcenwirtschaft. Die Mitgliedsunternehmen des BDE repräsentieren 75 Prozent des privatwirtschaftlich erbrachten Umsatzes in den Wirtschaftszweigen „Abwasserentsorgung“, „Sammlung, Behandlung, Beseitigung und Recycling von Abfällen“ sowie „Beseitigung von Umweltverschmutzungen und sonstige Entsorgung“.

Die rund 750 Mitglieder des BDE bilden die gesamte Wertschöpfungskette der Kreislauf- und Ressourcenwirtschaft ab. Das reicht von der Erfassung über die Sortierung und Verwertung von Abfällen bis hin zum Einsatz der aus dem Recyclingprozess gewonnenen Rohstoffe und Produkte.

Die Kreislaufwirtschaft spielt für den Klima- und Ressourcenschutz in Deutschland eine herausragende Rolle. So muss heute jede siebente Tonne der in Deutschland eingesetzten Rohstoffe nicht mehr importiert werden, weil Mitgliedsunternehmen des BDE Müll nicht als Abfall, sondern als Ressource begreifen. Damit ist Recycling inzwischen zur dritten tragenden Säule unserer Rohstoffversorgung geworden. Zudem steht die Branche für etwa ein Viertel der Gesamtminderung des CO2-Ausstoßes in Deutschland.

BDE-Mitgliedsunternehmen bieten Dienstleistungen in der Sammlung, Beförderung und Lagerung von Abfällen an. Sie recyceln Papier, Kunststoff, Glas, Altholz und Batterien sowie Elektroaltgeräte und Schrott. Sie bereiten Ersatzbrennstoffe (EBS) und mineralische Abfälle auf, verwerten Bioabfälle und sind in der Trink- und Brauchwasseraufbereitung tätig. Sie befördern, verwerten, behandeln und beseitigen Sonderabfälle und bieten Spezialdienstleitungen wie Industrie- und Schiffsreinigungen, Tierkörperbeseitigung und Datenträgervernichtung an.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BDEeV/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/bde_presse

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/BDEPresse

Name: Métis Nation British Columbia
Description:
MNBC is the government of Métis in BC, representing approximately 31,000 registered Métis Citizens and over 113,000 self-identified Métis people. The Provincial Government of British Columbia, as well as the Federal Government of Canada, recognizes the MNBC as the official governing organization for Métis in BC.

Our Vision
Métis Nation British Columbia will build a proud, self-governing, sustainable Nation in recognition of Inherent Rights for our Métis citizens.

Our Mission
Métis Nation British Columbia develops and enhances opportunities for our Métis Chartered Communities and Métis people in British Columbia by providing culturally relevant social and economic programs and services.

Name: Køge Kommune
Description:
Velkommen til Køge Kommunes LinkedIn profil.

I Køge Kommune arbejder vi for, at kommunen rummer alle muligheder for vores ca. 60.000 borgere - så de kan bo, leve og arbejde her hele livet. 

Køge Kommune træder i disse år store spændende udviklingsskridt og er i fuld gang med at udvikle sig til et regionalt kraftcenter. Opførsel af nyt Universitetssygehus, udvikling af et nyt byområde i Køge Kyst, ny jernbane og station i Køge Nord, Campus Køge og etablering af ny, stor erhvervs-havn er blandt de mange perspektivrige projekter, der vil præge og udvikle byen i de kommende år.

Køge Kommune er én arbejdsplads, men mange fagligheder. Kommunens 5.000 medarbejder tager sig af alle kommunens opgaver fra børn og unge over social og sundhed, teknik og miljø, personale, økonomi og IT til kultur og idræt. 

I Køge Kommune arbejder vi for at have attraktive arbejdspladser med høj faglighed, åbent samarbejde og god ledelse. Vi er ambitiøse i vores mål og giver plads til udvikling. 

Her på siden vil du finde jobopslag fra de mange forskellige kommunale arbejdspladser, informationer om kommunen som arbejdsplads, relevante nyheder om kommunen og meget andet – så følg os her.

Name: European People's Party
Description: The EPP is the EU’s centre-right party and its largest and most influential political family. The EPP currently includes 82 parties and partners from 44 countries, the Presidents of the European Commission, President of the European Parliament, 13 EU and 4 non-EU heads of state and government, 14 members of the European Commission and the largest Group in the European Parliament.

Name: EARA | European Alliance for Regenerative Agriculture
Indivisible Project
Description:
Our mission is to resist Trump’s agenda by empowering local activist groups to make their Members of Congress listen. Our work is premised on a simple idea: that Trump’s agenda doesn’t depend
on Trump--but rather on whether individual Members of Congress resist. In short, we work to support the creative, local leaders driving the Indivisible Movement.

Following the election of Donald Trump, a group of two dozen former congressional staffers and progressive advocates drafted a document called “Indivisible: A Practical Guide for Resisting the Trump Agenda.” What is the Indivisible Guide? It’s a toolkit on citizen power, a set of local, defensive advocacy strategies and tactics for resisting the Trump agenda. Thousands of local groups have now formed in nearly every congressional district in the country to put the guide into action.

Name: SMVdanmark
Description:
The Danish Federation of Small and Medium Sized Enterprises represents the Danish SMEs. As the main business association representing only the SMEs we work to improve the business conditions of SMEs. Everyday. 

The SME perspective is paramount to how SMEdenmark works with politcal issues and to the cooperation SMEdenmark has with its member associations, partners, politicians and civil servants on both local, national and international level.

Name: Dansk Beton
Description:
Dansk Beton er en branchesammenslutning i DI Byggeri. Medlemskredsen tæller knap 50 betonvirksomheder, der tilsammen udgør stort set alle betonproducenter i Danmark og beskæftiger 6.000 medarbejdere. 
Dansk Beton har til formål at udbrede kendskabet til betons anvendelse og skabe en samlet platform for branchen. Det gør vi gennem en bred vifte af aktiviteter herunder uddeling af Betonens Priser.
Bestyrelsen for Dansk Beton er sammensat af medlemmer indstillet af de tre produktsektioner: Betonelement-Foreningen, Fabriksbetonforeningen og Betonvareforeningen. 

På vores website har vi samlet en lang række artikler, billeder og videoer om  betonens anvendelse og teknik, arkitektur og Betonens Priser.

Name: ORA!
Description: Pagina ufficiale di ORA!

Name: Venstre, Danmarks Liberale Parti
Description:
Danmark skal være verdens bedste land at starte og drive virksomhed i.
Det er Venstres ambition. Vi arbejder på at forbedre forholdene for iværksætte, VVS’ere, C25 virksomheder og alle andre i det arbejdende Danmark. 
Gode danske virksomheder er forudsætningen for, at vi har råd til den velfærd, vi alle sammen ønsker.

Name: Working Families Party
Description:
Together We Can Make the Future and Build a Country Where Everyone Can Thrive. We believe that no matter where we come from or what our color, most of us want the same things. We want to earn enough to thrive, not just survive, and leave a better future for our kids. We want healthy food and clean water, safe neighborhoods and a safe world. We want to be free.

But the richest people on Earth — and the political insiders who serve them — have rigged the rules of our economy and our democracy to grab up wealth and power for themselves. They have defunded our schools, undermined community services, and stripped working people of the right to organize into unions. And then they blame poor people or people of different races or different places — aiming to divide us and distract us from what we have in common.

The Working Families Party is regular people coming together across our differences to make a better future for us all. We’re a multiracial party that fights for workers over bosses and people over the powerful. We want an America which realizes the promise – unrealized in our history – of freedom and equality for all.

Name: Organization of Islamic Cooperation ( OIC )
Description: The Organization of the Islamic Cooperation (OIC) is the second largest inter-governmental organization after the United Nations which has membership of 57 states spread over four continents. The Organization is the collective voice of the Muslim world and ensuring to safeguard and protect the interests of the Muslim world in the spirit of promoting international peace and harmony among various people of the world. The Organization was established upon a decision of the historical summit which took place in Rabat, Kingdom of Morocco on 12th Rajab 1389 Hijra (25 September 1969) as a result of criminal arson of Al-Aqsa Mosque in occupied Jerusalem.

Name: Amazon Watch
Description:
Amazon Watch is a nonprofit organization founded in 1996 to protect the rainforest and advance the rights of indigenous peoples in the Amazon Basin. We partner with indigenous and environmental organizations in campaigns for human rights, corporate accountability and the preservation of the Amazon's ecological systems.

We envision a world that honors and values cultural and biological diversity and the critical contribution of tropical rainforests to our planet's life support system. We believe that indigenous self-determination is paramount, and see that indigenous knowledge, cultures and traditional practices contribute greatly to sustainable and equitable stewardship of the Earth. We strive for a world in which governments, corporations and civil society respect the collective rights of indigenous peoples to free, prior and informed consent over any activity affecting their territories and resources. We commit, in the spirit of partnership and mutual respect, to support our indigenous allies in their efforts to protect life, land, and culture in accordance with their aspirations and needs.

Name: Tænketanken Frej
Description:
Frej er fødevarebranchens forandringsværksted. Vi vil udfordre fødevaresystemet med vild grøn energi. 

Mission
Frej bygger bro og motiverer til grøn forandring fra mark til måltid hos aktører og mellem generationer.

Vision
Frej arbejder for et nyt grønt fødevaresystem, der respekterer planetens grænser.

Name: NOVO 30
Description:
O NOVO é um partido fundado por cidadãos ficha-limpa, que nunca haviam se envolvido com política e resolveram sair da indignação para a ação.

Acreditamos que a política é o caminho para mudar o Brasil. E este caminho deve ser percorrido por gente qualificada e íntegra, através de uma instituição com princípios, valores e visão de longo prazo.

Acesse o nosso site https://novo.org.br/, conheça o trabalho dos nossos eleitos e saiba por que o NOVO é diferente!

Name: Finance Sector Union of Australia
Description:
The Finance Sector Union (FSU) represents a diverse community of finance, superannuation and insurance workers. We stand for secure pay, secure jobs, healthy and safe workplaces and a responsible and sustainable finance industry. 

JOIN TODAY: www.fsunion.org.au

Authorised by J. Angrisano, Finance Sector Union of Australia, Melbourne 3000

Name: FDM
Description: FDM varetager bilisternes interesse og arbejder for, at det er en positiv oplevelse at være bilist. Vores arbejde tager udgangspunkt i værdierne viden, troværdighed, aktiv holdning og dynamik. Vi er 300 medarbejdere fordelt på 30 adresser i hele landet. Hovedkontoret er placeret i Lyngby. FDM er med 269.000 husstande som medlemmer Danmarks største interesse- og forbrugerorganisation. FDM yder juridisk og teknisk bistand i sager omkring biler og trafik og varetager bilisternes interesse i trafik- og forbrugerpolitiske spørgsmål. FDM arbejder for at fremme trafiksikkerheden og en del af dette arbejde foregår på internationalt plan i tæt samarbejde med de øvrige landes bilklubber. FDM driver endvidere test og bilsyn, køretekniske anlæg, vejhjælp, forsikringsselskab og har rejsebureauer over hele Danmark. Se ledige stillinger i FDM: www.fdm.dk/job

Name: Conseil du Renouveau Économique Algérien مجلس التجديد الإقتصادي الجزائري
Description: Conseil du Renouveau Economique Algérien مجلس التجديد الاقتصادي الجزائري

Name: AHRCC - Asociación de Hoteles, Restaurantes, Confiterías y Cafés
Description: La Asociación de Hoteles, Restaurantes, Confiterías y Cafés agrupa a establecimientos que constituyen un sólido sector de notable importancia para el crecimiento económico y social. Se trata de actividades que participan activamente en la generación de empleo, con un aporte al fisco por demás significativo y un efecto multiplicador que se extiende a un amplio abanico de proveedores.

Name: Wildrose Independence Party of Alberta
Description:
Our Vision
Alberta will rightfully become a new Sovereign Constitutional Democracy that recognizes the Supremacy of God and the rule of law with individual freedoms and rights, a shining beacon to the world as the safest, healthiest, and most prosperous free country in which to live.

Name: European Liberal Forum
Description:
The European Liberal Forum (ELF) is the foundation of the European Liberal Democrats, the ALDE Party. A core aspect of our work consists in issuing publications on Liberalism and European public policy issues. We also provide a space for the discussion of European politics, and offer training for liberal-minded citizens. Our aim is to promote active citizenship in all of this.

Our foundation is made up of a number of European think tanks, political foundations and institutes. The diversity of our membership provides us with a wealth of knowledge and is a constant source of innovation. In turn, we provide our members with the opportunity to cooperate on European projects under the ELF umbrella. 

We work throughout Europe as well as in the EU Neighbourhood countries. The youthful and dynamic nature of ELF allows us to be at the forefront in promoting active citizenship, getting the citizen involved with European issues and building an open, Liberal Europe.

The European Liberal Forum is co-financed by the European Parliament. The European Parliament is not responsible for content of this account, or for any use that may be made of it.

Name: Kvinderådet
Description:
Kvinderådet arbejder for ligestilling og kvinderettigheder nationalt og internationalt . Kvinderådet er en paraplyorganisation, der består af 49 forskellige samfundsorganisationer: kvinde-organisationer, fagforbund og partier. Kvinderådet blev stiftet i 1899 som talerør for danske kvinder internationalt og har sidenhen været en vigtig aktør i at sikre kvinders stemmeret, og har kæmpet for lige rettigheder og ligestilling i Danmark. 

Kvinderådets vision er et bæredygtigt samfund, hvor ligestilling er en grundlæggende værdi for demokrati; Hvor alle mennesker har lige rettigheder, lige muligheder og lige vilkår politisk, socialt og økonomisk og fuldt ud udfolder deres frihed og potentiale uanset køn.

Name: Sozialdemokratische Partei Deutschlands (SPD)
Description: Wir freuen uns, über sozialdemokratische Politik zu informieren und mit euch zu diskutieren.

Name: International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance
Description: The International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance (IHRA) unites governments and experts to strengthen, advance, and promote Holocaust education, remembrance, and research worldwide and to uphold the commitments of the 2000 Stockholm Declaration.

Name: The Shura Council_SA | مجلس الشورى السعودي
Description:
[Those who respond to their Lord, and establish regular prayer; who (conduct) their affairs by mutual consultation; who spend out of what we bestow on them for sustenance] "Shura Sura (ChapterXL11), Verse 38". And [It is part of the Mercy of Allah that thou dost deal gently with them. Wert thou severe or harsh-hearted , they would have broken away from about thee : so pass over ( their faults ) , and ask for ( Allah's ) forgiveness for them ; and consult them in affairs ( of moment ) . Then, when thou hast taken a decision, put thy trust in Allah. For Allah loves those who put their trust (in Him)] "Al-Imran Sura (ChapterIII), Verse 159".

And following His Messenger Peace Be Upon Him (PBUH) in consulting his Companions, and urging the (Muslim) Nation to engage in consultation. The shura council has established to exercise the tasks entrusted to it, according to The Shura Council Law and the Basic Law of Governance while adhering to Quran and the Path (Sunnah) of his Messenger (PBUH), maintaining brotherly ties and cooperating unto righteousness and piety.

Name: Dansk Metal
Description:
Dansk Metal er fagforening for dig, der arbejder med it, teknik eller mekanik. Dette er forbundet Dansk Metals officielle LinkedIn-profil. 

Vi arbejder dagligt for at forbedre medlemmernes løn- og arbejdsvilkår. Dansk Metal har 111.000 medlemmer (januar 2014) - heraf cirka 8.200 lærlinge. 

Dansk Metal består af ca. 37 lokale afdelinger over hele landet.

Name: Stem op een Vrouw
Description: Stichting Stem op een Vrouw zet zich in voor de politieke emancipatie en representatie van vrouwen in Nederland.

Name: Middelfart Kommune
Description:
I Middelfart Kommune forbinder vi tingene. Vi forbinder historie og fremtid i udviklingen af Danmarks vækstcentrum. Vi forbinder væksten med en bæredygtig omstilling. Vi forbinder mennesker, der er forskellige, i stærke fællesskaber. Og vi forbinder helt bogstaveligt Danmark, øst og vest. Broerne til alting begynder her.

Middelfart er et godt sted at bo og leve. Vi har plads til alle, der ønsker tryghed,
sunde valgmuligheder og naturoplevelser. Trygheden gælder hele livet. Den handler om gode lærings- og udviklingsmuligheder for vores børn og unge. Sundheden
handler om, at vi tilbyder en sund livsstil, der forebygger og gør os livsduelige.
Og naturoplevelserne, de er lige uden for hoveddøren. Vi kalder det fællesskab på tværs.

Middelfart er Danmarks grønne vækstkommune. Som den fynske del af Trekantområdet ligger vi i Danmarks entreprenante centrum med flere end 400.000 arbejdspladser inden for en times kørsel. Vi satser på vækst med omtanke med et udviklingsorienteret erhvervsliv inden for fx fødevarer, transport og turisme. Et moderne erhvervsliv, velfærd med borgerne i centrum og læringsformer, der giver alle børn mulighed for at lære det, de kan. Vi kalder det sans for sammenhæng.

Frem for alt er Middelfart en kommune, der har fokus på fællesskab. Vi tror på, at
der skal være kort fra tanke til handling, og at tingene fungerer allerbedst, når vi
udvikler vores velfærd, skoler og kulturtilbud sammen – med en praktisk involvering af borgere, virksomheder, organisationer og vores stærke foreninger. Vores mangfoldighed er en styrke, og vi insisterer på, at vores velfærd har en høj standard for alle. Vi kalder det den direkte vej. Vi tror ikke på grænser. Vi tror på, at der altid er en bro.

Velkommen til 

Middelfart Kommune

Name: Environment America
Description:
Every day, we see more heartbreaking evidence of the damage being done to our planet: climate change, plastic pollution, wildlife disappearing forever. But we also see the solutions all around us, practically begging us to adopt them: solar and wind power, electric cars and buses, more walkable and “bikeable” cities, reusing and repairing stuff instead of throwing it away, and on and on.

At Environment America, our mission is to transform the power of our imaginations and our ideas into change that makes our world a greener and healthier place for all.

Name: National Association Of Funeral Directors
Description:
The NAFD is the voice of the funeral profession. We are proud to represent the views and interests of funeral directors from the smallest independent to the largest national provider. Our goal is to support our members in caring for the bereaved and the deceased in their care, as well as amplifying our members' voices to ensure that the funeral sector is front and centre in the media and in all of the UK’s Parliaments and Assemblies.

The NAFD is the largest trade association for the UK funeral sector with around 4,000 funeral homes represented alongside hundreds of funeral sector suppliers and international funeral firms.

The size and diversity of our membership gives us the authority to represent the sector’s views to the highest levels of Government as well as the media and general public.

Name: The Oxford Union
Description: The Oxford Union is the world's most prestigious debating society with a tradition of hosting internationally prominent individuals across politics, academia, and popular culture. Founded in 1823 at a time when The University of Oxford restricted students from discussing certain topics, The Union continues to uphold the principle of free speech through the exchange and debate of a wide range of ideas and opinions, presented by a diverse range of speakers - some inspiring, others controversial. As we celebrate 200 years of free speech during our Bicentenary year of 2023, we reaffirm our commitment to our integral values and also our belief that the discussion of complex topics should not only be encouraged but is an essential element of any free society.

Name: Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
Description: The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee is the only committee solely dedicated to electing a Democratic Senate. From organizing to fundraising to candidate recruitment, the DSCC works around-the-clock to re-elect Democratic senators and send new leaders to Washington who will move our country forward.

Name: vbw – Vereinigung der Bayerischen Wirtschaft e. V.
Description:
Wir sind die freiwillige, branchenübergreifende und zentrale Interessenvereinigung der bayerischen Wirtschaft und vertreten 164 Arbeitgeber- und Wirtschaftsverbände sowie 52 Fördermitglieder. In den Branchen der vbw Mitgliedsverbände sind bayernweit etwa 4,8 Millionen sozialversicherungspflichtige Beschäftigte tätig, das sind fast 90 Prozent aller Beschäftigten im Freistaat.

Auch als Landesvertretung der BDA (Bundesvereinigung der Deutschen Arbeitgeberverbände e. V.) und des BDI (Bundesverband der Deutschen Industrie e. V.) vertreten wir gemeinsame wirtschaftliche, soziale sowie gesellschaftspolitische Interessen. So erhalten wir den Freiraum für wirtschaftliches Handeln und sichern gleichzeitig den sozialen Frieden.

Netiquette: https://vbw-bayern.de/vbw/Social-Media-Netiquette.jsp

Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.vbw-bayern.de/vbw/Datenschutz/Datenschutz-SocialMedia-LinkedIn.jsp

Impressum: https://www.vbw-bayern.de/vbw/Impressum/index.jsp

Name: Parti animaliste
Description: Aujourd'hui, en France, le sort réservé à des milliards d'animaux doit se résoudre sur le plan sociétal : la question animale est une question politique. Le travail extraordinaire fait au quotidien par les associations de protection animale doit pouvoir se transcrire en dispositions législatives et réglementaires ; or, cette demande citoyenne pour plus de protection animale se heurte à l'indifférence voire à l'hostilité des actuels décideurs politiques. Il était urgent qu'un parti politique fasse le choix de mettre la protection animale au cœur de son programme : le Parti animaliste est monothématique, c'est-à-dire qu'il ne se positionne que sur des sujets regardant de façon directe ou indirecte les animaux.

Name: Confcommercio Roma
Description:
Promo.ter Roma , Ente per la Promozione e lo Sviluppo del Terziario della Provincia di Roma,  costituita il 27 giugno 2000 come associazione senza scopo di lucro, è l’ente di formazione della Confcommercio Roma .
Promo.ter Roma, avvalendosi di qualificati professionisti e di tecnologie all’avanguardia, concentra la sua attività nella promozione, progettazione, organizzazione e gestione di interventi atti a soddisfare le esigenze di sviluppo, con un’offerta  formativa che risponda ai bisogni  sia delle imprese che del singolo individuo. 
L’attività didattica della struttura estende la sua competenza altresì, nel settore della formazione obbligatoria, in osservanza delle vigenti normative in materia di Igiene degli alimenti (“Pacchetto Igiene” Reg. CE 852-853-854/04 ), Sicurezza nei luoghi di lavoro (D.Lgs. 81/08) e Privacy (D.Lgs. 196/03), tramite il Centro Assistenza Tecnica Confcommercio Roma, nonché in quello della formazione abilitante necessaria per il conseguimento della certificazione che consente lo svolgimento dell’attività commerciale.
Promo.ter Roma è accreditata presso la  Regione Lazio come Ente per la formazione continua e superiore, per svolgere la formazione per gli apprendisti e per la certificazione dei percorsi didattici relativi.
È inoltre accreditata presso la Provincia di Roma, presso i Fondi Interprofessionali e presso il Ministero della Salute come provider ECM. 
È certificata per la qualità, secondo le norme UNI EN ISO 9001:2000 settore EA 37.

Name: German Society for Security Policy
Description: We are the Gesellschaft für Sicherheitspolitik e. V. (German Society for Security Policy), founded on January 5, 1952, and thus the oldest security policy educational institution in the Federal Republic of Germany. As an independent, non-partisan association with around 80 sections and nearly 7,000 members throughout Germany, we are dedicated to communicating an understanding of security policy to the German public. With our local sections - led by experienced, volunteer section leaders and supported by a large number of active members - we hold up to 1,000 public events a year - and increasingly also hold discussions digitally. In doing so, we work closely with other organizations of relevance to security policy. Our "Young GSP", founded in 2019, is aimed at people under 35 who are interested in security policy and complements the offerings of the local sections - for constructive cooperation between the generations. With credible commitment, convincing competence and comprehensible argumentation, we convey the profound changes in the international security environment, name the new risks and threats in a permanently changing world, shed light on contexts and backgrounds. In doing so, we take into account the holistic approach of a networked security policy. In doing so, we attach importance to the idea of a defensible and combative democracy as a prerequisite for peace, freedom and security, as enshrined in the German Basic Law. We work to raise awareness of the need for and value of broadly understood security provision to safeguard our free democratic basic order in international responsibility.

Name: BDI - Bundesverband der Deutschen Industrie e.V.
Description:
The BDI is the umbrella organisation of German industry and industry-related service providers. It represents 39 industrial sector federations and has 15 regional offices in the German federal states. The BDI speaks for more than 100,000 private enterprises employing around 8 million people.

Industry is the basis of the German economy and plays a decisive role in determining the future competitiveness of our country. The BDI relays the interests of German industry to political representatives in Germany, Europe and worldwide.

Name: DI Byggeri
Description:
The Danish Construction Federation is a trade and employers’ organisation which covers the entire value chain of the building and construction sector. 

More than 6,700 companies are members of the federation. Together they cover all areas of the building and construction process within building, construction and industry.

For more information go to di.dk/byggeri.

Name: VVD
Description: De VVD is de Volkspartij voor Vrijheid en Democratie. Wij maken ons sterk voor veiligheid, werk en ondernemende mensen. Onze politieke ervaring maakt onze ideeën niet alleen goed doordacht, maar ook uitvoerbaar in de praktijk. De VVD streeft naar een kleine, slagvaardige overheid die garant staat voor een veilige en eerlijke samenleving, waar iedereen die hard werkt de ruimte krijgt om zijn of haar ambities te realiseren.

Name: Friedrich Naumann Foundation for Freedom
Description: The Friedrich Naumann Foundation for Freedom is the foundation for liberal politics in the Federal Republic of Germany. It aims to promote the goal of making the principle of freedom valid for the dignity of all people and in all areas of society, both in Germany and abroad. In our project countries, the support of human rights, rule of law and democracy in more than 60 countries form the core of the work of the regional offices in Europe, Africa, Asia, and Central America; various forms of international dialogue and transatlantic dialogue programme are used to promote these three values around the world. The foundation supports local, regional, and national initiatives to advance the rights of minorities, the democratic control of security forces and for strengthening international human rights coalitions.

Name: D66
Description:
D66 is a party with a strong international character. D66 supports a sustainable, democratic and open society, not only in The Netherlands but worldwide. Human rights and free and fair elections are essential in this global perspective, they constitute the basis for a democratic society. D66 works together with fraternal partners (political parties and civil society organisations) in order to support democratisation processes abroad. This cooperation takes place via the following avenues:

* The D66 foundation Internationaal Democratisch Initiatief (IDI) i  supports liberal democratic parties and civil society organisations in Central and Eastern Europe and Turkey.
*Democratic processes in Africa, Asia and Latin-America are supported by D66 through its involvement in Netherlands Institute for Multiparty Democracy (NIMD) i .
*D66 is a member of the European Liberal Democrats (ELDR) 
 *D66 is a member of Liberal International (LI)

Name: Liberal Party of Canada • Parti Libéral du Canada
Description:
The Liberal Party of Canada built an inclusive and prosperous Canada through a national vision that puts people first.

The hallmarks of our nation – the Charter of Rights and Freedoms, universal health care, our national flag, peacekeeping, bilingualism and multiculturalism, national unity, fiscal responsibility – are Liberal achievements.

Canada’s legacy was forged under Liberal leadership.

Reformers like Louis-Joseph Papineau and William Lyon Mackenzie fought for the early democratic reforms at the heart of our system of responsible government. Wilfrid Laurier built the nation from West to East. Canada came of age under Mackenzie King’s industrial and wartime advances. Lester Pearson achieved healthcare for all and prestige for Canada on the world stage. Pierre Trudeau made Canada into a just society. Jean Chrétien strengthened Canada’s national unity. Paul Martin left Canada with the strongest economy in the world.

In recent years the Liberal Party of Canada helped to define the issues that will shape Canada’s future: returning this country to economic and fiscal health, achieving environmental sustainability, giving our youngest citizens a head start in life through national early-learning child care, and creating a bright future for our First Nations peoples through the historic Kelowna accord.

Inspired by the high standards set by our party’s past, Liberals are united and ready to achieve the next big national projects that will tie Canadians together.

Name: Danske Regioner - Danish Regions
Description: Danske Regioner arbejder for at fremme det regionale demokrati og for at varetage regionernes fælles interesser. Det indebærer en bred portefølje af opgaver inden for forhandlinger med blandt andet regeringen, ministerier, faglige organisationer og andre interesseorganisationer samt opgaver med kommunikation og anden interessevaretagelse.

Name: Liberal Party of Australia
Description:
** What does the Liberal Party stand for? **

We are the party of initiative and enterprise;

We believe in the inalienable rights and freedoms of all peoples; and we work towards a lean government that minimises interference in our daily lives; and maximises individual and private sector initiative. 

We believe in government that nurtures and encourages its citizens through incentive, rather than putting limits on people through the punishing disincentives of burdensome taxes and the stifling structures of Labor's corporate state and bureaucratic red tape. 

We believe in those most basic freedoms of parliamentary democracy - the freedom of thought, worship, speech and association.

We believe in a just and humane society in which the importance of the family and the role of law and justice is maintained.

We believe in equal opportunity for all Australians; and the encouragement and facilitation of wealth so that all may enjoy the highest possible standards of living, health, education and social justice. 

We believe that, wherever possible, government should not compete with an efficient private sector; and that businesses and individuals - not government - are the true creators of wealth and employment. 

We believe in preserving Australia's natural beauty and the environment for future generations. 

We believe that our nation has a constructive role to play in maintaining world peace and democracy through alliance with other free nations. 

In short, we simply believe in individual freedom and free enterprise; and if you share this belief, then ours is the Party for you.

Authorised by A. Hirst, Liberal Party of Australia, Canberra.

Name: DIGITALEUROPE
Description:
DIGITALEUROPE is the leading trade association representing digitally transforming industries in Europe.

We stand for a regulatory environment that enables European businesses and citizens to prosper from digital technologies. We wish Europe to grow, attract and sustain the world’s best digital talents and technology companies.

Together with our members, we shape the industry policy positions on all relevant legislative matters and contribute to the development and implementation of relevant EU policies. Our membership represents over 35,000 businesses who operate and invest in Europe. It includes 91 corporations which are global leaders in their field of activity, as well as 39 national trade associations from across Europe.

Name: First Peoples' Assembly of Victoria
Description: We are the independent and democratically elected representatives of Traditional Owners of Country and Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples on the shared journey to Treaty in Victoria.

Name: Volt Europa
Description:
Volt is a pan-European, progressive movement that stands for a new and inclusive way of doing politics and that wants to bring real change to all European citizens. A new pan-European approach is needed to overcome current and future challenges, such as - among many others - climate change, economic inequality, migration, international conflict, terrorism, and the impact of the technological revolution on our jobs. National parties are powerless in front of these challenges, because they go beyond national borders and need to be tackled by us as Europeans, as one people. As a transnational party, we believe we can help the European people unite, create a shared vision and understanding, exchange good practices across the continent, and come up with policies together.

A new way of doing politics, for a new millennium.

Name: West Yorkshire Combined Authority
Description:
Our work is led by the Combined Authority, chaired by our Mayor, and supported by the thematic committees of the Combined Authority which focus on achieving our corporate objectives.

Membership of the Combined Authority is made up of the Mayor and democratically elected councillors from our West Yorkshire partner councils of Bradford, Calderdale, Kirklees, Leeds and Wakefield, and a non-voting member representing the City of York Council.

The Mayor’s Business Board brings together local business and community leaders with expertise across multiple sectors, including manufacturing, professional services, and the arts to champion the regional economy.

Name: Volt Nederland
Description:
Wij zijn Volt. Wij geloven dat betere samenwerking de enige manier is om de uitdagingen van de 21e eeuw aan te pakken. Problemen die wij niet in Nederland alleen kunnen oplossen, pakken wij Europees aan. Klimaat, veiligheid en migratie. Daarom werken wij in heel Europa met één visie aan dezelfde doelen. 

Wij staan voor positieve politiek. Zo bouwen wij aan een duurzame en veilige toekomst voor iedereen. In Nederland én in Europa.

Name: China International Big Data Industry Expo
Description:
China International Big Data Industry Expo (Big Data Expo) is the world's first expo themed around big data. Characterized by visions, industrial perspectives, and enterprise positioning on a global level, it aims to build a professional exchange and sharing platform for global big data professionals, enterprises, institutions and start-ups. With a focus on frontiers and win-win results, the Big Data Expo 2018 will explore big data development on the basis of the latest innovations and achievements in big data technology. With the theme "Data for Everything, Intelligence for Integration", the Big Data Expo 2018 will include the following:

A summit at which the government and enterprises will engage in dialogue. 

An opening ceremony at which state leaders will deliver addresses as well as renowned domestic and foreign experts and scholars will deliver speeches. 

Five high level dialogues at which top International big data enterprises and leaders will exchange ideas on Al, data security, internet of things, sharing economy and targeted poverty alleviation.

Several forums which will explore the deeper integration of big data with economy, culture, society and ecology, centering on six fields including digital economy development, national governance through big data, industrial innovation of blockchain and other technologies, data security, big data and people's livelihood as well as regional cooperation and exchange. 

Two concurrent conferences, one exhibition, one competition and a series of activities held during the Big Data Expo 2018. 

Two concurrent conferences- China e-commerce Innovation and Development Summit will be held during the Big Data Expo 2018. At the summit, leaders from the government, world-renowned e-commerce enterprises, innovative companies, non-governmental organizations and e-commerce industry will reach a new consensus through dialogue. 

One exhibition-China International Big Data Industry Expo (professional exhibition) will allow visitors to experience the most advanced technologies including Al, VR, AR and wearable devices revealing their vision for a better future. 

One competition-2018 China International Big Data Fusion Innovation Artificial Intelligence Global Competition will be held with more than 1,000 teams from over 10 countries will participate in the competition in six countries including China, the USA and Israel. The final will take place in Guiyang, Guizhou Province on May 25th, 2018. The results of the final will be announced during the Expo.

A series of activities-A series of activities will be held during the Big Data Expo 2018 to better promote the development of integration of big data with the real economy, social governance and people's lives. For the first time, the supercomputing capacity and technical applications of China's "Eye of Heaven"for astronomical big data will be displayed. 5G application scenarios will be presented, and pioneering big data research works will be released including China’s Big Data Valley, Block Data 4.0, as well as investment promotional information of Guiyang's 100 big data application scenarios. The Expo will also see the release of a series of the most advanced and disruptive technologies in the world such as the security index of domestic big data cities and other industrial development reports. The organizer has sent invitations to world-renowned big data enterprises, internet enterprises and software enterprises with positive responses.

Name: Vårdförbundet
Description:
Vårdförbundet (the Swedish Association of Health Professionals) is the trade union and professional organisation of four registered professions; nurses, midwives, biomedical scientists and radiographers.We represent more than 80 % of the workforce.

Our main objective is to develop and strengthen the four professions that we represent and to promote each member's development in his or her professional role. Vårdförbundet is active in public debate, with the aim of influencing the development of healthcare and other societal issues, both nationally and internationally.

We also represent managers, teachers and researchers within these professions, as well as students training to qualify for any of these four professions. Vårdförbundet is not affiliated with any political party, governmental organisation or religious group.

Follow us on:
http://twitter.com/vardforbundet

Name: Amadeu Antonio Stiftung
Description:
Seit ihrer Gründung 1998 ist es das Ziel der Amadeu Antonio Stiftung, eine demokratische Zivilgesellschaft zu stärken, die sich konsequent gegen Rechtsextremismus, Rassismus und Antisemitismus wendet.

Dafür unterstützt sie Initiativen und Projekte, die sich kontinuierlich für eine demokratische Kultur engagieren und für den Schutz von Minderheiten eintreten. Die Stiftung fördert unkompliziert und verteilt das Geld gezielt dort, wo es am dringendsten benötigt wird.

Die wichtigste Aufgabe der Amadeu Antonio Stiftung über eine finanzielle Unterstützung hinaus: Aufmerksamkeit für engagierte Menschen vor Ort zu schaffen und das Thema Rechtsextremismus dauerhaft auf die Tagesordnung zu bringen.

Name: Leadtech Political Consulting Private Limited
Description: Established in 2008, Leadtech has emerged as leading political research and consulting firm engaged in survey research, analytics, and campaign in the field of Election, Governance, Politics, Health, and Education. Leadtech is a center of excellence in the field of Election Studies. We believe and feel proud of our core values “integrity and loyalty” towards our client. Our approach is highly scientific for the selection of the samples to conduct the interviews, we use in-house built technology to analyze the data for accurate analysis. We equip our clients with the latest tools and technology to assess the current scenario, assist in quick decision making, and in optimizing the available resources for gaining the best possible returns. Leadtech is one of the best election campaign firms in India. We are the pioneer in conducting large-scale elections surveys, door to door surveys, field election campaigns, booth wise election campaign management, and in rigorous reach out activities during the election campaign. Leadtech is providing the latest technology such as mobile applications for party workers, voter search mobile application, and voter information management software. We deploy among the best political expert and election strategists for our clients to win the election. Our war Room team, full of political experts and analysts can help the client in making the road map and plans for each day during the election campaign. We help our clients at each step to make the right decisions until the last hour of the elections.

Name: Good Law Project
Description: We use the law to resist hate and bring hope. Injustice is not inevitable.

Name: Republican Jobs
Description:
Republican Jobs is a political headhunting service. Our team referred successful placement of over 1,400+ political operatives in 27 states in late 2022.

Send a resume at www.RepublicanJobs.gop

Name: Biden for President
Description: Together, we can finish the job for the American People!

Name: PoliticalEDGE
Description:
PoliticalEDGE is India's pioneer Election Management & Political Strategy organization with over 15 years of unmatched experience.

We believe in a data-led strategic 360-degree approach to any political campaign, and deliver strategies to enhance vote-share.

We work with Political Parties as well as individual leaders to shape their political journeys.

Name: ActBlue
Description: At ActBlue, we build tech and infrastructure for Democratic campaigns, progressive-aligned causes, and people working to create a better future. We put power in the hands of small-dollar donors and make giving online as easy as possible. And we work with thousands of groups -- from presidential candidates to environmental organizations to local school board members.

Name: Maia Sandu
Description: Președinte al Republicii Moldova, economist, ex-Ministru al Educației, ex-Prim-ministru, muncesc ca să avem o țară unde fiecare poate avea o viață bună și în siguranță, cred în puterea oamenilor buni, lupt pentru dreptate în țara mea.

Name: SEIU
Description: We are the Service Employees International Union, an organization of 2-million members united by the belief in the dignity and worth of workers and the services they provide and dedicated to improving the lives of workers and their families and creating a more just and humane society.

Name: Ministério da Justiça - XXV Governo
Description: Ministério da Justiça - XXV Governo

Description:
Die Mitte unserer Gesellschaft fordert radikale Reformen. Wir sind die Partei, die für diese radikalen Reformen eintritt. Wir sind die radikale Mitte.

Name: African Union ECOSOCC
Run for Something
Description:
Run for Something recruits and supports talented, passionate young people who will advocate for progressive values now and for the next 30 years, with the ultimate goal of building a progressive bench.

We help people run for offices like state legislatures, mayorships, city council seats, and more. We’ll do whatever it takes to get more under-40 year-olds on the ballot.

Name: DesignBoxed
Description:
DesignBoxed Creatives is a Political Election Campaign Management organisation with a proven track record of victory. We have a consolidated presence, both in the offline and online sphere. We are the only company with a dedicated team of ground team professionals amassing of real time and pertinent data, giving an unparalleled edge, expanse and conclusivity to our campaigns.

At DesignBoxed we understand that every, every cause, and every campaign is unique. That's why we help our clients create strategies that ensure positive engagement and connection with audience on an individual level.

Name: Indian National Congress
Description:
The Indian National Congress is India’s oldest political party. It led the freedom movement and has governed India for 55 of 72 years since independence. During this period, India evolved from being a poor and famine-stricken country to one of the fastest growing economies in the world, self-sufficient in food and a technological and scientific powerhouse. In 2009, India became the third largest economy in the world in terms of purchasing power parity, overtaking Japan. Under the Congress-led United Progressive Alliance, India saw the biggest ever jumps in literacy, health and nutrition, and 140 million citizens exited the ranks of the poor. All of this was achieved with minimum dislocation in a democratic system by ensuring that disadvantaged citizens also benefited from social and economic progress.

The Congress party stands today, as it did then, for freedom. We believe all citizens should be treated equally regardless of religion, caste, gender, sexual orientation or region. We reject extremism and hate from all sides. We believe that all disadvantaged groups should have equal access to rights and justice, and that our policies should promote emancipation, not discrimination. The INC stands resolutely in defence of our institutions because it is they that protect citizens from arbitrariness and tyranny. We cannot let expertise be replaced by ideology and systematic thinking be displaced by marketing-driven 'jumlas'.

The All India Professionals’ Congress (AIPC) is a department of the Congress party that seeks to provide professionals with a platform to participate in politics and in policy-making. We invite all professionals to join us and help promote our values of diversity, freedom and the empowerment of all citizens.

Name: Ministério de Portos e Aeroportos
Description: Perfil oficial do Ministério de Portos e Aeroportos

Name: CDU Deutschlands
Description:
Die CDU hat mehr als 50 Jahre verantwortlich regiert und die Bundeskanzler gestellt, von Konrad Adenauer über Helmut Kohl bis Friedrich Merz.

Wichtige Weichenstellungen kamen durch oder mit der CDU zustande: Westbindung und NATO-Beitritt, westliche Form der Demokratie und Soziale Marktwirtschaft, Aussöhnung mit den Kriegsgegnern, Umweltschutz & Energiewende, Deutsche Einheit und Europäische Union.

Jetzt geht es darum, unser Land und unseren Kontinent fit zu machen für die Zukunft. Mit dem Wissen der Vergangenheit richten wir den Blick nach vorn.

Auf die CDU ist Verlass. Seit 80 Jahren.

Name: All India Professionals' Congress
Description:
The All India Professionals’ Congress (AIPC) is India’s first political platform focused on the needs and aspirations of working professionals and entrepreneurs in the country. The idea of AIPC germinated from the assessment that professionals in today’s India are disconnected from politics, a starkly different situation from the first couple of decades after India's independence.

The purpose of AIPC is to build an ecosystem that connects professionals to the political domain. They will help promote an inclusive and progressive social, political and economic agenda.

AIPC is a department of the Indian National Congress, India’s oldest and largest political movement. AIPC’s work will help provide policy ideas as well as talent for the party.

Name: Verband der Unternehmerinnen (VdU)
Description:
Der Verband der Unternehmerinnen in Deutschland e. V. (VdU) vertritt seit 1954 als Wirtschaftsverband branchenübergreifend die Interessen von Unternehmerinnen in Politik und Gesellschaft. In besonderem Maße zeichnet uns die Verbindung von unternehmerischer Interessenvertretung und gleichstellungspolitischer Lobby aus. 

Wir setzen uns ein für verlässliche und zeitgemäße politische Rahmenbedingungen für Unternehmen, die Stärkung weiblichen Unternehmertums, die Förderung von Frauen in Führungspositionen und für bessere Bedingungen für Frauen in der Wirtschaft. Wir vertreten die politischen Belange von rund 1,2 Millionen selbstständigen Frauen aller Branchen und Unternehmensgrößen.

Name: Conservative Party of Canada
Description:
The Conservative Party of Canada Leader: Pierre Poilievre
Le Parti conservateur du Canada  Chef : Pierre Poilievre

Name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
Description:
Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is a third-generation Bronxite, educator, and organizer serving the 14th district of New York in the Bronx and Queens. Ocasio-Cortez grew up experiencing the reality of New York’s rising income inequality, inspiring her to organize her community and run for office on a progressive platform with a campaign that rejects corporate PAC funds.

Since her swearing-in to Congress in January of 2019, Congresswoman Ocasio-Cortez has remained committed to serving working class people over corporate interests and advocating for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.
Location: The Bronx and Queens, New York

Name: Västsvenska Handelskammaren
Description:
Västsvenska Handelskammaren är en privat partipolitiskt oberoende näringslivsorganisation. Vi arbetar med att skapa tillväxt och utveckla framtidens Västsverige genom att hjälpa företagen göra fler och bättre affärer och genom att påverka politiska beslut. Vårt arbete har regionalt fokus eftersom den ekonomiska tillväxten påverkas huvudsakligen av regionala förutsättningarna framför kommunala och nationella.

Vi har anor från 1661 och har idag är närmare 3 000 medlemsföretag. Ett åttiotal personer arbetar heltid för våra medlemmar. Till oss kan företag med alla typer av verksamheter vända sig när de vill ha extern hjälp, ny kunskap eller kontakter för att nå sina affärsmässiga mål. Handelskammaren är en naturlig mötesplats där människor och företag kan inspireras och skapa affärer.

Våra expertisområden:
Politisk påverkan | Affärsnätverk | Juridik | Internationella affärer | Kurser | Företagsutbildningar

Gå med i vår grupp här på LinkedIn:
http://www.linkedin.com/groupRegistration?gid=1463467
