XING: https://callcenter-verband.de/home/social-media/ccv-auf-xing
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/CallCenterVerband
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/callcenterverband

Name: Dream for America
Description:
Dream for America, Inc. (DFA) is a national youth movement founded by then 16-year-old William He on July 4, 2023 focused on identifying, educating, and inspiring students to advance progressive American values like freedom, democracy, diversity, & economic opportunity. Our programs initiate conversations & empower informed civic and cultural engagement among young Americans. We also help young citizens develop the knowledge, skills, and motivation to meaningfully engage with their communities.

With over 18,000 grassroots donors, a 1,000 person volunteer network spanning all 50 states, and a social media presence with 600,000 followers and 400 million impressions — Dream for America is the fastest-growing youth organization in the country rivaling far-right groups like Turning Point USA.

Students and young people across America are fed up with extremist ideologies that are tearing the fabric of our country apart, and we are waking up. Dream for America is working tirelessly everyday to actively engage with the culture and move the needle!

Through non-partisan debate, dialogue, & discussion, Dream for America believes that every young American can be enlightened towards real democratic values and inspired to usher in a new wave of pro-democracy progressivism echoing the visions of Franklin Roosevelt & John F. Kennedy.

Since our founding, Dream for America has embarked on a mission to build the most organized, active, and powerful pro-democracy grassroots network both online and on-campuses across the country to offer young liberals a sense of belonging and community, leadership development, & pathways to civic engagement and social change.

Name: Love HR, hate Racism - #hrespect
Description: Unter dem Motto „Love HR, hate Racism“ wurde die Kampagne #hrespect gestartet, um den Berufsstand der Personaler:innen für das Thema Rassismus und Rechtspopulismus zu sensibilisieren und eine Plattform für den Austausch zum Thema zu bieten.

Name: New York City Campaign Finance Board
Description: The Campaign Finance Board is a nonpartisan, independent city agency that serves the public interest by enhancing the role of New York City residents in the electoral process. Through its administration of the Campaign Finance Program, created in 1988, the CFB educates voters about the candidates and enables more citizens to compete for city office. The Program amplifies the impact of New Yorkers’ small contributions by matching them with public funds, reducing the possibility and the perception of corruption associated with large contributions and unlimited campaign spending.

Name: Behandlingsrådet
Description:
Danske Regioner oprettede Behandlingsråd med opgaven at lave anbefalinger af sundhedsteknologier, medicinsk udstyr, behandlingsregimer og tilgange til/organisering af behandlinger. Formålet med Behandlingsrådet er at målrette sundhedsvæsenets ressourcer til teknologier og indsatser, der giver mere sundhed for pengene. Det skal bidrage til højere kvalitet og til at dæmpe udgiftspresset på sundhedsvæsenet.

Behandlingsrådet arbejder ud fra 4 principper:

1. Mere sundhed for pengene
Behandlingsrådet skal være med til at sikre, at vi bruger ressourcerne i sundhedsvæsnet bedst muligt. Når rådet skal vurdere, om en teknologi eller behandling giver nok sundhed for pengene, skal der tages hensyn til, at en enkelt teknologi eller behandling ikke alene må beslaglægge en stor andel af de samlede ressourcer. Dertil skal rådet være opmærksomt på, om et sygdoms- eller behandlingsområde medfører særligt stort tab af levetid, og om der dermed skal kunne allokeres uforholdsmæssigt flere ressourcer end andre områder, og særligt om effekten af en teknologi eller behandling står mål med omkostningerne.

2. Faglighed og armslængde til det politiske system
Behandlingsrådets arbejde skal ske på et solidt fagligt grundlag med armslængde til det politiske system og de prioriteringer, der foretages der. Det skal være fagkyndige, der gennemgår dokumentationen bag og sikkerheden for en given teknologi eller behandling.

3. Åbenhed
De faglige vurderinger skal ske på baggrund af offentligt tilgængelige og anerkendte metoder og kriterier og med inddragelse af alle relevante parter - herunder også patienter.

4. Lighed
Behandlingsrådet skal understøtte, at der sker en ensartet anvendelse af teknologier og behandlingstilbud på tværs af landet og til både store og små patientgrupper.

Name: AEFVALE - Associação de Engenheiros Florestais do Vale do Itajaí
Description:
A AEFVale é a Associação de Engenheiros Florestais do Vale do Itajaí, que representa os ENGENHEIROS FLORESTAIS do Estado de Santa Catarina.

Foi fundada em 16/03/2013 e possui sede no município de Blumenau/SC. 

Está na terceira gestão, tendo a atual Diretoria Executiva iniciado os trabalhos em 03/12/2019.

Vem desde a sua fundação, tendo destacada atuação em Santa Catarina e no Brasil, com ações e eventos em benefício da sociedade, dos profissionais, dos estudantes e do meio ambiente, promovendo e desenvolvendo atividades técnicas e educativas, levando a ciência e tecnologia florestal ao conhecimento da sociedade.

Temos como MISSÃO representar os interesses dos Engenheiros Florestais, aprimorar a inserção profissional e expandir o mercado de trabalho, promover e difundir a ciência florestal no âmbito político e social de forma a favorecer o bem-estar da sociedade e o meio ambiente.

Nossa VISÃO é ser referência nacional como entidade representativa da classe dos Engenheiros Florestais, baseada no zelo às normas, na conduta ética e na excelência em gestão de processos, pessoas e relações institucionais.

E para alcançarmos os objetivos propostos, trouxemos como nossos VALORES: 
- Ética
- Inovação
- Transparência
- Comprometimento
- Respeito Profissional
- Cumprimento das Leis
- Responsabilidade Social e Ambiental

Contate-nos através dos e-mails: 
presidente@aefvale.org.br ou secretaria@aefvale.org.br

Name: The Political Edge
Description: The Political Edge is a new initiative of KRK Media and Research Pvt Ltd. It is an e-magazine portal that was launched late in 2018

Name: Fair Fight Action
Description: Fair elections are the moral foundation of the compact between the government and its citizens. Yet, during the 2018 election, thousands of citizens eligible to vote in Georgia were denied this fundamental right. Fair Fight is a national voter rights organization rooted in Georgia. We are the nation’s only organization focused on promoting free and fair elections through litigation, legislation, and advocacy, that brings high-impact campaign strategies to make elections fair – for all.

Name: KAS Subsahara-Afrika
Description:
Democracy.
Freedom.
Entrepreneurship.

Building bridges and expanding networks between Germany and Africa.

Name: Wirtschaftsbund Österreich
Description: Der Österreichische Wirtschaftsbund ist österreichweit die größte und schlagkräftigste politische Interessenvertretung für Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer. Die Erfolge, die der Wirtschaftsbund seit seinem Bestehen erzielen konnte, nützen nicht nur den Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmern, sondern der Wirtschaft insgesamt und schaffen Wohlstand für Generationen.

Name: CJPAC
Description: CJPAC is a national, independent, multi-partisan organization. Our mandate is to engage Jewish and pro-Israel Canadians in the democratic process and to foster active political participation. We are dedicated to helping community members build relationships within the Canadian political arena.

Name: RAJASHRAYA POLITICAL CONSULTANCY
Description: Welcome to Rajashraya political  Consulting, a 360° political consulting firm dedicated to advancing the principles and mission of the Indian Constitution. Based in New Delhi , we offer expertise in electioneering, policy formulation, and governance advisory. With over five years of experience, we have assisted more than 150 clients and supported over 200 assemblies, establishing ourselves as trusted advisors in the political landscape. Our team blends seasoned political consultants and diverse professionals, each bringing unique expertise. We specialize in policy recommendations, grassroots campaigns, stakeholder alignment, impactful events, social media engagement, and strategic multimedia content. We aim to foster dialogue and collaboration among young professionals to revolutionize electioneering, policy-making, and governance advisory. Rooted in strategic planning and organization at all levels, we emphasize research and technology to inform our campaign plans. Founded by a visionary leader with experience in  IPAC, . Consulting Rajashraya political  Consulting blends modern and traditional techniques to stay people-centric. Our dynamic team crafts strategies for prominent figures in Indian politics, ensuring every moment is  impactful. Join us in igniting societal change and driving success in the political arena.

Name: RådgivningsDanmark
Description:
RådgivningsDanmark er brancheforening for almennyttige organisationer, der yder gratis rådgivning til mennesker i vanskelige livssituationer.

I Danmark findes der ingen regulering med eller minimumskrav for kvaliteten af almennyttige rådgivningstilbud. RådgivningsDanmark arbejder derfor for at højne og sikre kvaliteten i sociale rådgivningstilbud og synliggøre medlemsorganisationernes arbejde, så gratis rådgivning af høj kvalitet bliver let tilgængeligt for mennesker med behov for hjælp.

RådgivningsDanmark tilbyder:
- En akkrediteringsordning med fælles kvalitetsstandarder, der er skræddersyet til rådgivningsbranchen.  
- Et kvalitetsstempel til de rådgivningstilbud, der lever op til kvalitetskravene.
- Kvalitetsudvikling gennem rådgivningsfaglige netværk, seminarer og videndeling
- Interessevaretagelse af faglige og politiske dagsordener på rådgivningsområdet.

Name: Dansk PersonTransport
Description:
DPT’s formål er at varetage medlemmernes økonomiske, faglige og sociale interesser og rettigheder ved forhandling og samarbejde for derved at sikre de bedst mulige betingelser for medlemmernes udøvelse af deres erhverv.

DPT arbejder også for at fremme og udvikle persontransport i Danmark samt for at sikre en vedvarende professionalisering af branchen.

Name: Danske Skoleelever
Description: Danske Skoleelever (DSE) er en interesseorganisation som arbejder for at skabe det gode skoleliv for de danske skoleelever. Organisationen varetager således både elevernes uddannelsespolitiske interesser og arbejder med udvikling af skolernes elevråd.

Name: The Gravel Institute
Description: Progressive think-tank.

Name: BGA
Description:
Der BGA vertritt die Interessen der Unternehmen des Groß- und Außenhandels sowie der B2B-Dienstleistungen auf nationaler, europäischer und internationaler Ebene. Er setzt sich ein für Weltoffenheit, freien Wettbewerb in einer liberalen, marktwirtschaftlichen Ordnung und verantwortungsvolles Unternehmertum.

Der BGA unterstützt Unternehmen, in einer globalen und digitalen Wirtschaft erfolgreich zu handeln. Im internationalen Wettbewerb sind Flexibilität und Schnelligkeit nämlich ausschlaggebend. Darüber hinaus ist der BGA Ansprechpartner für die Politik und informiert die Öffentlichkeit. Dabei fokussiert sich der BGA darauf, wettbewerbsfähige Standortbedingungen zu schaffen: für eine moderne Arbeits- und Sozialpolitik, eine leistungsfähige Infrastruktur, ein leistungsgerechtes Steuersystem, praxistaugliche Regelungen und eine konsequente Deregulierung.

Unternehmer ermöglichen Wachstum, schaffen Arbeitsplätze und garantieren damit Wohlstand für alle. Ohne ihr kreatives Denken wären weder die Aufbauleistungen der Nachkriegs- und Nachwendezeit noch die Erfolge Deutschlands auf den Weltmärkten möglich gewesen, Es ist auch heute Voraussetzung für künftige Prosperität.

Als B2B-Spitzenverband ist der BGA die durchsetzungsstarke Stimme und Plattform für Handel und Dienstleistungen. Für seine Mitglieder gestaltet er aktiv die Zukunft der Unternehmen in Politik und Wirtschaft mit.

Name: Parti Québécois
Description: Le Parti Québécois est un parti politique actif sur la scène québécoise dont l'objectif est de réaliser la souveraineté du Québec. Fort de plus de 100 000 membres, enraciné aux quatre coins du Québec, le Parti Québécois est aujourd'hui l'opposition officielle à l'Assemblée nationale avec 54 députés élus sous sa bannière et sous la direction de Pauline Marois, chef du Parti.

Name: Pinkstinks Germany e.V.
Description:
Pinkstinks ist Deutschlands reichweitenstärkste Bildungsorganisation gegen Sexismus. Wir produzieren niedrigschwellige Texte und Videos für unsere Netzwerke, beraten Unternehmen und machen Bildungsarbeit an Schulen. Feministische Themen bilden den Kern unserer Arbeit und wir haben uns erfolgreich als Werbeagentur für Feminismus etabliert.
Pinkstinks ist unabhängig, größtenteils spendenfinanziert und als besonders förderungswürdig anerkannt. Die Zeiten gendern sich.

Name: EDK | CDIP | CDPE | CDEP
Description: In der Schweiz tragen die Kantone die Hauptverantwortung für Bildung und Kultur. Sie koordinieren ihre Arbeit auf nationaler Ebene und bilden hierfür eine politische Behörde: die Konferenz der kantonalen Erziehungsdirektorinnen und -direktoren (EDK). Sie ist verantwortlich für die nationale Koordination in der Bildungs- und Kulturpolitik. Sie setzt sich für hohe Qualität, Chancengerechtigkeit, Durchlässigkeit und Mobilität im schweizerischen Bildungssystem ein.

Name: European Liberal Youth - LYMEC
Burgerstem
Description:
Burgerstem - Bouw mee aan de toekomst van democratie!

Welkom op de officiële bedrijfspagina van Burgerstem. Wij zijn een innovatieve organisatie die streeft naar een inclusieve en participatieve democratie. Onze missie is om burgers de macht terug te geven en hen in staat te stellen directe invloed uit te oefenen op belangrijke beslissingen.

Op deze pagina delen we inspirerende inzichten, boeiende artikelen en nieuws over de ontwikkelingen rondom Burgerstem en de wereld van democratie. We nodigen je uit om de pagina te volgen en actief deel te nemen aan de discussies die plaatsvinden.

Als volger van Burgerstem krijg je een uniek inzicht in de laatste trends op het gebied van democratische vernieuwing, blockchain-technologie en burgerparticipatie. Je zult op de hoogte blijven van onze donatiecampagnes, evenementen en belangrijke mijlpalen in ons streven naar meer inspraak en meer democratie.

We moedigen je aan om je mening te delen, vragen te stellen en ideeën uit te wisselen. Jouw stem telt! Samen kunnen we de toekomst van democratie vormgeven en bouwen aan een samenleving waarin alle burgers gehoord worden.

Word lid van onze community en sluit je aan bij de beweging voor een sterke, participatieve democratie. Samen kunnen we het verschil maken en de stem van alle burgers laten gelden.

#Burgerstem #Democratie #Participatie #Inclusie #ToekomstVanDemocratie

Name: Zentrum für neue Sozialpolitik
Description:
Sozialpolitik beginnt für uns beim Individuum. 
Ausgangspunkt unserer Arbeit ist die Frage: Was braucht ein Mensch, um sein Leben selbstbestimmt zu gestalten? Dabei verstehen wir Sozialpolitik nicht allein als staatliche Sicherung, sondern als breites gesellschaftliches Gestaltungsfeld. Sie umfasst alle politischen, wirtschaftlichen und sozialen Bedingungen, die individuelle Freiheit, soziale Teilhabe und faire Chancen ermöglichen. Der Sozialstaat ist dabei ein zentrales Instrument, aber kein Selbstzweck. Er soll Voraussetzungen schaffen, unter denen Menschen Verantwortung für sich und andere übernehmen können. 

Um diesen Anspruch einzulösen, analysieren wir soziale Strukturen, entwickeln politiknahe Konzepte und schaffen Räume für sachlichen Austausch und neue Ideen.

Name: Onward
Description:
Onward’s mission is to develop bold and practical ideas to boost economic opportunity, build national resilience, and strengthen communities across all parts of the United Kingdom.

Our vision is to address the needs of the whole country: young and old, urban and rural, for all communities across the UK – particularly places that have too often felt neglected or ignored by Westminster.

We believe in an optimistic conservatism that is truly national – one that recognises the value of markets, supported by a streamlined state that is active not absent. We are unapologetic about standing up to vested interests, putting power closer to people, and supporting the hardworking and aspirational.

Name: Sulisitsisut | Grønlands Erhverv | Greenland Business Association
Description:
Grønlands Erhverv (GE) har siden 1966 varetaget Grønlands erhvervslivs interesser, og vores medlemmer tæller i dag ca. 350 virksomheder med omkring 7.000 ansatte, fordelt på alle landets erhvervssektorer. Fra små og mellemstore virksomheder til store selskaber, der opererer på de internationale markeder.

Vi er således Grønlands dominerende erhvervsorganisation, da vi både repræsenterer langt de fleste virksomheder og ca. 80% af landets samlede private erhvervsliv lønsum. Det sikrer GE en central position på arbejdsmarkedet og i forhold til landets politiske ledelse og myndigheder.

Sulisitsisut 1966-mili Kalaallit Nunaata inuussutissarsiornikkut soqutigisai aallaavigalugit sulivoq, ullumikkullu suliffeqarfiit ilaasortavut 350-t missaanniipput, 7000-illu missaaniittut, nuna tamakkerlugu inuussutissarsiornikkut ingerlataqarfinnut tamanut agguataarsimasut, sulisuullutik. Suliffeqarfiit mikisut akunnattumillu angissusillit allaallu ingerlatsivissuit nunani tamalaani niuerfinnik suleqateqartut ilaasortaapput.

Taamaalilluta Kalaallit Nunaanni inuussutissarsiornikkut suliniaqatigiiffiit annersaraatigut, tassami suliffeqarfiit amerlanersaannut sinniisaavugut inuussutissarsiornikkullu aningaasat kaaviiaartitat nuna tamakkerlugu 80 %-iisa missaat kaaviiaartittarlutigit. Tamatuma suliffeqarnikkut aammalu nunap naalakkersuinikkut siuttuinut oqartussaasuinullu tunngatillugu Sulisitsisut qitiusumik inissisimanissaa qulakkeerpaa.

www.sulisitsisut.gl

Name: KAS Rule of Law Program, Sub-Saharan Africa
Description:
Established in January 2006, the rule of law program was specifically mandated to promote the rule of law in Sub-Saharan Africa. The Program covers 49 African countries.

The objective of the Rule of Law Program for Sub-Saharan Africa is to contribute to the development and strengthening of effective legal and judicial systems which conform to the requirements of rule of law and can support the same.

By complementing and linking the work of the KAS country programs in the field of rule of law, this program aims at strengthening the rule of law in the individual countries, at the regional level and at the continental level through the AU by promoting networking and exchange of views and experiences among various key stakeholders.

Owing to the breadth of the subject that is the "Rule of Law", and in order to be effective, the Program focuses mainly on the promotion and protection of the "Independence of the Judiciary", "Constitutionalism", "Human Rights", "Democracy" and "Regional Integration" which we deem are essential for political stability, economic development and social cohesion.

In order to achieve its objectives, the Program implements a variety of activities in collaboration with various partners on the continent. These include but are not limited to convening of conferences, workshops, seminars and other similar fora that will bring together various stakeholders; study and information visits around the world; as well as research, analysis and publication of comprehensive reports on the subject of the rule of law.

Name: Politicsarca
Description: Hello, I am Priyabrataa Ganguly and welcome to my page "Politicsarca".  Here you will watch my independent political analysis on various topics. I hope you will love and support my page.

Name: Sole Strategies
Description:
People-Powered Politics.

Struggling to run your campaign or non-profit on a shoestring budget? We've got your back. 

We provide expert services in Campaign Fundraising. Social Media Marketing. E-mail Marketing. Field Organizing. Public Relations. and Endorsements.

Name: Data for Progress
Description:
Data for Progress is a progressive think tank that conducts research, polling, and data analysis to produce strategic insights, inform policymaking, and equip movements with the tools needed to advance a more just, equitable future. 

Our work is supported by two organizations: Data for Social Good Education Fund, its 501(c)(3), and Data for the Social Good, Inc., its 501(c)(4).

Name: MoVimento 5 Stelle
Description:
Le cinque stelle che costellano il nostro orizzonte e orientano la nostra azione sono i beni comuni, l’ecologia integrale, la giustizia sociale, l’innovazione tecnologica e l’economia eco-sociale di mercato. 
Queste stelle costituiscono i punti cardine dell’azione politica del Movimento 5 Stelle. Sono le priorità programmatiche dell’impegno civico e istituzionale dei suoi rappresentanti.

Name: Priorities USA
Description: Priorities USA runs effective, large-scale, digital voter mobilization and persuasion campaigns in key battleground states. We invest in cutting-edge research and data. We build training and tools to grow our collective, progressive power. In partnership with movement allies, we employ innovative digital strategies and empower voters.

Name: DigiDems
Description:
Digital natives working with campaigns to elect Democrats.
 
DigiDems positively impacts Democratic outcomes in the elections cycle and helps establish the next generation of campaign organizers and tech developers. We will work with federal campaigns across the country to implement best practices in the tech space and optimize the use of platforms in campaigns.

We want to recruit and train young digital organizers who are passionate about progressive politics and are committed to the future success of the Democratic party.

Bottom line. We want to have an impact in 2018, 2020 and beyond.

Name: Confesercenti Nazionale
Description:
Fondata a Roma nel 1971, la Confesercenti è una delle principali associazioni imprenditoriali del Paese ed è membro fondatore di Rete Imprese Italia. Rappresentiamo più di 350mila PMI del commercio, del turismo, dei servizi, dell’artigianato e dell’industria, capaci di dare occupazione ad oltre 1.000.000 di persone. 
Con più di 5mila addetti, 120 sedi provinciali, 20 regionali e 1000 territoriali, siamo un punto di riferimento per le imprese su tutto il territorio nazionale. La nostra missione è quella di rappresentare il mondo delle PMI che, con il loro dinamismo, danno un contributo ineguagliato al Pil e all’occupazione d’Italia. Il nostro proposito è contribuire alla crescita delle imprese e con dell’economia e allo sviluppo della democrazia, attraverso la collaborazione con le istituzioni, con le organizzazioni sociali, economiche, culturali ed umanitarie. Su questi obiettivi, la Confesercenti promuove proposte su cui coinvolge le Istituzioni e le forze sociali italiane ed europee.

Name: Danske Destinationer
Description:
Danske Destinationer er brancheorganisation for destinationsselskaberne i Danmark. De danske destinationsselskaber har hver især til formål at udvikle turismen, markedsføre destinationerne som rejsemål for turister i samspil med lokalsamfundet og bidrage til, at turismen skaber resultater lokalt, regionalt og nationalt. Og bag dem står Danske Destinationer.

Danske Destinationers medlemmer er: VisitAarhus, Destination Bornholm, Wonderful Copenhagen, Destination Fjordlandet, Destination Fyn, VisitHerning, Destination Himmerland, Destination Kystlandet, Destination Limfjorden, VisitLolland-Falster, Destination Nord, VisitNordsjælland, Destination Sjælland, Destination SydkystDanmark, Destination Sønderjylland og Destination Trekantområdet

Name: La France insoumise
Description: La France insoumise est le mouvement créé par Jean-Luc Mélenchon.

Name: Centerpartiet
Description:
The Centre Party has a strong confidence in human will and the ability to take responsibility and be a participant in society. To be able to decide for oneself, quality of life, equal opportunity and business are values that distinguish the Centre Party policy.

We prioritize work and business activity: Sweden shall be one of the countries in the world where the conditions for starting and running a company are the best. It
is important to us that it becomes more profitable and less complicated to be a company owner. We would like it to be easier to employ persons and that those who work shall retain more of their salary.

Environment: In the future it must be possible for us to swim in our seas and oceans, breath fresh air and enjoy nature. Climate changes must be taken seriously. The Centre Party would like new cars to be able to run on
alternative fuel. We would like the food we produce to be healthy and safe and that it should be easier to buy environmentally friendly products. Simply put: it should be profitable to protect our nature.

A renewed welfare: The Centre Party would like
you to be able to decide more over your daily life. It should be possible to choose healthcare, welfare and school. The family should be able to choose which type of childcare the would like to have. No child should leave school without basic reading, mathematics
and writing skills. All of the elderly should be able to decide for themselves how they wish to live and what they need help with.

The open community: Sweden shall have an open and welcoming attitude towards the surrounding world. We take a distinct position concerning openness and freedom. We take this position in order to counteract racism and foreign hostility. In a society with increased supervision we would like to stand up for personal integrity.

Name: YIMBY Action
Description: YIMBY Action is a national network of people who advocate for abundant, affordable housing and inclusive, sustainable communities across the United States. We have over 57,000 activists in our network and 50 Chapters across the country. Through our network, chapters and activists have access to education, training, and tools to advocate for housing at the local, state, and federal levels. We bring people together to help create a future where everyone has access to stable housing and opportunity.

Name: Tucker Carlson
Description: Now is time we take the power out of the hands of the elite into the hands of the people, ensuring protection from the government’s poor decisions and legislations.

Name: Club europäischer Unternehmerinnen
Description: Der Club europäischer Unternehmerinnen e.V. (CeU) hat es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht, branchenübergreifend Unternehmerinnen und Frauen in leitenden Positionen bzw. mit dem Potential für eine Führungsposition auf ihrem Weg zu unterstützen und zusammenzubringen. In diesem Zusammenhang bieten wir unseren Mitgliedern, aber auch der Wirtschaft und der Politik, einen Wissens-Pool, der durch die Erfahrungen aller Beteiligten als extrem praxisbezogen und deshalb realitätsnah bezeichnet werden kann

Name: Les Écologistes - EELV Paris
Description:
Pour toute demande de contact et d'adhésion : contact@eelv.paris. 
Pour toute demandes presse : presse@eelv.paris !

Name: BFW Nordrhein-Westfalen
Description: Stimme der mittelständischen Wohnungs- und Immobilienwirtschaft NRW

Name: Tankesmedjan Fores
Description:
Fores – Forum for Reforms, Entrepreneurship and Sustainability – is a green and liberal think tank. We want to renew the debate in Sweden with belief in entrepreneurship and opportunities for people to shape their own lives.

Market-based solutions to climate change and other environmental challenges, the long-term benefits of migration and a welcoming society, the gains of increased levels of entrepreneurship, the need for modernization of the welfare sector and the challenges of the rapidly changing digital society – these are some of the issues we are working on.

We hold seminars and roundtable discussions in town halls, parliaments and board rooms, we publish reports, books and policy papers, we put together and chair reference groups around policy issues, we participate in the media debates, and we support policy makers with relevant facts. We act as a link between curious citizens, opinion makers, entrepreneurs, policymakers and researchers, always striving for an open-minded, inclusive and thought provoking dialogue.

Learn more about us on our website www.fores.se

Name: FES Future of Work
Description:
The Brussels-based Competence Centre on the Future of Work was founded in 2021 by the Friedrich-Ebert-Stiftung.

We strive for a future of work where the benefits of digital technology are widely shared, and go hand in hand with quality jobs and social protection for all. Therefore, we pay special attention to social dialogue and regulation to ensure that the digital transformation reinforces, rather than corrodes, the European commitment to social partnership and workers´ rights.

As a think tank and policy adviser, we regularly publish papers and reports and bring together stakeholders to discuss the future of work in various formats – from roundtables and workshops to conferences and an annual Summer School. In addition, we host a Digital Archive with relevant publications, podcasts and videos, and run the fortnightly Wage Against the Machine newsletter.

The Competence Centre focuses on the following three priority areas:

- Workers rights in the Digital Age

- Inclusive Digital Transformation

- Platformisation of Work

FES Future of Work supports all FES offices and their partners, and works especially closely with the Brussels-based colleagues at FES EU Office and FES Just Climate. In our daily activities, we cooperate with a wide range of stakeholders, including trade unions, NGOs, academia and policy-makers – especially at EU level.

Name: Storefront Political Media
Description:
Storefront Political Media is a Democratic consulting firm providing the highest quality media, communications and general consulting services to campaigns and candidates throughout the country.

Founded by Eric Jaye, the firm is one of the few in the nation that brings together all aspects of political media and management — including radio, television, websites, direct mail and general consulting — to help create a disciplined political campaign that moves a simple, powerful and unifying message.

Name: Fundação Estadual de Proteção Ambiental - FEPAM
Description:
A Fundação Estadual de Proteção Ambiental Henrique Luis Roessler (FEPAM) atua como órgão técnico do Sistema Estadual de Proteção Ambiental (SISEPRA), fiscalizando, licenciando, desenvolvendo estudos e pesquisas e executando programas e projetos, com vistas a assegurar a proteção e preservação do meio ambiente no Estado no Rio Grande do Sul.

Instituída pela Lei 9.077, de 4 de junho de 1990 (data na qual comemora-se o aniversário da instituição), e implantada em 4 de dezembro de 1991, a FEPAM nasceu da necessidade de preservar os ecossistemas e otimizar a qualidade ambiental do Estado. Desde 1999, a FEPAM é vinculada à Secretaria do Meio Ambiente e Infraestrutura (SEMA). 

Foi batizada em homenagem ao pioneiro Henrique Luis Roessler, uma figura histórica do ativismo ambiental gaúcho, nascido em 16 de novembro de 1896 e falecido em 14 de novembro de 1963.

Originalmente, era parte da Coordenadoria do Controle do Equilíbrio Ecológico do Rio Grande do Sul (criada na década de 70) e do antigo Departamento de Meio Ambiente (DMA), da então Secretaria de Saúde e Meio Ambiente.

No SISEPRA, instituído pela Lei nº 10330/1994, que tem como atribuições o planejamento, implementação, execução e controle da Política ambiental do Estado, o monitoramento e a fiscalização do meio ambiente, visando preservar o seu equilíbrio e os atributos essenciais à sadia qualidade de vida, bem como promover o desenvolvimento sustentável, a FEPAM compõe como órgão executor.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Stacey Abrams for Governor
Description:
Stacey Abrams has a vision for Georgia where equality fosters prosperity, and where everyone has the opportunity to succeed – not just survive. That is why she is running for Governor of our state. 

General Election: November 8, 2022.

Name: Venstre, Norges Liberale Parti
Description: Venstre er Norges eldste politiske parti og har alltid satt folk først. Siden 1884 har Venstres utgangspunkt vært det enkelte menneskes personlige frihet og det ansvaret vi alle har for fellesskapet, for miljøet og for hverandre.

Name: Gemeente Borsele
Description:
Gemeente Borsele 
Borsele is een gemeente van contrasten. Aan de ene kant vind je het prachtige Nationaal Landschap De Zak van Zuid-Beveland, een oase van rust en natuur. Aan de andere kant is er het Sloegebied, een dynamisch industrie- en havengebied met internationale bedrijvigheid, waaronder een kerncentrale. Deze combinatie maakt Borsele bijzonder: een gemeente waar rust en natuur hand in hand gaan met bedrijvigheid en innovatie.

Borsele als werkgever
Ben jij op zoek naar een werkgever waar persoonlijke én vakinhoudelijke groei voorop staat? In een organisatie waar we ons bezighouden met uitdagingen op zowel individueel als internationaal niveau en alles daar tussenin? Met oog voor de duurzame inzetbaarheid van onze collega’s? Dan is de gemeente Borsele jouw toekomstige werkgever! Hier werk je samen met zo’n 220 enthousiaste collega’s en maak je het verschil voor de ruim 23.000 inwoners en de ondernemers. Je krijgt de ruimte om jouw talenten te ontwikkelen en echt impact te maken. Kom werken bij Borsele en draag zo bij aan een ambitieuze gemeente.

Name: TOP - The Opportunities Party
Description:
The Opportunities Party (TOP) is dedicated to unlocking opportunities for all New Zealanders.

Authorised by H. Cargo, 90 Crawford St, Dunedin 9011.

Name: re:power
Description:
We’re a team of organizers, strategists, and technologists dedicated to building transformative political power. Our work is tied to the belief that by partnering with individuals, organizations, and coalitions across the country, we can uncover leaders within communities to create radical change. 

re:power exists to build a critical mass of social justice movements and their leaders who embody the ideology and practice of liberatory organizing, an organizing practice that is pro-Black and grounded in community, collective action, and abundance.

Name: Aúna Mexico
Description: Somos una plataforma que impulsa nuevas representaciones políticas con liderazgos de mujeres, para alcanzar mayores resultados en bienestar, justicia y protección del medio ambiente.

Name: Open Knowledge Foundation Deutschland e. V.
Description:
Wir setzen uns für offenes Wissen und demokratische Teilhabe ein. Dafür entwickeln wir Technologien und Instrumente und stärken so die Zivilgesellschaft!

Wir zeigen das demokratische Potenzial von Technologie:

Digital vernetzte Technologien bringen neue Möglichkeiten, um zivilgesellschaftliche Interessen umzusetzen: Bürger*innen können ihre Rechte und Pflichten einfacher wahrnehmen und sich besser über staatliches Handeln informieren. So wird der faktenbasierte politischer Diskurs unterstützt.
Dafür entwickeln wir Software, stellen Infrastruktur bereit und fördern Open-Source-Projekte. Wir experimentieren und bieten ein Experimentierfeld für andere.

Wir setzen uns für offenes Wissen ein:

Offenes Wissen ist in einem demokratischen Staat Voraussetzung jeder Mitbestimmung, darum streben wir nach einer Welt, in der Wissen online wie offline frei verfügbar ist. Das bedeutet, dass wir Wissen nicht nur nutzen, sondern auch teilen, weiterentwickeln und verändern dürfen. Wir stärken damit eine Gemeinschaft, an der alle partizipieren können.

Wir stärken die digitale Mündigkeit und den ethischen Umgang mit Technologie:

Wir wollen unser Wissen weitergeben. Denn nur wer Technologie versteht, kann sie mitgestalten. Daher geben wir Workshops zu den unterschiedlichsten Themen wie Data Literacy, Open Data oder Offene Bildung und entwickeln zudem eigene Bildungsformate.

Wir vernetzen Menschen, die an Projekten für eine offene und gerechte Gesellschaft arbeiten:

In den vergangenen sieben Jahren haben wir in Deutschland eine Community mit Tausenden ehrenamtlich Engagierten aufgebaut. Wir unterstützen Labs, d.h. Regionalgruppen, in über 26 Städten, organisieren Konferenzen und Hackathons und bringen Vertreter*innen aus Politik und der Zivilgesellschaft zusammen.

Name: BDSV Bundesvereinigung Deutscher Stahlrecycling- und Entsorgungsunternehmen e. V.
Description:
Die BDSV vertritt die Interessen von deutschen bzw. in Deutschland tätigen Unternehmen, die in den Bereichen Stahlrecycling und weiteren Entsorgungsdienstleistungen tätig sind. Sie ist der größte Stahlrecycling-Verband in Europa. Im Mittelpunkt der Verbandsziele stehen die
ökonomischen und ökologischen Rahmenbedingungen der Recyclingwirtschaft. Die Vereinigung steht für die Erhaltung der Umwelt und die Schonung von Rohstoffreserven. Die ökologischen Ziele müssen sich allerdings in ein wirtschaftlich realistisches und wettbewerbsförderndes Umfeld einfügen lassen.

Name: Progresívne Slovensko
Description: Sme politické hnutie, ktorého cieľom je prezentovanie progresívnych riešení problémov a spájanie ľudí, ktorí túto predstavu zdieľajú.

Name: Farmakonomforeningen
Description: Political service, lobbying, innovation and development of the organization and memberservices

Name: SUMH
Description: Sammenslutningen af Unge Med Handicap (SUMH) er en politisk paraplyorganisation for og af unge med handicap. SUMHs vision er, at alle unge med handicap har mulighed for at leve det ungdomsliv, som de ønsker. Vores arbejde består først fremmest i at sikre unge med handicap  medindflydelse og repræsentation i samfundet. Det gør vi ved at styrke vores medlemsorganisationers virke, arbejde politisk og udvikle nye projekter og initiativer, der sætter unge med handicap i front, som de ressourcer de er.

Name: FDP Kanton Zürich
Description: Die FDP.Die Liberalen Kanton Zürich ist eine politische Partei mit rund 9'500 Mitgliedern, 160 Ortsparteien und 12 Bezirksparteien. Sie engagiert sich für eine funktionierende Wirtschaft, ein exzellentes Bildungssystem, eine intelligente Steuerung des Bevölkerungswachstums und eine nachhaltige Sicherung der Energieversorgung. Ihre Politik orientiert sich seit 1894 an freisinnig-liberalen Werten wie Selbstbestimmung, Eigenverantwortung, Chancengleichheit und Handlungsfreiheit.

Name: Verbraucherzentrale Bundesverband
Description:
Der Verbraucherzentrale Bundesverband (vzbv) bündelt als Dachverband die Expertise von 16 Verbraucherzentralen und mehr als 30 verbraucherpolitischen Verbänden – darunter über 2.000 Organisationen und sieben Millionen Einzelmitglieder – für einen starken Schutz der Verbraucher:innen in Deutschland.

Impressum: https://www.vzbv.de/impressum
Datenschutz: https://www.vzbv.de/datenschutzerklaerung

Name: Friedrich Naumann Para La Libertad Mexico
Description: Foundation Friedrich Naumann for Freedom Mexico works on topics such as innovation, digitization, and the open market because an innovative and open society can promote the global freedom of individuals. Development depends on the ability of people to cooperate voluntarily to transform their creativity into value for others. We work together with Mexican organizations and civil society to promote the rule of law and a stronger democracy in which human rights are defended, and where good governance is a priority.

Name: Green Party of Ireland / Comhaontas Glas
Description:
Progressive political party focused on peace, democracy, protection of the environment and our natural resources and social justice.

The Green Party is a political party formed in 1981 by a group of people interested in better planning, social justice, sustainable economic growth and protection of our natural environment. The first Green Councillor was elected in 1985 and in 1989 the Party took its first seat in the Dáil. 

The founding principles of the Party are based on peace, democracy, protection of the environment and our natural resources and social justice.

Name: Trekantområdet
Description: Trekantområdet er Danmarks produktionscentrum. Industrien er og har altid været en stærk driver i området. I dag har vi mere end 550 produktionsvirksomheder og ikke færre end 31.000 industriarbejdspladser, hvilket er mere end Århus, Odense og København tilsammen.  Vi har en urokkelig tro på, at industrien også i fremtiden har en vigtig rolle at spille. Hvis den forstår at forny sig. Og det gør den i Trekantområdet.

Name: Intelligent Energy Alliance
Description: Intelligent Energy Alliance is the central hub for all stakeholders in Denmark who are interested in the intelligent energy system of the future. Intelligent Energy is the only one of its kind, bringing together stakeholders around a shared commitment to develop solutions for a smart energy system entirely based on renewables.

Name: Conservative Environment Network
Description:
The Conservative Environment Network (CEN) is the independent forum for conservatives in the UK and around the world who support net zero, nature restoration, and resource security.

We are a broad network united around shared principles, which brings conservatives together to debate environmental issues, find consensus, and promote market-based solutions.

Like the founder of modern conservatism Edmund Burke, we believe we have a duty to protect our natural inheritance for future generations. As conservative environmentalists, we believe that man-made climate change and the decline of nature are a threat to our national prosperity and security. 

We believe only a conservative approach can unite people, grow our economy, and protect our environment.

We support science-based environmental action, which empowers individuals and harnesses the power of the free market.

Name: Fundación Friedrich Naumann para la Libertad - Países Andinos
Description: La Oficina Países Andinos de la Fundación Friedrich Naumann para la Libertad desarrolla sus actividades en Perú, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Bolivia y Venezuela. Junto con los socios de la fundación, organizaciones o individuos, se busca promover sociedades democráticas, libres y emprendedoras.

Name: IG Metall aktiv | bei Audi
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen beim IG Metall Vertrauenskörper der AUDI AG Ingolstadt.

Die IG Metall ist eine starke Gemeinschaft, sie unterstützt und bietet Rückhalt für ihre Mitglieder. Von Rechtsschutz in arbeits- und sozialrechtlichen Angelegenheiten bis zu gerechten Löhnen und Gehältern - wir kümmern uns persönlich und zuverlässig um unsere Mitglieder.
