Name: Australian Regional Tourism Ltd (ART)
Description:
Australian Regional Tourism (ART) is the peak national body representing regional tourism practitioners. 

ART acts as a hub for collaboration, cooperation, ideas generation, knowledge sharing, networking and so much more. 

ART, on behalf of its members, advocates for sustainable regional development and amplifies key messages to government, other industries and industry sectors, researchers, educators and the public.

Name: German Association for Housing, Urban and Spatial Development
Description: The German Association for Housing, Urban and Spatial Development (DV) is a neutral and non-profit platform for integrated urban development and housing. In Germany and Europe, DV is actively involved in the political and professional discourse. The association brings together policymakers and stakeholders from all sectors and levels, including politics, administration, economy, jurisprudence and scince. Accordingly, the overarching goals of the DV are the exchange of experience, the discussion and coordination of different interests, and the elaboration of new approaches and policies in urban as well as spatial development.

Name: Transitional Justice and Post-Conflict Reconstruction
Description:
The UWO Transitional Justice Club aims to be an outlet in which students can participate in the currently emerging discourse in transitional justice by engaging with leading researchers in the field. We are an academic club, affiliated with the Centre for Transitional Justice and Post-Conflict Reconciliation.

We host a plethora of events that are all centered on educating and discussing the causes, effects, and aftermath of conflicts around the world. 

Transitional Justice is an emerging field of political science concerned with the rebuilding of a country after destruction (such as genocide) through judicial and non-judicial, alternative means of justice. These alternative means incorporate everything from changes in the criminal code to post-conflict development.

Name: Warren for President
Description:
Warren for President is hiring for a wide range of positions to help Elizabeth Warren work to secure the Democratic Party’s nomination for president. 

Our team is building a grassroots movement and we need your help—organizers, communicators, writers, coders, wonks and more. If you’re ready to roll up your sleeves and work to save our democracy, join us. Let’s dream big, fight hard, and win in 2020. 

Warren for President is committed to diversity among its staff, and recognizes that its continued success requires the highest commitment to obtaining and retaining a diverse staff that provides the best quality services to supporters and constituents. Our campaign is proudly an equal opportunity employer—and we strongly encourage diverse candidates to apply.

Name: Fagforbundet
Description: Fagforbundet er landets største arbeidstakerorganisasjon med 400 000 medlemmer og er en del av LO. Vår hovedoppgave er å sikre medlemmene gode og trygge lønns- og arbeidsvilkår, og et anstendig arbeidsliv.

Name: Australian Democrats
Description: The Australian Democrats (est. 1977) are a party with a proud history and a strong track record of being the people’s watchdog in the Senate. We speak for all Australians. There is an urgent need for a moderate, balancing voice that fights for integrity and sensible evidence-informed policies. Please join us today!

Name: Landkreistag Baden-Württemberg
Description: Der Landkreistag Baden-Württemberg vertritt die 35 baden-württembergischen Landkreise. Als Kommunaler Landesverband hat er die Aufgabe, die Interessen seiner Mitglieder zu bündeln und die Anliegen der Landkreise gegenüber der Landesregierung, dem Landtag sowie anderen Institutionen und Verbänden zu vertreten. Weitere Kernaufgaben sind die Information und Beratung der Landkreise in grundsätzlichen, organisatorischen und fachlichen Fragen wie auch die Förderung der Vernetzung untereinander. Um die Selbstverwaltung der Landkreise zu erhalten und zu stärken, sind sowohl in der Landesverfassung als auch in verschiedenen Landesgesetzen Mitwirkungsrechte des Landkreistags verankert. Präsident des Landkreistags ist der Tübinger Landrat Joachim Walter, als Hauptgeschäftsführer leitet Prof. Dr. Alexis v. Komorowski die Stuttgarter Geschäftsstelle.

Name: Uddannelsesforbundet
Description:
Uddannelsesforbundet er fagforening for lærere, vejledere og konsulenter på almene og erhvervsrettede uddannelser og sprogcentre.

Forbundet blev grundlagt i 2007 som en fusion mellem Danske Produktionshøjskolers Lærerforening (DPL), Dansk Teknisk Lærerforbundet(DTL) og Landforbundet af Voksen- og Ungdomsundervidere (LVU). Fra 2018 er Handelsskolernes Lærerforening (HL) fusioneret med Uddannelsesforbundet.

Uddannelsesforbundet er medlem af Fagbevægelsens Hovedorganisation (FH) og Lærernes Centralorganisation (LC) og er partipolitisk neutralt.

Name: StudentsFirst
Description:
StudentsFirst is a national movement founded by former Washington, DC Chancellor Michelle Rhee to transform our public education system.

America's schools are failing our kids. While some people blame the kids, or simply want to throw more money at the problem, we know that real change requires a better system -- one that puts students' needs before those of special interests or wasteful bureaucracies.

Not only is reform crucial to the future of our children, it is crucial to our economy. Of 30 the industrialized countries regularly surveyed, U.S. schools rank near the bottom and are not getting better. This translates into an economic loss of over $2 trillion per year and puts the U.S. at risk for not being able to compete in our global economy.

StudentsFirst has created a gold-standard, research-based policy agenda that can serve as a roadmap for state education reform plans. To drive lasting reform, we're working with parents, teachers, administrators, and citizens across the country to demand that public officials create policies that: elevate the teaching profession by recognizing and rewarding a teacher’s impact on student success, provide access to excellent schools regardless of a child’s zip code, and ensure effective use of public dollars and accountability-based governance structures.

Go to our website and Join the Movement: www.studentsfirst.org

Name: Chunaav
Description:
ABOUT CHUNAAV

Chunaav is a leading Political Consulting firm that has been serving the Indian political arena since 2005. With our headquarters located in Gurugram, we specialize in political strategies, election management, political management, political branding, political advisory, social media management, SWOT analysis, exit polls, research tools design, field operations, and much more. Our team of professionals is highly knowledgeable in the fields of psephology, election research, politics, and data analytics.

We understand the importance of actionable insights in the field of politics, which is why we are passionate about uncovering them through various methods including survey design, door-to-door surveys, data collection & management, and research. Our team of skilled storytellers puts in an extensive effort to provide accurate results to our clients, and we believe that context is key when it comes to analysing numbers.

In addition to our expertise in election management, we also excel in political campaigning, campaign management, social media management, political communications, and corporate communications. Our passion for discovering new perspectives and approaches sets us apart in the industry, and our commitment to our clients is unwavering. Whether it's an opinion poll, exit poll, or social media management, Chunaav has the experience and skills to manage it all.

Name: The National Union of Students in Norway
Description: The National Union of Students in Norway (Norsk studentorganisasjon, or NSO in Norwegian) is the largest organisation for students in Norway. Comprising member unions from higher education institutions across the country. NSO’s goal is to ensure students’ academic, social and economic rights.

Name: Yang2020
Description:
Presidential campaign for Andrew Yang (D) in 2020, running on a campaign of Universal Basic Income and evolution to the next stage of capitalism. 

Automation is destroying American jobs much faster than our labor market can adapt and we need to enact major solutions. To learn more, visit www.yang2020.com.

Name: FieldWorks
Description:
FieldWorks brings innovative grassroots and field strategies to Democratic and progressive campaigns and organizations.

FieldWorks specializes in grassroots organizing, field development and strategic planning.

Field and Campaign Planning; Grassroots Organizing; Targeting; Canvassing; Phone Banks; Vote-by-Mail and Early Vote; Signature Gathering; Ballot Initiatives; Fraud Watch and Voter Education; GOTV; Online and SMS Organizing; Training

Name: Youth of the European People's Party (YEPP)
Description:
YEPP is the youth organisation of the European People's Party (EPP). We bring together 63 Centre-Right youth political organisations from 39 countries all over Europe. Founded in 1997, YEPP has developed into the largest political youth organisation in Europe. Apart from being active within the structures of our mother party the EPP, we are committed in a number of other international arenas. One of our main objectives is to maintain good contacts within our political family, provide ground for training, discussion and cooperation and prepare the younger generation to lead tomorrow's Europe. This runs parallel to our mission to stimulate further integration in Europe, to uphold our principles, policies and ideas in the European political debate.

EPP is the pan-European party of the center-right.  The EPP includes 73 member-parties from 40 countries, 13 EU and 7 non-EU Presidents and Prime Ministers, the Presidents of the European Commission and European Council, 13 members of the European Commission and the largest Group in the European Parliament. 

Website:        www.youthepp.eu
Facebook:     www.facebook.com/youthepp
Twitter:          @YouthEPP
Flickr:            www.flickr.com/youthepp
Youtube:       www.youtube.com/user/YouthEPP

EPP portal: http://epp.eu 
EPP Group in the European Parliament: http://europarl.epp.eu
EPP Group in the Committee of the Regions: http://cor.epp.eu
EPP Group in the Council of Europe: http://coe.epp.eu

Name: Enhedslisten
Description:
Politisk parti på Christiansborg. 
Kæmper hver dag for at trække Danmark i en grønnere og mere solidarisk retning.
Stiftet i 1989 på et grønt og socialistisk grundlag.

Name: Central City Association of Los Angeles
Description: Central City Association of Los Angeles advances policies and initiatives that enhance Downtown's vibrancy and increase opportunity in the region. Celebrating 100 years of advocacy.

Name: Dansk Handicap Forbund
Description: Dansk Handicap Forbund er en del af handicapbevægelsen og samarbejder både lokalt, nationalt og globalt. Vi tror på fællesskabets styrke og muligheder. Vi er stolte af vores traditioner og udvikler os i takt med tiden og medlemmerne, som vi har gjort det siden 1925.

Name: DDV Deutscher Dialogmarketing Verband e. V.
Description: Der Deutsche Dialogmarketing Verband ist einer der größten nationalen Zusammenschlüsse von Dialogmarketing-Unternehmen in Europa und gehört zu den Spitzenverbänden der Kommunikationswirtschaft in Deutschland. Als die treibende Kraft der Data Driven Economy repräsentiert der DDV Unternehmen, die Daten generieren oder für den professionellen datenbasierten und kundenzentrierten Dialog nutzen. Gemeinsam mit unseren Mitgliedern wollen wir substanzielle Mehrwerte durch individuelle Beziehungen zwischen Menschen, Marken und Unternehmen in einer vernetzten Welt schaffen. Schwerpunkte des Verbandsengagements sind politische Arbeit, Informationsaustausch, Qualitätssicherung und Nachwuchsförderung.

Name: Volt France
Description:
Volt France est le chapitre français de Volt Europa, le premier mouvement politique véritablement paneuropéen. Présent dans 31 pays, avec 5 eurodéputés et plus de 200 élus, Volt porte une conviction forte : les défis d’aujourd’hui (climat, économie, justice sociale, démocratie) dépassent les frontières nationales. Seule une approche européenne, fédérale et coopérative permet d’y répondre efficacement. 

Nous sommes un mouvement progressiste, écologique et fédéraliste.

 Progressistes, car nos politiques sont fondées sur les faits, la recherche et une vision tournée vers l’avenir.

 Écologistes, car la transition doit être juste, inclusive et pensée à l’échelle européenne.

 Fédéralistes, car une Union européenne plus démocratique, transparente et efficace est indispensable pour relever nos défis communs.

Contrairement aux partis traditionnels, Volt n’est pas une coalition nationale, mais un seul mouvement transnational. Nous partageons programmes, expériences et bonnes pratiques entre pays, tout en restant ancrés dans les réalités locales.

En France, nous voulons promouvoir un modèle social européen qui allie justice sociale, innovation et durabilité. Nous défendons une Europe pour tous, qui simplifie la vie des citoyens mobiles et rapproche les institutions des citoyens. Nous croyons aussi à la vitalité de tous les territoires, urbains comme ruraux, grâce à des services publics de qualité et à des mobilités durables.

Volt France est avant tout une communauté de citoyens décidés à agir. Étudiants, actifs, chercheurs, entrepreneurs, élus locaux ou simplement curieux : chacun peut participer à la construction d’un futur plus juste, plus vert et plus démocratique. 

 linktr.ee/VoltFrance

Name: Bloco de Esquerda
Description:
O partido nasceu em 1999 da aproximação de três forças políticas: a União Democrática Popular, o Partido Socialista Revolucionário e a Política XXI, às quais posteriormente se juntaram vários outros movimentos.

À época, qualquer uma delas definia-se como resultado de processos de crítica em relação ao chamado «comunismo» ou «socialismo real», mantendo a referência comunista através da reflexão e da discussão sobre a actualidade do marxismo. Membro do Secretariado Unificado da IV Internacional, o PSR herdava a tradição trotskista, oposta ao estalinismo; a UDP, marxista, apresentava-se como desligada de quaisquer referências no campo comunista internacional, posicionando-se em ruptura com todas as experiências de "socialismo real"; a Política XXI resultara, por sua vez, da união de ex-militantes do Partido Comunista Português, pelos herdeiros do MDP-CDE e por independentes. Na formação do Bloco, juntaram-se ainda pessoas sem filiação anterior, mas que já haviam mostrado identificar-se com os movimentos indicados, destacando-se, no grupo inicial, Fernando Rosas (a sua antiga filiação no PCTP-MRPP havia acabado há muito).

Desde o início, o Bloco apresentou-se como uma nova força política que não negava a sua origem nos três partidos citados e que tinha uma organização interna democrática, mais baseada na representação dos aderentes do que no equilíbrio partidário. A adesão de novos militantes, sem ligação anterior a qualquer um dos partidos originários, contribuiu para esse efeito.

Name: NATO Industrial Advisory Group (NIAG)
Description: Find all the information on the NIAG Portal.

Name: Pete for America
Description:
Pete Buttigieg is running for President in 2020. This is a now or never moment for our nation. Whether it’s a climate on the horizon of catastrophe, a gun violence epidemic, or an economy where wages are stagnant, but costs keep rising - we are running out of time to take meaningful action. These crises are years in the making, yet Washington politicians have failed to act. Pete understands the urgency of these problems as a Midwestern mayor who has seen his hometown ravaged by corporate recklessness and as a veteran who served in one of the endless post-9/11 wars. He also understands, as someone who has been on the ground turning his city around from the brink, that we need to meet this moment with fresh and bold solutions that emerge from outside Washington--solutions that unite us around our shared values, instead of driving more partisan wedges between us, and that bring everyone to the table, instead of just preaching to the choir. We’ve faced big challenges as a nation before and we came together to overcome them. We're ready to break with the past and summon the courage to once again do big things and create a better future for our country. 

Join us and help Win the Era.

Name: Foundation Max van der Stoel (FMS)
Description:
De Foundation Max van der Stoel (FMS) is een onafhankelijke buitenlandstichting gelieerd aan de PvdA. We zetten ons in voor democratisering in de buurlanden van de EU, een eerlijker Nederlands en EU-beleid ten aanzien van ontwikkelingslanden, en we stimuleren het publieke debat over deze thema's in Nederland. 

De FMS werkt vanuit een kleinschalige organisatie van vaste medewerkers en stagiairs.

Name: Axiom
Description:
Axiom is a full-service political consulting firm that specializes in general campaign strategy, direct voter contact, field strategy, political polling and analysis, media buying, campaign compliance, fundraising, opposition research, and public affairs. 

Axiom Strategies was founded by Jeff Roe in Kansas City, Missouri in 2005. Axiom Strategies expanded its footprint into every region of the country with 12 individual offices in 8 different states. Axiom Strategies has now helped to elect 10 U.S. Senators, 74 U.S. Representatives, 7 Governors, and over 700 state and local legislators. Axiom Strategies is widely recognized as the nation’s largest Republican political consulting firm.

Name: Dansk Erhverv - Personalejura
Description:
Velkommen til Dansk Erhverv Personalejura. Du kan her læse artikler og nyheder om ansættelsesret, nye domme og afgørelser, som kan få betydning for din virksomhed.

Bag sitet står Dansk Erhverv, som repræsenterer et bredt udsnit af virksomheder og brancher. Vores mission er at fremme konkurrencekraft hos vores medlemmer i en globaliseret økonomi.

Name: Mouvement Démocrate
Description:
Le Mouvement Démocrate est le parti politique créé en 2007 par François Bayrou. 
" La France est une grande nation, admirée pendant des siècles pour sa culture et ses valeurs : les droits de l'homme, la créativité artistique, la liberté de ses intellectuels… Nous avons été un pays respecté, offrant une référence à bien des populations opprimées. Les Français sont un grand peuple. Les épreuves ne l'ont pas épargné mais chaque génération a su puiser jusqu'ici dans sa foi en l'avenir et dans les valeurs de la République la fierté et le dynamisme nécessaires. Nous en sommes capables à nouveau. "

Name: Public Advocate of the U.S.
Bundesverband der Träger beruflicher Bildung (Bildungsverband) e.V.
Description:
Der Bundesverband der Träger beruflicher Bildung (Bildungsverband) e. V. – kurz: BBB – ist ein Zusammenschluss maßgeblicher Anbieter von Bildungsprogrammen in Deutschland. In seinen Mitgliedsunternehmen und -verbänden unterstützen jährlich Tausende von Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern Menschen mit qualitätsgeprüften Aus- und Weiterbildungen bei der Verbesserung ihrer beruflichen Chancen.

Ziele des Bildungsverbandes:
- Der Bildungsverband will die gemeinsamen Interessen der Träger formulieren und ihnen Geltung verschaffen.
- Insbesondere sollen die Bestrebungen der Mitglieder in unternehmens-, bildungs- und sozialpolitischen Angelegenheiten durch Information und Beratung gefördert und koordiniert werden.
- Darüber hinaus haben Mitglieder des Bildungsverbandes eine gesonderte Zweckgemeinschaft gebildet, die arbeits- und tarifrechtliche Regelungen entwickelt, um diesen Geltung zu verschaffen. Als besonders wichtig erachten die Mitglieder des BBB den regelmäßigen Dialog miteinander, auch unabhängig von aktuellen Ereignissen.

Name: Hainan Lingshui Investment Promotion Bureau
Description:
The Diao Luo Mountains and Fenjiezhou Island are just two of Lingshui’s abundance of picturesque scenic spots. Coupled with ethnic traditions from the Li, Miao and Han minorities, Lingshui County is an excellent destination for tourists looking to dive into unique architecture and lively festivals.

Lingshui is currently undergoing rapid growth and development, and its government is welcoming people who have the courage to challenge and enjoy life in this beautiful Chinese region.

Tourism
Within the region of the Sanya Tourism Circle, Lingshui are stepping up efforts to attract more tourists and provide quality services for them. So far, luxurious brands including Westin, Hilton and Marriot have chosen to become a part of Lingshui, contributing to an ecological tourism resort with a lot to offer.

Agriculture 
Lingshui’s tropical climate and quality soil make the country a home to many exotic plants and crops, high-yielding produce includes cherry tomatoes, longan and capsicum chinense. In order to inspire progressive agricultural technologies, Lingshui has established the largest modern agricultural demonstration in Hainan province – contributing to the development of innovative agricultural science and technology.

Industry
With the vision of promoting rapid industrial development without sacrificing its healthy living environment, Lingshui encourages the use of green technologies across the county.

An open-door policy combined with abundant natural resources is leading to Lingshui becoming a rapidly developing region in China. We welcome and embrace visitors and investors from around the world to experience our growing tourist, high-tech and organic agriculture industries, making Lingshui a uniquely flavoured seaside city!

 >>Weolcome to Lingshu! Welcome to Hainan!Welcome to China<<

Name: North Carolina Republican Party
Description: On March 27, 1867, the North Carolina Republican Party was founded, and ever since has worked tirelessly to encourage and promote Conservative values by means of education, various forms of activism, and grassroots efforts. The North Carolina Republican Party supports Conservative ideas and strives to implement the freedoms outlined in both the North Carolina Constitution as well as the US Constitution, which the party believes should never be restrained.

Name: Verein Klimaschutz Schweiz / Association suisse pour la protection du climat
Description: Der Verein Klimaschutz Schweiz arbeitet darauf hin, dass die Schweiz eine wirkungsvolle und faire Klimapolitik verfolgt. Zu diesem Zweck lanciert er die Gletscher-Initiative. Begleitend baut er eine Bürger*innen-Bewegung auf und sorgt mit seiner Öffentlichkeitsarbeit für eine Verbreitung der nötigen Information rund um den Klimawandel.

Name: Regional Programme - KAS PolDiSSA
Description:
Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS) is a political foundation named after the first Chancellor of the Federal Republic of Germany, Konrad Adenauer (1876-1967). In accordance with the guidelines under European and International Cooperation, KAS promotes democracy, freedom and the rule of law, aligning with Germany's growing responsibility in the world. 

Globally, KAS has more than 78 offices and runs programs in over 100 countries; the Regional Programme – Political Dialogue for Sub-Saharan Africa (PolDiSSA) supports policy discussions and exchange between different regions and stakeholders across state institutions, political parties, civil society organizations and youth. 

PolDiSSA was specifically launched to strengthen political dialogue with and within Africa. Our programmes and initiatives include E-Lection Bridge Africa, the KAS School for Young Politicians (KASYP) and the African Policy Circle (APC), organised in collaboration with our partners.

Name: Arbeitnehmerkammer Bremen
Description:
Für eine gerechte Arbeitswelt - das ist seit inzwischen 100 Jahren unser Leitmotiv. Wir setzen uns mit unserer täglichen Arbeit dafür ein, unseren Mitgliedern gegenüber Politik und Wirtschaft eine Stimme zu geben - also den rund 400.000 Menschen, die ihren Arbeitsplatz in Bremen oder Bremerhaven haben. Wir zeigen auf, an welchen Stellen 'Gute Arbeit' noch nicht funktioniert, wir schlagen Lösungen vor und fordern Verbesserungen ein.

Wir machen jährlich rund 100.000 Beratungen zum Arbeitsrecht, zum Sozialversicherungsrecht, zu steuerrechtlichen Fragen, oder zur Berufsunfähigkeit. Auch Betriebs- und Personalräte unterstützen wir bei ihrer Arbeit. Außerdem bieten wir mit unserer Bildungstochter wisoak ein großes Weiterbildungsprogramm mit Seminaren, Workshops und Bildungszeiten (Bildungsurlauben).

Name: University of Toronto Students' Union
Description:
Founded in 1901, the University of Toronto Students’ Union (UTSU) is the official student government for more than 38,000 students at the University of Toronto. If you’re a full-time undergraduate student at the St. George Campus, you’re automatically a member of the UTSU. As a student government and independent not-for-profit organization, we operate autonomously from the University of Toronto administration. We strive to be a democratic, accessible, and member-driven organization, and all of our work is done with a strong commitment to equity.

Your student representatives are elected each year as executives or directors to the UTSU Board of Directors. The Executive Committee, which consists of the President and five Vice-Presidents, reports to the Board of Directors.

The UTSU works for you in many ways, but primarily through advocacy, events, and programs and services. We advocate for you by regularly lobbying the government and university, organizing public education campaigns, and supporting student-led initiatives. We organize major events for students, including Orientation/U-Fest, Frost Week, Unity Ball, Pasta Night, and more. And most importantly, we offer programs and services such as the Food Bank (offered every Friday at the UofT Multi-Faith Centre), the Student Aid Program, the Tax Clinic, our clubs funding program, the Resource Bank for student groups, and of course, the UTSU Health & Dental Plan.

Welcome to the UTSU. We’re here to serve you, and we’d love for you to get involved. Please email either a member of the Executive Committee or your local representative (Board Director) to get involved with us!

Name: New York State Democratic Committee
Description: Governing body of the New York State Democratic Party.

Name: Young Fine Gael
Description: Young Fine Gael is the youth wing of the Fine Gael party and is one of the few vehicles for young people to seek political change in this country. YFG is an autonomous youth organisation, it has the advantage of embodying the values of the Fine Gael Party, while maintaining the independence to express views of young people. Our membership ranges in age between 15 and 35, but we are also proud of our alumni, many of whom have excelled in their chosen professions.

Name: Deutscher Kulturrat e.V.
Description: The Deutscher Kulturrat e.V. (DKR) is the umbrella organization of the German art and culture, media and creative associations. He is the counterpart for the politics and administration of the federal government, the federal states and the European Union in all cultural policy matters that overlap the individual branches (sections) of the Deutscher Kulturrat. The aim of the Deutscher Kulturrat is to stimulate cultural policy discussion at all political levels and to advocate freedom of the arts, publications and information.

Name: Ministerium für Wirtschaft, Verkehr, Landwirtschaft und Weinbau Rheinland-Pfalz
Dansk Erhverv - Klima, Energi & Miljø
Description: Dansk Erhverv arbejder for, at Danmark ikke bare bliver verdens bedste land at drive virksomhed i, men også verdens bedste til grøn omstilling. Derfor arbejder vi for at skabe gode rammevilkår for dansk erhvervsliv inden for klima-, energi- og miljøområdet.

Name: European Democrat Students
Description:
European Democrat Students (EDS) is a pan-European centre-right student and youth political association, and the official student organisation of the European People's Party (EPP). 

Founded in Vienna by Scandinavian, German and Austrian students in 1961, it represents over 1.600.000 students and young people in more than 40 member organisations from 35 countries in Europe, and is the largest youth organisation in Europe.

Today, EDS grew into a large family which has an outlook that is various, rich and unique, represented by the name 'Democrat': Here, student organisations, political youth organisations and other centre-right organisations come together to shape modern centre-right policies for Europe.

Facebook: www.facebook.com/edsnet.eu
Twitter: @edsnet

Name: Toronto Foundation for Youth Involvement in Politics (TFYIP)
Description:
The TFYIP is a non-profit corporation focussed on getting youth more engaged in politics through our youth political engagement institute and the TFYIP Youth Issues Forum event programming! 

To become a youth member, please refer to our website for further information: www.tfyip.org for more information. 

Our Founders Javon Samuel and Viktor Elias always had a passion for youth voices empowerment and by starting the TFYIP, they feel this organization is a great first step in getting there.

Name: European Commission Trainees' Committee
Description:
The Trainees' Committee (TC) represents the trainees working at the European Commission and is elected at the beginning of each traineeship.
 
The Trainees' Committee plays two roles. First, it acts as a facilitator for all trainees between them and external parties like the Traineeships Office (TO), the Directorate-Generals (DG) and other partners. Secondly, it provides trainees with the opportunity to enhance their traineeship experience by socialising and spending their free time with other stagiaires through the coordination of different subcommittees.
 
The subcommittees are created by the trainees and differ from session to session. They cover areas such as sports, culture, careers, charity and entertainment.
 
The TC also is in contact with external bodies and individuals in order to bring events and activities to life. These include amongst others: EU institutions officials, venue managers, sponsors, travel agents, food/drink suppliers and media managers.
 
The Committee consists of five members with specific functions. However, we work together as a team to achieve the best results for the trainees. 

These members are doing this on a volunteer basis with no extra allowance or privileges. However, they might have an advantage on the selection for the Liaison Committee done by the TO.

Name: Grossman Solutions
Description: Grossman Solutions is a public affairs firm specializing in campaigns and advocacy, based in Hartford, CT and Washington, DC. We partner with our clients -- nonprofits, labor unions, political campaigns and progressive organizations -- to make positive change through advocacy, grassroots mobilization, executive search, and strategic advising. Our work is firmly rooted in our commitment to equity, integrity and getting the job done.

Name: ZDS - Zentralverband der deutschen Seehafenbetriebe
Description:
ZDS represents the German port industry. As a federation of state-level associations and with 170 member companies, ZDS strives to further improve the competitiveness of German seaport operators. ZDS engages German, EU and international stakeholders in economic, commercial, social and wage policy matters, and provides advice and information to its members. ZDS is a member of FEPORT, UNISTOCK and the Logistics Alliance of Germany.

The German seaport operators:

•	170 companies in 21 locations 
•	serve more than a 120,000 ships per year
•	handle more than two thirds of German seaborne foreign trade
•	turn over about 300 m tonnes of cargo of all kinds, including 3.7 m cars and trucks, almost 16 m containers, 24 m tonnes of grain, oil seeds and animal feed as well as 38 m tonnes of coal, gas, oil and oil products
•	secure jobs for up to 500,000 people throughout Germany

To contribute successfully to the German economy, port operators require

•	an efficient transportation network
•	optimised regulatory policy and public administration
•	competitive environment and energy policy
•	secure ports
•	fair wage and social policy

Name: Kerala Pravasi Association
Description:
The expatriate people, (widely known as "Pravasi") from Kerala, are the key contributors to the state's economic growth. The NRI deposits in the banks in Kerala have crossed the Rs 2 lakh crore as of Dec 2019.  As of 2020, Kerala emigrants abroad are at 2.12 million, works out to a little more than 6% of the population.

None of the Government in Kerala or the mainstream Political parties has taken any steps to ensure the welfare of the Pravasi's, rehabilitate the returnees,  utilise the investments for the state's development while ensuring a stable income for the returning Pravasi's or harnessing the knowledge and skills of the returning Pravasi's for the development of Kerala.  

The well-known  international expertise & experience in various fields of the professional returnees from overseas & outside Kerala are not at all reutilised the development of the State mainly due to the ignorance towards Pravasi's by the existing system. 

Kerala Pravasi Association (KPA) was formed by a group of like minded Pravasi's to achieve the following objectives
-  Self-reliant & self-sufficient Kerala
-  Welfare of the Pravasi's & Rehabilitation of returning Pravasi's
-  Harness the potential,international expertise & experience of Pravasi's for the future of the state
-  Create and implement a 10 year plan to build a new Kerala from pravasi perspective, free of corruption, free medical for each upto to 5 lakhs, clean water, free education, Home for all, world class infrastructure development in all sectors includnig Power, Transportation, Water and Sewage, Industry, Telecommunications, Waste & Reclying, Leisure and Property etc
-  Transform KPA into a mainstream political party in the near future
If you are from Kerala or have some association  join, get involved and support us, spread KPA's vision by inviting your friends, support our initiative to ensure Home, food & water for all, Free education & Medical and be part of our development projects.

Let's build a new Kerala

Name: Michigan Republican Party
Description:
I'm a Republican Because...

I BELIEVE the strength of our nation lies with the individual and that each person’s dignity, freedom, ability and responsibility must be honored.

I BELIEVE in equal rights, equal justice and equal opportunity for all, regardless of race, creed, sex, age or disability.

I BELIEVE free enterprise and encouraging individual initiative have brought this nation opportunity, economic growth and prosperity.

I BELIEVE government must practice fiscal responsibility and allow individuals to keep more of the money they earn.

I BELIEVE the proper role of government is to provide for the people only those critical functions that cannot be performed by individuals or private organizations, and that the best government is that which governs least.

I BELIEVE the most effective, responsible and responsive government is government closest to the people.

I BELIEVE Americans must retain the principles that have made us strong while developing new and innovative ideas to meet the challenges of changing times.

I BELIEVE Americans value and should preserve our national strength and pride while working to extend peace, freedom and human rights throughout the world.

FINALLY, I believe the Republican Party is the best vehicle for translating these ideals into positive and successful principles of government.

Republican candidates across Michigan offer voters real change, from lowering taxes, to reforming government, to fostering more investment and jobs growth. That's real change that Michigan needs today

Name: Verband 3DDruck e.V.
Description: Der Verband 3DDruck besteht aus Experten, Innovatoren und Unternehmern, die sich in der Entwicklung der Additiven Fertigung in Deutschland und Europa engagieren. Im Interesse unserer Mitglieder und Partner setzen wir durch Vernetzung und in enger Kooperation mit der Politik Impulse in der Additiven Fertigung.

Name: Physicians for Reproductive Health
Description:
Physicians for Reproductive Health unites the medical community and concerned supporters. Together, we work to improve access to comprehensive reproductive health care, including contraception and abortion, especially to meet the health care needs of economically disadvantaged patients.

•	We bring the physician’s distinctive voice to debates over reproductive health care
•	We provide leadership and tools so that physicians can speak up and take action
•	We use scientific expertise and our patients’ real-life experiences to influence legislation,medical practice, and public opinion
•	We advocate for reproductive health as a core part of all medical curricula
•	We provide leadership and tools so that physicians can speak up and take action
•	We offer the strength of our network to physicians all over the world

Name: UNOS - Unternehmerisches Österreich
Description:
Wir sind eine junge, engagierte Bewegung aus der Mitte der Gesellschaft: Unternehmer:innen, die Wirtschaftspolitik aktiv mitgestalten und die Wirtschaftskammer zu einer leistungsorientierten Interessenvertretung machen wollen. Eine Vertretung, die ihre Mitglieder begeistert – nicht durch Zwangsbeiträge bei der Stange hält.
 
WOFÜR WIR STEHEN
 Unternehmertum fördern – weniger Bürokratie, mehr Freiheit
 Innovation ermöglichen – statt Regulierung aus dem letzten Jahrhundert
 Mitgliedern dienen – serviceorientiert und transparent
 
UNSERE FORDERUNGEN
- Bürokratische Hemmnisse abschaffen: Freie Bahn für neue Geschäftsbereiche ohne Mehrfachgewerbescheine.
- Transparenz schaffen: Alle Budgets der Wirtschaftskammer offenlegen und indirekte Parteienfinanzierung stoppen.
- Rahmenbedingungen verbessern: Unternehmerfreundliche Regeln für nationalen und internationalen Wettbewerb.
 
UNSER BILD VON UNTERNEHMERTUM
Unternehmer:innen sind nicht die Klassenfeinde, sondern die Gestalter:innen, Innovator:innen und Arbeitgeber:innen unseres Landes. Sie verdienen Wertschätzung für Mut, Risiko und Einsatz – und die besten Bedingungen, um erfolgreich zu sein.
 
UNSER ZIEL
Wir wollen die Wirtschaftskammer ins 21. Jahrhundert führen: Weg von einem schwerfälligen, bürokratischen Apparat, hin zu einem modernen Dienstleister für Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer. Mit voller Transparenz, Freiheit statt Bevormundung und echter Mitgliederorientierung. 

 Du willst mitgestalten? Dann komm zu einer unserer Veranstaltungen für Mitglieder und Interessierte:
 www.unos.eu/events
 
 Und bleib up-to-date mit unserem Newsletter für Unternehmer:innen: www.unos.eu/mitmachen/newsletter

Name: Les Indépendants - République et Territoires
Description:
Le Groupe "Les Indépendants - République et Territoires" a été créé en 2017. Présidé par Claude Malhuret, il est composé de 19 Sénateurs.

"Notre Groupe tire sa force de sa diversité et de sa cohérence. Nos Sénateurs représentent des territoires métropolitains et ultramarins, urbains et ruraux. Issus de différents horizons politiques, ils sont réunis par la conviction qu’une ligne politique libérale, sociale et européenne peut et doit être défendue au Sénat afin d’accompagner les grandes réformes du Gouvernement lorsqu’elles sont justes et efficaces. Les Sénateurs de notre Groupe ne sont pas seulement des hommes et des femmes politiques. Ce sont des élus de terrain, forts d’une expérience professionnelle et pratique. Ce sont des avocats, médecins, agriculteurs et enseignants. Leurs domaines de compétences et leurs intérêts nourrissent l’action de notre Groupe et contribuent à la rédaction et au dépôt de propositions d’amendements et de lois. Surtout, les membres de ce Groupe forment une équipe soudée. Chacun y est libre de son vote en toute liberté. C’est la marque de fabrique des Indépendants. C’est aussi le fondement de notre action parlementaire à la fois humaniste et réformiste. Nous avons la conviction qu’une ligne politique libérale, humaniste et européenne doit être défendue au Sénat"

Name: GreenPAC
Description: A non-partisan organization to build environmental leadership in Canadian politics. GreenPAC allows Canadians who care about the environment to support political candidates who represent their values. Making environmental concerns politically relevant by recruiting, nominating, electing and supporting environmental champions.

Name: BDG Berufsverband Deutscher Geowissenschaftler
Description:
Der BDG Berufsverband Deutscher Geowissenschaftler e.V. ist seit über 35 Jahren die berufliche Interessenvertretung in den Bereichen Geologie, Geophysik, Mineralogie und weiteren Geowissenschaften der festen Erde in Deutschland. Neben der Sicherung der beruflichen Position und Interessen seiner Mitglieder sowie des geowissenschaftlichen Nachwuchses bietet der BDG eine Fülle von Serviceleistungen und Informationen.

Neben der Interessenvertretung der Geowissenschaftlerinnen und Geowissenschaftler gegenüber Politik, Öffentlichkeit und anderen Berufsgruppen bietet der BDG z.B. auch Infos aus der Geo-Branche und vergbit die Titel "Beratender Geowissenschaftler BDG", "Qualitätsgeprüfte Firma Geophysik" sowie "European Geologist".

Name: Indian National Congress Uttarakhand
Description: Indian National Congress is the oldest political party committed to serve the people of India.

Name: ANEV Association Nationale des Élus de la Vigne et du Vin
Description:
L’ANEV est née le 15 juin 1999.
Michel Grégoire, alors député de la 3ème circonscription de la Drôme et technicien agricole, ainsi qu’une vingtaine de parlementaires de circonscriptions viticoles, déploraient l’absence d’un réseau d’élus pour représenter les territoires de la vigne et du vin.

S’inspirant d’autres associations d’élus au service des territoires, comme l’Association Nationale des Elus de la Montagne (ANEM) ou l’Association des Maires Ruraux de France (AMRF), ces élus ont alors décidé de fonder l’ANEV : l’Association Nationale des Élus de la Vigne et du Vin.

Aujourd’hui, l’ANEV constitue le réseau des élus du vin, dépassant tous clivages politiques et géographiques. Elle regroupe plusieurs centaines d’adhérents, dont une grande majorité de communes et d’intercommunalités viticoles, ainsi qu’une centaine de parlementaires nationaux et européens, des régions et des départements.

Cela fait donc désormais 25 ans que l’ANEV se mobilise avec succès pour valoriser et défendre les territoires viticoles. Associée à de nombreux combats du monde vitivinicole, elle se positionne comme un espace de réflexion sur la place du vin dans notre société. Au cours de ces dernières années, elle a fait preuve de son utilité pour obtenir des victoires significatives pour la vigne, le vin et leurs territoires.

Name: Pierre Poilievre Group
Description: Pierre Poilievre group is an anti corruption group based out of the Ottawa Carleton federal riding in Canada.

Name: Partido Liberal Progresista
Description:
Somos un partido político de Costa Rica que cree en la libertad como la única vía para lograr el progreso óptimo en el ámbito social, económico e individual. Adoptamos la doctrina liberal de tradición costarricense, que siempre tuvo como norte el equilibrio entre la labor del Estado, el sector privado, el respeto al Estado de derecho y promoción de la libertad económica e individual.

El liberalismo progresista es la renovación de las ideas de la libertad!

El PLP es un partido que surge de la necesidad de rescatar los valores liberales que caracterizan a nuestra democracia y a la república costarricense. Se forma mediante el aporte de distintos intelectuales y formadores de opinión que, motivados por las dificultades de nuestro país, deciden pasar de las ideas a los hechos y fundar la Plataforma Liberal Progresista, que posteriormente se convertiría en el Partido Liberal Progresista. Es así como el 27 de febrero del 2016, la libertad tiene casa nuevamente.

Name: Liberalerna
Description: Liberalerna är Sveriges liberala parti. Tillsammans ser vi till att Sverige blir möjligheternas land för alla.

Name: Libertà nel Tricolore
Description: Consideriamo il TRICOLORE la massima espressione dell’identità nazionale, della difesa dei principi di Libertà ed emblema simbolo del POPOLO ITALIANO.

Name: Alliance for Youth Action
Description: The Alliance for Youth Action unites America's unstoppable young people. We are a national network of local organizations building a progressive youth power to strengthen our democracy, fix our economy, and correct injustices through on the ground organizing. Of Young People. By Young People. For All People.

Name: Dansk Håndværk
Description:
Dansk Håndværk er arbejdsgiverforeningen for små og mellemstore håndværksvirksomheder indenfor træ- og træindustri, byggeri, møbelproduktion og -reparation, snedker-, tømrer-, VVS- og trævirksomheder samt en lang række andre håndværksvirksomheder indenfor andre brancher i Danmark.
 
Vi indgår overenskomst på området, og vores målsætning er klar - at sikre vores medlemsvirksomheder de bedst mulige arbejdsbetingelser og vilkår at drive virksomhed under.

Læs mere om Dansk Håndværk på www.dhv.dk.
Kontakt os på tlf. 32 63 04 70 - vi er aldrig længere væk end ét telefonopkald.

Name: Inverclyde Chamber of Commerce
Description:
Welcome to the Inverclyde Chamber of Commerce – Champion of local businesses, providing services to improve business representation, networking, awareness and performance.

Inverclyde Chamber of Commerce (ICC) has been the influential voice of business in Inverclyde since we received our Royal Charter in 1813. Today, 200 years on, we are continuing to provide valuable services along with a range of initiatives to businesses of all sizes.

ICC regularly represents Inverclyde business interests, and has formed key alliances with business leaders, trade associations, government agencies, enterprise bodies and other chambers to ensure representation for our members at all levels. We ensure a continued board presence on Riverside Inverclyde and Inverclyde Alliance as well as with organisations the Chamber has been instrumental in initiating over the years, including Discover Inverclyde and the Inverclyde Construction Forum.

We consult regularly with members and work pro-actively with Scottish Government, Westminster, Inverclyde Council and Scottish Chamber of Commerce, to ensure that the issues driving economic activity and growth, and any barriers threatening our national and global competitiveness, are prioritised on the political agenda.

The need for a strong voice to represent Inverclyde business has never been greater. ICC is a dynamic member-led organisation, completely independent and not for profit with one straightforward objective – to support the local business community and specifically our strong network of member businesses.

By joining a Chamber of Commerce your company automatically becomes part of Scotland’s largest business organisation, with access to an unrivaled range of services, support and advice to aid your development and growth. With membership starting from less than £100 why not join online today and be part of building the success of Inverclyde and our business community.

Contact: seo@inverclydechamber.co.uk 
Telephone: 01475806824

Name: National Resistance Front of Afghanistan
Description: National Resistance Front of Afghanistan is a liberation movement to defeat terrorism and to establish a democratic and pluralistic Afghanistan where all citizens enjoy equal rights, regardless of their gender, religious beliefs and ethnicity.

Name: Arise South Africa Political Party
Description:
2024 is our 1994 
 Our vision is to ignite a Flourishing Tomorrow for All of South Africa.

At ARISE SOUTH AFRICA Party, we envision a future where every corner of our nation radiates with hope, prosperity, and unity, fueled by the transformative power of technology. We strive for a South Africa where the shackles of inequality, corruption, and despair have been shattered, replaced by boundless opportunities, unwavering justice, and a vibrant democracy powered by innovation. Our vision is to empower every citizen to realize their full potential in a tech-driven society, to nurture a culture of digital advancement where diversity is celebrated, and to lead South Africa to stand tall as a beacon of progress and technological excellence on the global stage.

Our mission is to catalyze Positive Change Through Purposeful Action in a Tech-Driven Landscape. 

The mission of ARISE SOUTH AFRICA Party is to champion a radical transformation of our country through decisive and purposeful action, harnessing the incredible potential of technology as a driving force. We are committed to dismantling the barriers that hinder progress, confronting the challenges that have held us back, and nurturing an environment where innovation, digital literacy, and collaboration thrive. With unwavering dedication, we will restore the integrity of our institutions, cultivate a culture of ethical governance in the digital age, and drive the resurgence of our economy through technological innovation. By mobilizing communities, harnessing the collective power of our people, and fostering transparent leadership, we are steadfast in our pursuit of a revitalized, tech-driven South Africa that stands as a testament to unity, resilience, and boundless technological prowess.

Name: Jim Oberweis for Congress | FL-19
Description:
Jim Oberweis is running for Congress in Florida’s 19th District to protect our values, secure the border, and keep Southwest Florida great.

A successful businessman and lifelong conservative, Jim is a proven leader who knows what it takes to create jobs, balance a budget, and defend American freedoms. With decades of experience and a deep commitment to service, he’s stepping up to bring common-sense leadership back to Washington.

 Fighting for our families and our freedoms
 Standing strong with President Trump
 Putting America — and Florida — First

Join the movement to take back our country.

Name: Illustratoren Organisation e.V.
Description:
Wir gestalten unseren Beruf
Unsere Ziele bestimmen unser Handeln

Die Illustratoren Organisation e.V. (IO) ist der einzige Berufsverband für Illustrator*innen in Deutschland. Unsere Mitglieder arbeiten in allen Bereichen der professionellen Illustration. Als starke Gemeinschaft vertreten wir wirkungsvoll unsere wirtschaftlichen, politischen und künstlerischen Interessen gegenüber Politik und Verwertern.

Dabei sind wir keine bürokratische oder anonyme Institution, sondern ein lebendiger Interessensverband, gegründet von Illustrator*innen, die erkannt haben, dass wir als Einzelne nur wenig bewirken können, um unsere Gesamtsituation zu verbessern. Zusammen jedoch haben wir durch Größe und Gemeinschaft eine starke Stimme. Eine Stimme die mit unserem steten Wachstum immer lauter wird: Wir sind mittlerweile über 2.000 qualifizierte und engagierte Kollegen und Kolleginnen!

Name: Operation Black Vote
Description: At its core Operation Black Vote exists to ensure we have greater racial justice and equality throughout the UK. OBV works specifically, but not exclusively, within the democratic and civic framework to deliver its objectives.

Name: Efterskolerne
Description:
Efterskolerne gør en forskel for unge og for samfundet. Hvert år bliver over 30.000 unge en del af fællesskabet på en af landets 242 efterskoler.

Formand: Torben Vind Rasmussen
Direktør: Bjarne Lundager Jensen

Name: Bayerischer Gemeindetag
Description: Der Bayerische Gemeindetag ist der Kommunale Spitzenverband der kreisangehörigen Städte, Märkte und Gemeinden, Verwaltungsgemeinschaften, Zweckverbände und kommunal beherrschten juristischen Personen im Freistaat Bayern. Er ist der mitgliederstärkste Kommunale Spitzenverband in Bayern und in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland. Auf dieser Seite informieren wir Sie über unsere Arbeit und unsere Positionen. Wir freuen uns, wenn Sie uns folgen!

Name: Business Region Aarhus
Description:
Business Region Aarhus unites 12 ambitious municipalities in East Jutland in a strong political partnership. Our primary objective is to create the best possible conditions for businesses to thrive.

As Denmark’s largest growth area outside the capital, we drive progress that benefits the entire country. Together, we are shaping a greener, smarter and more competitive East Jutland.

Name: Quebec Student Union
Description:
The mission of the Quebec Student Union is to defend the rights and interests of the student community by promoting, protecting and improving the condition of students and the local and international communities. 

The QSU has 91,000 members, from 10 university student associations, across Quebec.

Name: Hessischer Industrie- und Handelskammertag (HIHK)
Description:
Was für Hessens Wirtschaft in der Landespolitik wichtig ist und wichtig wird. // Der Hessische Industrie- und Handelskammertag (HIHK) ist die landespolitische Dachorganisation der 10 Industrie- und Handelskammern (IHKs). 

Alle hessischen Unternehmen – ausgenommen Handwerksbetriebe, freie Berufe und landwirtschaftliche Betriebe – sind per Gesetz Mitglied einer IHK. Folglich spricht der HIHK für mehr als 400.000 Unternehmen aller Größen und Branchen in Hessen. 

Der HIHK bündelt das Gesamtinteresse der gewerblichen Wirtschaft in Hessen, sorgt für die Erreichung eines gemeinsamen Standpunktes und vertritt diesen gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung, Gerichten und Öffentlichkeit sowie dem Deutschen Industrie- und Handelskammertag (DIHK). Dafür hält der HIHK enge Kontakte zur Landesregierung, dem Landtag und allen wichtigen Akteuren auf Landesebene. Darüber hinaus stellt der HIHK sicher, dass die Standpunkte der hessischen IHKs auch in der öffentlichen Wahrnehmung stärker zur Geltung kommen.

Der HIHK informiert und berät die Landesregierung in ihren Gesetzesvorhaben. Zudem unterstützt er die hessischen Industrie- und Handelskammern auch organisatorisch, koordiniert den Erfahrungsaustausch untereinander und erzeugt Synergien.

Name: Global Student Forum
Description: As the umbrella organisation of the world’s major representative, independent and democratic student unions, GSF defends the educational, cultural, economic and social interests of more than 300 million learners worldwide in the decision making spaces of the international community. Our multi-level democratic governance structure spanning from the local to the international level, ensures legitimate representation of constituency interests and accountability of the organisation’s political leadership.

Name: Fachverband Gebäude-Klima e. V. (FGK)
Description: In seiner mehr als 50-jährigen Geschichte entwickelte sich der Fachverband Gebäude-Klima e. V. (FGK) zum führenden Branchenverband der deutschen Klima- und Lüftungswirtschaft. In dieser Funktion vertritt der FGK die Interessen seiner Mitglieder gegenüber den Marktpartnern, der Politik, der Wirtschaft, den Normungsinstitutionen und der Wissenschaft. Mit einer intensiven politischen Kommunikation nimmt der Verband Einfluss auf ordnungsrechtliche Vorgaben sowie auf Normen aus dem relevanten Bereich der Technischen Gebäudeausrüstung. Die ca. 300 Mitglieder des FGK beschäftigen rund 49.000 Mitarbeiter und erwirtschaften einen Umsatz von etwa 7,1 Milliarden Euro pro Jahr.

Name: Bryggeriforeningen / Danish Brewers’ Association
Description:
Bryggeriforeningen er en brancheorganisation og fælles talerør for bryggerier og tapperier i Danmark. Vi varetager og formidler medlemmernes interesser overfor Folketinget, myndighederne, medierne og den øvrige offentlighed. Blandt andet når det gælder erhvervs-, miljø-, fødevare- og sundhedspolitik.

Bryggeriforeningen repræsenterer også medlemmerne i organisationer, som internationalt arbejder for at fremme øl- og læskedrikbranchens interesser.

Vi gennemfører initiativer og kampagner for en fornuftig alkoholkultur i ungdomsmiljøer, hvor øl som et lavalkoholdigt produkt kan indgå i moderate mængder. Kampagnerne er rettet mod både de unge og deres forældre.

Bryggeriforeningen arbejder desuden på at skabe øget kendskab til øl som del af en sund og naturlig livsstil – et naturligt produkt med rod i stolte, danske traditioner og håndværk samt en vigtig del af den danske kulturhistorie.

Name: Riforma e progresso
Description: Riforma e Progresso is a progressive, transversal, pro-European, democratic and constitutionalist liberal party. We want to be the moderate, liberal and centre-right wing of Italy, and represent all the Italians who recognize themselves in our principles and who are currently without any political movement in which to reflect themselves and in whom to trust and be represented (especially in these dark years of populism and extremism). Our policies are wide-ranging and transversal, many of which are so important and so desired by many Italians, that it doesn't matter what political affiliation they are, the important thing is to implement them! We are the alternative that all Italians have been waiting for. Members and supporters of the party recognize themselves in progressive liberal ideals and social freedom, asserting the principles of meritocracy, transparency, common sense, free thought, mutual respect, social responsibility, education, innovation, work, pursuit of social welfare and trust in the State, economic growth, environmental protection, equitable use of natural resources, pursuit of happiness and well-being of all individuals, as supreme regulators and inspirers of every public and private activity. They also argue that society must protect freedom and equal opportunities for all citizens by encouraging mutual collaboration between the state and the market through liberal institutions.

Name: Nyt Europa (NE)
Description:
NE is a non-profit organisation working with the European community. We believe that the EU can play a central role in ensuring a democratic and sustainable world — one that maintains economic, social, environmental, and demographic balance.

We believe in democracy that transcends national borders — in a European Union and a world built on sustainable democracies, both formal and informal. Citizen-driven deliberative democracy is at the heart of NE. We work to complement national democracies with a European, and in time also a global, democracy.

A well-functioning European democracy is not only about well-functioning institutions; it is also about ensuring a vibrant democracy in which we, as citizens, take part in developing shared solutions to shared challenges.

NE was founded in 1997 as an association, and anyone who is interested and shares our core values is welcome to become a member. NE is an association, a forum for debate, and a driver of change.

Name: Ayuntamiento de Guadalajara, Jalisco
Description: Gobierno Municipal

Name: SF - Socialistisk Folkeparti
Description:
SF er et dansk venstreorienteret politisk parti dannet i 1959. Partiet har siddet i Folketinget siden 1960.
Der findes omkring 100 lokale partiforeninger af SF rundt om i Danmark og partiet har politikere valgt ind i de fleste kommuner og alle regionsråd i landet.

Det ideologiske fundament er folkesocialisme, inspireret af demokratisk socialisme og grøn politik.
SF er medlem af Den Grønne Gruppe (G/EFA) i Europaparlamentet.

Name: This Is ReFrame
Description:
ReFrame builds narrative power to win. 
We invest in people — strategists, creatives, leaders, and dreamers — developing the skills, acumen, and networks we need to advance just narratives at scale.  

We use powerful technology to understand narratives across society in real time, gain strategic insight, and forecast arising opportunities to advance just narratives. 

We develop strategies, curate stories and mobilize networks to advance narratives that light the way to justice, liberation, healing and freedom for all people and the Earth.

This Is Signals, a visionary project of ReFrame, ingests, digests, and dissects social, cultural, and political conversations of the moment across time and space. By using the skills of small listening and the technology of big listening, This is Signals pilots social movements through the noise towards solidifying progressive values as everyday common sense for more people.

Name: Jungfreisinnige Schweiz
Description:
Die Jungfreisinnigen sind die politische Kraft, die sich überzeugt für die persönliche Freiheit einsetzt. Wir trauen jedem etwas zu und sind gegen einen überbordenden Staat, der überreguliert und die Bürger bevormundet.

Als Jungfreisinnige ist uns bewusst, dass es wichtig ist, sich jetzt und heute für die Zukunft einzusetzen. Die Entscheide, die heute gefällt werden, wirken sich in den nächsten Jahren aus. Unsere Generation wird die Folgen der heutigen Politik erben – besser also, wenn wir schon heute mitbestimmen!

Name: BVMW Thüringen
Description:
Wir sind DIE Interessenvertretung des Thüringer Mittelstands. Weit über 2.000 Mitgliedern bieten wir zahlreiche Events, Netzwerkmöglichkeiten, Impulse und eine Stimme in der Politik.

Profitieren Sie von Deutschlands größtem und aktivstem Unternehmernetzwerk! 300 Geschäftsstellen verknüpfen die mittelständischen Unternehmen mit mehr als 800.000 direkten Kontakten im Jahr.

---
