Name: Climate Caucus
Description:
Climate Caucus is a non-partisan, national non-profit working at the intersection of two essential pillars of shared prosperity: local democracy and climate policy.

Across the country, we support mayors, chiefs, councillors, regional directors and other representatives to enact, and advocate for, climate initiatives that meet the urgency of our times.

Our role is to ensure that such trusted voices have essential resources to succeed when supporting their communities through policy action and provincial and federal advocacy.

At the heart of our work is a deep commitment to safety, health and affordability for everyone in Canada, and the belief that supporting local leaders in climate is one of the most impactful ways to ensure just that.

Name: Bharteeya Janata Party
Description: Leading Political party of India ruling 8 States and 2nd largest in Parliament - a recognised oposition party. A party with character, Athics and Indian cultural value working for down to earth citizen

Name: Bureau Politique Déus Deronneth
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page LinkedIn officielle du Bureau Politique Déus Deronneth. Nous sommes dédiés à promouvoir la bonne gouvernance, la sécurité, l'industrialisation, la séparation du budget dans les collectivités territoriales, la priorité aux jeunes et aux femmes, ainsi que l'éducation en Haïti.

À travers notre engagement en faveur de la transparence, de l'intégrité et de l'innovation, nous visons à créer un environnement propice au développement économique, social et politique durable d'Haïti. Nous croyons fermement en l'importance de la collaboration et de la mobilisation de toutes les parties prenantes pour réaliser notre vision commune d'un Haïti prospère et inclusif.

Suivez notre page pour rester informé des dernières actualités, des initiatives en cours et des opportunités de collaboration. Ensemble, nous pouvons construire un avenir meilleur pour tous les Haïtiens. Rejoignez-nous dans notre mission de transformation et de développement pour Haïti.

Name: Der Mittelstand. BVMW Rheinland-Pfalz-Saarland
Description:
Gemeinschaft macht stark. Dies gilt besonders für den Mittelstand. Das Netzwerk des BVMW bietet Ihnen einzigartige Vorteile und einen Nutzen, der Ihren unternehmerischen Erfolg sichtbar steigern wird: 

Sie stehen als Unternehmer vor Herausforderungen: wir unterstützen Sie durch wichtige Impulse, neue Kontakte und die individuelle Beratung durch unsere Geschäftsstellen vor Ort
Sie benötigen für Ihr Unternehmen gute politische Rahmenbedingungen: wir setzen uns aktiv für Ihre Interessen ein – regional, national und international
Werthaltige Informationen und Empfehlungen bringen Ihnen konkreten Nutzen: wir liefern Ihnen alles Wichtige zu relevanten Themen – von der Außenwirtschaft bis hin zu Fragen des Zahlungsverkehrs.

Name: Permit Power
Description: Permit Power is a research and advocacy nonprofit organization working to make it quicker and cheaper to install clean energy equipment.

Name: Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung Canada
Description:
The Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS; Konrad Adenauer Foundation) is a German political foundation that is politically associated with but legally and financially independent of the Christian Democratic Union of Germany (CDU).

In Canada, we seek to intensify political cooperation between Germany and Canada to strengthen transatlantic relations and to address common challenges of global nature. In October 2019, we opened our first office in Ottawa that regularly organizes public events, such as conferences, podium discussions and webinars, and publishes short videos and electronic publications throughout the year.

Name: National Public Affairs
Description: National Public Affairs is a full-service national consulting firm that services a variety of candidates, campaign committees, and other non-political entities.

Name: IG Metall Bayern
Description:
Wir setzen uns mit über 366.000 Mitgliedern in Bayern ein für einen sozialen und ökologischen Wandel sowie bessere Arbeits- und Lebensbedingungen für die Beschäftigten durch Tarifverträge. Wir sind die Gewerkschaft der Metall-/Elektro-, Textil-/Bekleidungs- sowie Holz-/Kunststoffindustrie und des Handwerks. 
Die IG Metall Bayern ist organisiert in 21 Geschäftsstellen als Ansprechpartnerinnen für die Mitglieder vor Ort und die IG Metall-Bezirksleitung mit Sitz in München. Bezirksleiter ist Horst Ott.

Name: Ohio Democratic Party
Description: Join the team that's working to flip the Buckeye State blue.

Name: Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung  e.V.,  EU-funded projects
Description:
Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS) is a partner of the European Union to strengthen democracy, promote party cooperation and non-state actors (civil society, media, etc.), carry out political education and support good governance and decentralization.

KAS increases the impact of its activities  by implementing EU-funded projects. The complementary activities of the EU projects sharpen the profile of the respective country programme  and contribute to the implementation of European external policies.

Since 2005, Konrad Adenauer Foundation has successfully implemented more than 100 EU funded  projects worldwide in cooperation with local partners and with considerable co-financing amounting to more than 63 million Euros.

The EU Projects Team is part of the European and International Cooperation Department (HA EIZ) and supports the KAS foreign offices and local partners in all phases of EU projects . These include in particular:

- Application

- Management and implementation of projects

- Consultation

- Communication and liaison with the EU institutions

The team operates from its headquarters in Berlin and support the Multinational Development Dialogue (MNED) in Brussels, which is primarily engaged in dialogue with the European Union and its institutions. 

In cooperation with European and international partners, KAS also applies for EU service projects and benefits strongly from the worldwide institutional presence through its foreign offices as well as the broad network of local partners and experts on project-relevant topics.

Name: Klimaneustart Berlin
Description:
Für ein bezahlbares und unabhängiges Berlin
 Für ein zukunftsorientiertes Berlin
 Für ein verantwortungsvolles Berlin

 – – – 

Klimaneustart Berlin versteht sich als zivilgesellschaftliche Bewegung, die den Austausch zwischen Bürger*innen, Wissenschaft und Politik auf Augenhöhe vorantreibt.

Die Erklärung der Klimanotlage sowie der Berliner Klima-Bürger*innenrat gehen auf erfolgreiche Volksinitiativen von uns zurück. Mit dem Volksentscheid "Berlin 2030 klimaneutral" haben wir die Transformation unserer Stadt zu einem konkreten Thema gemacht. Mit unserer neuen Volksinitiative fordern wir 2025 die sozial-ökologische Bauwende in Berlin. Denn wer Berlin klimaneutral machen will, muss die Gebäude klimaneutral machen!

Name: California School Employees Association
Description:
The California School Employees Association is the largest classified school employees union in the United States, representing more than 250,000 school support staff throughout California.
 
CSEA members perform a wide range of essential work in our public schools and community colleges, including security, food services, office and clerical work, school maintenance and operations, transportation, academic assistance and paraeducator services, library and media assistance, computer services and more. 

CSEA was formed in 1927 when a determined group of Oakland custodians came together to support an elderly custodian who couldn’t afford to retire because public schools had no pension plan for such employees. This small group of custodians saw the need to gain rights and benefits for themselves and other school employees, and began the organization to achieve this goal. Through this initial determination, CSEA proved to be an organization that would stand the test of time. In 2001, CSEA members voted to become an independently chartered union of the AFL-CIO.
 
Today, CSEA continues to thrive as a member-governed union, democratically run by member volunteers in nearly 800 local chapters throughout the state. The union is led by the CSEA Board of Directors. Labor Relations Representatives and other professional staff work under the authority of CSEA’s Executive Director.
 
We are proud of our contributions toward California’s future, and we strive everyday to carry out our mission to improve the lives of our members, students and communities.

Name: CHplusplus
Description: Eine handlungsfähige, nachhaltige und wohlhabende Schweiz mit Wissenschaft und Technologie

Name: DWARS, GroenLinkse Jongeren
Description: DWARS, GroenLinkse Jongeren is een organisatie voor en door jongeren die zich inzet voor groene en linkse politiek. Het is de onafhankelijke jongerenorganisatie gelieerd aan GroenLinks. De organisatie heeft rond de 5000 leden die zich op verspreid over het land op verschillende manieren inzetten voor een betere wereld.

Name: Ένωση Κεντρώων - Union of Centrists
Description:
Union of Centrists is a Greek political party whose president is Vasilios Leventis.
Furthermore, Union of Centrists is a member 
of the European Democratic Party (EDP) in the European Parliament.

Name: Danske HF & VUC
Description:
Danske HF & VUC arbejder for, at alle har mulighed for at tage en uddannelse - uanset hvor de er i livet. 

Om du er ordblind, har en psykiatrisk diagnose eller ikke tog den lige vej gennem uddannelsessystemet, er der en plads til dig på VUC. Vi er for dem, der vil læse hf, for dem, der vil tage et fag ad gangen, og for de voksne, der skal i gang igen. 

Vi er en del af løsningen.

Name: Les Écologistes Ville de Lyon
Description: Groupe les Écologistes de la ville de Lyon - 102 élu·e·s dont 41 au Conseil municipal - Mandat 2020-2026

Name: Fagligt selskab af Kliniske Diætister
Description: Fagligt selskab af Kliniske Diætister i Kost og Ernæringsforbundet

Name: MariaLab
Description:
A MariaLab tem o desejo de construir espaços de tecnologia mais plurais, envolvendo mais mulheres, pessoas trans e não binárias e promovendo um pensamento e discussão interseccional que considere raça, classe social e identidade de gênero no desenho de tecnologias, sejam elas digitais ou não. Além da representatividade desses corpos invisibilizados, queremos propor reconstruções e reapropriações nos modos como desenvolvemos e interagimos com infraestruturas tecnológicas.

Trabalhamos para promover autonomia e fortalecer o autocuidado nos meios digitais, levando a tecnologia para espaços feministas e a nossa perspectiva feminista para espaços de tecnologia, construindo ambientes seguros, virtuais e físicos, com recortes sociais, étnicos ou econômicos por entender que somente assim se constrói aprendizados através da troca e acúmulo de saberes entre todas.

A MariaLab auxilia na coleta, organização e divulgação de informações e produção de conhecimentos científicos e socioeconômicos sobre a relação de tecnologias e feminismos.
Promovemos debates sobre tecnologias feministas, enfrentamento da violência online baseada em gênero e raça e sobre Governança da Internet. 
Produzimos materiais didáticos em diversos formatos para disseminar informações sobre tecnologias para mulheres, pessoas transgênero e não binárias.
Apoiamos outros projetos em tecnologias digitais e não digitais desenvolvidos por outras organizações e coletivos parceiros.

Name: Zo for Austin City Council District 9
Description:
Zohaib “Zo” Qadri made history as the first South Asian American and Muslim American on the Austin City Council, representing District 9, which encompasses vibrant neighborhoods such as Downtown, Rainey St., Clarksville, West Campus, Hyde Park, Travis Heights, Bouldin Creek, Mueller, Cherrywood, and more.

Elected in 2022, he is dedicated to tackling Austin’s housing crisis, promoting an equitable transit system, and uplifting vulnerable communities. Zo is committed to ensuring that every resident has a voice and access to the many opportunities that Austin offers.

Name: Der Mittelstand. BVMW Westpfalz
Description:
Sie sind auf der Suche nach wertvollen Kontakten, die Ihnen auf Ihrem geschäftlichen Weg weiterhelfen können? Der BVMW (Bundesverband mittelständische Wirtschaft) öffnet Türen für Sie – sowohl regional als auch über die nationalen Grenzen hinaus! 

Unsere vielfältigen Netzwerkmöglichkeiten verbinden Sie mit den richtigen Ansprechpartnern, um Ihre unternehmerischen Ziele zu erreichen. Egal, ob Sie lokale Kooperationen suchen, auf nationaler Ebene wachsen möchten oder internationale Partnerschaften anstreben – wir haben den Kontakt, der Ihnen weiterhilft. 

Profitieren Sie von unserer langjährigen Erfahrung und unserem weitreichenden Netzwerk. Treten Sie dem BVMW bei und nutzen Sie die Chance, wertvolle Beziehungen zu knüpfen, Know-how auszutauschen und Synergien zu schaffen.

Verpassen Sie nicht die Gelegenheit, Ihr Business auf das nächste Level zu heben! Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute und entdecken Sie, wie der BVMW Ihnen mit den richtigen Kontakten den Weg zum Erfolg ebnet.

Name: Blue Leadership Collaborative
Description: We develop and retain high-potential future campaign managers, with an emphasis on women and people of color, by providing them with the professional and leadership development they need to run races.

Name: Co-operative Party
Description:
We are the party of the co-operative movement, committed to building a society in where power and wealth are shared.

Democratic public ownership of the services and utilities we all rely on. Tackling the housing crisis through co-operative housing. Fans having a say in their sports club. Credit unions as an alternative to rip-off payday lenders. Shops owned by their customers that give back to the community.

Working in partnership with Labour, the Co-operative Party is a voice for co-operative values and principles from local communities up to the places where decisions are taken and laws are made.

Name: Michigan Democratic Party
Description: Michigan Democratic Party is a political organization based out of Lansing, Michigan.

Name: 20/20 Vision
Description: An economic policy research and advocacy firm participating in the national economic policy making process. We work with legislators, academics, public interest groups, and progressive organizations via engagement in economic policy legislative and political projects with a principal focus on fiscal and financial policy.

Name: TMI – Træ- og Møbelindustrien
Description:
TMI (Træ- og Møbelindustrien) er en arbejdsgiver- og brancheforening for 300 virksomheder i træ- og møbelbranchen. 
Snilde, stræben og skabertrang er vor vej til produkter vellidt i hele verden. 
Træ er vores enestående råstof, som endda er bæredygtigt fra naturens hånd. 
Vi forfiner det og forener det med andre materialer for at skabe vækst og arbejdspladser i hele Danmark.

Name: Initiative Deutsche Zahlungssysteme e.V.
Description:
The Initiative Deutsche Zahlungssysteme e.V. sees itself as a network and platform for companies and institutions that accept the digital, electronic and card-based payment procedures of the Deutsche Kreditwirtschaft (German Banking Industry Committee), in particular the girocard system, or companies and institutions that provide the infrastructure required for this. It bundles the interests of its members and represents them vis-à-vis politicians and the media. The association accompanies the development of new possible fields of application and innovative solutions in the area of payment, initiates pilot projects and supports existing activities of its members, especially in the areas of public relations and communication. 

Imprint: https://www.initiative-deutsche-zahlungssysteme.de/impressum/
Privacy Policy: https://www.initiative-deutsche-zahlungssysteme.de/datenschutz/

Name: LSVD⁺ – Verband Queere Vielfalt
Description:
The Federation Queer Diversity in Germany (LSVD⁺ – Verband Queere Vielfalt ) is a civil rights organisation representing the interests of lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and intersex and all queer people (LGBTIQ+). Human rights, diversity and respect – we want LGBTIQ+ to be accepted and recognized as self-evidently belonging to everSpecific goals of the LSVD⁺ include lobbying for Germany’s Basic Law to extend constitutional protection against discrimination on grounds of sexual orientation and gender identity; programmes at federal and state level to promote acceptance and diversity; legal and social recognition of rainbow families; enforcement of the right to sexual self-determination; LGBTI-inclusive school curricula; refugee policies that provide both protection and opportunity to persecuted LGBTIQ+ people; and foreign and development policies that promote respect for the human rights of LGBTIQ+ people at EU and global level.

Specific goals of the LSVD⁺ include lobbying for Germany’s Basic Law to extend constitutional protection against discrimination on grounds of sexual orientation and gender identity; programmes at federal and state level to promote acceptance and diversity; legal and social recognition of rainbow families; enforcement of the right to sexual self-determination; LGBTIQ+-inclusive school curricula; refugee policies that provide both protection and opportunity to persecuted LGBTIQ+ people; and foreign and development policies that promote respect for the human rights of LGBTIQ+ people at EU and global level.

The LSVD⁺ has since 1990 been fighting discrimination on grounds of sexual orientation and gender identity.  Our Federation has been a major driver and enabler of changes in Germany: the introduction of same-sex marriage; the General Act on Equal Treatment; the final and complete removal of Section 175  from Germany’s statute books.

Name: Asia-Pacific Committee of German Business (APA)
Description:
The balance of power in our world is changing, and the Asia-Pacific region will play a leading role in this new world order, geopolitically and geoeconomically. The APA wants to – and will – shape this change together with its partners in the region and is committed to the convergence of the economies of Asia and Europe. We want to improve market access and expand trade and investment – also for Asian companies in Europe. The APA is building bridges between German companies doing business in Asia and politics in Germany as well as in our Asian partner countries.

The APA is a joint initiative and umbrella organization of leading business federations – the Federation of German Industries (BDI), the Association of German Chambers of Commerce and Industry (DIHK), the German Asia-Pacific Business Association (OAV), the Federation of German Wholesale, Foreign Trade and Services (BGA) and the Association of German Banks (Bankenverband).

Name: GTS - Godkendt Teknologisk Service
Description:
GTS-foreningen formidler viden om den værdi GTS-institutterne bidrager med til dansk erhvervsliv og samfund. Ved at følge denne side bliver du opdateret med nyt fra "GTS-verdenen".

OM GTS-INSTITUTTERNE:
GTS-institutterne styrker dansk konkurrencekraft via ny viden og teknologi. Institutterne tilbyder specialistkompetencer og faciliteter til test- og demonstration, som gør det muligt for virksomheder at teste ideer på kryds og tværs – og i sidste ende gøre nye løsninger klar til markedet. Kort fortalt gør 
GTS-institutterne det muligt for virksomheder at udvikle sig, uden de skal kunne alting selv. Det skaber jobs, vækst og velfærd i hele Danmark. 

GTS-institutterne er: Alexandra Instituttet, Bioneer, DBI, DFM, DHI, FORCE Technology og Teknologisk Institut. 

Fakta om de syv GTS-institutter: 
•	Er virksomheder med et almennyttigt formål.
•	Alle er ”Godkendte Teknologiske Serviceinstitutter” (GTS-institutter).
•	Uddannelses- og forskningsministeren giver godkendelsen, og GTS er en ordning under Uddannelses- og Forskningsministeriet.
•	Ordningen administreres af Uddannelses- og Forskningsstyrelsen, der også indgår resultatkontrakter med institutterne.
•	GTS-institutterne modtager årligt cirka 350 mio. kr. i offentlig støtte.
•	Institutterne sælger desuden kommercielle ydelser, som udgør langt den største del af omsætningen. 
•	Der findes GTS-institutter i andre lande. I Europa hedder de Research and Technology Organisations (RTO), og de er samlet i paraplyorganisationen ”EARTO”.

Læs mere på www.gts-net.dk

Name: Lingshui Government
Description:
Situated in the south-east of Hainan Island, Lingshui County is home to 1223 square kilometers of mountains, plains and beaches. With a tropical monsoon climate, Lingshui is warm year round and home to numerous exotic plants and crops. With four bays and five ports; over 18537 acres of water-space is available for aquaculture. 


• Tourism

In order to establish Lingshui as an ecological, developing country, the county government is currently introducing large enterprises to participate in the development of local tourism. Lingshui boasts popular tourism areas including Diaolou Mountain and Li Miao Han


• Agriculture and Food

Lingshui County offers an excellent natural environment for the agricultural industry; allowing farmers to produce green, organic foods that are free from pollutants. The government aims to build a trusted, competitive brand to put Lingshui produce on the map – both locally and nationally.


• Industry

The county government plans to develop a low-carbon, energy-efficient industrial park at Kaidi Technology Campus, turning Lingshui into a leading industrial city with ecological concerns.

An open-door policy combined with abundant natural resources is leading to Lingshui becoming a rapidly developing region in China. We welcome and embrace visitors and investors from around the world to experience our growing tourist, high-tech and organic agriculture industries, making Lingshui a uniquely flavored seaside city!

>>>>>>>>>>Welcome to Lingshui! Welcome to Hainan!<<<<<<<<<<<

Description: At Zinc Collective, we believe that to win the critical battles our country faces today, we need a transformed, robust Democratic Party. Zinc Collective and its organizations—Blue Leadership Collaborative, DigiDems, and Zinc Labs— work to recruit, develop, support, and retain diverse, high potential talent and address gaps in a technologically-enabled Democratic ecosystem, in order to deliver persistent Democratic majorities.

Description: The genesis of the LNP lies deep in Queensland’s political history. For nearly 50 years there was a strong desire amongst the two conservative political movements to unite into a single entity. This goal was achieved on the 26th of July 2008 with the formation of the LNP.

Name: BC NDP
Description:
British Columbians are facing big challenges. David Eby and the BC NDP team are on your side. 

David Eby has a track record of taking on big problems and getting results, like reducing ICBC rates and cracking down on money laundering. 

He and his team are hitting the ground running on issues that matter to you and your family - tackling the housing crisis, making communities safe, strengthening healthcare, fighting the climate crisis and advancing reconciliation.

We’ve faced a lot in the last five years. Together, let’s take on the big problems and help everyone build a better future.

Learn more about the BCNDP at www.bcndp.ca

Name: HANDWERK BW
Description:
HANDWERK BW steht für den Baden-Württembergischen Handwerkstag. Wir sind der Dachverband der Handwerksorganisationen im Südwesten. Unsere Mitglieder sind Handwerkskammern, Fachverbände und weitere Partnerorganisationen. Als Repräsentant von 140.000 Betrieben, 805.000 Beschäftigten und 48.000 Auszubildenden sind wir die Stimme fürs Handwerk BW.

Unser Auftrag ist es, den „goldenen Boden“ zukunftsfähig zu halten. Wir wollen für faire Rahmenbedingungen sorgen und das Handwerk als attraktiven Arbeitgeber positionieren. Wir vertreten die Belange der „Wirtschaftsmacht von nebenan“ gegenüber dem Landtag, der Landesregierung, den Parteien sowie anderen Körperschaften und Verbänden, der Öffentlichkeit sowie in Richtung Berlin und Brüssel. Insbesondere hat HANDWERK BW die Aufgabe, eine einheitliche Willensbildung der baden-württembergischen Handwerksorganisationen in landes- und handwerkspolitischen Fragen herbeizuführen, zu allen das Handwerk betreffenden Angelegenheiten Stellung zu nehmen und diese Positionen zu vertreten.

Name: Marijuana Industry Group
Description:
Welcome to the Marijuana Industry Group (MIG). As the oldest and largest trade association for licensed Colorado cannabis businesses, MIG represents the interests and advocates on behalf of the rapidly evolving needs of the regulated marijuana industry in Colorado. We have a reputation of working with state and local regulators and policymakers to solve issues facing the industry. We have strong relationships with the governor’s office and statewide regulatory agencies, as well as involvement at local levels in Denver, Aurora, Boulder, Pueblo, Colorado Springs and other municipalities.

After 45 years of the war on marijuana, and over a trillion spent, marijuana remains universally available, particularly in our schools. Just like with prohibition, marijuana sales have been dominated by those who would use violence to control the illegal market. We provide a safe, accountable, and transparent alternative to the illicit market. Through licensing, regulation, and taxation, communities are able enhance safety, revenue, and civil liberties.

Name: Bharatiya Liberal Party
Description: Bharatiya Liberal Party (BLP)/ भारतीय लिबरल पार्टी aims to bring about a change in the political landscape of India. Our electoral pitch is Delhi state.

Name: SVDE ASDD
Description:
Willkommen beim Schweizerischen Verband der Ernährungsberater/innen SVDE

… dem unabhängigen Berufsverband der gesetzlich anerkannten Ernährungsberaterinnen und Ernährungsberater der Schweiz.

Die Mitglieder des SVDE haben an einer Fachhochschule oder altrechtlich an einer höheren Fachschule der Schweiz eine Grundausbildung in Ernährung und Diätetik abgeschlossen oder können einen gleichwertigen ausländischen Abschluss vorweisen. Sie verpflichten sich zur regelmässigen Fortbildung sowie zur Einhaltung der in der Berufsordnung festgehaltenen ethischen Grundsätze.

SVDE-Mitglieder sind berechtigt, den geschützten Titel „Ernährungsberaterin/Ernährungsberater SVDE“ zu führen. Dieser steht für seriöse, wissenschaftlich fundierte und praktisch erprobte ernährungsberaterische und -therapeutische Dienstleistungen, sei dies in Privatpraxen, in Spitälern, Reha-Kliniken und Ambulatorien, in der Gesundheitsförderung und Prävention, in der Lebensmittelindustrie, in der Forschung oder in anderen Bereichen.

Name: ᒪᑭᕝᕕᒃ - Makivvik
Description:
Politically, culturally and economically, Makivik has been a leader in building and developing a vibrant region called Nunavik, where, between the dualistic nations of Canada and Quebec, Inuit have established our own distinct place and identity.

Makivik, which in Inuktitut means “To Rise Up,” is a fitting name for an organization mandated to speak on behalf of the Inuit of Nunavik, and protect the rights, interests and financial compensation provided by the 1975 James Bay and Northern Quebec Agreement, the first comprehensive Inuit land claim in Canada, and the more recent offshore Nunavik Inuit Land Claim Agreement that came into effect in 2008.

The Corporation’s distinct mandates range from owning large profitable business enterprises and generating jobs; to social economic development, improved housing conditions, to protection of the Inuit language and culture and the natural environment. In 2017 Makivik created Nuvviti Development Corporation to operate its subsidiary companies and joint venture partnerships.

Makivik’s work demonstrates the extent that modern aboriginal treaties or land claim settlements could benefit governments and Inuit.
In 1975 when the first Agreement was signed, it took the position that “settling Inuit land claims” must be viewed in the context of a “new beginning” in terms of developing and implementing a new relationship and way of doing business with the governments of Quebec and Canada.

Makivik Corporation and its subsidiary companies have a remarkably positive story to tell and we invite you to explore this site to learn more about Makivik and the Inuit of Nunavik.

Name: Brighter India
Description: An in house political team and knowledge partner of the INDIAN YOUTH  CONGRESS (IYC), Brighter India is a closely knit group of professionals  engaging with India’s oldest national party at a political and policy level.  We strive to introduce and implement professional practices in the electioneering  process; design and execute youth specific campaigns; propel social media with  creative inputs and arm the organization with data and research.  We welcome like-minded young driven individuals (students and professionals) seeking to engage in politics in full time and part time roles to enable the organization effect some real change. Please reach out to us at  brighterindiafellowship@iyc.in

Description: Die EnDK ist das gemeinsame Energie-Kompetenzzentrum der Kantone. Sie fördert und koordiniert die Zusammenarbeit der Kantone in Energiefragen und vertritt deren gemeinsamen Interessen gegenüber dem Bund.

Name: Basic Rights Oregon
Description:
Basic Rights Oregon is one of the state’s leading progressive organizations. We work to ensure that all lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and queer Oregonians experience equality by building a broad and inclusive politically powerful movement, shifting public opinion and achieving policy victories. 

Basic Rights Oregon was formed in 1996 in response dozens of anti-gay ballot measures and to create a path for pro-active policy to bring dignity and respect to all LGBTQ Oregonians. Piece by piece, Basic Rights Oregon turned the tide on hate, racking up dozens of local victories. Our first big statewide victory came 11 years later, in 2007, when we passed comprehensive nondiscrimination protections and domestic partnership recognition during the same legislative session. Our efforts also led to anti-bullying legislation in schools, expanded access to health care for transgender Oregonians, the freedom to marry and a ban on youth conversion therapy. 

Today, Oregon is regarded as one of the most LGBTQ friendly state in the country. BRO is a 501(c)4 organization that maintains a 501(c)3 (Basic Rights Education Fund), a state candidate PAC and a ballot measure PAC.

Name: Députés Horizons & Indépendants

Name: Center for Economic Democracy
Description:
Center for Economic Democracy is a social change incubator for the New Economy. CED builds the capacity of low-income and working class communities of color to lead a Just Transition from capitalism to economic democracy. 

CED advanced Political Power Building, Cooperative Economic Development and Cultural Organizing as strategies to build a more just, sustainable and democratic economy.

Name: Bundesverband der Dienstleistungswirtschaft
Description:
Wer nicht dabei ist, wird nicht gehört oder überlässt das Spielfeld den anderen. Im politischen Berlin konkurrieren tausende Lobbyisten aus Wirtschaftsverbänden, Unternehmen, NGOs und Beratungsagenturen um die Aufmerksamkeit der politischen Entscheider. Regierungsvertreter, Bundestagsabgeordnete und Ministerialbeamte entscheiden bei jedem Gesetzgebungsvorhaben von neuem, welche Lobbyisten und Verbände einen relevanten Beitrag leisten könnten.   
 
Im Gespräch

Der BDWi organisiert zahlreiche Gespräche mit politischen Entscheidern; von Abgeordneten, die Berichterstatter zu einem konkreten Gesetzgebungsvorhaben sind, über Sprecher konkreter Politikfelder (zum Beispiel Wirtschaft, Finanzen oder Arbeit), bis zu Staatssekretären und Ministern. Die Gespräche werden von den zuständigen Ministerialbeamten und Fraktionsmitarbeitern begleitet.  

Im Thema

Bei den BDWi-Gesprächen präsentieren die Experten und Unternehmer der Mitgliedsverbände ihre Themen selber. Das hat sich bewährt. Expertise konkret, direkt und unverblümt vorgetragen ist für politische Entscheider viel wertvoller als Informationen aus zweiter Hand, indirekt von Vertretern vorgetragen. Das stärkt die Mitgliedsverbände, weil sie selber als die relevanten Experten wahrgenommen werden.   

Gesetzgebung

Der BDWi informiert seine Mitglieder über aktuelle Gesetzgebungsinitiativen der Bundesregierung und der Parteien. Der BDWi nimmt regelmäßig Stellung zu Gesetzesinitiativen und beteiligt sich an mündlichen Anhörungen.

Kommunikation

Keine Politik ohne Kommunikation. Der BDWi greift die Themen seiner Mitgliedsverbände in seinem MdB-Newsletter auf und organisiert dazu passgenaue Veranstaltungen. 

Impressum: https://www.bdwi-online.de/impressum.html
Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.bdwi-online.de/datenschutzerklaerung.html

Name: Oslo Høyre
Description:
Oslo Høyre er partiet Høyres kommune- og fylkesorganisasjon i Oslo. 

Vi jobber for å gjøre Oslo til verdenes beste by. Dette gjør vi gjennom å:

- Et helsevesen med pasienten i sentrum. 

Oslo Høyre består av politikere, ansatte og fantastiske frivillige som brenner for Høyre sin politikk. Vår leder er Morten Steenstrup og vår nestleder er Merete Agerbak-Jensen 

Sammen skal vi få fart på Oslo igjen!

Description: O Sindicato do Comercio Varejista do ABC - SINCOMERCIO ABC, é um sindicato patronal que atua na defesa dos comerciantes e empresários do comércio varejista, com o objetivo de atender e dar todo suporte necessário, garantindo a sua representatividade. Abrange os seguintes municípios - Santo André, São Bernardo do Campo, São Caetano do Sul, Diadema, Mauá e Ribeirão Pires. Name: DEVA Partisi
Description: Demokrasi ve Atılım Partisi, parti programında yer alan politikaların gerçekleştirilmesi suretiyle; kuvvetler ayrılığı esasına ve hukukun üstünlüğüne dayanan; yargının tarafsız ve bağımsızlığı ile hukuk güvenliğinin en üst düzeyde sağlandığı; katılımcı ve çoğulcu demokrasinin hakim olduğu; uluslararası sözleşmeler ve evrensel değerler çerçevesinde temel insan haklarının ve başta ifade ile basın özgürlüğü olmak üzere tüm özgürlüklerin garanti altına alındığı; şiddet, korku, baskı, ötekileştirme, ayrıştırma ve ayrımcılığın yaşanmadığı; hukuka bağlı, vatandaş odaklı, katılımcı, tarafsız, saydam, hesap verebilir, denetlenebilir, etkili ve verimli bir kamu yönetiminin hayata geçirildiği; herkesin insan onuruna yaraşır yaşam ve refah standartlarına ulaştığı; çocuklarımızın ve gençlerimizin geleceğe umutla baktığı, milletimizin barış ve huzur içinde yaşayacağı, saygın ve güçlü bir Türkiye idealini gerçekleştirmek amacıyla kurulmuştur. Partimiz tüm politika oluşturma, karar alma ve uygulamalarında; şeffaflık, hesap verebilirlik, dürüstlük, çoğulculuk, katılımcılık, kurumsallaşma, her alanda liyakatı esas alma, işi ehline verme, istişareye ve ortak akla dayalı yönetim, vatandaşlarımız arasında hiçbir ayrım yapmama, her koşulda gelişmiş bir demokrasiyi, insan haklarını, özgürlükleri ve hukukun üstünlüğünü savunma, toplumun değerlerine, ihtiyaç ve taleplerine duyarlı olma, kendini değerlendirmede tevazu ve ahlakı temel alma, politika uygulamalarında tutarlılık, öngörülebilirlik ve bütüncül yaklaşımı esas alma ilkelerine bağlı kalacaktır. Bu ilkeler doğrultusunda amacımızı gerçekleştirmek için bütün samimiyet ve gayretimizle çalışacağımıza tüm vatandaşlarımıza söz veriyoruz. Kamu kurumu niteliğindeki meslek örgütleri ile sivil toplum kuruluşlarının iç işleyişlerinde demokratik mekanizmaların güçlendirilmesi için gerekli düzenlemeleri yapacağız.

Name: South African - German Energy Partnership
Description:
As climate change accelerates, and energy demands rise, South Africa and Germany are joining forces to drive their energy transitions towards secure, affordable energy, and economically resilient energy systems. 

Through the South African-German Energy Partnership, led by the German Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs and Climate Action (BMWK) and the South African Department of Mineral Resources and Energy (DMRE), both countries are advancing sustainable energy solutions through several key initiatives. These include establishing an intergovernmental dialogue focused on effective, efficient policy solutions that support secure and environmentally friendly energy systems; implementing joint projects to bring sustainable energy solutions into practice; and working closely with the private sector to incorporate energy companies’ insights on policy matters, while leveraging their technical expertise.

Building lasting partnerships and fostering a culture of collaboration and innovation:

Since 2013, South Africa and Germany have joined forces through the South African-German Energy Partnership. This partnership is built on trust, shared goals, and a strong commitment to a sustainable energy transition. By exchanging experiences and lessons learned, this partnership aims to pave the way for cleaner energy, more resilient energy systems. 

The Deutsche Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit (GIZ) GmbH runs the Secretariat of the South African-German Energy Partnership from its Pretoria office. The Secretariat has a coordination function and follows-up the implementation plan of the partnership. This LinkedIn page is managed by the Secretariat of the South African - German Energy Partnership.

Name: Liberal Party of Australia (Victorian Division)
Description:
The Liberal Party of Australia’s broad membership base reflects Australia and Australian values. The Liberal Party was formed not around unions or interest groups, but around individuals. Australian values of individual dignity, liberty, free enterprise and family are reflected in the core values of the Liberal Party.

 The Victorian Division of the Liberal Party has played an important role in leading the progress of the Liberal Party over more than six decades. Influential Prime Ministers, Premiers and Ministers – both Federal and State – have helped to establish the Victorian Division as an integral part of the Liberal Party’s development.

Authorised by S Smith, Liberal Party of Australia (Victorian Division), L2 60 Collins Street, Melbourne VIC 3000.

Name: Innovation Competition of International Talents（中国海外创新人才大赛）
Description: The 1st Innovation Competition of International Talents, Shenzhen China (hereinafter referred to as the "Competition") is led by Ministry of Science and Technology of the Peoples Republic of China, and State Administration of Foreign Experts Affairs, sponsored by the Shenzhen Municipal Government, and hosted by Shenzhen Longgang District People’s Government, the Shenzhen Municipal Human Resources and Social Security Bureau, and Shenzhen Science and Technology Innovation Committee. The Competition, in response to the call for "mass entrepreneurship and innovation", aims to deepen international exchanges and cooperation in innovation, further promote organic combination of talents, technology and capital, attract more international talents to start business and make development in Shenzhen, and accelerate the creation of an ecological environment of openness, integration and innovation for entrepreneurship and innovation, to help Shenzhen to build an international city of entrepreneurship and innovation.

Name: Danske Malermestre - En rigtig maler
Description:
Danske Malermestre er arbejdsgiverforeningen og brancheorganisationen for alle Danmarks malervirksomheder. Danske Malermestre består af 35 lav og mesterforeninger, og har sekretariat i både København og Århus.

Danske Malermestre blev dannet i 1990 som resultatet af en fusion mellem to arbejdsgiverforeninger for malere, Centralforeningen af Malermestre i Danmark (CMD) og Danske Malermestres Arbejdsgiverforening (DMA).

Foreningen repræsenterer ca. 1.500 medlemmer med en samlet lønsum på ca. 1,9 mia. kr

Name: Canada Strong & Free Network
Description:
The Canada Strong and Free Network was founded in 2005 as the Manning Centre for Building Democracy to support Canada’s conservative movement by networking best practices and ideas pertaining to limited government, free enterprise, individual responsibility and a more robust civil society. The name change took place at the request of the organization’s founder Preston Manning in 2020.  

Our vision is a free and democratic Canada where conservative principles are well articulated, communicated, funded, embraced and implemented. 

Our mission is to strengthen Canada’s conservative movement by nurturing, supporting, and facilitating exchanges and stronger relationships amongst the movement’s various components. 

We believe:
* The individual is the central unit of society. Government exists to serve and protect the self-determination of free, responsible and creative human beings.
Democracy is the best system of organizing individuals; governments must be limited and responsible to the people they serve.

*The free, competitive, market economy is the best way to ensure individual flourishing.

*The wisdom of Canada’s cultural, religious and democratic institutions must be respected and protected.

*The maintenance and preservation of freedom, including freedom of speech, the rule of law and property rights are essential to the maintenance and preservation of democracy.

Visit https://canadastrongandfree.network for more information.

Name: Advanced Micro Targeting
Description:
Advanced Micro Targeting (AMT) is a direct democracy firm that sells big ideas. Big ideas like ending government corruption, giving voters the right to decide what's best for them, and electing leaders who actually listen to the voters.
We are currently hiring Petitioners, Canvassers, Team Leaders and Project Managers for projects nationwide.

Name: Bauindustrie Niedersachsen-Bremen
Description: Wir sind der Wirtschafts- und Arbeitgeberverband der Bauindustrie in Niedersachsen und Bremen.

Name: Blik og Rør
Description:
Blik- og Rørarbejderforbundet har over 10.000 medlemmer, og er blandt de ældste forbund i Fagbevægelsens Hovedorganisation. Forbundet er stiftet helt tilbage i 1890 og kunne fejre 130 års jubilæum i 2020. 

Forbundets medlemmer udgør langt den største faglærte gruppe i VVS-branchen, som er en del af den danske bygge- og installationsbranche. Forbundet organiserer bl.a. blikkenslagere, rørlæggere, VVS-montører, VVS- og energimontører, ventilationsteknikere, klima- og miljøteknikere, rustfast industriblikkenslagere og skorstensfejere m.v.

Blik- og Rørarbejderforbundet er en medlemsstyret organisation, hvor det er medlemmerne, som vælger de repræsentanter i afdelinger, kredse og forbund til at varetage deres interesser. Det er også medlemmerne, som på generalforsamlinger og forbundets kongres, har mulighed for at påvirke fagets udvikling og forbundets politiske prioriteringer.

Name: Svensk Kooperation
Description:
De kooperativa idéerna ligger i tiden. Men de kooperativa och ömsesidiga företagsformerna är okända för många. Det ska Svensk Kooperation ändra på.

De 100 största kooperativa och ömsesidiga företagen har en omsättning på över 600 miljarder kronor per år och 100 000 anställda, vilket gör dem till en väsentlig del av näringslivet i Sverige. De kooperativa företagen är en förebild när det gäller konsumentmakt, ekonomisk transparens, bra arbetsvillkor och hållbar produktion. Det är dags att fler får lära känna kooperationen som ett attraktivt komplement.

Svensk Kooperation ekonomisk förening är partipolitiskt obundet. Föreningen har till ändamål att främja medlemmarnas ekonomiska intressen genom att

• öka kunskapen om kooperation,
• sprida idéer och visioner,
• driva opinionsbildning och
• företräda medlemmarna i frågor som rör de kooperativa företagens villkor.

Svensk Kooperation ekonomisk förening bildades våren 2017 och är ett historiskt samarbete mellan konsument- och producentkooperationen i Sverige. Initiativtagare är LRF, KF, HSB och Fremia.

Name: American Council of Engineering Companies of California (ACEC California)
Description:
The American Council of Engineering Companies of California (ACEC California) is a 70 plus year-old, nonprofit association of private consulting engineering and land surveying firms.  As a statewide organization, ACEC California is dedicated to enhancing the consulting engineering and land surveying professions, protecting the general public and promoting use of the private sector in the growth and development of California.  The Council's members provide services for all phases of planning, designing and constructing projects. Member services include civil, structural, geotechnical, electrical and mechanical engineering and land surveying for all types of public works, residential, commercial and industrial projects.

The ACEC California family includes 22 local chapters covering the state, a 61-member Board of Directors (elected by the chapters), 24 Committees, 2 Academies, 5 Affiliated Organizations and a state office staff of 11.

ACEC California is the nation's largest Member Organization in the American Council of Engineering Companies (ACEC). Membership in ACEC California means automatic membership in ACEC, and representation at the national level.

Let's Connect!
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ACECCalifornia/
X (Formerly Twitter): https://twitter.com/ACEC_California
Instagram: www.instagram.com/acec_california

Name: Baden-Württembergischer Industrie- und Handelskammertag
Description: Der Baden-Württembergische Industrie- und Handelskammertag (BWIHK) ist der Dachverband der zwölf IHKs in Baden-Württemberg. Wir sind das politische Sprachrohr für über 650.000 Unternehmen in THE LÄND und konstruktiv-kritischer Begleiter der Politik in allen Fragen, die die Wirtschaft betreffen.

Name: Engine | Advocacy & Foundation
Description:
Engine is a policy coalition that connects startups and government, giving tech entrepreneurs a seat at the table in Washington, D.C. We provide a platform for startups to tell their stories, conduct research to inform our positions, and bring the community together with lawmakers through campaigns and events. Through education and constructing smarter public policy, on issues from immigration to patents and spectrum, we're trying to build  an environment where technological innovation and entrepreneurship thrive.

Our members -- more than 500 and growing daily -- are entrepreneurial high-growth businesses, pioneers, innovators, investors, and technologists all over the country, committed to taking action on policy issues.

Name: Association Suisse-ONU / Gesellschaft Schweiz-UNO / UN Association Switzerland
Description:
Plateforme nationale dynamique, entreprenante et ouverte à tous,
l’Association Suisse-ONU renforce le partenariat entre la Suisse et l’ONU
par une meilleure connaissance des Nations Unies, des actions de la Suisse
à l’ONU et de la Genève internationale.

Name: be-digital Basel
Description:
be-digital verleiht den ICT Unternehmen mehr Sichtbarkeit, vernetzt ICT-Anbieter und -Anwender miteinander, bietet Möglichkeiten zum Austausch und zur Weiterbildung und unterstützt Unternehmen individuell in ihrer digitalen Transformation.

Die Handelskammer beider Basel hat be-digital initiiert und am Digitaltag 2019 lanciert. Mit der Plattform erhält die ICT-Branche der Region Basel mehr Sichtbarkeit, wird gefördert und gestärkt. 

Um auch künftig als Region erfolgreich zu sein, sind gemeinsame Anstrengungen von Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft, Politik und Verbänden im Bereich der ICT gefordert. Die ICT-Branche ist eine Querschnittbranche und eine Treiberin künftiger Entwicklung. ICT-Kompetenzen gepaart mit dem hiesigen Industrie-Know-how sind das Erfolgsrezept für einen wettbewerbsfähigen Wirtschaftsstandort.

be-digital stösst den Dialog innerhalb der ICT-Branche an und vernetzt Experten, Anwender und weitere Interessierte. Der Erfahrungsaustausch steht im Vordergrund. Aber auch Start-ups und Best-Practice-Beispiele, sprich zukunftsweisende digitale Projekte, erhalten ihre Bühne.

be-digital vernetzt, berät und unterstützt, um Hindernisse zu beseitigen, neue Möglichkeiten zu schaffen und den Weg in die Zukunft zu ebnen. Es entstehen laufend Angebote, mit denen be-digital die Unternehmen in ihrer digitalen Transformation individuell unterstützt. Darüber hinaus setzen wir uns mit verschiedenen Massnahmen dem ICT-Fachkräftemangel dezidiert entgegen.

Die Handelskammer stösst gemeinsam mit den Unternehmen der Region den Dialog innerhalb der ICT-Branche an und vernetzt Experten, Anwender und weitere interessierte. Der Erfahrungsaustausch steht in einem ersten Schritt im Vordergrund. Aber auch Start-ups und Best-Practice-Beispiele, sprich zukunftsweisende digitale Projekte, werden ihre Bühne erhalten.

Name: Italia Repubblica Democratica
Description:
Art. 1
L'Italia è una Repubblica democratica, fondata sul lavoro.
La sovranità appartiene al popolo, che la esercita nelle forme e nei limiti della Costituzione.

Name: KAS Brasil - Fundação Konrad Adenauer Oficial
Description:
A Fundação Konrad Adenauer (KAS) é uma fundação política alemã, independente e sem fins lucrativos. Atuamos com base nos valores da União Democrata-Cristã (CDU), partido político alemão. Promovemos a Democracia, o Estado de Direito, os Direitos Humanos e a Educação Política, bem como a Economia Social de Mercado e o desenvolvimento descentralizado e sustentável.

Presentes no Brasil desde 1969, reunimos lideranças atuais e futuras da política e da sociedade, bem como formadores de opinião no universo acadêmico. Trabalhamos sempre com parceiros locais e incentivamos o diálogo sobre os principais desafios do país.

Presentes no Brasil desde 1969, reunimos lideranças atuais e futuras da política e da sociedade, bem como formadores de opinião no universo acadêmico. Trabalhamos sempre com parceiros locais e incentivamos o diálogo sobre os principais desafios do país.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: New Blue Party of Ontario
Description: A NEW and BLUE political party in Ontario that defends taxpayers, small businesses, churches and synagogues.  The other major political parties in Ontario all believe in the same thing: top down control, tax and spend policies, and telling Ontarians how to live their lives.  We are a political party that isn't for the insiders and establishment hacks but for hard working Ontarians - ready to challenge political corruption and advocate for the little guy.

Name: Sheikh Hasina
Description:
She gave the nation a new vision – Vision 2021, transforming Bangladesh into a middle-income country. She gave Bangladeshis the dream of Digital Bangladesh- an IT-based country. Four decades into independence, she has brought solace for 3 million martyrs and their families by initiating the much-awaited war crimes trial.

Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina led the country to witness the economy growing at a record pace. Her prudent leadership ensured the primary school enrolment rate reaching the highest it has ever been. Her visionary approaches to women empowerment earned her global acclamation. During her first tenure, she made the peace treaty – ending decades-long conflict between indigenous people and Bengali settlers. Most importantly, she is the custodian of the spirit of 1971-Liberation War of Bangladesh.

The daughter of assassinated parents - the sister of murdered brothers, she literally turned grief into courage to lead the country. Following the assassination of most of her family members by a group of disgruntled army officers, she had to spend six years in exile. Her comeback, in 1981, meant the comeback of democracy, the farewell to unelected power and beginning of the national progress. She herself survived as many as 19 murder attempts including 2004-grenade attack by militants, backed by the then BNP led government.

Elected the Prime Minister for the third time in 2014, she is putting her best to build a poverty and hunger free country as envisioned by her father –the father of the nation - Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujibur Rahman.

A Born Leader
She was born in Tungipara of Gopalganj district on September 28, 1947 – the year marking the births of two countries – India and Pakistan. Bangladesh became a part of Pakistan. Her father spent most of times organizing movements against the repressive regime of Pakistan. Sheikh Hasina as a student leader took part in pro-liberation movements. She actively participated in anti-Aiyub (the then President of Pakistan)

Name: Wirtschaftsbund Wien
Description: Der Österreichische Wirtschaftsbund ist österreichweit die größte und schlagkräftigste politische Interessenvertretung für Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer. Die Erfolge, die der Wirtschaftsbund seit seinem Bestehen erzielen konnte, nützen nicht nur den Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmern, sondern der Wirtschaft insgesamt und schaffen Wohlstand für Generationen.

Name: AOF Danmark
Description:
AOF er langt mere end kurser og foredrag på aftenskoler. 

AOF står f.eks også for
•	Danskundervisning til voksne udlændinge
•	Undervisning til voksne ordblinde (OBU)
•	Forberedende voksenundervisning (FVU)
•	Coaching af arbejdssøgende borgere
•	Aktivering og uddannelse af unge
•	Klæde borgere i Danmark på til at deltage aktivt i demokratiet
•	Debatarrangementer om alt fra udviklingsbistand til brug af digitale løsninger

AOF Danmark er landsforbund for landets AOF Regioner og afdelinger og er formelt ejet af en række medlemsorganisationer.

Alle aktiviteter tager afsæt i formålet… ”at udbrede viden og forståelse for værdier af samfundsmæssig og kulturel karakter, herunder om det internationale samarbejdes betydning.

AOF Danmark skal på samme grundlag medvirke til at udbrede demokratiet i samfundet og stimulere interessen for at deltage aktivt i samfundets organisation.” 

AOF er Danmarks ældste oplysningsforbund.

Name: Ballot Initiative Strategy Center
Description:
The Ballot Initiative Strategy Center (BISC), a 501(c)(4) organization, is the only progressive organization that works across the many policy, organizing, and political organizations, with local, state, and national players to analyze and support the ballot measure landscape.

We work with groups to develop the best overall strategy, and support funders and partners to make the best investments. Our relationships with organizations and funders, whether they are focused on short-term campaigns or long-term movement building, make us the only organization that bridges the many gaps in a crowded space.

No other national organization or network is solely focused on the strategy of running the best ballot measure campaigns or aligning ballot measure campaign efforts across sectors and networks to ensure the most effective use of resources and the greatest impact. We support the campaigns, the state tables, in-state grassroots organizations, and funders alike with important strategic guidance, due diligence and analysis, while training advocates and practitioners in real time – from first time organizers to the most seasoned campaign operatives.

Name: ZDS - Zentralverband der deutschen Seehafenbetriebe
Description:
ZDS represents the German port industry. As a federation of state-level associations and with 170 member companies, ZDS strives to further improve the competitiveness of German seaport operators. ZDS engages German, EU and international stakeholders in economic, commercial, social and wage policy matters, and provides advice and information to its members. ZDS is a member of FEPORT, UNISTOCK and the Logistics Alliance of Germany.

The German seaport operators:

•	170 companies in 21 locations 
•	serve more than a 120,000 ships per year
•	handle more than two thirds of German seaborne foreign trade
•	turn over about 300 m tonnes of cargo of all kinds, including 3.7 m cars and trucks, almost 16 m containers, 24 m tonnes of grain, oil seeds and animal feed as well as 38 m tonnes of coal, gas, oil and oil products
•	secure jobs for up to 500,000 people throughout Germany

To contribute successfully to the German economy, port operators require

•	an efficient transportation network
•	optimised regulatory policy and public administration
•	competitive environment and energy policy
•	secure ports
•	fair wage and social policy

Name: Vert'libéraux genevois
Description:
Nous agissons pour une transition écologique. Nous voulons: sortir des énergies fossiles, généraliser la mobilité douce, tourner le dos à une agriculture intensive et développer un aménagement du territoire harmonieux. Name: Green Party of the United States
Description: The Green Party of the United States is a federation of state Green Parties. Committed to environmentalism, non-violence, social justice and grassroots organizing, Greens are renewing democracy without the support of corporate donors. Greens provide real solutions for real problems. Whether the issue is universal health care, corporate globalization, alternative energy, election reform or decent, living wages for workers, Greens have the courage and independence necessary to take on the powerful corporate interests. The Federal Elections Commission recognizes the Green Party of the United States as the official Green Party National Committee. We are partners with the European Federation of Green Parties and the Federation of Green Parties of the Americas.

Name: Victorian Labor
Description:
The Australian Labor Party is Australia’s oldest political party, dating back to before Federation.

The ALP was first formed in Queensland in 1891 and, during the ten years that followed, separate Labor parties emerged in other colonial states. All were sponsored by the trade union movement, which participated actively in the foundation of the infant political movement.

The ALP became a federal party when the former Australian colonies federated in 1901. As a federal party, it is 20 years older than the Country Party (now known as the National Party) and 45 years older than the Liberal Party.

The Victorian Branch of the ALP was formed at Federation, and was built on a history of labour movement involvement in the Victorian Parliament.

The ALP, both nationally and in Victoria, is a genuine labour party in the sense that trade unions are part of its structure. This distinguishes a labour party from a social democratic party (although they may have common ideals and philosophies) and from broad-based progressive parties such as the United States’ Democratic Party.

Like Australia itself, the ALP is a federal organisation. Each state and territory has its own branch, with its own membership, rules and policies. These branches come together to form a national ALP organisation.

This is expressed most visibly through the National Conference and the National Secretariat, which are responsible for determining the Party’s national direction and administration.

Name: EPP Group in the European Committee of the Regions
Description:
Since its creation in 1994, the European People’s Party Group is a leading force in the European Committee of the Regions; the EU’s assembly of regional and local representatives.

Given that approximately two-thirds of EU legislation is implemented by local and regional authorities, it gives locally and regionally elected representatives of government a say over the content of EU legislation and represents the interests of citizens living and working in the EU’s diverse cities, regions and municipalities.

Name: Kennispunt Lokale Politieke Partijen
Description:
Het Kennispunt lokale politieke partijen biedt ondersteuning aan lokale politieke partijen, die geen gebruik kunnen maken van ondersteuning van een landelijke partij. 

Het Kennispunt bevat de volgende onderdelen:

- Een website met basisinformatie en online modules voor het besturen van politieke verenigingen, met als onderwerpen onder andere oprichting, organisatie en campagne voeren.
- Een trainingsaanbod voor bestuursleden en vrijwilligers van lokale politieke partijen.
- Trainingen voor kandidaat politiek ambtsdragers.
- Een helpdesk om vragen te stellen.
- Een wegwijzer voor volksvertegenwoordigers en bestuurders van lokale politieke partijen naar relevante informatie, opleidingsmogelijkheden en actuele dossiers.

Name: Junger Wirtschaftsrat
Description:
Eine starke Stimme der Jungen Generation

Der Junge Wirtschaftsrat bietet die Plattform für den Dialog zwischen Wirtschaft und Politik – von Anfang an. Junge Unternehmer und Führungskräfte bringen die Themen ihrer Generation auf den Tisch.


Für Führungskräfte und Unternehmer bis 35 Jahre, die gesellschaftliches Engagement in enger Anbindung an politische Entscheidungsträger umsetzen wollen, ist der Junge Wirtschaftsrat die erste Adresse. Bei Veranstaltungen auf Bundesebene wie dem Jungen Wirtschaftstag und der Arbeitsgruppentagung sowie auf Landesebene bei Workshops, Unternehmensbesichtigungen und politischen Diskussionsrunden debattieren die über 800 Mitglieder aktuelle wirtschafts- und gesellschaftspolitische Fragestellungen mit Vertretern aus Parlament, Regierung, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft.


Als Denkfabrik erarbeiten die Mitglieder des Jungen Wirtschaftsrates Lösungsvorschläge und Forderungen der jungen Generation und kommunizieren diese an politischen Entscheidungsträger aller Parteien. Neben der persönlichen Vernetzung der verschiedenen Generationen innerhalb des Wirtschaftsrates fungiert die Jugendorganisation des Wirtschaftsrates vor allem als kreative Ideenschmiede.


Besondere Schwerpunktthemen sind hierbei:

 

    Gewährleistung von Generationengerechtigkeit durch solide Staatsfinanzen

 

    Definition nachhaltiger Wachstums- und Wohlstandsziele

 

    Ausgestaltung einer leistungsfreundlichen Steuer- und Abgabenpolitik

 

    Entwicklung moderner Konzepte zur besseren Vereinbarkeit von Karriere und Familie

 

    Schaffung innovationsfreundlicher Rahmenbedingungen im digitalen Deutschland

 

    Umsetzung einer bezahlbaren, sicheren und umweltfreundlichen Energiepolitik

 

    Stärkung der Unternehmer- und Gründerkultur in Deutschland

Name: Scottish Green Party
Description:
We believe that Scotland can be fairer, greener and healthier.  The Scottish Greens have the people and the policies to make this happen.

Our councillors and MSPs have a solid track record of making a difference. We bring fresh, new, bold ideas to Parliament and Councils. We will work constructively with others who share our aims.

Our Co-Leaders are Lorna Slater MSP and Patrick Harvie MSP.

The registered party office is in Edinburgh at 19b Graham Street.

Name: Community Home Lenders of America
Description:
The Community Home Lenders of America (CHLA)  is a national non-profit association of small and mid-sized community-based mortgage lenders.  The mission of the CHLA is to promote federal mortgage programs, rules, and regulations which treat community mortgage lenders fairly, and which reflect the critical importance that community mortgage lenders play in providing broad access to credit for borrowers, in increasing competition in mortgage markets, and in providing borrowers with quality mortgage services and access to loans at a local level.

Community mortgage lenders face both significant challenges and new growth opportunities as the landscape for mortgage lending and servicing continues to change at an unprecedented rate.  Federal agencies are issuing a number of new regulations under Dodd-Frank, the CFPB continues to grow, and Congress is beginning a vigorous debate on the financial status and role of FHA, on the future of Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac, and on steps that could be taken to bring private capital back into mortgage markets, in order to shrink the footprint of Fannie, Freddie, and FHA.

These changes could have a major impact on community mortgage lenders. However, too often, policy makers in Washington hear only the voices of the biggest players, including so-called “too-big-to-fail” firms – often ignoring the perspective of other lender/servicers in the market.

2101 WILSON BLVD STE 610, ARLINGTON, Virginia, United States.

Name: DM&E
Description:
Danske Maskinstationer og Entreprenører samler virksomheder inden for maskinstations-, entreprenør-, kloakmester- og skoventreprenørområdet i en professionel og synlig brancheorganisation. Organisationen er kendt som videnscenter med et højt og personligt serviceniveau samt sin aktive rådgivning af sine mere end 730 medlemmer. Herfra tilføres medlemsvirksomhederne stor nytteværdi gennem adgang til specialiserede ydelser og aktiv politisk interessevaretagelse. Vi sikrer bl.a., at vore medlemmer bliver opdateret på de lovgivningsmæssige krav og forhold, der vedrører deres branche, samt at de får den rådgivning, de efterspørger.

Danske Maskinstationer og Entreprenørers vision er at samle alle virksomheder inden for jordbrugs-, skov-, kloak- og entreprenørområdet, der imødekommer foreningens betingelser om medlemsforhold i en stærk brancheorganisation. Vi ønsker at fremme vores medlemsvirksomheders virksomhedsdrift samt deres faglige og kollegiale sammenhold gennem rådgivning, møde-, kursus- og netværksaktiviteter samt uddannelse.

Brancheforeningen har hovedkontor i Danmark, Vejle og har pt. 21 ansatte.

Følger du Danske Maskinstationer og Entreprenører på LinkedIn, kan du forvente at blive opdateret på faglige nyheder samt central viden fra branchen. Du vil samtidig blive informeret om branchespecifikke kursus- og netværksaktiviteter samt konferencer.

Læs mere på: www.dmoge.dk

Name: Main Association of the German Wood Industry
Description: The Main Association German Wood Industry and Plastics Processing Industries represents the economic, political and technical interests of the wood industry with around 200,000 employees in 2,300 companies that generate a total turnover of 42 billion euros. The professional spectrum of topics covers the entire value chain along the material wood: from the sawmill industry to industrial wood processing and the furniture industry to construction with wood and the wood packaging industry. In addition it also represents the employers' interests of the wood industry and plastics processing industry. All the sectors represented are united by their commitment to sustainable business.

Name: Industrie- und Handelskammer für Ostfriesland und Papenburg
Description:
Die IHK für Ostfriesland und Papenburg setzt sich für das Gesamtinteresse der regionalen Wirtschaft ein. Wir beraten unsere Mitgliedsbetriebe zu allen Themen der Unternehmensführung - von der Existenzgründung bis zur Unternehmensnachfolge.

Im Dialog mit Politik und Verwaltung vertreten wir engagiert, mit einer tiefen regionalen Verankerung für die Interessen der regionalen Wirtschaft - und setzen Impulse für Wachstum und Wohlstand in der Region.

Eine tragende Säule unserer Arbeit ist die Organisation der dualen Ausbildung vor Ort. Pro Jahr organisieren wir mehr als 3000 Abschlussprüfungen pro Jahr.  Als Mentoren und Wegweiser werben wir in diesem Zusammenhang in Schulen und auf Messen für die Duale Ausbildung - damit unsere Mitgliedsbetriebe auch in Zukunft Zugang zu den besten Fachkräften von Morgen erhalten.

Impressum: www.ihk-emden.de/impressum

Name: IHK Lippe zu Detmold
Description:
Die Industrie- und Handelskammer Lippe zu Detmold (kurz: IHK Lippe) ist das gemeinsame Dienstleistungsunternehmen für über 22.000 Unternehmen und deren 100.000 Mitarbeiter/innen. Für die Mitgliedsunternehmen arbeitet die IHK Lippe als kundenorientierter Dienstleister, kritischer Partner der Politik und unabhängiger Anwalt für Markt und Wettbewerb. 

Aufgaben der IHK Lippe:
 
- Förderung der gewerblichen Wirtschaft in Lippe
 - Vertretung der Gesamtinteressen der Wirtschaft
 - Durchführung öffentlicher Aufgaben

Herzlich willkommen zum aktiven Dialog in der XING-Gruppe:  IHK Lippe zu Detmold

Name: Young Politicians of Canada
Description: The Young Politicians of Canada, are a national, non-partisan, non-profit organization that sustains the purpose of educating and empowering Canada's future leaders. We aim to engage students aged 14-24 in the political world through initiatives, placements, leadership opportunities, and councils. We work to grow young Canadians so that they can cultivate the skills necessary to meaningfully engage within our democratic system. The future of Canada needs a voice and we are the avenue to amplify the message of Canada's youth.

Name: National Democratic Redistricting Committee
Description: The National Democratic Redistricting Committee (NDRC), chaired by the 82nd Attorney General of the United States Eric H. Holder, Jr., is the first-ever strategic hub for a comprehensive redistricting strategy. With the support of former President Barack Obama, as well as key leaders around the country, the NDRC is attacking this problem from every angle to ensure the next round of redistricting is fair and that maps reflect the will of the voters.

Name: Kosmetik- og hygiejnebranchen
Description:
Kosmetik- og hygiejnebranchen er Danmarks største brancheforening for virksomheder der producerer, leverer og distribuerer kosmetik og personlige plejeprodukter og vaske- og rengøringsmidler til det danske og internationale marked.

Som medlem af Kosmetik- og hygiejnebranchen får du adgang til:

 - Vejledning og sparring om regler, love og krav.

 - Seminarer, arrangementer og konferencer. 

 - Politisk interessevaretagelse.

 - Internationalt samarbejde.

 - Netværk.


Læs mere om Kosmetik- og hygiejnebranchen på www.kosmetikoghygiejne.dk

Name: Texas Grain & Feed Association
Description: Established in 1898, TGFA represents the grain handling, flour milling, feed manufacturing and related industries in Texas.

Name: Ensemble Montréal
Description:
Le 2 novembre, on vote pour une équipe et une cheffe qui savent écouter et agir : on vote Soraya ! 

Agissons ensemble. Devenez bénévole dès maintenant   linktr.ee/ensemblemtl 
________

Ensemble Montréal s’engage à bâtir une ville où chaque Montréalais·e bénéficie d’une meilleure qualité de vie. Nous offrons des services municipaux efficaces, une gouvernance transparente et responsable, et tenons compte des réalités uniques de chaque arrondissement avec équité et respect.

Connecté aux véritables priorités des citoyen·nes, Ensemble Montréal est l’alternative crédible pour mener les changements dont Montréal a besoin en 2025 et au-delà.

Name: IOGT-NTO
Description:
IOGT-NTO arbetar för ett tryggare samhälle där ingen far illa av alkohol och andra droger – varken i Sverige eller någon annanstans i världen. 

På LinkedIn berättar vi om alkoholpolitik och vårt påverkansarbete. För att veta mer om vår övriga verksamhet, följ oss på Facebook och Instagram.

Name: Raajneeti Strategies (RASTRA)
Description:
Helping Democracy Win

•	Election services from Planning to implementation 

•	Image building of political candidates 

•	Researching and Launching campaigns that influence masses

•	An experienced winning team for a sure win

•	In-depth research of political scenario on Macro and Micro level

•	Political evaluation with Technology and reach at ground level 

•	Engaging the energy of youth in politics
Vision:
We at Rastra will strive to build a prosperous India through supporting the development of a political system that derives strength from feedback received from the electorate and thus addresses the requirements of the citizens. 
Mission:
We are on a mission to help the democracy win by supporting a political system that is people centric. 

How we can help you win elections ..?
Our democracy wins, every time a free and fair election is conducted in our country. Another vital aspect is the winning of right candidates who can guide the country on the path of progress. 
Our team of professionals helps you win the elections by planning, organizing and implementing your election campaign in the most effective manner. Strategic management of election starts with segmenting the electorate based on their social, financial, religious and political status. Carrying out thorough research with the help of ground survey, interacting with opinion maker, consultation with leaders from all castes and other methods we try to understand the reasons that will make them prefer one candidate or party over the other. We try to get the pulse of the electorate.

Name: Danske Byggecentre
Description:
The Trade Association Danish Building Centres members are among Denmark’s most significant building centers, and our mission is to protect their interests and give them general counseling so they are able to perform well as a company in a difficult market. Our members is not only suppliers of building materials to individuals, building enterprises and government contractors around the country - They are simultaneously considered as modern efficient centers of knowledge, logistics and consulting.

In Danish 

Danske Byggecentre – hvor der handles der bygges

Vi er brancheforening for landets mest betydende byggecentre, og vores formål er at varetage branchens interesser internt i forhold til medlemmerne og eksternt i forhold til branchens berøringsflader i indland og udland. Vi mener, at glæden ved at drive byggecenter i Danmark skal være større end besværet.

Vores medlemmer er ikke blot leverandører af byggematerialer til private, erhvervsvirksomheder og offentlige kunder i hele landet, de er samtidig moderne og effektive centre for viden, logistik og rådgivning.

I Danske Byggecentre arbejder vi hver dag på at gøre det nemmere, billigere og mere effektivt at bygge og renovere over alt i Danmark. Vi er med, hvor kontorhuse, boliger og kulturcentre skyder op. Hvor nye byrum og oplevelser opstår. Hvor der energirenoveres og -optimeres. Vi leverer de kvalitetsmaterialer, det værktøj og den rådgivning der skal til, for at bygherrer, ingeniører og arkitekter kan sætte nye projekter i søen og få økonomien til at løbe rundt – både i byggeriet og i Danmark. 

Det der adskiller medlemmer af Danske Byggecentre fra de fleste andre leverandører, er vores evne til at gå ind i kundens problematik og forstå den til bunds. Vi har erfaring fra selv de mest komplekse byggerier og kan rådgive erfarne bygherrer, ingeniører, håndværkere og arkitekter om valg af materialer.

Name: Sage Media Planning & Placement
Description:
Sage Media Planning & Placement creates winning media planning strategies for progressive candidates & causes  Our skilled media strategists use broadcast television, cable, radio, digital, print, and outdoor advertising to create media campaigns as broad or as narrow as our clients need to achieve their goals.

Sage Media’s competitive tracking department monitors and analyzes opponents’ spending to give clients the greatest amount of information possible when planning and placing their media. There’s no shortcut to doing this well. We are committed to providing our campaigns with the context to make wise choices.

Name: Democracy Earth Foundation
Description:
The internet transformed how we share culture, work together —and even fall in love— but governance has remained unchanged for over 200 years. With the rise of open source software and peer to peer networks, political intermediation is no longer necessary. We are a Y Combinator backed non-profit building protocols with smart contracts that allows decentralized governance for any kind of organization.

We started the development of DemocracyOS, considered the largest open source effort for online voting. Founded the first digital political party in Argentina, Partido de la Red (The Net Party) that got over 1% of the votes in its first election in 2013. And published 'Hacktivismo' along with Random House, a manual to hack governments that became a bestseller in Latin America.

Name: Physicians for Reproductive Health
Description:
Physicians for Reproductive Health unites the medical community and concerned supporters. Together, we work to improve access to comprehensive reproductive health care, including contraception and abortion, especially to meet the health care needs of economically disadvantaged patients.

•	We bring the physician’s distinctive voice to debates over reproductive health care
•	We provide leadership and tools so that physicians can speak up and take action
•	We use scientific expertise and our patients’ real-life experiences to influence legislation,medical practice, and public opinion
•	We advocate for reproductive health as a core part of all medical curricula
•	We provide leadership and tools so that physicians can speak up and take action
•	We offer the strength of our network to physicians all over the world

Name: Common Defense
Description: Common Defense is a diverse, grassroots organization of U.S. veterans and military families who are fighting to preserve the core values we sacrificed to uphold and defend. Together we vow to protect our communities from hate and violence, to serve on the front lines for social, economic, and environmental justice, and to champion a truly equitable and representative democracy.

Name: Nyt Europa
Description:
Nyt Europa er en non-profit organisation, som arbejder for et progressivt EU. Vi tror på, at EU kan spille en central rolle for at sikre en bæredygtig verden. En verden, hvor der er økonomisk, social, miljømæssig og demografisk balance. Vi tror på demokrati på tværs af landegrænser. Et EU og en verden med bæredygtige demokratier, formelt såvel som uformelt.

Demokrati har således været et omdrejningspunkt for Nyt Europa siden grundlæggelsen. Vi arbejder for at supplere de nationale demokratier med et europæisk og med tiden også et globalt demokrati. Et velfungerende europæisk demokrati handler om velfungerende institutioner, men det handler også om at sikre et levende demokrati, hvor vi som borgere tager del i udviklingen af fælles løsninger på fælles problemer.

Nyt Europa blev grundlagt i 1997 af Steen Gade (MF, SF) som fortsat er foreningens formand. Alle der er interesseret, og som deler Nyt Europas grundlæggende synspunkter, kan blive medlem af Nyt Europa. Det koster kr. 200 for almindeligt  medlemskab og 150 for studerende.

Nyt Europa ledes af en bestyrelse, tidligere kaldet Arbejdsudvalget, som i årenes løb har omfattet mange personer, som er kendt fra det politiske liv. Herunder Helle Thorning-Schmidt, Sofie Carsten Nielsen, Mette Frederiksen, Kirsten Jensen, Kirsten Larsen, Henrik Dahl, Naser Khadar og mange andre.

Name: FES Just Climate
Description:
FES Just Climate acts as a think thank about current and coming trends, and a policy advisor in ongoing debates. We support FES offices and their partners in shaping the industrial revolution of our times. We focus on energy, industrial, structural and labor policies, and the European Green Deal.

In 2021 the Friedrich-Ebert-Stiftung launched a competence center for Climate and Social Justice, based in Brussels. Climate and social policies must be two sides of the same European coin in the future. We need to develop climate-neutral energy systems and industries. Simultaneously, we need to safeguard and strengthen the welfare state, local participation and workers’ rights.

Name: Dallas County Republican Party
Description:
The Republican philosophy is a true reflection of traditional Texas values. It is these values core Republican principles that will sustain Texas into the future and continue to make our State strong, prosperous and proud. We support:

Strong Families
Families intent on giving their children the hope of a better tomorrow, the promise of a safe and secure today, and an appreciation and respect of yesterday.

Principled, Innovative Leadership
