Principled leaders with an understanding of Texas’ heritage and a clear vision for Texas’ future. Leadership that is unwavering in the face of criticism, steadfast when confronted with adversity, and committed to building a better State.

Limited Government
A government that promotes policies to unlock individual potential and unleash economic growth. Government that does not try to be all things to all people.

Honest Compassion
A society assisting those in need rather than a government trying to solve every problem by just throwing more money at it.

Opportunity For All
The opportunity to chart one’s own course, start a business, chase a dream, or build a life regardless of gender, race, or religion.

Quality Education
An educational system that prepares children for tomorrow’s workplace regardless of race, wealth or geographical location. Education is the bedrock of freedom and the gateway to opportunity.

Personal Responsibility
Individuals taking personal responsibility for their own actions and a criminal justice system based on this idea. With freedom comes responsibility.

Freedom
Freedom that is God given, affirmed by our Founding Fathers, articulated in the Declaration of Independence, and protected by the Constitution.

Rugged Individualism
The entrepreneurial spirit of the individual that continues to solidify Texas as a world economic power.

Name: Nova Scotia Federation of Municipalities
Description: The Federation enables effective local government for Nova Scotia’s communities by facilitating strategic advocacy, education and collaboration. (formerly Union of Nova Scotia Municipalities)

Name: Die Grünen Österreich
Description: Nachhaltigkeit in der Wirtschaft, Natur- und Klimaschutz, Fairteilen von Arbeit und Einkommen, Solidarität in der Gesellschaft, Demokratie und Mitbestimmung, Österreich im internationalen Gefüge - das sind die Eckpfeiler des Grünen Programms.

Name: Dachverband Schweizer Jugendparlamente DSJ
Description:
Der Dachverband Schweizer Jugendparlamente DSJ ist das parteipolitisch neutrale praxisorientierte Kompetenzzentrum für politische Bildung und politische Partizipation von jungen Menschen. Oder kurz gesagt: Der DSJ will junge Menschen für Politik und die Teilhabe daran begeistern.

Dieses Ziel verfolgt der DSJ mit der Förderung seiner Mitglieder, den Jugendparlamenten, sowie mit seinen Angeboten easyvote und engage.ch. Damit bietet der DSJ eine breite Palette von Informations- und Mitwirkungsmöglichkeiten im politischen System der Schweiz an. Daneben leistet der DSJ wichtige Grundlagenarbeit in seinen beiden Kernthemen politische Bildung und politische Partizipation, indem er Wissen generiert, Akteur:innen untereinander vernetzt und gewonnene Erkenntnisse einfach verständlich mit der breiten Öffentlichkeit teilt.

Name: PerspectieF, ChristenUnie-jongeren
Description: PerspectieF is the youth organisation of the ChristenUnie (ChristianUnion), a political party in the Netherlands. PerspectieF distinguishes itself from other Dutch political youth organisations by our view on life, society and politics. This view and this vision is based on our belief in God and our faith in what He makes known to us in the Bible. PerspectieF has around 2000 members between 12-30 years.

Name: ECOWAS CEDEAO
Description: Welcome to the Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS). Established on May 28 1975

Name: 89 Initiative
Description: The 89 Initiative is the first pan-European think-do tank. Our aim is to reinvigorate the EU. Based at LSE's European Institute.

Name: Secretaría Ejecutiva COSEFIN
Description:
Somos la Secretaría Ejecutiva del Consejo de Ministros de Hacienda o Finanzas de Centroamérica, Panamá y la República Dominicana (COSEFIN), que es una instancia de carácter regional donde se discuten temáticas relacionadas a los sistemas de armonización, desarrollo, información y convergencia de las políticas fiscales.

Somos parte del Sub sistema económico del Sistema de Integración Centroamericana SICA.

Name: GroenLinks-PvdA Zwolle
Description: Wij bouwen aan een groen en sociaal Zwolle – een stad van verbondenheid, waar zorgen voor elkaar net zo vanzelfsprekend is als zorgen voor onze leefomgeving.

Name: Handelskammer und Arbeitgeberverband Graubünden
Description:
Die HKGR ist die Stimme der Bündner Wirtschaft. Klar, konstruktiv und mit Weitblick setzen wir uns für gute Rahmenbedingungen für Graubünden ein. Wir pushen den Arbeitsstandort, vernetzen kluge Köpfe und bringen Entscheidungsträger:innen an einen Tisch. Lokal verankert, national vernetzt und immer mit Blick auf morgen.

Als Mitglied der HKGR sind Sie Teil eines starken Netzwerks, das sich für beste Rahmenbedingungen, neue Impulse und echten Austausch einsetzt. Wir bringen Sie mit den richtigen Leuten zusammen, vertreten Ihre Interessen und unterstützen Sie mit wertvollen Services rund um Export, Recht und Bildung sowie exklusiven Veranstaltungen. Gemeinsam gestalten wir die Zukunft der Bündner Wirtschaft – wirtschaftsliberal, weltoffen und verantwortungsvoll.

Name: Australian Labor Party (NSW Branch)
Description: NSW Labor is the oldest branch of Australia's oldest political party. Join today at http://nswlabor.org.au

Name: WESTERN DAKOTA ENERGY ASSOCIATION
Description: The Western Dakota Energy Association provides leadership on state, federal and local energy issues to ensure an effective exchange of ideas. North Dakota’s oil and coal taxes are 'in lieu of' of property taxes and the taxes are shared with the state as well as the local political subdivisions of counties, cities and school districts. The oil counties consist of 17 oil and gas producing counties in western North Dakota. The coal counties are located in central North Dakota where coal is converted to electricity in Oliver, Mercer and McLean counties. Communication with membership, education of legislators and fair representation on a federal and state level are goals of the association.

Name: Planned Parenthood Alliance Advocates
Description:
Planned Parenthood Alliance Advocates, Serving AK, HI, ID, IN, KY, & WA (PPAA) is an independent, nonprofit, nonpartisan organization that aims to educate, mobilize, and engage people and policy-makers on reproductive health, rights, and justice issues in Alaska, Hawaii, Idaho, Indiana, Kentucky, and Washington. PPAA lobbies and educates to advance Planned Parenthood's mission and also engages in limited electoral activities. 

The mission of Planned Parenthood Alliance Advocates is to encourage and protect informed individual choice regarding reproductive health care, advocate public policies that guarantee the right to choice and full and nondiscriminatory access to reproductive health care, and foster and preserve a social and political climate favorable to the exercise of reproductive choice through voter education, candidate endorsement and other means.

Name: German County Association
Description: The German County Association (DLT) is the association of the 294 German counties at the federal level. Its direct members are the Landkreistage (county councils) of the 13 Flächenländer (federal states), which represent the municipal interests in their respective federal state. It represents three quarters of the local authorities, around 96% of the land area and, with 55 million inhabitants, 68% of the population of Germany.

Name: People's Action
Description:
People’s Action builds the power of poor and working people, in rural, suburban and urban areas, to win change through issue campaigns and elections. When we say “poor and working people,” we mean all of us who are hurt by the 1% and corporations: poor people, low-income people, working class people, professionals, small business owners and unemployed people. We mean Black, white, Latino, Asian and Native people. We mean youth and students, and we mean retired people, elderly people and people with disabilities. We mean men, women, transgender, and gender non-conforming. We mean straight people and LGBTQ people. We mean citizens, and we mean immigrants. All of us.

You can find job openings from our network and other progressive organizations at https://movementbuillders.us.

Name: Red Wine and Blue
Description: Red Wine & Blue is a community of over 500K women that uses digital media and friend-to-friend organizing to change the world, one suburb at a time. Our team uniquely blends content and organizing to keep women engaged in the civic process year-round.

Name: Referendariatskommission
Description: Die Referendariatskommission beim Bundesverband rechtswissenschaftlicher Fachschaften e.V. bündelt die Interessenvertretungen der Referendar:innen bundesweit und wirkt gezielt auf Verbesserungen im juristischen Vorbereitungsdienst sowie in der zweiten Staatsprüfung hin.

Name: figawa e.V.
Description:
We are figawa. 

We
• are over 750 active experts,
• from more than 275 member companies. 
• with a total annual turnover of over 34 billion euros and employees,
• actively engaged in over 1,200 national and European standardisation bodies.

We are stakeholder, innovation booster and a knowledge network.
We create knowledge and sharpen visions. We bring interests together, drive them forward and secure them. For everyone who shapes safe and sustainable technologies around gas, liquid fuels and water for our common future.

To this end, we promote uniform and demanding standardization and are involved in legislative processes. In this way we are creating the basis for approval, testing and certification, and ensuring legal certainty for all market players.

Our approach is one of openness to technology in the heat and water supply sector and one which favours the transition from fossil to climate- neutral fuels.

How can we support you?

figawa e.V.
Mevissenstraße 1, 50668 Cologne +49 221 270799-0
info@figawa.de 

Privacy policy: https://figawa.org/datenschutz-social-media/

Name: Česká pirátská strana
Description: Moderní demokratická strana. Obrana svobody, ochrana občanů před šikanou, kontrola moci a zjednodušení státu pomocí technologií.

Name: Azione
Description: Azione è il luogo di mobilitazione dell'Italia che lavora, produce, studia e fatica. L'Italia stanca degli scontri inconcludenti tra tifoserie e degli slogan privi di contenuti.

Name: United Conservative Party of Alberta
Description: We're fighting for a stronger Alberta under the leadership of Danielle Smith.

Name: Agora Election Observation
Description:
Agora Election Observation provides a youth perspective on elections in Europe. We do this by deploying young people on election observation missions to specifically assess youth engagement.

This is important because Young people are underrepresented in elections across Europe. We aim to understand why.

Name: Labour: Women in Tech
Description: Promoting more girls in STEM subjects and women in tech and allied sectors. Campaigning to both smash barriers and for a Labour Government to make this happen.

Name: Concerned Women for America
Description:
Concerned Women for America protects and promotes Biblical values and Constitutional principles through prayer, education, and advocacy.

We help people focus on seven core issues, which we have determined need Biblical principles most and where we can have the greatest impact. At its root, each of these issues is a battle over worldviews. 

CWA is a unique blend of policy experts and an activist network of people in small towns and big cities across the country working to address mutually held goals and concerns. 

As a non-profit organization, CWA works with many other groups around the country.

Concerned Women for America (CWA) affirms the Bible’s unmistakable standard that there is right and wrong; that God is the Authority who established right and wrong by creation and by revelation in His Word, the Bible; that He has sent a Savior, Jesus Christ, to free us from our sin (wrong) by simple repentance and to enable us through the Holy Spirit to do what is right.

Priorities:
Life
Sexual Exploitation
Education
Marriage, Family, Religious Freedom
Israel
National Sovereignty

Name: Wij De Ouders
Description:
Wij De Ouders is een collectief van ouders die bezorgd zijn over de effecten van de coronamaatregelen op de geestelijke en lichamelijke gezondheid van onze kinderen.
Door te verbinden en elkaar te bekrachtigen willen wij onze kinderen beschermen.

Name: GroenLinks Zwolle
Description:
Een duurzaam en sociaal Zwolle. Daar zet GroenLinks Zwolle zich voor in. Onze zeven fractieleden doen dit via de gemeenteraad, onze twee wethouders doen dit in het gemeentebestuur.
Daarnaast zetten tientallen leden en sympathisanten zich in om Zwolle groener en socialer te maken. We organiseren bijvoorbeeld filmavonden, doen mee aan schoonmaakacties en zetten elk jaar een persoon of organisatie in het zonnetje met de 'Groene Prijs'. 
Wil je ook meedoen? In ons campagneteam of als steunfractielid? Stuur een berichtje naar bestuur@groenlinkszwolle.nl, of kijk op onze website.

Name: Democrats for the Illinois House
Description:
Under the leadership of new Speaker Chris Welch, Democrats for Illinois House (DIH) is dedicated to promoting excellent work of the caucus, protecting incumbents, and winning competitive races. 

The Illinois House Democratic Caucus is one of the most diverse in the nation. DIH is proud to celebrate the diversity of its members and caucuses representing Black (22), Latinx (10), Asian American (4), Women (39) and LGBTQ+ (4) members.

DIH is committed to creating an environment that is inclusive and welcoming to all people.

Name: Republican Liberty Caucus
Description: Founded in 1991, the Republican Liberty Caucus (RLC) is the nation's oldest continuously operating liberty group. Organized as a 527(c) the RLC works to advance the principles of limited government, free markets and individual liberty within the Republican Party.

Name: VHP
Description:
Grondbeginselen en ideologie VHP
De VHP is een politieke organisatie die zich in haar politiek laat leiden door idealistische en staatkundige beginselen, de Grondwet, en internationale verdragen.

De volgende tien grondbeginselen worden door de VHP geacht de basis te vormen voor duurzame ontwikkeling van Suriname:

1  De VHP streeft naar een harmonieuze Surinaamse samenleving welke haar krachten put uit de vrijheid en verscheidenheid in religie, etniciteit, cultuur, persoonlijke overtuiging, democratie en vrije meningsuiting.

2  De VHP staat voor verbroedering, natieversterking en solidariteit.

3   De VHP staat voor een democratische rechtsstaat met scheiding van de drie machten en geeft invulling aan haar politiek bestuurlijk beleid via sociaal-democratische en sociaal-liberale principes.

4   De VHP staat voor een staatsbestuur gebaseerd op de principes van goed bestuur, sterke overheidsinstituten, openbaarheid, voorspelbaarheid, transparantie en decentralisatie.

5  De VHP staat voor vrijheid, gelijkheid en broederschap.

6   De VHP staat voor hoogwaardig onderwijs, persoonlijke ontplooiing, emancipatie en het ontwikkelen van talenten.

7   De VHP staat voor het vergroten van het nationaal inkomen, welvaart, welzijn en sociale rechtvaardigheid voor iedere burger: het rechtvaardig verdelen van het nationaal inkomen en het garanderen van bestaanszekerheden zoals werkgelegenheid, en woon- en leef voorzieningen voor iedere burger

8   De VHP staat voor een sociaal-liberale samenleving met een gereguleerde vrije markteconomie, diversificatie van de economie, en ondernemerschap
9   De VHP staat voor de groene ontwikkeling van Suriname, waarbij de balans tussen economie en duurzame ontwikkeling vraagt om politieke keuzes voor o.a. smart agrarische productie, natuurontwikkeling, milieuvriendelijke productie, ICT ontwikkeling en mobiliteit, schone en leefbare buurten en stadsontwikkeling, en duurzame energieproductie.

Name: Arbejdsmiljørådgiverne
Description:
Arbejdsmiljørådgiverne er brancheforeningen for autoriserede arbejdsmiljørådgivere, virksomhedsinterne arbejdsmiljøfunktioner og andre arbejdsmiljø- og sundhedsfremmekonsulenter. 

Arbejdsmiljørådgiverne er således de danske arbejdsmiljørådgivningsvirksomheders fælles samarbejdsorgan og talerør.

På vores virksomhedsside kan du finde information om "Lab" - Arbejdsmiljøkonferencen i Nyborg og andre spændende ting.

Følg med her på siden og vær en del af et dynamisk og spændende miljø der slår et slag for arbejdsmiljørådgivning og som forsøger at fremme fokusset på arbejdsmiljørådgivning ved at påvirke relevante aktører.

Name: Niedersachsen.digital
Description:
Niedersachsen.digital ist die Plattform der digitalen Vorreiter Niedersachsens. Wir vernetzen  die digitalen Köpfe unseres Landes und teilen deren Wissen. Wir stellen Best-Practice-Lösungen aus Niedersachsen vor und diskutieren aktuelle Trends.
Alles für ein Ziel: Mehr Niedersachsen nachhaltig zu digitalen Vorreitern zu machen.

Name: Kaplan Strategies
Description:
Doug Kaplan leads Kaplan Strategies, a premier firm excelling in public relations and political consulting. With a track record of over 5,000 campaigns and 500+ public opinion polls, Kaplan's expertise has positioned the firm as a strategic powerhouse in campaign and market research services. Specializing in public relations, digital marketing, advanced polling, and call center management, Kaplan Strategies serves a broad spectrum of clients, including non-profits, public affairs, and private companies.

Over 11 years, Doug Kaplan has developed innovative marketing strategies, significantly impacting the industry. The firm is renowned for its cutting-edge approach to call center technologies and digital marketing, ensuring messages reach target audiences effectively.

A hallmark of Kaplan Strategies is its proprietary polling system, designed to maximize voter participation while maintaining cost efficiency. This system, alongside comprehensive market research, enables the firm to uncover business opportunities, optimizing client profits.

Our team of experts is adept at creating high-impact messaging across various media, enhancing the reach and effectiveness of political and non-profit campaigns. As a one-stop shop for political campaigns, Kaplan Strategies under Doug’s leadership offers tailored, result-driven solutions.

In summary, Kaplan Strategies, guided by Doug Kaplan's visionary leadership, stands out for its innovative services and successful track record. Our commitment to excellence and adaptability positions us as a trusted partner for clients seeking impactful campaign strategies.

Name: Hansard Society
Description: Founded in 1944, the Hansard Society is the UK’s leading source of independent research and advice on Parliament and parliamentary affairs.

Name: SMÅKRAFTFORENINGA
Description: SMÅKRAFTFORENINGA er en organisasjon for de som bygger og eier vannkraftverk med installert effekt under 10 MW.

Name: Danmarks Biblioteksforening
Description:
Danmarks Biblioteksforening er et forum for politikere og fagfolk, der interesserer sig for kultur, oplysning og biblioteker.

Foreningens formål er at fremme dansk biblioteksvæsen og virke for samarbejde og udveksling af erfaringer og ideer inden for hele kulturområdet med relation til bibliotekerne, inklusive kultur- og oplysningsinstitutioner i videste forstand.

Ca. 80% af befolkningen er repræsenteret i foreningen via de kommunale medlemskaber

Name: Tehreek e Labbaik Pakistan
Description:
Tehreek e Labbaik Pakistan 

Jab Deen takht pe ayega 
Har muslim izat paye ga

Name: The Campaign School at Yale
Description:
The Campaign School at Yale University is a nonpartisan, issue-neutral leadership program, whose mission is to increase the number and influence of women in elected and appointed office in the United States and around the globe. The Campaign School at Yale University has been inspiring and training women to lead for over twenty-five years.

Contact us at info@TCSYale.org or 203.734.7385!

Name: GRÜNE Schweiz
Description: Wir sind der Wandel. Wir übernehmen Verantwortung. Wir schaffen Zukunft.

Name: OECD Watch
Description: OECD Watch is a global civil society network with more than 130 members in over 50 countries. Membership consists of a diverse range of non-governmental organisations (NGOs) as well as grassroots and community groups that share a common vision of the need for corporate accountability for negative impacts on people and the planet. The network is formally recognised as the representative of civil society to the OECD committee that promotes the OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises on Responsible Business Conduct (Guidelines).

Name: DER MITTELSTANDSVERBUND - ZGV e.V. (SME Groups Germany)
Description: DER MITTELSTANDSVERBUND (SME Groups Germany) is the leading professional association of cooperations between small and medium sized enterprises. DER MITTELSTANDSVERBUND unites companies from the retail, crafts and services sectors as well as the production industry. DER MITTELSTANDSVERBUND represents around 230.000 independent entrepreneurs which are organized in about 300 groups. The legal form differs between the groups. Whereas around the half of the groups reside as registered cooperatives, the other groups are limited liability companies or stock corporations.

Name: DAKOFO
Description: DAKOFO er brancheforening for de danske korn- og foderstofvirksomheder, samt en række internationale handelshuse med hovedsæde i Danmark.

Name: NORDMETALL Verband der Metall- und Elektroindustrie e.V.
Description: Der Arbeitgeberverband NORDMETALL ist der Zusammenschluss von 290 Unternehmen der Metall- und Elektroindustrie in Bremen, Hamburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Schleswig-Holstein und im nordwestlichen Niedersachsen. Sie sind das „Herz der Wirtschaft“: Unternehmen aus Maschinen-, Anlagen-, Flugzeug-, Schiff- und Automobilbau, aus Elektro- und Medizintechnik, Metallerzeugung und -verarbeitung, in denen insgesamt 140.000 Menschen arbeiten. Für diese Unternehmen ist NORDMETALL Schutzschild, Lotse, Türöffner und Kontaktbörse.

Name: BridgeUSA
Description: BridgeUSA brings together political leaders of all backgrounds for virtuous discussion on important political issues. Our organization works with America’s future leaders on college campuses to foster spaces wherein a diverse range of ideas can engage one another through the practice of responsible discourse.

Name: Génération Écologie
Description:
Le parti de la décroissance et de l'écologie intégrale démocratique. Compte officiel de Génération Écologie. Mouvement animé par 
Delphine Batho.

Name: CLAPES UC
Description: En el Centro Latinoamericano de Políticas Económicas y Sociales de la Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile, Clapes UC; formado por las facultades de Ciencias Económicas y Administrativas, Ciencias Sociales, Derecho, Ingeniería, Historia, Geografía y Ciencia Política, y Medicina; se investigan, presentan y discuten ideas relacionadas con los incentivos para el crecimiento económico, el mejoramiento de la productividad, la creación de empleos y el aumento de la inversión. Analizamos además el aumento de la competencia en los mercados y la disminución de la pobreza y la desigualdad de ingresos compatible con el crecimiento económico.

Name: Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion (MIT) in Niedersachsen
Description:
Im MIT-Landesvorstand engagieren sich Unternehmer, Führungskräfte aus der Wirtschaft und Politiker aus ganz Niedersachsen. Gemeinsam beraten Sie über die strategische und inhaltliche Ausrichtung der MIT und erarbeiten Lösungen, um die Rahmenbedingungen für Familienunternehmen und die Wirtschaft insgesamt zu verbessern.

Die Niedersachsen-MIT ist mit rund 4.500 Mitgliedern in Niedersachsen der zweitgrößte Landesverband der MIT. Die Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion (MIT) ist der stärkste und einflussreichste parteipolitische Wirtschaftsverband in Deutschland und Europa. Die MIT vertritt die Interessen des Mittelstands, dem Rückgrat von Volkswirtschaft und Gesellschaft. Sie setzt sich für die Soziale Marktwirtschaft und mehr Unternehmergeist in der Politik ein.

Name: Dansk Erhverv - Forsvar
Description:
Dansk Erhverv Forsvar repræsenterer en bred vifte af produktions-, service- og handelsvirksomheder, herunder små og mellemstore virksomheder, der leverer til Forsvaret og den øvrige forsvarsindustri. Vores indsats i forsvarssektoren fokuserer på at styrke offentlige-private samarbejder, med særligt fokus på en større anvendelse af disse i Forsvaret. Vi arbejder desuden for at forbedre rammevilkårene for forsvarserhvervet, herunder på områder som sikkerhedsgodkendelser, deltagelse i Forsvarets udbud og eksportkontrol. Vi har også særligt fokus på vilkårene for iværksættere inden for forsvarsområdet.
Derudover arbejder vi for at styrke relationer mellem Forsvaret og erhvervslivet, herunder gennem formalisering af erhvervsrelevant indhold i værnepligten og en mere effektiv brug af reserven. Endelig prioriterer vi den grønne omstilling af Forsvaret og arbejder for en øget internationalisering af dansk forsvarserhverv.

Kontakt Dansk Erhverv Forsvarssektoren på mail: forsvar@danskerhverv.dk

Name: Grakom
Description:
Danish Association for Communication, Design & Media (Grakom) is a trade and employers’ association. Its goal is to strengthen the profitability of Grakoms business members and at the same time ensure the greatest freedom of action as possible.

As a trade association, Grakom monitors the developments in market conditions, legislation, technology, environment, etc. This knowledge is communicated to the members via Grakoms magazine, newsletters, website, courses, and member meetings.

As an employers’ association, Grakom looks after the interests of the members through negotiation and interpretation of collective agreements, questions relating to employment law, advises on working environment questions, and educational matters.

Grakom represents more than 500 Danish companies, among these graphic companies, printing houses, advertisement and communication agencies, packaging and label companies, bookbinding companies, display companies, suppliers, companies with secondary connection to the industry and associations with the same focus. 

Grakom is counselling and informing the companies about law, collective agreements, CSR, environment and conditions of the industry. All counselling from Grakom is expert based and build on a detailed knowledge of the industry. 

Grakom is a member of several international organisations, such as Intergraf, FESPA, FTA Europe and Egin.

Name: Jolt Action
Description:
Jolt is a Texas-based multi-issue organization that builds the political power and influence of Latinos in our democracy. 

Jolt brings together Latinos from across Texas to win on the issues that matter. Jolt doesn’t stand for any one party or politician — it stands for the Latino community, families, and parents who worked hard to give their children everything they didn’t have. Jolt supports Latinos to make change by making sure they have a say in how Texas is run.

Name: Bundesverband der Betreiber medizinischer Versorgungszentren (BBMV) e. V.
Description:
Der Bundesverband der Betreiber medizinischer Versorgungszentren (BBMV) e.V. wurde Anfang 2020 gegründet und vertritt MVZ-Gruppen der haus- und fachärztlichen Versorgung.

Der BBMV vertritt die Interessen der medizinischen Versorgungszentren (MVZ), der dort Beschäftigten, sowie der Unternehmensgruppen, die die MVZ mit nichtärztlichen Kapitalgebern betreiben, gegenüber Politik und Gesellschaft und sorgt innerhalb der Mitglieder für hohe Standards und beste Behandlungsqualität.

Wesentlich für den Erfolg unserer Mitglieder sind ihr guter Ruf, eine hochwertige Versorgungsqualität und ein langfristiges Engagement für die Gesundheit ihrer Patientinnen und Patienten.
Die Mitglieder des BBMV orientieren sich dabei am Leitbild des ehrbaren Kaufmanns. Und das aus gutem Grund: Der ehrbare Kaufmann verfolgt ein langfristiges Geschäftsmodell, welches im Einklang mit den Bedürfnissen und Interessen der Gesellschaft steht. Unsere Mitglieder übernehmen damit nicht nur einseitig Verantwortung für den rein wirtschaftlichen Erfolg ihrer Einrichtung, sondern übernehmen Verantwortung gegenüber der Allgemeinheit, den Patientinnen und Patienten sowie ihren Beschäftigten. Sie handeln im besten Sinne des Wortes nachhaltig.

Name: Familjen Helsingborg
Description: Familjen Helsingborg är en plats i nordvästra hörnet av Skåne och ett samarbete mellan kommunerna Bjuv, Båstad, Helsingborg, Höganäs, Klippan, Landskrona, Perstorp, Svalöv, Åstorp, Ängelholm och Örkelljunga.

Name: Wirtschaftsbund Vorarlberg
Description: Der Wirtschaftsbund ist die politische Interessensvertretung aller unternehmerisch denkenden Menschen, er nimmt auf Politik und Gesellschaft Einfluss, damit wirtschaftsfreundliche Rahmenbedingungen für die Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer gesichert sind. Der Wirtschaftsbund ist Ihr kompetenter und umsetzungsstarker Partner, wenn es um die Schaffung optimaler Rahmenbedingungen für Vorarlbergs Unternehmen und deren Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter geht.

Name: Europabevægelsen
Description:
Meld dig ind i Europabevægelsen her: https://europabevaegelsen.dk/fb-bliv-medlem/

Europabevægelsen er en tværpolitisk forening for alle, der vil Europa.
Foreningen har eksisteret i mere end 65 år, og der er Europabevægelser i 41 af de europæiske lande.

Europabevægelsen er til for dig, der gerne vil markere, at du er europæer. I Europabevægelsen arbejder vi aktivt for at styrke EU-debatten i Danmark og sikre en folkelig forankring af det europæiske i Danmark. Vores mål er også at bidrage med nye ideer og initiativer og hele tiden sætte fokus på EU-debatten i Danmark. Vi ønsker, at EU er mere på skoleskemaet, i avisspalterne og i debatten over aftenbordet!

Name: Unifor National
Description:
Unifor is a Canadian union with 320,000 members in every sector across the country. 

Unifor works to protect members and all working people. The union plays a leadership role in building thriving, safe workplaces and a strong economy so all workers in Canada have a good job, a decent standard of living and greater equality. 

Our union and members participate in our communities and in the political process to make Canadian society more just and equitable for everyone. Unifor advocates for and defends the economic and social rights of working people, including their human rights and their right to: safe work, secure employment, a wage and benefits that provide a decent standard of living, and dignity, equity and mutual respect in the workplace. 

Unifor was established on Labour Day in 2013, as a result of the merger of the Canadian Auto Workers union (CAW) and the Communications, Energy and Paperworkers union (CEP). Unifor has already proven itself to be a strong advocate for working people and an influencer of public opinion and policy. 

Follow us on Twitter @Unifortheunion or @SyndicatUnifor

Name: Parti libéral du Québec
Description:
Le Parti libéral du Québec (PLQ) est un parti politique œuvrant dans la province de Québec. Il est aussi le plus ancien parti politique de la province, présent depuis 1867.

Veuillez noter qu'une Nétiquette (www.plq.org/netiquette) est en vigueur sur la page LinkedIn du Parti libéral du Québec. Nous vous invitons à la consulter afin de vous assurer que vos publications en respectent les orientations. Cela nous permet d'offrir une plateforme de discussion agréable pour tous les usagers.

Name: Arbeitgeberverband Region Basel
Description:
Der Arbeitgeberverband Region Basel ist 2007 aus der Fusion zweier fast 90-Jahre-alter Verbände entstanden: aus dem Basler Volkswirtschaftsbund und dem Arbeitgeber-Verband Basel. Der neue Arbeitgeberverband Region Basel umfasst heute über 2'500 Einzelmitglieder (Firmen) und 20 Kollektivmitglieder (lokale oder regionale Wirtschafts- und Branchenverbände) aus den Nordwestschweizer Kantonen Basel-Stadt, Basel-Landschaft, Aargau und Solothurn. Damit zählt er zu den grössten regionalen Arbeitgeber-Dachverbänden der Schweiz. 
Als einer der führenden Wirtschaftsverbände in der Nordwestschweiz nehmen wir die Bedürfnisse unserer Mitglieder auf, strukturieren und vertreten diese nach Aussen. Im politischen Prozess zwischen Staat und Parteien nehmen wir die Rolle der Arbeitgeber ein.

Name: Der Mittelstand. BVMW e.V. Bundesverband - Wirtschaftsregion Dresden
Description: Events, Impulse, Netzwerk

Name: SEMAD
Description: A Semad(Secretaria de Estado de Meio Ambiente e Desenvolvimento Sustentável) é responsável pela coordenação do Sistema Estadual do Meio Ambiente (Sisema). Planeja, executa, controla e avalia as ações setoriais a cargo do Estado relativas à proteção e à defesa do meio ambiente, à gestão dos recursos hídricos e à articulação das políticas de gestão dos recursos ambientais para o desenvolvimento sustentável em Minas Gerais.

Name: California Environmental Voters
Description:
California Environmental Voters (EnviroVoters) exists to build the political power to solve the climate crisis, advance justice, and create a roadmap for global action. Our vision is to build resilient, healthy, thriving communities, and create a democracy and economy that is just and sustainable for all Californians. We are in the business of changing what’s possible.

----
Follow us on all of our socials:
https://linktr.ee/envirovoters

Name: Expedition Future
Description:
Be it the climate crisis, the coronavirus pandemic or funding the pension system, Switzerland is facing complex challenges for which effective political measures are required.
Created with the support of the Migros Pioneer Fund, Expedition Future wants to develop a collaborative tool for Switzerland's political system. The aim is to help politicians quickly find effective cross-party solutions that can be fed into the parliamentary process. Through a first "Policy Sprint," representatives of all political groups and relevant stakeholders will develop an action plan capable of getting majority backing.

Name: Senado de la República de Chile
Description:
El Senado de la República de Chile es una de las dos cámaras del Congreso Nacional. Sus funciones son participar en la elaboración de las leyes con la Cámara de Diputados y al Presidente de la República.

Desde el 21 de marzo de 2017, el presidente del Senado de Chile es el senador Andrés Zaldívar, miembro del Partido Demócrata Cristiano y su Vicepresidente, el senador Guido Girardi, del Partido por la Democracia. 
 
El Senado tiene, además, las atribuciones indicadas en la Constitución, que le son exclusivas:

- Conocer de las acusaciones constitucionales que entable la Cámara de Diputados.
- Resolver sobre la admisibilidad de acciones judiciales que se pretenda iniciar contra algún Ministro de Estado por actos de éste en el desempeño de su cargo que se estime que causan perjuicios injustamente.
- Conocer de las contiendas de competencia que se susciten entre las autoridades políticas o administrativas y los tribunales superiores de justicia.
- Otorgar la rehabilitación de la ciudadanía.
- Prestar o negar su consentimiento a los actos del Presidente de la República, en los casos en que la Constitución o la ley lo requieran.
- Otorgar su acuerdo para que el Presidente de la República se ausente del país por más de treinta días o en los últimos noventa de su mandato.
- Declarar, oyendo al Tribunal Constitucional, la inhabilidad del Presidente de la República y pronunciarse sobre la dimisión que el Presidente de la República haga de su cargo.
- Aprobar la declaración del Tribunal Constitucional sobre responsabilidad del Presidente de la República en hechos que han motivado la inconstitucionalidad de un partido u organización que no ha respetado los principios básicos del régimen democrático y constitucional.Dar su dictamen al Presidente de la República en los casos que éste lo solicite.
- Aprobar los nombramientos que el Presidente de la República proponga, en los casos que la Constitución y las leyes establezcan.

Name: 314 Action
Description:
Here at 314 Action and 314 Action Fund, we’re on a mission to elect more scientists to Congress, state legislatures, and local offices. As trained problem-solvers, STEM professionals are ready, willing, and able to find solutions for the significant challenges facing America in the 21st century. 

With a millions-strong grassroots network of engaged supporters in every part of the country, 314 works to promote the scientific and evidence-based policy communities and has become one of the most impactful organizations in progressive politics.

In 2018, we played a pivotal role in flipping the United States House of Representatives by electing nine first-time science candidates such as Dr. Kim Schrier, the first pediatrician elected to Congress, and registered nurse Lauren Underwood, the youngest Black woman to serve in the U.S. House.

In November 2020, the only two Democrats who flipped United States Senate seats – Sen. Mark Kelly of Arizona and Sen. John Hickenlooper of Colorado – were recruited to run for office by our organization.
With staff ranging from an entrepreneurial scientist who stepped into the electoral arena to seasoned political operatives and skilled fundraisers, 314 provides critical resources and expertise to STEM candidates new to politics. 

We reach out to scientific communities, identifying people with professional STEM backgrounds to run for local, state, and federal offices. Our work includes training and supporting our endorsed candidates, ensuring they have the cutting-edge tools to run successful campaigns.

Name: Udbudsportalen
Description: Udbudsportalen er indgangen til viden om udbud. Find vejledninger om regler, gode råd om processer og masser af cases om udbud. Udbudsportalen indeholder også en række værktøjer, som understøtter udbudsprocessen og overvejelserne om udbud f.eks. udbudsfakta.dk, Den Ansvarlige Indkøber og CPV-automaten.

Name: Matlock 4 RRC
Description:
James Matlock proudly represents the sixth generation of Texans. Born in Fort Worth and adopted at birth, he grew up in a small town in East Texas. As a dedicated United States Marine, James was part of the Marine Corps Security Forces Company, serving his country honorably. After completing his service in 1995, he returned to his roots in East Texas. 

A former Marine, James is not a politician but has 18 years experience in oil and gas. He is very concerned about infrastructure vulnerability, China, Blackrock, oil, gas, coal, pipelines, water quality, waste, mismanagement and orphan wells.

James has taken on the role of chaplain for both the VFW and the Texas State Guard, showcasing his commitment to God and his community. In 2005, he embarked on a career in the oil and gas industry. Now, he is running to become your next commissioner for the Railroad Commission of Texas, bringing the values of small-town life to Austin to advocate for your interests.

He has solutions with new technology! Come to a meeting near you for a chance to speak with Jim about your concerns and ask questions.

Name: Norsk Bergindustri
Description:
Norsk Bergindustri er bransjeforeningen for hele den norske mineralnæringen.

Våre rundt 175 medlemsbedrifter har stolte tradisjoner med å utvinne, forvalte og gjenvinne mineraler, naturstein, pukk og grus fra norske fjell – på en bærekraftig og ansvarlig måte. Vi låner naturen for å utvinne råstoff, som er avgjørende for industri og samfunnsbygging. Når vi er ferdig med prosjektene, setter vi naturen tilbake i minst like god stand som da vi startet virksomheten. 

Vi representerer også leverandører som leverer utstyr og tjenester, slik at medlemmene kan drive effektiv og bærekraftig mineralforvaltning. 

Som en medlemsforening er vår jobb å bidra til bedre rammevilkår for bransjen. Vi jobber også med å synliggjøre bergindustriens avgjørende rolle som samfunnsbygger.

Fastlands-Norge inneholder store mengder mineraler som verden er avhengig av for å produsere alt fra elektronikk og husholdningsprodukter til avanserte forsvarssystemer. Skal du lage omelett trenger du egg, slik man også trenger mineraler for å lage smarttelefon, medisiner, elbilbatterier eller sminke. 
 
Med andre ord; ingen mineraler, ingen produkter.  
 
Våre pukk- og grusmedlemmer tar imot steinmasser fra utbyggingsprosjekt, renser dem og bearbeider massene, slik at de kan brukes til andre formål som bygger landet. Dette er sirkulærøkonomi i praksis. 

Men pukkverkene har også en viktig beredskapsfunksjon i lokalsamfunnene. De er førstelinjetjenesten i kommunene når uvær og naturkatastrofer ødelegger veier og bygninger. Kortreist byggeråstoff er avgjørende for at veier raskt kan gjenåpnes med lavere klimaavtrykk.

Våre natursteinprodusenter bidrar med produkter av høy kvalitet, som blant annet brukes til murer, kantstein, fasader, og benkeplater. De følger langt strengere krav til HMS enn hva som er tilfellet i mange andre land. Derfor er det et etisk valg å velge norsk naturstein.
 
Sekretariatet har kontor i NHO-bygget i Oslo og ledes av generalsekretær Anita Helene Hall.

Name: Sri Lanka Podujana Peramuna
Description:
The Sri Lanka People’s Front is not an accident of history. It is the result of a people's struggle and commitment based on noble and just aspirations. The Sri Lanka people’s Front is a collective of citizens unique in the history of political parties in Sri Lanka. It seeks to fulfill national aspirations through policies that will be acceptable to all. We have commenced our forward march to ensure the prosperity of the nation while safeguarding the ethnic and religious identities and rights of the people of Sri Lanka.

ශ්රී ලංකා පොදුජන පෙරමුණ ඉතිහාසයේ අහඹුවක් නොවේ.එය පොදුජන පැතුම් සමුදායකින් පන්නරය ලද අසීමිත කැපකිරීම් සහිත මහජන අරගලයක උත්තුංග ප්රතිඵලයකි. ශ්රී ලංකා පොදුජන පෙරමුණ ලාංකේය දේශපාලන පක්ෂ ඉතිහාසයේ සුවිසල්ම පුරවැසි එකමුතුවයි. සැමට පිළිගත හැකි පොදු ප්රතිපත්ති මාලාවක් යටතේ ජාතික අබිලාශයන්ට සේවය කිරීම ශ්රී ලංකා පොදුජන පෙරමුණේ ප්රමුඛතම අපේක්ෂාවයි. තම තමන්ගේ ජාතික ආගමික අනන්යතාවයන් රැකගෙන ආර්ථික සෞභාග්යයෙන් සපිරිව සියල්ලටම එකට ජීවත් වියහැකි මව්බිමක් පිලිබඳ අපේක්ෂාව යථාර්ථයක් කිරීම පිණිස අපි ගමන් ආරම්භ කළෙමු. ඔබත් එන්න. සාඩම්බර කොටස්කරුවකු වන්න.

Name: New Zealand Labour Party
Description:
Labour wants to make New Zealand a better place to live in by providing opportunities for all, jobs, strong public services, quality education, and affordable healthcare. We believe this can be achieved by keeping assets in Kiwi hands, taking care of our environment, and ensuring we get our economy back in the black without compromising the wellbeing of hardworking Kiwis.

Join our movement for change: https://www.labour.org.nz/join

Authorised by Rob Salmond, 187 Featherston St, Wellington

Name: College Democrats of America
Description: College Democrats of America (CDA) is the official student outreach arm of the Democratic National Committee. CDA charters College Democrats state federations and campus chapters nationwide, organizing young activists in support of Democratic candidates.

Name: UnternehmensForum
Description:
Inklusion ist ein Gewinn für Unternehmen! Wir machen uns im UnternehmensForum stark für die Beschäftigung von Menschen mit Behinderungen. 

Im praxisnahen Austausch und Wissenstransfer teilen wir Best Practice - denn von den guten Erfahrungen anderer Betriebe lernt man am besten. Gleichzeitig machen wir damit auf die Chancen in der Ausbildung und Beschäftigung von Menschen mit Behinderung aufmerksam.

Als Zusammenschluss von über 40 Konzernen und mittelständischen Firmen agieren wir bundesweit und branchenübergreifend. 

Das UnternehmensForum hat den "Inklusionspreis für die Wirtschaft" iniitiert, der gemeinsam mit der Bundesagentur für Arbeit, der Budnesvereinigung der Deutschen Arbeitgeberverbände und dem Charta der Vielfalt e.V. verliehen wird.

Name: Organizing for Action
Description:
Organizing for Action is the grassroots movement built by millions of Americans to pass the agenda we voted for in 2012. We're organizing to create jobs and and strengthen the middle class, fix our broken immigration system, fight climate change, prevent gun violence, get the facts about Obamacare, protect women's rights, ensure marriage equality, and push forward on other important issues.

OFA works to ensure the voices of ordinary Americans are heard in Washington, while training the next generation of grassroots organizers that will keep fighting for change.

Name: PT - Partido dos Trabalhadores
Description: PT - Partido dos Trabalhadores - Fundado em 10 de Fevereiro de 1980 - Brasil - Número: 13 - Logomarca: Estrela - Cores: Vermelho e Branco

Name: Royal Embassy of Saudi Arabia, London
Description:
The United Kingdom and Saudi Arabia are long standing friends and business partners.

Our thriving friendship dates back over a hundred years and is at every level of our government, business and society.

Today there are approximately 20,000 UK citizens working in the Kingdom and there are currently more than 15,000 highly qualified mature Saudi students studying for advanced degrees in the UK in a wide range of subjects, from medicine to engineering and computer science.

Whether you are a Saudi national living here and needing advice or help, a British Muslim wanting to visit the Holy Places of Islam or a business wanting to trade with the Kingdom, we at the embassy in London, will do all we can to assist you

Name: AssoCounseling
Description:
AssoCounseling è un'associazione professionale di categoria che si occupa di accreditamento professionale e certificazioni di qualità. E' composta unicamente da counselor professionisti e si rivolge unicamente a counselor professionisti. 

AssoCounseling è strutturata nel pieno rispetto di:
- Direttiva Comunitaria sulle qualifiche professionali (36/2005/CEE)
- Direttiva Comunitaria sui servizi (123/2006/CEE)
- Recepimento italiano della Direttiva qualifiche, D. Lgs. 206/2007
- Codice in materia di protezione dei dati personali, D. Lgs. 196/2003
- Codice del Consumo, D. Lgs. 206/2005
- Codice di Etica e Deontologia dell'Associazione Europea di Counseling

AssoCounseling detiene il Registro Italiano dei Counselor di AssoCounseling (RICA), al quale tutti i counselor possono iscriversi a seguito dell'ottenimento del Certificato di Competenza Professionale in Counseling (CCPC). Il Certificato di Competenza Professionale in Counseling è una credenziale che attesta il possesso di specifiche competenze e conoscenze relative a precisi ambiti di intervento dell'attività di counseling.

Name: The Alliance Of Her
Description:
We empower women in Europe to pursue their political ambitions; we champion their efforts every step of the way; we mobilise to dismantle the barriers that stand in their path; and we fight every day for a future shaped by their voices.

The time for women to lead in Europe has come. This is her time. And she will be heard.

We are the Alliance Of Her.

Name: Landesverband Erneuerbare Energien SH e.V.
Description:
Der Landesverband Erneuerbare Energien Schleswig-Holstein steht für die Vielfalt und gemeinsame Stärke der Erneuerbaren-Branche. Wir setzen uns für eine hundertprozentig erneuerbare Energieversorgung ein.

Ob flankierende Maßnahmen, Fördermittel, Ziele oder Visionen: Entscheidungsträger brauchen Know-How. Und gerade Themenfelder wie Veredelung und Nutzung des erneuerbar produzierten Stroms verlangen nach gebündelter Expertise sowie strukturierter und übergeordneter Kommunikation in Politik und Gesellschaft. Wir übernehmen das, für alle Bereiche der Energiewende.

Für mehr regionale Wertschöpfung.
Für nachhaltigen Klimaschutz.
Für Schleswig-Holstein.

Name: American Conservative Union
Description:
The American Conservative Union (ACU) is the nation’s leading conservative grassroots organization, educating and mobilizing conservatives to fight for the restoration of our Republic. We do this through a variety of initiatives, including our annual flagship Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) in Washington DC, international CPACs on almost every continent, Battleground CPACs in states across America, policy advocacy across the full spectrum of issues, and support of candidates for public office. ACU is well positioned to capitalize on our status as the nation’s original grassroots organization and as one of the premier advocates for conservative policy in Washington. 

History: ACU was founded in 1964 by William F Buckley and other conservative luminaries. From its inception, ACU has served as the umbrella organization for the conservative movement, perpetually steering it in the direction of true conservativism which best protects our natural rights, including the right to life, liberty and property.

Today: ACU serves a unique role as a leader and organizer within the conservative movement: we combine ideas with action so everyday Americans learn what true conservatism is and what it takes to preserve it. We are educating, rallying, and mobilizing conservatives nationwide about key principles and policies, equipping them to become fully engaged, influential citizens.  

Our Mission: As the nation’s original conservative organization, ACU defines conservativism as the political philosophy that sovereignty resides in the person. This governing principle drives our mission to promote Individual Liberty, Personal Responsibility, a Thriving Culture, and a Strong National Defense so that America remains the land of freedom and opportunity, where citizens are empowered to work, prosper and flourish.  Ultimately, ACU envisions a country where Americans live freer, more fulfilled lives while voluntarily addressing the needs of their neighbors and communities.

Name: Hinckley and Bosworth Borough Council
Description:
Situated at the very heart of England on the border of the East and West Midlands, Hinckley & Bosworth Borough Council serves 100 000 residents, as well as communities and businesses in the borough.

We are an employer of choice; we have a workforce of around 450 committed staff, delivering services to our customers – whether they are residents, business, partners, councillors or other stakeholders.

Our vision is a place of opportunity, with the following aims:
People: Helping people to stay healthy, active and protected from harm
Places: Creating clean and attractive places to live and work
Prosperity: Encouraging growth, attracting businesses, improving skills and supporting regeneration

Name: European Democrats
Description:
The European Democratic Party (EDP), founded by Romano Prodi, François Bayrou and Francesco Rutelli, is a European political party which brings together parties and European elected representatives who want to build a Union closer to its citizens. 

www.democrats.eu
Facebook:  European.Democratic.Party
Twitter: @PDE_EDP

Name: Progress
Description:
Progressive Britain is the new platform for policymaking, political education and imaginative thinking to rebuild Labour and the nation. Rooted in the Labour Party, we are dedicated to national renewal through the intellectual revitalisation of the UK centre-left. 

We work collaboratively with members of the Government and thought leaders to provide contemporary opinion pieces on key political, economic and social events occurring here in the UK and overseas.  

Our ongoing work brings together politicians, policymakers, experts, and activists together to shape Labour’s policy and strategy and develop distinctive and dynamic positions as they navigate their return to Number 10.

Name: Voters of Tomorrow
Description:
Of people aged 18-29, barely 25% vote on every election, and much less pay attention to politics on a regular basis.

Voters of Tomorrow is a non-profit, student-led initiative to increase political engagement by millenials and generation Z.

We are not sponsored by any party or political action group, and our only goal is to get our generation to take the future into our own hands.

Name: Kansas Chamber of Commerce
Description:
The mission of the Kansas Chamber of Commerce is to continually strive to improve the economic climate for the benefit of every business and citizen and to safeguard our system of free, competitive enterprise.

The Chamber is member-driven and its strength comes from hundreds of Kansas employers of every size. The Chamber listens to its members, forms policy and a Legislative Agenda and then takes the issues and concerns of Kansas businesses directly to the policy-makers.

Name: Die Mitte - Le Centre
Description: Wir setzen uns für den Zusammenhalt der Schweiz ein. Mit Freiheit, Solidarität und Verantwortung. So bringen wir die Schweiz weiter. Wollen auch Sie Teil des politischen Aufbruchs sein?

Name: Gabonese Democratic Party (GDP)
Description: The GDP is undoubtedly a successful and sustainable political party whose life expectancy is more than 50 years. Under the impulse of its President, Ali BONGO ONDIMBA, it embarked on the path of its Regeneration and Revitalization.

Name: Texas Democratic Party
Description:
The official state Democratic Party of Texas. Based in Austin, TX. 

The Texas Democratic Party believes that we live in a land of opportunity as wide as our beautiful Texas skies. Texas Democrats care about our neighbors and know that we're stronger together than we are on our own.  We know that when everyone plays by the same rules, gets a fair shot and does their fair share -- Texas succeeds.  Our values are rooted in opportunity, freedom, fairness, equality, and progress.

Texas Democrats have led the fight for civil rights, Social Security, workers' rights, voting rights, veteran’s rights, health care, equality, immigration reform, and women's rights. We are the party of President Lyndon Johnson, Sam Rayburn, Barbara Jordan, Ann Richards, Joaquin and Julian Castro, Wendy Davis, and countless Texans throughout the state who work each day to keep Texas great.

We love our great state. And we fight to win elections to protect our Texas values.

Name: ActionSA
Description:
ActionSA, lauched in August 2020, is the fastest growing political party in South Africa.

It is a party for all South Africans who love their country, hate what is being done to it, and refuse to stay silent any longer. 

The time for talk is over. It’s time for ACTION. #LetsFixSouthAfrica

Name: VIK Verband der Industriellen Energie- und Kraftwirtschaft e.V.
Description: Der VIK ist seit 76 Jahren die Interessenvertretung industrieller und gewerblicher Energienutzer in Deutschland. Er ist ein branchenübergreifender Wirtschaftsverband mit Mitgliedsunternehmen aus den unterschiedlichsten Branchen, wie etwa Aluminium, Chemie, Glas, Papier, Stahl oder Zement. Der VIK berät seine Mitglieder in allen Energie- und energierelevanten Umweltfragen. Im Verband haben sich 80 Prozent des industriellen Energieeinsatzes und rund 90 Prozent der versorgerunabhängigen Stromerzeugung in Deutschland zusammengeschlossen.

Name: Programa Regional Seguridad Energética y Cambio Climático en América Latina (EKLA) - KAS
Description: Plataforma de asesoramiento y diálogo con el objetivo de impulsar los procesos de tomas de decisiones políticas.

Name: Der Mittelstand, BVMW e.V. Trier-Eifel-Mosel
Description: Bundesverband mittelständische Wirtschaft, BVMW, Regionalgruppe Trier-Eifel-Mosel. Wir vernetzen Unternehmer und sorgen für mittelstandsgerechte Politik in Berlin und Brüssel.

Name: Arbeiterkammer Wien
Description: Faire Bezahlung, gute Ausbildung, sichere Pensionen und leistbare Mieten. Dafür setzt sich die AK Wien ein.

Name: Bündnis Ökonomische Bildung Deutschland (BÖB)
Description: Das Bündnis Ökonomische Bildung Deutschland setzt sich für die Stärkung der ökonomischen Bildung in Deutschland ein.

Name: Psykologi i Akademikerforbundet
Description:
Psykologiforbundet (Norwegian Society of Psychological Science) har nå slått seg sammen med Akademikerforbundet for å starte Norgest første fag og interesseorganisasjon som er spesielt for alle med bachelor, master og profesjonsutdanning i Psykologi.

Ler mer her: https://www.akademikerforbundet.no/organisasjon/psykologi-i-aka/

Name: Wirtschaftsrat der CDU e.V. Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Mit über 2.700 Mitgliedern ist der Landesverband Baden-Württemberg die größte Gliederung innerhalb des bundesweit organisierten Wirtschaftsrates und gleichzeitig der größte branchenübergreifende und überparteiliche Unternehmensverband in Baden-Württemberg.

•       Mit 27 Sektionen im Land stark vor Ort und gleichzeitig überregional 
         vernetzt.   
•	Jährlich bis zu 300 Veranstaltungen mit Schwerpunkt  Politik und 
        Wirtschaft.
•	8 Landesfachkommissionen u.a. zu den Themen: Familienunternehmen, 
        Bauwerke, Automotive – Maschinen und Anlagenbau, Digitale 
        Wirtschaft, Energie und Umwelt.
•	Junge Unternehmer und Führungskräfte vernetzen sich im Jungen 
        Wirtschaftsrat zu Themen ihrer Generation. 

Die inhaltliche Arbeit des Wirtschaftsrats findet hauptsächlich in Bundes- und Landesfachkommissionen statt, in denen Experten aus der Mitgliedschaft sowie Mandatsträger, Vertreter der Verwaltung und Wissenschaftler eng zusammenarbeiten und gemeinsame  Positionen erarbeiten. 

Das Netzwerk des Wirtschaftsrats schafft Synergien zwischen Unternehmen und ermöglicht gleichzeitig einen direkten Dialog zwischen Politik und Wirtschaft. Dabei kommt besonders der vielfältige Branchenmix des Wirtschaftsrats - vom Start-Up über den Mittelständler bis hin zum DAX-Konzern - zum Tragen. 

Kontakt: bawue@wirtschaftsrat.de
Instagram: wirtschaftsrat_bw
Twitter: @wratbw

Name: Janasena Party
Description: Janasena or Janasena Party is an Indian political party active in the states of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, founded by Mr. Pawan Kalyan on 14th, March 2014. Formed with the motto of - Fighting for the rights of common man, Janasena founder Pawan Kalyan has introduced the concept of political accountability revolutionizing the way politics are done in the country.

Name: SP Schweiz
Description:
Die SP macht seit über 125 Jahren Politik für alle, statt für ein paar wenige Privilegierte. Wir sagen Ja zu einer Schweiz des Miteinanders statt des Gegeneinanders.

«Die Stärke des Volkes misst sich am Wohl der Schwachen», steht in unserer Bundesverfassung. Wir stehen für eine Gesellschaft ein, in der sich jede und jeder frei entfalten kann. Eine Gesellschaft, in der aber ein soziales Netz da ist, das verhindert, dass jemand durch die Maschen fällt. Die SP will eine Wirtschaft, die für die Menschen da ist und nicht umgekehrt. Wer in der reichen Schweiz arbeitet, soll von seinem Lohn leben können. Wir sind überzeugt, dass wir weiter kommen, wenn nicht nur jeder für sich selber schaut. Die Schweiz hat ein solides soziales Netz und gute öffentliche Infrastrukturen. Dazu hat die SP viel beigetragen. Ohne SP gäbe es keine AHV, keine Mutterschaftsversicherung und kein Frauenstimmrecht.

Doch wir wollen uns mit dem Erreichten nicht zufriedengeben. Wir sind überzeugt, dass die Schweiz gerechter, innovativer und fortschrittlicher werden kann. Wenn wir konsequent auf erneuerbare Energien setzen, dann schützen wir unsere Umwelt und schaffen nachhaltige und innovative Arbeitsplätze. Wenn wir auf Bildung und Integration setzen, dann schaffen wir Perspektiven und verhindern Arbeitslosigkeit. Wenn wir in den genossenschaftlichen Wohnungsbau investieren, dann helfen wir mit, Boden der Spekulation zu entziehen und sorgen für zahlbare Wohnungen. Kurz: Die SP macht eine Politik für alle statt für wenige.

Name: DI Hovedstaden
Description:
DI Hovedstaden arbejder for at forbedre erhvervsklimaet i de 28 hovedstadskommuner. Her repræsenterer vi over 7000 af DI’s medlemsvirksomheder. Foreningen er optaget af at løfte den grønne dagsorden, en mobil infrastruktur, en veluddannet arbejdsstyrke og en serviceminded kommunal administration.

Vi sætter virksomhedernes udfordringer på dagsordenen gennem samarbejde med vigtige lokale aktører som kommuner, regionen, skoler, uddannelsesinstitutioner, lokale erhvervsråd og regionale medier. Men vi samarbejder også med ministerier, styrelser, tænketanke, nationale medier og andre interessenter.

DI Hovedstadens LinkedIn fungerer som et talerør. Vi deler bestyrelsens arbejde, fremhæver gode historier fra vores medlemmer, videndeler kommunale initiativer, sætter fokus på aktuel politik – al sammen med en regional eller lokal krog. På den måde er vi relevante for dig, der er interesseret i lokal erhvervspolitik.

Name: Avanti Ticino
Description:
Avanti è un movimento politico che mira a favorire la partecipazione delle cittadine e dei cittadini alla politica.
Crediamo in un dibattito aperto, non dogmatico, pragmatico e libero da condizionamenti. Crediamo che sia il momento di superare la dialettica tra destra e sinistra che non porta a nessuna soluzione rispetto ai problemi complessi che viviamo. Il dogmatismo non riesce a dare risposte utili ai cittadini.
Crediamo in uno stato forte e agile al servizio dei cittadini, con una burocrazia snella e una pressione fiscale ragionevole. Vogliamo uno stato con finanze sane, in equilibrio di bilancio, capace quindi di finanziare le iniziative fondamentali per la protezione sociale, lo sviluppo
economico, la tutela ambientale in modo efficace, efficiente ed equo.
Crediamo in un’economia rispettosa degli individui e dell’ambiente e riteniamo indispensabile una dialettica tra le parti sociali improntata alla collaborazione più che al conflitto.
Ci opponiamo a ogni tipo di discriminazione.
Siamo contrari alla chiusura nazionalistica ma riteniamo importante tutelare i cittadini residenti rispetto ai problemi connessi con una globalizzazione incontrollata.
Siamo per una Svizzera indipendente e autonoma ma collaborativa e impegnata a livello internazionale.

Name: California YIMBY
Description: California YIMBY is a statewide housing advocacy organization that has helped pass 25 bills to increase home building and expand access to opportunity.

Name: USR
Description: USR este principala forță modernizatoare a României.

Name: Manitoba Keewatinowi Okimakanak (MKO)
Description: Follow us for news and events related to Northern Manitoba. Manitoba Keewatinowi Okimakanak Inc. (MKO) is a non-profit, political advocacy organization that has represented 26 First Nations in Northern Manitoba since 1981. The MKO represents more than 72,000 First Nations people.

Name: Deutscher Verkehrssicherheitsrat (DVR) e.V.
Description: Im Deutschen Verkehrssicherheitsrat arbeiten derzeit ca. 45 Personen. Wir koordinieren die Aktivitäten unserer Mitglieder aus Politik, Wirtschaft und Zivilgesellschaft. Dabei verfolgen wir die Strategie der Vision Zero – Niemand kommt um, alle kommen an.

Name: Matraa Consultants Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Branding|PR|Communications|Digital Marketing|

Name: Bauwirtschaft Baden-Württemberg e.V.
Description:
Die Bauwirtschaft Baden-Württemberg e.V. ist gemeinsamer Arbeitgeber- und Wirtschaftsverband der baden-württembergischen Bauwirtschaft mit rund 1.600 Mitgliedern.

Unsere Mitglieder unterstützen wir mit Beratungen zu allen unternehmensrelevanten Themenbereich wie z.B. Arbeits-, Sozial- und Tarifrecht oder Unternehmensführung.

Darüber hinaus setzen wir uns für die Belange der Bauwirtschaft in Baden-Württemberg gegenüber Politik, Behörden und Öffentlichkeit ein.

Folgen Sie unserer Seite und halten Sie sich über die Entwicklungen der Branche auf dem Laufenden.

Name: Industrie- und Handelskammer Thurgau
Description:
Die Industrie- und Handelskammer Thurgau ist ein branchenübergreifender Wirtschaftsverband von mehr als 640 Dienstleistungs-, Industrie- und Handelsunternehmen aus dem Kanton Thurgau. 

Als Interessenvertretung ihrer Mitglieder wirkt die IHK Thurgau als Scharnier zwischen Wirtschaft, Politik und Gesellschaft. Sie analysiert, kommuniziert und handelt mit dem Ziel, optimale wirtschaftspolitische Rahmenbedingungen für Ihre Mitgliedsunternehmen und den Arbeits- und Wohnort Thurgau zu schaffen.

Name: Movimiento Independiente de Renovación Absoluta "MIRA"
Description:
MIRA se constituye como un Movimiento Político Independiente de carácter nacional, y con proyección internacional, conforme a lo dispuesto en la Constitución Política de Colombia y en las leyes 130 de 1994 y 974 de 2005.

Su propósito es participar en la vida democrática del país, difundiendo y promoviendo la defensa de la dignidad humana y el mejoramiento de la calidad de todos, la prevalencia del interés general, mediante un proceso deliberativo, el cual es el fundamento primordial del ideal democrático y el fortalecimiento del orden constitucional y legal; en definitiva el objetivo de MIRA es difundir el Miraísmo.

En desarrollo de los principios que lo inspiran, el Movimiento procura influir en la formación de la voluntad política de los ciudadanos y participará, cuando lo considere conveniente o cuando dicha participación sea obligatoria, en los procesos electorales.

Además de las realizaciones políticas y su constante difusión, y como soporte de ellas, MIRA desplegará una amplia y continua labor social encaminada a incrementar los niveles de calidad de vida y de la realización del concepto de dignidad humana, por lo cual su labor se caracteriza por la búsqueda constante de la paz, la democracia, la justicia, la equidad, el conocimiento y el trabajo para todos los colombianos y colombianas.

Name: A Healthier Democracy
Description:
A Healthier Democracy is a platform for collaboration and community organizing at the intersection of health and civic engagement that leverages the untapped power of healthcare workers and healthcare settings as the people and places where social change can emerge. We provide a home for healthcare workers, community organizers, and healthcare organizations under the shared vision that together we can address our nation’s pressing social issues through collaboration. We are unleashing the healthcare sector as a source for social good. We are creating A Healthier Democracy. 

Portfolio Organizations at Launch

A Healthier Democracy is home to three high-impact national initiatives at launch. We believe our nation’s biggest and most complex challenges require innovative solutions leveraging health care settings and health care workers. Our centralized model enables us to quickly launch new initiatives drawing on deep expertise in healthcare organizing, creative communications, and marketing.

Vot-ER (Vot-ER.org)
- A nonpartisan voter registration movement that has organized over 26,000 healthcare providers and 700 healthcare sites to help non-urgent patients register to vote. 

Get Waivered (Getwaviered.com)
- A program rooted in political organizing that is converting our nation’s ERs into the front door for opioid addiction and has helped over 5,000 clinicians receive their DEA-X waivers to treat patients with opioid addiction.
GOTVax (GOTVax.org)
- An initiative aimed at leveraging a get out the vote framework to deliver vaccines directly to vulnerable communities throughout Massachusetts via hyper-targeted vaccine pop up clinics. 

Action Collaboratives and Fiscal Sponsor

A Healthier Democracy also hosts Action Collaboratives that allow healthcare organizers and groups of healthcare organizations to make progress toward solving complex challenges together. Our Fiscal sponsorship program helps social entrepreneurs navigate the winding path from vision to impact.

Name: Climate 200
Description:
Climate 200 is a non-profit supporting independent political candidates committed to a science-based response to the climate crisis, restoring integrity to politics, and advancing respect and safety for women. 

Authorised by B. Fay, Climate 200 Pty Ltd,  6/9 Barrack St Sydney NSW 2000.

Name: Volt Italia
Description:
Volt è un movimento progressista e paneuropeo.  
Progressista, perché guardiamo al progresso come l’unica via di uscita per rilanciare il paese. Paneuropeo, perché siamo una forza unica con una direzione strategica continentale poi declinata nei singoli stati.  
Volt vuole proporre un’alternativa forte e europea, creando una piattaforma di aggregazione di liberi cittadini che credono nella necessità di fare un passo in avanti nel: 

- Costruire un nuovo modello europeo: maggiore e migliore distribuzione di ruoli e responsabilità tra paesi e stato federale.
- Ridisegnare il modello sociale per adattarlo al contesto odierno: uguaglianza di diritti, mercato unico europeo per l’ingresso dei giovani nel mondo del lavoro.
- Rilanciare il modello economico e industriale proiettandolo nei prossimi 20 anni: aziende europee, alleanze tra paesi, valorizzazione delle risorse chiave di ogni nazione.

Name: Telugu Desam Party (TDP)
Description: Telugu Desam Party Abbreviated As Tdp, Is A Regional Political Party Active In The Southern ... Second Term (8 June 2014 Ð Incumbent) (First Chief Minister To Assume Office Of Post-Divided State / Newly Formed State Of Andhra Pradesh

Name: ATL - Transportens Arbejdsgivere
Description:
ATL - Transportens Arbejdsgivere er platform for ca. 850 transportvirksomheder. Vi arbejder hver dag for at styrke medlemmernes vilkår og vækstmuligheder.
Vi hjælper din virksomhed med alt fra personalejura og uddannelse til arbejdsmiljø og transportlovgivning. Og vi tilbyder branchens bedste lederuddannelser. ATL er en del af DI – Danmarks største erhvervs- og arbejdsgiverorganisation.

Name: Parlamento Europeu em Portugal
Description: A tua voz na União Europeia. O Parlamento é eleito diretamente pelos cidadãos de 27 países da UE. Segue-nos para ficares a par das últimas notícias.

Name: Republican National Lawyers Association
Description:
As the principal national organization of Republican lawyers, the Association has a targeted set of missions - all complementary, and none of which duplicate missions accomplished elsewhere. These missions include:

Advancing professionalism,
Advancing open, fair, and honest elections,
Advancing career opportunity, and
Advancing Republican ideals.

For more information about the RNLA, visit www.rnla.org or the RNLA's group page at www.linkedin.com/groups/126612/.

Name: Arizona Rock Products Association
Description:
ARPA‘s primary goal is to track key environmental, safety, transportation and governmental affairs and educate our members on the potential impact of current issues. Further, it is through intense political involvement at state and local levels that ARPA continues to make its greatest strides. ARPA provides the forum for key committees such as; environment, community relations, safety, transportation, concrete and asphalt technical committees and governmental affairs, whose work is the precursor to legislative initiative.
 
ARPA Regulatory

ARPA provides substantial benefits to our members and the communities in which we serve and operate. ARPA supports numerous technical and educational committees focused on environmental, safety, quality and transportation issues and these committees form the nucleus of ARPA‘s aggressive participation in state and community affairs. ARPA and its members strive to work productively within the political and regulatory infrastructure in order to continue to improve the lives of others and invest in the future of our communities.

 
ARPA members and employees care about the communities in which we live and work. As such, member companies and associations are active participants in charitable, educational, and social issues and work diligently to ensure that the benefits of our organization and industry span the diverse social and economic needs of our state.

Name: FNF Europe
Description: Friedrich Naumann Foundation for Freedom Europe has offices in Brussels, Geneva, Prague and Vilnius. Through our work, we seek to actively encourage the political debate and develop innovative liberal policies in Europe. A lively dialogue is based on tolerance and mutual understanding. Together with our liberal partners, we develop formats and campaigns to promote rule of law, free markets and human rights. Moreover, we coordinate EU co-funded projects in the field of democracy support, development cooperation and human rights protection.

Name: Altstipendiaten der Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung e.V.
Description: Alumni-Netzwerk ehemaliger Stipendiaten der Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung

Name: IG BAU
Description: Die IG BAU ist die Gewerkschaft für alle, die im Bereich Bauen, Agrar oder Umwelt arbeiten. Wir bieten Rat, Hilfe, finanzielle Unterstützung und Mitmachen.

Name: We're Right Here
Description:
People should have the power to shape their places. Communities should have the rights and tools they need to come together and take control of their own futures.

The We’re Right Here campaign is working to build a united movement for community power, spanning places and communities across the UK as well as the political spectrum.

Name: Els Borst Netwerk
Description:
De politiek is te belangrijk om alleen aan mannen over te laten”, zei Els Borst. Kort na het overlijden van de geliefde D66-politica lanceerde D66 het Els Borst Netwerk. 

D66 vindt het belangrijk dat vrouwen vanuit eigen kracht kansen creëren en aangrijpen en wilde hen hierin steunen met het netwerk.

Als Els Borst Netwerk willen we graag elkaar versterken, verbinden, kennisdelen en van elkaar leren.

Het Els Borst Netwerk is bedoeld om vrouwen te faciliteren om zich verder te ontplooien en om succesvol hun weg te vinden in de politiek en binnen D66.

Wil jij een initiatief onder de aandacht brengen of een link leggen? 
Mail naar  info@elsborstnetwerk.nl.

Name: Commonwealth Communications
Description: Commonwealth Communications (Comms2) serves as the communications and digital hub of Pennsylvania’s progressive infrastructure. Comms2 writes and produces content for progressive organizations, coordinates communications with partner and allied stakeholders, and monitors and develops strategies and tactics to best navigate the ever-changing digital and earned media landscape. Comms2 helps shape the political environment in Pennsylvania by centralizing institutional knowledge in a dynamic communications organization. The organization collaborates in filling the needs of progressive partners’ priorities, coalitions and campaigns throughout the Commonwealth.

Name: Tankesmedjan Timbro
Description: Timbro är Nordens främsta marknadsekonomiska tankesmedja och rankas återkommande bland de hundra mest framstående aktörerna i världen. Sedan 1978 är uppdraget att långsiktigt bilda opinion för marknadsekonomi, fri företagsamhet, individuell frihet och ett öppet samhälle.

Name: The Organization for World Peace (OWP)
Description: The Organization for World Peace advocates for peaceful resolutions to military conflicts and supports internally displaced persons and child soldiers.

Name: FNF Europe
Description: Friedrich Naumann Foundation for Freedom Europe has offices in Brussels, Geneva, Prague and Vilnius. Through our work, we seek to actively encourage the political debate and develop innovative liberal policies in Europe. A lively dialogue is based on tolerance and mutual understanding. Together with our liberal partners, we develop formats and campaigns to promote rule of law, free markets and human rights. Moreover, we coordinate EU co-funded projects in the field of democracy support, development cooperation and human rights protection.

Name: Mälardalsrådet
Description:
Mälardalsrådet är samverkansorganisationen för kommunerna och regionerna i Stockholm-Mälarregionen. Vi driver våra medlemmars frågor för konkreta resultat inom infrastruktur, maritim samverkan, innovation, kompetensförsörjning och internationella jämförelser och lärande. Vi samlar Stockholm-Mälarregionens kommuner, landsting och regioner till en dynamisk mötesplats för politik, näringsliv och akademi.

Vill du veta mer? Hör av dig!

Name: Gen-Z for Change
Description: We are dedicated to empowering our generation through education and civic engagement, using the power of social media to drive progressive change and hold those in power accountable. We're the place where the creator economy and progressive politics intersect on social media.

Name: Fraktion DIE LINKE. im Bundestag
Description: Fraktion DIE LINKE is a political organization company based out of Germany.

Name: Liberal International
Description: Liberal International (LI) is the world federation of over 100 liberal and progressive democratic political parties. LI was founded in 1947 to strengthen liberal protection from totalitarianism and communism. It has since become the pre-eminent network for promoting liberalism, individual freedom, human rights, the rule of law, tolerance, equality of opportunity, social justice, free trade and a market economy.

Name: Consejo Coordinador Empresarial
Description:
El Consejo Coordinador Empresarial fue fundado en 1976, como una respuesta del sector productivo nacional a la creciente intervención del gobierno en la economía y la aplicación de medidas claramente populistas.

Nuestro objetivo es coordinar las políticas y acciones de los organismos empresariales, e identificar posiciones estratégicas con soluciones específicas, que contribuyan a diseñar políticas públicas para elevar el crecimiento económico y el nivel de competitividad, tanto de las empresas como del país.

Como representante e interlocutor del empresariado mexicano, el CCE trabaja para impulsar el libre mercado, la democracia plena, la responsabilidad social y la equidad de oportunidades para la población.

Actualmente, integran el CCE 7 asociados (CONCAMIN, CONCANACO, COPARMEX, AMIS, CMHN, CNA y ABM) y 5 invitados permanentes (CANACO, CANACINTRA, AMIB, COMCE y ANTAD).

Además, fortalecemos nuestra labor con la colaboración de instituciones profesionales como el Centro de Estudios Económicos del Sector Privado (CEESP), la Comisión de Estudios del Sector Privado para el Desarrollo Sustentable (CESPEDES) y la Fundación del Empresariado en México, A.C. (FUNDEMEX).

Name: Labour in the City
Description:
If you are a Labour supporter working in Financial or related Professional, why not join Labour in The City? 

We have members from across London and the UK in every major financial and professional sector, and are a great place to meet people with similar political convictions, and to become more involved in politics.

Labour in The City are a forum for the City to hear from senior Labour leaders, and to present an expert voice to the Party to help support the best policy making.

We regularly organise events with Labour speakers, and as a member-led organisation, we welcome proposals from members who would like to take forward any ideas for events and activity themselves.

You do not need to be a member of the Party to join Labour in The City though you do need to share the Party’s aims and be a supporter.

Sign up via the website link below.

Name: Congreso Nacional de Chile
Description: El Congreso Nacional de Chile es el órgano legislativo de la República de Chile. Es un órgano bicameral compuesto por una Cámara de Diputados y un Senado. Tiene su sede en la ciudad de Valparaíso.1

Name: D66 Den Haag
Description: De grootste progressieve partij in de internationale stad van Vrede en Recht | Voor een kansrijk, groen en veilig Den Haag

Description:
Infos et actualités de toutes les droites, des patriotes, des souverainistes, et des indépendants chez les Français établis hors de France.
