Du kan få både de små som de store nyheder fra og om os og vores mange samarbejdspartnere, f.eks. Corolab, Erhvervsforum Roskilde og de mange lokale uddannelsesinstitutioner og virksomheder i vores kommune.  

Ligeledes kan du holde dig orienteret om vores erhvervsrettede arrangementer, priser, udbud og de mange samarbejdsmuligheder, som du finder hos os. Og meget, meget mere!

Du må meget gerne "follow us" samt sprede budskabet i din omgangskreds. Vi bestræber os på at være først med de bedste lokale erhvervsnyheder!

Om Roskilde Kommune: Med ca. 5.000 virksomheder og en privat fuldtidsbeskæftigelse på godt ca. 36.000 personer er Roskilde en af de absolut største erhvervskommuner i Region Sjælland. Dertil kommer en årlig nettotilflytning på 1000 nye indbyggere, som alle bidrager til de gode takter i handels,- kultur- og erhvervslivet.

Name: hydrosuisse
Description: Seit 1910 der Fach- und Interessenverband für die Themen Wasserkraft, Hochwasserschutz und Ökologie in der Schweiz.

Name: The Labour Party Ireland
Description: The Labour Party campaigns for ideas and policies that progress our vision for a fairer and better Ireland, for a Fair Society that is built on a prosperous and sustainable economy, personal liberty and social solidarity.

Name: FTF
Description:
FTF er hovedorganisation for i alt 450.000 danskere. Det er f.eks sygeplejersker, bankansatte og farmakonomer. De er medlem af cirka 70 forskellige fagforeninger og forbund, der i FTF arbejder sammen i forhold til arbejdsgivere, politikere og offentligheden. FTF arbejder for et bedre arbejdsliv og et bedre velfærdssamfund.

FTF's mission er: "at være den faglige-politiske hovedorganisation for partipolitisk uafhængige organisationer med professions- og erhvervsrettet uddannede medlemmer". 

FTF viser mod, vilje og styrke: 
• ved at være dagsordensættende og øve markant politisk indflydelse regionalt, nationalt og internationalt, 
• ved aktivt at bidrage til samling og samarbejde i fagbevægelsen om at fremme fælles mål, 
• ved at være vidensbank og levere professionel oplysning, rådgivning og vejledning, 
• ved at bygge på dialog, åbenhed og aktiv inddragelse af medlemsorganisationerne, og 
• ved at styrke sammenhold og samarbejde mellem de forskellige medlemsorganisationer.

FTFs cookie- og privatlivspolitik finder du her https://www.ftf.dk/brug-af-cookies-paa-ftfdk/

Name: Coalition Avenir Quebec
Description:
La Coalition Avenir Québec est un parti politique fondé le 14 novembre 2011. Répondant à l’appel de plusieurs milliers de Québécois, François Legault a donné au parti la mission de relancer le Québec. Un Québec plus autonome et plus riche. Une économie plus forte. Un Québec ambitieux!

Toute personne qui soutient les objectifs politiques de la Coalition peut en devenir membre.

Le chef de la Coalition Avenir Québec, M. François Legault, préside aux orientations et aux destinées du parti. Il est membre d’office de toutes ses commissions et instances.

Name: Minnesota DFL Party
Description: Minnesota DFL

Name: solid UNIT e.V.
Description:
solid UNIT, das Netzwerk für den innovativen Massivbau, ist Innovationsmotor! In strategischen Netzwerk-Teams arbeiten Partner:innen aus den Bereichen Bauplanung, Bauwirtschaft, Baustoffindustrie sowie Forschung und Lehre zusammen. 
Das Ziel von solid UNIT ist, durch eine engere Vernetzung der Partner:innen Innovationen in Forschung und Entwicklung im Bereich der mineralischen Bauweise weiter voranzutreiben und verstärkt auf den Baustellen zum Einsatz zu bringen. Im Fokus der Netzwerk-Teams stehen dabei Themen wie CO2-Einsparung, nachhaltiges Ressourcenmanagement oder Digitalisierung auf der Baustelle. Gleichzeitig informiert solid UNIT über nachhaltige Beispielprojekte und stellt Baustoff-Innovationen der mineralischen Bauweise vor.

Name: Leefbaar Rotterdam
Description: Leefbaar Rotterdam is de enige partij die er alleen is voor Rotterdam en de Rotterdammers. Gewoon voor Rotterdam.

Name: ARI - Affalds- og Ressourceindustrien
Description:
ARI er en interesseorganisation og medlemsforening for private virksomheder, der har professionel håndtering af affald som primær aktivitet. ARI’s medlemmer er blandt de største private aktører inden for håndtering af danskernes affald, og medlemmerne har aktiviteter i alle landets kommuner.
 
Vi mener, at håndteringen af affald skal konkurrenceudsættes, så markedskræfterne kan trække en udvikling, hvor nye metoder til effektiv genanvendelse af affald udvikles i private virksomheder. ARI arbejder for stabile og forudsigelige rammevilkår for den danske affaldssektor, styrkede markedsmuligheder i en cirkulær økonomi og et godt og langsigtet investeringsklima.

ARI gik i december 2024 sammen om et fælles ESG-kodeks med henblik på at imødekomme EU’s direktiv om bæredygtighedsrapportering (CSRD). ESG-kodekset er bygget op af de 12 European Sustainability Reporting Standards. Ved at følge linket til ARI’s hjemmeside kan du læse mere om ARI, samt hvordan ARI’s medlemmer konkret arbejder for at udvikle så bæredygtig en sektor som muligt – både miljømæssigt, socialt og i forhold til drift og ledelse.

Kontakt-mail: ari@di.dk

Name: Unternehmerverband Sachsen e.V.
Description:
Die kleinen und mittelständischen Unternehmen sind das Rückgrat der sächsischen Wirtschaft. Der Unternehmerverband Sachsen vertritt seit 1990 als älteste Wirtschaftsvereinigung die Interessen dieser Unternehmen. Im Mittelpunkt der Bestrebungen des Verbandes steht zum einen die Verbesserung der wirtschaftspolitischen Rahmenbedingungen für die sächsischen Unternehmen im regionalen, nationalen und internationalen Markt, um eine Chancengleichheit für die Entwicklung des einheimischen Mittelstandes zu erreichen. Dabei artikuliert der Verband die Interessen seiner Mitglieder gegenüber Politik, Administrative, den Wissenschaften, anderen Verbänden und der Gesellschaft. Zum anderen werden branchenübergreifend die Unternehmen des Verbandes durch unterschiedlichstes Maßnahmen im Netzwerk vereint. Dazu zählt neben der Zusammenarbeit zwischen den Mitgliedern ebenso die Zusammenführung der Wirtschaft mit der Wissenschaft. 

Der Unternehmerverband Sachsen vertritt mit seinen Partnern über 600 Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer, Reprivatisierer, Existenzgründer, Führungskräfte von MBO-Unternehmen sowie Selbständige und Handwerker.

Wirtschaftliche und politische Veränderungen dem Selbstlauf zu überlassen, bedeutet das Recht auf Mitgestaltung aufzugeben. Werden auch Sie Teil des Unternehmerverbandes Sachsen und engagieren Sie sich für eine positive wirtschaftliche Entwicklung – bündeln Sie mit uns die Kräfte für den schönsten Freistaat der Welt.

Name: Politechnica
Description: An integrated political advisory leveraging a powerful mix of data science, new media & technology in India.

Name: Ministère de l'Emploi et Travail - RDC
Description: Le compte officiel du Ministère de l'Emploi et Travail de la RDC || The official account of the Ministry of Employment and Labor of the DRC

Name: Labour Digital
Description: Labour Digital is the home of digital and technology policy for Labour Party members and supporters. We seek to understand the potential of technology for our country, to promote using it in our economy and our public services and to advocate regulating its use to protect citizens from unethical use.

Name: Save the Children Action Network
Description:
Save the Children Action Network (SCAN) is Save the Children’s political advocacy arm, created in 2014 to be the political voice for kids. Through a combination of grassroots activism, compelling messaging and candidate engagement, we build relationships with policymakers to increase investments in expanding access to early childhood education, preventing child hunger in the U.S and globally and protecting children around the world from harm in times of crisis.

Every child deserves a chance to thrive!

America’s strength starts with kids—at home and around the world. When we invest in kids, we invest in the strength, security, and success of our nation—because the foundation of a thriving America is built with health, education, and the well-being of every child. Through bold grassroots action, powerful storytelling, and direct engagement with candidates and lawmakers, Save the Children Action Network is transforming how policy gets made to ensure every child gets the strong start they deserve.

Name: Hamburger Zukunftsentscheid
Description: Am 12.10. stimmen alle Hamburger:innen in einem Volksentscheid darüber ab, ob Hamburg beim Klimaschutz ernst macht und bis 2040 klimaneutral wird – mit klaren CO₂-Budgets, jährlicher Überprüfung und Sofortmaßnahmen, falls die Ziele verfehlt werden. Die Umsetzung erfolgt zudem sozial verträglich.

Name: Sindifisco Nacional
Description: Entidade representativa dos Auditores-Fiscais da Receita Federal do Brasil.

Name: The Strategic Organizing Center
Description: The SOC is a mission-focused center developing strategies and implementing tactics on transformational campaigns that confront corporate power. We partner with workers and our affiliates — the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), Communication Workers of America (CWA), and the United Farmworkers of America (UFW) — who are united in building a strong vibrant labor movement through organizing workers hungry for change. The SOC acts with workers and unions driving strategies and tactics that support many of the largest organizing initiatives being conducted in the United States today.

Name: Frente Parlamentar de Recursos Naturais e Energia (Frente de Energia)
Description: A Frente Parlamentar de Recursos Naturais e Energia (Frente de Energia) é uma associação suprapartidária criada pela Resolução do Senado Federal nº 19/2021. Temos a finalidade de promover articulações, debates e outras iniciativas a respeito de políticas públicas e medidas que estimulem o uso sustentável de recursos naturais e a geração e o consumo responsáveis de energia.

Name: YPCC - Young Political Communicators Club
Description: Der Young Political Communicators Club (YPCC) ist ein parteiübergreifendes Netzwerk für junge Menschen, die politisch kommunizieren - ob beruflich oder ehrenamtlich, ob in Parlamenten, Parteien, Unternehmen, Verbänden oder auf der Straße. Wir schaffen so einen Raum, in dem wir uns gegenseitig kennenlernen, fordern und fördern können.

Name: Prefeitura Municipal de Campo Grande - MS
Latino Victory Project
Description:
The Latino Victory Project, co-founded by Eva Longoria and Henry R. Muñoz III, is an ambitious, non-partisan effort to build political power within the Latino community to ensure the voices of Latinos are reflected at every level of government and in the policies that drive our nation forward. The Latino Victory Project develops leaders for public office while building a permanent base of Latino donors to support them. Partnering with leading organizations, it shapes public policy that reflects the growing influence of the Latino community while also building cross-constituency alliances that can move the country forward.

The Latino Victory Project es un movimiento que crea poder en la comunidad latina para que sus rostros y voces se reflejen en todos los niveles de gobierno y en las políticas que impulsan a nuestro país hacia adelante. The Latino Victory Project ayuda a los latinos a ganar en elecciones locales, estatales y federales, y aboga por la comunidad latina. The Latino Victory Project hace esto mediante el desarrollo de una fuente de líderes latinos, capacitación y apoyo para candidatos, y  la construcción de una narrativa pública que refleja los valores y la influencia latina.

Name: ACRONYM
Description:
ACRONYM is a values-driven organization focused on advancing progressive causes through innovative communications, advertising and organizing programs. Since its creation in March 2017, ACRONYM has run dozens of targeted media programs to educate, inspire, register, and mobilize voters, and has worked with dozens of partners to accelerate their advocacy programs and investments.

In the 2018 cycle, ACRONYM developed new digital tools and strategies to encourage voters to register to vote and show up at the polls on Election Day. Through these programs, ACRONYM and it’s affiliated political action committee, PACRONYM, helped elect 65 progressive candidates across the country and in January 2019 launched Shadow, a technology company focused on building accessible, user-centered products to enable progressive organizers to run smarter campaigns.

Name: EU40
Description: EU40 seeks to connect the best and work together with the best, in order to defend our right of law, our democratic values and the freedom we need to take ownership of again and again every day

Name: Latinas Represent
Description: LatinasRepresent is an initiative led by the National Hispanic Leadership Agenda to increase Latina participation throughout the civic engagement continuum, inspire more Latinas to seek public service opportunities, and create a more reflective democracy.

Name: Affordable Medicines Europe
Description:
Affordable Medicines Europe is the association of parallel importers and exporters of pharmaceuticals, and it represents more than 120 companies operating in 23 countries of the European Economic Area.  The mission of its members is to offer a better deal for original European supply. 

Parallel importers purchase medicines from pharmaceutical wholesalers in other EU/EEA member states, and sell them in the national market at a lower price in compliance with the regulation of the recipient country. Parallel imports of pharmaceuticals create competition in a business where patents provide the rights owners with a monopoly.  This competition leads to reductions of the price and the creation of savings.

Name: Social Democrats
Description:
The Social Democrats are a force for real change in Ireland. 

We want to build  a society where every person has the opportunity to achieve their potential. We are a young party founded by leaders with a proven track record of honesty, hard-work and principled dealing.

We are committed to good quality public services and a vibrant and sustainable economy. We want to restore the public interest to its rightful place at the heart of politics and national life.

We are asking people to join us, to help build a Republic of Equals.

Name: Corporate Chanakya Services Private Limited
Description:
We Corporate Chanakya has been providing its services since 2011. We offer a clear five-step process of delivering our services: Research, Strategy, Operations, Technology, Transformation. Corporate Chanakya works across Opinion polls, Election Campaigns, Poll Management.
Winning in elections is intent on how well the candidate influences his voters to choose him. We “Corporate Chanakya” help you there, we advise the Organisation/Candidate on how best to engage with voters to win. We know our politician needs and we provide a service that is bespoke, take-charge, and outcome driven. We believe that the success of our clients is our achievement. We naturally speed in thinking accurate in implementing and are commercially reachable to any client. These traits make us the best choice for our clients.
We hold our political, bureaucracy, and Media connections to understand what is happening in key political centres before it is splashed on the front pages. We are the advisors of many senior politicians, some of the largest corporates, financial institutions, and investors. The bottom line is picking the right political consultant for your election management is important.

Name: National Security Action
Description: Committed to advancing principled American global leadership and opposing reckless policies that endanger our national security.

Name: LetsGOCircular
Description:
LetsGOCircular est le portail dédié à la stratégie nationale d’économie circulaire. Mis en place par les ministères de l'Économie (MECO), de l'Environnement, du Climat et de la Biodiversité (MECB), et des Finances (MFIN), c’est le lieu de rendez-vous pour quiconque souhaite suivre l’actualité conjointe du gouvernement luxembourgeois dans le déploiement de l’économie circulaire au Luxembourg, et s'inspirer de bonnes pratiques internationales (Grande Région et au-delà).

La stratégie nationale « Économie circulaire », présentée en février 2021, contribue à la mise en œuvre des programmes gouvernementaux consécutifs, qui font référence à l'économie circulaire de manière récurrente. 
 
Le Luxembourg se positionne comme un pôle de l’économie circulaire et a renforcé sa visibilité ces dernières années pour attirer les investissements et la technologie nécessaires, ainsi que pour favoriser la collaboration internationale.

En effet, grâce à sa bonne connectivité sociale, institutionnelle et économique, ainsi qu'à ses secteurs TIC et financier très performants, le Luxembourg est un banc d'essai prometteur pour les modèles commerciaux émergents de l'EC. 

Que vous soyez une entreprise, une municipalité, un(e) citoyen(ne) ou que vous souhaitiez simplement en savoir plus sur les actions et projets en rapport avec l’économie circulaire au Luxembourg, LetsGOCircular est le point de départ de votre démarche !

Name: UEMOA
Description: L'UEMOA est une organisation régionale qui vise à promouvoir l'intégration économique et monétaire entre les pays de l'Afrique de l'Ouest.

Name: The Nordic Council
Description:
The Nordic Council is the official cooperation body for the parliaments of Denmark, Finland, the Faroe Islands, Greenland, Iceland, Norway, Sweden, and Åland. It was established in 1952.

The representatives in The Nordic Council are driven by a shared ambition to make the Nordic region a great place to live, work, and thrive. This goal is at the heart of the ideas and proposals that emerge from The Nordic Council.

The Nordic Council also awards five prestigious prizes in literature, film, music, the environment, and children’s and young people’s literature. The first prize was awarded in 1962, and these prizes highlight the strong cultural ties within the Nordic region.

Name: For Our Future
Description:
For Our Future is a 501(c)(3), 501(c)(4), and PAC that empowers people in battleground states and districts to organize their communities, build progressive power, and fight for a government that works for everyone. We are a year-round, scalable organizing program with an outsized impact, training volunteers, organizers, and canvassers to have neighbor-to-neighbor, friend-to-friend conversations—online and in person—about issues that matter to working families.

We use proven and innovative strategies—testing and analyzing data every election cycle—to help people persuade and mobilize their friends and neighbors, driving participation in every election. For Our Future invests year-round in well-trained community organizers and canvassers, building lasting capacity in battleground states, and scaling when and where the need is greatest. Guided by a board that includes  AFSCME, AFT, NEA, and SEIU, our structure allows us to move quickly, adapt to changing conditions, and ensure every dollar raised goes straight into the organizing programs that deliver results. We reach voters where they are, having real conversations online and at the door. From there, we help people take deeper action: recruiting friends, volunteering, and leading local teams. Because we use non-election years to strengthen our capacity, earn community trust, and refine our strategies, we are uniquely positioned to grow in election years. 

Our model allows us to scale quickly, adjust targets as priorities shift, train state teams effectively, and deliver measurable results. When national campaigns need trusted capacity, they turn to us. This has enabled us to win local, state, and federal elections, advance ballot initiatives, and implement policies that make a
difference.

Name: CPAS
Description: The Centres Publics d'Action Sociale (public social services centres, CPAS) are tasked with guaranteeing dignified living conditions for all. To this end, they offer a wide range of assistance measures, which are available to the commune’s most disadvantaged citizens in some circumstances. Applications are assessed by a social worker and either approved or rejected by the CPAS Conseil de l'Action sociale (social work council).

Name: Geluk Centraal
Description:
Geluk Centraal is een vereniging die samen met jou het fundament van de Nederlandse samenleving wil veranderen door te denken vanuit geluk. We staan voor gigantische uitdagingen. Klimaatverandering, sociaalmaatschappelijke ongelijkheid, een overbelaste zorg en een enorm tekort aan betaalbare woningen. Om die uitdagingen toekomstbestendig op te kunnen lossen is een fundamentele systeemverandering nodig.

We moeten af van het welvaartsdenken, het moet over welzijn gaan. Daarom zijn we Geluk Centraal begonnen, samen met vooruitdenkers maken we het fundament voor onze samenleving. 

Het gaat best goed, maar dat is gebaseerd op fundamenten die aan renovatie toe zijn. We leven in een tijdperk waarin de systemen veranderen. De politiek zoekt naar nieuwe wegen, de energie is in transitie net als vervoer en landbouw, zelfs fundamentele wetenschap is verschoven naar het analyseren van data die er door internet ineens al is.

Om het sociaaleconomische speelveld serieus te nemen, moeten we bewust worden van de kwetsbaarheid van onszelf en de planeet waar we voor bepaalde tijd te gast zijn. Ook dat bewustzijn begint aardig manifest te worden. Mensen definiëren geluk steeds minder vaak als 'alles moet lukken'. 

Geluk gaat over gelijke kansen, gezondheid, een groene omgeving, gehoord worden, over je eigen gedrag. Geen vrijblijvendheid, maar vrijheid. 

Anders denk betekent ook fundamenteel anders doen. 'Want het leven is geen generale repetitie', aldus visionair en initiatienemer Wim-Heerke Spronk.

Name: Konrad Adenauer Stiftung Greece & Cyprus
Description: The Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS) is a German political foundation. With its programmes and projects, it actively contributes to international cooperation and communication. You will find a presentation of the Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung and its activities in Greece here.

Name: Tahltan Central Government
Description:
The Tahltan Central Government (TCG) is the administrative governing body of the Tahltan Nation. The Iskut Band and the Tahltan Band continue to govern Tahltan interests with respect to the Indian Act. The TCG is the representative government of the Tahltan Nation with respect to inherent Aboriginal title and rights. 

The Tahltan Nation’s Territory spans 95,933 square km of Northwest British Columbia or the equivalent of 11 per cent of the province. Tahltan Territory includes 70 per cent of BC’s Golden Triangle – a world-class mining jurisdiction with a thriving mineral exploration sector. Tahltan Territory is home to three of BC’s 16 operating mines or their shared footprint, and to approximately 41 per cent of BC’s exploration activities by expenditure. 

For more information, visit: www.tahltan.org.

Name: Europabevegelsen
Description:
Europabevegelsen skal arbeide for at Norge blir medlem i den Europeiske Union (EU) fordi
samarbeide mellom de europeiske folk bidrar til å fremme frihet, fred og demokrati, til å
utvikle kulturell forståelse og sosial utjamning, samt til å fremme en bærekraftig global
utvikling.

Europabevegelsen (European Movement Norway) skal arbeide aktivt med å spre informasjon om EU, bidra til debatten om
utviklingen i Europa og understreke de fordeler et medlemskap i EU betyr for Norge.

Name: ExcludedUK
Description:
ExcludedUK is a grassroots volunteer-run not-for-profit organisation established in response to the financial challenges faced by individuals and businesses entirely or largely excluded from government Covid-19 financial support.
 
ExcludedUK estimates at least 3 million have been excluded from meaningful government Covid-19 financial support. National Audit Office estimated 2.9 million were excluded from the schemes. A Standard Life Foundation survey published in February 2021 estimated 3.8 million are affected.
 
www.excludeduk.org

Name: United Nations in Azerbaijan
Description:
On 2 March 1992, Azerbaijan became a Member State of the United Nations after the UN General Assembly adopted resolution 46/230 at the 82nd plenary meeting of its 46th session in New York. On 6 May 1992, Azerbaijan opened its Permanent Mission to the UN in New York.
UN Sustainable Development Cooperation Framework (UNSDCF) – a new cooperation document for a period from 2021 to 2025 signed on 1 March 2021, between the UN Country Team and the Government of Azerbaijan has identified four priority areas for partnership: inclusive growth that reduces vulnerability and builds resilience; stronger institutions for better public and social services delivery; protecting the environment and addressing climate change; and achieving a gender-equitable society that empowers women and girls.

Name: International Democracy Union
Description:
The IDU is the world's leading association of centre-right political parties. Chaired by Canada's 22nd Prime Minister, the Rt. Hon. Stephen Harper, we are a mission-oriented not-for-profit that brings our members together globally to build relationships, share best practices, and support our shared values of freedom and democracy. With over 80 member parties and growing, the IDU network is truly global.

Founded in 1983, the IDU provides a forum for parties come together to exchange views on matters of policy and organisational interest in order that they may learn from each other, act together, establish contacts, and speak with a unified voice to promote democracy and centre-right policies around the globe. Founding members of the IDU included Prime Minister of the United Kingdom Margaret Thatcher, then US Vice-President George Bush Sr, Paris Mayor and later President of France Jacques Chirac, German Chancellor Helmut Kohl and among others.

Name: Fuzhou Municipal Bureau of Human Resources and Social Security
Description:
Fuzhou as the center of the provincial capital city of West Strait Economic Zone, middle zone is located in the Yangtze River Delta, Pearl River Delta and Taiwan Chinese three most active sector of the economy, is the mainland from the nearest capital city Taiwan. Fuzhou has a unique geographical advantage, it is a famous historical and cultural city in China, and the coastal port city is open.The total area is 12251 square kilometers, including 1026 square kilometers land area in the urban area. 

I. Superior geographical conditions
On February 13, 2017, the signing ceremony for the construction and commencement of new coastal city in Fuzhou & big data project was grandly staged in Fuzhou Strait International Conference & Exhibition Center, marking the official construction commencement of new coastal city in Fuzhou. Its area is about 188 square kilometers. It includes the international airport air harbor in the north, connects with Songxia Port in the south and faces the East China Sea, with a planned population of 1.3 million people. The area to the south of the airport expressway and to the north of Songxia Port is seen as the core area for the new costal area, with the area of about 86 square kilometers.

II. Favorable developing momentum
By giving full play to the advantage as the sole capital city in the Western Taiwan Straits Economic Zone, the economy in Fuzhou maintains a steady and rapid development. Our city has been listed in the “Third Batch of National Civilized Cities,” “Top 100 Cities of Comprehensive Strength in China,” “Silver-medal City for Investment Climate in China,” “National High-Tech Industry Base of Information Industry,” “Top 10 Most Competitive Cities of China’s Manufacturing Industry”, “Financial Ecological Cities with Largest Investment Value in China”, “National Famous Historical and Culture Cities”, “Most Livable Cities in China” and the “National Model Greening City.

Name: Historiske Huse
Description:
Historiske Huse arbejder for at sikre de bedste forudsætninger for, at ejere af fredede og bevaringsværdige bygninger kan nyde og passe godt på deres huse.

www.historiskehuse.dk

Name: Associação Mineira de Municípios
Description:
A Associação Mineira de Municípios – AMM foi fundada em 17 de outubro de 1952 com a filosofia que até hoje orienta seu dia-a-dia: reunir e representar os municípios de Minas buscando, através das suas potencialidades e individualidades, o fortalecimento de cada um e o consequente desenvolvimento do Estado.

Como entidade política, apartidária e de utilidade pública, a AMM tem, como seus parceiros, os gestores municipais que acreditam no princípio municipalista como alavancador para a construção de um Estado e um País soberano. Os governos estadual e federal, as Associações Microrregionais de Municípios, bem como diversas instituições da sociedade civil, trabalham em parceria com a AMM e reconhecem a força de sua representatividade.

A AMM atua como estrutura de articulação política e se posiciona frente aos poderes executivo, legislativo e judiciário como representante legítima das 853 cidades, o maior número de municípios reunidos do Brasil. Ao mesmo tempo em que defende os interesses e os direitos dos municípios mineiros, oferece a eles ferramentas para se tornarem cada vez mais autônomos através da implementação de uma gestão eficiente.

Além da importante representação política, a AMM está estruturada para prestar consultoria a todos os municípios mineiros nas áreas de saúde, jurídica, social, de educação, de economia, contábil, de finanças, de captação de recursos e de meio ambiente. Através de suas áreas técnicas, estabelece uma atuação capaz de ajudar cada município a otimizar suas competências. Seus consultores, profissionais especializados na área pública, trabalham com estratégias de fortalecimento municipal, propiciando aos prefeitos melhor condição de tomada de decisões.

Name: DSK - De Samvirkende Købmænd
Description:
Med De Samvirkende Købmænd har danske købmænd en slagkraftig brancheorganisation, der sætter mange “fingeraftryk” i dansk erhvervslovgivning. Medlemskredsen omfatter ca. 1.400 supermarkeder, discountbutikker, nærbutikker og convenience. DSK har også samtidig et tæt samarbejde med de to grossister i den frie sektor: Dagrofa og Reitan Distribution.

I daglig tale siger vi, at DSK’s formål er at passe godt på den danske købmand. Mere formelt formuleret, så er DSK’s erklærede formål at skabe de bedst mulige vilkår for selvstændige forretningsdrivende i dansk dagligvarehandel.
En af DSK’s vigtigste opgaver er derfor at deltage aktivt i tilblivelsen af love og bekendtgørelser, der berører dagligvarehandelen og dermed købmændene.

DSK har høringsret i forhold til relevant lovgivning og er repræsenteret i en lang række råd, nævn og udvalg, hvor der kan øves indflydelse. Via forhandlinger og med saglige argumenter over for regering, folketing og kommuner påvirker DSK lovgivningsmæssige tiltag.

Det gælder f.eks. inden for butiksstrukturudviklingen, fødevarelovgivning, skatte- og afgiftsforslag, markedsføring, betalingsmidler, miljøkrav m.m.

Name: Dansk Bilforhandler Union - DBFU
Description:
Velkommen til Dansk Bilforhandler Unions LinkedIn profil. Her vil du løbende løbende kunne læse om, hvordan vi skaber bedre vilkår for brugtbilsforhandleren og dig, som køber en brugt bil i Danmark og få mere information om vores forening.

DBFU er en brancheforening for brugtbilsforhandlere i Danmark, som har et fælles ønske om at øge forbrugernes tillid til markedet for brugte biler.

Vi stiller høje krav til vores medlemmer, som følger en lang række etiske retningslinjer og salgsbetingelser for at skabe en troværdig branche. Det er din sikkerhed som forbruger.

Når du køber en bil hos et af vores medlemmer, er du garanteret en pålidelig aftale med rimelige vilkår.

BrugtBilGarantiFonden
DBFUs medlemmer er en del af BrugtBilGarantiFonden, som er din garanti for, at forhandleren opfylder sine økonomiske forpligtelser over for dig som forbruger.

I tilfælde af at forhandlerne ikke kan leve op til sine forpligtelser, vil fonden erstatte dine tab.

DBFU et netværk af troværdige brugtbilsforhandlere

Name: USR
Description: USR este principala forță modernizatoare a României.

Name: Danish Maritime Officers
Description: Danish Maritime Officers is a trade union for officers in the Danish merchant fleet including captains, shipmates and engineers in MAERSK, D/S Norden, Torm and other shipping companies, together with maritime pilots and other managers and specialists in the maritime sector.

Name: Ecopreneur.eu - The European Sustainable Business Federation
Description: Ecopreneur.eu is the European Sustainable Business Federation of currently 9 national associations representing about 5000 companies across sectors and member states, many of which SMEs leading with circular models. A member of the Ecodesign Forum and Coordination Group of the European Circular Economy Stakeholder Platform, Ecopreneur.eu is the only cross-sectoral EU business organisation committed to ambitious measures, rules and regulations for a low-carbon circular economy. We advocate a new economic framework in which sustainability is promoted, the environment respected, and ecological principles are followed. Ecopreneur.eu and our members bring concrete experience from pioneering companies into the political debate, show best practice examples and represent the needs of green SMEs.

Name: Stevns Kommune
Description:
Stevns Kommune vil være kendt som et stærkt lokalsamfund i Øresundsregionen
- i storslået natur, en alsidig kultur og med god plads til både at bo og leve i.

Name: Städtetag Baden-Württemberg
Description: The Städtetag Baden-Württemberg is a top level professional association of 198 citys and municipalities aswell as other organisations. We support our members and represent their voices in federal politics.

Name: GroenLinks Amsterdam
Description: GroenLinks Amsterdam is de afdeling van GroenLinks in Amsterdam. Op dit moment zit GroenLinks met drie wethouder in het college en acht raadsleden in de gemeenteraad in Amsterdam. De politici van GroenLinks zetten zich in voor eerlijke kansen op werk, meer schone energie, ruimte voor de fiets en ondersteuning voor de mensen die dat nodig hebben.

Name: Student PIRGs
Description:
See more and apply online at http://jobs.studentpirgs.org

The Student PIRGs are hiring Campus Organizers to lead and train the next generation of activists!

Our team organizes campaigns across the country getting students involved and trains them to run campaigns that make an impact in the community, at the local, state, or federal levels, and wherever it will make the greatest impact.

The Student PIRGs is hiring more organizers to help us make a difference on some of the top issues facing our generation.

1)	We want democracy to work for everybody, not just Super PACs — so we’re working to overturn Citizens United and reclaim democracy for the people.

2)	We want to save the bees, so we are working to ban bee killing pesticides so we can continue to enjoy coffee, chocolate, and more!

3) We want clean energy, so we are working to get college campuses across the country to commit to 100% renewable energy

And much more!
	
Here are some things to know about the job:

First, our organizers don’t spend a lot of time sitting behind a desk! Most of your time will be spent out in the field creating partnerships and moving campaigns forward.

Second, you’ll also learn from some of the best organizers in the country — people who have been doing this work for 30+ years.

Finally, you leave behind a group of students that can sustain and grow this work in years to come.

We’re hiring organizers to work on college campuses in California, New Jersey, Massachusetts, Oregon, and other states.

If you have the passion and the drive it takes to fuel the power of student activism, win positive change, and build for even more victories in the future, consider a job with us.

Name: PES Group in the European Committee of the Regions
Description:
The Group of the Party of European Socialists (PES Group) in the European Committee of the Regions is a political group that brings together social democratic and progressive locally and regionally elected politicians from across the European Union. The Group aims at taking forward a progressive European vision with solidarity as well as social and territorial cohesion at its core.

The European Committee of the Regions is the EU's assembly of local and regional representatives. Its purpose is to involve presidents of regions, mayors, regional and local councillors in EU policy making, and thus to give a voice to the European territories, which are directly responsible for the implementation of around 70% of the EU legislation. Thanks to their dual mandate at local/regional and European levels, the 350 members from the 28 EU Member States play a key role in addressing the EU's challenges at grass roots level.

Our work in the European Committee of the Regions

The PES Group works to achieve its political priorities through its work in all six thematic commissions of the European Committee of the Regions, covering a broad range of policy areas relevant to local and regional authorities. These commissions produce political recommendations on proposed EU strategies and legislation, as well as on issues identified by the Committee as being of key importance to Europe's cities and regions.

Our work in Europe

The PES Group organises meetings and citizens debates in cities and regions across Europe, bringing policymakers together and connecting them directly with the lived experience of Europe's citizens. The Group also hosts workshops, seminars and cultural events to encourage debate and drive political action on some of the most important issues facing Europe's citizens.

Name: Wirtschaftsrat Hessen
Description:
Herzlich willkommen auf der Seite des Landesverbands Hessens!

Der Wirtschaftsrat der CDU e.V. ist ein branchenübergreifender Unternehmerverband mit rund 12.500 Mitgliedern, gegründet 1963 unter der Schirmherrschaft von Ludwig Erhard.
Als Stimme der Sozialen Marktwirtschaft verstehen wir uns als Brücke zwischen Wirtschaft und Politik – unabhängig, ausschließlich finanziert durch Mitgliedsbeiträge.

Wir führen den Dialog mit Entscheidungsträgern auf EU-, Bundes-, Landes- und Kommunalebene und setzen uns für wirtschaftspolitische Impulse im Sinne unternehmerischer Freiheit, Verantwortung und Wettbewerbsfähigkeit ein.

Mit über 2.000 Mitgliedern in Hessen schaffen wir Plattformen für Austausch, Vernetzung und konkrete Gestaltung politischer Rahmenbedingungen.

Zielgruppe: Mittelständische Unternehmer, Familienunternehmen, Spitzenpolitiker, Behörden und Institutionen, die sich am Leitbild des ehrbaren Kaufmanns orientieren und die Soziale Marktwirtschaft stärken wollen.

Name: PLR.Les Libéraux-Radicaux Vaud
Description:
Le PLR.Les Libéraux-Radicaux Vaud est présent dans les 13 (sous-)arrondissements du canton de Vaud grâce à ses sections (près de 50). Le parti base son programme sur trois valeurs principales : la liberté, la cohésion et l'innovation, sans oublier la responsabilité individuelle.

Si vous souhaitez vous engager ou simplement en apprendre plus sur le parti, n'hésitez pas à visiter son site internet : www.plr-vd.ch / ou à contacter son secrétariat cantonal via info@plr-vd.ch ou au 021 323 72 78.

PLR - avancer ensemble !

Name: SGP-jongeren
Description: Als jongerenorganisatie van SGP houden wij ons bezig om christelijke politiek dicht bij jongeren te brengen. Door leuke evenementen met interessante sprekers te organiseren wordt politiek tot leven gebracht.

Name: Outpatient Ophthalmic Surgery Society (OOSS)
Description: For more than thirty years OOSS has grown up with, advocated for and provided critical advocacy, network and educational support for the entire ophthalmic ASC community. As the only professional society addressing the unique interests of this maturing community, OOSS communicates regularly with over 1,000 ophthalmic-only centers and another 500 multispecialty centers with an ophthalmic focus. Of those, more than 500 centers engage regularly with OOSS, supporting advocacy endeavors, contributing industry intelligence, and participating in educational programs. At the heart of OOSS, are our members – our pioneers and our innovators. These people achieve incredible results every day, ensuring exceptional surgical experiences for patients and surgeons alike, and manage profitable enterprises that affordable value.

Name: VAUNET
Description:
VAUNET ist der Spitzenverband der Audio- und audiovisuellen Medien in Deutschland mit Sitz in Berlin und Büro in Brüssel. Zu den vielfältigen Geschäftsfelder der rund 160 Mitgliedern gehören TV-, Radio-, Web- und Streaming-Angebote. 

Die privaten audiovisuellen Medien sind Motor der Kreativwirtschaft und einer der größten Wirtschaftssektoren in Deutschland. Die Verbandsarbeit richtet sich an den konvergenten Märkten für audiovisuelle Medien aus und gestaltet auf nationaler wie europäischer Ebene die Rahmenbedingungen aktiv mit. Der Wirtschaftsverband hat zum Ziel, Akzeptanz für die wirtschaftlichen Anliegen der audiovisuellen Medien zu schaffen sowie die gesellschaftspolitische und kulturelle Bedeutung der Branche im digitalen Zeitalter ins Bewusstsein zu rücken. Video und Audio bilden die Klammer des Namens VAUNET, Net steht für Network und unterstreicht die Bedeutung, Allianzen zu bilden. 

VAUNET is the leading organisation for audiovisual media in Germany, with its headquarters in Berlin and an office in Brussels, it has been operating under the name VAUNET – German Media Association since 21 May 2018. The fields of business in which its 160 member companies operate are highly varied, ranging from TV and radio to internet and streaming offerings. VAUNET represents the interests of the commercial audiovisual industry, which is one of the largest business sectors in Germany. The Association's activities focus on development in the markets for audiovisual media and play an active role in shaping the relevant parameters at both a national and European level. The aim of the trade association is to create acceptance for the economic concerns of audiovisual media and raise awareness of the major sociopolitical and cultural significance of this industry in the digital age

Name: Vlaams Belang
Description: Het Vlaams Belang is de enige rechtse Vlaams-nationalistische partij in Vlaanderen.

Name: Australian Manufacturing Workers' Union
Description: The AMWU represents the interests of manufacturing workers throughout Australia. It advocates on behalf of its members with employers and their associations, local, state and federal governments. The AMWU is Australia's oldest registered trade union.

Name: The George Washington University Student Association
Description: The Student Association (SA) is the primary advocacy group for all 27,000 undergraduate and graduate students at The George Washington University. Chartered by the University's Board of Trustees, the SA is responsible for managing approximately $1.8 million in student fee money that is allocated to over 500 student groups. Consisting of a popularly elected President, Executive Vice President, and student Senate, the body is charged with working to promote the student experience by advocating, allocating, advertising, and assisting all students at GW.

Name: Reproductive Equity Now
Description:
Reproductive Equity Now works to make access to the full spectrum of reproductive health care a reality for all people in New England regardless of their race, ethnicity, income, zip code, gender, age, immigration status, ability, sexual orientation, or religion. 

Advancing reproductive equity and justice and eliminating barriers to  abortion care are central to our mission.

Name: Women for Election
Description:
Women for Election is a not-for-profit, non-partisan organisation which offers a tailored training and support programmes to women seeking to enter public life; and provides and facilitates a cross-party network of political women, committed to gender equality in Irish political representation. We believe that a diversity of voices in our politics will lead to more robust decisions, and help create a fairer, more inclusive and dynamic society.

Stemming from Women for Europe, an organisation established to provide a platform for women’s voices during the 2009 Lisbon treaty referendum, Women for Election is the response to demand we met, across Ireland, for an organisation wholly focused on providing practical supports for women entering politics.

Evidence shows that to bring about real change a combination of hard measures (quotas) and additional supports, such as training programmes and women’s political networks, is required. Women for Election provides a number of programmes designed specifically to empower women and to help them overcome challenges the may face when considering a career in politics.

Through our tailored programmes we aim to:

INSPIRE women to consider a career in politics
EQUIP women with the tools and techniques necessary to successfully get elected
INFORM women of the benefits of becoming more politically active

Our programmes provide high quality political training focused on supporting women to win. Delivered by a variety of experts our programmes cover all aspects of political campaigns, including building committed campaign teams, effective planning and administration, fundraising and budgeting, message development, presentation skills and managing the media.

Name: Fremstillingsindustrien i DI
Description:
Danmarks største faglige netværk for produktionsvirksomheder.

Fremstillingsindustrien er med sine 2.500 medlemsvirksomheder DI's største medlemsforening målt på lønsum. 

Ca. 80% af medlemsvirksomhederne i Fremstillingsindustrien er SMV'ere.
Virksomhederne i Fremstillingsindustrien er først og fremmest kendetegnet ved, som navnet siger, at de fremstiller noget, eller at de er knyttet tæt til virksomheder, der lever af fremstilling.

Virksomhederne repræsenterer brancher, der forarbejder metal, fremstiller komponenter og maskiner, servicerer og reparerer maskiner og installationer og handler med råvarer, komponenter og maskiner. Derudover har vi også medlemmer, der fremstiller software og forsvarsteknologi.


Gennem offentlighedspåvirkende aktiviteter - kampagner m.m. - bidrager Fremstillingsindustrien til at sætte en positiv dagsorden for den danske fremstillingsindustri og især agendaen omkring ProduktionsDanmark. 

Vi er et valgforum, som kanaliserer medlemmernes indflydelse ind i Dansk Industri. Vi overlader den politiske interessevaretagelse, herunder den arbejdsmarkedspolitiske interessevaretagelse, til DI.

Ambitionen i foreningen er at give det enkelte medlem nem adgang til værdiskabende rådgivning, services og relevant kommunikation.

Name: Merseyside Police Commissioner
Description: Official account for Merseyside's Police & Crime Commissioner Emily Spurrell.

Name: American Made Media Company
Description: American Made Media Company (AMMC) transforms visions into victories for campaigns and organizations. Through our sub-brands—Launchpad Strategies, American Made Media Consultants, NPA Strategies, NPA Polling, and 17th Street Media—we provide strategic consulting, media, polling, and compelling advertising.

Name: Advocates for Trans Equality
Description:
A4TE was founded in 2024 as the National Center for Transgender Equality (NCTE) and Transgender Legal Defense and Education Fund (TLDEF), two long-time champions for the trans community, merged together as one organization.

As a trans-led nonprofit, we help our community navigate the realities of law and policy through vital tools, knowledge, and services.

We leverage decades of experience on the frontlines of power to shift government and society towards a future where we are no less than equal.

Name: Office of the Mayor, City of Toronto
Description:
Office of the Mayor
City of Toronto

Name: Verband Deutscher Vermessungsingenieure (VDV) e.V.
Description:
Der Verband Deutscher Vermessungsingenieure (VDV) e.V. ist die berufspolitische Interessenvertretung für Vermessungs- und Geoinformationsingenieure in Deutschland. 
Die Mitwirkung bei der strukturellen Gestaltung des Deutschen Vermessungs- und Geoinformationswesens gehört zu den primären Zielen des Verbandes. 
Der VDV bündelt die Interessen und Belange seiner Mitglieder aus der freien Wirtschaft sowie dem Öffentlichen Dienst und vertritt sie gegenüber Politik und Gesellschaft im nationalen wie auch internationalen Kontext. 
Der VDV engagiert sich für die Ausbildung gut qualifizierten Ingenieurnachwuchses, die Erhöhung des Frauenanteils und für permanente Weiterbildung im Beruf.

Name: Wirtschaftsbund Steiermark
Description:
Wir wollen die erste Adresse für alle sein, die unternehmerisch denken und handeln, die etwas für sich, ihre Familien und Österreich bewegen wollen. Wir verstehen uns als führende politische Organisation der leistungsmotivierten gesellschaftlichen Mitte, als starke Interessensplattform und als attraktives Erfolgsnetzwerk für den gesamten selbstständigen und unselbstständigen Mittelstand in Österreich. Unternehmerisches Denken und Handeln ist für uns die Lösung für viele Herausforderungen, vor denen wir heute als Standort, Gesellschaft und Individuen stehen.

Wir wollen unseren Mitgliedern durch moderne Strukturen, die der Realität unseres Wirtschaftslebens entsprechen, eine starke Stimme, erfolgreiche Interessensvertretung und sinnvolles Service ermöglichen. Wir öffnen unsere Organisation für thematisches und temporäres Engagement sowie für kontinuierliche Partizipation. Unsere Leistungen und unser Auftritt in der Öffentlichkeit sollen unsere Leidenschaft für unternehmerisches Denken und Handeln spürbar machen.

Wir bekennen uns zum ordnungspolitischen Modell der Sozialen Marktwirtschaft mit den Kernwerten Freiheit, Leistung, Eigentum und Eigenverantwortung. Freiheit für ein erfolgreiches Unternehmertum. Freiheit von Überregulierung, Bürokratie und anderen unnötigen Belastungen ermöglicht wettbewerbsfähige Betriebe und wirtschaftlichen Erfolg. Leistung muss sich lohnen. Leistung als Essenz für eine positive wirtschaftliche und soziale Entwicklung muss in allen Teilen unserer Gesellschaft gefördert und gefordert werden. Erfolgreiche Wirtschaft braucht mehr Eigentum. Eigentum als Ergebnis persönlicher Leistung und Ausdruck individueller Freiheit ermöglicht die Bildung von Kapital, das investiert werden kann und vergrößert wirtschaftliche Handlungsspielräume. Ja zu Verantwortung in Wirtschaft, Bildung und Gesellschaft. Verantwortung – individuell, gesetzlich, ökologisch – ist für uns Markenzeichen unserer Wirtschaftskultur und unseres Verständnisses von Unternehmertum.

Name: People For the American Way
Description: People For the American Way is a national progressive advocacy organization that inspires and mobilizes Americans to defend freedom, justice, and democracy from those who threaten to take them away. For more than four decades, we have been dedicated to making the promise of America real for everyone and have worked toward a vision of a vibrant America where basic rights and freedoms are upheld for all, not just the wealthy and the powerful.Learn more:http://www.peoplefor.org

Name: Min A-kasse
Description:
The Danish word ‘a‑kasse’ is an abbreviation for ‘arbejdsløshedskasse’ and means unemployment insurance fund. When you join (become a member of) the a‑kasse, you are guaranteed an amount of regular income if you become unemployed. 

So the a‑kasse can give you time to look for the right job, pay your bills – and in fact help you to find a job. 

We are one of the few 'a-kasser', that put an honour into promoting a good tone in the unemployment-debate. 

Read more on our homepage.

Name: Impact Research
Description:
Impact Research (formerly known as ALG Research) is a progressive public opinion research firm specializing in message development and strategic consulting. Our company is especially proud to have served as President Biden’s pollster during the 2020 campaign, resulting in Biden’s nomination amidst the most competitive primary in modern history and his historic wins in states like Georgia, Arizona, and Pennsylvania. Impact also polled for President Obama in 2008 and 2012, helping elect the nation’s first Black President.

In the past two decades, our team has beaten more Republican congressional incumbents than any other polling firm in the industry. As pollsters, we’re committed to going beyond simply providing numbers. While we’re proud of our ability to collect good data, we believe polling is of little use unless it is paired with clear, actionable strategic advice.

The Impact Research team is dedicated to making America—and the world at large—a more equitable and just place. Through our work with progressive organizations like Planned Parenthood, EMILY’s List, AFL-CIO, and the ACLU, Impact Research has played a role in major reforms. Our work is also used beyond the ballot box, as Impact is trusted by Fortune 500 companies to develop messaging on products that improve the lives of consumers. 

Impact Research offers a team-oriented working environment that allows professionals to learn and grow from their peers’ natural strengths as they tackle challenges and solve problems together. We are fortunate to be surrounded by a caring team that is highly skilled and motivated. Though our employees are passionate in the performance of their individual roles, they recognize that the team’s synergy produces results unattainable individually. By joining our team, you will gain valuable experience and exposure to challenging and rewarding work. Please visit our website’s careers page for more information about job openings.

Name: ASFE - Alliance Solidaire des Français de l'Etranger
Description:
L’Alliance Solidaire des Français de l’Etranger (ASFE) est un mouvement  indépendant dédié aux Français de l’étranger.

Entre deux et trois millions et demi de Français sont établis à l’étranger. C’est considérable : plus que le nombre d’habitants à Paris.

Ces Français ont des besoins et des aspirations légitimes et variés : l’école de leurs enfants, leurs retraites, la santé et la sécurité de leur famille… le besoin de s’informer facilement de leurs droits, la possibilité de savoir qu’ils peuvent toujours rentrer, ou être accueillis pour la première fois lorsqu’ils ont toujours vécu à l’étranger.

Nous pensons que nos intérêts ne sont pas suffisamment défendus en France, où pourtant les décisions prises continuent de nous affecter. 

Nous pensons que cela tient au fait que les Français de l’étranger ne sont pas suffisamment entendus ni compris, car non défendus dans une optique indépendante des partis politiques nationaux. Ces derniers ne voient souvent les Français de l’étranger que comme des réserves de voix, à mobiliser à la veille des élections. 

L’ASFE est composée de Français de l’étranger : actuels, anciens, ou qui comptent le devenir à nouveau. Notre ambition est de faire émerger une représentation des Français de l’étranger plus en phase avec ce que cette communauté est devenue ces dernières années. Plus diverse, plus libre, parfois plus précaire. 

Se tourner vers ses compatriotes lorsque l’on part à l’étranger est un réflexe. Les réseaux de solidarité locaux, et existants, doivent se faire davantage entrendre. Les Français nés à l’étranger doivent également pouvoir les solliciter sans hésiter.

Name: ESCP International Politics Society
Description:
- ESCP International Politics Society shares content related to international affairs and political events in Europe and around the world. 

- We aim at providing learning opportunities for everyone through our publications and events, while giving the possibility to ESCP students and alumni to expand their network. 

- ESCP being the world's first business school in the world, our organisation enjoys a unique mixed perspective of business, politics, and international relations. 

- Founded in 2023, we are mainly active in Madrid and Paris, but operate across all ESCP campuses. 

Disclaimer: the views expressed in the publications are solely the views of the authors, and do not reflect the views of the entire organisation and the ESCP community.
____________________________________________

- L'association de Politique Internationale l'ESCP partage du contenu politique et lié aux affaires publiques en Europe et dans le monde.

- Nous visons à offrir des opportunités d'apprentissage pour tous grâce à nos publications et événements, tout en permettant aux étudiants et anciens élèves de l'ESCP d'élargir leur réseau.

- L'ESCP est la doyenne des école de commerce au monde et notre organisation bénéficie d'une perspective unique mêlant affaires, politique et politiques publiques.

- Fondée en 2023, nous sommes principalement actifs à Madrid et à Paris, mais nous opérons sur tous les campus de l'ESCP.

Avis : les opinions exprimées dans les publications sont uniquement celles des auteurs et ne reflètent pas les opinions de l'ensemble de l'organisation et de la communauté de l'ESCP.

Name: Democratic Majority for Israel
Description: We will work to maintain and strengthen support for Israel among Democratic leaders including presidential and congressional candidates as well as with the grassroots of progressive movements. We are committed to doing so because we recognize that America’s relationship with Israel, the sole democracy in the Middle East, is a mutually beneficial one based on shared values and shared interests.

Name: Dansk Erhverv - Arbejdsmiljø
Description:
Velkommen til Dansk Erhverv Arbejdsmiljø. På dette site kan du læse artikler og nyheder om Arbejdsmiljø og få inspiration til arbejdsmiljøarbejdet i jeres virksomhed.

Bag sitet står Dansk Erhverv, som repræsenterer et bredt udsnit af virksomheder og brancher. Vores mission er at fremme konkurrencekraft hos vores medlemmer i en globaliseret økonomi.

Name: Lyon au Coeur
Description: Association qui rassemble toutes les énergies désireuses de porter un projet audacieux pour Lyon en 2026

Name: Verband Region Stuttgart
Description:
Rund 2,8 Millionen Menschen leben in der Region Stuttgart, einem der dynamischsten und innovativsten Standorte Europas. Hier werden rund 30 Prozent der landesweiten Wirtschaftsleistung erbracht. Dies kann jedoch nur gelingen, wenn die Region, die aus 179 Gemeinden besteht, als Gesamtheit optimal funktioniert.

Auch aus diesem Grund wurde 1994 der Verband Region Stuttgart per Landesgesetz als Körperschaft des öffentlichen Rechts gegründet. Sein gesetzlicher Auftrag zur „Förderung und Sicherung einer geordneten Entwicklung“ hat in nahezu 30 Jahren an Aktualität nichts verloren.

Die politische Steuerung obliegt der Regionalversammlung mit ihren derzeit 88 Mitgliedern. Diese werden alle fünf Jahre durch die rund 1,7 Millionen Wahlberechtigten in der Region gewählt. Die Direktwahl sorgt für ein starkes demokratisches Mandat und ist einmalig in Baden-Württemberg.

Sparringspartner der politischen Ebene ist die Geschäftsstelle mit über 80 Mitarbeiter*innen. Sie bereiten die Beschlüsse der Regionalversammlung und der Ausschüsse vor und setzen diese um. Außerdem beraten sie die Kommunen in der Region.

Impressum: www.region-stuttgart.org/impressum 
Datenschutz: www.region-stuttgart.org/datenschutz

Name: PCG Buren
Description: De PCG Buren is een lokale christelijke politieke partij in de Gemeente Buren.

Name: Winning Connections
Description:
We are a team of former politicians, campaign strategists, journalists and data specialists who understand politics and how to explain what’s at stake.  We’ve mobilized voters and constituents for clients ranging from the American Cancer Society and Planned Parenthood to Everytown for Gun Safety and Obama for America. 

As the nation’s leading voter contact and grassroots advocacy firm, we’ve secured victories up and down the ballot and across the map. And we’ve won more awards than any other firm in our industry.

Name: JCI Baden-Württemberg
Description: Wirtschaftsjunioren Baden-Württemberg is a staffing and recruiting company based out of Jägerstraße 40, Stuttgart, Baden-W��rttemberg, Germany.

Name: Tax Justice Norge
Description:
Tax Justice Norge er en del av den internasjonale paraplyen Global Alliance for Tax Justice. Nettverket i Norge skal jobbe for global skatterettferd. Dette innebærer et demokratisk og åpent skattesystem der innbyggerne har demokratisk kontroll over skattelegging og stans av hemmelighold som tilbys av skatteparadis.

Tax Justice Norge skal: 
- Informere om de skadelige effektene av skjulte pengestrømmer
- Fremme kontakt mellom interesserte parter i Norge og mellom Norge og utlandet
- Stimulere og organisere forskning og debatt
- Oppfordre og støtte nasjonal og internasjonal kampanjeaktivitet
