Name: Green Party Norway
Description:
Miljøpartiet De Grønne (MDG) er både et politisk parti og en del av en internasjonal bevegelse. Vi arbeider for et medmenneskelig samfunn i økologisk balanse. Partiet ble stiftet 29. oktober 1988.

De Grønne er i vekst, både når det gjelder antall medlemmer og antall mottatte stemmer ved valg. 2015 ble året da vi virkelig slo gjennom lokalt: Vi gikk fra å ha 30 representanter på kommune- og fylkestingsnivå til å få 285 folkevalgte spredd over hele landet!  På landsbasis fikk De Grønne 4,2 prosent av stemmene ved kommunstyrevalget, mens ved fylkestingsvalget var resultatet 5,0 prosent.

Vårt nasjonale gjennombrudd kom ved Stortingsvalget i 2013, da vi fikk 2,8 prosent av stemmene, en nidobling fra forrige stortingsvalg, og Rasmus Hansson ble innvalgt på Stortinget som partiets første stortingsrepresentant. Siden da har vi markert oss sterkt både på Stortinget og i media.

Partiledelsen

Miljøpartiet De Grønne har to talspersoner av ulikt kjønn. Dette er en vanlig ordning i mange grønne partier og er begrunnet med hensyn til likestilling og maktspredning.

Den sittende ledelsen består av talspersonene Une Aina Bastholm og Rasmus Hansson, samt partisekretær Lars Gaupset.

Grønn Ungdom og andre bevegelser

Partiets ungdomsorganisasjon heter Grønn Ungdom, og ble stiftet i 1996. Anna Kvam og Lage Nøst er talspersoner, mens Isa Isene er generalsekretær.

Vi er sterkt til stede på Norges største utdanningsinstitusjoner, gjennom studentorganisasjonen Grønne Studenter. På landsmøtet i 2014 stiftet vi et internt kvinnenettverk, for å arbeide for mer likestilling innad i partiet, Grønt Kvinnenettverk.

Vi er en del av en voksende, global grønn bevegelse, og er medlem av European Green Party (EGP) og Global Greens. Vårt søsterparti i Sverige, Miljöpartiet de gröna, er det fjerde største partiet i Riksdagen og sitter i regjering med Socialdemokratarna. Grønne partier har lenge hatt ledende posisjoner i blant annet Frankrike og Tyskland.

Name: The Collective PAC
Description: The Collective PAC is working to create an America where Black people are equally represented at every level of government. The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward.

Name: Human Rights Campaign New England
Description:
Working across New England - Connecticut. Maine, Massachusetts, New Hampshire. Rhode Island, and Vermont, HRC New England works to secure equal rights for LGBTQ+ individuals and families at the federal and state level by lobbying elected officials, mobilizing grassroots supporters, educating Americans, investing strategically to elect fair-minded officials and partnering with other LGBTQ+ organizations. 

The New England Steering Committee is a diverse volunteer group of individuals. Join us! 

Nationally, the Human Rights Campaign serve as America's largest civil rights organization working to achieve lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and queer equality. By inspiring and engaging individuals and communities, HRC strives to end discrimination against LGBTQ+ people and realize a world that achieves fundamental fairness and equality for all.

The Human Rights Campaign envisions a world where lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and queer people are ensured equality and embraced as full members of society at home, at work, and in every community.

Name: Österreichischer Städtebund
Description:
Etwa 65 Prozent der Bevölkerung und 71 Prozent der Arbeitsplätze befinden sich in Österreichs Ballungsräumen. Der Österreichische Städtebund ist die kommunale Interessenvertretung von insgesamt 260 Städten und größeren Gemeinden.
Der Verein wurde am 24. September 1915 gegründet und hat heute neben Wien und den Landeshauptstädten praktisch alle Gemeinden mit über 10.000 Einwohner*innen als Mitglied. Die kleinste Mitgliedsgemeinde zählt knapp 1.000 Einwohner*innen.

Die Mitgliedschaft ist freiwillig. Der Österreichische Städtebund ist Gesprächspartner für die Regierung auf Bundes- und Landesebene und ist in der österreichischen Bundesverfassung (Art. 115 Abs. 3) ausdrücklich erwähnt.

Name: NOVO na Câmara
Description:
A Liderança do NOVO na Câmara é o órgão administrativo de consultoria, assessoria e prestação de serviços à bancada dos Deputados Federais do partido NOVO.

Todos os esforços da Liderança são em prol de um objetivo único: dar total apoio e fortalecer a atuação dos Deputados Federais do NOVO e suas equipes.

Esse trabalho conjunto e técnico é a prova de que, com boa vontade e a dedicação dos melhores profissionais, conseguiremos fazer uma política honesta, exemplar e de excelência.

Já que acreditamos que os maiores desafios estão na gestão pública, os maiores talentos também devem estar.

Assim, mesmo com uma bancada de 8 deputados, o NOVO na Câmara já conquistou posições de visibilidade nas principais pautas do Congresso Nacional nessa legislatura.

Resultado de uma grande atuação dos parlamentares, que são comprometidos – acima de tudo – com a construção de um Brasil alinhado com os ideais liberais, e de um trabalho intenso das equipes de gabinete e da Liderança.

Trabalhamos por um Brasil mais simples, justo e livre, onde todos possam chegar lá!

Name: SÜDWIND e.V.
Description:
Our vision is economic, social and ecological justice around the world. Our research and activities strive towards fair economic relations. The experiences of the poor and their concerns are what guides our thinking. We are committed to fighting discrimination against women. We uncover unjust structures, raise awareness and campaign for change. We develop tools and lines of action for Development organisations, Churches, Trade unions, Politics and Businesses. Our actions are based on the relationship between justice, peace and the integrity of creation.

SÜDWIND was founded 1991 in Cologne. The founding and its naming were inspired by the U.S. theologian Jim Wallis at the Ecumenical World Assembly in Seoul 1990: ”Tomorrow, it will be the south wind (German: SÜDWIND) of justice and liberation that breaks the chains of the oppressed.”

Name: FederServizi
Description:
Federservizi è un’associazione di aziende dell’area metropolitana di Roma operanti nei settori dei servizi alle persone, nell’ICT, nella comunicazione, nella formazione e nella gestione delle risorse umane, nella consulenza, nelle professioni, nella finanza, nel settore audiovisivo e nel commercio all’ingrosso non food. L’associazione, che fa parte di Confcommercio, è espressione di un macrosettore economico che rappresenta il 47% delle imprese dell’area metropolitana, il 33% degli occupati e il 64% del valore aggiunto, e che genera un fatturato totale annuo di 124 miliardi di euro.
Roma non è solo la Capitale d’Italia e una delle più belle città del mondo, è anche una città di servizi e conta 182.000 imprese private operanti nel settore. Federservizi nasce per rappresentarle accendendo un faro su di esse.

Name: Controle Alt Delete Official
Description:
Controle Alt Delete (een initiatief van IZI Solutions) is in het leven geroepen om etnisch profileren en buitenproportioneel politiegeweld tegen te gaan door middel van het organiseren van bijeenkomsten, het produceren van kritische films, het geven van workshops/lezingen, het schrijven van blogs en het bieden van constructieve oplossingen ten behoeve van beleidsverandering.

Website: https://controlealtdelete.nl/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/controlealtdelete/
Instagram: https://instagram.com/controle_alt_delete
Twitter: https://twitter.com/cntrlealtdlt

Name: Small Axe
Description:
We’re a not-for-profit with one goal: to create movements that are progressive, hopeful and powerful, to inspire people to act on the most pressing issues of our time.

We see the world as it is – rife with inequality, environmental neglect and elitist politics.

Never in our lifetime has the future felt so insecure. But this isn’t a time to hang back, it’s a time to grab onto hope, that’s why we are ambitious about building up leaders and movements to bring about the change we need.

Name: Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP)
Description:
BJP is devoutly committed to building a strong and developed India which is unimaginable without the trust and the unflinching support of the people of India.
Join us and be part of the unprecedented transformation that is changing the lives of all sections for better. Together, Lets build "Ek Bharat, Shreshtha Bharat" and witness the raise of New India under the Charismatic leadership of PM Shri Narendra Modi.

Name: ASEAN INTER-PARLIAMENTARY ASSEMBLY (AIPA) Secretariat
Description:
Philosophy
One Vision | One Identity | One Community

Establishment of AIPA
The ASEAN Inter-Parliamentary Assembly (AIPA) is a regional parliamentary organization. It was originally formed on September 2, 1977 as the ASEAN Inter-Parliamentary Organization (AIPO) by the leaders of the parliamentary delegations of Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore and Thailand attending the Third ASEAN Inter-Parliamentary Conference in Manila, Philippines.

In 1995, Viet Nam became a member, followed by Lao People's Democratic Republic in 1997, Cambodia in 1999, and Brunei Darussalam in 2009.

At the 27th AIPO General Assembly held in Cebu City, Philippines in 2006, there was a consensus to transform the organization into a more effective and closely integrated institution and to change the organization's name from AIPO to AIPA.

What Is AIPA?
AIPA stands for ASEAN Inter-Parliamentary Assembly. It serves as the center of communication and information among Member Parliaments which consist of Brunei Darussalam, Cambodia, Indonesia, Lao People's Democratic Republic, Malaysia, Myanmar, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, and VietNam. AIPA aims to encourage understanding, cooperation, and close relations among Member Parliaments as well as Observer Member Parliaments and other parliamentary organizations. AIPA also plays instrumental role in familiarizing the peoples of Southeast Asia with policies aimed at accelerating the realization of an ASEAN Community in 2015.

Name: Laisvės partija
Description: „Laisvės partija“ – politinė organizacija, vienijanti progresyviai mąstančius ir laisvę vertinančius ateities kūrėjus.

Name: Liberal Demokrat Parti, Türkiye
Description:
Liberal Demokrat Parti Türk siyasetinde aşağıdaki temel unsurların tümünü politikalarında ilke edinmiş yegane siyasi partidir.

1- Bireyin yaratıcı, üretici ve girişimcilik gücünü merkez alan politikalar üretmek.
2- Asli görevleri dışında, icraat yapmayan ancak denetleyen ve pek çok alanda denetleten bir devlet yapısı oluşturmak.
3- Adil rekabet ortamında, tamamen serbest bir piyasa ekonomisini gerçekleştirmek.
4- Evrensel temel hak ve özgürlüklerin ekonomik gelişmenin ön şartı olduğu bilinciyle, halkımızın doğuştan sahip olduğu tüm bu hak ve özgürlükleri kullanmasını sağlamak.
5- Tam bağımsız ve tarafsız yargı ile adaleti kısa zamanda ve caydırıcı bir şekilde sağlayan hukuk devletini oluşturmak.

Name: Labour Business
Description:
Labour Business is the prime membership network, campaigning and policy forum for business professionals and owners wishing to connect with fellow progressives. 

We believe that businesses and government should work together to promote enduring prosperity for all stakeholders. We also welcome the business professionals of the future including recent graduates and aspiring entrepreneurs. 

As the Labour Party’s only business affiliate we support them through campaigning, business engagement and policy development. 

Please visit our website to find out more including how to join us.

Name: Danske Studerendes Fællesråd / National Union of Students in Danmark
Description:
Danske Studerendes Fællesråd (DSF) er landsorganisation for studerende i Danmark. Gennem 20 medlemsorganisationer repræsenterer DSF ca. 165.000 studerende over hele landet. Med den baggrund og i tæt kontakt med en lang række samarbejdspartnere arbejder DSF dagligt for, at studerende i Danmark får de bedste uddannelser og levevilkår. Sådan har det været siden 1932. 

DSF er ikke underlagt nogen form for partipolitiske interesser.

DSF's 15 medlemsorganisationer er uafhængige studenterråd og studenterorganisationer, primært ved længere videregående uddannelsesinsitutioner. Til dagligt arbejder medlemsorganisationerne på deres uddannelsesinstitution for, at de studerendes interesser bliver varetaget på lokalplan, men to gange om året samles alle medlemsorganisationer til DSF's politikkonference, hvor det er medlemsorganisationernes opgave at lægge DSF's politiske linje samt at vælge DSF's politiske ledelse.

Name: ABC Greater Michigan Chapter
Description:
Associated Builders and Contractors values economic freedom within a free-market economy, with open and fair competition and diverse participants constantly striving to achieve the highest levels of personal and company performance.

We value the highest levels of personal and corporate standards of behavior characterized by responsibility, accountability and integrity, with demonstrated personal and industry professionalism by all participants.

The Core Purpose of Associated Builders and Contractors is to advance and defend the principles of the merit shop philosophy within the construction industry and to provide members and their employees with an opportunity to succeed.

Associated Builders and Contractors (ABC) is a national association representing nearly 25,000 merit shop construction and construction-related firms in 69 chapters across the United States. ABC’s membership represents all specialties within the U.S. construction industry and is comprised primarily of firms that perform work in the industrial and commercial sectors of the industry.

Associated Builders and Contractors is recognized as one of the leading organizations representing America’s business community and the U.S. construction industry.

Name: Danmarks Rejsebureau Forening
Description:
Danmarks Rejsebureau Forening (Association of Danish Travel Agents and Tour Operators) er brancheforening for danske rejsebureauer. Foreningen blev stiftet i 1938 og har siden sin stiftelse arbejdet for at skabe attraktive vilkår for rejsebureauerne i Danmark. 


Det er Danmarks Rejsebureau Forenings vision at være anerkendt som en ledende politisk repræsentant og rådgiver for danske rejsebureauer.

Det er Danmarks Rejsebureau Forenings mission at skabe attraktive vilkår for den samlede danske rejsebranche, herunder varetagelse af økonomiske og politiske interesser på et etisk funderet og bæredygtigt grundlag. Vores forhold til det enkelte medlem tager udgangspunkt i gensidig respekt, åbenhed, ærlighed og lydhørhed for medlemmets individuelle forhold, behov og ønsker.

Danmarks Rejsebureau Forening yder professionel rådgivning til medlemmerne og hjælper med at løse rejsebureauernes udfordringer. Vores rådgivningsydelser og politiske arbejde er med til at skabe & sikre professionalisme og udvikling i rejsebranchen.
Location: København K, Capital Region of Denmark

Name: Women Forward
Description:
Women for Kamala Harris (formerly Women for Biden-Harris, WFBH) is a nationwide community committed to informing, engaging, and mobilizing Democratic women to participate in our democracy. The volunteer organization was established early in the pandemic when it was clear that a primarily online approach to campaigning would be required. WFBH has emerged in 2024 as a powerful force with over 750,000 supporters across a range of social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, Threads, X, LinkedIn, and TikTok. 



Women for Kamala Harris is gearing up for the crucial 2024 Presidential race, with the all-volunteer team recruiting new members and organizing on-the-ground, particularly in presidential battleground states and key swing districts that will determine the party majorities in the U.S. Senate and House.

Name: College Republican National Committee
Description: Founded in 1892, the College Republican National Committee (CRNC) is one of the oldest, largest, and most active youth political organizations in the United States.

Name: Plaid Cymru
Description:
Mae Plaid Cymru eisiau llunio cenedl sy'n ffynnu o ganlyniad i'w heconomi cryf a chynnaliadwy ei hun gydag ysgolion gwych a gofal iechyd o'r radd flaenaf. Cymru a all roi gwell safon byw i bawb trwy waith caled, ymrwymiad i gydraddoldeb, chwarae teg ac ymdeimlad o uchelgais i deuluoedd, i gymuned ac i'r genedl. Cymru ar ei gorau.


Plaid Cymru wants to build a nation that thrives and prospers as a result of its own strong and sustainable economy with excellent schools and first-class healthcare. A Wales that can provide a better standard of living for all through hard work, a commitment to equality, fair play and a sense of ambition for family, for community and for the nation. Wales at its best.

Name: BDV Vending – Bundesverband der Deutschen Vending-Automatenwirtschaft e.V.
Description:
Über den BDV
Der Bundesverband der Deutschen Vending-Automatenwirtschaft e.V. (BDV) ist die führende Wirtschaftsvereinigung der Hersteller von Getränke- und Verpflegungsautomaten und der in diesem Bereich tätigen Automaten-Dienstleister („Operator“) und Lebensmittelhersteller.

Der BDV zählt rund 350 Mitglieder, ca. 200 davon sind selbständige Automaten-Dienstleister, meist regional tätige, mittelständische Unternehmen. Insgesamt machen die dem BDV angehörenden Automaten-Dienstleister etwa 2/3 des gesamten Marktes aus.

Der BDV veranstaltet gemeinsam mit der Kölnmesse als führende Fachmesse in Europa die "euvend & coffeena". 
www.euvend-coffeena.de

Das vollständige Impressum finden Sie hier:
http://www.bdv-vending.de/footer/impressum/

Name: Südosteuropa-Gesellschaft e.V.
Description:
Die Südosteuropa-Gesellschaft e.V. (SOG) unterstützt als Mittlerorganisation den politischen, wissenschaftlichen und soziokulturellen Austausch sowie die Auseinandersetzung mit Südosteuropa. Institutionell gefördert durch das Auswärtige Amt gehören wir seit unserer Gründung 1952 zu den wichtigen Trägern der deutschen Auswärtigen Kulturpolitik. Als SOG sehen wir es als unsere Aufgabe an, durch unsere Tätigkeit Brücken zu bauen.

Die Gesellschaft widmet sich der Förderung der wissenschaftlichen, politischen, wirtschaftlichen und kulturellen Beziehungen zu den südosteuropäischen Ländern und unterstützt die Vertiefung der Kenntnis über historische und gegenwärtige Entwicklungen in dieser Region.
Wir bieten durch unsere Veranstaltungen, Publikationen und das im Kreis unserer Mitglieder vereinte Expertenwissen ein Forum für den unabhängigen und überparteilichen Dialog zwischen der Bundesrepublik Deutschland und den südosteuropäischen Ländern sowie für die politikberatende und politikbegleitende Diskussion.

Name: ShivSena
Description: ShivSena is an Indian far-right regional political party. Its ideology is based on pro-Marathi ideology and Hindu nationalism (Hindutva), founded on 19 June 1966 by political cartoonist Shri Balasaheb Thackeray. The party originally emerged from a movement in Mumbai demanding preferential treatment for Maharashtrians over migrants to the city. It is currently headed by Shri Uddhav Saheb Thackeray. Members of ShivSena are referred to as ShivSainiks.

Name: Religious Action Center of Reform Judaism
Description:
For 50 years, the Religious Action Center of Reform Judaism ("the RAC") has been the hub of Jewish social justice and legislative activity in Washington, D.C. As the DC office of the Union for Reform Judaism, the RAC educates and mobilizes the Reform Jewish community on legislative and social concerns, advocating on more than 70 different issues, including economic justice, civil rights, religious liberty, Israel and more. As a 501c3 non-profit organization, the RAC's advocacy work is completely non-partisan and pursues public policies that reflect the Jewish values of social justice that form the core of our mandate.

Read more: http://rac.org/aboutrac/#ixzz2SdxKIaCR
Follow us: @therac on Twitter | therac on Facebook

Name: Labour Growth Group
Description:
The Labour Growth Group is a group of Labour MPs committed to tearing down the barriers to growth. We believe that many of the barriers to unleashing a new era of growth in the United Kingdom are political and we exist to confront those barriers.

We give a platform to bold and practical ideas to promote economic growth. We engage with fresh thinking, discuss big questions, and push practical reforms that can unlock potential and put money in the pockets of working people across the UK.

Name: NRWalley e.V.
Description:
NRWalley ist die Stimme der Startups in Nordrhein-Westfalen. Wir bringen alle Akteure des Startup-Ökosystems in NRW zusammen an einen Tisch, vernetzen sie und machen NRW zum neuen Startup-Hotspot! Außerdem vertreten wir Interessen der GründerInnen und Startups gegenüber Gesetzgebung und Verwaltung, der Wissenschaft und Forschung, sowie der Öffentlichkeit. 

NRWalley ist von echten GründerInnen für GründerInnen. It’s a force in American politics as it ensures a healthy roster of prepared and tested state leaders are ready to lead in their legislatures and/or run for higher office.

Name: Senate Black Legislative Staff Caucus (SBLSC)
Description:
The Senate Black Legislative Staff Caucus (SBLSC) is a professional and social network for Black legislative staff employed by the United States Senate. Established in 1977 as a non-partisan, official Senate staff organization that strives to build a sense of community and support among Black Hill staffers.

Membership is open to all who are interested regardless of race, creed, ethnicity, sex, religion, sexual orientation or national origin.

Name: Volt Amsterdam
Description: We are the local chapter of the pan-European party Volt. @VoltNetherlands is participating in the November 2023 parliamentary elections! We as a local chapter are campaigning, organizing events and discussing politics in a fun, fast-growing team. For more information: stemvolt.nl

Name: Wirtschaftsrat der CDU e.V. Nordrhein-Westfalen
Description:
Der Wirtschaftsrat ist ein parteiunabhängiger Wirtschaftsverband mit rund 12.000 Mitgliedern, der die Interessen der unternehmerischen Wirtschaft gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung und Öffentlichkeit auf regional-kommunaler, nationaler und europäischer Ebene vertritt. Durch seine deutlichen Positionierungen sowie die starke Präsenz von Top-Entscheidungsträgern aus Politik und Wirtschaft in seinen Gremien und bei Leuchtturmveranstaltungen ist der Wirtschaftsrat als wichtiger wirtschaftspolitischer Impulsgeber seit 1963 etabliert. 

Die 27 Sektionen des Wirtschaftsrates Nordrhein-Westfalen sind ein regionales Forum und bieten seinen über 2.000 Mitgliedern eine Plattform für das Mitwirken an standortpolitischen Themen. In jährlich landesweit über 200 Veranstaltungen ermöglichen wir unseren Mitgliedern die Gelegenheit zu einem direkten Gedankenaustausch mit den politischen Entscheidungsträgern. Die verschiedenen Formate verschaffen Informationsvorsprung und generieren wertvolle Kontakte. Im aktiven Dialog mit der Politik weisen die Mitglieder auf Entwicklungen hin und bringen Sichtweisen der Wirtschaft ein. 

Zudem verfügt der Landesverband Nordrhein-Westfalen aktuell über sieben Landesfachkommissionen, in denen die Mitglieder ihr Fachwissen einbringen können. 

Je weiter Wirtschaft und Politik sich inhaltlich entfernen, umso größer wird die Bedeutung des Wirtschaftsrates, der auf beiden Seiten wirkt, und zwar als Stimme des Mittelstandes und als Anwalt für eine klare Ordnungspolitik. 

Werden auch Sie ein Teil des Wirtschaftsrates und lassen Sie uns gemeinsam die unternehmerischen Interessen gegenüber den Entscheidungsträgern der Politik vertreten.

Name: Alternativet

Name: The Youth Vote UK
Description:
The Youth Vote UK is an organisation dedicated to increasing voter turnout amongst young people. Historically, those who have just become old enough to vote are among the least likely to vote in the UK.
Young people are the future of British politics, and the future of Britain, by virtue of their youth. It is important that their individual opinions (whatever they may be) are listened to and respected. What better way to begin this process than by getting them to the polls?
Through news analysis, in-person and online campaigns, and our campus ambassador program, The Youth Vote UK is helping young people vote, one tick at a time.

Name: Espoir RIC
Description:
Notre mouvement apartisan a un seul et unique objectif :

 Instaurer le référendum d'initiative citoyenne constituant en France 

Il s'agit de donner ainsi un nouveau droit politique à tous et à toutes : le droit de modifier la Constitution.

Avec cet outil, n'importe quel citoyen français peut soumettre une proposition de modification de la Constitution. Un référendum sera alors déclenché si cette proposition recueille suffisamment de signatures. La modification sera adoptée si une majorité de Françaises et Français vote oui. 

 La démocratie directe sera alors instaurée en France.

 La démocratie représentative perdure même avec le RIC Constituant. Simplement, ce dernier est un outil qui permet aux citoyen-nes d'initier et de voter des lois sans jamais qu'un élu puisse mettre son véto.

Le peuple souverain pourra faire évoluer les mécanismes de représentation dans un second temps, une fois le RIC Constituant établi.

L'objectif d'Espoir RIC 2022 a également été de faire du RIC Constituant une thématique centrale de la campagne présidentielle en 2022 ; et de celles qui suivront jusqu'à l'atteinte de cet objectif ! Nous souhaitons mettre en garde les citoyens contre les programmes non démocratiques et contre les engagements peu crédibles.

 Nous négocions avec les autres candidats l’insertion du RIC Constituant dans leur propre programme et leur profession de foi. 

Le RIC Constituant n'apporte pas seulement plus de droits politiques aux citoyens et citoyennes. Dans les pays qui en dispose, on observe, toutes choses égales par ailleurs :
 un meilleur PIB, un meilleur pouvoir d'achat
 des politiques plus respectueuses de l'environnement et des êtres humains et non humains qui le peuplent
 plus d'égalité entre les territoires ruraux et citadins
 des politiques extérieures plus stables, moins violentes
 des gouvernements plus respectueux de nos libertés individuelles

Rejoignez Espoir RIC et notre parti politique Solution Démocratique !

Wer bei uns mitmacht, engagiert sich im Beruf und will darüber hinaus auch etwas bewegen.

Mit unserem wirtschaftspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Engagement übernehmen wir Verantwortung für die Zukunft und geben der jungen Wirtschaft eine Stimme. Wir fördern den Austausch und die Entwicklung junger Unternehmer und Führungskräfte.

Name: Energie Club Schweiz
Description:
Energie Club Schweiz: Gemeinsam für eine sichere Energiezukunft!

Der Energie Club Schweiz (ECS) steht für eine Energiepolitik, die die Schweiz stark macht – sicher, unabhängig, wirtschaftlich und umweltfreundlich. Unser Ziel ist eine Stromversorgung, die jederzeit gewährleistet ist, auch ohne Importe. Wir schützen die Wirtschaft, die Umwelt und die Lebensqualität für kommende Generationen.

Unsere Anliegen:

Sicherheit: Strom jederzeit für alle – Blackouts verhindern!
Unabhängigkeit: Eigenständige Energieversorgung für eine souveräne Schweiz.
Wirtschaftlichkeit: Bezahlbare und zuverlässige Energie für eine starke Volkswirtschaft.
Umweltfreundlichkeit: Nachhaltige Lösungen im Einklang mit Natur und Klima.
Unsere Initiative: "Jederzeit Strom für alle (Blackout stoppen)"
Die Schweiz droht in eine Strommangellage zu geraten. Ohne Strom steht das Land still. Gemeinsam sorgen wir für eine sichere, unabhängige und klimafreundliche Energiezukunft.

 Jetzt informieren und mitmachen: blackout-stoppen.ch

Werden Sie Mitglied und bewegen Sie etwas!
Gemeinsam sind wir stärker: Unterstützen Sie uns dabei, die Energiezukunft der Schweiz aktiv zu gestalten. Als Mitglied im ECS profitieren Sie von exklusiven Informationen, Netzwerkmöglichkeiten und der Chance, Teil einer Bewegung zu sein, die für Versorgungssicherheit, Nachhaltigkeit und Wirtschaftskraft steht.

 Mitglied werden: energieclub.ch/de/mitglied-werden

Name: Revolution Field Strategies
Description: Revolution Field Strategies is a full-service strategic planning, organizing, and grassroots mobilization firm that leads successful campaigns and programs throughout the country. From dynamic canvassing programs and multi-modal voter registration efforts to scaled relational organizing, we help campaigns win by building smart, efficient programs that allocate resources to where they’ll be most effective.

Name: Freiheitliche Wirtschaft Wien - FPÖ pro Mittelstand
Description:
Unsere Kernmission: 
In einer Zeit wirtschaftlicher Herausforderungen ist unser Ziel klar definiert: Wir streben danach, den Wirtschaftsstandort Wien nicht nur zu stärken, sondern aktiv eine erfolgreiche und nachhaltige Zukunft für unsere Stadt mitzugestalten.

Unsere Strategie: 
Durch das kritische Hinterfragen von Gesetzen, Verordnungen und bestehenden Strukturen setzen wir uns für Innovation und positive Veränderungen ein. Unser Fokus liegt auf der Verteidigung unternehmerischer Freiheiten und der Förderung eines gesunden Unternehmertums.

Unser Versprechen:
Als verlässlicher Partner und engagierter Fürsprecher verteidigen wir die Interessen aller Wiener Unternehmer – von dynamischen Start-ups und engagierten Gewerbetreibenden bis hin zu traditionsreichen Familienbetrieben.

Name: Stadspartij Nijmegen
Description:
Als grootste, oudste en meest ervaren 100% lokale partij voelen we ons tot in elke vezel verbonden met dit mooie Nijmegen. Wij zijn zelf Nijmegenaren en willen net als jij kunnen rekenen op een sterke, vrije en sociale toekomst voor onze stad. Trots op wat ons als stad uniek en sterk maakt, beschermend voor de vrijheid van iedere inwoner, en zuinig op het sociale en zorgzame hart van Nijmegen. Samen maken we het leven in onze stad nog mooier.

Stadspartij Nijmegen gelooft in een Nijmegen waar mensen elkaar zien, helpen en waarderen. Waar je trots kunt zijn op jezelf, op elkaar en op de stad die we samen bouwen. We koesteren ons rijke verleden én laten groei samengaan met warmte, karakter en verbondenheid.

Voor ons betekent vrijheid: ruimte om jezelf te zijn, met respect voor de ander. Intolerantie, eenzaamheid en armoede horen hier niet thuis — in Nijmegen staat niemand er alleen voor. We geloven in de kracht van onze inwoners, van jong tot oud. Zorg begint in de wijk, in omzien naar elkaar en in een gemeente die dichtbij en bereikbaar is. We staan voor een veilige en rechtvaardige stad: daadkrachtig waar het moet, menselijk waar het kan.

Zo bouwen we aan een trotse, vrije en sociale stad die werkt voor iedereen.
Stadspartij Nijmegen wil daaraan bijdragen op onze eigen, herkenbare manier: nuchter, no-nonsense en altijd op zoek naar oplossingen die écht werken. We geloven niet in verbieden om het verbieden. Liever maken we dingen mogelijk, helpen we mensen op weg en geven we ruimte. Alleen als het moet, pakken we stevig door — omdat dat dan goed is voor de stad. We kiezen voor werken vanuit vertrouwen en samen verantwoordelijkheid nemen. Want wij staan voor onze stad!

Name: Ja zum Klimaschutz-Gesetz
Description:
Am 18. Juni 2023 geht es darum zu schützen, was uns wichtig ist. Wir übernehmen Verantwortung für die kommenden Generationen. Genau das tut die Schweiz mit dem Klimaschutz-Gesetz, dem Gegenvorschlag zur Gletscher-Initiative.

Hitzesommer, Extremwinter, Ernteausfall – das bringt die Klimakrise. Der Klimawandel ist eine Tatsache. Wenn wir nichts tun, werden Schäden und Kosten zunehmen.
Das Klimaschutz-Gesetz weist den Weg zu Netto-Null und bringt effektiven Klimaschutz. Mit Investitionen in innovative Technologien, Heizungsersatz und Gebäudesanierungen fördert das Klimaschutz-Gesetz die Wertschöpfung im Inland und neue Chancen für den Export. Davon profitieren das Klima und das Gewerbe.
Wer unsere Lebensgrundlage schützen und Verantwortung für die Zukunft übernehmen will, sagt JA zum Klimaschutzgesetz.

Nachdem unsere Stadt nach 5 Jahren Rot-Rot-Grün an den

die Dinge ändern.

Berlin ist ein internationaler Schmelztiegel an Potenzial, das
ausgeschöpft werden muss. Finden wir für unsere Probleme
wieder Lösungen, statt einfach mit ihnen zu leben. Nutzen wir
dafür die Innovationskraft, die in uns steckt. Folgen wir dem
Fortschritt, statt den Gedanken der Vergangenheit.

Eine gute Politik zeichnet sich nicht dadurch aus, dass sie
möglichst vielen Menschen möglichst viel wegnimmt. Eine gute
Politik zeichnet sich dadurch aus, dass sie für alle Menschen in
unserer Stadt die Chance eröffnet, Ideen zu entwickeln,

ernten.

Berlins in eine Stadt, die sie Willkommen heißt.

Holen wir uns die Zukunft.

Name: DI Roskilde/Køge Bugt
Description:
DI ROSKILDE/KØGE BUGT er en regionalforening for medlemmer af DI i kommunerne; Greve, Solrød, Køge, Roskilde og Lejre. 

DI Roskilde/Køge Bugt har ca. 850  medlemsvirksomheder fordelt i hele området og inden for mange forskellige brancher – bl.a. fremstilling, service, transport, digitalisering, handel og rådgivning.

Vi arbejder for at forbedre virksomhedernes rammevilkår lokalt, så de får de bedst mulige forudsætninger for at drive deres forretning. Et stærkt lokalt afsæt til den globale konkurrence er afgørende for, at virksomheder i og omkring Roskilde og Køge kan fortsætte med at skabe vækst og arbejdspladser i vores område.

Vi sætter virksomhedernes udfordringer på dagsordenen gennem alliancer med
de vigtigste lokale aktører – bl.a. kommuner, erhvervsskoler, lokale erhvervsråd og
regionale medier.

Vi afholder et årligt erhvervstræf med deltagere fra både virksomheder, kommuner
(bl.a. borgmestre) og MF’ere valgt i området. Vi hylder desuden virkelyst med vores årlige initiativpris til en lokal virksomhed. Vi hædrer også dygtige lærlinge og virksomheder, der gør en særlig indsats som praktiksted.

Vi byder diskussioner og kommentarer på denne side velkomne, og vi regner med, at du vil holde en god tone, når du kommenterer eller deler indhold fra siden. 

RETNINGSLINJER FOR DENNE SIDE
DI forbeholder sig retten til at fjerne indlæg, som ikke overholder gængse regler, og som ikke er relateret til de områder, DI beskæftiger sig med. Det betyder, at indlæg og debatter skal holdes i en respektfuld tone, og at spam og kommercielt indhold uanset emne fjernes.

Kontakt chefkonsulent Jes Lerche Ratzer på jelr@di.dk for spørgsmål vedr. regionalforeningen DI Roskilde/Køge Bugt.

Name: Partido Morado
Description: Aspiramos a que los peruanos construyamos juntos la República del Siglo XXI, donde el éxito dependa de los esfuerzos y no de los privilegios, donde podamos desarrollar nuestros talentos y donde realizaremos libremente nuestros proyectos de vida, que finalmente conduzcan a la felicidad de todos los ciudadanos.

Name: Equality Arizona
Description:
Equality Arizona is a non-profit organization made up of a 501(c)(3), the Equality Arizona Foundation; a 501(c)(4), Equality Arizona; and the Equality Arizona Political Action Committee. We use a variety of strategies to build the political and cultural power of LGBTQ Arizona.

We have successfully advocated for:

    * Then-Governor Janet Napolitano’s Executive Order protecting state employees from workplace discrimination

    * Recognition of domestic partnerships in the City of Phoenix

    * A comprehensive civil rights ordinance in Scottsdale protecting city employees from discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity

    * Healthcare and family benefits for domestic partners of state employees and their children through an administrative rule change (a legislative repeal of these benefits has been ruled unconstitutional by a federal district court and a final decision is pending)

    * Workplace non-discrimination protections based on gender identity for Phoenix city workers

    * The expansion of Arizona State University’s nondiscrimination policy to include protections based on gender identity or expression, the first Arizona state agency and fourth public university nationwide to do so.

* The repeal of the "No Promo, Homo" law.
    
* The repeal of archaic laws criminalizing same-gender relationships

Name: Keri: Caring for Activists
Description:
We are an activist collective supporting the mental health and wellbeing of kapwa Filipino social justice defenders. We provide social justice and indigenous/critical psychology-informed mental health and psychosocial support to activists at risk, while practicing trauma-informed care and LGBTQ+ affirmative counseling. We also provide psychosocial security consultancies and collective care workshops to movements and rights organizations.

We were formalized last July 3, 2020 to resist and stand against the Republic Act 11479 or Anti-Terror Law, which has been abused to suppress dissent and freedom of assembly, creating truly terrorizing and marginalizing environments. There is no ginhawa or wellbeing in environments with political repression, oppression, and corruption. 

We stand with anger and shout #ActivistsNotTerrorists and #JunkAntiTerrorLaw. We also call to #SurfaceAllDesaparecidos, surface all activists that have been Disappeared (o winala) by the Duterte and Marcos Administrations; and to free all political detainees who are red-tagged or criminalized because they chose to defend the wellbeing of their kapwa Pilipino. 

https://www.instagram.com/keriforactivists/

Name: Fossil Free Politics

We can no longer afford to let the fossil fuel industry undermine our democracy as we try and halt climate chaos, fix our energy system, and protect people and planet.

To tackle the climate emergency, and ensure that climate policy is conducted entirely in the public interest, we must cut fossil fuel interests out of politics, similar to existing restrictions on the tobacco industry. Before it's too late.

Formerly known as SCRB, Bearstar has worked on hundreds of political campaigns at all levels, including major candidates for President, Prime Minister, US House and Senate, Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, Mayor and numerous local and statewide initiatives.

The DA Abroad is the DA’s overseas network of volunteers who are making a difference and contributing to the success of our country through projects and campaigns that are aligned with the DA’s vision of One Nation with One Future underpinned by Freedom, Fairness and Opportunity for All.

Vækst i Generationer er et netværk med 14 af Danmarks familieejede virksomheder og mere end 185 associerede medlemmer, der primært består af små- og mellemstore familieforetagender. De familieejede virksomheder har i generationer skabt vækst, innovation og arbejdspladser i Danmark.

Name: Shrinking the Conflict Initiative
Description:
Israel is in a Catch-22: Society is divided regarding the solution to the Israeli-Palestinian conflict. The Israeli public is concerned with the security implications of implementing a Two-State Solution as well as the threat to Israel’s Jewish and democratic character resulting from a One-State Solution.

We refer to this as Israel’s “Catch-67”.

Formulating a strategy to cope with this challenge is critical in order to ensure Israel’s future as a Jewish, democratic, and secure state, especially in light of the emerging possibility of the Palestinian Authority’s collapse.

Shrinking the Conflict is a strategic framework in which the Palestinians will possess all of the authorities to govern the Palestinian population in the West Bank/Judea and Samaria, but without the capabilities to threaten Israel. This approach, that promotes a self-sustaining Palestinian autonomous government that doesn’t harm Israel, will reduce the concerns held by the majority of Israeli society.

Shrinking the Conflict was established in light of the challenges that Israel’s political catch-67 surrounding the conflict creates for Israel’s future as the homeland for the Jewish people and as a democratic and secure state. 

Our organization strives to create recognition of and support for the Shrinking the Conflict approach throughout Israeli society. The more widespread public support there is for the concept of shrinking the conflict, the greater the incentive will be for Israeli decision-makers to promote policy steps in line with this strategy.

In order to fulfill our mission, we organize parlor meetings and lectures all over Israel, create content via social media outlets and hold training seminars for Israeli influencers and opinion leaders.

Name: Europa-Union Brüssel
Description:
Die Europa-Union Deutschland (EUD) ist die größte Bürgerinitiative für Europa in Deutschland. Unabhängig von Parteizugehörigkeit, Alter und Beruf engagieren wir uns für die europäische Einigung. Wir sind aktiv auf lokaler, regionaler, nationaler und europäischer Ebene. Rund 17.000 Mitglieder sind in 16 Landesverbänden mit rund 300 Kreis-, Orts- und Stadtverbänden vernetzt und haben Partnerorganisationen in über 30 Ländern Europas. Die Europa-Union ist der deutsche Zweig der Union Europäischer Föderalisten (UEF) und gemeinsam mit ihrem Jugendverband Junge Europäische Föderalisten (JEF) Mitglied im Netzwerk Europäische Bewegung Deutschland (EBD).

Ziel des Brüsseler Verbandes ist, durch die überparteiliche Arbeit die Akteure auf beruflicher wie aber auch auf persönlicher Ebene in Brüssel zu vernetzen. Wir möchten eine Ergänzung zu den bestehenden Netzwerken der Institutionen, der Fachzirkel, der Parteien anbieten, um zu zusätzlichen Denkanstöße über die tägliche und manchmal enge eigene Tätigkeit hinaus anzuregen. 

Sind Sie neugierig geworden? Wir würden uns freuen, Sie auf einer unserer Veranstaltungen begrüssen zu dürfen. Gerne können Sie auch mit uns Kontakt aufnehmen, falls Sie weitere Fragen haben.

Name: FS Economy & Politics
Description: FS Economy & Politics is an initiative that wants to encourage FS Students to think outside of the box by debating about current political and macroeconomic issues. Our initiative thus provides a platform for FS Students to broaden their horizons. Our events range from small get-togethers with our members to big speeches with known politicians and economists. We encourage all students of Frankfurt School to join our events as they are an opportunity for a vivid exchange of political views as well as economic issues.

Name: Junge Grünliberale Schweiz (jglp)
Description: Wir Jungen Grünliberalen setzen uns konsequent für eine gesellschafts- und wirtschaftsliberale Politik ein. Gleichzeitig sind die wirtschaftliche und soziale Nachhaltigkeit sowie ein starkes Umweltbewusstsein Voraussetzungen für alle unsere Handlungen. Junge Grünliberale das heisst auch offen zu sein für neue Ideen und Ansätze, innovativ zu sein und alteingesessene Strukturen aufzubrechen sowie neue Ansätze zu lancieren. Wir reden heute mit für morgen und gestalten unsere Zukunft selber – werde auch Du Teil dieses Projekts!

Name: The National Coalition Party of Canada
Description: (English) In 2015 Political Action Committees (PAC) organizations were introduced to Ontario and Alberta and were expected to play a major role in Canadian political elections at the provincial and federal level. PACs are new to Canadian federal politics and are technically federal non-profit corporations registered with Industry Canada. The Canada Elections Act allows PACs to spend up to $150,000 on third-party advertising during an election but spending outside the election period was unlimited. | (Français) En 2015, des organisations de Comités d'Action Politique (CAP) ont été introduites en Ontario et en Alberta et devaient jouer un rôle majeur dans les élections politiques canadiennes aux niveaux provincial et fédéral. Les CAP sont nouveaux dans la politique fédérale canadienne et sont techniquement des sociétés fédérales sans but lucratif enregistrées auprès d'Industrie Canada. La Loi électorale du Canada permet aux CAP de dépenser jusqu'à $150,000 en publicité de tiers pendant une élection, mais les dépenses en dehors de la période électorale étaient illimitées.

Name: San Mateo County Association of Realtors (SAMCAR)
Description:
The San Mateo County Association of REALTORS (SAMCAR) is a trade association organized to ensure professionalism, protect property rights, and promote the ownership of real property. We seek to serve and be responsive to our members by continuously developing, implementing and promoting programs and services to help the individual REALTOR be successful. Our programs and services are designed to:  Enhance performance in a continually changing real estate environment; Support professionalism through training in and enforcement of the Code of Ethics of the National Association of REALTORS;  Assist in standing united in promoting and preserving real property rights through collective action;  Provide the means for members to be a constructive force in the improvement of life within the community.

Learn more at www.samcar.org/about

In a living wage for honest, hard work.

In the importance of collective bargaining and organization and labor unions.

In preserving fundamental constitutional rights, including the right to privacy, the right to worship as we see fit, and the separation of Church and State.

In alleviating the blight of poverty.

In fairness in our tax system.

In security for our homes, neighborhoods, ports, and nation.

In honest, uncorrupt government, where every vote counts and every vote is counted.

Name: National Assembly of Kuwait مجلس الأمة
Description:
The National Assembly is the legislative authority of the state of Kuwait that has a mandate of legislation and oversight on the executive authority;s work and implementation of laws. The Assembly is composed of fifty members elected directly by universal suffrage and secret ballot in accordance with the provisions prescribed by the electoral law
Laws are issued only upon the approval of the Assembly and the ratification of H.H. the Amir. The third chapter of the constitution of Kuwait, issued in 1962 has described the articles and competencies of the legislative authorities in three main areas

1. Legislative Affairs : include bills, decrees and treaties
2. Political Affairs : include decisions, proposals, questions , interpolations, request for debate , inquiries and receiving petitions and complaints from citizens
3. Financial Affairs: include the discussions, debates and ratification of public budgets and their annual final accounts as well as the approval of the assembly's budget.

Name: Behindertenkonferenz Kanton Zürich BKZ

Das Ziel der BKZ ist die Gleichstellung aller Menschen mit Behinderung. Die BKZ hat eine Bauberatung für hindernisfreies bauen. Für Menschen mit Behinderung ist eine hindernisfreie Zugänglichkeit und Nutzbarkeit von öffentlichen Bauten, Wohnbauten und Bauten mit Arbeitsplätzen sowie des öffentlichen Verkehrsraums und des öffentlichen Verkehrs eine der Grundvoraussetzungen für ein selbstbestimmtes Leben.

Name: Conservative European Forum
Description:
Founded over 50 years ago, the Conservative European Forum (CEF) is committed to strengthening political, economic, social, environmental, and security cooperation between the UK and continental Europe. Closer strategic cooperation, to tackle shared challenges, will make all parties safer, more prosperous and more influential on the world stage.

CEF believes that we need to move away from theoretical discussions and focus on the practical challenges of the UK's place in the world, find ways to work with our continental European partners, and build on the UK-EU Trade and Cooperation Agreement (TCA).

We host regular speaking meetings and networking events to bring together UK and other European stakeholders, including the diplomatic community and UK and European parliamentarians.  Our speakers in the last year have included the former UK Ambassador to the EU Sir Ivan Rogers, prominent politicians from Germany’s CDU such as Norbert Röttgen and David McAllister, Secretary General of the European People’s Party (EPP) Antonio Lopez-Isturiz White, former UK Chancellor of the Exchequer Philip Hammond, and other figures from business and UK politics.

We are committed to helping rebuild trust, not only between the UK and our European allies, but also between the Conservative Party and its sister centre-right parties throughout Europe and the European People’s Party (EPP).
Led by our expert-led policy groups, the organisation develops positive and constructive proposals to enhance co-operation and strengthen strategic partnerships between the UK, other European countries, and EU institutions. CEF works to promote and mainstream these ideas within the Conservative Party and wider Conservative family.

Many Conservatives support a close, strategic partnership with other European countries and EU institutions. We provide a forum for those on the centre-right of British politics, throughout the UK, who support our values and goals.

Name: PEI Coalition for Women's Leadership
The National Association for Medical Direction of Respiratory Care (NAMDRC)
Description:
NAMDRC’s primary mission is to improve access to quality care for patients with respiratory disease by removing regulatory and legislative barriers to appropriate treatment.

NAMDRC members, all physicians, work in close to 2,000 hospitals nationwide, primarily in respiratory care departments and critical/intensive care units. They also have responsibilities for sleep labs, management of blood gas laboratories, pulmonary rehabilitation services, and other respiratory related services.

For more than a quarter of a century NAMDRC has emphasized quality patient care. The Association is dedicated to providing support for pulmonologists and other physicians who provide clinical and management leadership in respiratory, critical care and sleep medicine.

Specifically, NAMDRC focuses on issues of importance to the individual practitioner, as well as a range of pulmonary related care services including:

– Respiratory Care
– Respiratory Home Health Care
– Long Term Respiratory Care Services
– Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy (HBO)
– Pulmonary Medicine
– Pulmonary Rehabilitation
– Pulmonary Physiology Assessments
– Critical Care
– Ventilator Management
– Sleep Disorders

Name: GLOBE - The Global Legislators Organization
Description:
GLOBE - The Global Legislators Organisation - is an international network comprising national parliamentarians from over 50 countries committed to developing and overseeing the implementation of laws in pursuit of sustainable development.

GLOBE is a non-party political organisation that supports legislators through national chapters to develop and advance laws on climate change, natural capital accounting and forests.

GLOBE was established by a group of legislators from G8 countries in 1989 to recognize and strengthen the central role of legislators and parliaments in tackling the world's major environmental challenges, as well as to emphasize the role of legislators in holding governments to account for the implementation of international commitments.

GLOBE's mission is to create a critical mass of legislators that can agree and advance common legislative responses to the major global sustainable development challenges.

Name: Wuhan Human Resources Service Center
Description:
武汉市人才服务中心（以下简称“人才中心”）成立于1983年，是隶属于市人力资源和社会保障局的人力资源公共服务机构。1995年，经原国家人事部批准，由原国家人事部、湖北省人民政府和武汉市人民政府共同组建了华中地区唯一的国家级区域性人才市场——中国武汉人才市场，2004年增挂“武汉大学生就业市场”牌子，进一步突显服务高校毕业生就业的重要职责。

Wuhan Human Resources Service Center (hereinafter referred to as "Talent Center") was established in 1983, is affiliated to the municipal human resources and Social Security Bureau of human resources public service institutions. Approved by the State Ministry of personnel, by the former State Ministry of personnel, the Hubei Provincial People's government and the Wuhan Municipal People's Government jointly set up in Central China's only state-level regional talent market.

人才中心总部位于武汉市江岸区车站路1号，地处美丽的汉口江滩，在武汉三镇分设了12个分支机构，包括3个开发区分市场、3个高校分市场、6个企业化运作实体，形成“一点多链”的市场布局，更好地服务用人单位、服务产业园区、服务高校毕业生和各类人才。

Talent center headquarters is located in Wuhan City Jiang'an District Station Road No. 1, located in the beautiful Hankou, in the towns of Wuhan is divided into 12 branches, including 3, 3 colleges and universities to distinguish the market development, 6 enterprise operation entity, to form a "Multi Chain" layout of the market, better service the employer, the service industry park and services for college graduates and professionals.

人才中心主要职能包括：开展高校毕业生就业服务、承办高校毕业生就业手续及咨询、大学生就业见习基地建设、大学生创新创业咨询和帮扶、档案管理、职称评定、人才引进、高层次人才服务、流动党员教育管理，以及人才派遣、人事代理、人才培训等社会化服务。

为适应武汉建设国家创新型城市和构筑国际化人才高地的需求，营造“大众创业、万众创新”氛围，市人才中心在大学生就业创业和高层次人才服务方面，做了一系列相关工作。

始终坚持开展公益性人才服务活动。连续多年举办“武汉知名企业高校行”、“武汉高层次人才创新创业交流会”、“全国高校毕业生就业服务月大型招聘会”、“楚天英才”高洽会等品牌交流活动，为优秀企业和毕业生、各类人才实现供需对接搭建通畅渠道。

不断引进国际化高端人才。组织武汉知名企业赴清华大学、香港城市大学等国内外著名高等学府引进优秀毕业生，为武汉的经济腾飞和社会发展架起了一座桥梁。

积极帮扶武汉地区高校大学生实现就业和创业。搭建“武汉地区高校就业联盟”、“武汉大学生就业见习基地”、“武汉大学生创业俱乐部”等服务平台，并先后举办“武汉地区就业联盟高校校长论坛”、“武汉大学生创业高层论坛”等一系列高端论坛，积极探索促进就业创业服务的先进理念。

目前，人才中心已成功承办两届武汉高层次人才创新创业交流会，为我市知名企事业单位与海内外高层次人才合作发展搭建了平台，初具品牌效应。通过30余年的建设和发展，人才中心已发展成为华中地区一流的人力资源服务机构，在全国人才市场体系中具有重要的影响力和辐射力。

Name: Neo India Party
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of the Neo India Party!

At Neo India Party, we are dedicated to transforming India into a nation free from corruption, crime, rising inflation, and poverty. Our mission is to create a prosperous and equitable society where every citizen has the opportunity to thrive.

We believe in the power of collective action and innovation to drive positive change. Our initiatives focus on:

Ending Corruption: Implementing transparent and accountable governance to restore trust in our institutions.
Fighting Crime: Enhancing public safety through effective law enforcement and community engagement.
Controlling Inflation: Advocating for sustainable economic policies that ensure price stability and affordability for all.
Eradicating Poverty: Promoting inclusive growth and providing opportunities for education, employment, and entrepreneurship.
Join us in our journey to build a New India. Together, we can create a brighter future for our nation.

Follow us for updates on our initiatives, events, and how you can get involved in shaping the future of India.

Name: Partido Liberal Colombiano
Description:
Principal Fuerza Política de Colombia

El concepto liberal nació en la Asamblea francesa el 4 de agosto de 1789 con la publicación de los “derechos del hombre y el ciudadano”. Pero fue en el Diccionario Crítico Burlesco publicado por Bartolomé José Gallardo en 1812, donde se definieron las ideas Liberales como aquellas que propenden por el amor y la posesión de la libertad, además de extender su benéfica influencia a toda la sociedad. Y, políticamente, fue en las Cortes de Cádiz de 1810 a 1813, donde el término Liberal se utilizó para denominar a quienes abogaban por la libertad y a sus contrarios los denominaron serviles o godos.

Name: The Wisco Project
Description:
The great state of Wisconsin will once again be the tipping point state in 2024, making it feel like we are quite literally the center of the universe in 2024. Our next president will ride on just how many Wisconsinites decide to stay home or show up at the polls. Wisconsinites will determine the future of healthcare, abortion rights, voting access, the Senate majority, and so much more. A lot of pressure, right? 

Luckily, Wisconsin has a super power: it’s young voters. Over 300,000 college students call Wisconsin home – when students vote, we win. 

Building on work started during the April 2023 Supreme Court Election, we’re building a scrappy and innovative organization that will organize our way to victory by inspiring thousands of college students to vote in the crucial 2024 elections.

Description:
Rødt mener at en annen verden er mulig — uten utbytting, undertrykking og nød. Vi vil arbeide for en sosialistisk forandring i Norge og i hele verden. Vi vil et samfunn hvor den økonomiske makta er i hendene på arbeidsfolk. Vi vil et demokratisk og sosialistisk samfunn som styres etter mål om økologisk balanse, individuell frihet, kvinnefrigjøring, sosial rettferdighet og avskaffing av fattigdom. Vi vil en verden som er bygd på menneskerettigheter, felleskapsløsninger, frihet, og internasjonalt samarbeid. Vi vil en verden der undertrykte mennesker gjør opprør mot overgrep og utbytting, og at menneskene blir i stand til å skape en framtid der de selv tar makta — gjør revolusjon. Vi vil bidra til å skape grunnlaget for at menneskene kan utvikle et samfunn uten undertrykte og undertrykkere: Et klasseløst samfunn, der du yter etter evne og får etter behov..

Vi trenger et feministisk arbeiderparti som er i kommunestyrer, fylkesting og på Stortinget. Vi trenger et parti som samtidig er en aktiv kraft der det viktigste skjer: på grunnplanet i fagbevegelsen, kvinnebevegelsen, bonde- og fiskarlag, miljøbevegelsen, det antirasistiske arbeidet, antikrigsarbeidet og Nei til EU.

Rødt er et parti med store mål. Vi har medlemmer med allsidig og lang erfaring fra folkevalgte organ, fra fagbevegelsen, fra kvinnebevegelsen, fra miljøkampen og internasjonalt solidaritetsarbeid. Vi har ungdommer, feminister, antirasister, innvandrere og kulturaktivister.

Vi ønsker å være et parti preget av åpenhet og gjensidig respekt, hvor uenighet verdsettes og politikk utvikles i et arbeidsfellesskap.

Bli med i arbeidet for å gjøre en ny og bedre verden mulig!

Name: Forza Italia
Description:
Il Movimento Politico Forza Italia è una associazione ispirata e creata da Silvio Berlusconi che ne è il Presidente Fondatore ed è sulla base dei suoi insegnamenti, delle sue intuizioni politiche e della sua guida che essa si è sviluppata, ha operato e continuerà a perseguire le proprie finalità, mantenendo un ruolo centrale nella vita
politica italiana, europea ed internazionale.

Il Movimento Politico Forza Italia è una associazione di cittadini che si riconoscono negli ideali propri delle
tradizioni democratiche liberali, cattolico liberali, laiche e riformiste europee. Essi ispirano la loro azione politica ai valori universali di libertà, giustizia e solidarietà concretamente operando a difesa del primato della persona in ogni sua espressione, per lo sviluppo di una moderna economia di mercato e per una corretta applicazione del principio di sussidiarietà.

Name: Wirtschaftsrat der CDU e.V. Bremen
Description:
Der Wirtschaftsrat der CDU e.V. ist ein bundesweit organisierter unternehmerischer Berufsverband mit derzeit über 12.000 Mitgliedern, der 1963 gegründet wurde. Wir bieten unseren Mitgliedern eine Plattform zur Mitgestaltung der Wirtschafts- und Gesellschaftspolitik im Sinne der Sozialen Marktwirtschaft Ludwig Erhards. Der Wirtschaftsrat vertritt Interessen der unternehmerischen Wirtschaft gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung und Öffentlichkeit. Wir finanzieren uns ausschließlich durch die Beiträge unserer Mitglieder.

-	Jährlich bis zu 60 Veranstaltungen
-	6 Landesfachkommissionen u.a. zu den Themen Familienunternehmen und Mittelstand, Energie und Umwelt, Luft- und Raumfahrt, Maritime Wirtschaft, Digitale Wirtschaft und Immobilien und Stadtentwicklung
-	Junge Unternehmen und Führungskräfte vernetzen sich im Jungen Wirtschaftsrat

Die inhaltliche Arbeit des Wirtschaftsrats findet hauptsächlich in Bundes- und Landesfachkommissionen statt, in denen Experten aus der Mitgliedschaft sowie Mandatsträger, Vertreter der Verwaltung und Wissenschaftler eng zusammenarbeiten und gemeinsame Positionen erarbeiten. Das Netzwerk des Wirtschaftsrats schafft Synergien zwischen Unternehmen und ermöglicht gleichzeitig einen direkten Dialog zwischen Politik und Wirtschaft. Dabei kommt besonders der vielfältige Branchenmix des Wirtschaftsrats - vom Start-Up über den Mittelständler bis hin zum DAX-Konzern - zum Tragen.

Zielgruppe sind aber auch Politiker im Europäischen Parlament und Vertreter der EU-Kommission, die Bundesregierung, Politiker des Deutschen Bundestages, die Landesregierungen bzw. -parlamente sowie auf kommunaler Ebene, mit denen Mitglieder und Vertreter des Wirtschaftsrates stets einen engen Austausch pflegen.

Name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
Description: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. www.wisgop.org

Name: Mission Control
Description:
Twenty-three years of breaking through the junk with creative mail that fits into smart communications strategies. Mission Control is the most successful direct mail firm working in Democratic politics today. Specialized in creative persuasion direct mail for Democratic campaigns, candidates, party committees, labor unions, and progressive advocacy organizations.

In 2021, team MC helped Democrats regain control of the Senate working with the Ossoff campaign in Georgia. 

In 2018, we helped flip 19 House districts: Ten working directly with candidates (eight of whom were women) and nine with independent expenditures.

In 2016, we did mail for eight of the nine congressional seats that Democrats flipped.

In the past decade, we have helped elect dozens of governors, senators, and mayors, and over a hundred state legislators, from Hawaii to Maine.

We help our clients win because we emphasize strategy, targeting, creativity, and messaging.

Name: FDP.Die Liberalen Frauen Schweiz
Description:
FDP Frauen Schweiz - politische Partei und Dachorganisation für rund 40 kantonale und regionale Frauengruppen der Partei FDP.Die Liberalen. 

"Speerspitze liberaler Gesellschaftspolitik"

Name: Rede Reforma
Description: A Rede Jurídica pela Reforma da Política de Drogas é uma organização de direitos humanos que reúne advogadas e advogados em defesa das vítimas da política de proibição das drogas.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Centre for the Union
Description: A think tank concentrating on preserving all aspects of our United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

Name: Deutscher Sportwettenverband
Description: Deutscher Sportwettenverband is the German association of sports betting providers. Based in Berlin, we serve as the first point of contact for policy questions in relation to (online) sports betting and represent the interests of our members.

Name: Gewerkschaft Nahrung-Genuss-Gaststätten (NGG)
Description:
Die Gewerkschaft Nahrung-Genuss-Gaststätten (NGG) vertritt rund 200.000 Mitglieder aus der Lebensmittelwirtschaft, der Tabakindustrie und dem Gastgewerbe. #NurGemeinsamGehts

Vom Weltkonzern Coca-Cola, McDonald’s oder Nestlé zur Bäckerei an der Ecke. Von der durchdigitalisierten Lebensmittelherstellung zur kleinen Craftbeer-Brauerei. Von Gastronomie und Hotellerie bis Nahrungsmittelindustrie: Das Aufgabengebiet der NGG ist so vielfältig wie bei keiner anderen Gewerkschaft. Hier trifft Industrie 4.0 auf traditionsreiche Handwerkskunst und die anspruchsvolle Arbeit im Dienstleistungssektor.

Die älteste Gewerkschaft Deutschlands ist gut für die Zukunft aufgestellt: Rund 350 Beschäftigte arbeiten deutschlandweit in 50 Büros Hand in Hand mit rund 200.000 Mitgliedern daran, die Arbeits- und Lebensbedingungen zu verbessern. Dabei hat unsere NGG in ihrer langen Tradition ihren Kampf für bessere Arbeits- und Lebensbedingungen immer auch mit gesellschaftlichen Werten verbunden.

Netiquette: Bitte beachtet beim Kommentieren die Kommentarrichtlinien für eine respektvolle Online-Kommunikation: https://www.ngg.net/alle-meldungen/meldungen-2022/netiquette/

Impressum: https://www.ngg.net/impressum/

Name: Europæisk Ungdom
Description:
Europæisk Ungdom er en tværpolitisk ungdomsorganisation, som arbejder for at øge forståelsen og interessen for Den Europæiske Union blandt unge i Danmark.

Organisationen er drevet af unge, og organisationens aktiviteter bliver for størstedelens vedkommende til på basis af en ulønnet indsats fra medlemmernes side. Aktiviteterne er alt fra kurser og debatarrangementer over studieture til en aktiv læserbrevsproduktion.

Politisk spænder medlemmerne vidt på den politiske venstre-højre skala, ligesom vi repræsenterer alt fra skeptiske EU-tilhængere til føderalister. Fælles er dog, at vi alle tror på, at det europæiske samarbejde er nødvendigt for at kunne løse mange af nutidens globale problemer.

Name: Institut pro politiku a společnost
Description:
The mission of the Institute is to cultivate the Czech political and public sphere through professional and open discussion. We aim to create a living platform which defines problems, analyzes them, and offers recipes for their solution in the form of cooperation with experts, politicians, international conferences, seminars, public discussions, and political and social analysis available to the whole of Czech society. We believe that open discussion with experts and the recognition of the causes of problems is a necessary presumption for any successful solution to the political and social problems facing society today.

The primary focuses of the Institute are social change, foreign and security policy, defense, European issues, sustainable development, and adaptation to climate change. We also address education, digitization, urbanism, advances and changes in the energy industry, life in a city and in a public environment and, of course, matters of values in politics and human rights in both our country and abroad.

Name: YMCA Queensland Youth Parliament
Description:
The YMCA Queensland Youth Parliament (QYP) is a unique opportunity for young people to create real change in Queensland. QYP participants, known as Youth Members, are the voice of youth in their electorates, advising politicians and decision-makers across the state. They're immersed in unique educational opportunities, experience parliamentary operation first hand, mingle with members of Government and Opposition, and have their say in fiery debates on topical issues.

Beyond bridging the gap between legislators and youth in Queensland, QYP also provides an outstanding opportunity for personal development, be that in leadership skills, public speaking ability or the lifelong friendships forged throughout the transformative experience.

27 years and counting #yourvoiceheard

Name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
Description: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. www.wisgop.org

Name: Senator Malcolm Roberts
Description:
Malcolm’s passion for freedom, responsibility and service are his guiding principles for his work as a Senator for Queensland.  He was first elected as a Senator with One Nation in 2016 and returned to the Senate again in 2019.

The early years of Malcolm’s life was spent in India before moving to Central Queensland with his family as his father worked in the coal mines, then later to the Hunter Valley and finally settling in Brisbane.  Malcolm and his wife Christine have two adult children.

After graduation he worked for three years as an underground coalface miner.

Malcolm has extensive experience and success from within the corporate sector and as a business owner.   His background in engineering and mining started before graduating with an engineering degree (honours) from University of Queensland. After graduation he worked for three years as an underground coalface miner.  Malcolm rose through management ranks to lead and bring about significant profitability and production improvements at underground coal mines and coal processing plants.He led the operational development of Australia’s largest and most complex underground coal project that successfully set many industry firsts.

A keen interest in business leadership and economics led Malcolm to a Master’s degree in business administration from the University of Chicago’s Graduate School of Business. He led the operational development of Australia’s largest and most complex underground coal project that successfully set many industry firsts.  He then established an executive consultancy specialising in leadership and management services for Australian and international clients.

Malcolm brings to the Senate a thorough, practical and analytical approach to examining issues and is deeply committed to listening and thoroughly researching the facts.  He is enthusiastic to work with Queenslanders to understand people’s concerns, connect with people’s needs and work to bring about helpful solutions.

Name: Norsk Landbrukssamvirke/The Federation of Norwegian Agricultural Co-operatives
Description:
Norsk Landbrukssamvirke er en interesseorganisasjon for 16 bondeeide samvirkebedrifter i landbruket. Medlemmene sysselsetter om lag 16000 personer og har en samlet omsetning på 75 milliarder kroner. Hovedaktiviteten er knyttet til matproduksjon basert på norske råvarer kjent gjennom merkevarer som TINE, Gilde, Prior og Hoff. Medlemmene har også en betydelig forretningsvirksomhet innen skogbruk, fôr, avl, rådgiving, bank, forsikring og innkjøp.

Norsk Landbrukssamvirke kjerneområder:

 - Næringspolitiske rammebetingelser 
- Utvikle landbrukssamvirkets fortrinn og konkurransekraft
- Kompetansetilbud for eiertillitvalgte
- Forskning og innovasjon

Name: PARTIJvdSPORT
Description: PARTIJvdSPORT is de enige landelijke politieke partij die het belang van sport, bewegen en gezonde leefstijl voor alle Nederlanders en een gezonde samenleving als uitgangspunt neemt.

Name: Armenian National Committee of Canada
Description: The ANCC is the largest and the most influential Armenian-Canadian grassroots human rights organization. Working in coordination with a network of offices, chapters, and supporters throughout Canada and affiliated organizations around the world, the ANCC actively advances the concerns of the Armenian-Canadian community on a broad range of issues and works to eliminate abuses of human rights throughout Canada and the world.

Name: Partido CHEGA
Description: Por Portugal e pelos Portugueses!

Name: Canvass America
Description: We deliver high quality canvassing that recruits locally, focuses on personal voter contact, and delivers results.

Name: Libertarian Party of Texas
Description:
America's Third Largest Party

The Libertarian Party is America's third largest and fastest growing political party. Libertarians engage in a variety of projects, working for everyone's liberty on every issue.

The Libertarian Party was created in December of 1971 by people who realized that the politicians had strayed from America's original libertarian foundation, with disastrous results. Their vision was the same as that of America's founders -- a world where individuals are free to follow their own dreams in their own ways, a world of peace, harmony, opportunity, and abundance.

Libertarians are practical; we know we can't make the world perfect. But, it can be better. Libertarians will keep working to create a better, freer society for everyone. As William Allen White said: "Liberty is the only thing you cannot have unless you are willing to give it to others."

Name: SYMALIM - Syndicat mixte de l'île de Miribel Jonage
Description:
Le SYMALIM est le Syndicat Mixte pour l’aménagement et la gestion de l’île de Miribel Jonage. Propriétaire du Grand Parc depuis 1968, il contribue également depuis 2017 (dans le cadre d’une fusion) à l’aménagement du Canal de Jonage et à la gestion du cours d’eau de la Rize. 

Le SYMALIM se compose de 16 collectivités dont le Conseil Départemental de l’Ain, la Métropole de Lyon, la Communauté de Communes Miribel et Plateau et les communes de Beynost, Décines-Charpieu, Jonage, Jons, Lyon, Meyzieu, Miribel, Neyron, Niévroz, Saint-Maurice de Beynost, Thil, Vaulx-en-Velin, et Villeurbanne.

Le Symalim fixe les grandes orientations, définit la stratégie du Grand Parc et sa mise en œuvre autour de ses 4 missions socles :
•	Préserver la ressource en eau potable
• 	Maintenir le champ d’expansion des crues du Rhône
• 	Préserver et valoriser le patrimoine naturel
• 	Accueillir tous les publics

Name: Australian Christian Lobby
Description: Authorised by M. Pearse, Australian Christian Lobby, Canberra

Name: New York State Young Republicans
Description:
Established in 1932, the Association of New York State Young Republican Clubs is one of the oldest political institutions in the nation.  We are the young professional wing of the New York Republican State Committee and a chartered member of the Young Republican National Federation.

The New York State Young Republicans serve as a resource for Young Republicans from Buffalo to Montauk to express their political opinions, learn about politics and civics, receive campaign training, network with like-minded people from across the state, and become more involved in their community.

We are a diverse coalition of volunteers, professional operatives, public servants, elected officials, young professionals, and business owners.  Our mission is to support the principles and objectives of the New York Republican State Committee and Young Republican National Federation.

Are you 18-40 years old and want to make an impact?  Get involved today!

Name: DIE FAMILIENUNTERNEHMER und DIE JUNGEN UNTERNEHMER - Niedersachsen
Description: Wir Familienunternehmer sind nicht nur ein wesentlicher Teil der Wirtschaft, wir Familienunternehmer prägen unsere Gesellschaft. Als Rückgrat der deutschen Volkswirtschaft setzen wir uns für Sie ein, in dem wir von der Politik optimale Rahmenbedingungen zum Wirtschaften fordern. Denn unsere Stimme hat Gewicht! Aber nur wenn wir gemeinsam auftreten - im Bund und in ihrer Region! Wir sind aktiv und vernetzen uns. Machen Sie mit! Es ist Zeit, dass sich was ändert.

Name: BVMW Taunus
Description:
BVMW im Hochtaunuskreis.
Der Bundesverband mittelständische Wirtschaft bringt Mittelständler sowie Geschäftsführer der Region zusammen - auch im Hochtaunuskreis!

Der Verband regt zum Gespräch und zum Austausch an durch gute Veranstaltungen sowie interessante Redner. Insbesondere haben BVMW-Mitglieder die Möglichkeit sich vorzustellen und einem interessierten Publikum zu präsentieren. Weitere Informationen gibt es bei Hans-Peter Neeb unter hans-peter.neeb@bvmw.de oder +49 151 700 66 769.

 

hochtaunus.bvmw.de

 

 

Unser Beitrag
Wir

1) führen Veranstaltungen durch, 

2) präsentieren neue, relevante Themen, 

3) vernetzen Geschäftsführer/ MIttelständler und 

4) stellen BVMW Mitglieder der Region vor. 

 

 

www.bvmw.de/der-bvmw/aufgaben-und-ziele.html

Name: Evropski parlament Slovenija
Description:
The European Parliament Liaison Office in Slovenia / Pisarna Evropskega parlamenta v Sloveniji is the European Parliament’s contact point for citizens in Slovenia. Our mission is to engage with the local population and increase awareness about what the European Parliament is, what it does and what it stands for. 

European Parliament is the only directly elected EU body, this represents the EU’s 500 million inhabitants and plays a key role in electing the President of the European Commission. 

www.europarl.si
www.europarl.eu

Name: American Youth Association
Description:
The American Youth Association (AYA) is dedicated to effecting real change in the lives of young Americans. We work closely with policymakers at state and national levels to influence legislation that directly impacts students. At AYA, we firmly believe in more than just conversation. We are committed to putting students in positions where they can enact meaningful change. 

Want to get involved? Email us at info@aya-us.com

Follow our social platforms to stay up to date on policy work, job openings, and more!

Instagram: @americanyouthassociation
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/americanyouthassociation

Name: NextGen Pharma, LLC
Description:
NextGen Pharma (NextGen) nace de la visión de sus socios fundadores de crear una nueva industria farmacéutica puertorriqueña, que haga uso de la amplia experiencia y conocimiento de nuestros trabajadores en el marco regulatorio de cumplimiento de calidad de dicha industria, y lo aplique en la investigación, desarrollo y manufactura de productos derivados del cannabis de alta calidad. Surge como respuesta al llamado que hace el Reglamento Núm. 8766 del Departamento de Salud a proveer opciones innovadoras que mejoren la calidad de vida y garanticen el bienestar de decenas de miles de pacientes puertorriqueños.

NextGen Pharma aspira a ser el líder local en el cultivo de cannabis medicinal y en la extracción, producción y distribución de productos derivados de cannabis de grado farmacéutico.

Name: Politsnack
Description:
Für Politikgestalter, Medienmacher und Gesellschaftsinfluencer! Willkommen auf der Seite des Politsnacks! Fokussiert auf die Themenschwerpunkte Kommunikation, Digitale Strategien, Kampagnenmanagement und Mobilisierung erhalten Sie hier in regelmäßigen Abständen Hinweise zu unseren Seminaren, Workshops und Konferenzen. Jede Woche erhalten Sie hier von unseren Expertinnen und Experten Best-Practice-Beispiele und praktische Tipps, die zeigen, wie Kommunikation gelingt.
