Name: Democracy for America
Description:
Democracy for America is a member-driven, people-powered progressive PAC with a one-million strong community taking on income inequality, money in politics, and structural racism. 

Since the organization's founding in 2004, DFA members have contributed over $63 million and made more than 25 million calls to elect over 1,000 progressive candidates up-and-down the ballot, all across the country.

Name: Barcelona en Comú
Description: Fent una Barcelona més justa, feminista, innovadora i democràtica.

Name: Parti Radical
Description:
Fidèle, depuis 1901, aux valeurs de la République, à sa devise et à la tradition du Parti républicain radical et radical-socialiste, le Parti Radical propose une vision spécifique de l’organisation de la société fondée sur la primauté de l’individu, l’autonomie de chacun, le solidarisme, la laïcité, l’égalité et la parité entre les femmes et les hommes, l’écologie et le développement durable, la présence de la France dans l’Union européenne et la coopération entre les peuples.

La réunification de la famille radicale se fonde sur un socle commun de principes et de valeurs, dans la perspective de construire une République moderne répondant aux changements de notre société.

La déclaration politique du 9 décembre 2017 rappelle les principes fondateurs du grand parti humaniste français que les radicaux veulent constituer et fixe quelques-unes des lignes directrices de l’action politique qu’ils veulent engager. Toutes sont dictées par l’idéal d’épanouissement individuel, par l’autonomie et la responsabilité, dans le cadre d’une société solidaire, qui singularise la pensée radicale.

Name: Danske Fodterapeuter
Description:
Danske Fodterapeuter har knap 2000 medlemmer, som alle er statsautoriserede fodterapeuter. Vi arbejder for at forbedre fodsundheden i den danske befolkning.

Over 95 procent af medlemmerne er selvstændigt erhvervsdrivende, resten er ansatte eller konsulenter på sygehuse og hospitaler.

Danske Fodterapeuter forhandler overenskomst med Danske Regioner og er medlem af den internationale paraplyorganisation FIP. Endvidere er Danske Fodterapeuter medlem af FH og Sundhedskartellet, der forhandler overenskomst for offentlig ansatte fodterapeuter.

Danske Fodterapeuter blev grundlagt i 1932.

Name: Aargauischer Gewerbeverband
Description:
Unser Leitmotiv

 Wir sind unabhängig, kompetent und innovativ.

 Wir setzen uns für die Stärkung des selbstständigen Unternehmertums in Handwerk, Handel, Dienstleistungen und Industrie ein.

 Wir sind ein Dienstleistungsunternehmen, das die Interessen der angeschlossenen Gewerbevereine und Berufsverbände und deren Mitglieder vertritt, Sekretariate von Berufsverbänden, anderen Organisationen und Abstimmungskomitees führt sowie die Aus- und Weiterbildung der Mitglieder gezielt fördert.

 Wir streben einen möglichst hohen Organisationsgrad an.

Mehr über den AGV unter www.agv.ch

Name: Alliance Party of Northern Ireland
Description:
Alliance works to build a society free of segregation, sectarianism and prejudice where everyone -- Catholic or Protestant, black or white, local or immigrant, rich or poor, young or old -- can live their live the way they want, free from fear.

Alliance works to build a society where we don't need to run cap in hand to Westminster to keep our public services working; one where we empower business to generate enough wealth to fund the services we all benefit from.

Alliance works to create a sustainable society -- where our beautiful environment is cherished, where we don't spend money we don't have and where the rights of individual are not smothered by the demands of the state and big institutions.

Name: Democratic Action Party (Malaysia)
Description:
The Democratic Action Party or DAP is a political party in Malaysia’s ruling coalition Pakatan Harapan. It has become part of a new government elected into power on 9 May 2018.

This is the first time Malaysia had a new government since the Independence of Malaya in 1957 and the formation of Malaysia in 1963. This new era is dubbed by the media and political observers as the New Malaysia.

DAP's RocketThe DAP was formed on 18 March 1966. Using its symbol of the ROCKET, the DAP had contested in 12 general elections from 1969 to 2018.

The party is committed to the struggle for a free, fair and democratic Malaysia, based on the principles of freedom, equal opportunity and equality, social and economic justice, human rights, and founded on the institution of parliamentary democracy.

Our original ideology was democratic socialism that promotes the idea of Malaysian Malaysia – unity in diversity in a multitracial and multicultural nation. In 2006, the party amended its constitution to adopt social democracy as its ideology, reflecting a more embracing of diverse democratic and progressive viewpoints.

As social democrats, we desire a social order whereby there can be free development of the human personality within the community; just distribution of the fruits of our labour; equality and social justice as the norms; and value and dignity placed on human work.

The basic idea of equality – including equal opportunity – is the precondition of free development of personality. It does not mean uniformity or an equality of outcome, rather it is against exploitation and the unfair advantages of those controlling economic and political power.

Social democracy is all about freedom, equality, justice, human rights and solidarity. It upholds the right to work and concern for the well-being of people of all classes, the right to a humane and clean environment, the right to comprehensive education and training of one’s choice, as well as the right to participate in administration

Name: British Institute of Global Affairs
Description:
The British Institute of Global Affairs (BIGA) is an independent initiative dedicated to revitalising the United Kingdom’s sense of purpose in a changing world.

We promote thoughtful discussion on how Britain’s domestic, economic, and cultural life connects to its role abroad, recognising that foreign policy begins at home.

BIGA is the place for new conversations on Britain and its place in the world. Think to the future. Think BIGA.

Name: Volt Utrecht
Description:
Volt Utrecht is de lokale afdeling van de pan-Europese partij Volt. Progressief, pragmatisch en positief. Volt staat voor een nieuwe generatie in de politiek. Deze generatie wil politiek waar nationalisme en populisme tot het verleden behoren, en waar grensoverschrijdende samenwerking de toekomst heeft. Volt brengt optimisme in de politiek met een radicaal positief geluid. Het is tijd om dat geluid ook op lokaal niveau te laten horen.

Volt Utrecht maakt zich hard voor een betrokken Utrecht. een duurzaam Utrecht, een sociaal Utrecht, een innovatief Utrecht en een bewoonbaar Utrecht.

Name: CALPIRG (California Public Interest Research Group)
Description:
CALPIRG is an advocate for the public interest. We speak out for a healthier, safer world in which we’re freer to pursue our own individual well-being and the common good.

All Californians want a healthier, safer, more secure future. CALPIRG works to find common ground around common sense solutions that will help make that future a reality. The problems we work on aren’t progressive or conservative. They’re just problems that our country shouldn’t tolerate, like getting lead out of drinking water or protecting consumers from unfair practices in the marketplace.

Name: APME
Description: A Associação das Pequenas e Médias Empresas (APME) presta um conjunto alargado de serviços que vão desde o apoio ao empreendedorismo, apoio à expansão e modernização de empresas, consultoria, apoio à internacionalização, apoio ao endividamento e recuperação de empresas, formação profissional, entre muitos outros.

Name: Justin Bibb for Mayor
Description:
Justin Bibb is a proud Cleveland native who grew up in Mt. Pleasant on the southeast side of the city. He has dedicated his career to rebuilding neighborhoods and making cities safer, healthier and more resilient. A leader in urban policy, Justin currently serves as the Chief Strategy Officer of Urbanova, a start-up focused on solving the unique challenges faced by midsized cities.

Over the last 15 years, Justin has worked at the intersection of government, business and the nonprofit sector as an executive and nonprofit leader. He interned for President Barack Obama when he was in the U.S. Senate and has served as Special Assistant for Cuyahoga County, Head of the Global Cities Practice at Gallup and most recently, Vice President for KeyBank.

Justin has long advocated for change and reform in education, transit and criminal justice as a nonprofit leader. He co-founded Hack Cleveland in 2014 following the death of Tamir Rice and launched Cleveland Can’t Wait in 2019, a nonprofit focused on advancing racial equity and economic opportunity in underserved neighborhoods across the city. Justin is deeply committed to Cleveland, serving on the boards of the Greater Cleveland Regional Transit Authority, Teach for America – Ohio, Destination Cleveland, and LAND Studio Inc.

Justin Bibb is running for Mayor of Cleveland because he believes Cleveland can’t wait for change. He is a bold, dynamic, and visionary leader who will bring a new sense of urgency and fresh ideas to the challenges we face. As mayor, Justin will champion a new generation of leadership to solve Cleveland’s oldest problems and prioritize solutions to modernize city government, make our neighborhoods safer, communities healthier and economy stronger.

Name: DI Midt Vest
Description: Vækst og udvikling i Herning, Holstebro, Ikast-Brande, Lemvig, Ringkøbing-Skjern, Skive og Struer Kommune

Name: All Party Parliamentary Group on the Environment
Description:
Strengthening Parliament’s role in developing environmental policy:

The oldest established all party group in parliament for environmental issues, the Environment APPG was established to strengthen the influence of parliamentarians on public policy and provide a forum for debate as well as access to specialist information.

Our activities span across three broad themes: climate and energy, waste and resources, and natural environment.

The Chair of the group is Fleur Anderson MP, and the secretariat is provided by Green Alliance. Its membership is made up of parliamentarians, businesses and organisations.

This is not an official or feed of Parliament. It has not been approved by either House. APPGs are informal groups of Parliamentarians with a common interest in particular issues. The views expressed are those of the group.

You can contact the secretariat on appg@green-alliance.org.uk

Name: Party Party of Rhode Island
Description: The Party Party of Rhode Island is a grass roots movement focused on state and local government reform.

Name: Global Labour Institute
Description:
GLI Manchester is a non-profit organisation promoting international trade union solidarity and organisation through education, research and project management. 

We have specialist internationalist experience in political education, organisation and trade union policy with informal economy workers, gender equality, climate crisis and just transition and the design and management of international workers education programmes. 

GLI works closely with global union federations, national unions and labour NGOs throughout the world.

GLI is guided by the values and principles of democratic socialism.

Name: Starostové a nezávislí
Description:
Starostové a nezávislí (STAN) je české politické hnutí, své zástupce máme v Poslanecké sněmovně, Senátu a Evropském parlamentu. Stojí za námi zkušení starostové.

V čele hnutí stojí Vít Rakušan, prvním místopředsedou hnutí je Lukáš Vlček.

Name: CCPIT Sub-council of Chemical Industry (CCPIT CHEM)
Description:
Founded in 1990, CCPIT Sub-Council of Chemical Industry and CCOIC Chemical Industry Chamber of Commerce are branches of CCPIT (China Council for the Promotion of International Trade) and CCOIC (China Chamber of International Commerce), and acts in accordance with the articles and principles of CCPIT. CCPIT CHEM has been the certified member of The Global Association of the Exhibition industry (UFI) since 2012. Administratively, CCPIT Sub-Council of Chemical Industry (CCPIT CHEM) affiliates to China Petroleum and Chemical Industry Federation (CPCIF) as its Conference & Exhibition Department.

CCPIT CHEM is the national foreign trade and investment promotion organization in chemical industry, and functions as a bridge for the cooperation between China's chemical industry and foreign counterparts. Through conducting economic & trade activities, overseas visiting and exchanging delegations, organizing or participating in exhibitions and conferences home and abroad, CCPIT CHEM has endeavored to enhance industry dialogues and network, promote foreign trade and investment, and deepen the understanding and cooperation between China's chemical industry and foreign counterparts.

Since established, CCPIT CHEM has exerted her professional advantages and industry resources, served the industry and companies, launched and organized a series of influential exhibitions and conferences mainly in the field of petrochemical, agrochemical, adhesive and sealants, specialty chemical and etc., and built the international display & exchange platform. Meanwhile, CCPIT CHEM has assisted Chinese companies entering into international competition to tap foreign market, and promoted the foreign trade & investment by organizing overseas exhibiting, visiting & exchanging delegations and seminars.

Name: Association des Départements d'île-de-France (ADIF)
Description:
Les sept Départements d’Ile-de-France (Seine-et-Marne, Yvelines, Essonne, Hauts-de-Seine, Seine-Saint-Denis, Val-de-Marne, Val d’Oise) se sont regroupés au sein de l’Association des Départements d’Ile-de-France (ADIF) afin d’assurer le relai de leurs positions auprès des pouvoirs publics sur tout sujet relatif au développement de la région-capitale (aménagement, transport, logement, éducation, solidarités, emploi, environnement…).
 
Acteurs incontournables de la cohésion sociale et territoriale et de l’investissement public, les spécificités et les enjeux auxquels sont confrontés les Départements franciliens justifient qu’ils fassent l’objet d’une approche adaptée dans les réflexions qui orientent l’avenir de la métropole régionale.
 
Forte de la diversité des collectivités qui la composent et des 10 millions d’habitants qu’elle représente, appuyée sur une gouvernance pluraliste et fondée sur le consensus, l’ADIF intervient en tant qu’interlocuteur privilégié du Gouvernement pour porter une vision efficace et inclusive de l’agglomération parisienne.
 
L’ADIF est présidée par Pierre Bédier, Président des Yvelines ; Georges Siffredi, Président des Hauts-de-Seine, en assure la première vice-présidence.

Name: Aluminium Denmark
Description:
Aluminium Danmark is the association for all businesses that work with aluminium in their value chain in Denmark – right from primary production to recycling.

Our members include foundries, surface treatment companies, packaging manufacturers, window frame manufacturers and much more.

What we all share is an interest in aluminium as a vital material in the circular economy. With its many material properties like resilience and a very high degree of recyclability, aluminium trumps other materials. We aim to spread knowledge of this.

At Aluminium Danmark, we are a member of Dansk Industri (DI - the Confederation of Danish Industry), and we work closely with our European colleagues and associations like European Aluminium, Metal Packaging Europe, Metals for Buildings, and Glasindustrien (the Glass Industry Association).

Does your business work with aluminium? Then contact us to hear how we help with everything from consultation to political advocacy in Denmark and Europe.

Name: Women In Politics
Description: Women In Politics fosters a community of teens around the world dedicated to promoting equality in politics. We believe that every person, regardless of race, gender, and socioeconomic class, should have a voice.

Name: Vanguard Field Strategies
Description:
Vanguard offers your campaign a quickly assembled and effectively implemented ground game that cuts through the clutter of political noise and advertising to deliver your message to the voters face-to-face.
What we do at Vanguard is place conservative like-minded individuals who believe in the campaign and the candidate to deliver their message door-to-door directly to the voter.
We pride ourselves on blending old-fashioned one-on-one conversations with the data-driven techniques needed to maximize efficiency. We’ll work with your campaign to develop ideal program targets and frame each conversation appropriately.
However persuasive, no form of voter contact occurs in a vacuum. We get to know our campaigns so we can not only work effectively as a stand-alone operation, but also supplement messages voters are seeing on TV, online, and in their mailbox.
Politics is personal; so, the way you talk to voters should be, too. In an ever-changing campaign landscape, the most persuasive medium remains constant – that’s a face-to-face conversation with a supporter who believes in their message and delivers it enthusiastically and respectfully.

Name: Arbeiterkammer Salzburg
Description:
Unsere Aufgaben sind gesetzlich geregelt: „Die Kammern für Arbeiter und Angestellte und die Bundeskammer für Arbeiter und Angestellte sind berufen, die sozialen, wirtschaftlichen, beruflichen und kulturellen Interessen der Arbeitnehmer und Arbeitnehmerinnen zu vertreten und zu fördern.“

Konkret beraten wir unsere Mitglieder in vielen Belangen. Außerdem vertreten wir die ArbeitnehmerInnen gegenüber Politik und Wirtschaft, reden bei der Gesetzgebung mit und leisten Grundlagenforschung. 

Wir sind zuständig in Sachen...
Arbeitsrecht und Arbeitnehmerschutz
Lehrlings- und Jugendschutz
Sozialversicherungsfragen
Lohnverrechnungs- und Steuerfragen
Konsumentenschutz
Frauenpolitik
Bildung, Weiterbildung
Umweltschutz
Kultur
Grundlagenforschung (z.B. durch Studien)

Name: Young European Socialists
Description:
The Young European Socialists, formerly ECOSY (European Community Organisation of Socialist Youth) is the umbrella organisation for socialist and social democratic youth in Europe.

YES gathers Socialist, Social Democratic and Labour youth movements of the European Union, Central and Eastern Europe and of the Mediterranean countries. We were founded in November 1992 in The Hague, Netherlands.

Currently YES unites 63 youth organisations from 47 countries to advocate for socialist and social democratic values in the European institutions, as well as facilitate the exchange of ideas between our members.

Name: West-Brabant Waterbreed
Description:
West-Brabant Waterbreed is de partij binnen waterschap Brabantse Delta, die opkomt voor de waterbelangen van alle inwoners van West- en Midden-Brabant: agrarische en recreatieve bedrijven, industrie en inwoners van dorpen en steden.

West-Brabant Waterbreed richt zich op alle aspecten van het waterbeleid: de juiste hoeveelheid water van goede kwaliteit, waterzuivering en waterveiligheid. We letten daarbij scherp op de kosten. 

West-Brabant Waterbreed opereert lokaal en onafhankelijk en is niet gebonden aan politieke partijen, belangen- en beroepsorganisaties of ideologische bewegingen. 

West-Brabant Waterbreed verenigt mensen uit de praktijk met bestuurlijke ervaring, kennis en een brede visie op water, financiën, natuur en ruimtelijke ordening. West-Brabant Waterbreed stelt de kandidatenlijst samen op basis van ervaring, kennis en regionale spreiding over het werkgebied van waterschap Brabantse Delta en heeft korte lijnen met de inwoners van West- en Midden-Brabant.

Name: glp lab
Description:
Wir sind das offene Politlabor der Grünliberalen. Wir wecken den Erfindergeist in der Politik und schaffen einen kreativen Raum für innovative Lösungen. Wir haben eine liberale, progressive und optimistische Grundhaltung. Und sind offen für alle, die neue Wege in der Politik gehen wollen.

Das glp Lab ist eine Grassroots-Initiative, welche die Schweizer Milizpolitik neu interpretiert und fit macht für das 21. Jahrhundert. Die Mobilität hat besonders bei jungen Personen zugenommen, was die Teilnahme an der Lokalpolitik – dem gängigen Einstieg in die Politik – erschwert. Immer mehr Personen möchten sich zudem gerne thematisch und projektbezogen engagieren.

Bei Diskussionen nach den Wahlen 2015 entstand die Idee eines Politlabors, das ermöglicht, Politik losgelöst von den klassischen Parteistrukturen mitzugestalten. Inspirationen fanden wir in Wien beim NEOSLab, der Denkfabrik der österreichischen Partei NEOS, beim aussenpolitischen Think Tank Foraus und der politischen Bewegung Operation Libero.

Name: PRASEG
Description:
PRASEG, the All-Party Parliamentary Group for Renewable and Sustainable Energy, is the cross-party group for UK politicians, industry, academia, and the third sector, to discuss and promote sustainable energy issues in Parliament and the wider political community.

We hold regular events in Westminster to discuss the strategic national and international policy developments that shape the deployment of sustainable energy including renewables, energy efficiency, and combined heat and power. We have a wide ranging network of supporters, and dozens of Parliamentary members, who attend and contribute to our events.

The All-Party Parliamentary Group for Renewable and Sustainable Energy is supported by an independent, not-for-profit NGO, PRASEG ltd. The views expressed by this group are not those of Parliament or either House.

Name: Les jeunes Républicains
Description:
Nous appelons à s’unir à nous, tous les jeunes qui ont dans leur cœur l’amour d’un pays dont l’idéal Républicain a transformé le monde.

https://www.republicains.fr
https://twitter.com/jeunesreps
https://www.facebook.com/lesjeunesrepublicains/
https://www.instagram.com/lesjeunesrepublicains/

Name: Color Of Change PAC
Description: Color Of Change PAC helps people respond effectively to injustice in the world by ensuring that Black issues are addressed by candidates looking to win with our community’s votes. As a national Black Super PAC, we push candidates to create a more human and less hostile world for Black people.

Name: DI Vand / DI Danish Water Industries
Description:
DI Danish Water Industries represents the Danish water sector and promotes the sector´s substantial growth and export potentials.

We work for improving the business framework conditions for the water sector in Denmark and EU and for more investments in science and innovation in water technologies.

Name: Nazaha
Description:
المهمة:
مهمتنا هي تمثيل اللبنانيين في البرلمان من أجل تحقيق رؤيتنا وأن تكون لنا قيم ومبادئ نزيهة مجسدة في حكم بلدنا.

الرؤية:
نؤمن بأن لكل شخص الحق في أن يُسمع ويُمثل في مجتمع ديمقراطي ونحن ندرك أن كرامة كل فرد هي المبدأ الأساسي للمجتمع الديمقراطي. نحن نؤمن باستقلالية الفرد ومسؤوليته وحريته في مجتمع محترم.

نؤمن بأن الرؤية طويلة الأجل مهمة لمجتمع مستدام في الداخل والخارج ونعتقد أن المسائل الاجتماعية والاقتصادية والبيئية مترابطة وأن المجتمع يتعزز عندما نتخذ إجراءات بشأن هذه المسائل الثلاث.

من نحن:
 النزاهة هي رابطة من الأعضاء والمؤيدين الذين يتقاسمون رؤية لبنان مزدهر وعادل اجتماعيا وموحدا لجميع اللبنانيين.

نحن نعمل وفقا لقيمنا ومبادئنا ونؤمن أن الأخلاق والنزاهة ينبغي أن تحكم كل ما نقوم به حتى يتم النظر في أعلى معايير السلوك وينعكس ذلك عندما ننشغل بتمثيل مسؤول للبنانيين.

نحن نؤمن باتخاذ القرارات بناء على الحقائق والأدلة. نحن نعتمد على البحوث والخبرة المشروعة لاتخاذ قرارات عقلانية وواعية من أجل تزويد اللبنانيين بحكومة مسؤولة ومستجيبة تلبي احتياجات اللبنانين.

نحن متفائلون واقعيون نؤمن بالسلام والصلح العام للجميع. إننا نحتفل بالتنوع، ونحن ملتزمون بالسعي إلى تحقيق تكافؤ الفرص لجميع الأشخاص في الإمكانيات غير المحدودة للروح البشرية. ونعتقد أنه من المهم توفير معاملة عادلة ومنصفة للجميع.
حكومة حزب النزاهة اللبناني مكرسة لحماية حياة جميع اللبنانيين وتعزيزها وملتزمة بالحكم الديمقراطي وسيادة القانون. نحن ملتزمون بتوفير توازن جيد وعادل بين الاقتصاد والعدالة الاجتماعية. وانطلاقا من قيمنا، نعمل مع اللبنانيين لتوفير تكافؤ الفرص والأمن لجميع المواطنين.

نحن نحكم على أساس أن لدينا مسؤولية تجاه رفاه الأفراد والأسر والشركات والصناعات والبيئة. لذلك، لدينا دور في ضمان تنظيم الأسواق بشكل صحيح عادل وحر وفي الحفاظ على الهوية اللبنانية في مجتمع عالمي.

نحن نقدر التعليم والإبداع والابتكار لأنه يؤدي إلى سياسة عامة قائمة على الأدلة. نحن منفتحون وعمليون وداعمون للفضول الفكري.

Name: Arbeitskreis Staatsreform
Description: Der Arbeitskreis dient zum Austausch über Reformen im öffentlichen Sektor und diskutiert Denkanstöße für die Organisation einer freien, gerechten und solidarischen Gesellschaft. Der Arbeitskreis will Einblicke in innovative Modernisierungsprojekte geben und Akteure der Verwaltungsmodernisierung vernetzen.

Name: NWF Strategies
Description:
At New Way Forward (NWF) Strategies we believe that Democracy begins with accessibility. We founded the New Way Forward to deploy frontiering software and strategies, providing any aspiring change-maker the tools to operate cutting-edge, winning campaigns.

Today, with our team’s combined 50 years of experience, NWF Strategies powers groundbreaking uphill battles, high-profile races, and landmark movements.

Name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
Description:
Wesley Hunt is ready to defend our values from Nancy Pelosi and the Washington liberals. He has proven he will fight for our great country and our way of life in Texas’s 7th Congressional District.

Wesley Hunt was born and raised in Houston, TX in a military family and is a proud alumnus of St. John’s School.  Upon graduation from St. John’s, Wesley accepted an appointment to the United States Military Academy at West Point. In 2004, he received his commission in the U.S. Army and graduated with a Bachelor of Science degree in Leadership and Management with a Field of Study in Mechanical Engineering.  After West Point, Wesley spent eight years in the Army as an Aviation Branch Officer and AH-64D Apache Longbow helicopter pilot. Wesley’s service included one combat deployment to Iraq, and two deployments to Saudi Arabia where he served as a Diplomatic Liaison Officer. While in Saudi Arabia, Wesley served as a liaison officer representing the U.S. Government in missions involving the Royal Saudi Land Forces Aviation Corps.

Upon completion of his military service and honorable discharge as a Captain, Wesley attended Cornell University and earned a Master of Business Administration (M.B.A.), a Master of Public Administration (M.P.A.) and a Master of Industrial and Labor Relations (M.I.L.R.).

Wesley is a lifelong conservative and is an active member of the community who has dedicated his time in military service and volunteer work to protect our country and improve the Houston area.  Wesley is active in many organizations in the Houston area. He serves on the board of trustees for the Harris County Center for Mental Health and is a board member of the Greater Houston Pachyderm Club. Wesley is on the board of trustees at St. John’s School and has served as a mentor to youth in the community both at MacCormick Juvenile Detention Center and Big Brothers Big Sisters in Austin, TX.

Wesley moved back to Houston upon completion of his master’s programs and currently

Name: Die Mitte Frauen Schweiz
Description:
Die Mitte Frauen Schweiz schaffen Lösungen für die Gleichstellung von Frau und Mann. Wir sind die Mitte Frauen, welche 
 in der Wirtschaft genauso verankert sind wie in der Familie,
 für realpolitische und nicht für utopische Gleichberechtigung der Frauen einstehen,
 nicht bloss Ansprüche stellen, sondern Verantwortung übernehmen.

Name: NIDA
Description:
NIDA is nodig. Een boost aan superdivers DNA en een islamitische inspiratie die diep van binnen iedereen voelt. 

Als de fundamenten van onze samenleving maar stevig genoeg zijn, kunnen we als geen ander, met en op elkaar bouwen. We geloven dat deze fundamenten verloren gaan in een politiek die gevangen zit in kwartaalcijfers en krantenkoppen, in angst voor elkaar en voor vernieuwing. Dit met alle gevolgen van – en voor onze – dien. Het leidt onder meer tot oppervlakkigheid, vervreemding, hokjesdenken en culturele krampachtigheid.

We geloven in fundamenten gebaseerd op universele principes en richtlijnen die God, de Bron van ons leven, ons hiervoor biedt via de boodschap van profeten en vanuit onze natuurlijke aanleg en balans om ons heen. Het is aan het openbaar bestuur van onze stad om deze fundamenten te waarborgen, van waaruit we zelf kunnen bouwen aan de ontwikkeling van leven, geloof, welvaart, talent en familie in onze stad.

Het zijn verschillende principes en richtlijnen omtrent deze vijf pijlers die fungeren als maatschappelijk fundament. Een visie van waaruit we samen de ecologische, religieuze, economische, culturele en sociale uitdagingen waar stad en land voor staan, aan kunnen en zullen gaan. Samen bouwen we stap voor stap aan een samenleving die meer in harmonie is met de Bron van ons leven, in harmonie met onszelf en onze omgeving.

Name: The Pivot Group
Description: A woman-majority owned firm, Pivot is committed to electing Democrats up and down the ballot. We are an energetic team of experts specializing in voter communications through direct mail, advanced targeting, and provide strategic guidance to progressive causes, organizations, and campaigns across the country. And we’ve created a workplace that lets us live out our deepest values.

Name: JEF Madrid
Description:
Jóvenes Europeístas y Federalistas de Madrid (JEF Madrid) es una organización juvenil proeuropea, políticamente plural, transpartidista y no gubernamental creada en 2003. Nos financiamos, principalmente, con la cuota de nuestros socios. Actualmente contamos con más de 80 socios. Nuestro ámbito de actuación es la Comunidad de Madrid. Colaboramos con la Unión Europea y el Consejo de Europa.

Formamos parte de la organización JEF Europe (Young European Federalist), federación internacional con más de 30.000 miembros en más de 42 países cuya fundación fue 1972.

El objetivo de JEF es la creación de una federación europea democrática, como elemento crucial para la paz y para garantizar una sociedad más libre, justa y democrática. JEF fomenta y promueve la ciudadanía europea, trabaja para la ampliación y profundización de la Unión Europea y busca acercar Europa a los ciudadanos. Nuestras ideas se extienden a través de actividades internacionales e intercambios juveniles, publicaciones, acciones públicas y cooperación con otras organizaciones juveniles.

JEF actúa para lograr que el poder político sea consciente de la importancia de una Europa Unida donde los ciudadanos sean el centro. Su relevancia a nivel europeo nos ha permitido actuar en cuestiones tan relevantes como la elección directa de los europarlamentarios, la estructuración de la Iniciativa Ciudadana Europea, la rendición de cuentas de las instituciones o la defensa de los Derechos Humanos en el continente. JEF siempre ha estado, en definitiva, a la vanguardia de las reformas en Europa.

En JEF no dependemos de partidos políticos ni organizaciones privadas. Somos un grupo de jóvenes con entusiasmo en un proyecto común al que invitamos a unirse a todo el quiera participar, de una forma u otra, para crear una Europa más justa. En suma, somos jóvenes cosmopolitas y abiertos que ven en Europa el futuro de nuestra sociedad.

Name: Nikos Christodoulides
Description: Επίσημη σελίδα του 8ου Προέδρου της Δημοκρατίας Νίκου Χριστοδουλίδη.

Name: Region Toggenburg
Description: Hier finden Sie interessante Informationen über die Region Toggenburg als Wohn-, Arbeits- und Lebensort.

Name: Campaign Masters Solutions PVT LTD
Description:
Campaign Masters Solutions PVT LTD is a full-service political campaigning, public affairs, strategic communications and advertising firm that combines innovation, technology, and creativity to solve problems in an adversarial world. We are an integrated strategy and marketing agency working with companies, political parties, and candidates to change people’s minds and move them to action.
Our roots are in politics. We bring professional experts in each of our services areas to develop and execute campaigns that help our clients achieve bigger and better results that they’d hoped for — setting a higher standard for whatever challenge or opportunity comes next.
What We Do

We build data-driven, integrated marketing campaigns. Our professional experts develop and execute custom strategies that help our clients reach their goals and set a higher standard for what comes next. We defy conventional wisdom by creating new, data-driven tools and technology to reach the right audiences with the right messages, and then turned them to our vote.
At CM, we combine the Science (the numbers, the strategy, the logic) and the Art (the visions, the equation, the outcomes) of your political background to create breakthrough concepts.
How We Work
Explore:- We begin by asking a lot and listening a lot during meetings with our team and the client.
Plan :- We create a comprehensive communications road map detailing the specific objectives and outlining the strategies
Test :- We test our hypotheses by using research and perception audits to ascertain where our target publics are in relation to the client and their goals.
Execute :- We execute the plan to its minutest detail. We are nimble enough to adjust the plan and handle any surprises along the way. We never lose sight of the goal.
Optimize:- We optimize our efforts by taking the client's message across various platforms and making the most of every available channel
Measure :- We measure everything we do.

Name: Leaders of a Beautiful Struggle
Description:
Leaders of a Beautiful Struggle (LBS) is a grassroots think-tank which advances the public policy interest of Black people, in Baltimore, through: youth leadership development, political advocacy, and autonomous intellectual innovation.

We seek to radically change the discourse around local and regional politics by injecting community voices into political conversations through policy research, advocacy, and community organizing from a grassroots perspective.

Name: European Center of Austrian Economics Foundation
Description:
Chartered in the Principality of Liechtenstein, the European Center of Austrian Economics Foundation (ECAEF) is an independent academic institution designated to research in the scientific tradition of the Austrian School of Economics and the advancement of its seminal ideas. The ECAEF is an innovative European think tank that firmly stands for self-responsibility, individual freedom, and limited government.

Name: Cannabis Culture
Description: Cannabis Culture Marijuana MagazineCannabis Culture is a magazine about marijuana and hemp around the world. As of spring 2009, Cannabis Culture Magazine is no longer available as a printed publication. We are still recognized as one of the best sources for information due to our highest-standard journalism and news delivery about cannabis-related politics, activism, growing information, entertainment and more, so bookmark www.CannabisCulture.com!

Name: Vaterländische Union
Description: Die Vaterländische Union (VU) ist die Nachfolgepartei der (Christlich-sozialen) Volkspartei(VP). Sie ging aus einer Fusion der VP und des Liechtensteiner Heimatdiensts (LHD) hervor. Am 5. Januar 1936 wurde die neue Partei im Restaurant Adler in Vaduz gegründet.

Name: SME4Labour
Description:
SME4Labour provides a forum to bring together SMEs to learn, share and work in partnership with the Labour Party.

WHY SME4LABOUR?

The Labour Party believes that small and medium enterprises businesses are the backbone of the United Kingdom. As of 2016, SMEs make up 99.3% of all private sector businesses in the United Kingdom, employing over 15.7 million people with an estimated combined annual turnover of £1.8 trillion accounted for 47% of private sector turnover.

Through Small Medium-Sized Enterprises (SMEs) for Labour, we want to provide a forum whereby SMEs can work in partnership with the Labour Party and continue to inform our economic policies.


WHAT DO WE DO?

SME4Labour seeks to strengthen relations between the small, medium, micro, owner and family run businesses with the Labour Party. We support constructive and informed discussion within the Labour movement on issues impacting on SMEs.

We work closely with trade unions, employers’ groups and individuals, encouraging strong partnerships and collaboration.

We organise meetings for Labour Parliamentarians and others, so that a greater understanding of the challenges faced by SMEs can be gained.

Name: MCG - Mouvement Citoyen Genevois
Description:
Ni gauche, ni droite, le citoyen d’abord ! 

Telle est la ligne de conduite du Mouvement Citoyen Genevois (MCG) :

 Justice : pour mettre fin à l’entre-soi et pour une justice plus humaine 

 Frontaliers : priorité de l’emploi pour les résidents genevois 

 Formation des Genevois : établir un plan Marshall pour stopper le sacrifice de nos jeunes talents locaux 

 Mobilité : limitons le flux massif de véhicules frontaliers et priorisons l’harmonie des modes de transport 

 Genève est riche, luttons contre la paupérisation, sans faire fuir inutilement les riches ! Tout le monde doit trouver sa place dans l’écosystème genevois ! 

 Impôts : ne faisons pas de Genève un enfer fiscal, surtout pour les personnes et renégocions l’accord des années 70 avec la France pour les frontaliers 

 Energie : assurer l’approvisionnement de Genève de manière pragmatique et mesurée grâce à nos cours d’eau 

 Environnement : défendre la nature genevoise pour une qualité de vie de tous et un canton qui respire 

 Economie : pour l’application stricte et proportionnée de la préférence locale contre une libre circulation absolue et sans limite défendue par les élites déconnectées 

 Logement : pouvoir habiter dignement à Genève est un droit pour tous 

 Une santé de haut niveau pour les Genevois sans lobbies mortifères des assurances privées (modèle POGGIA-MAILLARD de caisse de compensation) 

 Sport et culture : Genève doit être à la pointe et assurer la meilleure qualité de vie pour les genevois et le vivre-ensemble de notre communauté

Name: Liberated Voices Podcast
Description:
Welcome to Liberated Voices – a podcast specialising in geopolitical analysis and community organising.

We will give a voice to experts often suppressed in order to discuss current situations in this turbulent world, and how people are fighting back for their rights.

Name: PI - Procesindustrien
Description:
Procesindustrien (PI) er foreningen for virksomheder med komplekse fremstillingsprocesser. Procesanlæg i industrien kører 24/7 og bruger meget energi. Det giver virksomheder nogle særlige udfordringer, som det er svært at løse alene.

PI er det fælles talerør, der sikrer, at Danmark finder de bedste løsninger på miljø- og energiudfordringerne, som gavner både miljøet og danske virksomheder.

Vi arbejder sammen for at sikre, at virksomhederne har adgang til veluddannet arbejdskraft i hele landet.

Vi er et tæt, fagligt netværk af førende, internationalt orienterede produktionsvirksomheder, der sparrer med hinanden om dagsordener, som ingen andre tager sig af.

Kun Procesindustrien gør det.

Name: EMILY's List Australia
Description:
EMILY's List Australia is a national organisation aimed at getting more progressive Labor women elected to State, Territory and Federal Parliaments.
 
Formed in 1996, EMILY's List has provided crucial support to women seeking election to government. To date EMILY's List has supported 284 new women MPs into parliaments around Australia and a total of 577 women to run.
 
EMILY's List provides financial, training and mentoring support to endorsed candidates in State and Federal election campaigns. We fill a gap between when women are preselected and when they get elected.
 
There are currently almost 3,000 supporters of EMILY's List across Australia, but to grow our organisation further, we need your help! Your donations of money and time will ensure that “when women support women, women win!”

Name: Dansk Vejforening
Description:
Dansk Vejforening er en interesseorganisation på vejområdet. Vores medlemmer er virksomheder og organisationer, der er professionelle aktører på vejene.

Der er to hovedgrupper af medlemmer: de, der leverer materialer, ydelser eller udstyr til vejene. Og de der bruger vejen i forbindelse med deres erhverv.

Til den første gruppe hører f.eks. entreprenører og leverandører af vejudstyr samt rådgivende ingeniører og forsikring mv.

Til den anden gruppe hører f.eks. vognmænd, vejhjælp og sælgere.

Det særlige ved vores medlemskreds er, at vi binder vejinteresser sammen på tværs af sektorer. Samtidig specialiserer vi os i vejområdet og står derfor som den eneste erhvervsorganisation der udelukkende beskæftiger sig med veje.

Foreningen arbejder med interessevaretagelse gennem forskellige midler. Herunder gennem udspil i pressen, politisk kontakt, debat i medlemskredsen og ved at deltage i netværk med berøring til vejområdet.

Dette arbejde foregår med vægt på troværdighed, faglighed og samarbejde. Vi har et bredt udsyn og anerkender den rolle i samfundsøkonomien og trafikken som alle transportformer har.

Det vigtigste for Dansk Vejforening er, at hver transportform udnyttes optimalt, og at der er fokus på den enorme betydning for samfundsøkonomien, miljøet og færdselssikkerheden som et velfungerende vejnet har.

Name: IG Metall Bildung
Description:
IG Metall Bildung- Bei uns findest du Alles, was du wissen musst! Lerne in unseren Seminaren das Handwerkszeug für deine Arbeit als Betriebsrät*in und Vertrauensleute-Arbeit. Die Wege in unsere Seminare sind kurz. Mit unseren 7 Bildungszentren und unseren regionalen Bildungsangeboten sind wir ganz in deiner Nähe.
Mit unserer Kinderbetreuung bieten wir dir eine familienfreundliche Unterstützung an. Komm vorbei und werde Teil der IG Metall Bildungscommunity. Finde dein passendes Seminar im Bildungsprogramm oder im digitalen Bildungsplaner. 
https://bildungsplaner-igm.de/

Impressum: www.igmetall.de/impressum

Description:
Mit unserem wirtschaftspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Engagement übernehmen wir Verantwortung für die Zukunft und geben der Jungen Wirtschaft eine Stimme. Wir fördern den Austausch und die Entwicklung junger Unternehmer und Führungskräfte. Wir sind die Junge Wirtschaft.

Name: Avow
Description: We’re working for a better Texas: where every person is trusted, thriving, and free to pursue the life they want. Through community-building, education, and political advocacy, Avow is securing unrestricted abortion care for everyone.

Name: Binda Consulting International Ltd
Description:
Binda Consulting International (BCI) is a majority woman-owned, globally recognized consulting firm with a strong focus on political strategy, international development, and increasing women's participation in politics. We specialize in providing innovative solutions to complex political challenges, empowering organizations to navigate political landscapes, drive social change, and foster inclusive governance. With a team of highly skilled professionals and a proven track record of success, we are dedicated to promoting sustainable development and amplifying the voices of underrepresented communities worldwide.

At BCI, we believe that effective political strategy advances social change. We work at the intersection of politics, development, and gender equality, providing strategic support and advice to organizations striving to make a positive impact. Our multidisciplinary team brings together expertise in political communications, organizational development, advocacy approaches, and gender equality strategies, allowing us to deliver comprehensive solutions that drive meaningful transformation.

We collaborate with a diverse range of clients, including governments, international organizations, civil society groups, and private sector entities. Our approach is built on collaboration, ensuring that we understand our clients' unique challenges and develop strategies that align with their goals. We are committed to transformative change by addressing complex political issues, fostering inclusive governance, and promoting gender equality at all levels.

Name: Зелено движение
Description:
НИЕ СМЕ ЗЕЛЕНО ДВИЖЕНИЕ – активни граждани, защитници на природата и хора, поели отговорността за собствения си живот и гледащи към бъдещето. Хора, знаещи какво искат и как да го постигнат. Признати експерти и активни граждани, които с протестите в защита на Иракли и Странджа, Витоша и Рила, на безценната природа на България доказаха, че могат да печелят битки срещу интересите на мръсния бизнес и корумпираното управление. Битки, които в очите на другите изглеждаха предварително изгубени. Ние водим тези битки докрай, не се отказваме и не предаваме това, което защитаваме.

ИСКАМЕ смислени и постижими неща – да запазим най-ценните ресурси на България: хората и природата. Да върнем държавата на гражданите – на които тя принадлежи по право и на която те трябва да са суверен. Да бъдем фактор и коректив при взимането на важните решения, които засягат обществото и околната среда у нас и в Европейския съюз.

КАК? С конкретни решения за онова, което трябва да се промени и с ценностна система, гарантирана от дълбоката ни обвързаност с нашата кауза, която защитаваме – и като представители на неправителствените организации, и като граждани. Кауза, зад която ще стоим в политиката. Защото именно ние, Зелено Движение, сме политическият израз на отговорното гражданско мислене. Автентичната партия не само на природозащитниците, но и на всички онези, които смятат, че нещата в държавата ни не са наред и не се примиряват с това. Ние сме истинската опозиция – единствената политическа сила, създадена и работеща пряко с подкрепата на хора от улицата. Улицата, на която никога не сме се колебали да излезем в името на справедливите каузи и гражданското достойнство. Съзнавайки, че унищожаването на природата в България е следствие от модела на функциониране и политическо управление на държавата, ние се обединихме на 18 май 2008 г. в партия с принципна позиция. Ето защо участваме в изборите и сме отговорни пред вас за политиката, която водим.

Name: The Albany Club Toronto
Description: A historic jewel in the heart of Toronto's financial district, the Albany Club is one of Canada’s oldest and most respected private clubs. Founded in 1882 by Sir John A Macdonald, the club continues to thrive with over 900 members who are leaders in Canada's business and conservative political spheres. Featuring a brand new Rooftop Patio and barbecue, a business casual dress code, a health-conscious menu and relaxed cell phone policy, the Albany Club has evolved to meet the need of modern members while continuing to uphold traditions that date back to the founding of the country. Members and their guests enjoy the convenience of the club's elegant and luxurious interior as a place to entertain clients, conduct meetings, work away from the office, dine, relax, socialize, and build face-to-face relationships with members and their guests.

Name: Yes on 4 Florida
Description: Floridians Protecting Freedom (FPF) was a statewide campaign of allied organizations and concerned citizens working together to protect Floridians’ access to reproductive health care and defend the right to bodily autonomy. FPF recognizes that all Floridians deserve the freedom to make personal medical decisions, free of government intrusion. Our citizen-led ballot initiative, the “Amendment to Limit Government Interference with Abortion,” sought to further codify that right into Florida law by creating a constitutional amendment that explicitly blocks the implementation of laws that prohibit, delay, or restrict abortion access.

De Vereniging van Zuid-Hollandse Gemeenten (VZHG) werd op 26 juni 1923 opgericht als een zelfstandige vereniging van gemeenten op provinciale schaal.
De vereniging is statutair gevestigd in Den Haag en staat
ingeschreven in het handelsregister van de Kamer van

Alle Zuid-Hollandse gemeenten (per januari 2024 totaal 50) zijn lid van de vereniging en betalen jaarlijks contributie, afhankelijk van het inwonertal.  

De VZHG is tevens 1 van de 12 provinciale afdelingen van de Vereniging van Nederlandse Gemeenten (VNG).  http://www.vng.nl

Som menighedsrådenes interesse- og arbejdsgiverorganisation vil vi sikre de bedste vilkår for folkekirkens lokale ledelse herunder mere fleksibilitet i organiseringen, sikre kirkens tilstedeværelse og opnå retten til at forhandle overenskomster. 
Vi arbejder for, at staten fortsat understøtter folkekirken i overensstemmelse med grundloven, og at folkekirkens særstilling i forhold til andre trossamfund opretholdes.

Se mere om vores aktiviteter på menighedsraad.dk

Name: American Indian Cultural District SF
Description: Founded on March 31st, 2020, the American Indian Cultural District (AICD) is the first established Cultural District of its size in the United States dedicated to recognizing, honoring, and celebrating the American Indian legacy, culture, people, and contributions. AICD is located on Ramaytush Ohlone land in the Mission neighborhood but we serve as a cultural hub for the greater San Francisco American Indian community.

Name: Volt Danmark
Description:
Volt is a progressive, pan-european movement that wants to change the way politics is being done. Citizen to Citizen, Volt is started by young europeans from all over the continent who will not accept the status quo in the face of Climate Change, economic disparity, nationalistic tendencies and international conflict on the isssue of energy and consumption.

The next generation needs a new type of politics and we are here to deliver.
Read our policies on www.volteuropa.org , join our movement or donate to help us expand.

We are neither left nor right, because 21st century politics needs science and facts, not 20th century ideological stagnation.

We can Join The Change - and you can!

Our mission is to end the dysfunction at City Council, making Calgary safer, more inclusive, and more responsive to the needs of its residents.

Name: FRELIMO
Description:
A Frente de Libertação de Moçambique, também conhecida por seu acrónimo FRELIMO, é um partido político oficialmente fundado em 25 de Junho de 1962 (como movimento nacionalista), com o objectivo de lutar pela independência de Moçambique do domínio colonial português.

O primeiro presidente do partido foi o Dr. Eduardo Chivambo Mondlane, um antropólogo que trabalhava na ONU.

Desde a independência de Moçambique, em 25 de junho de 1975, a FRELIMO é a principal força política do país, sendo também o "partido da situação" desde então.

Description:
Somos un grupo de ciudadanos de diversos orígenes políticos, preocupados por el presente y el futuro de Colombia. Somos colombianos de distintos orígenes sociales, económicos y culturales, que aspiramos a que el Centro Democrático encarne la riqueza y diversidad de nuestro país.

Nos une el amor y compromiso profundo con la Patria, el respeto y la adhesión por la obra liderada por el expresidente Álvaro Uribe Velez; la convicción de que el país debe avanzar por la senda de la Seguridad Democrática, la confianza inversionista, la cohesión social, la austeridad estatal y el diálogo popular.

Name: Water Natuurlijk-HDSR (Utrecht)
Description:
Nederland Waterland! Met een beetje meer aandacht en slimme maatregelen kunnen we zoveel meer van ons water genieten. Je kunt daar veel meer dan je nu vermoedt aan bijdragen.

Water Natuurlijk is een Nederlandse stroming die zich (vanaf 2008) inzet voor water in de stad en het waterlandschap met hart voor natuur en duurzaamheid. We hebben leden en donateurs. 

Water Natuurlijk-HDSR heeft invloed op het waterbeleid via het Dagelijks Bestuur en het Algemeen Bestuur van Hoogheemraadschap de Stichtse Rijnlanden. Dit waterstroomgebied bevindt zich in de provincie Utrecht. 

Missie 
Water Natuurlijk onderscheidt zich door bij niet-wettelijke waterschapstaken te kiezen voor schoon water, dit te verbinden met ecologie zich in te zetten voor natuurvriendelijke oevers en dijken, kansen voor recreatiefaciliteiten, cultuurhistorie (restaureren van sluizen en dijkhuizen), de flora en fauna en duurzaamheid. Zorgen dat waterschapstaken realiseerbaar en betaalbaar zijn. 

Water Natuurlijk-HDSR zet zich in voor het waterlandschap zoals;  
●	Schoon water in rivieren, kanalen en sloten, verbindt met ecologie. 
●	Meekoppelkansen voor recreatie.
●	Natuurvriendelijke oevers en dijken.
●	Cultuurhistorie (bijv. restaureren van sluizen en dijkhuizen).
●	Klimaat in de stad en duurzaam
●	De flora en fauna.

Name: SPD-Stadtratsfraktion im Münchner Rathaus
Description:
Die SPD-Stadtratsfraktion im Münchner Rathaus hat ihren Kurs klar gesetzt: Für ein soziales München, in dem alle gut leben, das verlässlich funktioniert, sicher ist – und den Anspruch verfolgt, die ökologischste Großstadt Europas zu werden.

Wir machen Politik, die klug soziale, ökologische, wirtschaftliche und finanzielle Aspekte miteinander verbindet und abwägt, nicht den bequemen, sondern den zukunftsfähigen Weg geht.

Der wachsenden Spaltung zwischen Arm und Reich, dem Wandel der Arbeitsgesellschaft und den Anforderungen, die ein klimaneutrales München 2035 mit sich bringt, begegnen wir mit Mut und Zuversicht.

Zum Impressum: https://spd-rathausmuenchen.de/impressum/

We are experts in the decision-making process of consumers and voters and have extensive experience developing effective communications strategies that lead people to choose our client’s product or service, join their organization, hold their opinion, or vote as we would like.

Medborgerlig Samling vill bygga ett långsiktigt hållbart samhälle där individens frihet och framtida generationer sätts i fokus, där staten fokuserar på kärnverksamhet och civilsamhället har en framträdande roll för samhällsbygget.

Name: WGA Hamburg (Wirtschaftsvereinigung Groß- und Außenhandel Hamburg e.V.)
Description:
Die WGA, gegründet im Jahre 1916, ist ein Dachverband mit Sitz in Hamburg und begleitet ganz unterschiedliche Fachverbände, ihre Mitglieder aus dem Groß- und Außenhandel bei der tagtäglichen Arbeit im internationalen Handel.
Die WGA und die unter ihrem Dach zusammengeschlossenen Fachverbände wirken dabei in zahlreichen Gremien und Verbänden mit und stehen konstant im direkten Dialog mit Politik und Verwaltung. Dies ermöglicht die ganz gezielte Ansprache der jeweils entscheidenden Personen. Dabei werden praxisrelevante Aspekte sachlich fundiert eingebracht. Grundlage hierfür ist ein intensiver fachlicher Austausch mit und unter den Mitgliedern. Ergänzt wird diese Arbeit durch das Zusammenwirken mit Vertretern der Wissenschaft sowie durch eine aktive Presse- und Öffentlichkeitsarbeit.

More than 1,000 companies worldwide currently benefit from this strong association. Where individual trade associations are too weak, the WGA can make its voice heard towards authorities, politics and business in the long term. The WGA and the trade associations united under its roof participate in numerous committees and associations and are constantly in direct dialogue with politics and administration. Practically relevant aspects are introduced in a factually sound manner. The basis is for an intensive professional exchange with and among members in a wide variety of committees and events.

Name: Union Populaire Républicaine - UPR
Description:
L’Union Populaire Républicaine (UPR) rassemble des Français venus de tous les horizons politiques. Nous nous battons pour libérer la France de l'Union européenne, de l'euro et de l'OTAN, afin de rendre à notre pays sa souveraineté et son indépendance.

Nous refusons l’asservissement de la France à toute puissance étrangère et toute féodalité financière. L’UPR ouvre ainsi la voie du changement que les Français et ceux qui se reconnaissent dans la France attendent. 

Nos analyses vont au fond des choses et démontrent que la crise politique, économique, sociale et morale de la société française trouve justement son origine dans cette Union européenne qui nous asphyxie mais dont on prétend faussement qu’elle serait irréversible et non sujette à débat. 

François Asselineau, son président-fondateur, a été candidat à l'élection présidentielle de 2017.

Name: John McAfee for Libertarian Party President
Description:
John McAfee is a world-famous computer scientist, activist, hacktivist, and the developer of the first commercial anti-virus program. The cyber-security legend and privacy advocate spent two decades as a programmer for NASA, Univac, and Xerox, and Lockheed Martin. Since retirement, he’s traveled the world and spent some time battling banana republics and much more. 

Easily the most interesting man in the world, McAfee is a truly original and passionate believer in human freedom, and I’m honored to be a part of this refreshingly honest platform. We have bold visions about how and why the libertarian party, our country’s largest third party, must use the surprising opportunities of this election season wisely. Now McAfee is the front-runner for the libertarian party in 2016, and the most viable candidate. 

Along with his VP, Judd Weiss, an experienced entrepreneur and successful commercial real estate professional, McAfee/Weiss presents the most viable run. These are two international business people, not politicians, seeking to insert the ideas of human freedom, self-ownership, and the role of government into the most important conversations of our lifetime.

This historic election will witness the fracturing of two dinosaur parties and the emergence of a new and relevant political wing. The American people on the left and right have now have steadily realized the myths taught in civics: that WE choose our representatives, not the party bosses. Political junkies knew this long ago that brokered conventions and constituent choice were markers of past eras. 

We speak to the disaffected, the disenfranchised, the angry and frustrated. To those of us that feel alienated from the government that we ourselves created. We appeal to those interested in the cultivation of a viable third party. We are interested in those interested in making history. Join us: www.bealibertarian.com

Name: Steve Doyle for Assembly
Description:
Steve has been a La Crosse County resident his entire life, a product of our local schools and UW-La Crosse. He learned the value of hard work and financial responsibility at a young age from his parents, Pat and Elaine, who worked several jobs to raise their six children.

In his professional life, Steve has worked in education, law, and other areas of public service where he learned that government can be either a tool for progress or an obstacle to it. That is why Steve has grown deeply involved and emphasized collaboration, cooperation, and innovation during his government service.  Steve's time in these roles has demonstrated leadership and ability to work with people of different backgrounds, parties, and viewpoints.  He has served on multiple bipartisan taskforces and worked diligently to achieve results.

This year, Steve is running to keep working for us and building on this track record of success. He will always bring a positive spirit to governing and work hard on jobs, lower taxes, affordable healthcare, and a renewed commitment to education. Steve appreciates your support and encourages you to cast your ballot in the August Primary and November General Election!

AUTHORIZED AND PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF STEVE DOYLE

Name: Reform Political Advertising
Description:
Our goal is simple: electoral advertising should be regulated so that fact-based claims are accurate. We are not interested in party policy or political arguments, but we are very interested indeed when data, events and identities are manipulated, ignored or invented.

Voters agree with us: according to our 2020 YouGov research, 85% of the UK public agree that it is important “that political parties’ adverts do not make false or misleading claims.”

Political parties have taken advantage of this lack of regulation. Put another way, politicians know they can lie in advertising, so they do. Our reviews of advertising in the various elections since the 2019 General Election is evidence if it were needed that local and national elections are infected by distortion and falsification.

The tide is beginning to turn: Labour, Liberal Democrat, Green and 3 other 2024 London mayor candidates signed up to an ad code we developed to plug the regulatory gap. We've started approaching national parties also ahead of the general election. The Green Party and Plaid Cymru have already signed up.  

Dishonest political advertising distorts choice and damages democracy and advertising; both deserve better.

You can follow us on 
X @refpoliticalads
BlueSky reformpoliticalads.bsky.social
Sign up to our newsletter https://reformpoliticaladvertising.org/subscribe/

Name: Republican Party of Louisiana
Description:
Welcome to the Republican Party of Louisiana: your home for limited government, family values and a strong national defense.

From the preamble of our party’s platform:

The Louisiana Republican Party represents the values of the majority of the citizens of Louisiana.

We believe in the power and freedom of individuals. We oppose all efforts to replace that power with undue governmental control.

Our nation was founded on faith in God, family, country, and freedom. Efforts to modify or replace these core values erode the foundations of our society for future generations.

The United States is a democratic republic governed by elected representatives. These Representatives must honor the original meaning of our Constitution, and must protect the inalienable rights of the American people as stated in the Bill of Rights.

The Republican Party is strong, principled and conservative. It is the Party that should lead the state of Louisiana. We want to represent every facet of American society, not by patronage but by principle, and not by dividing interests but by serving the good of all.

Membership in the Republican Party of Louisiana is open to all citizens residing in our state who share the values and beliefs expressed in this document. We recognize a duty to include all who share these values and beliefs, making a special effort to welcome and involve those from groups not traditionally associated with our Party.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Ortenau
Description:
Wir Wirtschaftsjunioren: Das sind rund 10.000 Unternehmer und Führungskräfte unter 40 Jahren. Wir sind global vernetzt und als größtes Netzwerk junger Wirtschaft in Deutschland mit rund 215 Mitgliedskreisen vor Ort präsent. Wer bei uns mitmacht, engagiert sich im Beruf und will darüber hinaus auch etwas bewegen.
 
Mit unserem wirtschaftspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Engagement übernehmen wir Verantwortung für die Zukunft und geben der jungen Wirtschaft eine Stimme. Wir fördern den Austausch und die Entwicklung junger Unternehmer und Führungskräfte.
 
Wir sind die junge Wirtschaft.
 
Unsere Ziele sind ein starkes und zukunftsfähiges Unternehmertum, Innovation und Digitaisierung, faire Ausbildungschancen, ressourcenbewusstes Handeln und die Vereinbarkeit von Familie und Beruf. Dies erreichen wir durch ein starkes Netzwerk, Veranstaltungen, Seminare, Workshops und ehrenamtliches Engagement in Bildungs-Projekten.
Du bist Führungskraft, selbstständig, unternehmerisch tätig oder willst es werden? Entdecke die ganze Welt der Wirtschaftsjunioren mit einer 6-monatigen Gastmitgliedschaft.

Name: CIDI
Description:
Het Centrum Informatie en Documentatie Israel (CIDI) werd in 1974 opgericht. Sindsdien is CIDI uitgegroeid tot een vertrouwde naam in de media en in politiek Den Haag. Journalisten, docenten, studenten en politici weten CIDI te vinden voor betrouwbare informatie over antisemitisme, Joden (in Nederland), Israel en het Midden-Oosten.

CIDI brengt een realistisch beeld over Joden, Israel in het Midden-Oosten aan het Nederlandse publiek en maakt duidelijk waarom een Joodse staat, net als een staat voor Palestijnen, nodig is. CIDI is vóór vrede en bestrijd het wij-zij denken in Nederland. Daarom maakt CIDI zich ook sterk tegen alle vormen van racisme en specifiek ook antisemitisme.

Name: Citizens United
Description:
Citizens United's goal is to restore the founding fathers' vision of a free nation, guided by the honesty, common sense and good will of its citizens. Through a combination of education, advocacy, grassroots organization, amicus briefs, and award-winning documentary films and videos, Citizens United has been fighting for conservative principles and values for more than three decades.

In 2010, Citizens United win a landmark First Amendment decision at the United States Supreme Court in Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission. The case struck down two decades of unconstitutional restrictions on free speech.

Name: DI Lolland-Falster
Description:
DI Lolland-Falster er en regionalforening for medlemmer af DI i kommunerne; Lolland og Guldborgsund. 

DI Lolland-Falster har en lang række medlemsvirksomheder fordelt i hele området og inden for mange forskellige brancher – bl.a. fremstilling, service, transport, byggeri, digitalisering, handel og rådgivning.

Vi arbejder for at forbedre virksomhedernes rammevilkår lokalt, så de får de bedst mulige forudsætninger for at drive deres forretning. Et stærkt lokalt afsæt til den globale konkurrence er afgørende for, at virksomheder på Lolland og Falster kan fortsætte med at skabe vækst og arbejdspladser i vores område.

Vi sætter virksomhedernes udfordringer på dagsordenen gennem alliancer med de vigtigste lokale aktører – bl.a. kommuner, erhvervsskoler, lokale erhvervsråd og regionale medier.

Vi afholder et årligt erhvervstræf med deltagere fra både virksomheder, kommuner
(bl.a. borgmestre) og MF’ere valgt i området. Vi hylder desuden virkelyst med vores årlige initiativpris til en lokal virksomhed. Vi hædrer også dygtige lærlinge, der gør en særlig indsats som praktiksted.

Vi byder diskussioner og kommentarer på denne side velkomne, og vi regner med, at du vil holde en god tone, når du kommenterer eller deler indhold fra siden. 

RETNINGSLINJER FOR DENNE SIDE
DI forbeholder sig retten til at fjerne indlæg, som ikke overholder gængse regler, og som ikke er relateret til de områder, DI beskæftiger sig med. Det betyder, at indlæg og debatter skal holdes i en respektfuld tone, og at spam og kommercielt indhold uanset emne fjernes.

Kontakt chefkonsulent Lars Magnus Lund Christensen på lmlc@di.dk for spørgsmål vedr. regionalforeningen DI Lolland-Falster.

Name: East China Fair
Description:
East China Fair (short for ECF), supported by the Ministry of Commerce of the People’s Republic of China, co-sponsored by nine provinces and cities government, namely Shanghai, Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Anhui, Fujian, Jiangxi, Shandong, Nanjing and Ningbo, and organized by Donghao Lansheng (Group) Co., Ltd., is the largest regional international economic and trade fair in China with the most trade visitors, the highest transaction volume, and the greatest variety of exhibits on a global basis.

The 29th ECF will be held on 1st-4th, March, 2019 at Shanghai New International Expo Center, with an exhibition area of 115,000 m2. It will be divided into five exhibition pavilions, namely Clothing Exhibition, Textile Exhibition, Home Products Exhibition, Gifts Exhibition, and Modern Life Exhibition. Boosting China’s trade with other countries around the world, ECF has become an important platform to help Chinese enterprises go global, and is considered as a barometer of international trade in China.

Name: Vihreät - De Gröna
Description:
Fairness, choice, climate responsibility. Vihreät - De Gröna - The Greens of Finland

The Greens work for a fair change. Today the world wide green movement is needed more than ever.
Climate change is threatening the future of our environment and our way of life. People's well-being is threatened by changes in working life caused by the global economy.

The green movement is offering a fair and safe solution. We want to leave future generations a world which is in a better condition than it is today.

Background

The party was founded February 28, 1987, and registered as a political party the next year. Political activity had begun already in the early 1980s, when environmental activists, feminists and other active groups began to campaign on Green issues in Finland. In 1995 it was the first European Green party to be part of a state-level Cabinet.

The party was founded as a popular movement. The party still especially stresses openness and democratic decision-making.

Name: Tienskip
Description:
Jongeren staan ver van politiek en democratie af? Wij brengen daar verandering in! Tienskip weet de kloof tussen jongeren en democratie te verkleinen, door de betekenis van democratie te verbreden. Tijdens onze evenementen weten wij meer dan 5.000 jongeren enthousiast te maken voor een actieve rol in de democratie. Dit doen we door jongeren in de praktijk te laten ervaren hoe je zelf initiatief kan tonen in je directe omgeving, waardoor  wij de democratische instituten tot leven brengen. 

In 2015 zijn wij begonnen vanuit een eigen behoefte om meer te weten te komen over deze kant van democratie. Vanuit een project op de middelbare school is Tienskip gestart en tot de dag van vandaag is het een organisatie die bestaat uit jongeren. Inmiddels zijn wij ook actief buiten Friesland en vertrouwen wij op de inzet van meer dan 150 jonge vrijwilligers. Benieuwd naar onze organisatie en evenementen? Stuur ons gerust een bericht!

Name: Movimento Federalista Europeo (MFE)
Description:
Il Movimento Federalista Europeo venne fondato a Milano nel 1943 da un gruppo di antifascisti raccolti attorno ad Altiero Spinelli. I principi sui quali è nato sono contenuti nel Manifesto di Ventotene, elaborato nel 1941 dallo stesso Spinelli, con la collaborazione di Ernesto Rossi e Eugenio Colorni.

L'analisi e le proposte politiche del MFE si basano sulla convinzione della necessità del superamento della sovranità assoluta degli Stati nazionali attraverso la creazione di uno stato federale europeo, la Federazione europea. Per il MFE, solo unendosi in una Federazione gli europei possono rendere irreversibile la pace tra gli stati europeo, affrontare con efficacia le sfide della sicurezza, dello sviluppo e del nuovo ordine globale, e contribuire alla creazione di un ordine internazionale pacifico e democratico. La Federazione europea costituirà la prova più evidente che è possibile superare la divisione dell'umanità in Stati sovrani e potrà aprire la strada ad altre unificazioni regionali e in prospettiva a un governo democratico del mondo.

Il Movimento Federalista Europeo è un'organizzazione politica autonoma. È indipendente dai partiti politici e non partecipa alle elezioni.

Il MFE ha una sezione giovanile, la Gioventù Federalista Europea (GFE), che è anche la sezione italiana della JEF (Young European Federalists)

Il MFE costituisce la sezione italiana dell'UEF (Unione europea dei federalisti) e del WFM (World Federalist Movement), fondati entrambi nel 1947.

Name: Canadian Drug Policy Coalition  -   La Coalition canadienne des politiques sur les drogues
Description:
The Canadian Drug Policy Coalition (CDPC) envisions a safe, healthy and just Canada in which drug policy and legislation as well as related institutional practices are based on evidence, human rights, social inclusion and public health.

OUR GOAL is to develop and present a new direction in drug policy and lead
change processes within local, national and international arenas. We will
assemble and disseminate clear information and analysis and foster public
dialogue to build knowledge and awareness of strategies to respond to substance
use based on public health principles and human rights.
