Name: NEOS Wien
Description:
NEOS ist 2015 erstmals in den Wiener Gemeinderat und in die 23 Bezirksvertretungen eingezogen. Die fünf Abgeordneten haben sich von Tag 1 weg als DIE konstruktive Oppositionskraft etabliert. 

Bei der Gemeinderatswahl am 11. Oktober 2020 wurde dieser Einsatz belohnt: 7,5% bedeuteten ein Plus von 1,35 Prozentpunkten - angesichts der schwierigen Ausgangslage im Jahr der Corona-Krise ein hervorragendes Ergebnis. 

Dieses Wähler_innenvertrauen wurde schließlich auch umgemünzt: Es ist gelungen, mit der SPÖ ein mutiges, fortschrittliches Programm zu verhandeln - am 24. November wurde die Fortschrittskoalition angelobt und nahm ihre Arbeit unverzüglich auf. 

NEOS Landessprecher Christoph Wiederkehr fungiert nun als Vizebürgermeister und Stadtrat für Bildung, Integration, Jugend und Transparenz. 

Unterstützt von einem starken Rathausklub mit nunmehr acht Abgeordneten sowie knapp 80 Bezirksrät_innen in allen 23 Wiener Gemeindebezirken wird NEOS in den kommenden Jahren alles daran setzen, Wien noch besser zu machen. 

Einen besonderen Fokus legen wir auf gute Schulen und Kindergärten, auf den Wiederaufbau der Wiener Betriebe nach der Pandemie und damit die Senkung der Arbeitslosigkeit, auf ein sauberes, transparentes Wien und auf ein Wien, das ambitionierte Wege im Kampf gegen den Klimawandel einschlägt und nachhaltige Verbesserungen in diesem Bereich umsetzt.

Name: Anders. Brussel
Description: Open Vld Brussels is a liberal political party in Brussels.

Name: Conservative Way Forward
Description:
Conservative Way Forward was founded in 1991 to defend and build upon the achievements of the Conservative Party under Margaret Thatcher's leadership, and to adapt the principles of her era in government to modern concerns and challenges.

David Cameron has described us as “the largest and most effective pressure group in the Conservative Party today”.

Name: Brancheorganisationen Danske A-kasser
Description:
Danske A-kasser er brancheorganisation for 21 statsanerkendte arbejdsløshedskasser i Danmark.

Arbejdsløshedskasserne repræsenterer cirka 2,1 mio. medlemmer.

Danske A-kasser omfatter alle typer a-kasser, det vil sige fagligt afgrænsede og tværfaglige a-kasser og a-kasser for lønmodtagere og selvstændige.

Danske A-kasser repræsenterer a-kasserne over for politiske og administrative myndigheder og udfører en række servicefunktioner over for a-kasserne, herunder hotlinefunktion, uddannelse af bl.a. sagsbehandlere og forum for fælles drøftelser mellem a-kasserne.

Følg også Danske A-kasser på Facebook her: https://www.facebook.com/BrancheorgansationenDanskeAkasser/

Name: National Union for Democracy in Iran (NUFDI)
Description: Non-partisan, non-profit organization representing the Iranian-American community in pursuit of a US policy toward #Iran rooted in democracy and human rights

Name: Wirtschaftsbund Oberösterreich
Description: Leidenschaft für das Unternehmertum. Dafür stehen wir im Wirtschaftsbund. Uns alle vereint, dass wir stolz darauf sind, Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer zu sein. Und der Wirtschaftsbund tut alles, damit es auch in Zukunft möglich ist, seine Ideen unternehmerisch zu verwirklichen. Wir wollen unsere Betriebe mit guten Gewissen und Zuversicht an die nächste Generation weitergeben und gestärkt Neues schaffen. Dafür kämpfen wir als starke Stimme für die Wirtschaft.

Name: Animal Justice Party
Description:
The Animal Justice Party is the national voice for animals in Australian politics, with 4 elected representatives in VIC & NSW State Parliaments and Councils. 
We give a political voice to those who have none – we pursue the vital issues of animal protection through the Australian Parliamentary System by:
+ Actively contesting elections, thereby demonstrating that voters care about animal issues;
+ Lobbying for the adoption of animal-friendly policies by other political parties; and
+ Providing a political focus for the many animal issues that other parties ignore.

The Animal Justice Party actively campaigns at a government policy level against animal atrocities relating to wildlife destruction, factory farming, live export, companion and domestic animal abuse, and the use of animals for sport and entertainment.

We advocate for the toughening of animal protection laws, an increase in penalties for convicted animal abusers, regulation and restriction in the sale and use of companion animals, and for enhanced education in the treatment of animals. 

We believe that through the formation of the Animal Justice Party, and with the support of the many like-minded, concerned animal lovers (and voters) throughout Australia, real and urgent changes to the way in which animals are treated can be made. 

This Page and Contents are authorised by: L Elisei, Animal Justice Party, 470 St Kilda Rd, Melbourne, VIC 3004

Name: Aam Aadmi Party
Description:
A new political alternative in India to give voice to the common man who is being cheated, terrorized and looted by all of the current political parties. 
The new alternative is about giving power to the people, changing the culture of corrupt politics, promote transparency and pursue grassroots democracy both within and outside the organization.

Name: BC United
Description: BC United is a made-in-BC, independent political party united by free enterprise values and a commitment to creating opportunity for all of BC.

Name: NEOS Lab
Description: Das NEOS Lab, die Parteiakademie der NEOS, schafft Raum für politische Entfaltung, um neue Lösungen für eine neue Politik zu entwickeln. Hier werden Talente entdeckt, Persönlichkeiten gefördert und Skills trainiert. Unser politischer Ansatz beruht auf Innovation und Partizipation und lädt zu kritischem Denken, selbstbestimmtem Lernen und offenem Diskurs ein. Das NEOS Lab ist für die gesamte Organisation das Herzstück in der politischen Aus- und Weiterbildung, die Drehscheibe im Wissens-Bereich und als offenes Labor Begegnungsplattform für interessierte Bürger_innen.

Name: Volt Belgium
Description:
The first #PanEuropeanParty
Connect. Empower. Change! 
 27.000 members

Name: Open Vld Brussel
Description: Open Vld Brussels is a liberal political party in Brussels.

Name: Défendre les enfants
Description: Vos candidates & candidats citoyens aux élections européennes. Notre engagement premier est dans une dynamique de rassemblement, de la défense de vos droits fondamentaux.

Name: Dansk Køl & Varme
Description:
Dansk Køl & Varme er brancheforening for autoriserede køle- og varmepumpefirmaer i Danmark, Færøerne og Grønland. 

MISSION
Vores mission er at hjælpe vores medlemmer. Det gør vi blandt andet ved at varetage deres tekniske, økonomiske og juridiske interesser gennem vejledning og ved at tage kontakt til myndighederne. Vi kæmper for, at de værdier, som det danske samfund investerer i køle- og varmepumpebranchen, bevares eller øges. Det gør vi blandt andet ved at sikre, at vores medlemmer til enhver tid kan opfylde de fag- og lovgivningsmæssige krav. Derfor er kvalitet et nøgleord i vores mission.

VISION
Køleteknik er centralt for, at moderne virksomheder og et moderne samfund, som det danske, kan fungere. Uden køleteknik vil industrien gå i stå, fødevarer vil fordærve og internettet vil lukke ned.

I fremtiden vil køle- og varmepumpeteknologi få endnu større betydning og blive mere udbredt, fordi køleteknik går hånd i hånd med udbredelsen af ny teknologi. Derfor tror vi på, at kvalitet forsat vil være et nøgleord, for at være en konkurrencedygtig virksomhed i køle- og varmepumpebranchen. Samtidigt vil barren for at drive en effektiv og lovlig køle- og varmepumpevirksomhed løbende forhøjes. Derfor bestræber vi os i Dansk Køl & Varme på, at vores medlemmer er forkant med ny teknologi, ny lovgivning og målsætninger for miljø og klima.

AMBITION
Dansk Køl & Varmes ambition er at være den mest kompetente og effektive organisation på køle- og varmepumpeområdet. Vi skal være køle- og varmepumpevirksomhedes foretrukne brancheorganisation, og vi skal være myndigheder og politikeres oplagte sparringspartner, når ny lovgivning skal udformes, eller den eksisterende lovgivning skal håndhæves.

Name: IfNotNow
Description: IfNotNow is building a movement of American Jews to end the Israeli occupation and transform our community.

Name: Labour Housing Group
Description:
We are a socialist society affiliated to the Labour Party, dedicated to ensuring that housing of the highest possible standard is available for all members of the community regardless of their means.

Composed of housing policy experts, councillors, MPs, & grassroots campaigners we exist to connect the Labour Party to the wider housing community and provide a space for members to meet & discuss all things housing with like-minded individuals.

Our activities involve: hosting regular interviews with housing policy experts, annual policy days, Labour Conference fringe events, publications, & campaign sessions.

Our blog, 'Red Brick', also hosts in depth examinations of a variety of housing issues, and was recently described by the Guardian as a "superb blog". 
Read it here: https://redbrickblog.co.uk/

Name: DI Thy/Mors
Description: Vi arbejder for et stærkt Thy og Mors

Name: Sylvester Turner for Mayor
Description:
Every day, Mayor Sylvester Turner is working to lift every voice in Houston so we can continue to do great things for our city.

Houston is a city that never sleeps—and this is a story that continues to be told every day, by every one of us.

That’s why Mayor Turner is laser-focused on flood recovery, prevention and mitigation efforts – from securing billions of dollars in federal funding to passing sweeping changes in the way we develop our city in the future.

He is working to ease traffic congestion and improve road conditions through improvements to Rebuild Houston – the city’s program for streets and drainage that was approved by voters in a landslide last November – and working with METRO to expand and upgrade our transportation infrastructure.

He is not only lifting every voice in Houston, but also lifting entire communities. His award-winning Complete Communities initiative is creating more complete neighborhoods with access to quality affordable homes, jobs, well-maintained parks and greenspace, improved streets and sidewalks, grocery stores, retail, good schools, and transit options.

And he is Houston’s biggest booster when it comes to creating more jobs and economic opportunity – from helping to bring in millions of dollars to Houston through events like the 2020 World Energy Conference, to collaborating with leading institutions to make Houston a world leader in data science and digital technologies.

Mayor Turner always says, “In Houston, if you can dream it, you can do it.” His life is a testament to that philosophy.

Name: Bund der Steuerzahler Deutschland e. V.
Description:
Seit 75 Jahren vertritt der Bund der Steuerzahler die Interessen der Steuerzahler in der steuer- und finanzpolitischen Ausrichtung der Bundesrepublik. Der Verband fördert die Teilhabe der Zivilgesellschaft an politischen Debatten und ist ein konstruktiver Begleiter von Parlamenten und Regierungen. Mit rund 200.000 Mitgliedern und Spendern ist er eine Bürgerinitiative in der Mitte der Gesellschaft. Der Bund der Steuerzahler deckt Steuergeldverschwendung auf, hinterfragt Privilegien, macht Sparvorschläge und unterstützt Bürger und Betriebe mit Steuertipps. Zu den bekanntesten Publikationen zählen das „Schwarzbuch – Die öffentliche Verschwendung“ und die „Schuldenuhr Deutschlands“. Solide Staatsfinanzen, ein faires Steuersystem und die Transparenz der Gesetzgebung sind seit der Gründung zentrale Anliegen. Der Verband setzt sich parteiunabhängig für die Interessen der Steuerzahler ein und stärkt damit den demokratischen Diskurs.

For 75 years, the German Taxpayers' Association has represented taxpayers' interests in the democratic discourse on fiscal and financial policy. Embedded in the social market economy, it promotes civil society's active participation in tax policy debates. The association, with around 200,000 members and donors across 15 state associations and the federal level, is a true citizens' initiative at the heart of society. It uncovers tax waste, informs the public, proposes reforms, questions government privileges, and supports citizens with tax advice. Notable work includes "The Black Book – Public Waste" and "Germany's Debt Clock." The association advocates for transparent legislation, efficient use of tax money, fair taxation, and sound public finances, essential for maintaining democratic contributions through taxes. It remains non-partisan and distances itself from policies that undermine democratic principles and the Basic Law. Together, we must push for better policies to protect both taxpayers' interests and democracy.

Name: Bangladesh Awami League
Description:
The oldest and largest political party of Bangladesh, Awami League began its journey as a mighty political expression of the thitherto suppressed hopes and aspirations of the people living on the Padma- Meghna- Jamuna delta.

It is the party that steered the nation through post-partition quagmires, voiced the demands and aspirations of the people of this delta and finally led the Liberation War against West Pakistan to free the people from the centuries-old subordination.

With a golden past and grand present, Awami League represents the mainstream of the progressive, non-communal, democratic and nationalist politics of Bangladesh. The party boasts of a glorious past featuring relentless and uncompromising struggles against autocracy and communalism, against political and economic domination.

The game-changer of politics of the then Pakistan which began an epic journey with Maulana Abdul Hamid Khan Bhashani and Sheikh Mujibur Rahman at the helm, now is steered by Sheikh Hasina, the daughter of Father of the Nation Bangabondhu  Sheikh Mujibur Rahman.

For more information please visit: http://albd.org/index.php/en/party/history/78-62-years-of-struggle-and-achievements-bangladesh-awami-league

Name: DI Netværk
Description:
Bliv en del af et netværk, som skaber værdi og løsninger.

Hverdagen byder altid på udfordringer med skiftende teknologier, komplekse arbejdsopgaver og geopolitiske vilkår. 
 
DI samler viden fra 20.000 virksomheder og skaber en rød tråd mellem praktisk erfaring og de nyeste trends.

Som medlem af en af DI’s næsten 200 netværksgrupper får du adgang til et stærkt fællesskab. 

Mød ligesindede, del erfaringer og find løsninger, der styrker din rolle i din virksomhed.

Vores mødeledere sikrer et professionelt og fagligt indhold, hvor både DI’s interne erfarne fagpersoner og eksterne eksperter bidrager med viden og perspektiv.

Er du klar til at være på forkant med de nyeste tendenser og udfordringer?
Kontakt os i dag og hør mere om, hvordan du bliver en del af DI’s faglige Netværk. Send en mail til netvaerksteam@di.dk eller ring 3377 4776.

Name: The People
Description: The mission of The People is to bring Americans together to engage in civil discourse, establish and carry out nonpartisan governmental reforms and by doing so, the people will for the first time wil live in a truly representative democracy.

Name: DI Vendsyssel
Description: Regionalforening for DI-medlemmer i kommunerne Hjørring, Frederikshavn, Brønderslev og Læsø.

Name: BÜNDNIS 90/DIE GRÜNEN Sachsen-Anhalt
Description: BÜNDNIS 90/DIE GRÜNEN Sachsen-Anhalt is a political organization company based out of Otto-von-Guericke-Straße 65, Magdeburg, Germany.

Name: UK Young Ambassadors
Description: We believe that young people should have a say on the decisions affecting them and the issues they care about. Many of these issues are either global in nature, such as poverty and climate change, directly affected by global events, such as the Covid-19 Pandemic, or dealt with at international venues such as the Council of Europe, the Commonwealth or the United Nations.

Name: forumWHU
Description:
forumWHU is a student initiative at WHU - Otto Beisheim School of Management. It is dedicated to organizing and hosting the annual congress entitled “forumWHU", targeting the central topic „economy in responsibility“. As such it draws both current and future decision-makers together to exchange ideas and experiences in lectures, discussions and workshops, thereby becoming more aware of the social responsibility in business. It connects over 400 students of renowned universities from Germany and the EU with decision-makers from economy and politics every year.

The entire organization lies in the hands of active WHU students. They are supported by Prof. Michael Frenkel, former Dean of WHU and Holder of the Chair of Macroeconomics and International Economics.

Name: The Democracy Network
Description:
Politics is at a crossroads. Our democratic institutions are facing significant challenges, politics can often be seen to be stuck in the past and out of touch with the concerns of ordinary people, and decisions are often made without those they most affect. But, there are also lots of reasons to be hopeful that a stronger democracy is possible; there are many fantastic people and organisations working to strengthen and update democracy in the UK. Yet, too often we are isolated from one another and are not having the impact we need to build a democracy fit for the 21st century.

The Democracy Network is a network of people and organisations working on issues of power, democracy and voice in England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland. We support each other to connect and collaborate, share and learn, build a way to agree ways forward, and take action and influence decision makers together.

Name: BVDG - Bundesverband deutscher Galerien und Kunsthändler e.V.
Description:
Der BVDG ist ein Zusammenschluss von Galerien, Editeuren, und Kunsthändlern, die hauptberuflich und überwiegend mit bildender und/oder angewandter Kunst des 19. bis 21. Jahrhunderts handeln. Er vertritt die Interessen der professionellen Galerien und Kunsthändler in Deutschland auf nationaler Ebene. Der BVDG berät seine Mitglieder in allen Fragen der Galeriearbeit, fördert den Informationsaustausch und ist Ansprechpartner für Politik, Medien und Öffentlichkeit. Der BVDG nimmt auch Fördermitglieder auf, die über eine spezifische kunstmarktaffine Expertise verfügen.
Galeriearbeit, Editionstätigkeit und Kunsthandel unterscheiden sich wesentlich von anderer Handelstätigkeit. Galerist:innen, Editeur:innen und Kunsthändler:innen sind nicht nur Kaufleute, sondern sie nehmen die besondere Aufgabe der Künstler:innenförderung und Pflege von Kulturgütern wahr, sie sind Vermittler:innen künstlerischer Positionen und auf hoher Vertrauensbasis Berater:innen von Privatsammler:innen und öffentlichen Institutitonen, denen sie auch Leihgaben zur Verfügung stellen und vermitteln. Sie schaffen mit ihren kostenlosen und öffentlich zugänglichen Ausstellungen und Events – Vernissagen, Lesungen, Gespräche, Konzerte… - Anlässe und Räume, um über Kunst zu sprechen und diese zu erleben. Sie publizieren Kataloge und Bücher. Sie erfüllen damit eine unverzichtbare kulturelle Aufgabe.

Name: JMDA
Description:
La JMDA est une Organisation Politique Africaine à but non-lucratif, qui a pour vocation de dénoncer, de critiquer et de proposer des solutions, face à la flambée des coups d'état constitutionnels et militaires en Afrique, face au taux de Chômage grandissant et aux faux chiffres annoncés par des gouvernements Africains et face à la mal gouvernance des dirigeants Africains qui s'enrichissent en longueur de journée au détriment des populations Africaines.

La JMDA sera présente plus tard à travers des bureaux permanents dans tous les 54 pays Africains pour militer réellement contre toute forme de dictature, de mal gouvernance et de misère des populations Africaines. 

Le siège de l'organisation politique sera basé à Paris en France les années à venir.

Name: MPR Group
Description:
MPR Group fue fundado el 15 de Mayo del 2010 con el objetivo de impulsar proyectos educativos sobre marketing y comunicación política a quien desea aprender sobre estas especialidades sin importar sus limitaciones de tiempo, distancia o de tipo financiero.

Después de un rápido crecimiento, en 2013 y debido al trabajo realizado en beneficio de la industria política, la organización fue reconocida por The American Association of Political Consultants con el Pollie Industry Service Award.

MPR Group es la comunidad online más grande de consultores y comunicadores políticos de habla hispana en el mundo y son los organizadores de los Napolitan Victory Awards, galardones pioneros en reconocer el talento de los profesionales políticos que trabajan con audiencias hispanohablantes a nivel mundial.

Name: Als je uit elkaar gaat
Description: Alsjeuitelkaargaat is dé plek voor ouders als ze uit elkaar gaan. Tijdens een scheiding komt er veel op ouders af. Het internet staat bomvol informatie, wat wij hebben gebundeld op onze website.

Name: Tiny Home Industry Association
Description:
MISSION:
Unifying A Movement By Developing Standards And Promoting Best Practices In The Construction, Placement And Widespread Use Of Tiny Homes As Permissible And Permanent Housing.

VISION:
We Envision A World In Which People Are Allowed To Choose From A Broader Range Of Economical, Ecologically Responsible, Safe And Healthy Solutions.

IMPACT:
Fueling a Global Thriving Industry, Stimulating Economies and Forging Pathways to Sustainable, Attainable Housing
Fostering Strategic Relations with Innovators, Municipalities, Organizations, Developers, Investors, Builders and Individuals.

Name: Håndværkerforeningen København
Description:
Godt håndværk samler byen

Håndværkerforeningen København er en tværfaglig medlemsorganisation for selvstændige håndværksmestre og ejerledere. Vi kæmper for levende hovedstadsregion, og arbejder for at sætte fokus på godt håndværk.

Håndværkerforeningen udgiver magasinet MESTER fem gange om året. Magasinet skriver om godt håndværk i hovedstaden. Find artikler og tegn et gratis abonnement på hfk.dk/mester

På denne profil kommenterer vi bl.a. (men ikke udelukkende) på politik, trafik og parkering i hovedstaden, samt forholdene for hovedstadsområdets håndværksvirksomheder og erhvervsuddannelser.

Vores knapt 2.000 medlemmer er ejere og ledere af små og mellemstore virksomheder inden for en bred vifte af erhverv. Herudover er der tilsluttet 31 laug og brancheorganisationer.

Name: California Labor Federation
Description: The California Labor Federation, AFL-CIO, represents more than 2.1 million working Californians in 1,200 AFL-CIO and Change to Win labor unions throughout the state. Whether it's through elections, legislation or grassroots action, the California Labor Federation is on the front lines in the fight for workers' rights.

Name: Florida Blockchain Business Association
Description: The Florida Blockchain Business Association is a 501(c)6 focused on promoting blockchain friendly policies in the State of Florida. Our mission is to ensure that the entire community, from businesses to individuals, has a voice in Florida's political process. Through advocacy and education, the FBBA's goal is to make Florida a global destination and an innovation hub for the blockchain community.

Name: DI Østjylland
Description:
DI Østjylland er regionalforening for de knap 1800 medlemmer af DI i de fire østjyske kommuner. Vi arbejder for at skabe gode vilkår for at drive virksomhed i området. 

Det østjyske område er præget af stor vækst og fortætning. Der er nettotilflytning af borgere og der bliver skabt mange jobs, også i det private erhvervsliv. 

Væksten giver trængselsudfordringer, både i forhold til infrastrukturen og bosætningen, hvor vante mønstre er i opbrud. 

I DI Østjylland arbejder vi for, at det skal være et godt sted for alle at bo, leve og arbejde - også for udenlandske medarbejdere. En forudsætning for, at der er godt at bo, er gode jobs i virksomheder i udvikling. 

Derfor arbejder vi konstant med at forbedre vilkårene for virksomhederne. Samtidig arbejder vi for, at der bliver uddannet flere dygtigere medarbejdere til erhvervslivet, både ved at flere vælger en erhvervsuddannelse, men også ved at flere tager en efter uddannelse. 

På tværs af alle vores mærkesager går den grønne omstilling. Vi vil tænke ”grønt”, fordi det er en god idé og fordi at der er gode potentialer i det for vores virksomheder.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Hessen e.V.
Description: Wir sind der Landesverband der 16 WJ-Kreise in Hessen und geben den hessischen Wirtschaftsjunioren eine starke Stimme. Wir sind die Stimme der jungen Wirtschaft!

Name: Der Mittelstand. BVMW Dresden
Description:
Profitieren Sie von Deutschlands größtem und aktivstem Unternehmernetzwerk!
Unsere 300 Geschäftsstellen verknüpfen mittelständische Unternehmen mit mehr als 900.000 direkten Kontakten im Jahr. In allen unternehmerischen Bereichen bieten wir Leistungen und Unterstützung, die auf unsere Mitglieder zugeschnitten sind: Arbeitskräftegewinnung, Digitalisierung, Gesundheitsförderung, Innovation, Recht, Steuern und natürlich Einkaufsvorteile, die es in sich haben! 

Stellen Sie uns auf die Probe. Lernen Sie ein Netzwerk kennen, das in Qualität und Größe in Deutschland einzigartig ist! Setzen Sie sich mit uns in Verbindung unter britta.kick@bvmw.de

Name: SEV Swiss Union of transport workers
Description: SEV stands up for fair pay, decent working, living and environmental conditions. Technological change, unrestrained mobility needs and ruthless entrepreneurial profit-seeking have led to existing labor rights of employees being called into question. Therefore, employees are more than ever dependent on the protection and support of a strong trade union. The SEV is competent and bundles the experiences from the different professional areas of public transport.

Name: Konrad-Adenauer-Foundation Iraq
Description: Freedom, justice and solidarity are the basic principles underlying the work of the Konrad-Adenauer-Foundation (KAS). The KAS is a political foundation, closely associated with the Christian Democratic Union of Germany (CDU). In our European and international cooperation efforts we work for people to be able to live self-determined lives in freedom and dignity and we make a contribution, underpinned by our values, to help Germany meet its growing responsibilities throughout the world. Through our country offices in the Middle East, the Konrad Adenauer Foundation assists the political, economic, and social development in the region. We want to contribute in a sustainable way to the rooting and the reinforcement of democracy, the rule of law, and civil society, to the development and the consolidation of social market economy structures, to the avoidance of violent conflict, to the consolidation of cooperation within the region and with Europe, as well as to a constructive dialogue between cultures and religions. The Syria/Iraq Office has been set up in September 2015 and deals with the political and social situation in both countries, questions regarding the stability of neighboring countries, the refugee situation and security implications arising from the Syrian civil war and the expansion of the Islamic State (IS). The realization of our goals ensues through a mix of different tools, foremost through trainings, education and consultation, as well as through dialogue programs, research and publications. These projects and programs are supported through activities in Germany and Europe.

Name: Iran Lotus Movement
Description: To participate in the Iran Lotus Movement is required to follow the ten principles. We respectfully ask members to speak about the statements above with their friends and family and discuss its implication with other people.

Name: AIITEU
Description: AIITEU provides all kind of support to all the people working in IT and ITES Sector at all the major cities

Name: WILWEST
Description: Mit der Standortentwicklung WILWEST entsteht ein attraktiver Standort mit hoher Lebens- und Aufenthaltsqualität. Gleichzeitig wird die Verkehrssituation in der gesamten Region über Kantons- und Gemeindegrenzen hinaus deutlich verbessert.

Name: Konstnärernas Riksorganisation
Description: Konstnärernas Riksorganisation företräder 3 400 yrkesverksamma bildkonstnärer, konsthantverkare och formgivare i Sverige. Vi arbetar för konstnärlig frihet och goda villkor för bild- och formkonstnärer.

Name: Volt Czechia
Description:
This is the Czech chapter of Volt Europa.

Volt is a pan-European, progressive movement that stands for a new and inclusive way of doing politics and that wants to bring real change to all European citizens. A new pan-European approach is needed to overcome current and future challenges, such as - among many others - climate change, economic inequality, migration, international conflict, terrorism, and the impact of the technological revolution on our jobs. National parties are powerless in front of these challenges, because they go beyond national borders and need to be tackled by us as Europeans, as one people. As a transnational party, we believe we can help the European people unite, create a shared vision and understanding, exchange good practices across the continent, and come up with policies together.

A new way of doing politics, for a new millennium.

Name: New Era Colorado
Description: New Era Colorado is a non-profit organization reinventing politics for our generation through innovative social and political action. It is the goal of New Era to get people, especially young people, involved in politics.

Name: Blue Future + the Youth Progressive Action Catalyst
Description:
Blue Future envisions a world where no matter our color or origin, our income or zip code, desire and determination are the only things getting in the way of young people’s ability to push for a transformative and progressive agenda.

Blue Future equips the progressive movement with the best and brightest youth organizers. We pay young people, especially those longest denied access, to develop their leadership, organizing skills, and intrinsic belief in their own agency. In the process, we’re transforming our politics to be rooted in equity, justice and compassion as we organize for an economy, care system, and democracy that works for all of us.

Mission

To continuously engage, mobilize, and connect young people to progressive campaigns, equipping them with the resources, tools, skills, and network to be effective volunteers, organizers, and public servants.

Name: Bundespräsidialamt (Office of the Federal President)
Description:
Das Bundespräsidialamt ist die offizielle Institution, die den deutschen Bundespräsidenten in seinen Aufgaben unterstützt. 

Wir sind verantwortlich für die reibungslose Organisation von Staatsbesuchen, die Koordination mit anderen Regierungsstellen und die Beratung des Bundespräsidenten in nationalen und internationalen Angelegenheiten. Unser engagiertes Team arbeitet daran, demokratische Werte zu fördern und die politische Landschaft Deutschlands zu gestalten.

Name: NIDA Almere
Description:
NIDA Almere omdat we geloven in Almere.
Wij Almere: één wereld in één stad als één familie.

Name: DREAM DEFENDERS
Description: Dream Defenders is a National Black Freedom Organization fighting for safety and a good life for all.  Our membership is made up of diverse youth, young adults and students. Long Term we fight to end our generation’s support for capitalism, project an alternative vision of society, and affirm that interdependence and redistribution of wealth is the solution to poverty and racism, through organizing hundreds of thousands of young Black people into a national movement organization fighting to govern.

Name: Students for a Free Tibet
Description: Students for a Free Tibet (SFT) works in solidarity with the Tibetan people in their struggle for freedom and independence. We are a chapter-based network of young people and activists around the world. Through education, grassroots organizing, and non-violent direct action, we campaign for Tibetans' fundamental right to political freedom. Our role is to empower and train youth as leaders in the worldwide movement for social justice.

Name: Grêmio Politécnico da USP
Description:
Fundado em 1903, o Grêmio Politécnico é uma das primeiras e mais importantes associações estudantis do Brasil, representando os mais de 6 mil estudantes de graduação e pós-graduação da Escola Politécnica da Universidade de São Paulo. 

Ao longo de sua história, o Grêmio teve um papel importante no desenvolvimento de São Paulo e do Brasil, sempre atuando para ajudar a Escola Politécnica a formar melhores engenheiros e líderes mais comprometidos. 

Hoje em dia, a organização desenvolve atividades em quatro grandes áreas: atuando em assuntos acadêmicos; realizando projetos e eventos; gerindo empreendimentos; e promovendo programas de sociais. 

Os projetos desenvolvidos pelo Grêmio se concentram em dar aos alunos a oportunidade de melhorar seu impacto na sociedade, discutindo questões-chave para o desenvolvimento do país, fornecendo conhecimentos técnicos e realizando atividades culturais. Exemplos desses projetos são: a Semana de Arte da Poli (SAPO), que contribui tanto para o relaxamento quanto para a formação cultural dos alunos; a Semana dos Politizados (SemaPol), que traz para a escola importantes pensadores e líderes do Brasil para debater tópicos pertinentes ao contexto do nosso país; os Cursos Parthenon, que geram aprendizado de soft skills e habilidades técnicas; e o Jornal O Politécnico, um dos periódicos estudantis mais antigos ainda em circulação no Brasil, com milhares de exemplares distribuídos todos os anos por toda a USP.

Na gestão de empreendimentos, a associação tem três empresas: a Copiadora Politécnica; a Lanchonete O Triedro; e o Poliglota Idiomas, um centro de cursos de línguas que atende quase 2 mil alunos e contribui para a internacionalização da Universidade de São Paulo há mais de 30 anos.

O Cursinho Popular da Poli-USP é o maior programa social do Grêmio. É um curso pré-vestibular que atende jovens de baixa renda, dando-lhes a oportunidade de entrar nas melhores universidades do Brasil.

Name: Groupe Écologiste au Sénat
Description: Le compte LinkedIn officiel du Groupe Écologiste - Solidarité et Territoires du Sénat

Name: JanSuraaj
Description: Jan Suraaj Party is a political Party launched by political strategist turned politician Prashant Kishor on 2 October 2024 in Bihar, India.

Name: Young People's Alliance
Description:
We are a movement of young people who are making youth voices heard through voting and advocacy.

For more information, contact us at: ncyoungpeoplesalliance@gmail.com!

Name: STIP Delft
Description:
STIP, Students of Technology In Politics, is a local political party in Delft. Founded in 1993, STIP is entirely run by students with six seats in the city council. Although the party is run by students, most of them studying at Delft University of Technology, it is a party for all inhabitants of Delft and gives "a young view at an old city". 

In the 2022 municipal elections, STIP won 6 seats and became the largest party in Delft; a nationwide historical accomplishment! We initiated the formation of a new coalition with a new alderman; TU Delft alumni Maaike Zwart. She is in charge of sustainability, employment and income and economy.

Name: Volt Portugal
Description: Partido pan-europeu, progressista, pragmático, federalista e ambientalista. Queremos mudar a forma como se faz política! Junta-te!

Name: Fundación Pensar
Description: Trabajamos en propuestas para enriquecer la mirada de Cambiemos para que cada día tengamos un futuro mejor con más oportunidades.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Øjenforeningen
Description:
Øjenforeningens formål er at forbygge og bekæmpe øjensygdomme og blindhed.

Synet er uden sammenligning den sans, danskerne mest frygter at miste. Det er også den sans, der har størst betydning for en normal livsførelse. Derfor kæmper vi for bedre behandlinger, så du i stedet for at blive blind, bliver behandlet.

Vi finansierer den forskning, der gør, at vi i dag tilbyder banebrydende behandlinger i Danmark. Vi har givet de danske øjenlæger førertrøjen på, så vi i dag ligger helt fremme i det internationale felt, når det handler om at implementere den nyeste viden i de behandlinger, der bevarer danskerne syn.

Et samlet ’Syns-Danmark’ står bag Øjenforeningen. 

Således har alle Danmarks faglige organisationer inden for øjeområdet faste pladser i Øjenforeningen forskellige organer – hovedbestyrelsen, repræsentantskabet og Fagkyndig Komité, der vurderer ansøgninger om forskningsstøtte. De faglige organisationer tæller DOS (Dansk Oftalmologisk Selskab), DØO (Danske Øjenlægers Organisation), Optikerforeningen, Serviceforbundet, Fagligt Selskab for Øjensygeplejersker og Danske tale, høre og synsinstitutioner (DTHS).

Alle kan blive medlemmer af Øjenforeningen. Vi er en landsdækkende organisation med 16 lokalforeninger, der primært drives af frivillige kræfter. Kun sekretariatets ansatte er lønnet.

Name: Heritage Action for America
Description:
Heritage Action for America is a unique combination of top-notch conservative policy analysis, a widely respected government relations team and dedicated grassroots activists that advance conservative policy.

For too long, big-government special interests have dominated Washington. Heritage Action believes Washington should work for America’s best interest, and we will hold them accountable to ensure they do.

Name: Warnock for U.S. Senate
Description: Reverend Raphael Warnock is running for Senate to fight for affordable health care, protect voting rights, and ensure the dignity of working people.

Name: Kemi & Life Science
Description:
Kemi & Life Science er et unikt branchefællesskab og netværk for distributører og producenter af råvarer og ingredienser til kemi og life science samt andre virksomheder, som er en aktiv del af værdikæden. Kemi & Life Science er en brancheforening under Dansk Erhverv.

Vi arbejder for at skabe tryghed, viden og indflydelse for vores medlemmer, deres værdikæder og deres kunder gennem politisk arbejde, vidensformidling og netværksarrangementer. Dette gøres ved at udveksle viden ved faglige netværksarrangementer, formidle information som skaber viden og indsigt i relevant lovgivning og markedsudvikling, styrke den bæredygtige udvikling samt søge politisk indflydelse. 

Som medlem af Kemi & Life Science får du adgang til et attraktivt og professionelt netværk af distributører og anvendere af kemi. Medlemskabet giver samtidig dig og dine kollegaer tilbud om at deltage i vores faglige arrangementer, rådgivning, vidensdeling og en masse andet!

Name: PRAHA 6 SOBĚ
Description:
Taky věříte, že Praha potřebuje především výsledky pro Pražany? 

Za námi výsledky jsou. Jsme PRAHA 6 SOBĚ, součást pražské městské strany PRAHA SOBĚ. 

Máme  energii posouvat a řešit všechno, co Prahu 6 trápí, bez zatuchlosti a kmotrovství. Není to žádná věda, stačí chtít. 
A co vy, chcete se přidat nebo nám jakkoli pomoci?

Rádi se s vámi setkáme, ozvěte se nám!

 Mariana Čapková - místostarostka Prahy 6 
 Jiří Janoušek 
 Filip Orel 
 Štěpán Barták 
Lukáš Pokorný 
 Jan Matas

#vysledkyproprahu #PRAHASOBĚ #PRAHA6SOBE #Praha6 #kongres #team

Name: Shehbaz Sharif
Description: Official page of President Pakistan Muslim League-N, being run by his staff. Status shared by Shehbaz Sharif himself is signed with his name initials 'SS'.

Name: Austrian People's Party
Description: The Austrian People's Party (German: Österreichische Volkspartei; ÖVP) is a conservative and Christian-democratic political party in Austria. A successor to the Christian Social Party of the late 19th and early 20th centuries, it was founded immediately following the reestablishment of the Republic of Austria in 1945 and since then has been one of the two largest Austrian political parties. The ÖVP won the 2017 election, having the greatest number of seats. Its chairman Sebastian Kurz is the youngest Chancellor in Austrian history and currently the world's youngest leader.

Name: Der Gewerbeverein
Description: Der Gewerbeverein organisiert und vernetzt Schweizer KMU, die nachhaltig produzieren und wirtschaften. Diese kleinen und mittleren Unternehmen (0-250 Angestellte) wollen den finanziellen Gewinn nicht auf Kosten von ökologischen, sozialen oder kulturellen Faktoren machen, sondern in diesen Bereich ihrer unternehmerischen Verantwortung ebenso nachkommen.

Name: Pour Paris
Description: Compte officiel du groupe Pour Paris I Conseil de Paris.

Name: BridgeEurope
Description:
We invest in the future of democracy by building bridges between students and young professionals with vastly different views.

Our goal is to develop the next generation of engaged, informed and constructive citizens who focus on solving the issues of our time.

We are active on university campuses in Europe, the US, and Africa, and run global conferences, programs, and digital conversation formats.

Get in touch: contact@bridgeeurope.org
#BridgeTheDivide

Name: Unabhängige Flugbegleiter Organisation (UFO) e.V.
Description:
Die UFO vertritt bundesweit die berufs- und tarifpolitischen Interessen von mehr als 30.000 Kabinenmitarbeitern in Deutschland. 

In unserer täglichen Arbeit kümmern wir uns somit unter anderem um die Wahrung tarifpolitischer Mitgliederinteressen durch den Abschluss von Tarifverträgen, leisten juristische Unterstützung und betreiben Lobbying auf nationaler und internationaler Ebene. Im Bereich der Berufspolitik liegt unser Fokus auf den Arbeitsgemeinschaften Gesundheit und Aviation Security, der Bereitstellung einer Schnittstelle zur IVTV (Interessengemeinschaft Versicherter im Transport- & Verkehrswesen) und einem Zugang zur BG Verkehr (Berufsgenossenschaft Verkehrswirtschaft Post-Logistik Telekommunikation). Außerdem arbeiten wir stetig an der Weiterentwicklung des Berufsbildes Flugbegleiter. Des Weiteren ist UFO ein gerngesehener Ansprechpartner für Presse und Passagiere bei vielen Fragen rund ums Fliegen, denn wir verstehen uns als Sprachrohr der Kabine in Deutschland.  

Um all diese Aufgaben zu bewältigen, braucht UFO, die sich inzwischen zu einer relevanten Größe im Umfeld von Berufsgewerkschaften entwickelt hat, natürlich auch entsprechende personelle Ressourcen: Unter dem Vorsitz des Vorstands arbeiten rund 20 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter im Hauptamt und etwa 100 Ehrenamtliche in verschiedenen Ressorts und Gremien.

Name: UDW / AFSCME Local 3930
Description:
United Domestic Workers of America, UDW/AFSCME Local 3930 is a statewide labor union that represents more than 170,000 home care and family child care providers in 45 counties in California. Founded in 1979, UDW is a diverse, progressive labor organization that seeks dynamic, committed individuals who will support our members and those for whom they care locally, statewide, and at the national level. 

UDW is one of California’s largest labor unions. We consistently support and lead important social justice initiatives like fighting for racial justice, income inequality, and affordable health care for all. We are committed to respect and dignity for seniors, people with disabilities, and the children in our care.  We fight for better working conditions and fair pay for home care and child care providers, and full funding for life-saving programs like In-Home Supportive Services (IHSS) and subsidized family child care. For more information about UDW, please visit our website at www.udw.org.

Name: L.A.Psi. - Libera Associazione Psicologia
Vote Hemp
Description:
Vote Hemp is a national, single-issue, non-profit advocacy group founded in 2000 by members of the hemp industry to remove barriers to industrial hemp farming in the U.S. through education, legislation and advocacy. We work to build grassroots support for hemp through voter education, registration and mobilization, as well as defend against any new laws, regulations or policies that would prohibit or restrict hemp trade.

Industrial hemp is the non-psychoactive, low-THC varieties of the Cannabis sativa plant.

Name: America First Action
Description:
America First Action Super PAC is committed to creating an America where prosperity, safety and strength reign. Where hard working people like you lead the charge with grit, determination and pride. Together, we continue to forge an America where opportunities are boundless – a first place America where we ALL win. 

America First Action is the only Official Pro-Trump Super PAC dedicated to electing federal candidates who support the agenda of the Trump-Pence administration.

Name: CDU Berlin
Description: Wir sind #bereitfürmehr.

Name: VVD International
Description:
VVD International is responsible for the international activities and relations of the Dutch Liberal Party VVD. VVD International is based at the headquarters of the VVD in The Hague, The Netherlands.

The main aim of VVD International is realising, maintaining and enhancing relationships with liberal sister parties and organizations around the globe and actively participating in international liberal networks. One of the priorities is contributing to the capacity building of liberal parties in Eastern Europe, at the Balkans, the Middle East and Northern Africa. The latter is made possible thanks to the MATRA and SHIRAKA programme of the Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs. The MATRA and SHIRAKA programmes support countries in Eastern Europe, The Balkans, Middle East and Northern Africa in their transition to a pluralist and democratic society, governed by the rule of law.

Over the past 25 years VVD International has successfully supported liberal political parties abroad, through the deployment of VVD’s best trainers and experts, whom provide trainings in field of communication, volunteer management, coalition building, manifesto drafting, running a campaign and much more. VVD International works on a demand-driven basis and organises and contributes to over more than 150 programmes a year.

Through capacity building projects VVD International contributes to the emergence of capable, viable and professional liberal (future) politicians and parties. Projects have been successfully implemented in Armenia, Belarus, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Croatia, Kosovo, Egypt, Bulgaria, North Macedonia, Georgia, Jordan, Lebanon, Morocco, Poland, Serbia, Slovenia, Tunisia and Ukraine.

Name: Asociación de Empresarios y Empresarias Nacionales - ENAC -
Description:
La Asociación Civil de Empresarios para el Desarrollo Argentino - ENAC - es una organización político empresarial creada en Diciembre del 2015 que representa los intereses de los empresarios nacionales pymes, fundamentalmente a los que viven del mercado interno.

Actualmente somos más de 300 empresarias y empresarios de 17 provincias trabajando para construir una Argentina mejor.

Afiliate a ENAC y aprende a defender tus derechos.

Serán sus propósitos, sin fines de lucro:

Generar un espacio común de integración de empresarios de pymes y emprendedores productivos y sociales, a fin de propender a la generación de herramientas capaces de mejorar las condiciones de competencia, productividad y desarrollo del empleo.
Fomentar la formación profesional en temas de emprendedurismo y gestión empresarial, apuntando especialmente a formación de empresarios de pymes.
Promover la investigación sobre las distintas variables que hacen a la actividad empresaria argentina y americana, a fin de procurar el mejoramiento y fortalecimiento de las pymes y emprendimientos productivos.
Difundir y promover los valores sociales y las condiciones históricas que permitieron el desarrollo de la industria nacional.

ENAC es integrante del Consejo Económico y Social y también del Consejo de Argentina contra el hambre.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: California Calls
Description: California Calls is a growing alliance of 31 grassroots, community-based organizations spanning urban, rural and suburban counties across the state. We engage, educate and motivate new and infrequent voters among young people, from communities of color, and from poor and working class neighborhoods to make California’s electorate reflect our state’s diverse population. Through our bottom-up approach, we are organizing voters most impacted by budget cuts and deteriorating public services in support of systemic, progressive solutions to our state’s fiscal crisis. Working together, and including those who are often left out of policy decisions, we believe we can reclaim the California Dream of equality, opportunity and prosperity for all Californians.

Name: Cobalt Advocates
Description:
Nothing should stand between you and your health decisions, which is why Cobalt is dedicated to fighting for systems, structures and policies that protect reproductive rights and guarantee comprehensive, universal access to reproductive healthcare, including abortion.

Our daily work
● We are committed to securing and protecting every person’s access to reproductive health services, and combating all threats to that access -- now and in the future.
● Cobalt realizes policies, structures, and attitudes that secure unlimited and affordable access to the full range of reproductive health services, including abortion.

○ Policy
■ We elect lawmakers who will actively fight for reproductive freedom and
oppose those who work against it.
■ We hold policy-makers accountable for their role in protecting
reproductive freedom.
■ We share information to ensure policy-makers are aware of all barriers and
issues related to reproductive healthcare access.

○ Structures
■ Through funds and support systems, we ensure no one is provided with
misinformation or denied health services because they cannot afford them
or find them in their community.
■ With our Cobalt Abortion Fund, we put special emphasis on making sure
individuals seeking an abortion have the information, resources and
support systems they need.

○ Attitudes
■ We confront stigma and misinformation wherever we see it.
■ Through the powerful combination of community-based stories and
science-based research, we shape the public conversation around
abortion and reproductive health so that it is supportive of every
individual’s decision.

(We were founded in 1967. Cobalt is our third iteration. Previously we were NARAL Pro-Choice Colorado and we were originally known as the Colorado
Association for the Study of Abortion (CASA).

Name: Slow Food UK
Description:
Slow Food UK is a not-for-profit organisation, part of the international eco-gastronomic Slow Food movement founded in Italy in 1989 to counteract the commercialisation of the fast food industry and associated fast life.

Envisioning a world in which all people can eat food that is good for them, good for the people who grow it and good for the planet.

Name: Women in Cities International/Femmes et Villes International
Description: International exchange network of academics, professionals and community leaders that promotes gender equality in cities and communities.

Name: Ben Carson Heals
Description:
America has been injured and needs a man that can heal our nation, #BenCarsonHeals #Carsonheals

Ben Carson had a childhood dream of becoming a physician.

But growing up poor in a single-parent household in Detroit with bad grades and a horrible temper, the statistics were certainly not in his favor.

Fortunately, Ben’s mother, having only completed third grade herself, challenged her two children to reach beyond their meager circumstances through reading and building their knowledge of the world.

As he began to appreciate reading, Ben’s grades improved dramatically and he started to develop what would become a life-long love affair with learning. Young Ben excelled in high school and upon completion, went on to attend college at Yale University where he met Candy, the young lady who would become his wife.

Name: Euro in Czechia
Description:
EURO V ČESKU, in english EURO IN THE CZECHIA, is a voluntary, non-governmental, non-profit association of the supporters of the adoption of the euro who have joined forces to actively work for its adoption, to popularize this goal and to provide public services and educational activities.

What are we doing?

Popularization €: campaign, discussions with citizens, awareness-raising events in schools, associations and other organizations, creation of analyzes, articles and other materials,

Knowledge hub: Advice and professional services in the field of €, archiving of articles on the euro, library of publications and legislation on €, preparation of documents for order;

Think tank: Monitoring and reaction in the media space, active and passive participation in seminars and other related events, lobbying in political circles, associations and companies, monitoring and evaluation of ECB, NBS and CNB policies, monitoring and evaluation of the development of key economic indicators in the EU, associations of pro-Euro personalities, groups, experts and citizens and others.

Name: KeiHart voor Amersfoort
Description:
KeiHart voor Amersfoort is een nieuwe lokale volkspartij die streeft naar meer directe democratie en inspraak voor inwoners, politieke vernieuwing, het oplossen van de woningnood en het leefbaar houden van onze mooie stad. Wij zijn begonnen vanuit onvrede over hoe het stadsbestuur de resultaten van het raadgevend referendum over het nieuwe voorgestelde parkeerbeleid heeft opgepakt. Het negeren van de wens van bijna 75% van de Amersfoorters leidt ertoe dat veel mensen niet worden vertegenwoordigd door het huidige bestuur. Daarom is KeiHart voor Amersfoort opgericht.

Wij willen de huidige politiek openbreken en het politieke klimaat in onze stad verbeteren. Nog altijd besluit een deel van de inwoners van de gemeente Amersfoort om niet te gaan stemmen. De keuze van het stadsbestuur om de wensen van een meerderheid van Amersfoorters naast zich neer te leggen helpt daar ook niet bij. Mensen voelen zich niet gehoord en vertegenwoordigd en dat terwijl de lokale politiek het dichtst bij de samenleving zou moeten staan.

KeiHart voor Amersfoort is dé pragmatische volkspartij van onze gemeente. Wij bestaan dan ook uit mensen die vanuit verschillende achtergronden qua politiek, leeftijd en werkervaring samen zijn gekomen. Wij willen ons voor tal van verschillende onderwerpen in gaan zetten als wonen, bereikbaarheid, klimaat, economie, jongeren en veiligheid. Het is ons doel zoveel mogelijk mensen te vertegenwoordigen en een optimistisch, democratisch geluid te laten horen voor onze inwoners.

Name: ECCC
Description: ECCC is a political organization company based out of 600 L St Nw, Washington, District of Columbia, Cambodia.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Harzkreis
Description:
Wir Wirtschaftsjunioren Harzkreis e.V. sind junge Unternehmer*innen, selbständige und angestellte Führungskräfte aus allen Bereichen der Wirtschaft. Gegründet im Jahr 1991 agieren wir unter dem Dach der Wirtschaftsjunioren Deutschlan und damit Teil von über 10.000 jungen Visionören, die unser Land gestalten.

Unsere Werte:
 auf ehrbares Unternehmertum setzen
 Beruf und Familie leben
 in Bildung investieren
 nationale und internationale Netzwerke knüpfen
 innovationsstark und ressourcenbewusst handeln

Unter diesen Schlagworten initiieren wir zahlreiche Projekte und Aktivitäten. Deutschlandweit, aber auch auf regionaler und lokaler Ebene.

Als Wirtschaftsjunioren Deutschland zählen wir zur Junior Chamber International (JCI) - einer weltweiten Organisation, in der sich 200.000 Mitglieder in 5.000 unabhängigen lokalen Organisationen und mehr als 100 Staaten und Gebieten zusammengeschlossen haben. Deren Ziel ist es, Personen im Alter zwischen 18 und 40 Jahren Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten zu geben, so dass diese in die Lage versetzt werden, positive Veränderung in der Gesellschaft zu bewirken.

Name: Friends Of Sherrod Brown
Description: Friends Of Sherrod Brown is working to re-elect Senator Sherrod Brown to the U.S. Senate in 2024.

Name: D66 Groningen
Description:
D66 Groningen. De grootste partij van Groningen. Sociaal-liberaal. Progressief.

Goed onderwijs. Fijn wonen. Groene toekomst. 
Samen maken we Groningen.

Groningen is een optelsom van veel moois: een bruisend cultureel klimaat, de mooiste binnenstad en goede scholen. D66 wil deze positie versterken. We geven het onderwijs een extra impuls, creëren een mooie woonomgeving en werken aan vergroening en verduurzaming van de stad en de dorpen. Doe je met ons mee?

Goed onderwijs 
D66 zet onderwijs op één. Goed onderwijs betekent een goede start en de beste kansen voor de toekomst. We investeren in voorschoolse educatie, duurzame schoolgebouwen, cultuur, sport en een levendige studentenstad. Groningen moet voor iedereen dé onderwijsgemeente van Nederland blijven, ongeacht je achtergrond.
 
Fijn wonen 
Groningen is een populaire gemeente en steeds meer mensen willen hier wonen. Dat zorgt voor krapte en daarom gaat D66 vol voor betaalbare koop- en huurwoningen en geschikte kamers voor studenten. Maar, wonen is meer dan een huis. Wij kiezen voor diversiteit in de wijken, met goede voorzieningen, speelruimte en veilig verkeer met de fiets op één.

Groene toekomst 
Groningen wordt nog groener en duurzamer, met meer bomen en  extra parken. D66 stimuleert toekomstbestendige energie en schoon vervoer en zet koers op een circulaire economie. Fijn voor inwoners, goed voor het klimaat en het stimuleert de groene werkgelegenheid.

"Samen met inwoners hebben we Groningen de afgelopen vier jaar nog aantrekkelijker en kansrijker gemaakt. Daar ben ik trots op en hiermee  willen we doorgaan. Dus stem D66 op 21 november.” 
- Paul de Rook, lijsttrekker

Name: Allgemeiner Deutscher Fahrrad-Club (ADFC) Landesverband Baden Württemberg e.V.
Description: Der ADFC Baden-Württemberg ist der größte Interessensverband der Radfahrerinnen und Radfahrer in Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und weltweit – mit fast 30.000 Mitgliedern im Land, über 50 Orts- und Kreisverbänden und mehr als 1.000 ehrenamtlich Engagierten. Der Fahrradclub setzt sich auf allen politischen Ebenen für die Verkehrswende und sicheren, komfortablen Radverkehr ein.

Name: Pakistan Peoples Party
Description:
Ayub Khan lost at the negotiation table at Tashkent the war that was won by the Pakistan army supported by the people of Pakistan in 1965. This humiliation enraged the people of Pakistan against the dictator. Mr Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto, a patriot as he has always been, was left with no choice but to quit the Ayub Government on June 16, 1966. Bhutto was determined to bring down the dictator who had betrayed the nation.
To achieve this goal, he needed a political organization and a political platform. He waited for more than a year before he found both; like so many aggrieved politicians before him, he chose to found his own political party.
The PPP was launched at its founding convention held in Lahore on November 30 – December 01, 1967. At the same meeting, Zulfikar Ali Bhutto was elected as its Chairman. Among the express goals for which the party was formed were the establishment of an “egalitarian democracy” and the “application of socialistic ideas to realize economic and social justice”. A more immediate task was to struggle against the hated dictatorship of Ayub Khan,who was at the height of his power when the PPP was formed. Basic principles of PPP enshrined:
Islam is our Faith
Democracy is our politics
Socialism is our Economy
All Power to the People
The Party also promised the elimination of feudalism in accordance with the established principles of socialism to protect and advance the interests of peasantry.
Immediately after its formation, the PPP spread its message among the workers, peasants and students throughout Pakistan, who greeted it enthusiastically. While it was still in this process, a mass uprising broke out against Ayub Khan’s dictatorship and the PPP quickly moved to play a leading role in this movement. After Ayub resigned in March 1969, an interim military government took over and announced elections for December 1970. The PPP contested these elections on the slogans of “ROTI,

Name: Partai Solidaritas Indonesia DPW DKI Jakarta
Description:
Selamat datang di halaman LinkedIn resmi PSI Jakarta!

PSI Jakarta hadir sebagai platform partai politik yang siap memperjuangkan budaya politik yang transparan dan partisipatif; anti korupsi; keberpihakan kepada perempuan, anak dan kelompok rentan; dan juga toleransi di ibukota.

Tahun 2019 adalah fase transformasi dari PSI Jakarta, dari partai politik menjadi partai politik dengan suara terbesar ke-4 di ibukota dengan total 404.508 suara dan berhasil meraih 8 kursi di DPRD DKI Jakarta. Hasil ini merupakan kombinasi dari kerja keras seluruh elemen PSI Jakarta dan tentunya kepercayaan yang besar dari masyarakat Jakarta. Masuknya PSI Jakarta ke dalam parlemen ibukota merupakan awal dari perjuangan transformasi politik Indonesia yang diperjuangkan oleh PSI.

PSI hadir dengan semangat #SiapKerjaSiapDiawasi. Sebagai partai anak muda yang membawa semangat muda dan idealisme, PSI Jakarta berupaya untuk mewujudkan peran wakil rakyat yang ideal yaitu memperjuangkan aspirasi masyarakat, tidak berjarak dengan konstituen, dan menjadi mitra kritis dan strategis bagi eksekutif. Dalam hal tata kelola organisasi partai, PSI Jakarta juga terus berbenah.

Kami ingin fungsi dan peran partai tidak hanya berjalan menjelang Pemilu saja. Setelah melaksanakan restrukturisasi organisasi kepartaian pada bulan Juli yang lalu, kolaborasi antara pengurus organisasi dan anggota dewan dilakukan dalam berbagai kegiatan Fraksi PSI DPRD DKI Jakarta.

Name: Danske Psykomotoriske Terapeuter
Description:
Tak fordi du følger Danske Psykomotoriske Terapeuter her på LinkedIn. Vi er forbund for Psykomotoriske Terapeuter, Afspændingspædagoger og Bevægelsespædagoger fra Gotvedskolen.
Vores opgave er at give vores medlemmer de bedste vilkår, forudsætninger og muligheder - til gavn for dem selv og for samfundet, gennem et stærkt fagligt fællesskab.

Psykomotoriske terapeuter arbejder inden for en lang række felter relateret til sundheds- og sygdomsområdet. F.eks. forebyggelse og lindring af fysisk og psykisk sygdom, ergonomi og arbejdsmiljø, fysisk træning og vedligeholdelse m.m. Psykomotoriske terapeuter arbejder i kommuner og regioner, i private og offentlige virksomheder samt i eget selvstændigt virke. 

Det psykomotoriske arbejde kan overordnet deles i to praksisser: En behandlingsdel og en træningsdel. De to måder at praktisere faget på bliver ofte udøvet i en kombination.

Psykomotoriske terapeuter arbejder grundlæggende ud fra en sundheds-/sygdomsbetragtning, der anskuer den menneskelige krop og psyke som et hele, hvor delene gensidigt påvirker hinanden. Dette konstante dobbelte blik kendetegner hele det psykomotoriske virkefelt, uanset hvilket specifikke faglige område den psykomotoriske terapeut har sit professionelle virke inden for. Ligeledes inddrages de sociale aspekter, som den/de pågældende klienter eller deltagere er påvirket af i deres liv og som dermed har indvirkning på deres velbefindende. 

Du kan uddanne dig til Bachelor i Psykomotorisk Terapi og Afspænding på UCC i Randers og Hillerød.

Name: PLR Ville de Genève
Description:
Née le 26 mai 2011 du rapprochement institutionnel de l’Association libérale de la Ville de Genève et de l’Association des Radicaux de la Ville de Genève, l’Association PLR de la Ville de Genève a pour ambition de contribuer au rayonnement au couleurs de notre famille politique dans notre Cité.

Dans le prolongement des actions menées aux niveaux fédéral et cantonal, elle s’engage ainsi à promouvoir les valeurs de liberté, de responsabilité, de solidarité et d’égalité des droits et des devoirs qui fondent le PLR; de même, son action est guidée par le respect des principes démocratiques, du fédéralisme, de l’État de droit, de la justice et de la laïcité.

Forte d’un réseau de membres implantés dans l’ensemble des quartiers genevois (au gré d’antennes constituées à cet effet) et sous l’impulsion dynamique de son Comité, notre Association entend conduire une politique de terrain empreinte de proximité, destinée à permettre la défense efficace des intérêts de nos habitants; celle-ci a pour but de favoriser le développement harmonieux de chacun(e), dans un cadre de vie adapté aux exigences économiques et sociales.

A ce titre, nous nous efforçons de relayer, au plan politique local, les préoccupations qui s’expriment chez nos membres; à titre d’exemple, notre Association soutient les projets conduits par le Groupe PLR au Conseil municipal, organise la participation libérale-radicale aux élections et votations en Ville de Genève ou encore promeut les initiatives PLR auprès du corps électoral, des instances politiques et des décideurs de la société civile.

Nous nous réjouissons de vous accueillir sur notre site Internet et, nous l’espérons, au sein de notre famille politique !

Name: DI Sydvestjylland
Description:
DI Sydvestjylland repræsenterer DI's medlemsvirksomheder i Esbjerg, Varde, Vejen, Billund og Fanøs kommuner og vores medlemmer arbejder inden for en lang række brancher som f.eks. fremstilling, service, transport, handel, IT og rådgivning.

I DI Sydvestjylland arbejder vi for at skabe så gode vilkår for virksomhederne som muligt, så de står stærkt i konkurrencen. Adgangen til kvalificeret arbejdskraft er ofte afgørende for det lokale erhvervslivs konkurrenceevne.

I samarbejde med de kommunale politikere og embedsmænd er der meget opmærksomhed på, at virksomhederne kan få kvalificerede medarbejdere. Det gælder lige fra dygtige ufaglærte over faglærte til højtuddannet arbejdskraft.

I disse år er der specielt fokus på at få flere unge til at vælge en erhvervsvenlig uddannelse, da alt tyder på, at vi kommer til at mangle smede, industriteknikere, elektrikere og værktøjsmagere i fremtiden.

DI Sydvestjylland er særligt optaget af, at de kommunale rammevilkår tilgodeser de erhverv, der er særligt udsatte for konkurrence. Målet er at styrke vækst og udvikling i Sydvestjylland.

Name: Fetterman For US Senate
Description:
#TeamFetterman is here to bring John Fetterman to the US Senate (PA-D):

Pennsylvania born and raised, John was born to teenage parents who were just starting out on their own. At the time, his father worked nights to put himself through college.  At 23, John joined up with Big Brothers/Big Sisters, and his life has never been the same since.

The disparity between his own life and that of his ‘little’ motivated him to quit his job and join AmeriCorps’ 2nd Year class. For two years, John served in Pittsburgh’s historic Hill District, where he helped set up the first computer labs in the neighborhood and taught GED classes to young mothers and fathers.

He went on to earn a Masters in Public Policy from Harvard’s Kennedy School of Government where he focused on finding solutions in social work, business, and public policy to confront urban challenges and economic inequality.

John then returned to Pennsylvania to start a GED program in the town of Braddock. Once a booming steel town, Braddock in 2001 was one of the poorest and most troubled communities in the commonwealth, facing steep population decline and high rates of poverty.

In 2005, encouraged by his students and motivated to do more to address the inequality that he felt was holding Braddock back, John ran for mayor.

He managed to win the crowded primary by a single vote. And he’s been hard at work ever since.

During the last 10 years as mayor, John is most gratified by breaking the cycle of violence in Braddock that culminated with nearly 5 ½ years without the taking of a life.

He’s applied a hands-on approach from AmeriCorps and his service experience with to take steps towards progress and rebuild this community, creating jobs, getting youth engaged, and bringing creative urban policy solutions to Braddock.

Now is the time to bring these solutions to the greater Commonwealth of Pennsylvania and Fetterman For US Senate is here to help make that happen.

Name: Embu County
Description:
Embu County is one of the 47 Counties established in the new constitution of Kenya that was promulgated in Aug. 2010. It has a Total Population of 516,212 and covers an area of 2,818 SQ. KM. The Population density is 183 people PER SQ. KM. The main communities in the county are the Embu, Mbeere, Kamba and other cosmopolitan communities in the urban centres.
The County constitutes of 4 constituencies; Manyatta, Runyenjes, Mbeere North and Mbeere South. The county is home to Mwea National Reserve and 3 of the 7 Kenya famed hydroelectric water dams along the river Tana i.e. Kamburu, Kindaruma and Kiambeere.
Main Economic Activities include Tea, Coffee and dairy farming in the upper zones of the county, Livestock and bee keeping in the lower zones i.e Mbeere and Mwea. - See more at: http://embucounty1.net/welcome#sthash.uRmciN3y.dpuf

Name: Euro Coop
Description:
Euro Coop is the European Community of Consumer Co-operatives, whose members are the national organisations of consumer co-operatives in 19 European countries.

Established in 1957, Euro Coop is the first European-wide co-operative association. Today, we represent over 4,500 local and regional co-operatives, the members of which amount to more than 32 million consumers across the continent.

Primarily active in food and non-food retail, consumer co-operatives are enterprises owned by consumers. Our members employ 500,000 European citizens, working in 36,000 point of sale, which in turn realize an annual turnover of € 76 billion and rising.

The Euro Coop Secretariat is based in Brussels since 11 June, 1957.

Name: League of Minority Voters
Description:
The League of Minority Voters is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to advancing the rights of minority voters through bipartisan advocacy, education, and empowerment. 

We work to ensure that communities of color have a strong voice in the electoral process and in shaping the policies that impact their lives.

Our mission is to promote bipartisan solutions that strengthen civic participation and amplify the voices of underrepresented voters. 

Through education and engagement, we empower individuals and communities to act, lead, and make informed decisions for the common good.

We envision a society where every citizen—regardless of background—is respected, valued, and equipped to participate fully in democracy. 

The League supports grassroots initiatives that foster education and leadership within minority communities, promote diversity and inclusion at all levels, and encourage collective action toward shared progress.

Our Core Values
— We believe that citizenship requires knowledge as well as the ability and will to act.
— We believe that the responsibility of good governance rests on the shoulders of all citizens.
— We believe that the rights of both majority and minority citizens are interdependent.

Together, we’re building bridges, inspiring participation, and strengthening democracy—one community at a time.

(503) 946-8526 | info@minorityvoters.org | www.minorityvoters.org

The League of Minority Voters is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. 
Contributions and gifts are tax-deductible.

Name: Oui à la loi pour l’électricité
Student Party Front
Description:
Front is a student party in the university council, where it represents the interests of the students. Front is the largest student party of Tilburg University. We were founded in 2006 by three progressive students. They wanted to create more competition within the student parties in the university council, in order to ensure a better academic debate and with that, bringing the council to a higher level.

These students had a clear vision in mind. Even today, their vision can be seen through the actions of Front. Front is ‘Going the Extra Mile’. Front chooses to represent the interests of those students who themselves sensibly go ‘the extra mile’. These students are the heart of the university community and are vital for the success of the university. They create opportunities for themselves and others through their active attitude. These students do more and thus deserve more. Front is prepared to go ‘the extra mile’ for the students who do this as well.

Tilburg University has been increasingly internationally oriented. Front has, since its establishment, marked that the ambition to enlargen the  international character of Tilburg University is very important. That is why student party Front is always pursuing internationalisation. Internationalisation should be reflected in the education of Dutch and international students.

Fractie Front is a young, professional group with a proactive attitude and refreshing ideas. Do you want to know more about us or the university council? Send an email to info@fractiefront.nl or come by at our office (E209).

Name: Der Mittelstand BVMW e.V. Bergisches Rheinland
Description:
Der BVMW, als größte, freiwillig organisierte, politisch unabhängige und branchenübergreifende Interessenvertretung versteht sich als Partner der mittelständischen Unternehmen. Dabei ist, neben der Informationsvermittlung, die Vernetzung der Mitglieder ein elementarer Bestandteil des Erfolgs. Der BVMW spricht für rund 900.000 Unternehmen bundesweit. Mit über 340 Geschäftsstellen ist der BVMW der wichtigste Mittelstandsverband, dessen starke Stimme gezielt und aktiv die Interessen seiner Mitglieder vertritt.  

Im Zentrum der Verbandsarbeit des BVMW bergisches Rheinland stehen vier Hauptaufgaben:  
- politische Interessenvertretung 
- kommunikative Veranstaltungen  - praxisbezogene Informationen  
- Impulsgeber bei mittelstandsrelevanten Themen  

Hiervon profitieren die Mitglieder nahezu täglich, auf allen Ebenen der Praxis zum Beispiel 
 - vom Arbeitgeberzusammenschluss 
- von Expertenteams und Kommissionen 
- von gesellschaftlichem Engagement 
- vom branchenübergreifenden Wissenstransfer.  

Der BVMW in der Wirtschaftsregion bergisches Rheinland verfügt über mehr als 500 Mitglieder aus nahezu allen Branchen. Innerhalb der Vernetzung über den Verband profitiert jeder Einzelne von dem Know-how, das über die Verbandsarbeit gebündelt wird sowie von speziellen Angeboten, die sich auch preislich vorteilhaft auswirken.  

Der BVMW bergisches Rheinalnd sieht sich als wirtschaftspolitischer Visionär und unterstützt den Mittelstand mit flankierenden Beratungsleistungen und zukunftsrelevanten Themen.  Ansprechpartner finden Sie über die Website.  

Impressum: https://www.bvmw.de/impressum/

Description:
La CPME Finistère, Confédération Générale des Petites et Moyennes Entreprises, est une organisation patronale interprofessionnelle, privée et indépendante.

Nous assurons aujourd'hui la représentation et la défense de l'ensemble des petites et moyennes entreprises, tous secteurs confondus (industrie, commerce, services, artisanat), au niveau national, tant auprès des pouvoirs publics que des partenaires sociaux, ainsi qu'au niveau international. 

PARTICIPEZ À NOTRE RÉSEAU, qui réunit des dirigeants venus de tous les secteurs professionnels. Leur point commun est d’être à la tête d’entreprises à taille humaine, d’assumer leur prise de risque et de cumuler nombre de fonctions. C’est pourquoi vous trouverez à nos côtés des appuis pour rendre les solutions relatives à vos problèmes juridiques, fiscaux, sociaux et financiers... plus accessibles.

TIREZ PROFIT DES RESSOURCES MISES À VOTRE DISPOSITION PAR NOTRE ÉQUIPE. Constamment, l’environnement réglementaire national et européen des entreprises change : à nous d’anticiper. Il nous paraît indispensable de mettre à la disposition des TPE et PME des formations, diagnostics, appuis personnalisés et médiation, guides… pour accroître leur possibilité de réactions et leur montrer quels sont aujourd’hui les leviers de croissance potentiels.

PARTAGEZ AVEC NOUS LES VALEURS DE L'ENTREPRENEURIAT RESPONSABLE, qui soudent, animent et portent notre confédération. À travers la valorisation des PME et TPE qui ouvrent pour la diversité, le développement durable, l’animation de leur territoire… et représentent aussi des opportunités de recruter des talents, d’innover et se développer harmonieusement.

Name: Svobodní
Description: Svobodní jsou česká politická strana založená v roce 2009 v reakci na přijetí Lisabonské smlouvy, prostřednictvím které se Česká republika dobrovolně vzdala části svých práv. Vystupujeme na ochranu svobody jednotlivce a proti dlouhodobému trendu jejího omezování ve prospěch byrokracie a regulací. V současné době je strana zastoupena v horní komoře Parlamentu ČR senátorem Jindřichem Chalupským. Hlasitě reprezentovala Českou republiku a její zájmy prostřednictvím svých europoslanců. Strana je tradičně úspěšná ve volbách do obecních zastupitelstev a její zastupitelé dlouhodobě aktivně reprezentují zájmy svých voličů a brání plýtvání v rámci obecních rozpočtů. Aktivní zastoupení měli Svobodní rovněž v krajském zastupitelstvu Zlínského kraje. Nejvýznamnějším orgánem strany je Republikové předsednictvo, které má všeobecnou odpovědnost za stranu a politické záležitosti mezi zasedáními Republikového výboru. Současným předsedou politické strany je Mgr. Libor Vondráček. Strana působí na území celé ČR a je otevřena novým členům, kteří jsou ochotni činit aktivní kroky k ochraně svých práv a hodnot.

Name: Connecticut League of Conservation Voters (CTLCV)
Description:
The Connecticut League of Conservation Voters (CTLCV) is a bipartisan, statewide, nonprofit organization dedicated to giving our environment a voice at the Capitol.

We work to elect champions who will fight for the air we breathe, water we drink, and values we share. During session, we inform lawmakers and the public about key environmental priorities, track critical votes, and hold our leaders accountable in our annual Scorecard. 

CTLCV identifies and tracks state legislation introduced in Connecticut's General Assembly that will impact the state's natural resources. State Legislators are notified about these bills through periodic Scorecard Alerts and asked to cast a pro-environment vote. After each session, CTLCV produces an Environmental Scorecard that grades legislators on their overall votes and makes this information widely available to the public.

Each year, CTLCV endorses political candidates for state and local office who have demonstrated leadership and pledge to make the environment a high legislative priority. Endorsements for the 2014 election cycle are being announced beginning in August 2014.

CTLCV works to get more conservation-minded people involved in the political process by providing the tools and information they need to make informed choices at election time. CTLCV is helping to build a stronger environmental presence in the State Legislature and empowering Connecticut residents to protect the environment.
