Name: The Every Voice Coalition
Description:
Who We Are:

We are a student and young alum led non-profit bringing together students, community organizations and universities to combat campus sexual violence by empowering survivors and students to write, file, and fight for their own protections and support into law. Currently on the ground in 14 states and Washington D.C., we've successfully passed our student-written bills into law in 6 states and are looking to continue to build our advocacy across the country.

What We Do:

Sexual violence policies must reflect the real experiences of students on campus, and the movement must be led by students. Our legislation is written by students, and students lead our coalition, from campus organizing to legislative advocacy.

For 30 years, researchers have documented epidemic levels of sexual violence on our college campuses. Incidence rates are even higher for students with marginalized identities. While no one policy can end campus sexual violence, there are proven measures that reduce incidence rates and support survivors. The Every Voice legislation filed across the country encompasses a set of basic protections that all students should have access to:

• Free medical and legal support services through Memorandums of Understanding between universities and rape crisis centers
• Amnesty policies that prevent survivors from being punished for breaking school code of conduct at the time of an incident, such as alcohol or drug use
• Confidential advising services to make clear survivors’ rights and options
• Public data on sexual violence to increase transparency, measure progress, and improve policy
• Universal, evidence-based annual prevention and response training for all students and employees

Name: Katal Center for Equity, Health, and Justice
Description:
Katal works to strengthen the people, policies, institutions, and movements that advance health, equity, and justice for everyone. Our work is informed by community organizing methods and philosophies, draws on public health practices and tools, and is grounded in a racial equity framework.

Katal utilizes multiple methodologies to secure practical and lasting change:

- Develop and execute high-impact organizing and advocacy reform campaigns at the state and municipal level, frequently through collaborations with partner organizations who share our values. 

- Build leadership and organizing capacity of directly impacted people and local groups –especially among people most impacted by policies we want to change

- Leverage work at the municipal and county level to advance state-based reforms. 

- Utilize public health research, tools, and methodologies. 

- Provide training and technical assistance for organizing, campaign development, advocacy, communications, and more.

- Measure and evaluate the impact of our work and its transactional and transformational outcomes. 

- Practice facilitative leadership, a co-creative model centered on deep collaboration.

Building leadership and developing the capacity of directly impacted people and local groups –especially among people most impacted by policies we want to change – is at the core of our mission and vision, informing every aspect of what we do. By producing more leaders and more effective advocates, we seek to strengthen communities and sustain the impact of our work together.

We practice and teach “shared leadership” and “facilitative leadership” models wherein any given campaign roles and responsibilities are rotated and buy-in is cultivated to shape group decision-making. This helps staff and members cultivate meaningful ownership of the work, develop skills through hands-on practice, and show how to have an impact on the power structures that have caused harm.

Name: Dansk Agroindustri
Description:

Det vil sige en fødevareproduktion, som er effektiv, klimavenlig og med høj dyrevelfærd. Dansk agroindustri er blandt de bedste i verden til at udvikle og sælge løsninger til fremtidens fødevareproduktion. Dermed bidrager dansk agroindustri til at verdens befolkningsvækst ”kan lade sig gøre” og at både den danske og udenlandske landmand, når sine klimamål.

Dansk Agroindustri (DAI) har i 100 år været en stærk brancheforening for virksomheder, der leverer maskiner og udstyr til landbruget og tilstødende erhverv.

Medlemskredsen består af knap 90 virksomheder, der har specialiseret sig i landbrugsmaskiner, maskiner til fødevareindustrien, staldudstyr, udstyr til gylle- og kornhåndtering, bioenergi og AgTech-løsninger.

DAI er medlem af af erhvervsorganisationen Landbrug & Fødevarer (L&F) og ejer sammen med L&F udstillingen Agromek.

Name: Moroccan Diplomatic Society FGSES
Description:
The Moroccan Diplomatic Society (MDS) at the Faculty of Governance, Social, and Economic Sciences at Mohammed VI Polytechnic University in Rabat is dedicated to advancing Morocco’s rich legacy of diplomatic excellence. We believe that diplomacy is both an art and a responsibility—an essential force for fostering peace, understanding, and progress in a complex world. Our society hosts prestigious events like an annual diplomatic gala, international summits, exclusive policy labs, and high-level conferences, offering our members rare, immersive experiences in the diplomatic field. Through these unique and carefully curated gatherings, along with private embassy visits and strategic dialogues, MDS provides unparalleled exposure to the world of diplomacy. By embracing the art of diplomacy, our members refine their skills in negotiation, cultural diplomacy, and international cooperation, empowered to represent Morocco’s values of unity, respect, and cultural openness. MDS inspires its members to become visionary leaders, bridging divides and championing Morocco’s legacy of peace and collaboration across borders. 

Our members take pride in being true ambassadors of Morocco, dedicated to upholding the principles of integrity, respect, and excellence that define our nation’s diplomatic identity. As millennials in a rapidly changing world, we recognize our responsibility to reflect Morocco's rich heritage while engaging with contemporary global issues. MDS serves as a platform for dialogue and a crucible where passion for diplomacy meets a commitment to inspire others. Through our initiatives, we cultivate a new generation of leaders who are knowledgeable in the art of diplomacy and motivated by a patriotic desire to represent Morocco’s interests. We honor the legacies of our beloved King Mohammed V and His Majesty King Hassan II, may God rest their souls, alongside His Majesty King Mohammed VI, whose visionary leadership and guidance inspires us daily.

Name: Mayors for a Guaranteed Income
Description:
Economic insecurity isn’t a new challenge. Wealth and income inequality, which have long plagued our country, continue to grow. Even prior to the pandemic, people who were working two and three jobs still couldn’t afford basic necessities. COVID-19 has only further exposed the economic fragility of most American households, and has disproportionately impacted Black and brown people. 

Building off his first-of-its-kind guaranteed income pilot (SEED) and rooted in Dr. King’s legacy, Mayor Michael D. Tubbs (Stockton, CA) founded Mayors for a Guaranteed Income in June 2020. Member Mayors commit to our statement of principles, and: 1) advocate for a guaranteed income; 2) invest in narrative change efforts to highlight the lived experience of economic insecurity; 3) invite other cities to join MGI effort.

Since launching, MGI has grown its ranks from 11 to 125 mayors. We have supported the launch of 28 guaranteed income pilots across the country, with an additional 15 in the pipeline. In total, these pilots will deliver more than $100 million in direct, unconditional relief to everyday Americans. We’ve also helped shift public support on guaranteed income, with a bipartisan majority (55%) of Americans now supporting a guaranteed income.

Name: TEAM for a Livable Vancouver
Description:
TEAM for a Livable Vancouver was formed in August 2021 by people of all political backgrounds who hoped to create a more neighbourhood-friendly City Hall that would honour electors’ decisive vote for change in the 2018 election.


We chose the name TEAM because we were inspired by the insights and legacies of The Electors’ Action Movement (T.E.A.M.), the party that brought residents together in 1968 to save Strathcona, Chinatown, Gastown and Vancouver’s waterfront from a freeway system. Then, City Hall bureaucrats badly underestimated the desire of residents to have meaningful involvement in the face and future of their city.

We are feeling a similar disconnect today.


We believe Vancouver residents want thriving, livable neighbourhoods for ourselves and newcomers and that, if City Hall listens to us, there is still time to reverse many of the problems that have developed over the past decade.



TEAM will be a voice for all neighbourhoods. We can:


Start valuing the contributions of neighbourhood organizations and commit to genuine consultation with residents instead of surveys and workshops aimed at getting pre-determined results 

Start prioritizing the types of housing that residents say they want and need in order to manage the housing crunch, instead of promoting building to maximize developer profits

Establish an evidence-driven City Hall that will make better decisions, both financially and in planning for the future

Overhaul policies that make doing business more expensive and lead to closed shops and services

Stop taking on senior governments’ responsibilities and focus on core municipal ones such as the streets, sidewalks and parks that make a comfortable, functioning city 

Reverse the downward trajectory of community safety with initiatives aimed at easing the fear and despair in our streets that are backed by research and funded appropriately

Be realistic about Vancouver’s contribution to climate change and ensure mitigation measures.

Name: VVD Venray
Description:
Venray is een gemeente om trots op te zijn. Zowel de stedelijke kern als onze mooie dorpen mogen er zijn. Toch zijn er ook nog uitdagingen. We gaan ervoor zorgen dat we ook in de toekomst een prachtige gemeente blijven om te wonen, werken en leven.  

De gemeente is er op de eerste plaats voor de eigen inwoners. De beste manier om dat te laten zien is door de inwoners beter te betrekken bij de totstandkoming van het beleid en de uitvoering ervan. Daarom willen we vlak naast onze plaatsgenoten staan, ongeacht leeftijd, achtergrond of politieke overtuiging, “Samen voor Venray!”

Als lokale VVD onderschrijven we de vijf liberale kernwaarden van de (landelijke) VVD:
 	Vrijheid
 	Verantwoordelijkheid
 	Verdraagzaamheid
 	Sociale rechtvaardigheid
 	Gelijkwaardigheid van alle mensen

Voor ons lokale beleid maken wij soms gebruik van ons landelijke netwerk door kennis te nemen van de expertise bij andere afdelingen van de VVD. Of om invloed uit te oefenen, bijvoorbeeld bij bestuurlijke of politieke uitdagingen die ons zelf raken maar verder gaan dan de gemeentegrens.

18 maart zijn er verkiezingen voor de gemeenteraad. Bij deze gemeenteraadsverkiezingen valt er iets te kiezen, Een zetel kan afhangen van een paar stemmen. Ga dus vooral stemmen of regel op tijd een machtiging.

Wij hebben heel veel vertrouwen, zin en energie om de doelen uit dit programma te realiseren en we staan klaar om bestuurlijke verantwoordelijkheid te dragen in het college.

Namens de leden van VVD Venray,
Wim De Schryver,
lijsttrekker

Samen voor Venray, Oostrum, Leunen, Ysselsteyn, Wanssum, Oirlo, Merselo, Blitterswijck, Castenray, Veulen, De Hei, Geijsteren, Vredepeel en Smakt!!

Name: Democracy Summer
Description:
The Democracy Summer project trains and deploys the next generation of Democratic organizers and leaders to win elections all over America.

Founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin, backed by the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee, and buoyed by thousands of supportive alumni across the country, Democracy Summer engages high school and college-aged young people in state-of-the-art tactics in voter registration, canvassing and digital political organizing. Moreover, through on-line seminars with leading historians, law professors, political organizers and union and elected leaders, it provides an intensive education in the historical struggle for democratic freedom and essential lessons for effective political leadership today.

Democracy Summer expanded nationally for the first time in 2021 in an historic partnership with the DCCC and multiple campaigns of Democratic Members. Democracy Summer expanded nationally for the first time in 2021 in an historic partnership with the DCCC and campaigns of Democratic Members—and in 2024, more than 110 House Democratic campaigns across America joined Democracy Summer to recruit a new generation of political activists and leaders.

Our virtual curriculum has featured lectures on the struggle for democracy and voting rights from academic luminaries like Harvard Professor Alex Keyssar, who speaks on his books The Right to Vote: The History of a Contested Right and Why Do We Still Have the Electoral College?; expert voting rights lawyers like Marc Elias, who speaks about how to understand and combat rampant voter suppression; elected officials like former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the late John Lewis, a stalwart supporter of Democracy Summer until his death; and labor leaders like the Executive Director of the Labor Heritage Foundation, Elise Bryant, who gives our Fellows insight into the major contributions of the labor movement to political, economic and cultural democracy.

Name: Hauptstadtbüro Bioenergie
Description:
Hauptstadtbüro Bioenergie – Die gemeinsame Stimme der Bioenergiebranche in Berlin

Im Hauptstadtbüro Bioenergie bündeln vier führende Verbände der deutschen Bioenergiebranche ihre Kompetenzen und Ressourcen in der Energiepolitik:

der Bundesverband Bioenergie e.V. (BBE),

der Deutsche Bauernverband e.V. (DBV),

der Fachverband Biogas e.V. (FvB) und

der Fachverband Holzenergie (FVH).

Gemeinsam vertreten sie die gesamte Wertschöpfungskette der Bioenergie – von Land- und Forstwirtschaft über Anlagen- und Maschinenbau, Energieversorger bis hin zu Betreibern und Planern von Bioenergieanlagen.

Das Hauptstadtbüro Bioenergie gibt den vielen Akteuren und Technologien der Bioenergiewirtschaft eine starke gemeinsame Stimme gegenüber der Politik. Es engagiert sich technologieübergreifend für die Energiepolitik in den Sektoren Strom und Wärme und setzt sich für faire Rahmenbedingungen im Zuge der Energiewende ein.

Durch den engen Kontakt zu politischen Entscheidungsträgern und seine enge Zusammenarbeit mit dem Bundesverband Erneuerbare Energie e.V. (BEE) verfügt das Hauptstadtbüro Bioenergie über ein starkes Netzwerk innerhalb der Energiepolitik in Berlin und auf EU-Ebene.

 Mehr erfahren unter www.hauptstadtbuero-bioenergie.de

Name: Danmarks Pelagiske Producentorganisation
Description:
Danmarks Pelagiske Producentorganisation har siden 1984 været hovedorganisation for danske fiskefartøjer, der fisker pelagiske fiskerarter som sild, makrel og hestemakrel til konsummarkedet og industrifisk som tobis, brisling, blåhvilling, sperling og havgalt til produktion af mel og olie. 95 % af de fisk DPPO fanger er bæredygtighedscertificerede (MSC mærket).

Vi arbejder med et langsigtet fokus på bæredygtig forvaltning af europæiske fiskeressourcer samt fødevarekvalitet og rentabilitet i fiskeriet 

Vores medlemmer ejer en af mest moderne flåder til pelagisk fiskeri i Europa og kan bryste sig af særdeles veluddannede og kompetente besætninger. Vi er en del af en velfungerende industri med yderligere vækstpotentiale, der spiller en vigtig rolle i at skabe jobs, vækst og velstand ude i de danske kystsamfund.

Name: janyuva.in
Description: people live better world

Name: Nation's Future Party حزب مستقبل وطن
Description: The Nation's Future Party, also known as the Future of the Nation Party or Mostaqbal Watan, is an Egyptian political party. It has grown to become one of Egypt's largest political parties. As of March 2016, the party chairman was Ashraf Rashad

Name: VdU Landesverband Württemberg
Description:
Der Verband der Unternehmerinnen in Deutschland e.V. (VdU) vertritt seit 1954 als Wirtschaftsverband branchenübergreifend die Interessen von Unternehmerinnen in Politik und Gesellschaft. In besonderem Maße zeichnet uns die Verbindung von unternehmerischer Interessenvertretung und gleichstellungspolitischer Lobby aus. 

Wir setzen uns ein für verlässliche und zeitgemäße politische Rahmenbedingungen für Unternehmen, die Stärkung weiblichen Unternehmertums, die Förderung von Frauen in Führungspositionen und für bessere Bedingungen für Frauen in der Wirtschaft. Wir vertreten die politischen Belange von rund 1,2 Millionen selbstständigen Frauen aller Branchen und Unternehmensgrößen.

Baden-Württemberg zählt zu den wirtschaftsstärksten und wettbewerbsfähigsten Regionen Europas. Unsere Region steht für Tradition und Fortschritt, Vielfalt und Zusammenhalt, wirtschaftliche Dynamik und menschliches Miteinander.

Erfolgreich und menschlich –  so sehen wir auch unseren Landesverband. Der Landesverband Württemberg ist stark und aktiv. Unsere Veranstaltungen sind attraktive Treffpunkte für Unternehmerinnen. Wir bieten ein Forum für regen Gedankenaustausch, wirtschaftliche und kulturelle Informationen und erfolgreiches Netzwerken.

Name: Volt Ireland / Volt Éireann
Description:
Volt is a Pan-European, progressive movement that stands for a new and inclusive way of doing politics and that wants to bring real change to all European citizens. A new pan-European approach is needed to overcome current and future challenges, such as - among many others - climate change, economic inequality, migration, international conflict, terrorism, and the impact of the technological revolution on our jobs. National parties are powerless in front of these challenges, because they go beyond national borders and need to be tackled by us as Europeans, as one people. As a transnational party, we believe we can help the European people unite, create a shared vision and understanding, exchange good practices across the continent, and come up with policies together.

A new way of doing politics, for a new millennium.   We are the Irish voice in Volt and Europe.

Name: Vote Mama
Description: Vote Mama is the first organization dedicated to building the political of moms. Vote Mama PAC endorses and supports Democratic moms running for office up and down the ballot and across the country, Vote Mama Foundation breaks the structural barriers moms face running for office, and Vote Mama Lobby mobilizes a national movement of moms to elect moms and pass *truly* family-friendly policies.

Name: D66 Internationaal
Description: D66 Internationaal is het Internationaal Bureau en politieke buitenlandstichting van D66. Als zeer internationaal georiënteerde partij werkt D66 ook buiten de Nederlandse grenzen aan een duurzame, democratische en open samenleving. Centraal hierbij staan de mensenrechten en vrije en eerlijke verkiezingen die een basisvoorwaarde vormen voor een democratische samenleving. Dit gebeurt onder andere door samenwerking met liberale zusterpartijen.

Name: CAi - Engineering Student Council UC Chile
Description:
The Engineering Student Council (CAi) is an institution founded in 1904 with the purpose of representing the students of the School of Engineering at Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

With over 110 years of history, it has been led by outstanding engineers, becoming an influential entity in multiple historical processes within the University.

Among its main responsibilities are political representation and contributing to the holistic development of future engineers. It is worth noting that throughout the years, CAi has served as a platform from which various social and technological ventures have emerged.

VISION
We are a group of students with diverse perspectives and political orientations, united by a common goal: to create a School of Engineering where all members feel part of a united and engaged community.

To achieve this, we focus on projects that promote comprehensive engineering education, addressing topics such as inclusion, diversity, social responsibility, innovation, and entrepreneurship.

As students, we play a formative role among our peers that complements academic teaching, ensuring that as a School, we work together to solve society’s challenges and drive transformation.

Name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC (JanePAC)
Description:
The climate crisis poses unprecedented threats to our communities, our environment, our economy, and our security. It’s not too late to change our course. But it won’t happen as long as oil, gas, and coal companies maintain their stranglehold on American politics.

In 2020, the fossil fuel industry poured $139 million into our elections. This money has real consequences. Major solutions are stopped cold: the Green New Deal, Build Back Better, clean energy investments, ending billions in tax subsidies to the fossil fuel industry — all because of politicians backed by Big Oil.

Fossil fuel lobbyists and their money control Congress. They block actions with huge donations to politicians from both parties. Jane Fonda Climate PAC will help elect leaders who will rise to the urgency of this moment and stand up to the fossil fuel industry.

Jane Fonda Climate PAC will leverage the donations of those who are climate concerned to counter the outsized influence the fossil fuel industry has on our government. We will make sure politicians who support oil and gas are as afraid for their jobs as we are about the impending climate disaster.

Name: Handwerkskammer Freiburg
Description:
Handwerkskammer Freiburg –  Über uns und unsere Mission

Die Handwerkskammer Freiburg ist die Selbstverwaltungsorganisation des Handwerks in den Kreisen Ortenau, Emmendingen, Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Lörrach sowie dem Stadtkreis Freiburg. Mit rund 15.500 Mitgliedsbetrieben vertreten wir aktiv die Interessen des südbadischen Handwerks in Politik, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft. Unsere Kernaufgaben umfassen die Interessenvertretung des Handwerks, Beratung der Betriebe, Eintragung in die Handwerksrolle und das Registrieren von Ausbildungsverträgen.

Wen wir suchen

Wir suchen motivierte und engagierte Menschen, die das Handwerk mit Leidenschaft stärken und voranbringen möchten. Sie sollten eigenständig, eigenverantwortlich, kommunikationsstark und teamfähig sein.

Was wir bieten

Freuen Sie sich auf ein modernes, dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld, das auf Kollegialität und Mitgestaltung ausgelegt ist. Wir bieten Raum für kreative Entfaltung und berufliche Weiterentwicklung sowie flexible Arbeitszeiten und mobiles Arbeiten. 

Wenn Sie Freude an Ihrem Beruf haben und jede Herausforderung meistern, sind Sie bei uns genau richtig. Bewerben Sie sich bei der Handwerkskammer Freiburg!

Name: IBEW Local #46
Description: I have been an working wireman in the greater Seattle area from the start of my apprenticeship through this day, while simutaneously building and developing my electric vehicle part distribution business. A business that was concieved during the 3rd year of my apprenticeship.

Name: PDCI-RDA officiel
Description:
Le Parti démocratique de Côte d'Ivoire-Rassemblement démocratique africain (PDCI-RDA) est un parti politique ivoirien fondé en 1946, succédant au Syndicat agricole africain par Félix Houphouët-Boigny, avec pour objectif affiché « l’émancipation du peuple noir » et membre du Rassemblement démocratique africain dès sa création. De centre droit d’inspiration libérale, il est le parti unique depuis l’indépendance en 1960 jusqu’en 1990, sous la direction du président Houphouët-Boigny. Il est le plus ancien parti politique d’Afrique subsaharienne après l’African National Congress (ANC) en Afrique du Sud.

Depuis 2023, M.Tidjane Thiam est le Président du Parti démocratique de Côte d'Ivoire.
 
Né le 29 juillet 1962 à Abidjan en Côte d'Ivoire, il un est homme d'affaires, dirigeant d'entreprise et homme politique ivoirien. Il fut dirigeant de plusieurs entreprises dont McKinsey & Company, Prudential et Crédit suisse. Sous le régime de l'ex-président de la république Henri Konan Bédié, Il fut ministre du plan et du développement de la république de Côte d'Ivoire. Il est diplômé de l'École polytechnique et de l'École des mines de Paris.

Name: Republicanos
Description: Primeiro e único partido a ter uma instituição de ensino superior: a Faculdade Republicana.

Name: McGill Political Science Students' Association
Description: The Political Science Students' Association (PSSA) represents all students enrolled in major, minor, honours, and joint-honours undergraduate degrees in the department of Political Science at McGill University.

Name: The “Schools Exchange for Success” Network
Description:
“Schools Exchange for Success” („Austausch macht Schule“) is the network of specialist support and funding organisations for international school and youth exchange in Germany. They have been working together since 2013 to strengthen, support and promote international exchanges among schools and pupils.

The ten members of the group have seen first-hand that intercultural experiences are significant in shaping the lives of young people and in the long term promote better understanding of global relationships.

The group calls for international school and youth exchanges to be firmly embedded in the educational system, advocating that every pupil should have the opportunity to take part in an intercultural exchange of some kind, either through meeting peers from other countries, time spent abroad or through virtual exchange.

The organisations therefore work together to consolidate existing international activity, further develop relevant frameworks and introduce new initiatives to foster and promote school and youth exchange. Conferences and specialist events provide the opportunity for dialogue for teachers, youth workers and other education professionals.

The initiative helps to develop training modules on international school and youth exchange with the aim of having them incorporated as core constituents in teacher training schemes. The network also acts as a platform, providing support for schools and youth groups as they work together and develop activities in the field of international exchange.

Name: Debt Collective
Description: https://debtcollective.org

Name: The Pat McCrory Committee
Description: Conservative Leadership Built in North Carolina, Not Washington.

Name: AOG - Allgemeine Offiziersgesellschaft von Zürich und Umgebung
Description: Die AOG bezweckt die Pflege der Zusammenarbeit und der kameradschaftlichen Beziehungen unter den Offizieren. Sie bietet Ihren Mitgliedern Möglichkeiten zur Weiterbildung durch die Veranstaltung von Vorträgen, Exkursionen, theoretischen und praktischen Übungen, sowie weiteren ausserdienstlichen Anlässen. Weiter, fördert die AOG die Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Offiziers- und Unteroffiziersgesellschaften, sowie Fachvereinen und fördert damit insgesamt eine moderne und schlagkräftige Armee in Bezug auf Einsatz, Führung und Organisation. Damit nimmt sie aktiv die Interessen der Offiziere im Rahmen der schweizerischen Sicherheitspolitik war und unterstützt diese.

Name: Pink Cross
Description:
Pink Cross ist der nationale Dachverband der schwulen und bisexuellen Männer* in der Schweiz. Wir vertreten die Interessen der schwulen und bisexuellen Männer gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung und Öffentlichkeit.

Unser Ziel ist die Anerkennung und Gleichberechtigung von schwulen und bisexuellen sowie anderen queeren Lebensformen in der Schweizer Gesellschaft als auch weltweit. Wir setzen uns gegen Diskriminierung, Vorurteile und Gewalt aufgrund der sexuellen Orientierung, Geschlechtsidentität und HIV-Status ein. Unsere Ziele erreichen wir durch unsere aktive Medienpräsenz, politische Überzeugungsarbeit und eine Stärkung der LGBTIQ-Community.

Name: Climate Action PA
Description:
Climate Action PA is a project of the Conservation Voters of Pennsylvania. Founded in 2021, we aim to engage communities to accelerate the transition to a clean energy economy while advancing racial justice and equity.

The organizing team works to plan community events, share petitions and work with PA constituents to help make such policies a reality.

Name: ESB Economic Forum
Description:
The ESB Business School's Economic Forum is a German public panel discussion on current topics in business, politics and society. The event is organized annually by students and is open to all interested parties.

Every year since 1996, international experts from politics and business have debated a current economic policy problem at WIFO.

Each year, the panel discussions focus on critically examining an economic policy problem. To this end, a diverse panel of experts is invited each year to evaluate the problem from scientific, political and real-world perspectives. 

The Economic Forum also provides an all-round platform for information, exchange and discussion for students, but also for the general public to engage intensively with the topic of the Economic Forum.

Name: Björkåfrihet
Description: Björkåfrihet arbetar med internationell solidaritet, hållbar utveckling och socialt ansvarstagande. Genom internationellt utvecklingssamarbete och opinionsarbete stödjer vi organisationer som arbetar mot fattigdom och förtryck runt om i världen. Genom vår second hand-verksamhet möjliggör vi återanvändning av insamlande gåvor och bidrar på så sätt till att hushålla med jordens resurser. Vi erbjuder meningsfull sysselsättning och arbetsgemenskap åt människor som står utanför arbetsmarknaden och/eller har funktionsnedsättningar.

Name: Erhvervsskolernes ElevOrganisation (EEO)
Description:
EEO er organisationen for elever på de tekniske erhvervsuddannelser samt EUX, SOSU, PAU og HTX. Vi er altså elevernes organisation, og det betyder, at vi kæmper for vores egne interesser. Vi arbejder for god og gratis uddannelse til alle. Det betyder bl.a. bedre arbejdsmiljø, flere praktikpladser og bedre praktikforhold.  

Vi mener, at vi som elever skal stå sammen for at skabe forandring. Og forandring er der brug for, hvis vi skal sikre en uddannelse, som er med til at udvikle os og hvor vi lærer relevante færdigheder. Der er problemer med faldefærdige skoler, bunkevis af lærerfri timer, frafald på skolerne og så videre.

I EEO mener vi, at eleverne er hverdagens eksperter. Det er os, der går på skolerne, og derfor ved, hvordan det er at være erhvervsskoleelev i dagens Danmark. Vi er altså meget mere værd i denne sammenhæng end en hær af smarte politikere og akademikere, som tror de ved, hvad de snakker om.

Name: syntra - Das ManagementNetzwerk Deutsche Telekom e.V.
Description: syntra – Das Management-Netzwerk der Deutschen Telekom e.V. ist offen für alle (auch ehemaligen) Fach- und Führungskräfte sowie den Fach- und Führungskräftenachwuchs im Konzern. Dabei wenden wir uns sowohl an leitende als auch an außertarifliche Angestellte. Dank unseres starken Netzwerks und des aktiven Informationsaustauschs vertreten wir Ihre Interessen und fördern den kollegialen Zusammenhalt. Wir unterstützen Sie mit vielfältigen Leistungen in jeder Lebensphase und setzen uns dafür ein, dass Sie sich bestmöglich im Arbeitsleben entwickeln. So erwarten Sie z. B. ein attraktives Veranstaltungsprogramm, eine exzellente juristische Beratung oder topaktuelle Informationen zu für Sie relevanten Themen – um nur ein paar wenige Punkte zu nennen.

Name: Salisbury City Council
Description: Salisbury City Council was formed following Local government re-organisation in April 2009. Based at The Guildhall, in the historic Market Place, the council operates and maintains various assets across the city. To find out more about us and what we do please explore our website at www.salisburycitycouncil.gov.uk

Name: GroenLinks-PvdA in Europa
Description: GroenLinks-PvdA in het Europees Parlement.

Name: IG Metall Berlin-Brandenburg-Sachsen
Description: Bezirk Berlin-Brandenburg-Sachsen (BBS) der Gewerkschaft IG Metall: In Betrieb und Gesellschaft aktiv für mitbestimmte Arbeit und ein gutes Leben. Superkraft: #Solidarität!

Name: Unlock Democracy
Description:
Unlock Democracy believes politics must work for everyone because currently the rules of democracy aren’t fair.

We bring people together in an inclusive, supportive and inspiring movement for political reform, developing people’s skills, knowledge & confidence in order to build power and win significant political change.

What we believe:

* The government is too powerful because we don’t have a written constitution that sets out what they can and can’t do.
* Big money gives the powerful an inside track to decision making.
* An outdated voting system means politicians don’t represent us.
* Politicians are unwilling to make desperately needed democratic reforms.

Name: Confederação dos Agricultores de Portugal
Description: CAP, the Portuguese farmers confederation, is a socio-professional organisation which regroups more than three hundred organisations spread over the whole country, such as Federations, Regional Associations, as well as specialised associations for the different agricultural and forestry sectors, and even some co-operatives.

Name: Debout!
Description: Association politique de soutien à l'action de François Ruffin

Name: Landesverband Bayern Großhandel · Außenhandel · Dienstleistungen e.V.
Description:
Der Landesverband Bayern Großhandel, Außenhandel, Dienstleistungen e.V. (LGAD) ist der Unternehmer- und Arbeitgeberverband der Wirtschaftsstufe „Großhandel, Außenhandel und gewerbeverbindenden Dienstleistungen“ im Freistaat. Dabei sind wir...
- …die Kanzlei für Arbeitgeber
- …die Stimme des Großhandels
- …verantwortungsvoller Tarifpartner
- …Netzwerkplattform für Unternehmer

Unsere Transparenz- und Informationspflichen finden Sie hier: https://www.lgad.de/datenschutz/

Name: NAU - Netværket af Ungdomsråd
Description: Netværket af Ungdomsråd (NAU) er en tværpolitisk ungdomsorganisation for demokratisk funderede projekter for unge mellem 13 og 30 år, som f.eks. ungdomsråd, ungdomshuse og lignende.

Name: University of Victoria Students Society
Description:
The University of Victoria Students' Society (UVSS), founded in 1963, is a student society that represents all undergraduate students at the University of Victoria. The Society operates several businesses and provides services to students in the Student Union Building (SUB).

The Society advocates on behalf of students on important issues such as increasing accessibility to education, racism, affordable public transportation and environmental sustainability. In addition, the UVSS helps to provide a discounted "Universal Bus Pass" (UPass) to students. The Society administers clubs and course unions and also organizes several events on- and off-campus.

Name: Cities of London and Westminster Conservatives #TwoCities
Description:
Cities of London & Westminster is one of the UK's most active and dynamic Conservative Associations.  

As London's Premier League Association, we support political campaigning across the capital.  We hold regular networking and social events in central London.

#CLWCA
#TwoCities

Promoted by James Cockram on behalf of CLWCA all at 90 Ebury Street, Westminster SW1W 9QD.

Name: Les Tricoteuses Hystériques
Description:
Le procès des v*ols de Mazan a rendu public ce que nous, militantes, dénonçons depuis des années et ce que nous, victimes, découvrons dans la douleur : La justice n’épargne pas les femmes qui subissent les violences sexistes et sexuelles.
Un procès pour viol est encore aujourd’hui dans notre pays des droits de l’homme, un moment où la victime est suspecte. Le v*ol est le seul crime pour lequel les accusés et leurs avocat.e essayent par tous les moyens de prouver que la victime l’a bien cherché. Il n’existe pas de procédure en justice aussi maltraitante pour les victimes que celles pour les violences sexuelles.

La justice patriarcale, imprégnée de la culture du v*ol ne permet pas aujourd’hui aux victimes d’être traitées avec dignité.
Elle n’est nullement dissuasive.
Elle ne permet pas de rendre justice.
Le procès des viols de Mazan a permis de montrer au monde entier la manière dont sont malmenées les victimes de v*ol en France.

Pour une Gisèle, combien d’anonymes ? Les statistiques issues des enquêtes de victimologie sont glaçantes. En France, un homme v*ole ou tente de v*oler une femme toutes les 2 minutes 30 et toutes les trois minutes un enfant est victime d’inc*ste, de v*ol ou de tentative de v*ol.

A l’issue du procès des v*oleurs de Mazan, un avocat, maître Christophe Bruschi est revenu à plusieurs reprises pour cracher son mépris au visage des femmes militantes féministes qui sont venues chaque jour durant 3 mois soutenir Gisèle Pélicot et sa famille. Cet avocat a hurlé face à la foule que son client était libre et qu’il avait un message pour nous :  “MERDE”.  “Tricoteuses hystériques” a-t-il lâché ensuite, dénué de honte et le sourire jusqu’aux oreilles face aux caméras du monde entier.
Lorsque nous femmes parlons trop fort, lorsque nous femmes nous unissons pour dénoncer les violences systémiques liées à notre s%xe, nous sommes décrédibilisées, moquées.

“Tricoteuses Hystériques”, soit. Nous en serons fières.

Description: Senator Tammy Baldwin's re-election campaign.

Description:
Member of Parliament Rajya Sabha l पूर्व राज्य मंत्री (अध्यक्ष पिछड़ा आयोग)

Name: New Patriotic Party

Name: Metropolitankonferenz Zürich
Description:
Vor dem Hintergrund der zunehmenden Bedeutung der funktionalen Räume hat 2005 eine Grundlagenstudie über die politische Zusammenarbeit im Wirtschaftsraum Zürich gezeigt, dass die Kooperation zwischen Kantonen, Städten und Gemeinden optimiert werden kann. Mögliche Modelle sind an breit angelegten Workshops von Behördenmitgliedern und Fachleuten diskutiert worden.

Nach einer Aufbauphase von rund drei Jahren wurde der Verein Metropolitanraum Zürich am 3. Juli 2009 in Frauenfeld gegründet. Als privatrechtlich organisierter Verein verfügt die Metropolitankonferenz Zürich über Statuten, ein Budget und geregelte Meinungsbildungs- und Entscheidungsabläufe. Momentan gehören dem Verein die acht Kantone Zürich, Aargau, Thurgau, Schaffhausen, Schwyz, St. Gallen, Zug und Luzern sowie rund 120 Städte und Gemeinden aus dem Metropolitanraum Zürich an.

Name: Independent Election Commission - Jordan
Description:
Overview of IEC:
The Independent Election Commission (IEC) is the independent Jordanian organization that conducts the democratic elections of Jordan at all levels of government. The IEC was imagined, birthed and developed in a record amount of time. Created in May 2012 as part of the comprehensive political reforms that His Majesty King Abdullah II Bin Al-Hussein initiated, the IEC administered its first election in early 2013 for the 17th Jordanian Council of Representatives. The IEC aims to maintain the highest levels of transparency, integrity and impartiality in the management of various electoral processes, thus ensuring the confidence of Jordanians and the international community at large.

Vision:
To excel as an administrator of Jordanian Elections in a manner that enjoys the trust of citizens and electoral stakeholders.

Mission:
The IEC strives to administer the elections of Jordan with the utmost transparency and impartiality thus furthering the continued democratization and decentralization of the state. By communicating openly with the public and executing informative campaigns, the IEC also aims to increase awareness of the importance of political participation amongst Jordanian citizens.

Key Values:
Independence and Impartiality: Make decisions and adopt procedures freely and fairly without any interference or influence from any other party.
Equality: Ensure that all citizens and international partners have equal access to opportunities and information without discrimination.
Transparency and Accountability: Ensure work procedures are clear and documented, and make all information related to the work of the commission available to all parties.

Name: Young Liberals of Canada | Jeunes libéraux du Canada
Description:
The Young Liberals of Canada (YLC) is the national youth wing of the Liberal Party of Canada, counting all Liberal members aged 25 and under as commission members. The Young Liberals of Canada (YLC) is the largest political youth organization in Canada, and have a proud history of leading change both within the Liberal Party and in Canadian politics as a whole.

The Commission of the Young Liberals of Canada promotes the perspectives, policies, and ideas of Young Liberal members. It is not a separate entity from the Liberal Party of Canada, but is rather a part of it, and mirrors its structure in many ways. There are Provincial and Territorial Organizations, which administer themselves according to their own constitutions and bylaws. There is also the National Executive that runs the affairs of the entire YLC. The organization binds together provincial and territorial Liberal Youth organizations across Canada, and is known as an effective force for reform and bold new progressive ideas.

Name: Blue Wave
Description:
Blue Wave Political Partners is a national political consulting firm that offers tailored political compliance and fundraising to Democratic and progressive candidates and campaigns across the country on the federal, state, and local levels. Blue Wave has offices in Washington DC, Tennessee, Oregon, North Carolina, and Washington State.

Our fundraising services are customized to meet any candidate or committee's specific goals. Our planning and implementation strategies are centered around skilled targeting and processing of donor networks of a variety of politically engaged communities. We conduct fundraising support through successful event planning, call time programs, email and direct mail solicitations, and other tools. 

Our compliance services offer extensive knowledge of federal and state campaign finance laws where it pertains to contribution, disbursement, and reporting activity. We ensure compliance with election regulations when processing, reconciling, and reporting disclosure information in a timely and efficient manner. We provide the resources to anticipate both the general and unique needs of each campaign.

Our non-profit division provides personalized accounting/compliance and reporting for 501(c)(3) and 501(c)(4) organizations. Charitable registration/reporting, accurate and timely financial statements, HR and time tracking allocation, and IRS 990 reporting are some of the services we offer. 

We also offer training seminars for campaigns and organizations on campaign finance compliance.

Name: YATA Italy
Description:
Youth Atlantic Treaty Association è una associazione internazionale formata da appassionati, studenti e giovani professionisti dedita alla promozione dei valori cardine del nostro sistema euro-atlantico: libertà, democrazia, rule of law.
Gli stessi, iscritti nel trattato Nord-Atlantico dal quale la NATO ha avuto origine, ci permettono oggi di vivere in pace, sicurezza e prosperità. L'aumentare delle tensioni globali, il terrorismo e il ritorno di potenze revisioniste però, ricordano con forza come tali valori non possano essere dati per scontati. Ecco perché sia in Italia che in tantissimi altri Paesi eurasiatici e nordamericani l'Atlantic Treaty Association e il suo gruppo giovanile, la YATA, lavorano per preservarli e promuoverli. 
Spesso, noi giovani, sentiamo dire che siamo il futuro di questo Paese, il futuro dell'Europa, il futuro del mondo. Anche, senza dubbio. Ma consentiteci di dire che attraverso un impegno politico, editoriale, associativo, culturale, sociale, quando mettiamo le nostre competenze al servizio della collettività con passione e dedizione noi giovani mostriamo di poter essere anche - e forse soprattutto - il presente dell'Italia, dell'Europa e del mondo.

Name: Status Quo Alkmaar

Bij Status Quo Alkmaar delen we een gemeenschappelijke visie: het streven naar een krachtige, rechtvaardige samenleving waarin iedereen gehoord wordt. Onze beweging ontstond uit de overtuiging dat lokale betrokkenheid de sleutel is tot een bloeiende gemeenschap. Inwoners van Alkmaar verdienen een stem in de beslissingen die hun leven beïnvloeden. 

Wij nodigen je uit om deel te worden van onze beweging en actief bij te dragen aan de toekomst van Alkmaar.

Name: Democratic Municipal Officials
Description:
We connect, elect, and empower Democratic Municipal Officials.

Democratic Municipal Officials (DMO) is a national association of elected mayors, city council members, and other municipal leaders. DMO has over 6000 active members and has state chapters forming in over 30 states. As a constituency organization of the Democratic National Committee (DNC), Democratic Municipal Officials is the Democratic voice in local politics and the local voice in Democratic politics.

Any incumbent municipal official who self-defines as Democrat, even if they hold non-partisan office, can become a member of Democratic Municipal Officials.

DMO serves as the structure through which municipal officials who subscribe to the principles of the Democratic Party can communicate and promote Democratic goals at the local level. We also serve as the liaison between local elected Democrats and the DNC.

The DMO Advisory Board is made up of associations, unions, corporations and individuals who support DMO with an annual financial contribution and also provide expertise, resources, and information to help our members govern better. For more information or to join, please contact Fran Katz Watson at (202) 546-0474.

E’ uno strumento importante ed incisivo di tutela e di evoluzione dell'imprenditoria minore. Lo sviluppo economico, la solidità delle imprese e la crescita dell'occupazione, rappresentano gli obiettivi centrali per questa associazione. Svolge, nei confronti del propri aderenti, non soltanto funzioni di rappresentanza sindacale, ma anche di individuazione e offerta di nuove opportunità imprenditoriali, di regolamentazione degli interessi economici, erogazione di servizi e assistenza tecnica, commerciale e finanziaria.

Name: Governo de Sergipe - Secretaria de Estado da Comunicação Social
Description:
Responsável direta pela política de comunicação do Governo do Estado, a Secretaria de Estado da Comunicação Social tem o papel de acompanhar os princípios adotados nesta gestão estadual, assumindo o desafio de estabelecer as mudanças necessárias para a construção de um Sergipe Novo.

Portanto, propondo-se a desenvolver uma comunicação pública em sua essência, assume o dever de compactuar com a esfera pública. A Secom valida-se do direito do cidadão à informação, primando por uma política que priorize a participação popular e respeite a multiplicidade de vozes, de olhares e de opiniões num movimento crescente em nome da desconstrução da comunicação prestada em via de mão única.

A meta é solidificar, entre os sergipanos, a imprensa e a administração pública de seu Estado, uma parceria através das práticas e dos meios comunicativos. E ao se colocar a serviço do povo sergipano, a Secom potencializa a comunicação enquanto ferramenta também de inclusão social. Pois se queremos uma sociedade mais justa, mais democrática, esta vontade passa também pelo acesso aos meios de informação.

Name: VVD International
Description:
VVD International contributes to a free and democratic world by strengthening liberal values through international cooperation. 

For over 25 years, VVD International has been responsible for the foreign relations of the Dutch liberal party: People's Party for Freedom and Democracy (VVD). Our core mission is to promote and reinforce liberalism by building, maintaining, and deepening partnerships with like-minded political parties and organizations worldwide. VVD International focuses on three key pillars: political education, consultation, and participation.

VVD International designs and delivers training programs for (young) political leaders and party staff from liberal sister parties abroad. Drawing on the VVD’s extensive experience since its founding in 1948, these programs strengthen party capacity in areas such as campaigning, volunteer management, internal governance, talent development, digital engagement, and data-driven politics. Notable programmes are the Liberal International Democratic Training Academy (LIDTA) and the Liberal Leadership Academy: Europe (LLA), supported by trainers and experts from within the VVD.

Within Europe, the VVD is an active member of the Alliance of Liberals and Democrats for Europe Party (ALDE) and participates in the Renew Europe group in the European Parliament. Globally, the VVD is part of Liberal International and maintains strong relations with networks such as the African Liberal Network (ALN), Al Hurriya Liberal Network (AHLN), and the Liberal South East European Network (LIBSEEN).

Many of VVD International’s activities are carried out with support from the Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs through the MATRA and SHIRAKA funding programmes.

Name: "Woher kommst du wirklich?"
Description:
Wie oft hast du die Frage "Woher kommst du wirklich?" schon gehört oder selbst gestellt? Die Frage wird oft leichtfertig gestellt, als wäre sie ein einfacher Eisbrecher. In einer Gesellschaft, in der selbst unter besten Freunden nicht nach dem Gehalt gefragt wird, scheint es erstaunlich, dass die Frage nach der "Herkunft" als so banal angesehen wird. 

Sie ist weit mehr als eine neugierige oder beiläufige Frage. Sie öffnet eine Tür zu einem Labyrinth aus emotionalen Erfahrungen, impliziten Annahmen und tief verankerten Stereotypen. Dahinter können sich komplexe und intime Lebensgeschichten verbergen, die ebenso Traumas, Schmerzen, Ängste und Sorgen enthalten können.

Im Podcast "Woher kommst du wirklich" werden genau die Menschen zu Wort kommen, denen diese Frage regelmäßig gestellt wird – sei es wegen ihres Aussehens oder ihres "anders" klingenden Namens. 

Doch entgegen dem, was der Titel vermuten lässt, geht es in diesem Podcast nicht um die Herkunft meiner Gäste.
Stattdessen sprechen wir über das, was wirklich zählt: die einzigartigen, komplexen und emotionalen Geschichten der Menschen.

In diesem Podcast wird nicht einem Skript gefolgt, und es gibt keine vordefinierten Fragen. Der Gast und der Host öffnen ihre Herzen und Emotionen und gehen auf eine Entdeckungsreise durch ihre Vergangenheit und Erfahrungen.

Name: CDU-Fraktion Berlin
Description:
Mit unseren 52 Abgeordneten aus allen Bezirken Berlins sind wir die größte Fraktion im Berliner Abgeordnetenhaus.
Nach der Wiederholungswahl wollen wir neues Vertrauen in politisches Handeln stiften und die Stadt wieder zusammenführen. Dafür nehmen wir ganz Berlin in den Blick und entwickeln konkrete Lösungen für die Herausforderungen in unserer Stadt. Die CDU-Fraktion arbeitet mit aller Kraft daran, dass Berlin jeden Tag ein bisschen besser funktioniert: In den Bürgerämtern, in den Schulen und Kitas, in der Sicherheit, in der Mobilität, beim bezahlbaren Bauen und Wohnen und in vielen weiteren Politikbereichen.

Name: Instant Runoff Voting for Texas
Description: Instant Runoffs for Texas advocates for the adoption of instant runoff voting also known as ranked choice voting, for primary and general elections for local, state, and federal elections in Texas. With this voting method, voters have a greater choice and a stronger voice in elections as it is more inclusive, participatory, and representative than our current first-past-the-post electoral system.

Name: Women2Win
Description:
Women2win is a broad cross section of men and women from across the Conservative Party who recognise that the party must change if it is to win the trust and confidence of the British people. We support David Cameron's commitment to select more women to fight winnable seats, and to elect more Conservative women to Parliament.

Women2win aims to increase the number of Conservative women MPs, by providing support, advice and training to women who wish to enter Parliament or get more involved in politics.

Women2win is campaigning to promote the brightest and best women the party has to offer and to convince Conservative associations of the benefits of putting their trust in women candidates.

Women2win believes the Conservative Party will substantially increase its electoral support if it makes a determined approach to ensure that the gender of our candidates in winnable seats reflects modern Britain.

Name: Republican Party of Arkansas

Working to build a new conservative majority who will fight for hardworking Arkansas taxpayers.

Our Mission:

The Republican Party will support conservative candidates who are passionate advocates for tax reform, fiscal sanity, less government, smart stewardship of the environment, life, the family, the 2nd amendment and individual liberty.
