Name: Cobranza del Triunfo
Description: Unidad opositora para reconocer a Edmundo González Urrutia como presidente constitucional. Participación en nuevas elecciones requerirá mejoría en estrategias de cobranza del triunfo. Énfasis en enlaces comunicacionales y políticos con la comunidad internacional en apoyo a la Plataforma Unitaria

Name: MassEquality
Description: MassEquality is the leading Massachusetts grassroots advocacy organization working to ensure that everyone can thrive from cradle to grave without discrimination and oppression based on sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression. We do this by partnering across issues, identities and communities to build a broad, inclusive and politically powerful movement that changes hearts and minds and achieves policy and electoral victories.

Name: Kompetenceløft
Description: Vi er Den opsøgende indsats for uddannelse og kompetenceudvikling. Vi udbreder viden om muligheder for uddannelse og kompetenceudvikling til ledere og medarbejdere på FOA’s og 3F’s områder. Vi understøtter lokale indsatser - og løfter mennesker.

Name: Team Cori Bush
Description:
Cori for Us is leading a grassroots campaign that focuses on people first. Our team is passionate about economic and racial justice, Medicare for All, education equity, and the need for fierce, bold leadership in Congress. We are the people and we can run - and win this fight - without corporate dollars. 

This campaign is 100% people-funded because Cori is only accountable to the people. She believes in innovative and equitable policies to ensure everyone has the opportunity to thrive, succeed, and have a voice. She is a fighter for our children, our communities, and our futures.

Cori is the “now” leader we need to represent Missouri’s 1st Congressional District to give regular working people a voice in Washington, DC. 

Follow Cori on Facebook at www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush or Twitter and Instagram @CoriBush

Name: American Families for Vaccines + AFV Action Fund
Description: American Families for Vaccines defends the science, laws, and people that keep our communities healthy. We mobilize the pro-vaccine majority to advocate for science-based public health laws, promote accurate information, and support vaccine confidence and access in legislatures, courts, and communities nationwide.

Name: Future is Now Coalition (FiNC)
Description:
Welcome to the Future is Now Coalition (FiNC)—where we’re not just reforming politics, we’re replacing the rigged system that’s failed the people for decades.

FiNC is building a citizen-owned alternative political ecosystem—a full system shift that bypasses establishment control and puts citizens back at the center of power.

At the heart of this work are two core innovations:

 Digital Politics (DP): A mindset shift that helps Americans “see the game” clearly. It reframes politics from Left vs. Right to People vs. Power, exposing how media, money, and parties control the narrative—and how citizens can break free.

 Digital Democracy (DD): The civic infrastructure to act on that clarity. A platform-in-development that ensures every candidate is seen, every citizen is heard, and every journalist is free to speak. DD will include tools like Politician Report Cards, Candidate Matchmakers, and Real-Time Consensus Tracking—all co-created with (and owned by) the public.

We’re not launching another app. We’re building the digital embodiment of democracy itself.

FiNC’s mission focuses on:
 True Citizen Representation – Politicians answer to people, not donors.
 A Level Playing Field – Third parties and underdog candidates compete without gatekeepers.
 Informed Citizenship – Politics made clear, accessible, and free from spin.

This isn’t just a project—it’s a Meta-Movement: a movement of movements working together across issue lines, party lines, and media silos to build something better.

If you've felt disillusioned by politics but energized by possibility, you’re not alone. FiNC isn’t here to flip the system to a new side, we’re here to give Americans the tools, clarity, and infrastructure to build a new one.

Join the shift.
 futureis.org

Name: Nye Borgerlige
Description:
Danmark har brug for et parti, der kombinerer en klassisk konservativ værdipolitik med en borgerlig økonomisk politik og en utvetydig modstand over for konventioner og overstatslige aftaler, der begrænser det danske folkestyre. 

Et parti, der tager udgangspunkt i det givne og vil udvikle samfundet baseret på viden og erfaring frem for at revolutionere på baggrund af tro og ideologi. 

Danmark har brug for Nye Borgerlige.

Vi skal være et frit folk med en stat, der beskytter os og vores værdier. En stat, der er stærk nok til at rejse den svage, men for svag til at knække den stærke. Men den bærende enhed i Danmark er ikke staten. Det er civilsamfundet og den kultur, der binder os sammen som folk, knytter os til vores fortid og gør os ansvarlige for vores fremtid. Derfor skal individet, familien og de frivillige fællesskaber have gode rammer for at trives og udvikles.

Vores frihed og vores værdier er ikke universelle. De er baseret på et kristent, demokratisk fundament, som danskere før os har kæmpet sig til. Vi er vigtige bindeled i en lang historie om et stolt og frit folk, der – trods vores lands størrelse – har formået selv at sætte rammerne for tilværelsen i Danmark. Vi er forpligtede til at bevare og videregive et Danmark, der er mindst lige så frit, rigt, vidende og lykkeligt som det, vi modtog. 

Det Danmark, vi elsker og er stolte af.

Name: Republican Attorneys General Association
Description:
The Republican Attorneys General Association (RAGA) is the only national organization whose mission is electing Republicans to the Office of Attorney General. RAGA concentrates on supporting our current attorneys general and recruiting outstanding candidates, providing them with research and financial support and assisting in message development. In doing so, RAGA is improving the talent base from which many future Governors and U.S. Senators will be drawn.

RAGA was formed because an inadequate number of state attorneys general were committed to defending federalism, adhering to the law during the course of multi-state litigation and applying a common-sense, free market approach to governing.  In its first election year, RAGA made its mark on American politics by emerging as the only Republican organization to gain seats during the hard-fought 2000 elections. Since then, the impact of RAGA has been significant as the number of Republican attorneys general has increased in six of the past eleven elections, growing from fourteen to twenty seven nationwide.

Description: DI Vestsjælland er regionalforening for de 960 medlemmer af DI i de seks vestsjællandske kommuner. Vi arbejder for at skabe gode vilkår for at drive virksomhed i området. Description: პარტია „გირჩი - მეტი თავისუფლება“ არის პოლიტიკური ორგანიზმი, რომლის მიზანია კლასიკური ლიბერალიზმის და არაძალადობის პრინციპებისთვის მებრძოლი მდგრადი პოლიტიკური მოძრაობის შექმნა, რომელიც გამჭვირვალობისა და ანგარიშვალდებულების სტანდარტების მაქსიმალურად დაცვით, ხელს შეუწყობს ქართულ პოლიტიკაში ახალი ადამიანების მაქსიმალურ ჩართვას, რაც თავის მხრივ უნდა იქცეს საქართველოს დესოვიეტიზაციის წინაპირობად.

Name: Moxie Media
Description:
Est. in 1999, Moxie is a Black, Latina, and majority woman-owned business and the first female-founded political direct mail firm in the United States.

We build power and expand opportunity for those who historically have been left out or left behind.

We champion people of color, LGBTQ+ people, women, workers, veterans, our planet, democracy, and equity.

We show up wholeheartedly to craft proven strategy and bold design to connect, inspire, and win.

Description: LOPI er en forening for 38 lokale banker, sparekasser og andelskasser i Danmark, Færøerne og Grønland. Medlemskredsen omfatter stort set alle danske pengeinstitutter med lokal forankring.

Name: Texas Humane Legislation Network
Description:
Texas Humane Legislation Network (THLN) is a 501c4 nonprofit organization founded in 1975 working to stop animal cruelty and abuse before it starts. We are the ONLY Texas-based organization focused on addressing unjust state animal welfare laws.

As a 501c4, we are unique in that we are able to act as a political voice for animals across Texas.  This allows us to engage in unlimited lobbying as it relates to animal welfare.

Looking to get involved with our mission? Visit our website at thln.org.

Name: Free Republic of Verdis
Description: Verdis, officially the Free Republic of Verdis is a sovereign country in Southeast Europe located on a pocket of land between Croatia and Serbia along the Danube River. Verdis was proclaimed on the 30th of May 2019.

Description: Water Natuurlijk werkt aan Nederland met schoon en gezond water. Een land waarin mensen nu en later veilig kunnen wonen en genieten van water. Met landschappen waarin de natuur floreert en groene steden waar je prettig kunt wonen. Een land waarin landbouw en industrie een plek hebben en ondernemers duurzaam werken. En waar voldoende schoon (drink)water is voor iedereen.

Name: Rideshare2Vote.com
Description:
The Only BLUE GOTV and Transport program proven to increase voter turnout for campaigns, organizations with voting constituents, and Voter GOTV groups up to 45% over state averages. Contact us to learn how we can help you win. 

If a 5-15% voter turnout increase above state averages would help you win, you must schedule a time to let us show you how we serve your campaign.

Schedule an appointment now to learn more.

If you are a political strategist, operative, campaigner and think outside the traditionally taught campaign strategies, then we are the company you will want to hire!

Let us add another key layer to your existing strategies and outreach. Call us today! 888-977-2250

Name: German Embassy Tel Aviv
Description:
In 1965, Germany and Israel established diplomatic relations and since then they have consistently expanded and grown strong in various sectors: Business, science, technology, climate, politics, culture – German-Israeli cooperation encompasses virtually all areas of life. 
With this LinkedIn channel, we would like to spotlight some examples of this very close cooperation and explore further opportunities to deepen even more the bond between Germany and Israel. Germany is Israel’s most important economic partner in the EU, with bilateral trade worth almost 9 billion US dollars in the past year. Products made in Germany enjoy an excellent reputation, and German companies are well positioned on the Israeli market. On the other hand, Israel´s technology-based economy offers innovative opportunities for German industries.
Science and research is another field in which Germany and Israel cooperate closely. Theses relations even preceded political ties. They include long-standing partnerships, for example with the Max Planck Society for the Advancement of Science. The German Academic Exchange Service (DAAD) enables Israelis to study and conduct research in Germany. Nowadays, especially the challenges posed by climate change offer to German and Israeli companies further room to cooperate and excel together.

Name: Grüne Wirtschaft Österreich
Description:
Die Grüne Wirtschaft ist die Organisation der Grünen UnternehmerInnen in Österreich. Wir vertreten die Interessen von Ein-Personen-UnternehmerInnen (EPU) sowie Kleinbetrieben und sind als Grüne Fraktion in der Wirtschaftskammer aktiv.

Globalisierung, Bevölkerungsentwicklung, Ressourcenknappheit, Klimawandel, Wohlstandsverteilung: Die zentralen Fragen der Gegenwart erfordern innovative sowie mutige Antworten und Konzepte – auch und vor allem seitens der Wirtschaft. 

Die Arbeit der Grünen Wirtschaft orientiert sich dabei an den Grünen Grundwerten. Wir fühlen uns der Grünbewegung zugehörig – sind aber nicht Teil der Partei, sondern eine rechtlich unabhängige, befreundete Organisation der Grünen.

ZVR-Zahl 729827890

Name: Wisconsin Startup Coalition
Description:
Advocating for Wisconsin's Startup Founders. 
Wisconsin lags behind other states in supporting Startup founders when they need help most. The Wisconsin Startup Coalition will proactively advocate to policy makers on behalf of entrepreneurs to improve the early-stage ecosystem, accelerating the process that takes innovative ideas and empowers them to become Wisconsin businesses.

Vision: Double the number of annual first fundings in Wisconsin in the next 5 years.

Name: BVMW Wirtschaftsregion Chemnitz
Description:
Der Mittelstand.BVMW ist die Stimme des Mittelstands. Er vertritt im Rahmen der Mittelstandsallianz die gemeinsamen Interessen von rund 30 Arbeitgeber- und Wirtschaftsverbänden mit über 900.000 Unternehmerstimmen. Mehr als 400 BVMW-Geschäftsstellen im In- und Ausland setzen sich für die im Verband organisierten Unternehmen ein. Schwerpunkte der Verbandsarbeit sind die Bildung von Netzwerken, die Organisation von 2.000 Veranstaltungen im Jahr und die politische Interessenvertretung auf regionaler Ebene sowie in Berlin und Brüssel. Name: Ergoterapeutene, Norsk Ergoterapeutforbund
Description: Norsk Ergoterapeutforbund - Ergoterapeutene er fagorganisasjonen for ergoterapeutene i Norge. Ergoterapeuter gir mennesker mulighet til å leve et aktivt liv og delta i samfunnet. Det er ergoterapeutene som bidrar til å finne løsninger når det oppstår et gap mellom helsa og hverdagens krav. Vi er en tydelig og fremtidsrettet fagorganisasjon og det naturlige valget for ergoterapeutene i Norge. Vi ivaretar medlemmenes arbeidsvilkår og yrkesutøvelsens rammebetingelser, uavhengig av medlemmenes stillingstittel. Vi har 4600 medlemmer i kommuner, offentlige og private sykehus og helseinstitusjoner, offentlig forvaltning og en rekke andre virksomheter.

Name: Zionist Organization of America
Description:
The Zionist Organization of America, founded in 1897, has worked for over a century to educate and advocate on Israel’s behalf. Our priority is to support the Jewish people and the Jewish state. These efforts include addressing anti- Semitic activity, lobby missions to Washington, calling out anti-Israel bias in the media, and working with students across American campuses, a growing platform for anti-Israel sentiment.

ZOA Campus is committed to training the future leaders of Zionism. We send committed activists to Israel every year on our Student Leadership Mission to develop their skills and knowledge to better advocate for Israel. 

The ZOA Student Leadership Mission to Israel is a fun and intense two weeks of Israel advocacy training in Israel. Students have the opportunity to travel throughout Israel, including Jerusalem, Judea & Samaria, and Israel's strategic border regions: Western Negev, Galilee, and Golan Heights.  Students also meet with Knesset Members, journalists, policy experts and much more.

Name: American Constitutional Rights Union
Description:
The American Constitutional Rights Union (ACRU) is dedicated to defending the constitutional rights of all Americans.

ACRU stands against harmful, anti-constitutional ideologies that have taken hold in our nation’s courts, culture, and bureaucracies. We defend and promote free speech, religious liberty, the Second Amendment, and national sovereignty.

Name: District Council 37
Description: DC 37 is New York City's largest public employee union, represents 125,000 members and 50,000 retirees. Our members help make New York run by working in over 1,000 titles – everything from Accountants to Zookeepers.

Name: Bundesverband Deutscher Berufsförderungswerke e.V.
Description:
Der Bundesverband Deutscher Berufsförderungswerke hat seinen Sitz in Berlin und bündelt das Know-how sowie die langjährige Erfahrung seiner 24 Mitglieder mit 28 BFW Hauptstandorten. Wir verstehen uns als Ansprechpartner für Menschen, die sich aufgrund von Krankheit oder Unfall beruflich neuorientieren. Zudem unterstützen wir Unternehmen in Deutschland bei der Sicherung ihrer Fachkräftebasis und Bewältigung der demografischen Herausforderung am Arbeitsmarkt. Die Zusammenarbeit und der Erfahrungsaustausch mit unseren Mitgliedern und den Vertreterinnen und Vertretern aus Politik, Wirtschaft und Verbänden stellt einen zentralen Aspekt unserer Arbeit dar. 

https://www.bv-bfw.de/datenschutz.html
https://www.bv-bfw.de/impressum.html

Description: Jüdische Deutsche kommen als Bestandteil politischer Diskussionen zu wenig vor. Dies, obwohl seitens der Politik durchaus Interesse an einem breiten Meinungsaustausch besteht. Grade in Zeiten, in denen der gesellschaftliche Konsens neu verhandelt zu werden scheint, ist es wichtig, sich Gehör zu verschaffen.

Name: United Voice
Description:
United Voice is one of Australia's largest unions. United Voice members work in a wide range of occupations including hospitality, property services, health & aged care, manufacturing, mining & miscellaneous and childcare.

United Voice is a smart and ambitious union that acts on the values of fairness, compassion and equity. Members are the heart and soul of United Voice, and inspire the union’s action. We are active in the workplace, the community and in politics, in order to achieve positive change and build the type of society we believe in.

Name: VdU Landesverband Bayern-Süd
Description:
Der Verband der Unternehmerinnen in Deutschland e.V. (VdU) vertritt seit 1954 als Wirtschaftsverband branchenübergreifend die Interessen von Unternehmerinnen in Politik und Gesellschaft. In besonderem Maße zeichnet uns die Verbindung von unternehmerischer Interessenvertretung und gleichstellungspolitischer Lobby aus. 

Wir setzen uns ein für verlässliche und zeitgemäße politische Rahmenbedingungen für Unternehmen, die Stärkung weiblichen Unternehmertums, die Förderung von Frauen in Führungspositionen und für bessere Bedingungen für Frauen in der Wirtschaft. Wir vertreten die politischen Belange von rund 1,2 Millionen selbstständigen Frauen aller Branchen und Unternehmensgrößen.

Die Region in und um München zählt seit Jahren zum innovativsten und erfolgreichsten Wirtschaftsstandort Europas. Ein breites Spektrum an wachstumsstarken Unternehmensbranchen, großen und mittelständischen Unternehmen, sowie vielen Forschungs- und Bildungseinrichtungen machen unseren Wirtschaftsraum attraktiv.

Mit Unternehmerinnengesprächen, Unternehmensbesuchen und einer Vielzahl weiterer wirtschaftlicher, politischer und kultureller Veranstaltungen sorgt unser Landesverband für eine intensive Vernetzung. Uns ist der Erfahrungsaustausch von Unternehmerinnen auf Augenhöhe wichtig. In regem Austausch mit Politik, Wissenschaft und anderen Organisationen sowie Managern setzen wir uns für die Interessen von unternehmerisch tätigen Frauen ein und erhöhen ihre Sichtbarkeit.

Name: Republican State Leadership Committee
Description: The Republican State Leadership Committee is the largest national organization focused on electing Republicans to state offices in every corner of the nation.

Name: PowerShift e.V.
Description:
PowerShift (Verein für eine ökologisch-solidarische Energie- & Weltwirtschaft e.V., Berlin) wurde 2010 gegründet. Das Ziel des Vereins ist die Transformation der Energie- und Weltwirtschaft im Sinne sozialer und ökologischer Gerechtigkeit. PowerShift ist Think Tank, Netzwerkerin und Lobbyistin für sozial-ökologische Veränderungen. Gemeinsam mit unseren Partnern in Deutschland, Europa und weltweit analysieren wir die Entwicklungen in unseren Themenfeldern Handel/Investitionen, Energiepolitik, Mobilität und Rohstoffe. Wir publizieren und qualifizieren, schmieden Netzwerke und Bündnisse und nehmen Einfluss auf politische Entscheidungsprozesse. Wir wenden uns an politische Entscheidungsträger*innen, damit diese Rahmenbedingungen schaffen, die nachhaltige Entwicklungen fördern und an die interessierte Zivilgesellschaft, damit genügend Veränderungsdruck entsteht. 

Unsere Social Media Community Netiquette fürs gutes Klima unter unseren Beiträgen: https://power-shift.de/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/PowerShift_Netiquette.pdf

Name: Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS) UK & Ireland
Description:
As a political foundation, the Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS) closely collaborates with partners in the fields of politics, think tanks, academia, and civil society in the United Kingdom and Ireland. Political dialogue, analysis, and information dissemination are our core tasks. Our goal is to strengthen cross-border cooperation and mutual understanding. We achieve this through a variety of projects and dialogue programs aimed at enhancing people's understanding of each other and enabling more effective collaboration.

We contribute to fostering constructive and friendly dialogue in the face of significant political challenges. Our annual German-British Dialogue in Cadenabbia, our flagship political project, brings together German and British parliamentarians to discuss current political developments and explore avenues for bilateral cooperation.

In line with our project objectives, we facilitate the exchange of ideas, knowledge, and solutions with think tanks and academic institutions to address current issues. By exchanging insights and experiences, we strengthen relationships between Germany, the United Kingdom, and Ireland, as well as within our broader European and international network.

Follow us for updates, reports, and more!

Enjoy!

Name: SPD-Bundestagsfraktion
Description:
Die gewählten Mitglieder der Sozialdemokratischen Partei Deutschlands bilden gemeinsam die SPD-Bundestagsfraktion und vertreten die sozialdemokratische Politik im Deutschen Bundestag. Die SPD-Bundestagsfraktion setzt sich für die 21. Legislaturperiode derzeit aus 120 Abgeordneten zusammen.

Zentrale Aufgabe der SPD-Bundestagsfraktion ist es, sich an den programmatischen Positionen der Partei zu orientieren und diese unter Beachtung der jeweiligen Gegebenheiten und Möglichkeiten und der parlamentarischen Spielregeln im Bundestag in praktische Politik umzusetzen.

Die Fraktion erfüllt diesen Auftrag dadurch, dass sie nach gründlicher Diskussion in Arbeitsgruppen, Querschnittsgruppen, im Fraktionsvorstand und in der Gesamtfraktion ihre Entscheidungen durch Abstimmung trifft und die so getroffenen Entscheidungen im Bundestag geschlossen vertritt.

Die Arbeit einer großen Fraktion wie der SPD-Bundestagsfraktion muss geplant, koordiniert und organisiert werden. Das ist die Aufgabe des Fraktionsvorstandes. Er berät die langfristigen Ziele und bereitet die aktuelle parlamentarische Arbeit vor. Die Entscheidungen treffen aber alle Abgeordneten nach Information durch die Ausschussarbeitsgruppen in den Fraktionssitzungen.  

Für die laufenden Geschäfte ist der Geschäftsführende Fraktionsvorstand zuständig. Er setzt sich aus dem Fraktionsvorsitzenden, den Stellvertretern:innen und den Parlamentarischen Geschäftsführern:innen zusammen.     

Die Stellvertretenden Vorsitzenden sind an erster Stelle für bestimmte politische Bereiche zuständig. Sie koordinieren die Arbeit der Arbeitsgruppen aus den ihnen zugeordneten Bereichen. Für die Durchführung der organisatorischen Aufgaben der Fraktionsverwaltung sind die Parlamentarischen Geschäftsführer:innen verantwortlich.

Die SPD-Fraktion hat am 7. Mai 2025 den Abgeordneten Dr. Matthias Miersch zum Vorsitzenden gewählt.

Name: Red Horse Strategies
Description:
Red Horse Strategies knows campaigns. From smaller local races to statewide battles, we know how to start campaigns, how to improve campaigns, how to keep them nimble and most importantly, how to win. Our approach is hands-on: we don't just fly in to town on special occasions or for the victory party. We are embedded in all our campaigns, overseeing the planning and management, paying attention to the details and getting our hands dirty.

As your consultants, we work with you to develop your campaign plan, budget and message, then stay a part of your team to make sure it is executed properly. At RHS, we are deeply involved in your campaign's operation because experience has taught us that close races are won or lost based on the strength of the plan, and the skill of the execution.

Your win is as important to us as it is to you, so we make sure that it is managed smartly, efficiently and effectively.

Name: Verband Freier Berufe in Bayern e.V.
Description: Verband Freier Berufe in Bayern E.V. is a company based out of 55 Türkenstr., München, Germany.

Name: Political Consulting
Description: Political Consulting or PoliticalConsulting.com are the first fully integrated Online Political Consultants. Sure mailers work, but if that is your idea of a creative political campaign, we probably aren't the right team for you. We use cutting edge methods to help get you in front of your "best fans" and easily let them share your message to those that are most likely to listen to them.....their friends.

Name: Bundesverband Carsharing e.V.
Description: Der Bundesverband Carsharing e.V. (bcs) ist der Dachverband der deutschen Carsharing-Anbieter. Ziel des Verbandes und seiner Mitglieder ist es, den Autobestand und Autoverkehr sowie die Umweltbelastung durch den motorisierten Individualverkehr zu verringern. Wir fördern Carsharing als Teil einer ressourcenschonenden und klimaneutralen Mobilität in enger Zusammenarbeit mit den weiteren Akteuren des Umweltverbunds.

Name: Undeb Bangor, Bangor Students' Union
Description:
A charity organisation that works to defend and extend the rights of students at Bangor University.

Based in Bangor, Gwynedd.

Name: Dyrebeskyttelsen Norge
Description: Dyrebeskyttelsen Norge er en av de eldste dyrevelferdsorganisasjonene i verden, stiftet i 1859.

Name: Grenspost Düsseldorf
Description: Op deze LinkedInpagina krijgt u een kijkje in de keuken van de interprovinciale post van Gelderland, Overijssel, Limburg & Zuid-Holland in Düsseldorf. Onder de naam Grenspost Düsseldorf zetten de ‘Deutschlandbeauftragten’ van deze provincies zich in voor het versterken van de grensoverschrijdende samenwerking met Duitsland.

Name: Children Of Capital
Description:
Children of Capital is a bold and ambitious nonprofit newsletter founded by Anviksha Singh, a passionate academic and researcher. We are dedicated to political activism, offering unique perspectives on politics and economics through the lens of Indian ethnicities and cultural experiences. 

At the core of our work is the belief that now is a crucial moment for India’s youth to drive meaningful, grassroots political change. Inspired by the revolutionary spirit of Shaheed Bhagat Singh, we explore the dynamics of late-stage capitalism and the potential of India to shape the future on a global scale.

Through raw and insightful commentary, Children of Capital seeks to foster political reinvention and provoke essential conversations that challenge the status quo. Join us as we bring attention to the urgent need for reform in India's political landscape.

Mail us your opinions on- childrenofcapitalnewsletter@gmail.com

Follow us on- https://www.instagram.com/coc.newsletter?igsh=cm9wNThlNjdvd2ox

Name: DIVERSITRY e.V.
Description: DIVERSITRY e.V. aims at promoting diversity and inclusion across all agencies and offices of the German Federal Administration. DIVERSITRY e.V. connects ministerial diversity initiatives, advocates for equality, and paves the way for long-lasting changes. We want to amplify the voices of BIPoC and increase representation across all agencies. We thereby aspire to a Federal Administration which reflects the diversity of our society and acknowledges the unique potential of each employee for its future viability. Our vision is a society in which someone's ethnical or cultural background constitutes not a limitation but a celebrated core strength in an increasingly globalized world.

Name: Honorary Consulate of India in Stuttgart
Description:
The tasks of the Honorary Consulate include the maintenance and development of Indo-German relations. To this end, events with a link to India are regularly organised and delegations are received. Furthermore, the Honorary Consulate is available as a point of contact.

Honorary Consul Andreas Lapp is committed to promoting and developing relations between Germany and India in the fields of business, trade, tourism, culture, education and science.

The Honorary Consulate does not process any visa applications for travel to India.

Enquiries are only processed by email: info@honorarkonsulat-indien.de

Name: epicenter.works
Description: "epicenter.works for digital rights" is an Austria-based fundamental rights NGO with a focus on privacy and freedom of speech on the internet. Formerly known as the Working Group on Data Retention Austria (AKVorrat) the organisation succeeded with its complaint in the in the Court of Justice of the European Union that lead to the abolishment of the EU Data Retention Directive in 2014. It also played a leading role in the political debate on net neutrality protections in the EU via the campaign SaveTheInternet.eu. The aim of the organisation is to protect fundamental rights online and offline. To this end, epicenter.works closely follows legislative processes on the national and EU level, and provides tools to empower citizens to make their voices heard.

Name: Shannon Stubbs
Description: Member of Parliament for Lakeland Alberta and Conservative Shadow Minister for Public Safety and Emergency Preparedness

Name: Shawmut Services LLC
Description:
Shawmut Services is a full-service strategic planning, organizing, and grassroots mobilization firm that leads successful campaigns and programs throughout the country.

Our team has helped build winning presidential campaigns, drive one of the country's largest progressive advocacy operations, run battleground state parties, and managed successful canvass, voter registration, and signature-gathering operations throughout the country.

Name: The Rubin Report
Description:
Based in Miami, The Rubin Report is an independent talk show centered on free speech and cultural discourse, with annual viewership exceeding one billion and a global subscriber base in the millions.

Hosted by bestselling author and commentator Dave Rubin, the show features long-form, unfiltered conversations on politics, culture, religion, and current events. From one-on-one interviews in The Sit Down, to honest group discussions in The Round Table, to Rubin’s own raw commentary in Direct Message, the show is a space for real dialogue.

Previous guests have included comedians like Bill Maher, political figures such as Donald Trump, intellectuals like Jordan Peterson as well as public figures across tech, media, and entertainment—from Peter Thiel to Tony Robbins.

Fan-funded by a global audience and distributed across YouTube and all major podcast platforms, the show continues to be a top-ranking destination for viewers and listeners seeking truth, depth, and open conversation.

Name: Volt România
Description:
Volt România este un partid politic român şi reprezintă capitolul naţional al Volt Europa, o mişcare progresistă, pan-europeană, care propune o nouă viziune și un nou mod de a face politică, bazat pe soluții adaptate pragmatic și inovativ idealurilor comune europene.
Valorile noastre fundamentale sunt libertatea, egalitatea de oportunități și demnitate, statul de drept, transparența și incluziunea.
Practica noastră politică este structurată de principiile democrației participative, implementată printr-o structură minimal-ierarhică și facilitată de platforme de comunicare și colaborare paneuropene. Tuturor membrilor li se garantează posibilitatea de a contribui semnificativ la luarea deciziilor indiferent de statut sau identitate.

Name: Bager- og Konditormestre i Danmark
Description:
”Bager- og Konditormestre i Danmark sikrer optimale vilkår for – og understøtter aktivt udviklingen af – fremtidens innovative bager- og konditorvirksomheder i Danmark.

Det gør vi gennem målrettet politisk arbejde samt gennem en individuel, proaktiv medlemsrådgivning, der er baseret på faglighed, nytænkning, unikke produkter og ydelser samt målrettet kommunikation.”

Derfor er Bager- og Konditormestre i Danmark (BKD) en højt specialiseret brancheforening, som 100% er til for dig. Det betyder, at vi er der, lige når du har brug for det. Vi er klar til at hjælpe og rådgive dig på et højt fagligt niveau i forhold til lige netop dine behov og den hverdag, du befinder dig i. For vores klare målsætning er, at vi er til for at styrke din forretning! Og vi lader det ikke bare blive ved snakken. Vi handler!

Som medlem af BKD kan du med rette forvente lidt mere – hver eneste dag. Det er vores målsætning, at et medlemskab af BKD skal give synlig merværdi for den enkelte virksomhed. Det er grunden til, at BKDs sekretariat udgøres af et team af engagerede eksperter med en stor praktisk viden om bager- og konditorbranchen. Det er også grunden til, at vi har sammensat en unik palet af ydelser, som i detaljer er skræddersyet til branchen og til dit personlige behov. Vi vil gøre vores til, at det bliver nemmere og mere profitabelt for dig at drive bager- og konditorvirksomhed.

Name: Forbundet for Ledelse og Teknikk (FLT)
Description: Vi er en del av Forbundet Styrke, som organiserer 80.000 medlemmer innen olje-, gass- og landindustri, ledelse, teknikk og arbeidsinkludering.

Name: Both Parents Matter
Description:
Our vision is of a society where every child is enabled and supported to maintain a meaningful and loving relationship with both parents and their wider families.

Since 1974, Both Parents Matter (formerly Families Need Fathers) has been dedicated to ensuring that every child has the opportunity to maintain meaningful relationships with both parents and their wider family after separation. We believe that children thrive when they are supported in a loving and stable environment, free from unnecessary conflict. 

Our charity is built on the values of advocacy, compassion, and collaboration. Through collaboration with policymakers, legal systems, and community partners, we work to create societal attitudes toward shared parenting and lasting change in family law—helping to build stronger families, healthier communities, and a more efficient support system for separated families. At Both Parents Matter, we are committed to building a society where all children can thrive, regardless of family circumstances.

Name: Bündnis 90/Die Grünen Berlin
Description: Bündnis 90/Die Grünen Berlin is a political organization company based out of Germany.

Name: Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion NRW
Description: Die Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion (MIT) ist eine Gliederung der CDU und versteht sich als Mittler zu Handel, Handwerk, freien Berufen, leitenden Angestellten in Wirtschaft und Verwaltung und denjenigen, die sich dem Mittelstand zugehörig fühlen.

Name: Österreichische Ärztekammer
Description: Die Österreichische Ärztekammer (ÖÄK) ist die gesetzliche Standesvertretung von über 44.000 Ärztinnen und Ärzten in ganz Österreich. Sie vertritt die beruflichen, sozialen und wirtschaftlichen Interessen der Ärzteschaft. Sie sorgt außerdem für die Wahrung des Ansehens, der Rechte und der Einhaltung der Pflichten der Ärztinnen und Ärzte. Die ÖÄK fungiert als öffentlich-rechtlicher Dachverband für die neun Landesärztekammern. An ihrer Spitze steht der Präsident der ÖÄK. Er wird von drei Vizepräsidenten unterstützt, wobei ein Vizepräsident die Bundeskurie Angestellte Ärzte und einer die Bundeskurie Niedergelassene Ärzte leitet. Die ÖÄK versteht sich als tragendes Element im österreichischen Gesundheitswesen. Sie setzt Initiativen, um das Gesundheitswesen an die sich ständig ändernden Gegebenheiten in Gesellschaft und Politik anzupassen. Die ÖÄK steht für Innovationsbereitschaft, Verantwortungsbewusstsein und zeitlose ethische sowie ärztliche Werte.

Name: Feeding Rocks
Description: In his twenties, the Honorable Eric Dick was a Papa John's pizza delivery driver. He dreamed big and never lost faith, and today, he owns Dick Law Firm. He represents thousands of Houston consumers with denied or underpaid property insurance claims (e.g., home insurance disputes against Allstate). As a lifetime learner, he was fortunate to start an MBA at Rice University during the Coronavirus pandemic. Giving back to the public is crucial to Eric Dick. He has written a book on Texas History. He served an unpaid elected position as a trustee for the Harris County Department of Education and worked as president of the board of trustees. They've done some great stuff there, like starting Texas's first public recovery high school, an initiative to increase child literacy, and a program to reimburse teachers for their expenses when buying students' school supplies. Eric Dick is happily married to Danielle, and they share two beautiful daughters, Grace and Caroline.

Name: The Association of Black Conservatives
Description:
The Association of Black Conservatives is a national organization with chapters across Canada. 

We promote conservative values and believe our prosperity as Canadians is assured when we maintain strict fidelity to principles of equality for all.

Name: New Jersey Young Democrats
Description: The New Jersey Young Democrats (in conjunction with the NJDSC Youth Caucus) is the official youth arm of the New Jersey Democratic State Committee. From ages 14-36, our members are making a difference at all levels of government. From grassroots activists to governmental staffers to elected officials the NJ Young Dems are working to effect progressive change in the great State of New Jersey.

Name: LOAD e.V. - Association for Liberal Internet Policy
Description: The Internet is a promise of freedom. In LOAD, people gather who work together to protect this freedom. LOAD is a think tank and representation of interests and promotes the current and future net citizens in the realisation of their fundamental rights. We constructively support societies digital change. Our fundamental values are freedom, personal responsibility and an unprejudiced interest in innovation.

Name: Ministério das Finanças
Description: Conta Oficial do Gabinete do Ministro das Finanças - XXIII Governo

Name: International Political Campaigns Expo
Description: The world's premier platform for political parties, campaign experts, political strategists, academics, and innovators shaping the future of political campaigns.

Name: VdU Landesverband Rheinland
Description:
Der Verband der Unternehmerinnen in Deutschland e.V. (VdU) vertritt seit 1954 als Wirtschaftsverband branchenübergreifend die Interessen von Unternehmerinnen in Politik und Gesellschaft. In besonderem Maße zeichnet uns die Verbindung von unternehmerischer Interessenvertretung und gleichstellungspolitischer Lobby aus. 

Wir setzen uns ein für verlässliche und zeitgemäße politische Rahmenbedingungen für Unternehmen, die Stärkung weiblichen Unternehmertums, die Förderung von Frauen in Führungspositionen und für bessere Bedingungen für Frauen in der Wirtschaft. Wir vertreten die politischen Belange von rund 1,2 Millionen selbstständigen Frauen aller Branchen und Unternehmensgrößen.

Von Koblenz bis an die niederländische Grenze erstreckt sich das Gebiet des Landesverbands Rheinland. Als ältester Landesverband, der gleichzeitig mit dem VdU 1954 in Köln gegründet worden ist, kombinieren wir Tradition mit Innovation.

Wir stehen für den wirtschaftlichen Fortschritt in Nordrhein-Westfalen und unsere Mitglieder sind kompetente Gesprächspartnerinnen für Politik und Gesellschaft. Wir engagieren uns für eine starke Wirtschaftsregion, schauen auch über den regionalen Tellerrand und haben Interesse an internationalen Kontakten. Neben den überregionalen Veranstaltungen wie Betriebsführungen, Diskussionsrunden oder Vorträgen finden auch in den Regionalkreisen regelmäßig Veranstaltungen statt.

Name: Elect Judge Huesmann
Description: Mark Huesmann is an experienced attorney, dedicated educator, and veteran advocate. Thank you for the support you provided to Mark in the April 2nd, 2024 election to continue his service as Branch 3 Judge.

Name: Thurgauer Gewerbeverband
Description:
Der Thurgauer Gewerbeverband (TGV) ist der grösste Wirtschafts- und Arbeitgeberverband im Kanton Thurgau und vertritt die Interessen von 6‘851 Klein- und Mittelunternehmen im Kanton Thurgau (Stand 01.01.2022). Als Dachorganisation von 35 regionalen Berufsverbänden und 30 lokalen Gewerbevereinen setzt sich der TGV für bessere wirtschaftliche Rahmenbedingungen und eine KMU-freundliche Politik ein und fördert das freie Unternehmertum. Er ist in Wirtschaftsfragen für Politik, Staat und Gesellschaft ein zuverlässiger und kompetenter Ansprechpartner. Der TGV ist ebenfalls Veranstalter der jährlich stattfin-denden Berufsmesse Thurgau. 
www.tgv.ch/ueber-uns/

Name: COMMUNIA
Description:
COMMUNIA is an international association incorporated under Belgian law that advocates for policies that expand the Public Domain and increase access to and reuse of culture and knowledge. It acts as a network of like-minded activists, researchers and practitioners based in Europe and the United States who seek to limit the scope of exclusive copyright to sensible proportions that do not place unnecessary restrictions on access and use.

COMMUNIA’s mission is to foster, strengthen and enrich the Public Domain. Its origins trace back to the eponymous, originally European Commission-funded, Thematic Network, in which over fifty academics and activists participated, researching and promoting the digital Public Domain in Europe and worldwide.

COMMUNIA takes the Public Domain as a point of departure for its analysis of copyright policy. Our definition of the Public Domain has been codified in the Public Domain Manifesto authored and published in 2011, which has been signed by more than 1500 organisations and individuals. The Public Domain Manifesto establishes a broad definition of the Public Domain that includes works that are not protected by copyright (because they have never been protected or because copyright protection has expired). It also encompasses usage rights created by open licensing practices and limitations and exceptions to copyright.

Since most of COMMUNIA’s members are based in Europe, our primary focus is to advocate for improvements to the EU copyright framework. This work is guided by four principles, which are derived from our 20 Policy Recommendations:
- Defend and expand the Public Domain.
- Protect and promote usage rights.
- Empower creators and their audiences.
- Create safeguards against copyright abuse.

To advance our mission, we engage in advocacy, offer expertise, raise awareness for the public domain, support strategic litigation and collaborate with other organisations in Brussels, in Europe and worldwide.

Name: Stand Up America
Description: Stand Up America is a progressive advocacy organization with nearly two million community members across the country. Focused on grassroots advocacy to stand up to corruption and voter suppression and build a more representative democracy, Stand Up America has driven over 1.74 million calls to lawmakers, registered over 100,000 voters, mobilized thousands of protestors, and contacted tens of millions of voters.

Name: Arbeitgeber- und Wirtschaftsverband Jade e.V.
Description: Seit seiner Gründung im Jahr 1919 steht der AWV Jade für die Interessen der Wirtschaft in den Gebietskörperschaften der Stadt Wilhelmshaven und den Landkreisen Friesland und Wittmund – der Jaderegion. Gemeinsam mit den ihm partnerschaftlich verbundenen Verbänden der Metall- und Elektroindustrie Nordmetall sowie AGV Nord repräsentiert er mehr als 420 Mitgliedsunternehmen, die für rund 47.000 sozialversicherungspflichtige Beschäftigungsverhältnisse stehen.

Name: FDP.Die Liberalen Thurgau
Description: Wir machen uns stark für die Freiheit. Deswegen arbeiten wir gutschweizerisch hart für tragfähige Lösungen, setzen uns für Nachhaltigkeit durch Fortschritt ein und wehren uns gegen Bürokratie und erstarrte Strukturen. Unser Regierungsrat und unsere 18-köpfige Fraktion im Grossen Rat stehen täglich an vorderster Front für diese Werte ein. Gemeinsam mit unseren 5 Bezirks- und 32 Ortsparteien engagieren wir uns für einen innovativen, lebenswerten Kanton Thurgau.

Name: Swiss Entrepreneurs & Startup Association SWESA
Description: SWESA improves the economic policy framework for startups and innovative SMEs in Switzerland. We create transparency, always provide up-to-date information and are committed to representing the interests of our members. The Parliamentary Group Startups and Entrepreneurship is our direct access to the National Council and Council of States.

Name: Bangladesh Nationalist Party-BNP
Description: The Bangladesh Nationalist Party is one of the major political parties of Bangladesh. It was founded on 1 September 1978 by former Bangladesh President Ziaur Rahman after the Presidential election of 1978, with a view to uniting the people with nationalist ideology of the country.

Name: TREAT California
Description:
TREAT California is a citizen-led movement to safely and ethically harness the power of psychedelic medicines to treat mental health. We want to improve the lives of millions by creating the most impactful paradigm shift in mental healthcare in generations.

Our ballot initiative will establish the largest psychedelic funding agency in the world, providing $5 Billion for research and affordable access to these innovative treatments for all Californians. We’re not merely changing mental healthcare—we're orchestrating its future.

Name: The Climate Party
Description:
The only UK political party focused 100% on climate change.

Imprint within link in bio.

Name: Georgian College Students' Association
Description:
Engage. Empower. Collaborate.

Vision

The Barrie Campus Georgian College Students’ Association (GCSA) will be a recognized and engaged executive council that promotes the rights of students, heightens student engagement, and enhances the quality of student life. It will prepare confident leaders of tomorrow, while respecting the diversity and strength of all, and continuously assess, adapt and grow to fit the needs of an increasingly diverse student body.

Mission

To advance the general welfare of all Georgian College students and:

-Serve as a resource for students
-Serve as a resource for faculty and staff
-Act as liaisons to and from the student body and the college administration
-Remain a major source of information to and from the student body
-Recruit and develop student leaders within a professional culture to benefit the larger community; engage in purposeful community service.

Name: Да, България!
Description:
Политиката е разговор с хората за бъдещето и ако го водим искрено ще открием стремеж към щастие и достойнство. Заложени във всеки човек. Без изключение. 

Едва ли има някой, който да не иска децата ни да живеят в една друга България, която не е смазана от липсата справедливост и върховенство на закона, която не е пречупена от бедността и неравенствата, която не е застрашена от ограбване и разрушаване на природните й ресурси, където институциите работят за интереса на една върхушка и корупцията е пропила изцяло публичния живот.
Вярваме, че можем да мобилизираме потенциала си, да се борим и да знаем, че сме направили най-доброто, на което сме способни. Длъжни сме. 
Политическото време на нашата генерация ще изтече, ако не преминем към действие и не поемем отговорност. 
Днес казваме: Да се политизираме! Да вземем страна в битката за България. 
Защото искаме да живеем в България, където личната свобода и достойнството са фундамент за развитие и успех. Страна, отзивчива към мечтите на всеки един свой гражданин. 
Можем да постигнем промяна, ако имаме дълг и задължения един към друг. Когато сме солидарни и в общност. 
Отговорността и куражът да защитаваме непреклонно ценностите си правят една нация голяма и изправена. 
България може да застане високо. 
Да, България!

Name: Indiana Republican Party
Description:
Primary Functions of The Indiana Republican Party 

Political
Grow our party through training, recruitment and engagement by investing in candidates, coalitions and county parties.   

Communication
Effectively communicate our message through traditional and new media sources.  This includes working with national and local media and keeping supporters up-to-date on the latest talking points and news.

Operations
Provide infrastructure and resources to reduce overhead expenses to the Governor’s campaign staff, The Indiana House Republican Campaign Committee, The Indiana Senate Majority Campaign Committee, and other state wide Republican campaigns and organizations.  

Finance
Raise the funds necessary to meet our political, communication and operational goals while maintaining a healthy balance for the future of The Indiana Republican Party.

Name: Be A Hero
Description:
Be A Hero is a people-powered organization founded by Ady Barkan and Liz Jaff. The two met when Liz filmed Ady's confrontation of Senator Jeff Flake on a plane, pleading with him to vote against the Tax Bill in 2017, as it would save his life. But the story of Be a Hero began before that, with a choice.

Four months after the birth of his son Carl, Ady Barkan was diagnosed with ALS. Confronting his own mortality, Ady had to decide how to make the most of his remaining time.

After Ady’s interaction with Senator Flake went viral Ady and his co-founder Liz Jaff started Be a Hero to confront members of congress about healthcare using the power of the human story. Since then, Be a Hero has taken on impossible fights and amplified countless stories of incredible heroism in the face of injustice.

Name: AltraPsicologia
Dein Tiroler Wirtschaftsbund
Description: Größtes unternehmerisches Netzwerk & wirtschaftspolitische Interessenvertretung Tirols

Name: The Young Fabians
Description: The Young Fabians are the under 31s section of Britain's oldest left-wing think tank and Labour Party affiliate, the Fabian Society. Since the 1960s, the Young Fabians and our ideas have set the political agenda and changed our country for the better. And as the UK's only think tank run by and for young people, we're yours to join and shape.

Name: California Association of Health Plans
Description: CAHP is a dynamic trade association that advocates for virtually all California health plans representing 28 million enrollees, and is a key player in California health policy issues in the California legislative and regulatory arenas.  CAHP’s diverse membership includes the largest health plans in the United States, as well as smaller plans that specialize in serving the health care needs of those least able to afford coverage.

Name: Marco Rubio for U.S Senate
Description:
FIGHTING TO RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM
Marco grew up in West Miami watching his parents, who had come to America from Cuba, work hard to achieve the American Dream. Their dedication to giving Marco and his siblings a better life taught him that in America, anything is possible.

As a U.S. Senator, Marco has advanced commonsense, conservative ideas that address the issues Americans face. Marco created the Paycheck Protection Program, which supported more than six million Florida jobs and saved nearly half a million Florida small businesses when the pandemic hit. He took on his own party to double the child tax credit for working families and put more money back in the pockets of Floridians. He created accountability at the Department of Veterans Affairs, revitalized restoration efforts for the Everglades, and is leading the fight against communist China.

All of these efforts are aimed squarely at restoring the American Dream, bringing good jobs back to America, and making our communities safer. Sign up today to join Team Marco and get involved in your local area!

Name: Forandringsfabrikken Changefactory
Description: Forandringsfabrikken (Changefactory) is a national foundation whose aim is to contribute to better services for children and young people, based on responses from children and young people themselves. Changefactory invites cooperation between children and young people, professionals and authorities - so that services for children and young people such as schools, mental health services, child welfare services, mental health care and correctional facilities are as useful, safe and effective as possible. Changefactory work is based on the values: with openness, humility, love and in close collaboration with children and young people. In Changefactory, children and young people are the "pros" and themselves convey concrete advice for change to professionals and national authorities.

Name: FødevareDanmark
Description: FødevareDanmark er en paraplyorganisation for navnlig små og mellemstore virksomheder inden for fødevaresektoren og repræsenterer en bred vifte af foreninger inden for detail, produktion og handel med fødevarer.  FødevareDanmark har i dag 700 medlemmer der for værdi for deres medlemskab i form af politisk interessevaretagelse, forsikring, fødevaresikkerhed, marketing og juridisk assistance.  Kontakt os gerne for at høre mere om hvad vi kan gøre for din fødevarevirksomhed.

Name: IG Metall bei Siemens und Siemens Energy
Description:
Das Siemens Team der IG Metall betreut seit 2001 Beschäftigte und Betriebsräte bei Siemens und Siemens Energy. Hauptamtliche Vertreter*innen des Teams gibt es im Vorstand der IG Metall, bei den Bezirksleitungen in Bayern, NRW und Berlin-Brandenburg-Sachsen sowie in den Geschäftsstellen Berlin und Erlangen; außerdem zählt eine Vielzahl betrieblicher Kolleg*innen sowie weiterer hauptamtlicher Betriebsbetreuer*innen zum Team.

Impressum für diese Seite: https://www.dialog-igmetall.de/impressum

Name: Liberaler Mittelstand e.V. Bundesvereinigung
Description:
Unsere Vision
Wir sorgen für mehr Mittelstandskompetenz in den Parlamenten. Mittelstandspolitik ist der Kern liberaler Wirtschaftspolitik, der Garant von Wohlstand, Fortschritt, hoher Beschäftigung und einer breiten Mittelschicht als Rückgrat der Gesellschaft. Die Leistungskraft des Mittelstands hat Deutschland stets aus wirtschaftlichen Krisen geführt. Heute wissen wir: Geht es dem Mittelstand gut, dann geht es Deutschland gut. Dafür brauchen politische Entscheidungen mehr Praxisnähe und Entscheidungsträger ein größeres Verständnis für die Bedeutung und die Anforderungen des Mittelstands.

Unsere Mission
Wir sind Plattform, Netzwerk und politisches Sprachrohr für liberal gesinnte Mittelständler. Wir sind die Interessensvertretung und kompetenter Ansprechpartner von kleinen und mittelständischen Unternehmern, Freiberuflern, Selbstständigen sowie deren Mitarbeiter als selbstbestimmte Marktteilnehmer im Geiste der Aufklärung und des Liberalismus. Unser zentrales Leitbild ist dabei Freiheit als Selbstbestimmung und Übernahme von Verantwortung für sich selbst wie auch für Unternehmen und Mitarbeiter sowie die Gesellschaft insgesamt. Die Zusammengehörigkeit von Verantwortung und Haftung sind für uns selbstverständlich. Dafür treten wir öffentlich ein. Wir wollen eine positive Wahrnehmung von mittelständischem Unternehmertum fördern, indem wir unsere liberalen Grundwerte leben und für den Mittelstand streiten

Name: ASFE - Alliance Solidaire des Français de l'Etranger
Description: L'ASFE est une association qui a vocation à soutenir les Français de l'étranger dans leurs problématiques liées à l'expatriation, et en particulier leurs représentants consulaires.

Name: Commission on Palliative and End-of-Life Care
Description: The commission works to identify current strengths and weaknesses in access to high-quality palliative care.

Name: The Blue Lab
Description:
The Blue Lab is a political incubator that is revolutionizing progressive political campaigns and the next generation of candidates and campaigners. Started in 2012 by Scott Ferson and Sean Sinclair, both veterans of local, state and national campaigns, the Blue Lab is a progressive campaign infrastructure incubator. The lab's mission is to cultivate the next generation of Democratic campaign leaders, to provide a unique educational experience, and to lower the barrier of entry for first-time, minority, and female candidates. A successful Blue Lab helps to level the playing field and create a true land of opportunity for candidates and future campaign leaders.

To achieve its mission the Blue Lab provides permanent campaign capacity for Democratic office-seekers, incubating multiple efforts at any given time. It is staffed by college students who work collaboratively on the tasks assigned and overseen by political professionals. The Blue Lab draws heavily on the start-up model, applying it to an industry that largely runs campaigns as they were run 100 years ago.

Name: CAL-ALHFA (California Association of Local Housing Finance Agencies)
Description: CAL-ALHFA was established in 1989 to represent local housing professionals and agencies in the California State legislature and State housing programs. We also work on housing issues at the federal level. CAL-ALHFA is a non-profit organization with a broad based membership including public and private agencies which develop, finance, and administer programs to create affordable housing in California. Members of CAL-ALHFA benefit from the following member services: Legislative Advocacy. Sponsoring, supporting (or opposing), and tracking housing legislation including bond financing, program development and administration, relocation, and land use law. On-Going Program Advocacy. Tracking program developments in CalHFA, HCD, Tax Credit Program, and Debt Limit Allocation Program. Assisting in the development of program policies and procedures. Member of numerous task forces and special advisory groups. Education. Sponsoring conferences, symposia and webinars as needed to provide information on new developments in the field of affordable housing. Newsletters and Legislative Alerts. Preparing and distributing newsletters and as-needed legislative alerts to inform members of current activities. Individual Member Services. Providing advocacy and advice on district or agency matters as requested. Professional Networking. Providing a forum for industry leaders to share ideas, information, and expertise with their colleagues. 2022 Priorities This year, we intend to focus on two main areas: 1. Expanding homeownership opportunities in underserved communities, including BIPOC households. 2. Serving as a bridge between local agencies trying to comply with new legislative mandates and the state agencies (HCD, State Attorney General) that administer them. Examples of issues to be examined: new density bonus laws, implementation of SB9 and SB10.

Name: TURN - The Utility Reform Network
Description: We stand up for consumer rights, affordable rates and a more livable California. For 50 years, we have challenged California’s powerful energy and telephone companies, saving consumers and small businesses millions, and demanding reliable service and environmentally sound policies. We advocate for better utility policies, provide consumer assistance, and mobilize people statewide to take action for change.

Name: La Crosse Area Young Democrats
Description: We seek to support Democratic candidates in Western Wisconsin and build a sense of purpose for young members of our community.  If you are interested in getting involved with us, feel free to reach out!

Name: Moderaterna i Stockholms stad och län
Description:
Om oss

Moderaterna i Stockholms stad och län är landets största politiska lokala och regionala organisation. Vårt gemensamma uppdrag är att skapa ett bättre Sverige – det uppdraget upphör aldrig. Att vinna val är en förutsättning för att kunna genomföra nödvändiga förändringar. Vi ska opinionsbilda för våra idéer, utbilda våra förtroendevalda, utveckla våra idéer och rekrytera nya medlemmar och förtroendevalda.

Name: WA Institute for a Democratic Future
Description:
WAIDF was established in late 1997 to develop and promote emerging generations of Democratic and civic leaders in Washington State. Founded by Dean Nielsen and Lisa Witter, the program was established in response to a lack of organizations or training at the time that offered a comprehensive learning experience for young adults.  The first class graduated 24 fellows in June of 1998.  IDF has graduated over 600 fellows over the last 26 years and is proud of the wide array of accomplishments of our alumni.

WAIDF is a six-month fellowship from January through June, occurring over eleven intensive weekends.  During these weekends the program focuses on a diverse range of political topics. The program covers the nuts and bolts of campaigns and elections, geographic issues from around the state, and developing leadership skills with our fellows. The program offers a rich curriculum, networking opportunities, and will leave Fellows with lasting ties to their current class and other alumni. Fellows meet with elected officials, leading experts, business owners, lobbyists, nonprofit leaders, and people making a difference in their communities all over the state and in Washington D.C. We want our fellows to get engaged in the political process while introducing them to the people and issues that are affecting our state.  Each year IDF graduates a “farm team” of progressive leaders who go out into the world and make a difference within campaigns, policy jobs, non profits and work in their communities.

Name: Erhvervskontakten - Odense Kommune
Description:
ErhvervsKontakten er erhvervslivets indgang til Odense Kommune.
Vores formål er at gøre det så let som muligt at drive eller starte virksomhed op i Odense.

Når du henvender dig til os, får du én kontaktperson tilknyttet, der tager hånd om netop din sag. Vi er virksomhedernes forlængede arm ind i Odense Kommune. Vi hjælper med at navigere i vores services og tilbud, informerer og vejleder samt sætter stik i til relevante fagkollegaer. 
I større og komplekse byggesager hjælper vi din virksomheder med at koordinere de nødvendige tilladelser på tværs af fagområderne. ErhvervsKontakten sikrer en kontinuerlig dialog, en smidigere sagsbehandling og løbende opfølgning på din sag.

Name: Alberta Party
Description:
Tired of angry, divisive politics that seem hopelessly stuck in the past? The Alberta Party brings a fresh, positive, and creative approach to getting things done in Alberta. The Alberta Party is Fiscally Responsible, Socially Engaged 

We’re made up of problem-solvers and innovators who aim to tackle our challenges using real-world experience and practical solutions—not ideology or dogma.

We stand for fiscal responsibility—understanding our tax dollars aren’t unlimited and need to be spent wisely on important public services.

We believe that Alberta is at its best when our fierce entrepreneurial spirit is being nurtured—not stifled—by government.

We protect human rights, value diversity and welcome everyone to the table.

Alberta Party Leader:
Barry Morishita served as a Councillor and Mayor of the City of Brooks from 2016-2021 and was elected Leader of the Alberta Party by the Board of Directors in August of 2021.

Morishita also served as President of the Alberta Urban Municipalities Association (now Alberta Municipalities) from 2017-2021 before stepping down from the role to successfully seek the leadership of the Alberta Party.

Come and join us. We need volunteers to help build a prosperous, respectful Alberta. Contact us at info@albertaparty.ca.

Name: Make Votes Matter
Description:
Make Votes Matter is the cross-party campaign for Proportional Representation in the House of Commons.

Seats in Parliament should match how people vote - and every vote should count, regardless of where you live or who you vote for. 

There are three strands to the campaign;

The Alliance - https://www.makevotesmatter.org.uk/the-pr-alliance/
We're building the Make Votes Matter Alliance of pro-reform parties, organisations and individuals, at a leadership level - to work together to get rid of the outdated and undemocratic First Past the Post system.

Labour Campaign - https://www.makevotesmatter.org.uk/labour4pr/
To make Proportional Representation a reality, it will almost definitely need the support of one of the two biggest parties. Make Votes Matter works closely with Labour members to help persuade the party to commit to PR. 

The arguments for Labour to back PR are overwhelming. A vast majority of Labour voters support a fair, proportional voting system. Our task is to enable the debate so that this position becomes Labour's official policy. A third of Labour MPs support PR and the number's growing. The key thing that needs to happen is for local Labour parties to pass resolutions calling on Labour to back PR. Working with the Labour Campaign for Electoral Reform, we've trained speakers to go to Constituency Labour Parties (CLPs), lead discussions on PR, and enable members to make up their minds - and we find the vast majority agree with us 78 CLPs have passed motions so far.

The Grassroots - https://www.makevotesmatter.org.uk/find-local-group/
We're building a grassroots movement to press politicians for a fair, proportional voting system. This is made up of local groups campaigning for fair votes across the UK, alongside key volunteers and activists taking part in Make Votes Matter events, action days, and lobby events. 

Join the movement for Proportional Representation so we can win real democracy in the UK!

Name: Massachusetts Republican Party
Description:
The Massachusetts Republican Party offers a new direction, following its core principles of smaller government and individual freedom.  The MassGOP will offer strong candidates for elected office to restore good, efficient government to Beacon Hill.  The party will field honest candidates who embody the spirit of public service.
The solution to the problems on Beacon Hill is no new laws, the solution is new lawmakers.
 
The MassGOP is a party grounded in common-sense principles.  We advocate for families and businesses, and demand government policies that help, not new laws.  For example, Republican legislators proposed $1 billion in reform savings in 2009, while the Democrats voted for $1 billion in new taxes and fees.
 
The Massachusetts Republican Party consists of all enrolled Republican voters in the Commonwealth and is governed by the Massachusetts Republican State Committee.  The State Committee establishes the policies of the Party, provides a central headquarters, gives leadership to the city, ward and town committees in electing Republican candidates to office, raises money for the purposes of the Party, and seeks new members for the Republican Party.  Consistent with the preamble to the Rules of the National Republican Party, it is the intent and purpose of the State Committee to foster the tenets of the Republican Party as stated in the Platform of the National Republican Party.

If you or someone you know wants to run for office as a Republican, or wants to get involved with the party, please visit the “Get Involved” section of our website.

Name: Partai GOLKAR
Description:
Golkar is a nationalist-centrist party which upholds the principle of Karya Kekaryaan which sees society from a functional group perspective. This perspective makes Golkar a "public problem-solving" party that relies on expertise and scientific knowledge in its decision making. National development, economic growth, and political stability lies central to our belief on how to achieve people's welfare. 

We continue to look for new political talents from all background with expertise, competence, and passion to contribute to the nation.

Vision:
To attain an Indonesian society that is united, sovereign, advanced, modern, peaceful, just, prosperous, faithful with noble morality, legally and environmentally aware, proficient in science and technology, and respected in the international community. 
	
Mission:
1. To assert, secure, and protect Pancasila as foundation of nation and country ideology in strengthening the unitary state of Indonesia
2. To attain proclamation goals through the implementation of national development in all sectors to create a democratic, sovereign, and prosperous society; uphold law supremacy and defend he human rights; and support world order and peace.
3. To achieve an effective government with good, clean, respected, and democratic governance. 

Aims
1. To defend and practice the values of Pancasila and uphold Republic of Indonesia's Constitution Year of 1945.
2. To attain the goals of the nation as stated in the preamble of the Republic of Indonesia's Constitution Year of 1945
3. To create a just and prosperous society with equality in material and spiritual resources based on Pancasila and Republic of Indonesia's Constitution Year of 1945 within the scope of a unitary state
4. To attain sovereignty of the people in developing a democratic life that respects and upholds truth, justice, and human rights.

Name: Danube Institute
Description:
The Danube Institute was established by the Batthyány Lajos Foundation in 2013 in Budapest, with the aim of encouraging the transmission of ideas and people within the countries of Central Europe and between Central Europe, other parts of Europe, and the English-speaking world. 
The Institute itself has been committed from its foundation to three philosophical loyalties: a respectful conservatism in cultural, religious, and social life, the broad classical liberal tradition in economics, and a realistic Atlanticism in national security policy. These ideals remain our lodestars. 
More recently, we have added a fourth commitment: exploring and extending the related concepts of democracy and patriotism. We believe that the nation-state offers the only sure foundation for democracy and that a tolerant civic nationalism is the only basis for a successful democratic internationalism. Nation-states are the building blocks of internationalism. Both are to be distinguished from supra- or trans-nationalism which embody the ambition to transcend them but which have so far failed to match them in democratic accountability. 
Our methods of developing and transmitting these ideas are research, analysis, publication, debate, and scholarly exchanges. Our primary audience is the universe of center-right intellectuals, political leaders, and public-spirited citizens. But we will also engage our counterparts on the democratic center-left in vigorous and principled public debate on as many occasions as possible and appropriate. We hope to draw upon the best minds of our day across national boundaries in international forums.
The debate itself is our fifth commitment. It is a vital catalyst in building a democratic society.

Name: Young Republican National Federation
Description:
The Young Republicans (YRs) are the oldest political youth organization in the United States and serve as the young professional auxiliary of the Republican Party.  Our mission is to RECRUIT, TRAIN & ELECT the next generation of Republican leaders!

Founded in 1931 by West Point graduate George H. Olmsted as he began to attract the attention of the leaders of the national Republican Party, and he was invited to meet with President Herbert Hoover at the White House. President Hoover, so impressed with his visit with Olmsted, asked the young man to head the Young Republican division of the Republican Party, which Olmsted did. In 1935, the Young Republican division officially became the Young Republican National Federation (YRNF), and the YRNF elected Olmsted as the organization’s first president.

Since its creation, YRNF has established itself as the premier Republican grassroots organization in the nation, providing essential grassroots support for Republican candidates and conservative issues on the local, state and national levels. YRNF has a solid record of producing future Republican Party leaders – including Governors, Senators, Congressmen, nationally recognized campaign consultants, and community leaders.

Through recruiting, training and mobilizing people, the YRNF presents an opportunity for ordinary people to do extraordinary things. Through community involvement in political issues, charitable projects and participation in political campaigns, YRs work to improve the world in which we live.

While the YRs are best known for political activism and service to our communities, YR events also provide a great opportunity for interaction amongst membership. This interaction allows for the exchange of ideas, networking, and friendships that will last a lifetime.

Name: LVN, the Dutch Liberal Women's Network
Description:
At LVN, the Dutch Liberal Women's Network, we're here to inspire, support, and champion liberal values. Together, we spotlight women's talents and help them climb the ladder in politics, societally relevant roles, and leadership positions. 

We discuss issues in politics and society that directly affect women and are important to all of us. This includes women's safety and health, economic equality, leadership, and women's rights.

Founded in 2002 as the follow-up to 'Vrouwen in de VVD' ('Women in the VVD'), LVN became the Dutch People's Party for Freedom and Democracy VVD's first official network. The LVN is still one of the most active networks today.

Our activities are open to everyone who connects with our mission. If you want to help build a more inclusive and equal-opportunity society, you’re more than welcome to join us.

Follow this page for inspiring stories, interesting updates, and exciting events (in Dutch). Don't forget to click on the  at the top right of this page to ensure you won't miss interesting opportunities!

Name: Initiative 12 % - Une baisse d'impôts pour tous
Description:
L’initiative 12% en bref

Le Canton de Vaud détient le triste record du taux d’imposition sur le revenu et la fortune le plus élevé de Suisse, dépassant d’un tiers la moyenne nationale. Les comparaisons fiscales entre cantons sont cruelles pour l’État de Vaud. Elles révèlent des écarts abyssaux qui ne sont ni justifiés, ni justifiables : dans des cantons démographiquement et structurellement similaires au nôtre, comme Berne ou Zurich, les contribuables paient bien moins d’impôts cantonaux. Une situation d’autant plus inacceptable quand on sait que l’État de Vaud dispose de plus de 4 milliards de réserves de cash…
 
Notre initiative propose une solution simple et concrète :  une réduction de 12% s’appliquera à l’impôt cantonal sur le revenu et la fortune.

Name: Bundesforum Männer - Interessenverband für Jungen, Männer und Väter e.V.
Description:
Das Bundesforum Männer versteht sich als politische Interessenvertretung für Jungen, Väter und Männer.

Unser Ziel ist es, durch gleichstellungsorientierte Männerpolitik nachhaltige Veränderung für alle Geschlechter zu erreichen. Denn Gleichstellung kann nur erfolgreich sein, wenn alle Geschlechter berücksichtigt werden und Männer als Adressaten und Akteure in eine moderne Gleichstellungspolitik eingebunden sind.

Gleichstellungsorientierte Männerpolitik stärkt Männer in ihren unterschiedlichen Lebenslagen und Identitäten. Sie hat alle Geschlechter im Blick, ist partnerschaftlich orientiert und geschieht im konstruktiven Dialog zwischen den Geschlechtern.

Description:

Whether you are a small start-up or established company looking to grow, the EDC offers a range of direct services to help your business every step of the way. The EDC has three major functions:

- To provide information and referral services to help local businesses to start up, succeed, and grow;

- To develop and disseminate factual data regarding significant economic activities, trends and projections for Sonoma County. In addition, the Economic Development Director performs numerous activities on behalf of the Board of Supervisors ranging from coordination to analysis of issues impacting Sonoma County; and

- To offer FREE customized market analysis and tools to give businesses in Sonoma County a competitive edge in today’s marketplace.

Name: Vertretung des Freistaats Thüringen bei der EU
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen bei der Vertretung des Freistaats Thüringen bei der EU in Brüssel! 
Du interessierst Dich für das politische Geschehen in Europa und willst wissen, warum es wichtig ist, dass Thüringen in der EU vertreten ist? Dann bist Du hier genau richtig! 
Unser Team besteht aus engagierten Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern, deren Aufgabe es ist, den EU-Gesetzgebungsprozess zu beobachten und zu analysieren, um die Thüringer Landesregierung frühzeitig über aktuelle Entwicklungen zu informieren. Unsere Aufgabe ist es, die Interessen des Freistaats wirksam in den Entscheidungsfindungsprozess einzubringen. Wir verstehen uns als Thüringen-Botschafter in Brüssel und repräsentieren die kulturelle Vielfalt unsres Landes in der EU. Dazu stehen wir im ständigen Austausch mit den EU-Institutionen und stellen so sicher, dass Thüringen auf EU-Ebene sichtbar bleibt. 
Bist Du Studentin oder Student, suchst ein spannendes Praktikum und möchtest in einem dynamischen Team im internationalen Umfeld mitten im Herzen der EU arbeiten? Dann sende Deine Bewerbungsunterlagen (Anschreiben, Lebenslauf, Nachweis des Pflichtpraktikums, Zeugniskopien) an BEU4_PF@tsk.thueringen.de. Wir freuen uns darauf, Dich kennenzulernen und gemeinsam die Interessen Thüringens zu vertreten.

Du willst auch sonst nichts verpassen, was bei uns passiert? Dann folge uns hier auf LinkedIn und bleibe Up-to-date. Hier findest Du aktuelle Informationen über die Aktivitäten des Freistaats in der EU und in Thüringen. 

Euer Team der Vertretung des Freistaats Thüringen bei der EU in Brüssel

Unsere Webseite: https://thueringen.de/thueringen-in-bruessel/landesvertretung

Name: Konrad Adenauer Stiftung, Media Programme Asia
Description:
The Programmes' objectives are achieved by strengthening dialogue amongst leading editors and journalists through regional conferences and meetings and by two key initiatives: the Asia News Network (ANN) and the Konrad Adenauer Center for Journalism (ACFJ) at Ateneo de Manila University.

The Asia News Network (ANN), comprising 23 English-language national daily newspapers in 20 Asian countries, was initiated to provide avenues for cooperation and to optimize coverage of major news events in the region. More importantly, the ANN has been working towards the improvement of the coverage of Asian affairs by Asian media. Thus member newspapers get reliable access to news sources in Asia and the development of professional journalism in the region is promoted. The initiative is beneficial for two reasons: first, it reduces the dependence of member newspapers on international wire services and second, the newspapers get more substantial, in-depth news from an Asian perspective.

The Konrad Adenauer Center for Journalism (ACFJ) at the Ateneo de Manila University completes our vision and mission in journalism development in Asia. It was established in June 2000 as a joint initiative of the KAS and the Ateneo de Manila University. The ACFJ offers degree and non-degree programmes in subject-specific reporting as well as basic courses such as journalistic ethics. The ACFJ is a regional center: It recruits students from all over Asia; it addresses working journalists by granting scholarships. We are especially proud of the Center’s pioneering "M.A. in Journalism" programme, which has attracted working journalists from many Asian countries since its implementation in 2003.
