Senior leaders of the Congress party will actively participate in the Yatra. Those who are unable to join the Yatra, will help spread its message by organising events and participating in online campaigns.

People from all walks of life will join the Yatra at various points, and march together. It will be a celebration of India’s unity, a festival of hope that will come alive with musical programs and contests that anyone can participate in.

This is an open invitation to all to join and walk with us. India belongs to all of us. ‘Bharat Jodo Yatra’ is for all.

In the last 8 years, India under the leadership of PM Shri Narendra Modi Ji has achieved the feat of becoming the 5th largest economy from the 11th place it held earlier. Prime Minister’s vision of a $5 trillion economy will have significant positive impact on Maharashtra’s economy.

Maharashtra is the most industrialized State in India. It has consistently been the No. 1 investment destination and attracts a large share of Foreign Direct Investments to the country. Mumbai, the financial capital of the country is located in Maharashtra. The Bharatiya Janata Party(BJP) – the biggest political party in the State under the leadership of DCM Shri Devendra Fadnavis strives to retain the top slot by creating a business environment conducive to the corporate community. Indicators like FDI inflow, Ease of Doing Business rankings & Infrastructural development figure high on the priority list of Devendra Fadnavis Ji’s goals to attract investors from across the globe. DCM Devendra Fadnavis Ji’s one trillion-dollar economy goal for Maharashtra is aimed at making the State number one in all social, economic and human development parameters to fuel economic growth.

As a thriving democracy, the development indicators and economic growth in Maharashtra are inextricably linked to the political situation and policy decisions of its leaders. Name: VdU Landesverband Baden
Description:
Der Verband der Unternehmerinnen in Deutschland e.V. (VdU) vertritt seit 1954 als Wirtschaftsverband branchenübergreifend die Interessen von Unternehmerinnen in Politik und Gesellschaft. In besonderem Maße zeichnet uns die Verbindung von unternehmerischer Interessenvertretung und gleichstellungspolitischer Lobby aus. 

Wir setzen uns ein für verlässliche und zeitgemäße politische Rahmenbedingungen für Unternehmen, die Stärkung weiblichen Unternehmertums, die Förderung von Frauen in Führungspositionen und für bessere Bedingungen für Frauen in der Wirtschaft. Wir vertreten die politischen Belange von rund 1,2 Millionen selbstständigen Frauen aller Branchen und Unternehmensgrößen.

Der Landesverband Baden ist in vier Regionen vertreten: Im Nordbadischen mit der Region  Rhein-Neckar-Odenwaldkreis,  mit den Städten Heidelberg, Mannheim, Schwetzingen, Weinheim, Mosbach und der Region um Karlsruhe mit Rastatt, Pforzheim und Baden-Baden sowie im Südbadischen mit der Region um Freiburg mit Bad Krozingen, Emmendingen, Offenburg und dem Markgräflerland mit Heitersheim, Müllheim und Lörrach. 

Das VdU-Programm in Baden ist besonders facettenreich. Jede Region bietet monatliche Veranstaltungen und zusätzliche Highlight-Termine an: Business-Dinner und Fachvorträge,  Fachkonferenzen in Kooperation mit namhaften Institutionen und Verbänden, Einblick-Termine bei Unternehmen, Wirtschaftsreisen und exklusive Netzwerk-Events. Gäste sind nach Voranmeldung herzlich willkommen, den VdU kennenzulernen.

Name: Magyar Kétfarkú Kutya Párt
Description:
A Magyar Kétfarkú Kutya Párt mindig is aktív, cselekvő állampolgárok közössége szeretett volna lenni. A legtöbb párt aktivistái két választás között nem sok mindent tudnak csinálni, nekünk viszont nagyon fontos, hogy sok embernek adjunk lehetőséget bekapcsolódni a széles értelemben vett közéletbe, ami akár még olyat is jelenthet, hogy csinálsz valami értelmes dolgot. A „Panaszkodás helyett megcsináljuk!” mottó jegyében próbálunk olyan problémákkal foglalkozni, amelyek terén tényleges eredményeket érhetünk el. Szívesen dolgozunk együtt civil szervezetekkel, akiket lelkesít, hogy street art akciókkal, vagy épp gerillakertészkedéssel szépítsék meg közterületeinket. Teljes mértékben elhatárolódunk a többi magyar párt egymásra mutogató és felelősséget áthárító stílusátol, energiáinkat inkább a környezetünk élhetőbbé tételére koncentráljuk. Brit tudósok és saját számítasaink alapján csak idő kérdése, hogy az emberek felismerjék az ebben rejlő potenciált, és hatalomra juttassanak bennünket. 

Ha szeretnéd, hogy bejussunk az Európai Parlamentbe és minél több önkormányzatba, miközben folytatjuk a szokásos akcióinkat is, akkor támogass egyszeri adománnyal vagy havi rendszerességgel itt:

https://mkkp.hu/2023/11/12/nagyon-kell-a-segitseged/

#mkkp #kutyapart

Name: Junger Wirtschaftsrat NRW
Description:
Der Junge Wirtschaftsrat bietet die Plattform für den Dialog zwischen Wirtschaft und Politik – von Anfang an. Junge Unternehmer und Führungskräfte bringen die Themen ihrer Generation auf den Tisch.

Für Führungskräfte und Unternehmer bis 35 Jahre, die gesellschaftliches Engagement in enger Anbindung an politische Entscheidungsträger umsetzen wollen, ist der Junge Wirtschaftsrat die erste Adresse. Bei Veranstaltungen auf Bundesebene wie dem Jungen Wirtschaftstag und der Arbeitsgruppentagung sowie auf Landesebene bei Workshops, Unternehmensbesichtigungen und politischen Diskussionsrunden debattieren die über 800 Mitglieder aktuelle wirtschafts- und gesellschaftspolitische Fragestellungen mit Vertretern aus Parlament, Regierung, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft.

Als Denkfabrik erarbeiten die Mitglieder des Jungen Wirtschaftsrates Lösungsvorschläge und Forderungen der jungen Generation und kommunizieren diese an politischen Entscheidungsträger aller Parteien. Neben der persönlichen Vernetzung der verschiedenen Generationen innerhalb des Wirtschaftsrates fungiert die Jugendorganisation des Wirtschaftsrates vor allem als kreative Ideenschmiede.

Deine Themen? Unsere Themen! 

Betreuung & Bildung
Arbeitswelt & Karriere
Recht & Steuern
Familien- & Rollenbilder 

#EqualCare #EqualPay #Equal Pension

Wir machen uns stark mit Dir & für Dich! 

Unsere Expertise, Erfahrungen, Sichtweisen & Ideen bringen wir in Veranstaltungsformate, Gremien & Kooperationen & Fachgespräche ein, sowie in Gesetzgebungsverfahren, Veröffentlichungen und in Interviews.

Der VBM ist Herausgeberin des ca. 100-seitigen Ratgeber zur Vereinbarkeit: Das Dschungelbuch.
DER Ratgeber zu Vereinbarkeitsthemen für Eltern, Gleichstellungsbeauftragte und Unternehmen.

In 2014 haben wir den Equal Pension Day ins Leben gerufen, um die krasse Rentenlücke zwischen Frauen & Männern zu thematisieren!

Name: SGP Zuid-Holland

Natuurlijk wel, op nieuwe maatschappelijke vragen moeten immers nieuwe antwoorden komen. Toch blijven we in de kern herkenbaar: het SGP-ankerpunt, de Bijbel, blijft. De SGP blijft dicht bij haar principieel christelijke boodschap. Herkenbaar ook blijft de waarde die wij hechten aan de Nederlandse identiteit. De partij blijft opkomen voor een groot Nederlands goed: vrijheid van geweten. Dit doen we al ruim 100 jaar en zullen we blijven doen.

Name: Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung Vietnam
Description:
KAS has been working in Vietnam since 1993. Within its international cooperation activities, KAS aims to support policymakers, governmental institutions, administrative bodies, research institutes, and think-tanks in strengthening democratic structures, the rule of law and human rights in Vietnam. The Foundation works towards creating an environment conducive to sustainable economic, ecological and social development. Human beings with their distinctive dignity and with their rights and responsibilities are thereby at the heart of our work. All programmes are conceived and implemented in close cooperation with Vietnamese partners on the national and local level.

Vietnam has undergone reforms in the political, social and economic spheres since launching the Doi Moi reform process in 1986. Promoting the change, KAS supports Vietnam’s socio-political and economic development as well as modern education through annual programmes, comprised of conferences, seminars, trainings, round-table discussions, study visits, contributions to research and publications.

KAS in Vietnam is committed to the promotion of

• Rule-of-law structures
• Parliamentary democracy
• Sustainable and social market economy
• Regional and international integration

Name: Starke Demokratie e. V.
Description: Wir unterstützen in der Kommunalpolitik aktive Menschen mit Workshops und weiteren Angeboten zur Prävention von Hass und Gewalt. Mit unseren Angeboten bereiten wir Menschen, die sich in der Kommunalpolitik engagieren (wollen) auf den Umgang mit Hass und Gewalt vor und helfen ihnen, ihre persönliche Resilienz zu verbessern. Wir signalisieren ihnen, dass die Bevölkerung des Landes nicht wegschaut, sondern sich solidarisch zeigt. Wir zeigen bestehende Angebote auf, schaffen Kontakte und vermitteln Informationen in unterschiedlichen Formaten. Wir geben Empfehlungen zur Kommunikation in der digitalen und in der analogen Welt. Auf unserer Website, über unseren Newsletter sowie im regelmäßig erscheinenden Podcast bieten wir Informationen zum Thema an. Zudem informieren und sensibilisieren wir in weiteren Veranstaltungen die Zivilgesellschaft, um die Solidarität mit politisch aktiven Menschen zu fördern.

Name: Landsrådet for Norges barne- og ungdomsorganisasjoner (LNU)
Description: LNU er ein paraplyorganisasjon for 102 norske barne- og ungdomsorganisasjonar, med til sammen 450.000 medlemsskap. Medlemsorganisasjonane er demokratiske og frivillige barne- og ungdomsorganisasjonar, og representerer eit stort mangfald av aktivitetar og verdiar.

Name: FO - Fellesorganisasjonen
Description:
FO er Norges største fagforening for sosialarbeidere, og et av de største forbundene i LO. Medlemmene våre utgjør hjertet i velferdsstaten og står opp for tryggheten til dem som trenger det aller mest. 

Vi organiserer over 36 000 barnevernspedagoger, sosionomer, vernepleiere, velferdsvitere og studenter. Vårt oppdrag er å stå opp for dem som står opp for andre.

Name: APPG for Universities
Description:
The All-Party Parliamentary University Group (APPUG) acts as a key avenue of communication between parliamentarians and vice-chancellors of the UK’s universities and examines issues affecting the country’s university sector and possible policy responses. Chaired by Adam Thompson MP.

This is not an official feed of Parliament. It has not been approved by either House. APPGs are informal groups of Parliamentarians with a common interest in particular issues. The views expressed are those of the group.

Contact: appug@universitiesuk.ac.uk

Name: Ground Floor Public Affairs
Description:
Ground Floor Public Affairs is a community outreach and government relations firm. At Ground Floor, we believe that real solutions emerge through strong relationships. For 20 years, we have worked within government and managed successful political campaigns. We bring together government, business, and community to find common ground and leverage resources, creativity and vision to get the job done for our clients. 

We build brand awareness for corporations and nonprofit organizations. We create coalitions in support of positive change for our clients and the community.  We also work with entrepreneurs seeking to update regulations that stifle innovation. 

Our objective is to connect you with the people you need to know to achieve your goals, while creating a tangible benefit for the communities where you live and work. We pride ourselves on being nimble, responsive and giving you the personal attention you deserve. 

You have an idea, we realize it. You have a message, we deliver it. You have a crisis, we get you through it. We believe that government, business and the community can all succeed while benefiting the greater good. 

Ground Floor – Strong relationships. Real solutions.

Name: VPOD - Gewerkschaft im Service public
Description:
Der VPOD (Verband des Personals öffentlicher Dienste) ist seit über 100 Jahren die starke Gewerkschaft im Service public. Als Gewerkschaft mit mehr als 34'000 Kolleginnen und Kollegen setzen wir uns für einen starken öffentlichen Dienst ein, der allen zu Gute kommt.
Wir verhandeln auf Augenhöhe mit Arbeitgebern und kämpfen für fortschrittliche Arbeitsbedingungen entgegen allen Sparzwängen, Liberalisierungs-und Privatisierungstendenzen. Wir verhandeln Gesamtarbeitsverträge, die gesetzliche Grundlage für viel Arbeitsverträge. Wir beraten und unterstützen unsere Mitglieder bei allen Schwierigkeiten am Arbeitsplatz. Wir setzen uns ein für Qualitätssicherung und Weiterentwicklung von Berufsbildern und engagieren uns im Weiterbildungsbereich.

Name: Istiqlal Youth Academy
Description:
Youth initiative of the Istiqlal Party in Morocco  
Run by youth and for youth.

Name: Australian Greens Victoria
Description:
The Australian Greens Victoria are the progressive force in Australian politics. We are a political party based on four key principles: ecological sustainability, grassroots democracy, social justice and peace and non-violence.

We have the courage to put people and our future first. That means that along with meaningful and smart solutions to ensure future generations of Australians have clean air, clean water and clean soil, the Greens are also working in many other areas to champion integrity, decency and fairness.

As well as representing constituents, the Greens speak on behalf of those who wouldn’t otherwise get much of a say inside parliament: children, refugees, students, individuals and families living in poverty and, of course, our natural environment.

Name: Wirtschaftsbund Kärnten
Description:
Der Wirtschaftsbund Kärnten ist eine Organisation, die sich für die Interessen der Wirtschaft in dem österreichischen Bundesland Kärnten einsetzt. Wir sind Teil des Wirtschaftsbundes Österreich und vertreten die Anliegen von Unternehmen und Selbstständigen in Kärnten gegenüber der Politik und der Öffentlichkeit. 

1946, wurde der WBK als „Wirtschaftliche Vereinigung“ gegründet. In den ersten Jahren setzten wir uns vor allem für die Schaffung eines stabilen wirtschaftlichen Umfelds und die Förderung der heimischen Industrie und Landwirtschaft ein. In den 1950er und 1960er Jahren waren wir aktiv in der Förderung des Tourismus. In den 1970er Jahren wandten wir uns verstärkt der Förderung kleiner und mittlerer Unternehmen sowie der Schaffung von Arbeitsplätzen zu. In den 1980er Jahren setzten wir für den Ausbau der Infrastruktur, insbesondere des Autobahnnetzes, ein. Seit den 1990er Jahren haben wir unser Engagement auf die Förderung von Innovation und Technologie ausgeweitet. Wir haben uns zum größten Interessenverband der Kärntner Wirtschaft entwickelt und vertreten die Interessen von rund 11.000 Mitgliedsbetrieben in Kärnten. Im September 2023 erfolgte der Online-Launch unseres Business-Magazins „M.U.T.“ 

Der Wirtschaftsbund Kärnten verfolgt das Ziel, die Interessen der Kärntner Wirtschaft zu vertreten und die wirtschaftliche Entwicklung in Kärnten zu fördern. Dazu gehört die Verbesserung der Rahmenbedingungen für die Kärntner Wirtschaft, die Schaffung von Arbeitsplätzen und die Förderung der Aus- und Weiterbildung von Fachkräften. 

Wir setzen uns auch für die Förderung von Innovationen und die Unterstützung von Startups ein. Hierzu werden regelmäßig Initiativen und Projekte gestartet. 

Bleiben Sie auf dem Laufenden und melden Sie sich für den kostenlosen Wirtschaftsbund Newsletter an: https://www.wirtschaftsbund-ktn.at/

Name: The California League of Independent Notaries
Description: The CLIN strives to promote public awareness and advocate for California Notaries by building community, providing communication and lobbying for policy that strengthens the Office of Notary Public and represents members common interests.

Name: Mississippi Republican Party
Description:
The Mississippi Republican Party is the state affiliate of the United States Republican Party. The Party Chairman is Mike Hurst and the Executive Director is Rance Bilbo.

The Mississippi Republican Party fundamentally believes in the conservative principles of individual freedom, personal responsibility, free market economic policies, and a society that respects our God given rights of life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness.

Because we believe that government cannot and should not be the solution to all problems, Mississippi Republicans believe in policies that promote the entrepreneurial spirit that encourages hard work, rewards self-sufficiency, honors the institution of the family, and places a high value on integrity in all areas of private enterprise and government.

Mississippi Republicans believe in the rule of law, and that all people are created equal and therefore deserve equal opportunity without regard to race, color, gender, creed or age.

Follow the MSGOP on Twitter: @MSGOP @MikeHurstMS @rance_bilbo 

Follow the MSGOP on Facebook: www.fb.com/MSGOP

Name: DGS, Danske Gymnasieelevers Sammenslutning
Description: Danske Gymnasieelevers Sammenslutning, DGS, har siden 1965 været gymnasieelevernes talerør. I dag repræsenterer DGS mere end 89.000 gymnasieelever fra landets STX-, HF- og IB-skoler.

Name: Roy Cooper for North Carolina
Description: Roy Cooper is fighting for a North Carolina where people are better educated, healthier, have more money in their pockets, and have the opportunity to live lives of purpose and abundance.

Name: Rosie Cordero-Stutz for Miami-Dade Sheriff
Description: 28-year veteran of Miami-Dade Police Department passionately serving & protecting, Republican candidate for Miami-Dade County Sheriff.

Name: İyi Parti
Description:
Türkiye'ye İyi Gelecek
Gençlerimize iş, kadınlarımıza yaşam hakkı ve eşitlik, yaşlılarımıza huzur, güven ve bakım imkanı, çocuklarımıza neşe, mutluluk ve sağlık, milletimize birlik ve beraberlik getirmek için yola çıkıyoruz. Zor dönemde ve zor şartlarda yola çıktığımızın farkındayız. Milletimize inanıyor ve güveniyoruz. Seksen milyonuz. Büyük bir milletiz. Büyük bir ekonomiyiz. Çalışıyoruz ve üretiyoruz. Paylaşamıyoruz. Hakça paylaşacağız. Birlikte başaracağız. Adil olacağız. Adaleti sağlayacağız.

Name: Sinfar/SP - Sindicato dos Farmacêuticos no Estado de São Paulo
Description:
O Sindicato dos Farmacêuticos no Estado de São Paulo (SINFAR-SP) é o único representante legal da categoria farmacêutica perante as autoridades constituídas de nosso Estado. Esta representação se faz defendendo os direitos e interesses dos profissionais farmacêuticos junto a órgãos governamentais, sindicatos patronais, poder judiciário e a sociedade de um modo geral.

O SINFAR-SP luta pela valorização da categoria farmacêutica e pela conquista de benefícios aos trabalhadores.

Name: CDA | Cannabis Distribution Association
Description:
The Cannabis Distribution Association (CDA) represents a diverse group of cannabis distributors. In California, our members distribute over 30% of licensed cannabis products sold statewide. Beyond California, we have a growing presence nationwide by way of the CDA Interstate Task Force. We welcome participation in the task force from representatives of state-specific cannabis trade organizations. Since 2016, we have been a critical stakeholder in cannabis policy, advocating for solutions that ensure the economic viability for small business, promote supply chain integrity, and prioritize consumer safety.

CDA, formerly the CGA Distribution & Transportation Committee, was formed in 2016 as a partner organization to California Growers Association (CGA).

Name: Republicans Overseas Czech Republic
Description:
We are a political organisation representing Republicans living in the Czech Republic. We are part of the global network that keeps our members and all nine million United States citizens living abroad well-informed and well-connected with their political leaders back home.

 Jsme politická organizace zastupující Republikány žijící v České republice. Jsme součástí globální sítě, která zajišťuje informovanost našich členů a všech devíti milionů občanů Spojených států žijících v zahraničí a jejich dobré spojení s politickými představiteli doma.

Name: BSP Telangana
Description: The Bahujan Samaj Party is a progressive political party in India that was formed to represent Bahujans, referring to the country's Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes, along with minorities

Name: Judge Tom Murry
Description:
At this crossroads in our country’s history, now is the time to restore confidence in the judicial system and uphold our core freedoms enshrined in our Constitution.  We need Judges to follow the original meaning of the Constitution and follow the law as jurists not as activists.  When judges issue rulings based on their political views, they undermine the public’s trust. Every person deserves dignity and respect, and judges are called to provide equal justice under the law every time in every case. We need proven conservatives to serve as judges to uphold the rule of law. As a State Prosecutor, Army JAG officer and former legislator, I have a track record of fighting important fights and achieving results.

My pledge is simple: every day I will work to advance justice for everyone in North Carolina. I humbly ask for your prayers and support as I seek to serve you as a Judge on the North Carolina Court of Appeals.

My campaign theme is Micah 6:8 - Act justly, love mercy, and walk humbly with my God. Please join #TomsTroops and share my website with your friends and family.

Name: James Talarico for Texas State House District 52
Description:
James was born at Round Rock Hospital. After graduating from McNeil High School, he earned a bachelor’s degree in government from The University of Texas at Austin and a master’s degree in education policy from Harvard University. James taught 6th grade at an underserved public school where he worked with kids and
families to close the gaps in his classroom. He now serves as the local Executive Director of a nonprofit that provides innovative technology to thousands of our students. James is committed to working with everyone — Republicans, Democrats, and Independents — to move Texas forward.

Name: D66 Utrecht
Description: D66 Utrecht is een actieve lokale partij. Wij staan voor een open en democratische samenleving, waarin optimale individuele vrijheid en verantwoordelijkheid voor elkaar samengaan. Een actieve samenleving die dynamisch, open, tolerant en solidair is voor alle inwoners en ondernemers van Utrecht.

Name: CropLife Danmark
Description:
CropLife Danmark, tidligere Dansk Planteværn, er interesseorganisation for virksomheder, der udvikler og markedsfører konventionelle og biologiske pesticider samt biostimulanter understøttet af plantebioteknologi, præcisionsteknologier og digitale løsninger. Vi arbejder for, at danske landmænd kan drive konkurrencedygtige virksomheder med omtanke for miljøet. Nu og i fremtiden. 
CropLife Danmarks primære opgave er at tilbyde vores medlemmer adgang til viden, politisk indflydelse samt faglige netværk.

Foreningens medlemskreds består af BASF, Bayer CropScience, FMC, Corteva Agriscience, Nordisk Alkali, Nufarm Nordics, UPL, Adama og Syngenta Crop Protection. 

CropLife Danmark er medlem af den europæiske brancheforening CropLife Europe og deltager aktivt og konstruktivt i industriens europæiske netværkssamarbejde.

Name: Parldigi
Description: Cross-partisan group of 50 Swiss parliamentarians promoting open source software, open data, open government, open standards, open content, open access, net neutrality etc.  Co-presidents are Edith Graf-Litscher (SP) and Franz Grüter (SVP).

Name: Her Bold Move
Description:
Founded in early 2021, Her Bold Move is a progressive political action committee laser-focused on shattering the glass ceilings that still exist in American politics. By providing critical support including financial aid, message amplification, paid media, mentorship, and more, we work to elect women to the remaining government seats that have yet to be filled by a woman.

Our organization exists to bring about the kind of change that only bold moves can and to ensure that women have every opportunity they need to make those moves on the largest scale possible. We believe that this work will help to give young girls the role models they deserve, young boys the role models they need, and Americans of all ages the kind of leadership they didn’t know was possible.

Name: Danske Murermestre
Description:
Danske Murermestre er en del af DI Byggeri og har ca. 1.000 medlemsvirksomheder. 

Danske Murermestres formål er:
- at samle virksomheder, der udøver virksomhed indenfor murer- og betonområdet, herunder virksomheder med en naturlig eller traditionel tilknytning til virksomheder af den anførte art.
- at varetage virksomhedernes interesse inden for uddannelse, efteruddannelse, faglig/teknisk udvikling samt aftaleretslige forhold.
- at varetage virksomhedernes arbejdsgiverpolitiske interesser i forhold til murer- og betonområdets specielle forhold fx prislister/overenskomster og arbejdsmiljø.
- at styrke det kollegiale sammenhold.
- at værne om medlemmernes økonomiske, faglige og organisationsmæssige interesser.

Danske Murermestre har en række nedsatte udvalg, bl.a. på områderne teknik, arbejdsmiljø, uddannelse og kursus, overenskomst og priskurant. Udvalgene arbejder med og forsøger at løse de aktuelle sager på områderne. 

Danske Murermestre afholder en lang række kurser for foreningens medlemmer.

Name: Women Winning
Description:
2018 marked the beginning of a new era of pro-choice women’s leadership, but in both Minnesota and Washington D.C., women are still significantly underrepresented at the tables of power. With emboldened threats to reproductive rights at all levels of government, it is more important than ever that pro-choice women run for -- and win -- elected office.

Since 1982, Women Winning has been building a coalition of people of all backgrounds, gender identities, and political affiliations united in our mission to recruit, train, and elect pro-choice women to all levels of public office -- from park board to President of the United States. We’ve endorsed and elected thousands of candidates, tripling the number of pro-choice women holding elected office in Minnesota.

Pro-choice women continue to step up to run for office and Women Winning will be with them at every step on the campaign trail in 2019, 2020, and beyond.

Name: CDU Baden-Württemberg
Description: Wir zeigen auf, wo unser Land in den kommenden Jahren stehen soll und wie wir dies erreichen wollen. Wir sagen, was wir denken, und wir tun, was wir sagen.

Name: Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion Sachsen
Description: Die MIT ist mit rund 25.000 Mitgliedern die größte Vereinigung, die sich für die Soziale Marktwirtschaft nach dem Vorbild Ludwig Erhards einsetzt. Mit Ihrer Mitgliedschaft unterstützen Sie die Tausenden Ehrenamtler, die sich in Vorständen und Parlamenten auf Kreis-, Landes-, Bundes- und Europaebene für eine bessere Wirtschaftspolitik im Sinne der Sozialen Marktwirtschaft einsetzen.

Name: Labour Women's Network
Description:
Labour Women’s Network was founded thirty-five years ago to secure women’s equality in the Labour Party. We are the only official women's affiliate to the Labour Party. A membership organisation and Socialist Society, our membership figures are currently at a record high. 

Through the LWN Political School and the Jo Cox Women in Leadership Programme, we train and empower women to change the culture of their local parties, stand for public office and be ready to lead. We are proud to have trained a significant proportion of the Women's Parliamentary Labour Party, including Rachel Reeves, Angela Rayner and Thangam Debbonaire, as well as women at all levels of office across the country. In the part 18 months we have also launched commissioned regional Labour women’s leadership schemes in Eastern, West Midlands and South East, as well as the inaugural Chris Herries Development Programme with the Co-Operative Party.  We have just launched the Yorkshire and Humber Regional scheme.

LWN campaign for necessary changes in Labour’s policy, practice and culture, with recent successes including making Labour’s parliamentary selections shorter and cheaper, making Labour events safer for women, and working with LGA Labour to roll out parental leave policies for councils. We are also campaigning to embed hybrid working long-term in Labour’s practice as we push to #KeepTheGoodStuff from the pandemic, and to #DiffuseAbuse against women in public life. We recently launched our #LocalGovernment4ThisMillennium campaign looking at practical ways to correct the women’s leadership gap at council level.
We believe in sisterhood no matter your shade of red, and aim to bring diverse Labour women together to make our voice heard.
www.lwn.org.uk

Promoted by Labour Women's Network, 15 Albion Street, SK15 2PX

Name: Ontario NDP Caucus
Description: The ONDP endeavours to establish in this province a government whose objective shall be to substitute economic planning for irresponsible control with all its unjust consequences and thereby to give maximum opportunity for public, co-operative, and private enterprise to contribute to the development of our province.

Name: ANCMP
Description:
Fondée le 5 avril 1905, à l’initiative de Paul DOUMER, trois fois ministre des finances, député et Président de la République, sous la dénomination d’Association des Publicistes, Secrétaires Parlementaires et Collaborateurs de Ministres, reconnue par Arrêté Ministériel n° 2576 du 1/4/1911, l’Association Nationale des Collaborateurs de Ministres et de Parlementaires (ANCMP) est régie par le code de la Mutualité.

Albert Lebrun en a pris la succession. Il fut aussi député, président de la chambre des députés en 1905 puis Président du Sénat en 1927 et Président de la République
Elle regroupe :

    des membres actifs : Collaborateurs de Ministres et de Parlementaires ainsi que Collaborateurs d’élus territoriaux ;
    des membres honoraires : Dirigeants d’Entreprises, Professions libérales, personnalités diverses ;
    des correspondants français et étrangers.

Elle organise tout au long de l’année :

    des dîners-débats autour d’une personnalité.
    des rencontres avec un invité surprise.
    des voyages découvertes en région et à l’étranger.

L’ANCMP édite la revue Chambre & Sénat, revue fondée en 1903.
Hommes d’état, ministres, diplomates, chercheurs, savants, économistes, chef d’entreprise, personnalités du monde associatif de la vie civile confient à Chambre & Sénat leurs propositions et leurs analyses.

Name: Colorado Democratic Party
Description: Together, we are Colorado Democrats. Our mission is to empower all Coloradans to achieve a better future, to lead the battle for democracy, to elect honorable people who will fight hard for working families, to never abandon the dream of a better tomorrow.

Name: Dansk Kunstnerråd
Description: Dansk Kunstnerråd er en tværfaglig organisation for de professionelle kunstneres organisationer i Danmark, med henblik på samarbejde på det kunst- og kulturpolitiske område. I 2023 har Dansk Kunstnerråd 26 medlemsorganisationer med ca. 20.000 medlemmer.

Name: Party of Humanists
Description:
We are the party of the modern age: rational, liberal and progressive.

We trust and believe in man's self-realization in utmost freedom and personal responsibility. We are fully committed to civilizational and technological progress. Rational, scientific decision-making is indispensable - facts always go before feeling.

Name: Ontario NDP
Description: Ontario’s Official Opposition

Name: Food Not Bombs
Description: Food Not Bombs is a mutual aid movement with local chapters around the world.

Name: People's United Forum
Description: PUF is the sociopolitical organization empowering South Sudanese to raise their voices in matters concerning the social, economic, and political affairs of South Sudan. We are a democratic party guided by the principles of inclusivity, stewardship, liberty, transparency, and accountability

Name: Girls Who Talk Politics
Description:
Girls Who Talk Politics is a digital platform dedicated to making UK politics more accessible, engaging, and inclusive for women and girls. We provide clear, reliable political content to a community of over 68,000 followers, breaking down complex and encouraging informed conversation. 

Through online education, events, and partnerships, we empower girls and women to build political confidence and participate meaningfully in public life.

Name: Tankesmien Agenda
Description:
Tankesmien Agenda er en partipolitisk uavhengig tankesmie som bidrar med samfunnsanalyse og progressiv politikkutvikling for sentrum-venstre i norsk politikk. 

Tankesmien Agenda jobber kunnskapsbasert for et samfunn med reell frihet for alle. Det forutsetter små forskjeller, like muligheter, høy tillit og sterke demokratiske institusjoner. Alle skal ha frihet og mulighet til å delta i samfunnsliv, hverdagsliv og arbeidsliv på like vilkår, uavhengig av hvor man kommer fra, hvem man er og hvilke ressurser man har. En rettferdig samfunnsutvikling forutsetter fortsatt vekst og velferd – innenfor rammen av klimamålene og naturens tåleevne.

Tankesmien Agenda ble opprettet etter initiativ fra Landsorganisasjonen i Norge (LO) i 2014, som en uavhengig tankesmie.

Name: Puerto Rico Statehood Council - PR51st
Description: The Puerto Rico Statehood Council is working to build a national movement in support of equal rights for the U.S. citizens of Puerto Rico through statehood. We are a Washington, D.C. based, non-partisan, 501(c)4 non-profit organization that believes that the core American values of freedom, democracy, liberty and justice must apply equally to all U.S. citizens including those in Puerto Rico.

Name: Sentience – Politik für Tiere
Description: Sentience Politics trägt die Interessen nicht-menschlicher Tiere in die Mitte der Gesellschaft. Wir möchten durch institutionelle Veränderungen dafür sorgen, das Leid nicht-menschlicher Tiere möglichst effektiv zu minimieren und die Lebensumstände zu verbessern. Dafür arbeiten wir insbesondere mit den direktdemokratischen Mitteln, die uns in der Schweiz zur Verfügung stehen – namentlich mit Initiativen und Vorstössen auf kommunaler, kantonaler und nationaler Ebene.

Name: Prefeitura Municipal de Camaragibe
Description:
Camaragibe é um município brasileiro do estado de Pernambuco. Pertence à Região Metropolitana do Recife, sendo o município mais populoso e o oitavo de Pernambuco.
Elevação: 55 m
Tempo: 27 °C, vento SE a 18 km/h, umidade de 78%
Região metropolitana: Recife
Prefeito(a): Demóstenes Meira (PTB)
Fundação: 1982
Aniversário: 13 de maio
Distância até a capital: 16 km
Unidade federativa: Pernambuco

Name: Abundant Housing Illinois
Description:
Abundant Housing Illinois is a grassroots community of 6,000+ activists advocating for housing abundance and sustainable, inclusive cities in Illinois.

As a chapter of YIMBY Action, a national network of pro-housing advocates, we are committed to creating a future where everyone has access to affordable and thriving communities.

Support our work by signing up for our newsletter @ http://bit.ly/AHIL-newsletter

Name: Libertas Network
Description:
Our mission is to change hearts, minds, and laws to build a freer society by creating and implementing innovative policy reforms and exceptional educational resources.

Our Vision

A future where individuals are unleashed from restrictions that prevent them from peacefully building the lives they want.

Our Benefits

Libertas Institute is effective; 85% of our policy proposals are successfully enacted into law. By using strategy and persuasive communication to inform the public and educate elected officials, we help generate the political will to reduce and eliminate barriers that government places in the path of hard-working individuals. Our policy work is primarily focused on reforming state and local laws in Utah, where we operate. We also partner with like-minded groups and legislators in other states to help them adopt the reforms we have innovated.

Our unique educational materials, such as the Tuttle Twins children’s books, are translated into several languages and read by hundreds of thousands of families throughout the world. Our award-winning free market curriculum teaches economics to kids of all ages, and our Children’s Entrepreneur Market events provide a direct experience for youth to apply their knowledge and experience the benefits of operating a small business. These and other resources help the rising generation understand and embrace the ideas of a free society.

Name: Samajwadi Party
Description:
The Samajwadi Party was founded on 4th October 1992 by Shri Mulayam Singh Yadav ji and is based in Uttar Pradesh. It has contested Lok Sabha and State Assembly elections around the country, though its successes have been mainly in Uttar Pradesh. In the 2012 legislative assembly elections of Uttar Pradesh, SP registered a landslide victory with a clear majority in the House, thus enabling it to form the government in the state. This was expected to be the fifth term of Mulayam Singh Yadav as Chief Minister of state, but he surprised everyone by selecting his son, Akhilesh Yadav, to be the new chief minister (the youngest ever). It became official on 15 March.

PARTY IDEOLOGY
The Samajwadi Party believes in creating a socialist society, which works on the principle of equality.

PARTY CONSTITUTION

Samajwadi Party’s Constitution was revised in Eighth National Conference in Agra, Uttar Pradesh in 2011.

OUR LEADER

Ram Manohar Lohia ji, Janeshwar Mishra ji, JP Narayan ji, Karpoori Thakur ji and many more are the forever role model for every Samajwadi Party workers.

Mulayam Singh Yadav is the founder of the Samajwadi Party (1992) and Akhilesh is the President since January 2017.

PARTY PRESIDENT

Hon'ble Mr. Akhilesh Yadav ji was born on July 1, 1973, in Saifai (Etawah) of Late Shri Mulayam Singh Yadav and Late Shrimati Malti Devi.

Website
https://www.samajwadiparty.in/
