Name: Partisan
Description: Europe's first Political Tech Summit was the start of a new professional community. Partisan provides this community with a digital home — connecting, informing and empowering political professionals across Europe and beyond.

Name: Organizing Corps 2020
Description:
We are recruiting college juniors and students expecting to complete school by June 2020 to spend 8 weeks this summer – June 10, 2019–August 2, 2019 – learning the art and science of being a field organizer in a presidential election.

Corps members can earn $4,000 gaining valuable career skills in leadership, project management and communication while experiencing the exciting and rewarding field of campaigns.

The program kicks off with a five-day national training led by campaign veterans where corps members will learn key skills in field and digital organizing, and data analytics. For the remaining 7 weeks, corps members will, with the help of a coach, return to their home communities and work with their local Democratic party to turn the training into on the ground learning through action – organizing neighborhoods and registering voters. In the process, corps members will build a powerful network of like-minded peers and mentors from across the country that will last beyond 2020.

The summer 2019 corps experience will give young people the skills and tools to organize their community and – importantly – get a great first job working for the Democratic presidential nominee and fighting to win across the country in 2020.



[PAID FOR BY THE DEMOCRATIC NATIONAL COMMITTEE, DEMOCRATS.ORG. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE.]

Name: Solution Démocratique
Description:
Notre parti propose une approche différente de celle des partis traditionnels : plutôt que de multiplier les promesses, nous partons d’un constat partagé.

Si notre pays traverse une crise démocratique, sociale et institutionnelle, c’est avant tout parce que les règles qui structurent notre système politique sont défaillantes.

Aujourd’hui, un nombre restreint d’acteurs, souvent déconnectés des réalités de terrain, peut imposer des orientations politiques à l’ensemble de la population. Cette concentration du pouvoir alimente le désenchantement, la défiance, l’abstention – et fragilise notre pays.

Dans ce contexte, changer simplement les visages ne suffit plus. Il est temps de s’attaquer aux causes structurelles : réformer nos institutions, en s’inspirant des pratiques démocratiques qui ont fait leurs preuves ailleurs.

 Notre proposition est à la fois simple, transpartisane et pragmatique : redonner aux citoyens un pouvoir réel d’initiative et de décision sur les grandes orientations collectives. Cela passe par des mécanismes concrets permettant de mieux associer les citoyens aux décisions, tout en garantissant stabilité et efficacité.

Nous sommes des citoyens engagés, sans étiquette partisane, réunis autour d’un objectif commun : réconcilier les Français avec la vie publique en renforçant leur capacité d’agir.

Rendez-vous sur solutiondemocratique.fr

Name: politics
Description: politics is a political organization company based out of India.

Name: Citizens Interest
Description: Citizens Interest is a bipartisan organization combating corruption in nonprofit-advocacy industry.

Name: SEIU 1021
Description:
SEIU Local 1021 represents over 60,000 employees in local governments, non-profit agencies, health care programs and schools throughout Northern California.

SEIU Local 1021 is a diverse, member-driven organization with members who work to make our cities, schools, colleges, counties, and special districts safe and healthy places to live and raise our families. We nurse our sick, educate our children, clean our schools, and care for our seniors and developmentally disabled.

Our mission is to ensure that all workers and their families have a voice in our Union, as well as our workplace, government, and communities. We envision a society where all workers and their families live and work in dignity and respect.

In March 2007, Local 1021 united SEIU members from 10 locals in Northern California, from San Joaquin County in the central valley to Del Norte County on the Oregon border.

We’re proud to be part of SEIU, North America’s fastest growing union. With more than 2 million members, we’re united in our commitment to building a fair economy, providing workers a voice on the job, fighting for equality and ensuring that all working people can live with dignity.

Name: GroenLinks The Hague
Description: GroenLinks is the Dutch green party: our name translates GreenLeft. We care about the environment, we fight for equality, and are working to provide affordable housing in The Hague.

Name: HSS Europe
Description: The Hanns Seidel Foundation is a German political foundation that bases its values on democracy, peace and development. With the opening of the Brussels Office in 1982, the Hanns Seidel Foundation has been taking into account the importance of Brussels as the headquarter of EU and NATO.  The Brussels Office works on two major thematic areas: the European Dialogue and the Development Policy Dialogue. With its conferences, it takes up current topics of European and international politics, brings together decision-makers from various levels and countries and actively contributes to the development of a lively, critical and knowledgeable public.

Name: Génération Maastricht
Description: Génération Maastricht is one of the fastest growing student think-tank and youth organisations in Europe: with more than 750 sympathisers, 100+ volunteers and 40+ researchers. Our aim is to create a space open to all, allowing young people to be creating and advocating for policy reforms in Europe, and to make sure that make sure that, as young persons, our voices are taken into account in the international ecosystem.

Name: Abortion Rights
Description:
Abortion Rights was formed in 2003 by the merger of the two long-standing and influential campaigns – the National Abortion Campaign (NAC) and the Abortion Law Reform Association (ALRA).

We oppose any restrictions in women’s current rights and access to abortion.

We aim to improve the current UK abortion law for women, to make abortion available on the request of the woman.

We aim for all women in the UK to have equal access to safe, legal, and free abortion and to improve their experience of care.

We seek to build the widest possible support for a woman’s right to choose and encourage individuals and organisations – women’s groups, trade unions, political representatives, academics and students, health care professionals, minority ethnic, lesbian and gay and disabled people’s organisations and all others to get involved.

We are an active membership-based democratic campaigning organisation. In additional to individual members, we are delighted to have the support of NUS and civil society organisations as well as the TUC and national trade unions including AMICUS , ASLEF , CWU , FBU , NAPO ,PCS , RMT , T&G , TSSA , UCU , UNISON , STUC trade union regions, branches, sections and individual trade unionists.

We are an independent campaign, without any government or church funding. Money from membership and affiliation fees, grants, donations and our fundraising Pro-choice Lottery scheme is crucial to sustain our important work. 

If you support a woman’s right to choose, why not make a real difference and join Abortion Rights today!

Name: Danish Asphalt Pavement Association
Description: The Danish Asphalt Pavement Association is industry and employer association for Danish companies that manufacture and / or perform asphalt coatings and related activities.

Name: Culture Counts
Description:
Culture Counts works on behalf of a group of core members to place culture at the heart of policy making. The organisation and its members are committed to working openly and collaboratively. Collectively we increase the profile of culture; aligning, aggregating and amplifying the sector across policy areas.

Members are the major umbrella organisations across Scotland's arts, screen, heritage and creative industries. The group formed in 2011 to advocate for the value and importance of culture to life in Scotland. 

Culture Counts is unincorporated. Our members agree policy and communications which are overseen by a Steering Group.

Name: Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung USA
Description: The Konrad-Adenauer-Stiftung (KAS) is a German political foundation. At home as well as abroad, our civic education programs aim at promoting liberty, peace, and justice. We focus on consolidating democracy, the unification of Europe and the strengthening of transatlantic relations, as well as on development cooperation.

Name: Prefeitura de Cariacica
Description: Página destinada à divulgação das ações, serviços e obras da Prefeitura de Cariacica.

Name: Hoosier Women Forward, Inc.
Description:
WHO WE ARE |

Hoosier Women Forward is a political and civic leadership training program designed to empower Democratic women to become more active participants in politics and leaders in their communities.

OUR MISSION |

To increase the number of Democratic women in elected and appointed government positions and in positions of influence in the community and private sector.

OUR GOALS |

-Empower Democratic women to become more active, confident and valuable participants in politics and community leadership;
-Grow a powerful network of engaged Democratic women across Indiana;
-Develop Democratic women to run for office at the local, state and federal levels;
-Increase the number of Hoosier Democratic women of influence in every level of government, and in seats at the tables where decisions are made.

WHAT WE DO |

Each year, a group of twenty (20) to twenty-five (25) outstanding Democratic women will be selected through a competitive application process to participate in a nine-month leadership training program. Applications will be available in May of 2018 and the inaugural class will begin in September of 2018.

Democratic women with a demonstrated ability to take initiative in their communities or places of work and are encouraged to apply. Applicants should have an interest in public policy, advancing Indiana forward with progressive ideas, and be committed to increasing women’s influence in the political process.

Through a combination of study, field experience, and mentorship, Hoosier Women Forward participants will gain valuable political leadership training that will prepare them to become more informed, active and mindful public servants.

Name: ECR Party
Description:
European Conservatives and Reformists (ECR) Party is Europe’s leading Conservative movement. Since our foundation in 2009, we have become on of Europe’s most important political movements. With more than 40 political parties and active representation in the European Parliament, Council of Europe, Committee of Regions and NATO Parliamentary Assembly.

We are united by our centre-right values, as expressed in the Reykjavik Declaration. The ECR Party is dedicated to individual liberty, national sovereignty, parliamentary democracy, private property, limited government, free trade, family values and the devolution of power.

These values underpin our politics, including our vision for a reformed European Union. Europe stands at a crossroads and the ECR Party’s agenda for reform has never been more relevant than it is today. Join our movement, and help us advance a Europe – and a world – of free peoples, free nations and free markets.

Name: Europäisches Parlament in Deutschland
Description:
Deine Stimme in der EU. Das Europäische Parlament ist direkt von den Bürger*innen in den 27 EU-Ländern gewählt.  

Dies ist die Seite des Verbindungsbüros des Europäischen Parlamentes in Deutschland. Die englischsprachige LinkedIn-Seite des Europäischen Parlament findet ihr unter www.LinkedIn.com/company/european-parliament.

Name: Norges Bondelag
Description:
Norges Bondelag er den største fagorganisasjonen for bønder i Norge, og har over 60 000 medlemmer, over 500 lokallag og 14 fylkeslag. Gjennom gode politiske kontakter og høy faglig kompetanse jobber vi med å sikre gode vilkår for norsk matproduksjon. 

Vi har som mål å samle alle som er, eller kjenner seg knyttet til bondeyrket, fremme felles saker, trygge landbruket og ivareta bygdenes økonomiske, sosiale og kulturelle interesser. Vi forhandler hvert år med staten om bondens inntektsmuligheter. Norges Bondelag mottar ikke statsstøtte, og er økonomisk og politisk uavhengig.

Name: BVMW Vorder- und Südpfalz
Description:
Der BVMW - Bundesverband mittelständische Wirtschaft e.V. vertritt im Rahmen der Mittelstandsallianz die gemeinsamen Interessen 900.000 Unternehmerstimmen. Mehr als 200 BVMW-Geschäftsstellen im In- und Ausland setzen sich für die im Verband organisierten Unternehmen ein.

Der BVMW Rheinland-Pfalz / Saarland verbindet Unternehmen und gibt dem Mittelstand eine Stimme. Damit gelingt der persönlicher Austausch in einem attraktiven regionalen Unternehmernetzwerk.  

Der BVMW. Gemeinsam für einen starken Mittelstand. 

Schauen Sie gerne auf unserer Website vorbei: https://www.bvmw.de/de/rheinland-pfalz-saarland
Impressum: https://www.bvmw.de/impressum/

Name: Reichsbanner Schwarz-Rot-Gold e.V.
Description:
Im Reichsbanner Schwarz-Rot-Gold, Bund aktiver Demokraten e.V. engagieren sich heute Menschen mit dem Ziel, die freiheitlich-demokratische Verfassungsordnung der Bundesrepublik Deutschland zu bewahren und zu stärken. Damit führen wir die Tradition unseres 1924 gegründeten und 1933 verbotenen Verbandes aktiv fort.

Wir wissen, dass Demokratie und Freiheit nie selbstverständliche Güter sind und, dass daher die Erhaltung der Bundesrepublik Deutschland als parlamentarische, demokratische Republik eine fortwährende Aufgabe für uns alle darstellt. Unser Ziel ist es, dass mehr Menschen sich daran aktiv beteiligen.

Name: DP - Demokratesch Partei
Description:
We make policies that face the new challenges. We want to better unite the different needs in people's lives. Women and men can be successful at work and at the same time have enough time for their families, children and leisure time. We like to speak Luxembourgish and are proud of our multilingualism. The DP has ensured that there are finally different schools for our different children in Luxembourg and that the talents of all children – in and out of school – are adequately encouraged.

We are convinced that we must not play off the interests of economy and ecology against each other, but must intelligently combine the two in order to continue to develop our country sustainably and responsibly.

The DP will invest massively in the country's mobility infrastructure so that we can all get from A to B faster in the future - whether by bus, train, car, tram, bicycle or on foot. We have proven that a balanced national budget is possible, despite high investments in the areas of education, mobility and housing.

For the DP, healthy state finances are the basis of our politics and for the credibility of our country in Europe and in the world. Not "either ... or", but "both and": This is the basis of the successful Luxembourg model, with which we will continue to lead our country into a secure future.

Because that is "Zukunft op Lëtzebuergesch".

Name: Groupe Socialistes et apparentés - Assemblée Nationale
Description:
Le groupe des députés socialistes et apparentés rassemble les députés socialistes, écologistes, citoyens, progressistes et divers gauche, élus le 7 juillet 2024 pour la XVIIème législature.

Twitter : @socialistesAN
Facebook : @socialistesAN
Instagram : @socialistesan

Name: WRS
Description: WRS Political is a media, digital, and public relations firm helping center-right leaders tell their stories, shape narratives, and drive policy.

Name: Bangladesh Nationalist Party - BNP
Description:
About Bangladesh Nationalist Party-BNP
The Bangladesh Nationalist Party is one of the major political parties of Bangladesh. It was founded on 1 September 1978 by former Bangladesh President Ziaur Rahman after the Presidential election of 1978, with a view to uniting the people with nationalist ideology of the country.

Ideology:

The party holds the ideology of Bangladeshi nationalism as its core concept and adopted a 19-point program which declared that "The sovereignty and independence of Bangladesh, golden fruits of the historic liberation struggle, is our sacred trust and inviolable right". The founding manifesto of the BNP claims that the people of Bangladesh want to "...see that all-out faith and confidence in the almighty Allah, democracy, nationalism and socialism of social and economic justice are reflected in all spheres of national life".

BNP and its student wing was the driving force in the 1990 uprising against the autocratic Ershad rule that culminated in the fall of the regime and the restoration of democracy in Bangladesh. Begum Khaleda Zia, who served as the party's chairperson from 1983, was elected as the first woman Prime Minister of Bangladesh.

Begum Khaleda Zia is the chairperson of the party, with Tarique Rahman as the senior vice-chairman and Mirza Fakhrul Islam Alamgir as the secretary-general. And since 9 February, 2018 Tarique Rahman is the acting chairman of the party.

Name: Parti Communiste Français (PCF)
Description: Le Parti communiste français (PCF) est un parti politique français qui porte au coeur de son projet l'émancipation humaine et la préservation de la planète. Présent dans tous les départements, il est conduit par Fabien Roussel, député du Nord et candidat à la présidentielle 2022.

Name: bdia nrw . bund deutscher innenarchitektinnen und innenarchitekten - Landesverband NRW
Description:
Der bdia ist der einzige Berufsverband nur für Innenarchitekt*innen, wurde 1952 in Detmold gegründet und zählt bundesweit über 2.000 Mitglieder. 

Für die Innenarchitekt:innen stellt er eine starke Berufsvertretung in NRW, auf Bundes- und Europaebene dar. Für Auftraggeber ist die Mitgliedschaft im bdia eine Qualitätsmarke, denn hier findet er Fachleute, die alleine oder im Netzwerk, Lösungen für alle Fragen der Innenarchitektur bieten.

Wir sind dort, wo es um unsere Belange geht. Wir sind einer der Gründungsverbände der Architektenkammer Nordrhein-Westfalen. Wir sind ein starker Partner in der AKNW und ihren Arbeitsgremien. 
Wir sind eingebunden in die Arbeit der Bundesarchitektenkammer (BAK). Wir sind tätig in Sonderbereichen wie DIN-Ausschüssen.

Wir bieten gelebte Praxis im regelmäßigen Austausch unter Kollegen in den Regionalgruppen in NRW; im Miteinander ohne großen Zeit- und Wegeaufwand; in sozialen Netzwerken; Möglichkeiten zur Bildung von Kooperationen, um somit Kräfte zu bündeln; durch informative Exkursionen und Veranstaltungen;  durch gemeinschaftliche Messeauftritte; mit aktuellen Seminaren, als Grundlage für die Arbeit als Innenarchitekt*in.

Wir stehen für die Berufsgruppe der Innenarchitekten/Innen in NRW und arbeiten für die Bewahrung des gesetzlichen Schutzes der Berufsbezeichnung Innenarchitekt*in; die Akzeptanz des Berufsstand der Innenarchitekt*innen als Träger gesellschaftlicher und kultureller Verantwortung; die öffentliche Diskussion der Qualität des Planens und Bauens der Innenarchitektur; angemessene Honorare; die Vereinbarkeit von Familie und Beruf; faire Bedingungen beim Berufsstart; Studienabschlüsse, die zur Kammerfähigkeit führen.

Name: Partido Nacional
Description:
Partido político de Uruguay que promueve la democracia y la participación ciudadana. Tras la Elección Nacional del 2019, el Partido cuenta con 10 senadores y 30 diputados.
Tras la Elección Departamental del 2015, el Partido Nacional encabeza el gobierno en 12 de los Departamentos.

Name: Eerste Kamerfractie GroenLinks-PvdA
Description: Het officiële LinkedIn account van GroenLinks-PvdA in de Eerste Kamer

Name: 10 Volte Meglio
Description:
10 VOLTE MEGLIO è un gruppo politico costituito da imprenditori, professionisti, manager, professori, scienziati, startupper, innovatori, studenti, impegnati nella società civile, nei servizi sociali. Siamo uomini e donne del nord, del centro, del sud Italia, ciascuno con storie di successo alle spalle.
Che hanno deciso di impegnarsi per l’Italia  per proteggere gli interessi di tutti. Vogliono farlo mettendo a disposizione del paese le loro competenze, la loro voglia di fare, il loro senso civico, il loro piano di azione e la loro visione di futuro per creare un'Italia che sia realmente 10 VOLTE MEGLIO.

Name: ND
Description: Politisk organisation/parti med en handfull mandat. Finns över hela Sverige.

Name: Data Trust
Description:
Big data is our business. Data Trust builds the premier national voter file and combines it with expansive consumer data inventories and individualized analytical models to help our right-of-center clients create a data-first strategy.

Founded in 2011, Data Trust’s mission was simple: provide the best, most affordable political data on the market. Since then, we have developed an unparalleled force of voter and electoral data in the right-of-center data ecosystem.  We now have data on over 300 million individuals and a unique data warehouse that contains nearly 2,500 individual data points, including hundreds that are unique to Data Trust’s inventory.

Data Trust’s tactical, relevant, and accurate voter data provides a foundational data source for nearly all major Republican party committees, campaigns, and conservative organizations, allowing them to contact voters more efficiently—and cost-effectively.  We also offer our expertise to many trade associations and corporate clients, providing big data solutions and precise audience targeting that mobilizes members and engages customers.

Data Trust’s data allows you to build custom audiences to reach voters effectively through nearly every medium, including digital platforms, phone, door-to-door, and mail. This data then is enriched by our clients returning their metrics, creating an expansive ecosystem of Republican and conservative organizations that works to engage voters, win elections, and influence policy.

Despite offering the most up-to-date voter files, constantly refreshed consumer data, modeling library, and data visualizations, our data is affordable to organizations of all sizes and is powered by the most secure infrastructure.

If you work in political data, there is no one better than Data Trust.

Name: Gauche Républicaine et Socialiste (GRS)
Description:
Parti politique créé en Février 2019 par Emmanuel Maurel, député européen, et Marie-Noëlle Lienemann, ancienne ministre
Anthony Gratacos, porte parole, conseiller départemental de Seine-et-Marne
Sophie Camard, maire du 1er secteur de Marseille, membre de la direction nationale

Name: Progress Texas
Description:
Progress Texas is a non-profit media organization promoting progressive messages and actions in our state.

We tell the progressive side of the story in our state to develop strong narratives around progressive issues and shape favorable public opinion. Follow us for daily updates in our newsfeed, on our website, and in the mainstream media as we work to build a stronger Texas.

Our team of seasoned campaign and media pros develop great content with clear and compelling messages to inspire activism and voter participation. Founded in 2010, Progress Texas is an affiliate of the ProgressNow national network.
While campaigns come and go, Progress Texas is the permanent home for progressive media, message, and activism in our state.

Texas isn't as much a red state as it is a non-voting state. We’re getting better, but compared to the rest of the country our voter turnout ranked 41st overall in 2018. It’s up to all of us to do something about it.

We’re building a stronger and more progressive Texas that focuses on the things that unite us instead of divide us. You can help impact change every time you share our content, sign a petition, contact a legislator, make a donation and most importantly - when you vote.

Visit our website to see our latest content and sign up for our email list!

Name: Radiograf Rådet
Description:
Radiograf Rådet er den faglige organisation for radiograffaget i Danmark.

Vores medlemmer er stort set alle landets radiografer, og vi har dermed knap 2.500 medlemmer svarende til omkring 90 % af landets radiografer og radiografstuderende.

Name: Gulvbranchen
Description: Gulvbranchen er et branchefællesskab, der samler det fagtekniske arbejde mellem leverandører og entreprenører, der arbejder professionelt med montering og vedligeholdelse af gulve.

Name: The Matriots
Description:
Tired of partisan rancor? Join us in a political action committee working to get more Ohio women elected to public office who will promote a healthy economy in which women can thrive and prosper.

The Matriots is an Ohio nonpartisan political action committee founded in May of 2017 by a group of women who participated in the Women’s March on Washington. Moved by the tremendous outpouring of support that day for American women and their issues, the Ohio marchers decided to launch an effort to put more women into political leadership to ensure economic justice and advance policies impacting the lives of Ohio women.

Name: Fremskrittspartiet/Progress Party
Description:
(English version after the Norweegian text) 

Fremskrittspartiet er landets tredje største politiske parti. Vi har ca 17 000 medlemmer, hvorav ca 4000 tillitsvalgte og folkevalgte. Vår Stortingsgruppe er Stortingets tredje største gruppe, og består av 27 representanter.

Partikontoret holder til i Karl Johans gate 25. Her arbeider det ca 25 personer. 


The Progress Party is the third largest party in Norway. We are approximately 17 000 members, of which approximately 4000 are representatives and nationally elected. The Parliamentary Group is the third largest, of which 27 are Members of parliament.
 
The Party Office is situated in Karl Johans gate 25 with around 25 employees.

Name: Green Party of the Philippines
Description:
We are an emerging national green political party in the Philippines. 

STATEMENT OF POLITICAL AGENDA

1. National moratorium on all forms of mining.
2. Nationwide logging ban and reforestation/aforestation of 50% of all land area of the major islands.
3. Swift shift to full renewable sources of energy.
4. Nationwide plastic ban and full implementation of all solid waste, liquid waste and toxic waste management laws.
5. Shift to 100% organic agriculture with full support to small farmers and fisherfolks especially those within marine and farming protected areas.
6. Full protection and support to Indigenous Peoples, the Bangsamoro and Cordillera Peoples for their self governance and sustainable development.
7. Green Governance that will lead to more control and support for local communities to manage their own ecosystems.
8. Shift to electric pubic transport system with sufficient support from government to small drivers and operators.
9. Protection and rehabilitation of all rivers, lakes and protected lands and waters.
10. Protection through building community resiliency and adaptation and justice through reparation and rehabilitation of all victims and survivors of victims of the impacts of climate change.

Name: Bundesjugendvertretung
Description:
Die BJV setzt sich als Interessenvertretung gegenüber der Politik für die vielfältigen Anliegen von jungen Menschen von 0 bis 30 Jahren ein – seit 2001 ist sie gesetzlich verankert und hat sozialpartnerschaftlichen Status.

Als BJV wollen wir, dass junge Menschen mitenscheiden können. Diesen Anspruch stellen wir auch an uns selbst: Die BJV ist eine jugendgeleitete Organisation. Der BJV-Vorstand besteht aus jungen, ehrenamtlichen Jugendvertreter*innen unter 30 Jahren. Diese werden aus den zahlreichen Mitgliedsorganisationen der BJV entsandt und von der hauptamtlichen Geschäftsstelle in ihrer Arbeit unterstützt.

Alle Entscheidungen, die heute getroffen werden, beeinflussen das Leben von Kindern und Jugendlichen am längsten – also sollen junge Menschen auch mitreden können!

Dafür setzten wir uns als Lobby für die Rechte und Anliegen von jungen Menschen ein.

Insgesamt sind rund 3 Millionen Menschen in Österreich unter 30 Jahre. Ihre Anliegen sind unser Auftrag als Interessenvertretung.

Name: BVMW Landau i.d.Pfalz
Description:
Der BVMW - Bundesverband mittelständische Wirtschaft e.V. vertritt im Rahmen der Mittelstandsallianz die gemeinsamen Interessen 900.000 Unternehmerstimmen. Mehr als 300 BVMW-Geschäftsstellen im In- und Ausland setzen sich für die im Verband organisierten Unternehmen ein.

Der BVMW Nordbaden-Rhein-Neckar verbindet mittelständische Unternehmen von der Vorderpfalz über die Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar und Technologieregion Karlsruhe bis zum Nordschwarzwald.Damit gelingt der persönlicher Austausch in einem attraktiven regionalen Unternehmernetzwerk.  

Der BVMW. Gemeinsam für einen starken Mittelstand. 

Schauen Sie gerne auf unserer Website vorbei: https://www.bvmw.de/landau
Impressum: https://www.bvmw.de/impressum/

Name: Close the Gap California
Description: Close the Gap California is a statewide campaign to achieve gender parity in the California Legislature by 2028. By recruiting accomplished, progressive women in targeted districts and preparing them to launch competitive campaigns, CTG is changing the face of the Legislature one cycle at a time. 25 CTG Recruits are serving today, 18 of them women of color. We recruit women committed to reproductive justice, public school funding, and combating poverty.

Name: Deutscher Hanfverband
Description: Der Deutsche Hanfverband (DHV) vertritt die Interessen der Cannabiskonsumenten und Legalisierungsbefürworter. Wir streben einen legalen, verbraucherfreundlichen Markt für das Genussmittel Cannabis an – von der Produktion bis zum Verkauf in Fachgeschäften für Erwachsene. Wir wollen jede Form von Diskriminierung beenden und kämpfen für sinnvolle Regeln u.a. in den Bereichen Führerschein, Besitz, Konsum, Eigenanbau, Anbauvereine und Medizin.

Name: Pro Flughafen
Description:
#ZRH #Flughafen #Direktverbindungen #TorzurWelt
Der Flughafen ist Zürichs Tor zur Welt. Mit seinen Direktverbindungen nach Europa und in die ganze Welt  ist er ein wichtiger Wirtschaftsmotor für die Region und die ganze Schweiz. Um weiterhin wettbewerbsfähig und zukunftssicher zu bleiben, benötigt der Flughafen kontinuierliche Verbesserungen und Modernisierungen. Pro Flughafen setzt sich für eine nachhaltige, effiziente und moderne Luftfahrtinfrastruktur ein, die Wohlstand und Wachstum in der gesamten Region fördert.

Name: RISE
Description:
Rise builds student-led advocacy campaigns and programs that put higher education within reach for all.

Rise trains and hires community college and university students to organize campaigns focused on eliminating tuition and fees, expanding financial aid, ending student hunger and homelessness, and getting out the vote. Rise also created the Student Navigator Network to provide case management and one-on-one assistance to students affected by COVID-19. Although Rise students work nationwide, our primary focus states in 2020 are California, Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.

Name: Chamber Partnership Western Balkans
Description: The Western Balkans Chamber Partnership Project connects the national chambers of commerce in the Western Balkans and supports them in growing sustainable relations with the regional economy. Solid and collaborative chambers can help the private sector increase the region's economic competitiveness. And by strengthening our partner chambers in empowering themselves and their network, we, together, pave the way toward sustainable economic development.

Name: Alliance for New Mobility Europe
Description:
The Alliance is the place where New Mobility public and private stakeholders come together to define common interests, policies and positions. 
Formed in 2020, we are aiming to become the voice of the sector at European and national level, as a knowledge portal and enthusiastic advocate for New Mobility solutions for the benefit of our societies and economies in Europe.

Name: Students Learn Students Vote Coalition
Description:
The Students Learn Students Vote (SLSV) Coalition is the national hub and largest nonpartisan network in the United States dedicated to increasing college student voter participation.

We convene and connect campuses, nonprofit partners, students, and philanthropic leaders with each other, and with resources and programming towards achieving our vision of ensuring that every student has easy and equal access to participate in every election. We use data, relationships, celebration, and easy-to-follow planning structures, to help campus and local leaders register and turn out more student voters every year. 

Our theory of change is rooted in institutionalizing nonpartisan voter engagement within campus cultures and processes. By connecting and supporting local campus leaders with the resources, tools, and knowledge they need to build a diverse coalition, analyze student voting data, strategically plan, and embed voter registration, voter education, and voter mobilization into existing campus processes, we believe voter engagement can become an integral part of the campus culture.

Name: POLITICODE
Description:
Politicode provides Political Consulting services to all the parties involved in political domain including political parties, politicians, organisations and brands. We conduct in-depth study of all the factors which affect or shape voter’s behaviour by engaging and understanding them; thus, assisting client to take informed decisions for future course of actions. Our campaigns are based on data-led strategies to achieve political goals. 

Our services can be purchased individually and are tailored to your needs but when combined they offer a full end-to-end campaign package. Politicode provides clients with a truly quantifiable & successful approach to campaigning.

Name: BuVEG - Bundesverband energieeffiziente Gebäudehülle e.V.
Description:
Der BuVEG vertritt alle Gewerke der Baubranche, die bei Neubau, Renovierung oder Sanierung einer energieeffizienten Gebäudehülle mitwirken. Dazu zählen beispielsweise Hersteller von Produkten für die Errichtung von Fassaden aus Putz oder Ziegeln, für die Anbringung von Dämmung beziehungsweise Wärmedämmverbundsystemen (WDVS), etwa aus Mineralwolle oder Styropor- beziehungsweise EPS-Platten, und für den Austausch von alten Fenstern und Türen.

Als Verband bündeln wir die Interessen und das Fachwissen unserer Mitglieder und bringen beides in den Austausch mit der Politik, relevanten Verbänden, den Medien und den NGOs ein. 

Einen besonderen Schwerpunkt unserer Arbeit bildet die Klimapolitik: Auf Basis wissenschaftlich hinterlegter Studien und Stellungnahmen machen wir auf die Bedeutung der effizienten Gebäudehülle für das Erreichen der Klimaschutzziele und der Energiewende aufmerksam und suchen nach Lösungen, die den Weg zu einem klimaneutralen Gebäudebestand ebnen.

Name: Union of Municipalities of New Brunswick | Union des Municipalités du Nouveau-Brunswick
Description:
The Union of the Municipalities of New Brunswick (UMNB) is a bilingual association of sixty local governments of all sizes, representing over one third of New Brunswick’s population.

Since 1994, UMNB has advocated for strong, sustainable communities throughout the province. Our members decide UMNB’s policies & priorities through member resolutions, at regional Zone meetings, and at our Annual General Meeting. Together, our members tackle local challenges and share solutions to make life better for their citizens.

***

L’Union des municipalités du Nouveau-Brunswick (UMNB) est une association bilingue de 60 gouvernements locaux à travers la province et qui représente plus du tiers de la population. 

Depuis 1994, l’UMNB milite pour des collectivités fortes et durables à la grandeur de la province. Nos membres déterminent les politiques et les priorités de l’UMNB au moyen de résolutions adoptées par les membres, lors des réunions régionales de zones et de notre assemblée générale annuelle. Nos membres unissent leurs efforts pour relever les défis locaux et échangent des solutions visant à améliorer la vie de leurs citoyens.

Name: Fundación Konrad Adenauer Argentina
Description:
Somos una asociación civil sin fines de lucro. Nuestros valores y principios
coinciden plenamente con los de la Unión Demócrata Cristiana de Alemania
(CDU). Somos independientes tanto en la organización jurídica como en el
plano financiero. Nuestros ingresos provienen de asignaciones del Estado,
contribuciones voluntarias, donaciones y cuotas de participantes.
Nuestra casa matriz se encuentra en Berlín. Con un total de más de 1300
empleados en todo el mundo, disponemos de centros de estudios y
formación en Alemania y en Europa. A nivel mundial estamos presentes
con oficinas propias y representantes en más de 120 países.

Trabajamos en la Argentina desde 1964. En estas casi seis décadas los
programas realizados se desarrollaron de acuerdo con los principios
y valores que nos rigen, tomando en cuenta la coyuntura política
y económica, pero siempre buscando nuevas ideas, propuestas y
oportunidades de capacitación, formación y asesoría.
Nuestro principal objetivo en la República Argentina ha sido y es el
fortalecimiento del sistema democrático, de sus instituciones y actores.
Nuestro trabajo se caracteriza por una fuerte y exitosa interacción con las
diversas organizaciones contrapartes y una gran cantidad de personas
e instituciones afines que hoy en día conforman una importante red de
contactos de mutua cooperación.

Name: KAS Perú
Description:
Libertad, justicia y solidaridad son los principios a los que se orienta el trabajo de la Konrad Adenauer Stiftung (KAS). La KAS es una fundación política allegada a la Unión Demócrata Cristiana (CDU). Como cofundador de la CDU y primer canciller federal alemán, Konrad Adenauer (1876-1967) representa la reconstrucción de Alemania sobre las bases de la economía social de mercado, su reinserción en la política exterior, la visión de la integración europea. Su legado político e intelectual es para nosotros una inspiración y un compromiso.

Queremos motivar a las personas a participar activamente en la construcción del futuro. A través de más de 100 oficinas y proyectos en más de 120 países contribuimos a fomentar la democracia, el estado de derecho y la economía social de mercado.

Trabajamos en cooperación con instituciones públicas, partidos políticos y organizaciones de la sociedad civil. Nuestras metas y valores buscan profundizar la cooperación política regional y global. 

Para su compromiso en el Perú, donde la KAS trabaja desde hace más de 50 años, hemos definido como principales objetivos:
El apoyo a la institucionalización y fortalecimiento de las estructuras democráticas, de los partidos políticos y del estado de derecho, promoviendo la formación política, especialmente en las nuevas generaciones.

La promoción del debate académico y político sobre el rol de Perú y de América Latina en los retos globales en el contexto de la política exterior y de la política de seguridad.

El fomento de un diálogo constructivo entre la política y actores religiosos, económicos y de la sociedad civil, promoviendo la construcción de una sociedad pluralista basada en el respeto a los derechos humanos, el principio de la subsidiaridad y la economía social de mercado.
La promoción de un uso responsable de las nuevas tecnologías, aprovechando las oportunidades comunicativas de la digitalización para lograr una democracia más participativa y cercana a los ciudadanos.

Name: Boghandlerforeningen
Description:
Boghandlerforeningen er boghandlernes brancheforening

Som brancheforening varetager foreningen danske boghandleres fælles interesser, særligt i forhold til:

• forlæggere og forlæggerorganisationer
• lovgivning, myndigheder og institutioner
• virksomheder, der har betydning for boghandelen
• erhvervsorganisationer, f. eks. butikshandelens hoved- og arbejdsgiverorganisationer
• uddannelsesspørgsmål

Boghandlerforeningens formål er også at virke for fagets udvikling og rationalisering, for etablering af interessefællesskaber og andre hensigtsmæssige samarbejdsformer.

 Boghandlerforeningen har 210 medlemmer (2021).

Name: WA Institute for a Democratic Future
Description:
WAIDF was established in late 1997 to develop and promote emerging generations of Democratic and civic leaders in Washington State. Founded by Dean Nielsen and Lisa Witter, the program was established in response to a lack of organizations or training at the time that offered a comprehensive learning experience for young adults.  The first class graduated 24 fellows in June of 1998.  IDF has graduated over 600 fellows over the last 26 years and is proud of the wide array of accomplishments of our alumni.

WAIDF is a six-month fellowship from January through June, occurring over eleven intensive weekends.  During these weekends the program focuses on a diverse range of political topics. The program covers the nuts and bolts of campaigns and elections, geographic issues from around the state, and developing leadership skills with our fellows. The program offers a rich curriculum, networking opportunities, and will leave Fellows with lasting ties to their current class and other alumni. Fellows meet with elected officials, leading experts, business owners, lobbyists, nonprofit leaders, and people making a difference in their communities all over the state and in Washington D.C. We want our fellows to get engaged in the political process while introducing them to the people and issues that are affecting our state.  Each year IDF graduates a “farm team” of progressive leaders who go out into the world and make a difference within campaigns, policy jobs, non profits and work in their communities.

Name: American Bridge 21st Century
Description: American Bridge 21st Century is a progressive research and communications organization committed to holding Republicans accountable for their words and actions and helping you determine when Republican candidates are pretending to be something they’re not.

Name: UNION OBRERA METALURGICA
Description: La Unión Obrera Metalúrgica (UOM) es el sindicato que representa a los trabajadores metalúrgicos.
Location: Comuna 1, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Academy Politics
Description:
Academy Politics is an apartisan, non-profit organization that seeks to recruit, assist, and support service academy graduates that want to continue their service to the nation through political office.

We are seeking in to increase the number of Service Academy grads serving at the local, state, and national level in order to create a network of graduates that are willing and able to work towards common goals regardless of political party.

Name: Juventude Popular
Description: A Juventude Popular é a organização política de juventude autónoma do CDS-PP. Rege-se pelos valores da democracia-cristã, do liberalismo e do conservadorismo.

Name: Pro-Choice Washington
Description:
Pro-Choice Washington is the only organization solely focused on political and legislative advocacy for reproductive freedom in Washington state. We believe every person deserves equitable access to affordable, unbiased, quality reproductive and abortion healthcare within their community.

Our organization is powered by a network of more than 26,000 members, donors, and activists across the state who are speaking up for reproductive rights through advocacy, community engagement, and education.

Name: Swing Strategies - California
Description:
We believe thoughtful engagement in the political process can improve communities, strengthen businesses, and create opportunities for quality jobs and a thriving economy.

Swing Strategies helps our clients win political and public affairs campaigns that have a meaningful impact in people’s lives. Through an unmatched combination of strategic insight and award-winning creativity, we consistently deliver better results.

Name: North Norway European Office
Description:
The North Norway European Office represents the regional interests of northern Norway in Brussels. The office particularly follows and seeks to influence the development of European Arctic policy, regional policy and industrial policies related to raw materials, transport, fisheries and R&D. Through its presence in Brussels, the office is also a regional competence centre on EU/EEA matters.

-----------------

Nord-Norges Europakontor ble opprettet i 2005 for å fremme og forsterke nordnorske interesser i EU. Kontoret medvirker i EUs politikkutvikling ved å spille inn nordnorske synspunkter så tidlig i prosessen som mulig. Man ønsker å påvirke i forkant samt utnytte handlingsrommet i etterkant. Gjennom tilstedeværelsen i Brussel er kontoret dessuten landsdelens kompetansesenter på EU/EØS.

Name: Agency for the Prohibition of Nuclear Weapons in Latin America and the Caribbean (OPANAL)
Description:
OPANAL (Agency for the Prohibition of Nuclear Weapons in Latin America and the Caribbean) is a regional organization created with the objective of promoting nuclear weapons non-proliferation in Latin America and the Caribbean . 

As an international organization, we focus on strengthening the Treaty of Tlatelolco, the first nuclear-weapon-free zone treaty in a densely populated area of the world. Our work encompasses promoting nuclear energy for peaceful purposes, developing measures to prevent illicit trafficking of nuclear materials, and collaborating with other international organizations to promote nuclear safety. 

OPANAL is committed to building a world free of nuclear weapons and works tirelessly to ensure that Latin America and the Caribbean remain a nuclear-weapon-free zone.
Location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México

Name: Internationale Bodensee-Konferenz
Description:
Die Internationale Bodensee-Konferenz (IBK) ist das politische Dach der grenzüberschreitenden Zusammenarbeit in der Bodenseeregion.

Ziel der IBK ist es, die Bodenseeregion als attraktiven Lebens-, Natur-, Kultur- und Wirtschaftsraum zu erhalten und zu fördern und die regionale Zusammengehörigkeit zu stärken. 

Grundlage der Zusammenarbeit bildet das Leitbild der IBK für den Bodenseeraum. 

Zu den zehn Mitgliedern zählen die Länder und Kantone Baden-Württemberg, Schaffhausen, Zürich, Thurgau, St.Gallen, Appenzell Ausserrhoden, Appenzell Innerrhoden, Fürstentum Liechtenstein, Vorarlberg und Bayern.

Name: 18 Million Rising
Description:
Harnessing the power of the internet, cultural work, and movement building, 18MR grows Asian American political power by educating, mobilizing, and organizing Asian Americans towards taking collective action online and offline.

We work within movements for racial justice, abolition, and democracy towards a liberated future for Asian Americans and all marginalized peoples.

Name: Office of Kamal Haasan
Description: Office of Kamal Haasan supports the parliamentary policy and public initiatives of Thiru Kamal Haasan - Member-Elect, Rajya Sabha. Our work spans legislative research, governance innovation, and civic engagement, with a focus on progressive policymaking rooted in constitutional values, scientific temper, and centrist policies. We bring together a multidisciplinary team committed to reimagining public service.

Name: Liberale Surental
Description: Liberale Geuensee - Wir machen Zukunft.

Name: GCU Students' Association
Description:
GCU Students' Association exists to represent and enable GCU students to enhance all aspects of their student experience. This is our Mission. All GCU students are automatically members of the Students' Association.

We are constantly striving towards our Vision that GCU students will have an outstanding experience that will live with them forever and our Values are Diversity, Community, Participation, Fun, Support and Leadership. We are an award winning organisation.

We are a charity with charitable purposes and are a separate and independent organisation from GCU. We are located in the Students' Association Building on the Glasgow Campus and have a office at GCU London.

Name: Équipe LaSalle Team
Description:
Forte de l’expérience des mandats précédents, Équipe LaSalle Team se démarque par l’audacité et l’investissement personnel de ses élus et par un important bassin de bénévoles remarquables. Tous ayant un attachement sincère à l’arrondissement et une fierté sans borne à faire partie d’une collectivité où se conjuguent au présent développement, environnement et diversité.

La volonté des membres d’Équipe LaSalle Team est de poursuivre les efforts de l’arrondissement afin de maintenir un milieu de vie de qualité, bâti sur une communauté durable, dynamique et prospère.

Name: Ontario Public Service Employees Union
Description: OPSEU is a 180,000 member public service union located in Ontario, Canada. It represents workers in the Ontario Public Services, Colleges, the LCBO and the broader public sector. That includes about 50,000 members who work in Ontario's health care system.

Name: DukungCalonmu
Description:
One Platform for all Politician Needs!

Dukungcalonmu.com dikelola secara profesional oleh PT. Dukung Calonmu Indonesia

[Under Development]
Startup digital politik pertama dan satu-satunya di Indonesia!
Campaign Platform
Online Election
Political Marketplace

Kehadiran DukungCalonmu.com diharapkan akan menghadirkan budaya politik baru di Indonesia melalui digitalitasi politik guna meningkatkatnya partisipasi masyarakat dalam politik sehingga akan terpilihnya pemimpin-pemimpin yang mampu membawa Indonesia lebih baik.

Name: Amsterdamse VVD
Description: De VVD-fractie in de  gemeenteraad van Amsterdam telt 5 raadsleden en 2 fractievertegenwoordigers. De fractievoorzitter is Daan Wijnants. De Amsterdamse VVD is eveneens vertegenwoordigd in stadsdeelcommissies door heel Amsterdam. Samen knokken we voor een vrij, veilig en welvarend Amsterdam.

Name: Sindicato dos Petroleiros do Norte Fluminense
Description:
Somos o maior sindicato dos petroleiros da América Latina. Defendemos os interesses dos petroleiros e petroleiras há cerca de 30 anos, lutando por direitos trabalhistas e valorização da categoria. Defender a Petrobrás é defender o Brasil!

No início, havia apenas o Sindipetro-RJ, que defendia os interesses dos trabalhadores do estado, e instalou-se em Macaé em 1988. Com o passar dos anos, a Bacia de Campos foi se firmando como maior produtora de óleo e gás do país e, com isso, começou a surgir entre os trabalhadores da região Norte Fluminense a necessidade de ter uma estrutura sindical mais eficaz de representação na região. Por isso, em 1995 foi realizado um plebiscito na categoria, que decidiu pela criação do SINDIPETRO-NF (Sindicato dos Petroleiros do Norte Fluminense). Em julho de 96, tomou posse a primeira diretoria do NF.

O Sindipetro-NF defende e luta pelos interesses de todos os trabalhadores das empresas do setor petróleo que atuam em atividades fins: perfuração, exploração e processamento de óleo e gás.

Atualmente, possui mais de 9.500 trabalhadores filiados, incluindo os das empresas contratadas e parceiras da Petrobras, como a Halliburton, Schlumberger, BJ Service, Brasdrill e Falcon. Mas pretende ampliar esse número buscando filiar trabalhadores de empresas onde a atividade principal é o petróleo.

Em todo país a categoria petroleira é representada por sindicatos petroleiros que somam um total de 19. Suas diretorias mantêm uma interação constante e têm como órgãos máximos de representação a Federação Única dos Petroleiros (FUP), a Confederação Nacional dos Químicos (CNQ) e a Central Única dos Trabalhadores (CUT).

Name: Bundesverband Flächenheizungen und Flächenkühlungen e. V. (BVF)
Description: Der Bundesverband Flächenheizungen und Flächenkühlungen e.V. (BVF) wurde 1971 gegründet und ist ein Zusammenschluss von über 50 namhaften Unternehmen aus Heizungsindustrie, Regelungstechnik, Montage sowie angrenzender Bereiche. Die Fußbodenheizung stellt den Hauptanwendungsbereich dar, wobei die Wand- und Deckenheizung stark an Bedeutung gewinnen.  Ebenfalls stark steigend ist der Einsatz von Systemen zur Flächenkühlung, insbesondere über die Decke. Wir stellen Ihnen umfangreiche und produktneutrale Informationen zu Systemen der elektrischen und der hydraulischen Flächenheizung und Flächenkühlung kostenlos zur Verfügung.

Name: Liberaler Mittelstand Baden-Württemberg (LIM)
Description: WIR SETZEN UNS FÜR EINE WIRTSCHAFTSPOLITIK MIT AUGENMASS EIN.

Name: League of Women Voters of Florida
Description:
The League of Women Voters of Florida is a nonpartisan political organization encouraging informed and active participation in government, working to increase understanding of major policy issues, and advocating for legislative changes and policies for the public good.

We envision a democracy where every person has the desire, the right, the knowledge and the confidence to participate.

The League of Women Voters of Florida is an organization fully committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion in principle and in practice. Diversity, equity, and inclusion are central to the organization’s current and future success in engaging all individuals, households, communities, and policy makers in creating a more perfect democracy.

Name: Investeringskader Waddengebied
Description: Het Investeringskader Waddengebied (IKW) is het meerjarig investeringsprogramma van de Waddenprovincies om onderscheidende en bijzondere projecten in het Waddengebied mogelijk te maken. Samen met het Waddenfonds en in afstemming met (natuur)organisaties, overheden, bedrijfsleven en kennisinstellingen, draagt het IKW bij aan de duurzame economische en ecologische versterking van het Waddengebied.

Name: Alberta Federation of Labour
Description: The Alberta Federation of Labour is the leading voice for working Albertans, representing 28 affiliated unions and 170,000 unionized workers across Alberta.

Name: Rethink! GOP
Description:
Rethink! GOP is a trailblazing Super PAC leading the charge in political innovation. Operating across 18 states, our mission extends far beyond conventional boundaries, incorporating essential components such as Get Out The Vote (GOTV), Early Voting, and Ballot Harvesting. Guided by the esteemed leadership of former Arizona GOP State Party Chairwoman, Dr. Kelli Ward, and driven by Gen Z Republican Consultant and political reformist, Robert Duran IV, alongside the dynamic California's 2022 Secretary of State candidate and best-selling author, Rachel Hamm, our organization emerges as a powerhouse committed to revitalizing and revolutionizing the political landscape. 

Rethink! GOP is dedicated to spearheading transformative change in Republican voting strategies on a national scale. In our pursuit of progress, Rethink! GOP boasts the largest social media army for the GOP, led by Conservative Influencer Cam Higby. By leveraging cutting-edge technologies and strategies, we harness the full potential of digital and social media to engage voters, amplify our message, and achieve impactful results. Join us in reshaping the future of Republican politics as we combine visionary leadership with innovative approaches for a new era of electoral success.

Name: International Association of Political Consultants
Description:
IAPC members represents a broad spectrum of professional political activities. The great majority of them have played significant roles in electing the heads of state in the world’s democracies. 

The IAPC is committed to fostering democracy and the democratic process throughout the world. The organization has remained true to its original mission of fostering the growing and diverse profession of political consulting as well as the practical aspects of democratic elections.
 
The IAPC accomplishes this by bringing together members at its annual meeting to exchange views and information about political developments and campaign techniques.
 
Organizationally, this conference which is held each November in a different city is the most important activity of the IAPC.

Name: Die Junge Mitte Schweiz
Description:
Die Junge Mitte ist die Jugendvereinigung der Die-Mitte-Partei der Schweiz.

Die Junge Mitte Schweiz ist in den Kantonen durch die Kantonalsektionen vertreten. Der Vorstand der Jungen Mitte Schweiz ist für die Organisation der Partei verantwortlich.

Name: Liberal Youth of Denmark
Description:
Venstres Ungdom[1] (literally: Youth of the Left) is the youth wing of the Danish Liberal Party Venstre. 

Venstres Ungdom is one of the largest political youth organization in Denmark. As of 31 December 2015, it had 3,068 members. Members play a major role in the election campaigns of Venstre. Other activities include organizing seminars and debates. The nation-wide organization has a committee corresponding to each cabinet department headed by a Venstre politician. These committees hold regular meetings with the relevant cabinet ministers. A VU spokesman is elected to represent the organization for each major area. As of January 2017, the number of spokesmen is ten.

Name: Ministry of Social Policy, Family, and Unity of Ukraine
Description:
Ministry of Social Policy, Family, and Unity of Ukraine is the central executive authority shaping and implementing policies to protect people’s social rights and promote a decent standard of living.

Our mission is to provide thoughtful and lasting support to all who need it, upholding their dignity and well-being.

We are working to build a barrier-free society in Ukraine, ensuring that people receive timely and inclusive support throughout their lives.

Also we work to preserve and develop human capital, provide protection to the most vulnerable, and support people — from planning parenthood and raising children to dignified ageing.

To make this possible, we are integrating innovative digital tools into the social sphere, so that nearly all services are accessible online — more accessible, more efficient, and more responsive to people's needs.

Together with European countries, we are shaping not just policies, but a shared home. 

A home where people come first. Always.

Name: Georgia House Democratic Caucus
Description:
The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is tasked with recruiting, training, and assisting Democratic candidates for the Georgia State House. Caucus members come from all over the state, representing many different communities, all with the same now, strong legislative representation in the GA House of Representatives. 

During Legislative Session, the House Caucus is responsible for ensuring the the legislative needs of constituents are met.

Name: #AfDnee
Description:
Die AfD erscheint vielen Wahlberechtigten gerade attraktiver denn je. Dabei zeigt ein Blick in das Programm der Partei: Menschen, die die AfD wählen wollen, würden am stärksten unter der AfD-Politik leiden.

#AfDnee will sie darüber aufklären, dass eine Stimme für die AfD in Wirklichkeit eine Stimme gegen ihre eigenen Interessen ist.

Name: DI Sønderjylland
Description: DI Sønderjylland repræsenterer DI’s medlemsvirksomheder i de fire sønderjyske kommuner. Vi arbejder for medlemmerne via dialog med kommunerne og andre lokale organisationer - blandt andet ved at følge op på DI’s store årlige analyse, Lokalt Erhvervsklima.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Limburg-Weilburg-Diez
Description:
Wir sind die Junge Wirtschaft.

Wir Wirtschaftsjunioren: Das sind rund 10.000 #Unternehmer und #Führungskräfte unter 40 Jahren. Wir sind global vernetzt und als größtes Netzwerk junger Wirtschaft in Deutschland mit rund 215 Mitgliedskreisen vor Ort präsent.

Wer bei uns mitmacht, engagiert sich im Beruf und will darüber hinaus auch etwas bewegen.

Mit unserem wirtschaftspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Engagement übernehmen wir #Verantwortung für die #Zukunft und geben der jungen Wirtschaft eine Stimme. Wir fördern den #Austausch und die #Entwicklung junger Unternehmer und #Führungskräfte.

Wir sind die junge Wirtschaft.
Wer bei uns mitmacht, engagiert sich im Beruf und will darüber hinaus auch etwas bewegen. Mit unserem wirtschaftspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Engagement übernehmen wir Verantwortung für die Zukunft und geben der jungen Wirtschaft eine Stimme. Wir fördern den Austausch und die Entwicklung junger Unternehmer und Führungskräfte.

Mehrwerte der Mitgliedschaft sind ein belastbares #Netzwerk, gesellschaftliches #Engagement, internationaler #Austausch, politische #Beteiligung und die persönliche #Weiterentwicklung.

Name: DIE FAMILIENUNTERNEHMER und DIE JUNGEN UNTERNEHMER in Bremen
Description: Bremen ist die Heimat von leistungsstarken Mittelständlern und innovativen Köpfen. Wir setzten uns dafür ein, dass unsere Stadt wieder ein attraktiver Standort für ihre Familienunternehmen wird.

Name: Mouvement Politique pour le Changement - MPC
Description: Le Mouvement Politique pour le Changement est le parti congolais patriote et souverainiste. Il est présidé par Aubrey Porte bonheur.

Name: GroenLinks Utrecht
Description:
Utrecht is een echte GroenLinks-stad. GroenLinks draagt als stabiele grote partij in Utrecht al jaren bij aan het vormgeven van de stad. En dat zie je, dat voel je, dat merk je.

Met twaalf zetels is GroenLinks de grootste partij in de Utrechtse gemeenteraad.  
De raadsleden van GroenLinks zetten zich in voor meer betaalbare woningen, schone energie, ruimte voor de fiets en eerlijke kansen voor alle Utrechters. Name: VdU Landesverband Sachsen/Sachsen-Anhalt
Description:
Der Verband der Unternehmerinnen in Deutschland e.V. (VdU) vertritt seit 1954 als Wirtschaftsverband branchenübergreifend die Interessen von Unternehmerinnen in Politik und Gesellschaft. In besonderem Maße zeichnet uns die Verbindung von unternehmerischer Interessenvertretung und gleichstellungspolitischer Lobby aus. 

Wir setzen uns ein für verlässliche und zeitgemäße politische Rahmenbedingungen für Unternehmen, die Stärkung weiblichen Unternehmertums, die Förderung von Frauen in Führungspositionen und für bessere Bedingungen für Frauen in der Wirtschaft. Wir vertreten die politischen Belange von rund 1,2 Millionen selbstständigen Frauen aller Branchen und Unternehmensgrößen.

„Mehr daraus machen, aus eigener Kraft“, so lautet das Motto unseres Landesverbands. Die Region hat sich zu einem attraktiven Wirtschaftsstandort gewandelt. Unsere Mitglieder wirken daran mit: Eine Vernetzung untereinander und ein Starkmachen für eine politische Interessenvertretung stehen bei uns im Zentrum. Mit anderen Verbänden zu kooperieren, aber auch die eigenen Kontakte zu nutzen, zu verstärken und zu vernetzen, sind unsere Ziele für ein wirtschaftlich starkes Sachsen und Sachsen-Anhalt.

Dazu trägt die Vielfalt der Unternehmen in unserem Verband bei. Unsere Region und unser Landesverband haben beachtliche Potentiale, denn ein starker Mittelstand bedeutet eine starke Region.

Name: Piratenpartij Nederland (PPNL)
Description:
De Piratenpartij is een geuzennaam waar we trots op zijn. De prikkelende naam associëren we met een strijd voor vrijheid en laat zien dat we ons niet willen laten inperken door de gevestigde orde. Het stempel ‘piraat’ wordt namelijk altijd gedrukt op een groep die ingaat tegen monopolisering van een nieuw gebied.

In de 17e eeuw kregen Europese staatsbedrijven zoals de Nederlandse VOC het monopolie op handelsroutes over zee naar grondstofrijke gebieden. Het woord ‘piraat’ had een brede betekenis en werd gebruikt voor alle niet erkende zeevaarders, dus bijvoorbeeld ook Chinese handelaren.

In Engeland kreeg het koninkrijk het monopolie op de boekdrukpers en werden ondernemers die het in hun hoofd haalden zelf een drukpers in elkaar te zetten ‘woordpiraten’ genoemd. Vijftig jaar geleden was de radio-ether de nieuwe horizon en kreeg de BBC als enige partij het recht om uit te zenden. Dankzij zogenoemde ‘radiopiraten’ als zeezender Radio Veronica konden we toch kennismaken met popmuziek.

Het onontgonnen land van onze tijd is het internet. Ook hier zijn nu nog geen sluitende juridische modellen en bedreigt monopolisering net als in de eerdergenoemde voorbeelden onze vrijheid. De informatierevolutie heeft ons ongelofelijk veel opgeleverd, maar heeft overheden en bedrijven ook in staat gesteld iedere stap van burgers en consumenten nauwkeurig in kaart te brengen. Dit zorgt voor een onevenwichtige machtsbalans waarvan de gewone burger de dupe wordt. De Piratenpartij wil het evenwicht terugbrengen en een open informatiesamenleving creëren.

De Piratenpartij werkt nauw samen met Piratenpartijen uit andere Europese landen. Zij hebben zich in 2014 verenigd in de pan-Europese politieke partij European Pirate Party. Verder is de Piratenpartij aangesloten bij Pirate Parties International.

.
.

2) Raising awareness: about women political prisoners, survivors of systemic violence (torture, rape, sexual assaults) 
3) Support: Celebrating and honoring collaborative spirits of all women. Providing spaces and opportunities for psychosocial wellbeing and healing. Seeking to amplify the grassroots women rights groups.

La nostra ambizione è quella di rappresentare le istanze di un’intera generazione dentro e fuori le istituzioni.
Per fare questo promuoviamo la partecipazione nella militanza e nella formulazione di progetti condivisi, rimuovendo tutto ciò che possa rappresentare un ostacolo: differenze economiche, sociali, culturali o di sesso.
Siamo internazionalisti: crediamo che lo scontro non dovrebbe essere tra nazioni o culture diverse, ma che si debba collaborare insieme al fine di eliminare le disuguaglianze e le contraddizioni che affliggono l’Italia, l’Europa e il mondo. Per questo motivo siamo membri delle organizzazioni del socialismo europeo (YES) e Internazionale (IUSY).
In poche parole siamo Giovani, siamo Democratici e vogliamo cambiare il mondo.

Name: LDEW Hessen/Rheinland-Pfalz e.V.
Description:
Seit 2008 sind die Unternehmen der Energie- und Wasserwirtschaft in Hessen und Rheinland-Pfalz mit den Sparten Strom und Fernwärme, Erdgas, Wasser und Abwasser in einem gemeinsamen Verband organisiert. Der Landesverband der Energie- und Wasserwirtschaft Hessen/Rheinland-Pfalz e. V. - LDEW - mit Sitz in Mainz vertritt die Interessen seiner Mitglieder gegenüber Politik, Behörden und der Öffentlichkeit auf Landesebene.

Er arbeitet mit dem BDEW Bundesverband der Energie- und Wasserwirtschaft in Berlin zusammen. Dabei versteht er sich als Bindeglied insbesondere auch zu kleineren und mittleren Unternehmen. Im LDEW sind rund 275 Mitgliedsunternehmen vertreten.

Die Mitarbeit an der Gestaltung der wirtschafts- und rechtspolitischen Rahmenbedingungen der Energie- und Wasserwirtschaft gehört zu den Kernaufgaben des LDEW. Er berät und unterstützt seine Mitglieder in wirtschaftlichen, rechtlichen und technischen Fragen. Ziel ist dabei die Förderung der Sicherheit, Qualität und rationellen Gestaltung der Energie- und Wasserwirtschaft. Der LDEW bündelt das Fachwissen der Branche und setzt dieses zur fachlichen Beratung von Politik und öffentlichen Institutionen ein. Er unterstützt die Interessen seiner Mitglieder gegenüber Markt- und Kooperationspartnern (Kammern, Verbänden und sonstigen Institutionen).

Der LDEW bietet seinen Mitgliedsunternehmen in Hessen und Rheinland-Pfalz vielfältige Dienstleistungs- und Veranstaltungsangebote. Er schafft eine Plattform zum spartenübergreifenden Erfahrungsaustausch. In seinen Gremien und Netzwerken bietet er Mitwirkungsmöglichkeiten bei der Ausarbeitung von landesspezifischen Richtlinien, Anwendungshilfen, Branchenempfehlungen und Grundsätzen für die unternehmerische Praxis.

Name: Eco Food Choice
Description:
The Eco Food Choice LIFE project was born of the shared ambition of reaserchers to develop and harmonize environmental labelling on a European scale. The project, financed by the LIFE program, brings together 9 European partners from France, Spain, Germany and the Netherlands, bringing expertise in a wide range of complementary fields: agricultural production, data, LCA, consumer sciences, etc.

The initiative also aims to create a framework for discussion open to all: countries, companies or NGOs wishing to make progress in harmonizing environmental labelling on a European scale.

The ultimate goal is to present the European Commission, by 2027, with an environmental display system that has been validated and recognized by a wide range of stakeholders. The work of this project thus offers a crucial opportunity to stimulate European collaboration for more sustainable food practices.

Name: Allons Enfants
Description:
Allons Enfants est un parti politique organisé et géré par des étudiants et jeunes actifs de moins de 30 ans. Nous avons créé un mouvement qui fonctionne, pense et agit différemment pour montrer que les jeunes aussi ont leur mot à dire. Nous voulons contribuer au débat public en croisant notre regard avec celui des autres générations.

Européen
Nous sommes nés d’une expérience locale (les élections municipales de 2014) car nous croyons dans l’importance des politiques de proximité, mais nous pensons que pour exister dans notre monde globalisé il est essentiel de penser grand, de penser européen. L’Union européenne est une incroyable opportunité et un espace d’échange, de débat et de rencontres qui doit être mis au bénéfice d’une politique intégrée pour permettre à ses membres de peser sur la scène internationale. Nous voulons une Europe socialement exemplaire, économiquement puissante, profondément citoyenne.

 Porter la voix de la jeunesse
Dans les partis traditionnels, les jeunes sont trop souvent relégués dans les « mouvements de jeunesse » qui servent de fonction support à la maison mère sans être au cœur de la prise de décision. Ce que nous voulons, c’est montrer que nous, les jeunes, méritons d’être consultés et écoutés car oui nous avons des choses à dire ! Allons Enfants, en permettant à chacun d’exprimer son opinion, de débattre, de faire entendre sa voix, entend lutter contre l’autocensure des jeunes qui ne se sentent pas légitimes à s’engager. La citoyenneté s’acquiert à 18 ans, alors votons, exprimons-nous, engageons-nous !

Innovant
A l’heure du digital, il est grand temps que l’innovation soit mise au service de la démocratie. Les techniques actuelles permettent à chaque citoyen de s’exprimer et de réagir aux décisions prises localement ou nationalement. Les outils appropriés doivent être mis en place pour exploiter le potentiel offert par la technologie. Nous voulons des politiques publiques qui incitent à l’innovation et à la participation.

Name: IG Kultur Luzern

Wir stärken das Bewusstsein für kulturelle Anliegen, leisten wichtige Lobbyarbeit im kulturpolitischen Umfeld und verstärken die einzelnen Stimmen unserer Mitglieder zu einer starken, gemeinsamen Stimme. Name: ESRA | European Semiconductor Regions Alliance
Description:
Semiconductors are at the heart of Europe’s technological future. To strengthen its position and enhance resilience, Europe aims to reach a 20% share of global chip production by 2030. Achieving this goal requires more than just investment in manufacturing—it depends on strong regional ecosystems that connect research, design, suppliers, infrastructure, and talent.

This is why ESRA – the European Semiconductor Regions Alliance was established. Bringing together key European regions, ESRA works to enhance the semiconductor value chain, foster innovation, drive talent development, and support Europe’s strategic autonomy.

As a partner of the European Commission, ESRA aligns with the strategic objectives of the European Chips Act (ECA).

Currently, Piemonte (Italy) serves as chair region, working alongside Saxony and Catalonia as co-chairs to advance ESRA's mission

تيار سياسي له عمق جماهيري، يضم مجموعة من الكفاءات العالية والشخصيات السياسية الوازنة، يعمل على استمرار عملية الإصلاح الشامل والآمن التي يتبناها فخامة رئيس الجمهورية السيد محمد ولد الشيخ الغزواني، للنهوض بالوطن في شتى المجالات.

الأهداف:

-العمل على إنجاح فخامة رئيس الجمهورية السيد محمد ولد الشيخ الغزواني في رئاسيات 2024 بطرق وأساليب جديدة ومبتكرة، وذلك من أجل استكمال مسيرة البناء والنماء.

-تعزيز الوحدة الوطنية وتقوية ودعم الجبهة الداخلية والدفاع عن المصالح العليا للوطن.
-الارتقاء بالعمل السياسي في البلاد واعتماد مبدأ تغليب المصلحة العامة على الخاصة.
-تمكين الشباب وتعزيز مشاركتهم في العملية السياسية.
-تمكين المرأة في شتى المجالات وتعزيز مشاركتها في تنمية المجتمع.

Name: The Private Office of Nigel Farage
Collin McNamara for Wisconsin
Description:
Collin McNamara grew up in Central Wisconsin and is deeply involved in our community.  He is a proud graduate of UWSP, where he served as the elected student body president.  Even though our country is deeply divided, Collin knows that politics doesn’t have to be a blood sport.  Collin will make sure that legislators work together as leaders and solve the real problems at hand: boosting our economy, keeping our communities healthy, and improving the quality of education.

Name: MUNSU
Description: The Memorial University of Newfoundland Students' Union (MUNSU) is composed of all 13,000 undergraduate students at the St. John's campus of Memorial University of Newfoundland. The Students' Union advocates for students though a comprehensive campaigns and lobbying strategy directed at policy-makers and represents students' needs and concerns to university administrators, governments, and community agencies. The Students' Union also provides services to improve the lives of its members. The Students' Union was one of the founding members of the Canadian Federation of Students (CFS), and today works with more than 80 other member students' unions of the Federation across the country to campaign for more accessible post-secondary education and to provide services to students.

Name: Build One South Africa
Description:
Change is upon us. 

The old order is crumbling and South Africans are coming together around a plethora of alternatives that may unite into a common values-bound reform movement. Led by Mmusi Maimane, former leader of South Africa’s largest opposition, Build One SA is an umbrella political platform bringing together at least 100 independent candidates from diverse constituencies to contest in the 2024 elections.

About Us:
Led by Mmusi Maimane, BOSA has elected a ten person executive team that will serve as the organising core team seeking to steer the political platform to a victory in 2024 and beyond.

We believe that in a truly non-racial, non-sexist South Africa, abantu express their ubuntu to their family, community and nation through a values based lifestyle and by being accountable (ukuziphendulela) to others.

We want to build a political campaign centered around the creation of a national ecosystem for prosperity, which embraces the well-being of workers, professionals, rural communities, youth, holders of capital and civil servants. 
A critical aspect of a values-based nation is supporting the dignity of all its citizens.
How we educate citizens for success and what working environments we create for our citizens will serve as a reflection of the nation we are trying to build. In this regard, our mission is to restore, reform and construct a thriving future for generations to come.

Name: DI Randers-Norddjurs
Description:
DI Randers-Norddjurs repræsenterer DI’s medlemsvirksomheder i de to kommuner. Vi arbejder for medlemmerne via dialog med kommunerne og andre lokale organisationer - blandt andet ved at følge op på DI’s store årlige analyse, Lokalt Erhvervsklima.
Hvis du melder dig ind i DI bliver du automatisk medlem af din lokale DI-regionalforening, som ledes af en valgt bestyrelse med lokale virksomhedsledere. Det sker hvert forår i forbindelse med et erhvervstræf.

I DI Randers-Norddjurs arbejder vi med at finde langsigtede løsninger på de udfordringer, som vores lokale DI-medlemmer står over for.

Et godt eksempel på det er, at vi arbejder på, at flere unge til at vælge en erhvervsfaglig uddannelse. Derfor har vi i Randers i begyndelsen af året en tilbagevendende jobmesse under devisen: Hvis du har kloge hænder, så har vi praktikpladsen.

Et andet vigtigt emne er problemer med trængsel i trafikken til skade for medarbejdere og varetransport. Derfor arbejdere vi på en udvidelse af E45 helt op til Randers Nord og en ekstra bro over Gudenåen.

DI Randers-Norddjurs arbejder gennem alliancer med de vigtigste lokale aktører. Det kunne være kommunerne, erhvervsskolen eller Business Region Aarhus. Derudover arbejder vi på regionalt niveau med andre DI Regionalforeninger og Business Region Aarhus.

Endelig samler vi viden sammen, som DI kan bruge til at præge de nationale dagsordener.

Så kontakt os gerne, hvis du vil påvirke fremtiden i Randers og Norddjurs, eller hvis du gerne vil vide mere om fordelene ved et medlemskab i DI.

Name: PUBLIC
Description:
Founded in 2017 as Stuart Collective, PUBLIC has worked on the frontlines of climate, education, healthcare, and workers’ rights. Together with our partners, we’ve secured billions for schools, elected transformational leaders, and helped pass policies that protect everyday people.

We also learned a hard truth: good ideas aren’t enough.
Strategy sits unused. Coalition messages get diluted.
Teams are forced to react instead of lead.

So in 2024, we rebuilt PUBLIC for what the moment demands.

Today, PUBLIC is a collective of strategists dedicated to supporting our peers to address the emergency facing American democracy, while finding joy and building toward movements of the future.

We help political strategists take action and build real power—without giving up or giving in.

Our work combines training, tools, community, and bespoke consulting designed to help leaders move forward. We turn strategy into simple, usable systems, so good ideas don’t get lost.

We partner with:

* Advocacy organizations and nonprofits
* PACs, C3s, and C4s preparing for 2026
* Public agencies navigating scrutiny and change
* Coalitions aligning complex partners
* Foundations and funders seeking movement-aligned strategy

PUBLIC exists to help good ideas win public support—fast.

Because in today’s political and media environment, even the best ideas need help being heard.

We believe democracy is fragile, but not beyond repair.
Movements don’t move themselves—people do.

And we’re here to support those people with clarity, community, and strategy that works.

 Learn more: www.PUBLICcampaigns.com

020 is both a student party and a student association established around the Universiteit van Amsterdam. It advocates for the student body in the university’s Student Council, championing its own perspective of ‘pragmatic progressivism’ to achieve its goals with a focus on diversity, helping students with housing, and connecting our peers with job and internship opportunities. 

On the other hand, it provides the student body with information about university life and studies, information about life in Amsterdam, with events (whether online or in-person), and other social opportunities with fellow students.

Unlike other associations or parties, the scope of 020 requires an extensive organisational structure, consisting of a Board, Departments, and Teams within each department. These bodies each serve different, yet essential, functions of the party, and provide skill development opportunities for those students involved with them.
