Name: Maine Democratic Party
Description:
The Maine Democratic Party (MDP) is dedicated to making sure government at every level works for all Maine people.

From the school board to the Blaine House to Congress, MDP supports candidates with a positive vision for our state. We believe in a fair shot for everyone, and to make that vision a reality we are investing more, earlier, in organizing and outreach than ever before. We are building grassroots campaign movements to help spread our message about standing up for working Mainers and moving Maine's economy forward with good-paying jobs.

We believe that our Democratic values — affordable and accessible health care, strong schools, higher incomes, and an economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few — are Maine values. And we believe that when we take our message to the people wherever they are, they prove it at the ballot box.

Name: Erasmus by Train
Description: We aim to link the Erasmus+ programme with sustainable travel for a greener and more united Europe. We find it contradictory that the EU, which sees itself as a sustainable player, indirectly promotes air travel, because there is no sufficient support for sustainable means of travel for Erasmus+ participants. The European Green Deal is only worthwhile if the European programmes themselves become more sustainable. We believe that an extension of the Erasmus+ scholarship in the form of an Erasmus+ ticket which would cover travel to and from the Erasmus destination will lead to a significant decrease in air travel. In the meantime, we hope that this change in scholarships also sensibilizes students for sustainability issues and sustainable travel. This could further impact inter-European train connections and cooperation. In addition, we expect Erasmus by Train to provide a more wide-ranging and exciting experience of Europe. Europe and its open borders would no longer be "flown over" but rather truly experienced.

Name: Was verdient die Frau?
Description: Das Projekt „Was verdient die Frau? Mehr Geld, Zeit und Respekt!" wird vom Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend gefördert, ist in der Abteilung Frauen Gleichstellungs- und Familienpolitik beim Deutschen Gewerkschaftsbund angesiedelt und setzt sich seit 2014 für die Stärkung der eigenen Existenzsicherung von Frauen ein. 'Auf eigenen Beinen stehen!' – das ist gerade jungen Frauen im Arbeits- und Privatleben wichtig. Doch vielen Frauen wird ihre ökonomische Abhängigkeit und deren Folgen erst im Nachhinein klar. Das DGB-Projekt will das ändern und rückt den ganzen Lebens- und Erwerbsverlauf in den Fokus – denn gleiches Geld für gleiche Arbeit und ökonomische Gleischstellung müssen selbstverständlich sein. Frauen haben das verdient! Das Projekt sensibilisiert insbesondere Frauen und Arbeitgebende allen Themen rund um ökonomische Gleichstellung. Wir informieren  in Social Media und über die Webseite, aber auch vor Ort in Betrieben, durch unser deutschlandweites "Bildet Banden!"-Netzwerk, aber auch durch Inputs und Workshops.

Name: Colorado Sierra Club
Description:
The Colorado Sierra Club is a powerful collective of  more than 100,000 grassroots changemakers  working together across the state to  advance climate solutions, act for justice,  get outdoors, and protect lands, water, air, and wildlife. We are an organization that believes in the power of working together to make change happen.

As the Colorado chapter of the national Sierra Club, the largest and most influential grassroots environmental organization in the U.S., together for over 126 years we have helped shape the way people can participate in local, state, and national advocacy and policy work, so that we can better protect the planet—and each other.

Combined, our 3.5+ million members and supporters—through the Sierra Club’s resources, personal efforts, and collective action—have helped us make real change in advancing climate solutions, protecting lands, air, water and wildlife, acting for justice, and getting people outdoors. But our real power doesn’t come from our numbers alone. It comes from bringing all kinds of people together, sometimes for the first time, around issues they care about.

We have a lot more change to make, because so much more is possible. We work alongside other local and national groups because we are more powerful together.

Join us in making change.

Name: Lesley Briones for Harris County Commissioner Pct. 4
Description:
A native Texan and proud Latina who grew up on the U.S.-Mexico border, Lesley García Mitchell Briones developed a deep understanding of the struggles faced by working people and the importance of strong families and communities. 

Bilingual and bicultural, she is the daughter of teachers, who taught her the importance of education, hard work, and serving others—values which have defined her and which she will bring to the office of County Commissioner for Precinct 4.

Lesley knows that together, we can build a county government that keeps our families safe, protects our homes from flooding, expands access to health care, treats everyone fairly, and creates good jobs that help our families thrive.

Lesley attended Harvard University and graduated with honors, supported by scholarships and working three part-time jobs to put herself through school. She returned to the border to serve as an 8th and 10th grade teacher at two of the lowest income public schools in the country. Witnessing the injustices her students faced deepened Lesley’s desire to fight for equal rights and influenced her decision to become a lawyer. She attended Yale Law School, where she led the Latino Law Students’ public service initiatives and provided pro-bono assistance to victims of domestic abuse and juvenile offenders.

Upon graduating from Yale Law School, Lesley returned to Texas to practice law at Vinson & Elkins LLP. She then served as the General Counsel and Chief Operating Officer of the Laura & John Arnold Foundation, a major philanthropic nonprofit. There, she led the legal and business operations of the organization, helping to build it from a small Houston start-up to a team of more than 75 individuals across the country.  Lesley is proud to have been part of a team whose mission is maximizing opportunity and minimizing injustice, and to have helped grant over a billion dollars toward that goal.

Name: GESUNDHEIT AKTIV e. V.  | Bürger- und Patientenverband
Description:
GESUNDHEIT AKTIV ist ein unabhängiger, gemeinnütziger Verein, der die Interessen von BürgerInnen und PatientInnen in gesundheitsrelevanten Fragen vertritt. Wir setzen uns ein für

- Methodenpluralismus in der Medizin
- freie Wahlmöglichkeiten für die Patienten in Bezug
   auf Therapien und Medikamente
- eine Partnerschaft auf Augenhöhe zwischen Arzt und Patient
- eine versorgungs- und patientenorientierte Forschung
- integrierte und wohnortnahe Versorgungsstrukturen
- ein demokratisches, ganzheitlich orientiertes Gesundheitswesen.

GESUNDHEIT AKTIV will Menschen darin unterstützen, ihr eigenes Gesundheitspotenzial zu erschließen. Wir stehen ein für ein Gesundheitswesen, das den Einzelnen in der Ausbildung seiner Autonomie für seine eigene Gesundheit fördert, und das die Leistungen für die persönlich gewählte Therapierichtung weitestgehend erstattet.

Dafür organisieren wir eigene Kampagnen, erstellen verschiedene Medien wie Broschüren, Hörbücher, veröffentlichen unsere Zeitschrift GESUNDHEIT AKTIV - DAS MAGAZIN sowie einen E-Mail-Newsletter.

Wir organisieren Veranstaltungen über aktuelle Entwicklungen im Gesundheitswesen oder zu einzelnen Streitfragen, bieten Kurse und Workshops zu verschiedenen Themen und veranstalten Kongresse.

Viele Informationen stehen auch hier auf unserer Webseite unter den Stichworten Kompetent entscheiden und Gesund leben. In unserem Service-Bereich finden Sie viele hilfreiche Adressen und Links.

Der Verein hat seine Wurzeln und seinen Bezugspunkt in der Anthroposophischen Medizin. Für uns ist diese ein wichtiger Impulsgeber für patientenorientierte Entwicklung im Gesundheitswesen.

Name: Occupy Wall Street
Description:
We are the only organized group in u.s. politics willing openly profess radical viewpoints and go out in the streets and fight! We are not affiliated with the democratic party, republican party, communist parties, labor unions, or NGOs. Instead we seek to organize left-leaning independents to build a radical anti-capitalist, anti-authoritarian alternative to the current political establishment.

Our movement began on September 17, 2011 when a scrappy group of anarchists, communists, liberals, and conservatives decided to pitch tents in Manhattan’s financial district. For two months we controlled Zuccotti Park—which we renamed Liberty Square—and made use of this space as a public forum, provider of social services, and a simulacrum of a better world in which we sought to our own alternatives. Since then our movement has spread to over 100 cities in the US and 1,500 cities globally who've sought to follow our model.

The Occupy Solidarity Network, Inc. is a 501(c)(4) not-for-profit organization founded in New York by Priscilla Grim, Micah White, and Justine Tunney to serve as a legal front that practices mutual aid and advances the interests of the international Occupy movement.

Name: Save The CBC 2025
Description:
Thank you. The CBC has been protected for another four years—and this is something to celebrate. 

It means that, as Canadians, we still have a trusted public voice—one committed to amplifying our cultures, connecting our communities, and reflecting who we are, together.

This is a real win. Not just for public broadcasting, but for identity. For the idea that a country as vast and diverse as ours can still find common ground.

But with that voice comes responsibility—and possibility.

We now have four more years of space to hear each other.

Four more years of national bandwidth to bridge differences, elevate new voices, and strengthen the ties that hold.

Four more years to ask: What does cultural sovereignty really look like in an age of weaponized distraction?

Because let’s be honest: we are not up against silence—we are up against noise.

Extreme funding is pouring into social platforms, most often from outside our borders, with a clear purpose: to divide. 

To inflame cultural tensions, erode trust in our democratic institutions, and distract us from coordinated economic and political pressures— including from the US  where misinformation has become a tool of influence and destabilization.

We’ve protected a trusted voice. But we’ll need more commitment to protect each other.

This is time to celebrate what we’ve saved, and get ready to create what comes next: dialogue, connection, and resilience in a noisy, divided, and destabilized world—where a resilient Canada is defending our sovereignty and offering democratic clarity to the world.

------------
We are citizens who care about the CBC and our country, and want to protect and ensure our resilience. for our democracy, our sovereignty, our culture, and for access to trustworthy, free and independent press. – a vital public service.

We are not affiliated with the CBC

Name: Christians on the Left
Description:
Christians on the Left is a movement of Christians with a radical commitment to social justice, to protecting the environment and to fostering peace and reconciliation.

We believe that ‘loving our neighbour’ in the fullest sense involves struggling for a fair and just society, one in which all can enjoy the ‘fullness of life’ Jesus came to announce. And we want to work to make it happen.

CotL offers space for Christians to come together to help shape the political agenda. Affiliated to the Labour Party and with members in the Commons, the Lords, on local councils and in trade unions and constituency Labour parties, CotL makes sure the Christian voice is heard in politics. Through lobbying, publications, public meetings, local branch activities, media work and other ways we are an effective voice for social justice.

Name: Young Liberals of Norway
Description: Norges Unge Venstre (NUV), or Young Liberals of Norway in english, is the liberal youth party of Norway. Young Liberals of Norway was founded on the 27th of January 1909, and is the oldest youth party in Norway. The party is an affiliate of Venstre, The Liberal Party in English, which is the social-liberal party in Norway. Young Liberals of Norway, though an affiliate of the Liberal Party, are politically independent of the mother party, and has it’s own political platform as well as it’s own organisational structure. Young Liberals of Norway has three poltical focus areas. They are education, climate and the European Union and international affairs.

Name: Samvirkene
Description:
Samvirkene er interesseorganisasjonen for norske samvirker. Vi representerer 2.8 millioner medlemmer, 94.000 ansatte og 250 milliarder i omsetning. Våre medlemmer er i alle bransjer over hele landet.

Samvirkene arbeider for et verdiskapende og mangfoldig eierskap og like vilkår for de ulike eierformene.

Name: Sächsischer Volkshochschulverband
Description: Der Sächsische Volkshochschulverband (SVV) ist der Fachverband der Volkshochschulen in Sachsen. Er vertritt die Interessen der 15 sächsischen Volkshochschulen und ihrer Träger auf Landes- und Bundesebene. Der SVV berät  Entscheidungsträgerinnen und -träger in Politik und Verwaltung. Wir Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter der Geschäftsstelle des Verbandes unterstützen die strategische sowie operative Arbeit der Volkshochschulen. Wir organisieren Fortbildungen für Mitarbeitende sowie Kursleitende und koordinieren die Vernetzung der Volkshochschulen untereinander und mit anderen Einrichtungen.

Description: Regidor a l'oposició del Grup Municipal d'Esquerra Republicana de Catalunya

Name: Community Justice Action Fund
Description: Community Justice Action Fund is a project of Tides Advocacy, a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization. It is dedicated to building power for and with communities of color to end gun violence. The organization's comprehensive, holistic, and grassroots policy framework is driven by communities directly impacted by violence. It operates in the public policy sector and has a team size of 2-10 employees. The organization also provides a platform for general inquiries and contact through their website.

Name: Rutgers Democracy Lab at the Eagleton Institute of Politics
Description: The Rutgers Democracy Lab will work to ensure that future generations have access to the tools and knowledge needed to do the important work of strengthening democracy. The Lab will draw on the multidisciplinary expertise of Rutgers students, faculty, and researchers to connect with community members, civic groups, and practitioners to help tackle challenges; explore and test new ideas and potential solutions; and develop evidence-based best practices that support and enhance democracy.

Name: Partij voor de Dieren Schieland en de Krimpenerwaard
Description:
Het stoppen van de vernietiging van de de aarde. Dat kan alleen door gedragsverandering, het beëindigen van de bio-industrie en het bevorderen van de biodiversiteit. Goed voor mensen, dieren en de natuur. 
Het doorboren van dikke planken, het blijven hameren op hetzelfde aambeeld, fungeren als een haas in de marathon. Dat wordt de rol van de Partij voor de Dieren in het Hoogheemraadschap van Schieland en de Krimpenerwaard. 
Onze vier kernwaarden: Duurzaamheid, Mededogen, Persoonlijke vrijheid en Persoonlijke verantwoordelijkheid.

Name: Fund Her
Description:
Powering progressive women to lead California.

Founded in 2017, Fund Her is the political action committee dedicated to achieving gender parity in California politics. The only organization of its kind, Fund Her provides the missing piece: the financial support to ensure progressive, accomplished women are well-positioned to win.

Fund Her’s core values are women’s equality, reproductive freedom, social justice, and climate responsibility. We endorse women who share our dedication to those principles and are committed to fighting for them once elected.

Name: Al Chaab Yorid
Description:
Al Chaab Yourid est un nouveau parti politique Créé  par un groupe de jeunes tunisiens ne se reconnaissant pas dans les discours des partis politiques traditionnels.
Aujourd’hui, le pourrissement aggravé et généralisé de la situation socio-économique et politique, constitue une source de préoccupations nationales et internationales. Cette situation structurelle et le contexte sociopolitique actuel nous interpellent et nous poussent à questionner le leadership politique présent au cours des dernières années.
Nous avons besoin aujourd’hui d’hommes d’État qui s’apprêtent toujours à mettre en réserve leur convictions personnelles ou partisanes et donnent droit à la préservation des intérêts supérieurs de la nation. C’est dans ce cadre que le peuple tunisien a choisi le président Kais Saied lors des présidentielles de 2019 et c’est dans cette logique que s’inscrit le projet « Al Chaab Yourid ».
Nous avons l’ambition de booster une nouvelle génération d’hommes et des femmes politiques pour qu’ils puissent s’implanter dans le paysage politique durablement et auront la possibilité d’être candidats aux élections. Al Chaab Yourid, n’a pas et n’aura pas de président et notre projet se base sur une vision nouvelle qui rejette toute hégémonie et pensée unique. Nous partons du principe que notre projet est une start-up et nous développeront des filiales de cette entreprise. AL Chaab Yourid dispose d’une instance constituante composée de jeunes qui vous ressemble, qui croient au changement et qui sont là dans le seul but est de mettre la locomotive sur les rails, le reste ça sera VOUS!

Name: Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion (MIT) Baden-Württemberg
Description: Wir sind die größte politische Wirtschaftsvereinigung in Baden-Württemberg mit rund 3000 Mitgliedern. Unser Engagement gilt den kleinen und mittleren Unternehmen (KMU), den Selbständigen, den freien Berufen und allen, die täglich Ergebnisse erzielen und Verantwortung tragen. Für diese Leistungsträger machen wir uns politisch auf allen Ebenen, vom Land bis nach Europa, stark. Unter dem Motto „Eigentum, Recht und Freiheit“ setzen wir uns für Eigenverantwortung, Risikobereitschaft, Leistungsorientierung und individuelle Freiheit ein.

Name: CDU-Fraktion im Landtag des Saarlandes
Description: Die CDU-Fraktion stellt in der 17. Wahlperiode mit 19 Abgeordneten die zweitstärkste politische Kraft im saarländischen Landtag. Unsere Abgeordneten setzen sich für die Belange der Menschen ihres jeweiligen Wahlkreises ein und vertreten die Interessen des Saarlandes.

Name: FAIRtax Official
Description:
The FAIRtax is nonpartisan legislation (H.R. 25/S. 155) designed by economists that replaces personal and corporate income taxes, payroll taxes like Social Security and Medicare, estate, gift, capital gains, alternative minimum, and self-employment taxes.

It treats all citizens equally and allows American businesses to thrive, all while generating the same tax revenue for the government through the establishment of a progressive, national sales tax on new goods and services.

Whether you are a Democrat, Independent, Libertarian or Republican, part of the 99% or the 1%, FairTax will help you pursue your happiness!

See www.fairtax.org for more details, cosopnsor information, local contacts, news and to sign up!

Name: ΕΛΛΗΝΙΚΟΣ ΠΑΛΜΟΣ - Γραφείο Νικόλαος Παπαδόπουλος
Description: Το γραφείο του Ανεξάρτητου Βουλευτή Νικολάου Παπαδοπούλου δραστηριοποιείται στο πλαίσιο της Κοινοβουλευτικής Δημοκρατίας με στόχο την προώθηση πολιτικών υπέρ της κοινωνικής δικαιοσύνης, της διαφάνειας και της συμμετοχής των πολιτών στη λήψη αποφάσεων. Επικοινωνούμε με τους πολίτες, παρακολουθούμε τις κοινοβουλευτικές εξελίξεις και αναλαμβάνουμε πρωτοβουλίες με επίκεντρο τον άνθρωπο και το δημόσιο συμφέρον.

Name: Marta FOR Europe | #TeamMarta
Description:
Marta Barandiy, Ph.D. in International Law, is an advocate for defense, security, human rights, and European values. She focuses on connecting Ukrainian and Eastern European civil societies with European policymakers, enhancing their presence in Brussels and other decision-making hubs.

Marta FOR Europe reflects her expertise in human rights, defense, international relations, and sustainability, emphasizing the importance of a secure, prosperous, and peaceful Europe founded on sovereignty and dignity.

The platform showcases Marta’s insights and initiatives, encouraging dialogue on civil society, democracy, and economic development, inspired by Ukraine’s resilience and the evolving military-industrial sector.

Marta FOR Europe invites experts and citizens to participate in meaningful discussions about Europe’s future, aiming to address challenges and work together for security, prosperity, and lasting peace.

Name: electric Handdryer Association
Description: The electric Handdryer Association is an international initiative by companies from the electric hand dryer industry to explain why electric hand drying is the system of the future. Modern products in the air-based handdrying business are characterized by attributes such as environmantal friendly, efficient and economically attractive.

Name: Likud Party
Description: Likud is a political party that promotes social equality, free market values, and Jewish cultural traditions.

Name: Martin Fayulu
Description: Martin Fayulu is a Congolese businessman and the winner of the 2018 Presidential election. He is currently leading a peaceful movement to seek truth and justice for the Congolese people who were stolen their victory.

Name: Conservative Women's Organisation
Description:
The CWO offers a focus and support for all women whose beliefs and values are broadly in sympathy with the modern Conservative Party. They can establish contact, learn about Conservative viewpoints and contribute to the discussion about the issues that will influence future Conservative policy. 

The CWO form a countrywide network of women of all ages and backgrounds, working together in a wide range of activities within the voluntary party.

Name: Wetenschappelijk Instituut voor de SGP
Description: Het Wetenschappelijk Instituut voor de Staatkundig Gereformeerde Partij is de denktank van de SGP. Wij zetten ons in om kennis en inzicht te verwerven op verschillende beleidsterreinen. Door middel van onafhankelijk onderzoek analyseren wij deze ontwikkelingen en belichten wij die vanuit reformatorisch perspectief. De onderzoeksresultaten worden vervolgens gecommuniceerd met politici, partijleden, SGP-stemmers en extern publiek. Zo streven wij ernaar, het maatschappelijke en politieke debat te beïnvloeden op basis van de reformatorische levensbeschouwing.

Name: Tom Vandendriessche
Description:
De Europese Unie is totaal aan het ontsporen. Wat ooit begon als een economische samenwerking om vrede en welvaart te realiseren, ontwikkelt zich tot een politieke superstaat die steeds meer macht wil en ons daarmee van het ene conflict naar het andere leidt.

Het is hoog tijd dat er geluisterd wordt en we terugkeren naar de originele fundamenten en waarden van de Europese Unie. Dat is een vrijwillige economische samenwerking tussen vrije en democratische natiestaten.

Name: Australia One Party
Description:
AUSTRALIAONE
Is committed to strengthening Australia as a sovereign, self-reliant, Judeo-Christian western democracy which is:
• Economically powerful
• Militarily intimidating
• Politically free
• Culturally vibrant and
• Socially cohesive

AUSTRALIAONE
Is the party for decent everyday Australians who want the best future for themselves, their families, their local communities and Australia.
This needs all of us to take a stand.

AUSTRALIAONE
Must take back control of our local councils, as well as our state and federal parliaments.
No matter who you are, here’s your opportunity. Let’s help each other.

It’s time for Australians to take back their country

Les Jeunes Libéraux-Radicaux Vaudois sont issus de la fusion des Jeunes Radicaux et des Jeunes Libéraux en 2010. C’est la plus grande jeunesse de parti du Canton en termes d’élus. Si vous souhaitez en savoir plus, rendez-vous sur notre site internet.

Description: Landtag Rheinland-Pfalz, Fraktion Bündnis 90/Die Grünen is a management consulting company based out of 3 Kaiser-Friedrich-Straße, Mainz, Germany.

Name: Διάλογος των Νέων Καβάλας (Dialogue of Youth Kavala) - Local Youth Network
Description:
The Scientific Association "Dialogue of the Youth of Kavala - Local Youth Network" aims at the political activation and education of young people at local level through events and simulations. Additionally, it acts as a response to the growing political cynicism and indifference that dominate our societies. For this purpose, it annually hosts four events: 1) The “Dialogue of citizens” - an interactive table debate among citizens and university professors on various significant topics, 2) the “Dialogue of students” a simulation of an ad-hoc Committee about educational topics, 3) the “Dialogue for Kavala” a simulation of the Municipal Council of Kavala regarding local issues and finally 4) “Cosmodialogos” a conference on local and youth issues with young participants of all ethnicities.

One of the founding reasons and initial goals of our Association was the creation of a Municipal Youth Council so as to promote a local youth agenda and to foster youth institutionalised political participation. The adoption of the Decision No 221/2021(ΨΚΒΤΩΕ6-17Β) by the Municipal Council of Kavala led to the creation of the Municipal Youth Council of Kavala and the realization of this goal. The 1st Assembly of the Municipal Youth Council was held on 28/12/2021.

Name: Conservative Friends of Israel
Description:
Conservative Friends of Israel (CFI) works to promote its twin aims of supporting Israel and promoting Conservatism in the UK. With more than 2,000 activists as members, CFI is active at every level of the Conservative Party

CFI organises numerous events in and around Westminster, takes Conservative parliamentarians and candidates on delegations to Israel, campaigns hard for Tory candidates in target seats, and works to ensure that Israel’s case is fairly represented in Parliament

After leaving the House in 1974, Michael Fidler created CFI, as he felt the time was right to correct mistaken impressions and to demonstrate strong Conservative support for the State of Israel

Name: Pro-Choice Minnesota
Description:
The mission of NARAL Pro-Choice Minnesota is to develop and sustain a constituency that uses the political process to guarantee every woman the right to make personal decisions regarding the full range of reproductive choices, including preventing unintended pregnancy, bearing healthy children, and choosing legal abortion.
 
The NARAL Pro-Choice Minnesota Foundation is a 501 C(3) tax-deductible non-profit organization. The Foundation's mission is to support and protect, as a fundamental right and value, a woman's freedom to make personal decisions regarding the full range of reproductive choices through education, training, organizing, legal action and public policy.

Name: YS - Yrkesorganisasjonenes Sentralforbund
Description:
YS forhandler om lønns- og arbeidsvilkår på vegne av 215 000 medlemmer i våre ni YS-forbund. 

Vi er partipolitisk uavhengig, og ikke er knyttet til ett, bestemt politisk parti, men samarbeider med politikerne fra sak til sak.

Som medlem i et YS-forbund er du tilsluttet YS som hovedorganisasjon. Oppgaven vår er å ta vare på deg som arbeidstaker og utvikle arbeidslivet.

Name: Sámediggi Sämitigge Sääʹmteʹǧǧ Saamelaiskäräjät
Description:
The Sámi Parliament is the self-government body of the Sámi in Finland, legislated at the beginning of 1996. Its main purpose is to plan and implement the cultural self-government guaranteed to the Sámi as an indigenous people. The Sámi Delegation (Sámi Parlamenta), founded under a decree, was a predecessor to the Sámi Parliament, and operated from 1973-1995.

The Sámi Parliament is the supreme political body of the Sámi in Finland. It is an independent legal entity of public law which, due to its self-governmental nature, is not a state authority or part of the public administration. The Sámi Parliament functions under the administrative sector of the Ministry of Justice. The Sámi Parliament represents the Sámi in national and international connections, and it attends to the issues concerning Sámi language, culture, and their position as an indigenous people. The Sámi Parliament can make initiatives, proposals and statements to the authorities.

The 21 members, and 4 deputies, are elected among the Sámi every four years. Due to its representative nature, the Sámi Parliament expresses an official view of the Sámi in Finland on the issues concerning them. 

The Plenum, a full-time chair, and an Executive Board are the main organs of the Sámi Parliament. The Sámi Parliament appoints committees to prepare issues. The operation of the Sámi Parliament is funded by the state.

Name: Friends of Al Aqsa (FOA)
Description:
Friends of Al-Aqsa is a UK based non-profit making NGO concerned with defending the human rights of Palestinians and protecting the sacred al-Aqsa Sanctuary in Jerusalem. This vision is supported by various international groups and organisations. Friends of Al-Aqsa was first established in 1997 and now has an international support base.

Aims & Objectives
 The following aims and objectives are being pursued using all the available peaceful, legal and democratic means:

(a) Highlighting Human Rights abuses suffered by the Palestinians
 (b) Putting pressure on the British government to make Israel respect International Law and human rights
 (c) Bringing the Palestinian issue to the attention of those concerned with International Law, human rights and UN Resolutions
 (d) Mobilising international condemnation for Israel’s apartheid policies to be manifested through the boycott of Israel
 (e) Educating people on the issue of Palestine through conferences, lectures and publications
 (f) Emphasising the significance and the centrality of the al-Aqsa Mosque to the Islamic faith and the Muslim identity and re-affirming the Muslim historic and religious rights to the area
 (h) Working in conjunction with international heritage, cultural and humanitarian organisations in joint ventures to advance these aims 

Join us in opposing this brutal occupation and working to achieve a Free Palestine by getting involved with your local branch.

Feel free to email us, contact us and get involved.

Good healthcare, a strong economy in The Hague with 10,000 new jobs and residents of The Hague who decide for themselves about their neighbourhood. That's what we go for!

Description: CAD aims to protect the lives and well-being of frontline climate justice activists (CJAs) working under oppressive and dangerous conditions. CAD therefore provides emergency response and safety resources, while building a support network inside the climate justice movement. CAD was built out of the climate justice movements' need of safety support for Afghan CJAs in 2021 and operates in a small team.

Description: Compte officiel des députés du @partiudr.

Name: Junge ÖVP
Description: Wir – die Junge ÖVP – sind über 100.000 junge Menschen, die ehrenamtlich Politik machen & so unser Umfeld mitgestalten. Wir sind in allen neun Bundesländern aktiv und mit unseren Orts -, Bezirks- und Landesorganisationen auf allen politischen Ebenen vertreten. Unser Ziel ist es nachhaltige Politik für junge Menschen vor Ort zu machen. Egal ob Schülerinnen und Schüler, Studierende, Lehrlinge, Angestellte oder Selbstständige. Wir machen Politik von Junge für Junge – unkompliziert, modern und offen für jede und jeden, der oder die mitmachen will.

Name: Fairer Share
Description: The campaign to replace Council Tax and Stamp Duty with a fairer system. Join over 100,000 households and sign our petition for The Proportional Property Tax.

Name: PACMA
Description:
Somos el Partido Animalista Con el Medio Ambiente, el único partido político español que trabaja por la defensa de los animales, el medio ambiente y las personas. Luchamos por el fin de la explotación de todos los animales y por una sociedad donde se les respete y proteja; una sociedad más justa, más sostenible y más respetuosa con todas las personas, y donde la defensa del medio ambiente tenga un papel primordial.
Nuestro objetivo electoral es conseguir representación en las instituciones para impulsar los necesarios cambios legales para hacer realidad esa sociedad por la que luchamos.

Sí, somos un partido político, pero no somos como los demás: somos activistas en política, y nuestros principios no se compran ni se venden.

Trabajamos cada día denunciando el maltrato animal, presionando a las administraciones y dando voz a quienes no la tienen, y todo de forma completamente independiente, pues financiamos nuestra labor únicamente con las aportaciones de las personas afiliadas y donantes.

Name: PvdA Noord-Holland
Description: Wij strijden voor een sociaal, fatsoenlijk en eerlijk Noord-Holland voor iedereen.

Name: Pramila Naidu
Description: I am a Designated senior advocate in Bangalore as well as a Politician. I am presently serving as a Trained Mediator in Bengalore Medication Centre. I Graduated from B.M.S  College of Law, Bangalore University, and eventually received my L.L.B degree.

Name: North Bay Leadership Council
Description:
NBLC Leading the North Bay ... Employers Committed to providing leadership in ways to make the North Bay Sustainable, Prosperous and Innovative.

Over thirty years ago, business leaders founded the North Bay Leadership Council (NBLC) on a simple premise:  We can accomplish more by working together.  Today, the Council includes over 40 select employers in the region. Our members represent a wide variety of businesses, non-profits and educational institutions, with a workforce in excess of 25,000.

North Bay Leadership Council is an employer-led public policy advocacy organization committed to providing leadership in ways to make the North Bay sustainable, prosperous and innovative.   As business and civic leaders, our goal is to ensure economic health by promoting better education, infrastructure, and governance to make our region a better place to live and work. 

In our third decade, NBLC has identified improving public education as our top priority in recognition that better early childhood education, closing the achievement gap for Latino students, increased readiness for college and careers, and greater numbers of students pursing math and science majors, are fundamental to gaining a competitive edge as a regional economy that is also facing serious challenges to our ability to retain and attract new jobs. 

In 2011, NBLC’s membership of the leading companies in the North Bay grew, providing an increased diversity of industry sectors contributing to our work.

Name: D66 Delft
Description:
D66 Delft is a local constituency of Dutch Democrat Party D66.

D66 is a social-liberal party with a strong progressive character and international outlook. It supports a sustainable, democratic and open society, not only in The Netherlands but worldwide. Human rights and free and fair elections are essential to this global perspective as they constitute the basis of democratic society.

D66 is a member of the European Liberal Democrats (ELDR) and of Liberal International (LI).

Name: Reform UK - Chester South and Eddisbury Constituency
Description:
How we recover as a nation from the pandemic will be critical to the future success of the UK. We must reform the way our country is run and managed so that it works properly for the people.

Reform is essential in three key areas:

Reform our Economy: to succeed, we must become a low tax, smartly regulated, high growth economy. Faster growth is the only way to better wages and more tax revenues to invest in better healthcare and other public services. Our bold economic vision frees up over 6 million people from paying income tax and over 1.2 million small businesses/self-employed from paying corporation tax. We would also remove a raft of stifling taxes. This will generate much faster growth.

Reform our Public Sector: we must be ambitious, seeking faster, more efficient public services that work better for us all, with better results. For example, in health, we should demand zero waiting lists. Our police need to focus on preventing crime, catching criminals, not woke nonsense.

Reform our Institutions: major change is needed to the bodies that impact our lives, the unelected cronyism of the House of Lords, the outdated civil service, the bloated BBC. Reform is essential to our voting system so it is fairer, more representative; the two-party system embeds the status quo and prevents real change.

A real agenda for bold reform. We restate our core values: We must return all our liberties to the people. We must preserve freedom of speech. We must control our borders properly. We must protect our proud heritage from the woke folk and celebrate our nation’s incredible successes.

Name: Women in Public Affairs
Description:
Women in Public Affairs Germany is a dynamic network in Berlin dedicated to fostering the professional growth and empowerment of women in the realm of public affairs and policymaking.

Our mission is to amplify the voices of women across Germany who are shaping policies, influencing decisions, and driving positive change in our communities and beyond. In a world where gender parity remains an ongoing challenge, our network serves as a beacon of support, collaboration, and advocacy for women navigating the complexities of public affairs.

Name: Electric Vehicle Union
Description:
Electric Vehicle Union (EVU) aims to be the most influential network for the promotion of adoption and perseverance of electric mobility around the globe. The foundation will do this alongside its partners and stakeholders, who are among the most successful, innovative and influential actors in the global Electric Vehicle (EV) community.

Rune Haaland founded the EVU September 2011. EVU is a global movement with dedicated and innovative business actors, enthusiasts, EV associations, NGOs and other stakeholders with a mission to electrify mobility with clean and renewable energy. EVU is undergoing a process to be registered as a EU based association, situated in Brussels, to streamline communication with the upper echelon of political power in Europe. The foundation also consists of a network of ambassadors and connections in multiple countries.

EVU is registered as a non-profit foundation in Norway with an external Board of Directors, Mr. Knut Eide and Børre Hannisdal. The Directors operate in close cooperation with Lester Brown and Earth Policy Institute in Washington.

Name: Ohio Senate Democrats
Description: The Ohio Senate Democrats is the campaign arm of the Ohio Senate Democratic Caucus. We recruit candidates to run as Democrats for the Ohio Senate, protect our incumbent members, and aim to pick up seats in the Ohio Senate.

Name: PollTech Research & Analytics
Description: PollTech is a premier political consulting firm and intelligence think tank, offering a comprehensive suite of services that empower political campaigns, organizations, government, and policymakers with the tools they need to thrive in today's complex political and governance landscape.

Name: Brad Schwartz for State Senate
Description:
Brad Schwartz is a lifelong resident of Nassau County, deeply rooted in his community, and dedicated to addressing the pressing issues facing Long Island and New York State. As the founding Chair of the Sid Jacobson JCC's Community Needs Bank Committee, he has been instrumental in combating local food insecurity, a critical aspect of the high cost of living crisis.

A former award-winning TV producer and editor, Brad's decade-long battle with illness inspired his transition into public policy, driven by a commitment to rectify broken systems such as healthcare. His expertise spans a diverse academic background, including a doctoral scholarship in international affairs from Johns Hopkins University (SAIS) and a double Master’s degree in International Public Policy.

With an unwavering focus on combating media disinformation and promoting good governance, Brad leverages his original media background and extensive experience in policy research to drive informed decision-making. His exceptional career in the media industry, working with major networks and contributing to Emmy-award-winning projects, underscores his ability to deliver impactful results through strategic storytelling and effective communication.

Having emerged as a top fundraiser and the first openly LGBTQ candidate to run for state senate on Long Island, Brad is committed to prioritizing educated policy over empty politics. His resilience, combined with a genuine passion for community and political engagement, positions him as a formidable candidate ready to address the affordability crisis and advocate for the well-being of residents across the state.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Ostbrandenburg
Description: Wir sind junge und dynamische Unternehmerinnen, Unternehmer und Führungskräfte unter 40 Jahren in Ostbrandenburg. Wer bei uns mitmacht, engagiert sich im Beruf und will darüber hinaus auch etwas bewegen. Wir fördern den Austausch und die Entwicklung junger Führungskräfte. Wir engagieren uns gesellschaftlich in unserer Region. Wir sind einer von ca. 220 Wirtschaftsjuniorenkreisen in Deutschland.

Name: VFF - Verband Fach- und Führungskräfte e.V.
Description:
Die Arbeitswelt mit all ihren Herausforderungen wandelt sich ständig und schneller denn je. Wir kennen das Arbeitsumfeld und die Bedürfnisse von Fach- und Führungskräften seit Jahren und gestalten diese professionell mit. Wir geben Ihnen zuverlässigen Rückhalt in allen Fragen rund um Ihr Arbeitsverhältnis: Vom exzellenten juristischen Service über kompetente Beratungsleistungen im Bereich Steuern, Finanzen und New-Placement sowie maßgeschneiderte Seminare bis hin zur Unterstützung im Bewerbungsprozess. Sie profitieren zudem von unserer Eingliederung in Deutschlands größtes Führungskräftenetzwerk. Führungskräfteverbände mit über 70.000 Mitgliedern deutschlandweit (ULA – Vereinigung der deutschen Führungskräfteverbände) und etwa 1,5 Mio. Mitgliedern europaweit (CEC – European Managers) sprechen gemeinsam mit einer starken Stimme.
Gehen Sie mit uns in Führung!

Name: European Association of Political Consultants (EAPC)
Description:
During the annual conference of the International Association of Political Consultants (IAPC) in Dublin 1995, Sepp Hartinger (Austria) and Michel Bongrad (France) decided to found the European Association of Political Consultants. Six months later, Hartinger organized a meeting in Paris between a group of European consultants to discuss the idea. The EAPC was officially founded in September 1996, with the inaurgural conference taking place in Vienna with colleagues from Austria, Germany, Turkey, Italy, Switzerland, Hungary, France and the USA.

In the following years, EAPC grew into a broad coalition of political consultants and public affairs professionals in Europe. Members exchanged experiences, giving each other tips on how to act most effectively and support democracy. 

In 2003 the EAPC started the project “Election Time”, presenting the best campaigns from the continent in an annual year book. The project ran for 3 years between 2003-2005, and was translated into English, German, Turkish and Russian. 

In 2010 the EAPC elected Gerlinde Manz-Christ from Liechtenstein as their the first female President. 

In 2014, the EAPC embarked upon a re-organization, aiming to make their services more dynamic in order to better cater to their members. This process continued at the 2017 general assembly in Brussels, where the EAPC adopted the Code of Conduct for all members as well as a new constitution. In the same year, thhe EAPC established the “EAPC Polaris award”, a new award for political campaigning. 

The EAPC is a one-of-a-kind platform for political consultants in Europe. Our association cooperates very closely with other professional associations in the  political consulting business, like IAPC, AAPC and ALACOP.

Name: Biogasrat+ e.V.
Description:
Biogasrat+ e. V. - dezentrale energien

ist der Verband für dezentrale erneuerbare Energieerzeugung und Energieversorgung und vertritt die Interessen der führenden Marktteilnehmer der Bioenergiebranche. Im Vordergrund steht dabei die Markt- und Systemintegration der erneuerbaren Energien entlang der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette. Biogas und insbesondere Biomethan können im Strom-, Wärme- und Verkehrssektor wesentlich dazu beitragen, die klimapolitischen Zielvorgaben zu erfüllen und das sozialverträglich, nachhaltig erneuerbar und kosteneffizient. Aus diesem Grund setzt sich der Verband für einen stärkeren Einsatz von Biomethan in allen Nutzungspfaden ein, indem rechtliche Rahmenbedingungen optimiert und zugleich Planungs- und Investitionssicherheit für die Marktakteure geschaffen werden, um die bestehenden Potenziale der Biogas- und Biomethanerzeugung zu heben.

Name: New Virginia Majority
Description: New Virginia Majority is a civic engagement organization dedicated to empowering working-class communities of color across Virginia. The organization focuses on promoting racial, economic, and environmental justice through year-round efforts in political education, voter outreach, mobilization, and leadership development. Its initiatives aim to expand democratic participation and address pressing social issues such as climate pollution and systemic inequalities.

Name: Bund der Selbständigen Schleswig-Holstein - BDS SH
Description:
Der Bund der Selbständigen Schleswig-Holstein e.V. (BDS SH) vertritt als eine der führenden Interessenvertretungen die Anliegen von Unternehmern und Selbständigen in Schleswig-Holstein. Unser Ziel ist es, eine starke Gemeinschaft zu schaffen, in der Mitglieder von einem umfangreichen Netzwerk profitieren, das Unterstützung, Wissenstransfer und Geschäftsmöglichkeiten bietet.

Wir setzen uns für die Verbesserung der wirtschaftlichen Rahmenbedingungen ein, indem wir aktiv politische Arbeit leisten und uns für die Entbürokratisierung, faire Marktbedingungen und verbesserte Fördermaßnahmen für KMUs stark machen. Ein besonderes Augenmerk liegt auf der Förderung der digitalen Transformation und der Unterstützung unserer Mitglieder bei der Anpassung an die Herausforderungen und Chancen des digitalen Zeitalters.

Durch regelmäßige Veranstaltungen, Workshops und Seminare bieten wir Unternehmern die Möglichkeit zur Weiterbildung und zum Austausch über aktuelle Trends und Themen wie Innovation, Nachhaltigkeit und New Work. Dabei arbeiten wir eng mit lokalen Handels- und Gewerbevereinen sowie weiteren Partnern zusammen, um ein breites Spektrum an Perspektiven und Expertisen zu integrieren.

Der BDS SH ist nicht nur ein Netzwerk für geschäftliche Kontakte, sondern auch eine Plattform für sozialen Austausch, aus der langfristige Partnerschaften und Freundschaften entstehen können. Unsere Mitglieder profitieren von einer starken Gemeinschaft, die sich gegenseitig unterstützt und gemeinsam für die Interessen des Mittelstands eintritt.

Wir laden alle Unternehmer und Selbständigen ein, Teil unserer Gemeinschaft zu werden, um gemeinsam die Zukunft des Unternehmertums in Schleswig-Holstein zu gestalten. Mit Ihrer Mitgliedschaft im BDS SH stärken Sie nicht nur Ihr eigenes Geschäft, sondern tragen auch zur Entwicklung einer florierenden und nachhaltigen regionalen Wirtschaft bei.

Name: Independent Center
Description:
The Independent Center gives VOICE to the millions of Americans who believe in common sense solutions, tolerance and freedom of choice to solve our problems.

Independent voters are now the pluralistic majority, we will decide the results of the 2024 election. 

Our mission is to deliver research on who are the independent voters, what we want and believe in and how we can help solve challenges. We advocate for centrist and bipartisan solutions, supporting politicians who will work together, regardless of party lines.

We need your support. Join our list for our latest reports and insights, events and more. We want to hear your ideas.

Name: Diverse Young Leaders
Description: Youth participation is limited, time consuming and can cost a lot of money. It can keep many potential candidates, who do not have the resources from attending or applying to opportunities. Thereby, we often witness participation from a very homogeneous group. The same group that will potentially become the leaders of tomorrow. We wanted to create an initiative that addresses this issue and helps diversify youth engagement and participation. To combat this phenomenon it is important to ask oneself what barriers are holding young minorities back from excelling in their career and taking in potential leadership roles. Diverse Young Leaders aims to spread awareness on possible barriers for young people with a minority background.

Name: Faithful America
Description: Faithful America is the largest and fastest-growing online community of Christians putting faith into action for social justice. Our members are sick of sitting by quietly while Jesus' message of good news is hijacked by the religious right to serve a hateful political agenda. We're organizing the faithful to challenge such extremism and renew the church's prophetic role in building a more free and just society.

Name: Gemeinde Samedan
Description:
Samedan, Wirtschaftszentrum des Oberengadins

Die zentrale Lage Samedans führte wohl dazu, dass Samedan der Hauptort des Kreises Oberengadin (neu Region Maloja) wurde. Als Metropole darf Samedan das Spital Oberengadin sowie das Alters- und Pflegeheim beherbergen. Die zentrale Lage bringt es auch mit sich, dass in Samedan verschiedene kantonale Ämter untergebracht sind.


Samedan ist ein wichtiger Verkehrsknotenpunkt

Der Bahnhof von Samedan ist das Herzstück des Bahnverkehrs im Oberengadin, kommen hier doch mit den Zügen von St. Moritz, Pontresina / Bernina, Unterengadin und Albula vier Linien zusammen. Der Knotenbahnhof ist ein modernes Dienstleistungszentrum mit vielseitigen Aufgaben. Durchschnittlich fahren täglich über 100 fahrplanmässige Züge in Samedan ein und aus. Zudem wird ein Fernsteuerzentrum für die Albulalinie betreut. 

In der Ebene von Samedan befindet sich auch der Engadin Airport. Seine Bedeutung für den Tourismus – besonders im wichtigen Luxussegment – ist unbestritten, genauso wie seine touristische Bedeutung für die Region als Ganzes. 


Samedan, der Gewerbeort

In Samedan ist das Gewerbe, verglichen mit den anderen Oberengadiner Gemeinden, am stärksten vertreten. Zahlreiche Handwerksbetriebe garantieren beste Qualität. 

Durch den Aufbau einer eigenen Gewerbezone in der Cho d'Punt – der grössten im Oberengadin – ist es gelungen, dem Gewerbe den nötigen Raum zu geben und gleichzeitig den Ortskern und die Wohngebiete weiterhin wohnlich und attraktiv zu erhalten. 

Das und noch sehr vieles mehr gibt es in Samedan zu entdecken! Diese Vielfalt und Schönheit des Ortes möchte die Gemeinde Samedan mit ihren Einwohner:innen und Fans auf diesem und anderen Kanälen teilen.

Folgt uns auch auf Facebook und Instagram.

Name: BürgerInnen Forum Europa
Description:
Das BürgerInnen Forum Europa - das sind Menschen, die miteinander die Zukunft der EU gestalten wollen.

Unser Verein ist eine überparteiliche Plattform, die Europa österreichweit zum Thema macht.

Mit der Mission, das europäische Bewusstsein in Österreich zu stärken, organisieren wir echte BürgerInnendialoge in allen Bundesländern, gestalten durchdachte Lösungen mit ExpertInnen und sind der place-to-be für alle, die sich für Europa engagieren wollen.

Name: UBC Political Science Students' Association
Description: The UBC Political Science Students' Association (UBC PSSA) is an entirely student-run departmental club, supported by the UBC Political Science department. We strive to provide all undergraduate students interested in political science with opportunities to learn more about the discipline by hosting entertaining, informative, and social events that connect them with other students with similar interests as well as professionals. Our ultimate goal is to cultivate a prosperous undergraduate environment for Political Science students. The PSSA represents the interests of students, and presents them to the faculty, meaning we take concerns and suggestions seriously, in such a way that can make an actual difference in student life.

Name: Italian American Democratic Leadership Council
Description:
At the request of the Democratic National Committee, Italian American leaders in the Clinton-Gore campaign founded the Italian American Democratic Leadership Council in 1993 to serve as the national voice of Italian Americans in the Democratic Party. 

The organization’s objectives are to:

Raise Funds - Raise and contribute campaign funds to Italian American Democratic candidates for Congress and major statewide candidates in every election cycle

Organize Outreach Efforts - Assist Democratic presidential campaigns in organizing and implementing outreach to Italian American voters in the U.S. and abroad

Advocate for Appointments - Advocate for the appointment of Italian Americans by Democratic presidential administrations to Cabinet positions, federal judgeships, ambassadorships, White House and other administration staff positions, and federal boards and commissions

Increase Participation - Recruit Italian American Democrats to participate in campaigns, party-building activities, and public service

Lead the National Democratic Ethnic Coordinating Council - Helped found and continue to lead the National Democratic Ethnic Coordinating Council within the Democratic National Committee

Support Speaker Pelosi - Support the efforts of Speaker Nancy Pelosi, the first Italian American Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives

Host Receptions - Host receptions for Italian American delegates to the Democratic National Convention and for Italian Americans attending inaugural events honoring Democratic presidents

Name: Platforma za progres
Description:
Platforma za progres je politička stranka nastala kao rezultat pokreta koji je započet tokom predizborne kampanje za opće izbore u Bosni i Hercegovini. Osnivač i aktuelni predsjednik je prof. dr. Mirsad Hadžikadić, kandidat za člana Predsjedništva Bosne i Hercegovine na općim izborima 2018. godine.

Kao stranka, Platforma za progres je osnovana na Dan državnosti Bosne i Hercegovine, 25.11.2018. godine, na Prvoj osnovačkoj skupštini u Domu mladih u Sarajevu. U prvoj godini dana svog djelovanja, učlanilo se preko 6000 ljudi, te je uspostavljena unutrašnja struktura stranke. Druga skupština je održana u Banjaluci, 24.11.209. godine, kada je izabrano kompletno rukovodstvo stranke demokratskim putem.

Principi Platforme su: država, znanje, poštenje, mladi i odgovornost.

Name: Maryland Republican Party
Description: The Maryland Republican Party is fighting for a freer, stronger, more prosperous state and country where everyone can achieve the American Dream. We're proud to have elected Governor Larry Hogan, the 2nd most popular Governor in the country. He is a champion for workable Republican ideals in Annapolis — and he has led the most inclusive and most diverse administration in Maryland history.

Name: California Cannabis Voice
Description:
The time is now in California to bring cannabis-related businesses the respect and legitimization they deserve. Legislation is in the works right now -- California Cannabis Voice is working to ensure the impending state law to license medical cannabis businesses is fair and takes into account the current realities in the state, particularly the cultivating counties.

California Cannabis Voice represents the interests of the cannabis community, particularly cultivators and producers. The advocates behind the PAC will direct resources to elect politicians and influence legislation in line with our 12 guiding principles outlined here. 

The PAC will influence how local laws regarding medical cannabis, such as zoning laws, are drafted and enacted. Be a part of the first wave of legitimization or risk missing it.

The AAP is the ruling party in the National Capital Territory of Delhi, and has been changing the face of governance and politics in the national capital under the leadership of its National Convener and Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal. It has opened the doors for common citizens to become a part of a political organization. By giving a voice to the common citizens, the AAP as a collective is addressing the faults in the strongest pillars of a nation, namely democracy, bureaucracy and electoral system, etc. With the promise to end corruption from the system and put forth a model of alternative politics, the AAP made its grand entry.

The AAP motivates youth who is interested in politics, and the skilled who is anywhere between exploring the circuit of possibilities, to join the largest growing political movement in the country. The nation needs you.

Name: United Tea Party of Georgia
Description:
The United Tea Party of Georgia promotes the philosophy upon which the Country was founded.  Guided by the Declaration of Independence and the United States Constitution, our focus is to hold elected officials accountable, restore core values of our society, and be governed by the rule of law in a Constitutional Republic.

We seek like minded citizens for membership and as candidates for election to local, state and federal offices.  We have a deep respect and love for this Country and its people and seek to guide and preserve this Nation as our Founding Fathers intended, beginning within our own community.

Name: International Young Democrat Union (IYDU)
Description:
The International Young Democrat Union (IYDU) is a global alliance of centre-right political youth organisations united by a common desire for greater freedom and less government.

First established in 1981, two years before its parent organisation the International Democrat Union (IDU), then re-established in 1991, the IYDU has grow from 14 members to 127, from more than 81 different nations.

Our membership is diverse. We come from a rich array of histories, cultures and political traditions, but we are united by a shared commitment to freedom, and to fighting socialism. Some of us come from established democracies with deep-rooted beliefs in individual freedom and liberty; some have experienced first-hand the destructive evil of communism; others are still fighting for basic freedoms.

Throughout the year the IYDU hosts a number of events around the world. Current and future leaders network, discuss ideology, share ideas and build friendships. Our events include a Freedom Forum in the middle of the year, a Study Trip, and a Council Meeting held towards the end/start of the calendar year.

Becoming involved in IYDU demonstrates a commitment:  to a better world, created through genuine democratic process. Participants at our conferences have progressed to become cabinet ministers, members of parliament, senior advisers and leaders within their respective industries in both the public and private sectors.

Name: Christian for Treasurer
Description: Christian Espinosa Torres is a candidate for Douglas County Treasurer with over 20 years of experience in economics and fiscal management. He currently serves as the Assistant Director of the Human Rights and Relations Department in Omaha. He applies his experience to enhance the community's financial well-being and drive positive change. Christian believes in investing in local economies, supporting small businesses, and ensuring that public resources that serve entire community effectively.

Name: Stones' Phones
Description: Stones’ Phones is a political consulting firm focused on phone technology in support of electoral campaigns, Democratic causes and progressive issues. We supply the message, strategy and means of communication for campaigns to reach and persuade voters along with giving progressive organizations the means to directly connect with their members. For over a decade Stones’ Phones has worked on most major presidential campaigns including Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton, along with hundreds of governor, senate and congressional races.  In addition we support the greater progressive community – whether it’s environmental groups, civil and LGBT rights organizations, Unions and non-profits working to advance the cause of equality, justice and access for all Americans.

Name: PERFORM Zukunftsregion FrankfurtRheinMain
Description:
FrankfurtRheinMain ist eine der wirtschaftsstärksten und lebenswertesten Regionen weltweit. Sie erstreckt sich über Städte und Landkreise in Bayern, Hessen und Rheinland-Pfalz. Und sie hat großes Zukunftspotenzial, wenn sie ihre Stärken als polyzentrisches Kraftfeld richtig ausspielt. 

Als international erfolgreiches Wirtschaftszentrum steht FrankfurtRheinMain im ständigen Standortwettbewerb mit anderen Regionen und Mega-Cities weltweit. Unter dem Dach von PERFORM setzen sich die Wirtschaftskammern seit 2016 für eine verbindliche bundesländerübergreifende Zusammenarbeit in entscheidenden Themen der regionalen Standortentwicklung ein – damit unsere Metropolregion auch morgen zur Spitze gehört. 

Wir fördern eine gemeinsame Identität FrankfurtRheinMain. Wir vernetzen Vertreter:innen aus Politik, Wirtschaft, Verwaltung, Wissenschaft und Gesellschaft – beispielsweise bei unserem jährlichen „Tag der Metropolregion“. Wir liefern verlässliche Daten und Fakten zur Entwicklung – etwa über Studien, Umfragen und Erhebungen – und vermitteln Wissen und Impulse. Wir setzen eigene Projekte zur Entwicklung der Metropolregion um, darunter ausgewählte Services für Kommunen und Unternehmen. Und wir machen die Erfolge anderer sichtbar – insbesondere über den mit 10.000 Euro dotierten „Preis der Metropolregion“: Mit unserem Zukunftsaward würdigen wir jährlich ein herausragendes Projekt, das sich in besonderer Weise um die Weiterentwicklung von FrankfurtRheinMain verdient gemacht hat.

Name: Voters For Animal Rights
Description: Voters For Animal Rights is a grassroots advocacy organization that is building political power for animals in New York State. Our mission is to help elect candidates who support animal protection, lobby for stronger laws to stop animal cruelty, and hold elected officials accountable to humane voters.

Name: Ensemble Montréal
Description:
Parti politique montréalais, Ensemble Montréal est une équipe forte de 33 élus répartis dans 13 arrondissements, unie par son désir de travailler pour Montréal et ses citoyens. 

Décidé à prendre le pouvoir d’ici 4 ans, Ensemble Montréal forme présentement l'Opposition officielle à l'hôtel de ville de Montréal.  Nous exerçons une opposition responsable et rigoureuse, grâce à notre équipe composée d'individus de talent, de femmes et d'hommes qui possèdent l'expérience et la détermination nécessaires pour contribuer à tous les dossiers municipaux.  

La démarche de notre formation politique se fonde sur une réflexion, une vue d’ensemble tenant compte de toutes les considérations, tant humaines et sociales que géographiques et économiques. Tout en privilégiant l’échelle locale, notre vision d'ensemble nous fait garder l’oeil sur l’extérieur de notre territoire. Avec Ensemble Montréal, notre ville assumera pleinement le rôle de métropole qu’elle tient face aux autres villes du Québec et du monde.

Name: Capitol Jewish Women's Network
Description: This is for Jewish women on the Hill, downtown and in between to collaborate and network. It is for women in policy, press, politics and PR or any related field.

Name: Stadt Frankfurt am Main, Foreigners Advisory Council
Description:
The Foreigners Advisory Council - or - "KAV"  (Kommunale Ausländer- und Ausländerinnenvertretung der Stadt Frankfurt ) is the elected representation of  foreigners in the city of Frankfurt, Germany. The KAV consists of multiple factions that have the common goal of improving Integration. The  KAV understands "Integration" as an equal participation  in the communal life while respecting the individual cultural identity, as well as developing new cultural commonalities. 

Die KAV ist die Kommunale Ausländer- und Ausländerinnenvertretung Frankfurt am Main. Die KAV besteht aus mehreren Listen, doch ihr gemeinsames Ziel ist die Integration.Unter „Integration“ versteht die KAV: Eine innerhalb der Werte und Normen des Grundgesetzes stattfindende gleichberechtigte Beteiligung am gesellschaftlichen Leben unter Bewahrung der eigenen kulturellen Identität, aber auch die Entwicklung von neuen kulturellen Gemeinsamkeiten.

Name: Socialist International
Description: The Socialist International is the worldwide organisation of social democratic, socialist and labour parties. It currently brings together 132 political parties and organisations from all continents.

Name: ChristenUnie Veenendaal
Description: De ChristenUnie gelooft in de kracht van de Veenendaalse samenleving. Veenendaal wordt in de eerste plaats gevormd door burgers zelf - in verbanden als gezinnen, verenigingen en geloofsgemeenschappen - en ook door (maatschappelijke) organisaties, scholen en bedrijven. God heeft ons aan elkaar gegeven. Samen nemen we verantwoordelijkheid, gaan verplichtingen aan en maken Veenendaal leefbaar. Wij geloven dat mensen tot bloei komen wanneer ze echt samen leven en zich verantwoordelijk voelen - voor zichzelf, voor elkaar en voor hun omgeving - en ze dat actief handen en voeten geven.

Name: CDU-Fraktion im Schleswig-Holsteinischen Landtag
Description:
In der 20. Legislaturperiode steht das gemeinsame Regierungsbündnis von CDU und Grünen unter dem Motto: „Ideen verbinden. Chancen nutzen". Mit Innovationskraft und der Bereitschaft, neue Wege zu gehen, wollen wir die Herausforderungen der Gegenwart lösen und die Zukunft erfolgreich gestalten.
Mit 34 Abgeordneten sind wir deutlich die stärkste Kraft im Landeshaus. Lediglich ein Mandat fehlte zur absoluten Mehrheit.
Über die Hälfte der Abgeordneten gehört erstmals dem Landtag an. Mehrere junge Abgeordnete haben den Generationswechsel vorangebracht. Zu unserer Schleswig-Holstein-Fraktion gehören Abgeordnete aus allen kreisfreien Städten ebenso wie aus allen elf Kreisen.

Name: FS Model United Nations
Description: Each year, the FS Model United Nations (MUN) initiative offers Frankfurt School students the unique opportunity to participate in the National Model United Nations (NMUN) Conference in New York. In this political simulation students experience firsthand how the UN works and learn to engage in global issues. Thereby, participating students advance their skill set, including public speaking, formal writing, negotiating and diplomatic skills, as well as assertiveness and team spirit. After all, the NMUN New York is an exceptional experience to stimulate cultural exchange.

Name: Democratic Business Council of Northern Virginia
Description: Founded in 2003, the Democratic Business Council of Northern Virginia (“DemBiz”) is one of the country’s premier networking and event organizations for progressive business professionals. DemBiz connects business executives, elected officials, non-profit leaders, progressive activists and a range of other like-minded individuals from around the dynamic Northern Virginia region and beyond. DemBiz is uniquely positioned to advance the message that Democrats are better for business and the economy. o	Best known for its monthly Signature Breakfast Series events, DemBiz features national, statewide and local speakers including presidential candidates, business leaders, congressional members, national journalists, local elected officials and more. Programs also include candidate forums, legislative updates and happy hours. Please join us!

Name: Impegno per la professione
Description:
Il nostro impegno.
Ci impegniamo, con competenza, visione e coraggio, affinché l’Ordine di Roma possa continuare a svolgere il proprio ruolo di impulso e promozione di iniziative, serie e concrete, e consentire ai Commercialisti di partecipare attivamente ai processi di riforma ed ai cambiamenti in  atto nell’economia e nella società italiana contribuendo a costruire un sistema più dinamico, inclusivo e competitivo.

Name: Bund der Steuerzahler Hamburg e.V.
Description: Der BdSt ist die Interessenvertretung aller Steuerzahler:innen. Er ist unabhängig, parteipolitisch neutral und gemeinnützig. Sein Ziel ist es, die Steuern und Abgaben zu senken sowie Verschwendung zu stoppen. Seine Arbeit finanziert er ausschließlich aus Mitgliedsbeiträgen und Spenden.

Name: March On
Description:
March On is a political organization composed of women-led political activist groups that grew out of the women’s marches of January 21, 2017. They have come together as a united force to take concrete, coordinated actions at the federal, state and local levels to impact elections and move the country in a progressive direction.
Founded by the leaders of many of the marches across the country, March On is women-led, but open to all, and will employ a sophisticated political strategy to coordinate concrete actions at the federal, state, and local level through the joint efforts of millions of marchers. March On is a 501(c)(4) organization with a Super PAC and an affiliated (c)(3) project.

Name: D66 Arnhem
Description:
Vertrouw op de eigen kracht van mensen
Denk en handel internationaal
Beloon prestatie en deel de welvaart
Streef naar een duurzame en harmonieuze samenleving
Koester de grondrechten en gedeelde waarden

D66 Arnhem heeft na de grote winst bij de gemeenteraadsverkiezingen van 3 maart 2010 vier zetels in de Arnhemse raad, en levert een wethouder in het huidige college.

Name: Parti conservateur du Québec
Description: Nous, les membres du Parti conservateur du Québec, sommes des Québécoises et des Québécois de divers horizons qui adhèrent et qui se rallient aux principes fondamentaux: la liberté et les droits individuels, la responsabilité de chaque citoyen, l'économie de marché, la réduction de la taille de l'État et une meilleure place du Québec au sein de la fédération canadienne.

Name: Antidiskriminierungsbüro Sachsen
Description:
Zentrale Anlaufstelle für Betroffene von Diskriminierung in Sachsen //
Beratung, Weiterbildung, Information //

Bei der Wohnungssuche, auf Arbeit, im Geschäft oder einer Behörde – wenn Menschen Diskriminierung erfahren, ist es gut, nicht allein da zu stehen. Wir unterstützen Betroffene dabei, mit dem Erlebten umzugehen, und beraten sie, wie sie sich für ihre Rechte stark machen können. Durch Weiterbildungen und Vernetzung in Sachsen versuchen wir unserer Vision, einer gelebten Antidiskriminierungskultur in Sachsen, näher zu kommen.

Name: Wirtschaftsrat Hamburg
Description:
Mit rund 1.000 Mitgliedern zählt Hamburg zu den stärksten Landesverbänden im Wirtschaftsrat. Wir sind Kompetenzzentrum und Netzwerk zugleich: In unseren Landesfachkommissionen bündeln Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer ihre Expertise und entwickeln gemeinsam Positionen zu aktuellen wirtschaftspolitischen Themen, die die Stadt bewegen. Regelmäßig laden wir in verschiedenen Formaten zu hochkarätigen Veranstaltungen mit bekannten Persönlichkeiten aus Politik, Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft und Medien ein und ermöglichen den persönlichen Dialog mit den Entscheidungsträgern.

Zu den traditionellen Clustern Hafen, Logistik und Luftfahrt ist es für die Hansestadt wichtig neue und zukunftsweisende Branchen gewinnen. Die Digitalisierung bietet Hamburg die große Chance, sich ein Stück weit neu zu erfinden. Es gilt, durch die Ansiedlung innovativer Unternehmen, die Etablierung von Forschungs- und Entwicklungseinrichtungen sowie die gezielte Förderung kluger Köpfe zu einem der führenden Standorte für die digitale Transformation zu werden.

Name: WLU Graduate Students' Association
Description: The Wilfrid Laurier University Graduate Students’ Association is the student government representative of all graduate students at WLU. The WLUGSA exists to advocate for and support the community of graduate and professional students at WLU.

Name: European Christian Political Party
Description:
The European Christian Political Party (ECPP) is the only European political party in the European Parliament explicitly working on promoting Christian values in politics. We gather almost 100 Christian-democratic parties, individuals and organizations from all over Europe, which makes us the biggest Christian political network. ECPP is not affiliated to any of the groups in the European Parliament, but our MEPs sit with the ECR and EPP groups.

In short, we stand for:
 - a Europe of human dignity
 - an economy that works for people and planet
 - healthy families and healthy marriages
 - freedom, security and stability
 - fighting human trafficking 
 - reforming the European Union
 - preserving Christian culture & heritage

We aim to reflect and work on Christian-democratic policies in Europe from an explicit Christian-social view. We focus on the human being in his relationship with God, other people and the creation. We see this relational thinking as the heart of Christian democracy. 

Parties, think tanks and individual politicians can participate in a broad range of ECPP activities such as conferences, seminars and trainings, and be involved in the further development of ECPP. 
In 2010, ECPP (formerly ECPM) has been granted official status at the European level by the European Parliament. 

If you are interested in the ECPP and its activities, please do not hesitate to contact us. You are most welcome!

Name: CDU-Landtagsfraktion Baden-Württemberg
Description: Unsere Landtagsfraktion, das sind die 42 Abgeordneten der CDU im Landtag von Baden-Württemberg mit dem Fraktionsvorsitzenden Manuel Hagel, unterstützt durch die Fraktionsgeschäftsstelle.

Name: Bergen Venstre
Description: Vi vil ha en grønn og levende by hvor det er godt å vokse opp, enten du er en liten bergenser, eller en liten bedrift. Bergen skal være en raus by hvor vi tar vare på dem som faller utenfor og heier på dem som lykkes.

Name: British Columbia Youth Parliament
Description:
BCYP is a Youth Service organization dedicated to fulfilling its motto, "Youth Serving Youth". Our history spans almost a century, having its roots in our predecessor organization in 1924, the Older Boys Parliament. Each year, 95 individuals, ages 16 to 21, from around the province meet in the Legislative Buildings in Victoria and debate a variety of legislation that outlines projects that will then be run throughout the year. In addition to this, Private Members Resolutions are introduced giving members the ability to debate any issue they choose to, while still participating in a practical lesson on the parliamentary process.

We're a non-profit, non-partisan youth service organization run by youth from across British Columbia. We're run by youth, for youth.

What does all this mean? We're not associated with any political parties or organisations, and we do our best to serve the youth of BC through projects that further your mental, physical, and spiritual well-being.

Name: ASFE - Luxembourg
Description: Des Conseillers des Français de l’étranger à votre écoute, qui répondent à vos questions et défendent vos prérogatives de ressortissants expatriés devant l’Assemblée des français à l’étranger. Une liste indépendante pour vous guider et faire valoir vos droits en France et au Luxembourg.

Name: Studenterrådet ved Københavns Universitet
Description:
Studenterrådet er en mangfoldig og vidt forgrenet studenterpolitisk organisation, som repræsenterer de 40.000 studerende på Danmarks største universitet. 

Vi arbejder hårdt for at sikre vores interesser som studerende på Københavns Universitet – både på lokalt og nationalt plan.  I Studenterrådet arbejder vi sammen på tværs af fag og fakulteter med det formål at skabe et bedre universitet. Det er os der kæmper for feedback, fagcaféer og flere undervisningstimer. Det er os der slår i bordet og går til kamp, når politikerne prøver at gennemføre reformer der forringer vores uddannelse. 

Vi tror på at vi kan lave verden om. Vi tror på at vi sammen skal tage ansvar for vores uddannelse, så når politikere eller rektoratet truer kvaliteten, siger vi stop. Vi studerende er Danmarks fremtid, og det er en fremtid, der er værd at investere i.

Name: FDP Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Wir sind die Freien Demokraten Baden-Württemberg. Wir sind die Partei der Freiheit, des Rechtsstaats, der Chancen und des Optimismus. Wir kämpfen für die Rechte, die Aufstiegschancen, weltbeste Bildung und das Erreichen eines guten Lebens für alle Menschen in unserem Land. Wir glauben an den Fortschritt, die soziale Marktwirtschaft und an die Vernunft jedes Einzelnen.

Die historischen Wurzeln unseres Landesverbands in den liberalen Bürgerbewegungen des 19. Jahrhunderts und die Neugründungen im September 1945 um Theodor Heuss, Wolfgang Haussmann und Reinhold Maier, dem ersten Ministerpräsidenten des Landes Baden-Württemberg, sind für uns ein historischer Auftrag. Die Herausforderungen der Zukunft packen wir optimistisch und voller Empathie für individuelle Bedürfnisse an. Als pragmatischer, bürgernaher Problemlöser füllen wir das Subsidiaritätsprinzip mit Leben.

Name: National Security Network
Description: The mission of the National Security Network (NSN) is to strengthen American national security by helping to create and advance progressive policies for exercising American power and addressing global challenges. NSN concentrates on bridging the gaps in thought and action between policy experts and policymakers, and between Washington politics and the American public, and challenges misguided, overly militarized conservative approaches foreign policy. We promote a selective, pragmatic international engagement that emphasizes diplomatic and economic tools, along with a responsible use of military action, to ensure America’s security and promote American values. Accomplishing these tasks requires combining strategic communications with policy expertise to achieve outcomes across policymaking circles, Congress, and the media.

Name: Agadir Technical Unit (ATU)
Description:
نشأة الوحدة الفنية

مقرها الدائم بعمان – المملكة الأردنية الهاشمية.
بدأت نشاطها في 8 أبريل 2007.
تعمل كمؤسسة رسمية لمتابعة تنفيذ إتفاقية أغادير.
تسعى لتقديم المشورة والدعم الفني والقيام بدراسات موضوعية لكافة المسائل المتعلقة بالإتفاقية وتنفيذها لصالح الدول الأعضاء في الإتفاقية.
تحظى بالدعم الفني والمالي من الإتحاد الأوروبي.
Funded by the European Union (EU

الاطار القانوني للوحدة الفنية

المادة رقم (27) من إتفاقية أغادير: تنشأ بموجب هذه الاتفاقية وحدة فنية لرعاية شؤونها يكون من إختصاصها تقديم المشورة والدعم الفني في جميع المسائل التي تخص تنفيذ الاتفاقية.
الملحق (III) لاتفاقية اغادير: والذي يدعو لانشاء وحدة فنية لاتفاقية اغادير.
بروتوكول انشاء وحدة فنية لرعاية شؤون إتفاقية إقامة منطقة التبادل الحر بين الدول العربية المتوسطية.

اهداف الوحدة الفنية:

متابعة تنفيذ نصوص واحكام الاتفاقية ورعاية شؤونها.
متابعة تنفيذ قرارات لجنة وزراء الخارجية ولجنة وزراء التجارة الخارجية.
تقديم المشورة الفنية في مختلف المسائل والجوانب المتعلقة بالاتفاقية وكيفية تنفيذها.
