Name: Oklahoma Democratic Party
Description:
The mission of the Oklahoma Democratic Party is to elect Democrats.

The ODP reflects the solid values of the state it represents – honesty, hard work and compassion for those who are less fortunate.

We are the party squarely in the center of the political spectrum.

Unlike the far left, we know that less government is sometimes a better government and that government cannot solve every difficulty faced by our society. But, unlike the far right, we understand there is a role for government to play in finding solutions to our country’s problems.

We firmly believe that government at every level has an absolute responsibility to encourage opportunity for success to all  of its citizens. However, government has no responsibility to guarantee success itself.

We believe in public education as the oldest and best method to improve the quality of life for all Oklahomans. We support improved funding for education at all levels, coupled with meaningful reforms to ensure taxpayers get the most from every education dollar.

Oklahoma Democrats are progressive and sensible. We are optimistic about the future, and we are determined to see Oklahoma’s traditional values upheld.

Name: UReka
Description:
UReka is the biggest student party with currently 6 of 9 seats in the University Council of the University of Twente.
It has been established in 2001 and is since then engaged in representing student interests in front of the UT board.
UReka is the only student party that works full-time on the issues of students and that has a very strong bonding with study- and student associations, national and international workgroups, and (of course) with you students.

UReka is strongly target-oriented, proactive and very communicated - these main competences help us to develop and maintain a strong network with students, associations and think-alongs so that we are always up-to-date and can achieve our goals for the improvement of education at the UT and students' life.

Beside the work for the University Council, UReka is always busy to find out where there are problems, ideas and advices from students and associations to improve the study conditions for both Dutch and international students. It is important for us not to limit our interests and responsibilities to our work in the council but also to be proactive and find topics or ideas of improvement ourselves. To achieve this goal, we are member of numerous associations and workgroups so that we can use this network as a resource for our topics to deliver to the council.

Ensemble, œuvrons pour que chaque Sénégalais accède aux opportunités de croissance et réussisse. Suivez-nous pour des idées innovantes, des débats constructifs et des actions en faveur d'un Sénégal prospère. Rejoignez-nous pour VIVRE une Vision Vers Le Renouveau."

Name: San Fernando Valley Young Democrats (SFVYD)
Description:
Welcome, Young Activists and Changemakers! 

The San Fernando Valley Young Democrats (SFVYD) is comprised of politically active young professionals who all share a common vision -  to support and elect progressive leaders, shape equitable public policy, spur civic engagement and action within our communities, and increase the presence of young Democrats in the San Fernando Valley. 

SFVYD offers a vibrant calendar of diverse programming and has produced numerous elected officials, organizational leaders, and legislative staffers throughout Los Angeles, including California Senator Alex Padilla, Valley Industry and Commerce Association President Stuart Waldman and many others. 

Reach us anytime at sfvydemocrats@gmail.com! To provide us with job opportunities we can share with our networks, please email sfvydcomms@gmail.com.

Name: ART Arbeitgebervereinigung Region Toggenburg
Description:
Die Arbeitgebervereinigung Region Toggenburg (ART) fördert den Zusammenhalt der Arbeitgeber der Region zur Wahrung und Förderung ihrer gemeinsamen Interessen. Nach innen fördert der Verein den Gedankenaustausch und die Zusammenarbeit zwischen seinen Mitgliedern, insbesondere in bezug auf allgemeine Wirtschafts- und Personalfragen.

Die Region Toggenburg befindet sich inmitten von Europa. Es wird durch die beiden Talschaften Neckertal und Thurtal gebildet. Das Landschaftliche Wahrzeichen des Toggenburgs ist die Bergkette der Churfirsten, die gleichzeitig die Begrenzung nach Süden bildet. Das Toggenburg ist in zwei wirtschaftliche Regionen aufgeteilt. Im oberen Bereich ist der Tourismus und die Landwirtschaft das treibende Element. Im mittleren und unteren Teil ist eine starke Industrie angesiedelt die Produkte und Dienstleistungen in die gesamte Welt liefern. Zusammen mit der Landwirtschaft und dem damit verbundenen Brauchtum bildet das Toggenburg in jeder Hinsicht einen verlässlichen Partner in allen Lebenslagen. Sei es als Lieferant oder Kunde, als Wohn– und Arbeitsort aber auch als Erholungs- und Feriendomizil. Wir leben und arbeiten da wo andere Ferien machen. 

Das Toggenburg – Mittendrin.

Name: New Brunswick Green Party / Parti vert NB
Description:
The New Brunswick Green Party is the third largest provincial political party represented with three re-elected MLAs in the legislature. Rooted in communities, our vision is to form a government and to advocate for social, economic and environmental well-being now and for future generations. 

The Green Party is the real Green deal. We offer new vision, energy and commitment to the future of our province. We are the only party committed to placing the well-being of people and communities at the heart of government decisions, while protecting the natural environment on which we all utterly depend.
---
Le Parti Vert du Nouveau-Brunswick est le troisième plus grand parti politique de la province et est représenté à l'Assemblée législative par trois députés réélus. Enracinés dans nos communautés, notre vision est de former le gouvernement en promouvant le bien-être social, économique et environnemental maintenant et pour les générations futures.

Le Parti vert est la véritable affaire écologique. Nous offrons une nouvelle vision, une énergie renouvelée et un engagement envers l'avenir de notre province. Nous sommes le seul parti engagé à placer le bien-être des personnes et des communautés au cœur des décisions gouvernementales, tout en protégeant l'environnement naturel dont nous dépendons tous entièrement.

Name: Juntos Podemos +
Description:
Somos una agrupación estudiantil con participación activa en la política universitaria, conformada por estudiantes  de la Facultad de Ciencias Administrativas (FCA) , de la Universidad Nacional Mayor de San Marcos.

Nuestra misión es buscar el cambio y mejora continua de la Facultad de Ciencias Administrativas, para el beneficio de los estudiantes y la defensa de sus derechos universitarios siendo un referente para otras agrupaciones políticas estudiantiles.

Nuestros valores son:
1. Responsabilidad
2. Compromiso
3. Vocación de servicio
4. Honestidad
5. Solidaridad

Name: VdU - Landesverband Thüringen
Description:
Der VdU vertritt seit 1954 als Wirtschaftsverband branchenübergreifend die Interessen von Unternehmerinnen. Seit 70 Jahren setzt sich der VdU für mehr weibliches Unternehmertum, mehr Frauen in Führungspositionen und bessere Bedingungen für Frauen in der Wirtschaft ein.

Derzeit repräsentiert der VdU über 1.800 frauengeführte, insbesondere mittelständische Unternehmen aus Industrie, Handwerk, Handel und Dienstleistung. Die Mitglieder des VdU erwirtschaften zusammen einen Jahresumsatz von 85 Milliarden Euro und beschäftigen 500.000 Menschen.

Unser Landesverband stellt den Zusammenhalt aktiver Unternehmerinnen dar, die durch monatlich hochkarätige Veranstaltungen in den verschiedensten Formaten Verbindungen von Frauen zueinander ermöglichen, um unternehmerisch Impulse zu setzen und geschäftliche Aktivitäten zu fördern.

Name: The Nationals WA
Description:
The Nationals WA is a political party with more than a century’s devotion to standing up for regional West Australians and the local communities they call home.

Regional WA is responsible for so much of Australia's economic output, it is only fair the people who live and work in the regions are strongly represented.

When regional areas are strongly represented, the whole state benefits from common sense solutions and an appetite to get things done. WA will always benefit from greater diversification and decentralisation of its economy and The Nationals WA has a proud history of driving an agenda that aims to deliver just that.

JOIN OUR FIGHT for a stronger WA.

Name: Centre Party International Foundation
Description: Centerpartiets internationella stiftelse (CIS) är en av Sveriges partianknutnaorganisationer (PAO) som på uppdrag av regeringen och med finansiering av Sida arbetar för utveckling av demokrati och mänskliga rättigheter i bl.a. Västra Balkan, i Västafrika och i Palestina. Prioriterade målgrupper är kvinnor och ungdomar och att öka deras möjlighet till politiskt deltagande och inflytande. CIS arbetar även med liberala systerpartier för att verka för demokratisk och progressiv utveckling.

Name: Vereniging Verticaal Transport
Description: De VVT is een brancheorganisatie voor bedrijven die machines exploiteren voor verticaal transport. Mobiele kranen, torenkranen, verreikers, hoogwerkers. Vooral verhuurders van mobiele kranen zijn lid van de  VVT. We zijn actief op het gebied van cao arbeidsvoorwaarden, Arbo- en Warenwet, Arbocatalogus verticaal transport, richtlijn Hijs- en hefmiddel, richtlijn mobiele kraan en opleiden en examineren voor de sector.

Name: State Representative Matt Morgan
Description: Welcome and thank you for visiting my page. For years, it has been my desire to become a voice in government for the people of my community in order to enhance their lives through better policies.  I make no secret of my qualifications. In many ways, I’m just like you!  My wife and I are small business owners; we own our own home; and we have two beautiful children who attend local schools. I know what it’s like to work hard at my job, be a responsible parent, and remain dedicated, consistent, and tenacious in order to bring about good change. I am honored and proud to be a native Texan, and I’m very excited about the possibilities of making our community an even greater place to live and raise a family. Morgan4Texas is not a campaign but a journey for the betterment of all. For this reason, I am interested in your opinions, and I truly care about being an advocate to provide you with the voice in government that you deserve. Please join me and my many supporters as we embark on this journey to the Texas State House of Representatives-District 26.

Name: CDA Lansingerland
Description:
Met 45 kandidaten uit elke kern, jong & oud, rijk & arm, praktisch & theoretisch opgeleid, kies je met het CDA voor de leukste, oudste en grootste volkspartij van Lansingerland. Er gaat veel goed in Lansingerland, maar er zijn ook echte problemen. Daarom hebben we volop plannen ontwikkeld, waarmee we voor u aan de slag willen gaan. 

Want net als u, zijn wij THUIS IN LANSINGERLAND.

De vijf belangrijkste prioriteiten:

I. Dorps wonen: we bouwen 1.000 compacte, betaalbare woningen voor jongeren, ouderen en alleenstaanden, en drie knarrenhofjes. Geen industrie bij woonwijken, geen windturbines bij Kruisweg.

II. Een groener Lansingerland: er komt een groene buffer rond onze gemeente, en in elke kern een kinderboerderij .

III. Sterke verenigingen: houd sporten betaalbaar en de huren van sportvelden dus laag. We ondersteunen lokale koren, orkesten, Koningsdag etc.. Vrijwilligers vormen het cement van de samenleving.

IV. Veiligheid in de buurt: het politiebureau moet weer open voor inwoners om aangifte te doen of een agent te spreken. Meer fietsveiligheid en minder vertraging dankzij de aanleg van fietstunnels onder de Boterdorpseweg (bij de scholen), Klapwijkseweg en de N209. Geen coffeeshop in Lansingerland.

V. Integratie van nieuwkomers: asielopvang komt niet midden in woonwijken, maar op een logische plek aan de rand van de gemeente. Statushouders moeten meedoen, en de taal leren. Dat is in ieders belang. Tegenover een uitkering staat een tegenprestatie.

Name: KAS Ghana
Description: KAS GHANA is a leading voice in promoting democratic development and good governance in Ghana. We share insightful analysis, news, and resources on the latest trends in democracy, governance, and innovation. Follow us for the latest updates and join the conversation on shaping a better future for Ghana

Name: BJP Gujarat
Description:
The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) a direct successor of erstwhile Bharatiya Jana Sangh (BJS) founded in 1980, is a major political party of India. The Bharatiya Jana Sangh was founded in 1951 by Syama Prasad Mookerjee, a nationalist leader, former Union Minister and freedom-fighter. 

The party advocates welfare social social policies, self reliance, robust economic growth, foreign policy driven by a nationalist agenda, and strong national defense. The BJP is pledged to build up India as a strong and prosperous nation, which is modern, progressive and enlightened in outlook and which proudly draws inspiration from India's ancient culture and values and thus is able to emerge as a great world power playing an effective role in the comity of Nations for the establishment of world peace and a just international order. 

The Party aims at establishing a democratic state which guarantees to all citizens irrespective of caste, creed or sex, political, social and economic justice, equality of opportunity and liberty of faith and expression. The Party shall bear true faith and allegiance to the Constitution of India as by law established and to the principles of socialism, secularism and democracy and would uphold the sovereignty, unity and integrity of India. 

The BJP stands for strong national defense, small government and free-market economic policies. Integral humanism has been its core philosophy and identity ever since its inception.

Name: FDP.Die Liberalen Nürensdorf
Description:
Seit 1848 bringen die freisinnig-liberalen Werte die Schweiz vorwärts.

Seit 1894 vertritt die FDP auf Bundesebene eine freisinnig-demokratische Grundhaltung und setzt sich für die individuelle Freiheit aller ein.

Seit 1972 setzt sich die FDP Nürensdorf auf kommunaler Ebene für dieselben Anliegen ein.

Wir sind uns bewusst, dass Nürensdorf eine attraktive und gesunde Gemeinde ist, die eine hohe Wohnqualität bietet. Unser Engagement dient dazu, diese privilegierte Situation zu erhalten und nach Möglichkeit weiter auszubauen. Wir engagieren uns schwergewichtig in folgenden Bereichen:

- Pflege und Ausbau unserer hochwertigen Schulen mit Förderung aller Leistungsklassen.

- Solidarische Entwicklung der Flughafenregion Zürich - insbesondere KEIN Pistenausbau.

- Engagement für nachhaltig gesunde Gemeindefinanzen mit einem attraktiven Steuerfuss

- Sicherstellung einer guten Anbindung an den öffentlichen Verkehr.

- Rekrutierung und Aufbau kompetenter und engagierter Behördenmitglieder.

- Förderung der zwischenmenschlichen Beziehungen und eines konstruktiven Dialogs unter den Bürgerinnen und Bürgern von Nürensdorf.

Wir gestalten.

Name: Gewerkschaftsteam im ReTraNetz Berlin-Brandenburg
Description:
ZUKUNFT MACHEN. ARBEIT SICHERN. Als Gewerkschaftsteam im ReTraNetz Berlin-Brandenburg nehmen wir die betrieblichen Themen und Beschäftigten in den Blick und entwickeln mit Betriebsräten und Unternehmen Konzepte für eine gelungene Transformation, bei der es fair zugeht. 

Wir sind ein vom Bundesministerium für Wirtschaft und Klimaschutz (BMWK) aufgrund eines Beschlusses des Deutschen Bundestages gefördertes Projekt. 

Unsere Partner im ReTraNetz-Konsortium: Berlin Partner für Wirtschaft und Technologie (Konsortialführer), bbw Akademie für Betriebliche Weiterbildung GmbH, Fraunhofer-Institut für Produktionsanlagen und Konstruktionstechnik IPK, IG Metall Berlin-Brandenburg-Sachsen und bfw Unternehmen für Bildung  / Institut für Forschung, Training und Projekte (iftp), Technische Universität Berlin - Fachgebiet Werkzeugmaschinen und Fertigungstechnik, Wirtschaftsförderung Brandenburg WFBB (assoziierter Partner).

Mehr Informationen unter https://retranetz-bb.de/
Impressum: https://retranetz-bb.de/impressum
Datenschutz: https://retranetz-bb.de/datenschutz

Name: UBI Works
Description: Our mission is to shift the conversation about basic income to recognize it as an economic need and economic opportunity, with the goal of seeing UBI implemented in Canada.

Name: Shaffer 4 Nevada
Description:
Mark Shaffer for Nevada Senate District 8

YOUR BEST BET FOR NEVADA

My name is Mark Shaffer. As your next State Senator & a Republican for District 8, please allow me to tell you a little about myself. Las Vegas has been my home since 1957, & over the years we have seen Nevada go through many changes. Some changes have been good, while others have torn our State apart. It’s time for Someone to Step up to the Plate & bring back the Values that Nevada was built on, & that is me. As your next Senator for District 8, with my Drive, Success & Passion for Nevada, it’s my Honor to Serve you, as We the People, not We the Party.

In my 65 years in our Beautiful State, my fond memories are of Great Education, Low Crime, much lower Gas & Groceries, & Nevada used to be “Business Friendly”. Today, these are Hot Issues. My goal in Carson City is to get these issues all under control, for all of Nevada.

In my career, as the Publisher & Owner of a popular small business here in town, getting up close & personal with over 3000 local Business Owners & Entrepreneurs, as well as neighbors & friends, has collectively provided me with a wealth of information on their personal desires & dreams, as citizens & running a business in Nevada. Not only from their past, but right up to their current issues & concerns of 2022.

In my current business & occupation, working with Nevada’s Top Doctors, Lawyers, Realtors, & Business Owners, who all have the same challenges you do, on a day-to-day basis, we talk about everything. From the price of gas to the uncertain mask controversy, poor teacher pay, local crime levels, not enough police, support for our local Veterans, growing homelessness, the meth & opioid epidemic, & the economic importance of small business in Nevada. All these Hotbed Topics that are important to me, effect all of us, one way or another.
My Faith is Number One. As a Christian first, & a Republican second, my values cannot be Bought or Led Astray. 

Thank you very much,

Mark

Name: PERSIST.
Description:
Born out of the largest women’s political coalition in U.S. history, PERSIST. has grown from a moment into a movement, connecting power players, national leaders, influencers, organizers, and everyday activists.

We are the women and allies who are ready to fight back, lead change, reclaim our democracy, and take back the airwaves.

We’re not just resisting - we’re persisting. This isn’t politics as usual. It’s a new political era.

Name: BVMW Region Rostock. Der Mittelstand. Bundesverband mittelständische Wirtschaft
Description:
Der Mittelstand in Deutschland ist die tragende Säule und Grundpfeiler unserer freiheitlichen demokratischen Gesellschaft und sichert so unseren Wohlstand.

Der BVMW ist der größte freiwillig organisierte Spitzenverband der deutschen Wirtschaft und vertritt mit seinen 350 Geschäftsstellen über 900.000 Mitglieder im Rahmen seiner Mittelstandsallianz. 

Retten, Sichern und Verteidigen Sie mit dem BVMW den Mittelstand in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern!

Name: People Power for Florida
Description:
Founded in 2021 by State Rep. Anna V. Eskamani, We promote civic engagement and increase voter participation with organizers and volunteer leaders across the state in Florida that are on the ground registering voters and mobilizing Floridians to get involved in local government. We are building a multi-class, multi-racial and multi-generational coalition that shows up in different communities, at campuses, and across the Sunshine State to help people access their right to vote.

People Power for Florida exists to put political power into the People's hands. Our mission is to promote responsible government policies that support all Floridians through on the ground organizing in communities across the state - registering voters and mobilizing supporters.

Name: Tėvynės sąjunga - Lietuvos krikščionys demokratai (TS-LKD)
Description:
Tėvynės sąjunga - Lietuvos krikščionys demokratai – didžiausia centro dešinės politinė jėga Lietuvoje. Tėvynės sąjunga buvo įkurta 1993 metais. 2008 m. partiją sustiprino prie jos prisijungę Lietuvos krikščionys demokratai.  

Lietuvos nepriklausomybę iškovojusio Sąjūdžio pradėtus darbus tęsia jauni, entuziastingi, idėjų kupini specialistai, įvairių sričių ekspertai ir politikai, kuriantys naują Lietuvą, kurioje gyventi gera visiems.  

Saugome patriotiškumo, pilietiškumo ir tvirtos šeimos vertybes. Tikime laisvu žmogumi, atsakingu už savo sprendimus, mylinčiu Tėvynę, gerbiančiu savo praeitį ir įgyvendinančiu ateities vizijas.

Name: Ε.Κ.Ο. ΝΑΥΤΙΛΙΑΣ Ν.Δ./MARITIME ORGANIZATION OF NEA DEMOKRATIA
Description:
Σας καλωσορίζουμε στην επίσημη σελίδα στο LinkedIn της Ε.Κ.Ο. Ναυτιλίας της Νέας Δημοκρατίας.

Η Ε.Κ.Ο. Ναυτιλίας ιδρύθηκε το 2018 από εργαζόμενους, επαγγελματίες και επιχειρηματίες της Ελληνικής Ναυτιλιακής Κοινότητας και υπάγεται στη Γραμματεία Ειδικών Κομματικών Οργανώσεων της Νέας Δημοκρατίας.

Πρωταρχικός σκοπός της Ε.Κ.Ο. Ναυτιλίας είναι η αέναη ενίσχυση των διαχρονικών δεσμών της Νέας Δημοκρατίας με τον ευρύτερο ναυτιλιακό χώρο, μέσω της αναλυτικής καταγραφής προβλημάτων, της εποικοδομητικής διαβούλευσης και της εντός θεσμικού πλαισίου υποβολής τεκμηριωμένων εισηγήσεων και ρεαλιστικών προτάσεων.

Η επιστημονική κατάρτιση, η εργασιακή εμπειρία, η επαγγελματική εξειδίκευση και η ανιδιοτελής προσφορά όλων των Μελών της Ε.Κ.Ο. αποτελούν τα εχέγγυα της ανάδειξης των πολιτικών αξιών της Νέας Δημοκρατίας στους κόλπους της Ελληνικής Ναυτιλιακής Κοινότητας.

«…ὦκα δ᾿ ἐφοπλίσσαντες ἐνήσομεν εὐρέι πόντῳ»,
Ομήρου «Οδύσσεια» (Β’29

Get engaged with Missouri Democrats

Movimiento para reunificación de las dos Españas y protección del legado hispano.

Name: British Friends of Ukraine
Description:
British Friends of Ukraine promote economic, business, cultural and social ties between Ukraine and The United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland.

We can be contacted at britishfriendsofukraine@gmail.com .

We stand together with the people of Ukraine against Russia's imperialist invasion of Ukraine. Our aim is to work towards a Ukraine of peace, prosperity, democracy and freedom, free of Russian aggression and occupation.

Name: Fundação 1º de Maio
Description:
Somos uma instituição ligada ao partido Solidariedade e nosso objetivo é promover os valores de igualdade, respeito à diversidade e representatividade por meio da capacitação e formação política!
Desenvolvemos cursos, debates, palestras e capacitação sobre política, administração pública e outros temas pertinentes para o desenvolvimento do país, tanto para os filiados do partido quanto para a sociedade civil.
Já realizamos mais de 200 eventos, entre encontros e grupos técnicos de trabalho pelo Brasil inteiro, atuando para preparar os cidadãos e despertar uma consciência crítica e capacidade de atuar como agente político e ferramenta de transformação social.

Name: Northern Virginia Republican Business Forum
Description: The Northern Virginia Republican Business Forum is the crossroads of business and politics in Northern Virginia. It is the place to be if you are in business, interested in politics, and have a deep appreciation for the economic principles that have built our free enterprise system. Be a part of the effort to unite business leaders and the Republican Party in support of common-sense fiscal solutions for our country.

Name: The Politica at Boston University
Description: The Politica at Boston University (PBU) is an academic global affairs club with an online podcast and publication. We serve as a platform for students passionate about global affairs to engage in refined dialogue and publish interdisciplinary research on topics relevant to the modern political conversation, with focuses on the studies of law, economics, politics, and activism. We seek to fulfill the vacancy on campus of a space where students can respectfully discuss, collaborate, and publish comprehensive academic analyses centered around current affairs.

Name: Volt Austria
Description:
Volt is a pan-European, progressive movement that stands for a new and inclusive way of doing politics and that wants to bring real change to all European citizens. 
A new pan-European approach is needed to overcome current and future challenges, such as - among many others - climate change, economic inequality, migration, international conflict, terrorism, and the impact of the technological revolution on our jobs. 
National parties are powerless in front of these challenges, because they go beyond national borders and need to be tackled by us as Europeans, as one people. As a transnational party, we believe we can help the European people unite, create a shared vision and understanding, exchange good practices across the continent, and come up with policies together. 
A new way of doing politics, for a new millennium!

Name: Frauen aufs Podium e.V.
Description: Der Verein Frauen aufs Podium unterstützt politisch engagierte Frauen*. Wir entwickeln Programme und Projekte um die gleichberechtigte politische Teilhabe in Deutschland zu stärken. Dazu recherchieren wir interessante Ideen, entwickeln sie weiter und setzen sie praktisch um. Wir beziehen alle Menschen mit ein, um so die Chancengleichheit in allen Bereichen unserer Gesellschaft zu beschleunigen.

Vychází z odkazu evropské kultury a z tradic křesťanskodemokratických a křesťanskosociálních stran a hnutí u nás i ve světě. KDU-ČSL rozvíjí humanitní a demokratické tradice naší společnosti a usiluje o uplatňování konzervativních hodnot v politické oblasti.

Name: Missouri Republican Party
Description:
Preamble

Most of what is important in life we do for ourselves, without the government.  We form our own families and raise our own children.  We choose what we want to do in life.  We pray to our God as we choose; we form and join the religious and civic groups that care for our neighbors in need and shape the direction of our state.  There are only a few things we need the government to do for us; but it should do those things well and faithfully.

Missourians deserve a state and national government with the vision to see the bright future ahead and the effective leadership to guide us there.  We pledge to provide both the vision and the effective leadership Missourians deserve.

Name: WebRoots Democracy
Description: Founded in May 2014, WebRoots Democracy was a London-based think tank focused on progressive and inclusive technology policy. After six and a half amazing years, we brought our work to a close in November 2020.

Name: Bangladesh Students' League
Description:
On 4 January 1948, the East Pakistan Muslim Chhatra League was established by Sheikh Mujibur Rahman at a meeting in Fazlul Huq Muslim Hall at the University of Dhaka. The organisation's name was later changed to the Bangladesh Chhatra League. Naeemuddin Ahmed was the first convener of BCL, while Khalek Newaz Khan was the founder general secretary of the Chhatra League.

During the 1971 Bangladesh Liberation War, members of the Chhatra League were recruited into the Mujib Bahini (also known as the Bengal Liberation Force).

Name: Network 229
Description:
Network 229 est un groupe de réseautage professionnel au Bénin qui organise des événements, notamment une soirée mensuelle d'échanges et de divertissement dénommée Afterwork 229 (tous les derniers vendredis du mois). 

En créant un espace où des professionnels de tous les horizons et de tous les secteurs peuvent se rencontrer, discuter et établir des relations, nous croyons que chaque individu peut évoluer de façon significative. Chaque membre de l'équipe agit à titre personnel et dans un but non lucratif. 

Rejoignez-nous pour vivre une expérience enrichissante au sein d'une communauté de professionnels et d'entrepreneurs béninois.

Name: Marcelo Del Rei da Saúde
Description:
Enfermeiro, pós graduado em oncologia e gestão pública. Há 12 anos presido a ONG Associação Grupo União da Saúde (AGUS).

Com foco na saúde e assistência social, contamos com profissionais voluntários, advogados, psicólogos, assistentes sociais, enfermeiros e nutricionistas.

Nosso carro chefe é a retirada e entrega de medicamentos de alto custo, para mais de 300 famílias aqui em SBC de forma gratuita.

Juntos somos mais forte!

Description: Lake Babine Nation is a political organization company based out of PO BOX 879 225 Sus Avenue, BURNS LAKE, British Columbia, Canada.

Name: Høyres Næringsforum
Description:
Bedriftskanalens mål er å etablere et bredt nettverk ut mot næringslivet og delta aktivt i videreutviklingen av Høyres næringspolitikk.

Bedriftskanalen skal sikre en politikkutvikling som er forankret i virkelige løsninger på virkelige problemer for virkelige næringsaktører og jobbskapere.

Name: Fiom-Cgil Bologna
Description:
La FIOM-CGIL è il sindacato delle lavoratrici e dei lavoratori metalmeccanici. 
Dal 1901 siamo impegnati quotidianamente per la difesa e l'estensione dei diritti, attraverso una intensa attività di contrattazione a livello nazionale e locale e una presenza radicata e costante all'interno delle Aziende. 

A Bologna sono oltre 1500 le Aziende in cui la FIOM-CGIL ha almeno un iscritto e più di 18.000 le lavoratici e i lavoratori che hanno deciso di farsi rappresentare da noi.  
In oltre il 70% delle Aziende con più di 20 dipendenti siamo riusciti ad ottenere un contratto di secondo livello, che integra e migliora quanto stabilito dal CCNL. 

LE NOSTRE SFIDE PER IL FUTURO
Nelle nostra azione quotidiana stiamo affrontando una serie di sfide difficili e complessi, che ci stanno interrogando profondamente sul nostro ruolo e sulle nostre prospettive per il futuro. 
Come possiamo preservare e ed estendere il nostro capitale di diritti e di conquiste, ottenute in decenni di lotte e battaglie, in un contesto industriale post-crisi, in cui stiamo assistendo a enormi cambiamenti nei modi di produrre e nella composizione della forza lavoro?

Affrontiamo insieme le sfide del futuro, per cambiare il presente. 
Iscriviti e partecipa alla FIOM-CGIL BOLOGNA.

Name: Občanská demokratická strana
Description:
Principy
ODS je liberálně-konzervativní stranou navazující na tradice evropské křesťanské civilizace, na humanitní a demokratický odkaz první republiky a na zkušenosti západních demokracií. Ve svém programu proto prosazujeme svobodu jednotlivce, vládu práva a volný trh, který je nejlepším předpokladem všeobecné prosperity. Stejně tak se zasazujeme o standardní fungování liberální demokracie západního typu, odmítáme proto věčné pokusy o hledání třetích cest, kolektivistické ideologie i naivní pokusy o nepolitickou politiku.

Základem naší praktické politiky je důraz na soukromé vlastnictví, nízké daně, podnikavost, solidaritu zodpovědných, snižování byrokracie, malý a bezpečný stát, ochranu soukromí, individuální zodpovědnost, zdravé veřejné finance a nezadluženou budoucnost.

Pro zahraniční orientaci České republiky považujeme za klíčové silné transatlantické vazby, a to jak pro zajištění naší vlastní bezpečnosti, tak i pro rozšiřování prostoru svobody a demokracie ve světě.

Ve vztahu k Evropské unii zastáváme střízlivý a racionální postoj zdůrazňující nutnost zvyšování konkurenceschopnosti a rozvíjení efektivní spolupráce a zároveň hájící národní zájmy České republiky a jejích obyvatel.

Struktura a členové
Od svého vzniku v roce 1991 dokázala ODS vybudovat moderní čtyřstupňovou strukturu tvořenou místními, oblastními a regionálními sdruženími a pokrývající území celé České republiky. ODS tak je a v celých polistopadových dějinách i vždy byla nejsilnější a největší pravicovou stranou na české politické scéně, jejíž reprezentanti aktivně působí na všech úrovních samosprávy.

Name: حزب حماة الوطن
Description: الحساب الرسمي لحزب حماة الوطن

Name: Her Term
Description:
Her Term is a Georgia-based initiative created to recruit women to run for public office at the state level. Our name reflects the ownership and responsibility women take when they are elected to lead and serve. It's Her Term - and it's her turn.

We take a data-driven approach to finding qualified and progressive women who we believe can and will win. They come from different backgrounds and roles in their private lives, and have different areas of interest, but they share a commitment to ensuring our government meets the needs, and reflects the will of its constituents.

Our goal is to see more women take on critical elected roles - and to see every branch of our government transformed by equitable representation.

Name: Studenten voor Leiden
Description: Studenten voor Leiden is in de zomer van 2020 opgericht door een groep studenten en starters met de ambitie onderdeel uit te gaan maken van de Leidse gemeenteraad vanaf 2022. Het idee is direct na het verkameringsdebat in 2019 geboren. Destijds stonden student en stad lijnrecht tegenover elkaar, terwijl de stad en de studenten juist zo erg bij elkaar horen. Het idee: een dynamische en moderne politieke partij dóór studenten, starters en jongeren, vóór de stad. Een jonge partij waar de jonge stad zich in kan vinden. Zo wil SVL  niet alleen de jongste, maar ook de meest dynamische politieke partij van Leiden zijn!

Name: AAPI Victory Fund
Description: The AAPI Victory Fund – the first Super PAC of its kind – is focused on mobilizing Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islanders (AANHPI) eligible voters and moving them to the ballot box. The AAPI community is joined through our values of hard work, family, and our history as immigrants. With the AANHPI eligible voters exceeding that of the margin of victory in numerous districts and states, we have an opportunity under a common agenda to bring AAPI voters into position to make or break outcomes for candidates across the country.

Name: Momentum Mozgalom
Description: A Momentumot az első szabad magyar generáció tagjaiként alapítottuk 2015 tavaszán, hogy tegyünk Magyarország rendszerszintű problémáinak megoldásáért. Egyenként tehetetlennek éreztük magunkat, de mertünk nagyot álmodni. Az vezérelt minket, hogy egy új politikai közösséget hozzunk létre és meggyőzzük az embereket, hogy van még értelme politizálni Magyarországon.

Name: PLR.Les Libéraux-Radicaux Montreux
Description:
Préparer l’avenir, préserver la qualité de vie !

Le PLR présente une équipe renouvelée, compétente et engagée pour Montreux. Ancrés dans les quartiers et les villages, nos candidats s’investissent avec pragmatisme, responsabilité et esprit de dialogue au service de la population montreusienne. 
Notre programme est résolument orienté pour : soutenir un développement économique et culturel dynamique, garantir une gestion rigoureuse des finances, promouvoir un aménagement du territoire durable, soutenir des projets intergénérationnels, renforcer la sécurité publique. Proche et à l’écoute, le PLR s’engage, avec vous, pour le renouveau de Montreux.

Name: Water Natuurlijk Rijn en IJssel
Description:
Water Natuurlijk is de groene waterschapspartij met hart voor blauw. Elke dag weer zetten Water Natuurlijk bestuurders in Rijn en IJssel zich in voor schoon, veilig, gezond en betaalbaar water. 
Onze bestuurder Antoinet Looman maakt als heemraad deel uit van het college van waterschap Rijn en IJssel. Inclusief Looman telt de fractie vijf bestuurders. 
Als grootste groene waterschapspartij zorgt Water Natuurlijk voor gezond en betaalbaar water, meer natuur en voor duurzame waterschappen.

Name: Deutsch-Koreanisches Forum e.V.
Description:
Beim Deutsch-Koreanischen Forum tagen jährlich deutsche und koreanische Fachexperten aus Politik, Wirtschaft, Kultur und Wissenschaft abwechselnd in beiden Ländern.

Das Deutsch-Koreanische Forum erarbeitet Handlungsempfehlungen für Politik, Wirtschaft, Kultur und Wissenschaft, die an die Staatschefs und Regierungen beider Länder übergeben werden.

Name: Højteknologifonden
Description: The Danish National Advanced Technology Foundation general objective is to enhance growth and strengthen employment by supporting strategic and advanced technological priorities within the fields of research and innovation.

Name: Socialistes, Radicaux, Citoyens du Centre-Val de Loire
Description:
Le Groupe Socialistes, Radicaux, Citoyens rassemble 25 élu.e.s de la majorité régionale du Centre-Val de Loire autour de valeurs communes et d’un projet politique ambitieux pour le mandat. Il a pour but d’apporter aux conseillers régionaux un espace de réflexion, de rencontre et d’expression politique.

Une équipe salariée motivée et pluridisciplinaire accompagne ses membres au quotidien.

Les élus membres : Olivier Béatrix, Anne Besnier, Sylviane Boëns, François Bonneau, Michèle Bonthoux, Cécile Caillou-Robert, Carole Canette, Guillaume Crépin, Julie Ferron, Mathilde Fouchet, Philippe Fournié, Jalila Gaboret, Catherine Gay, Jean-Patrick Gille, Temanuata Girard, Karine Gloanec Maurin, Marc Gricourt, Harold Huwart, David Jacquet, Romain Mercier, Mohamed Moulay, Cathy Münsch, Pierre-Alain Roiron, Dominique Roullet et Audrey Rousselet.

Name: Movimento Giovani
Description:
The Movimento Giovani, or Italian Youth Movement, is the largest nonpartisan national youth movement in Italy. 
Our mission is to identify, aggregate, and amplify the voices of thousands of fragmentated youth organizations across the country to fill a clear market vacuum: the absence of a national political movement untied to parties. 
Our vision is to have a coordinate network of youth entities able to consolidate proposals and lobby institutions. Why? Because there is a reason why youth policy is underdeveloped in Italy, there is a lot of noise but not a lot of joining forces. We will change that.

Name: Social Democratic Party of Finland
Description:
SDP in Finland, founded 1899, is a modern, centre left party, which aims to unite the potential of the political system with the hopes and optimism of our progressive ideals.
Our key values include:

    * A fair society – A society without fairness, is a society without meaning. Success, opportunity and freedom must be open to all people, and society should reward hard work and fair-play – not greed, status or chance. The measure of people should be their respect for others, not their wealth and background or characteristics such as race, sexuality or gender.

    * A supportive state – States should not decide how people live their lives, but they can give people the power to choose for themselves. The state should not be an authority above citizens, but a solid base below them - on which they can build their lives with the services and security they need to pursue their dreams.

    * A sustainable future – We cannot ignore the great problems of tomorrow, for the small benefits of today. Environmental damage, reckless economic activity and a weakening of social care all pose threats to the future of our country and our world. An active state and international cooperation must be the tools with which we build a sustainable future.

Name: Democracy Matters
Description:
Democracy Matters, a non-partisan campus-based national student organization, works to get big private money out of politics and people back in. Offering paid internships to undergraduates and affiliate internships to high school students, Democracy Matters mentors the next generation of leaders dedicated to strengthening our democracy. Students organize actions and projects connecting pro-democracy reforms to issues of environment, civil rights, education, health care, foreign policy, and more.

Democracy Matters, was founded in 2001 by NBA basketball player, poet, and activist Adonal Foyle and his parents, Joan and Jay Mandle, both of whom are Colgate University professors and life-long organizers. Our mission is to strengthen democracy by: (1) training young people how to be effective grassroots organizers and advocates, and (2) supporting public financing of election campaigns (“fair elections”) and other pro-democracy reforms.

Student activism is essential to achieving the political reform that our country needs. Our national network of Campus Leaders and Democracy Matters Chapters mobilizes student ideas and enthusiasm to energize the national movement for campaign finance and democratic reform.

Democracy Matters chapters across the country work to remove the corrosive and corrupting influence of big private money in the political process. Our vision is a democracy that includes and is accountable to all voters – not just big campaign contributors. 

The Democracy Matters Institute, Inc. is organized and operated exclusively for charitable and educational purposes under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. The materials posted on this website are educational in purpose. The problems cited therein are with the electoral finance system. The Democracy Matters Institute does not intend to target any specific politician or party.

Name: Danske Osteopater
Description: Danske Osteopater blev officielt stiftet i 2013 og er en interesseorganisation der varetager medlemmernes og professionens interesser, herunder ved at fremme informationen om osteopati, støtte op om etablering af dansk reguleret fuldtidsuddannelse i osteopati og osteopatisk forskning der lever op til akademiske anerkendte standarder.

Name: Zetkin Foundation
Description:
Software and methods for organizers 

 100+ volunteers
 the Zetkin platform is used in 7 countries
 Made for the movement - by the movement

Name: Legalise Cannabis Australia
Description: We advocate for  cannabis law reform across Australia, including medicinal access with home grow options, personal use, and the development of a thriving hemp industry. Our focus is on protecting patient rights, supporting sustainable agriculture, ending prohibition, and promoting policies that benefit both people and the planet.

Name: VVD Amstelveen
Description:
De VVD is opgericht in 1948 en werkt en denkt vanuit het liberalisme. Op basis van het Liberaal Manifest en de Beginselverklaring brengen onze politici het liberalisme in praktijk. 

Vrijheid, verantwoordelijkheid, verdraagzaamheid, sociale rechtvaardigheid en de gelijkwaardigheid van alle mensen. Om deze waarden gaat het bij de VVD. Ze zijn vastgesteld en uitgewerkt in de Beginselverklaring.

De VVD afdeling Amstelveen heeft daarnaast de kwaliteit van wonen, werken en vrije tijdsbesteding in een veilige omgeving hoog in het vaandel staan.

Name: Partido Verde
Description: Os verdes buscam na ecologia política novos caminhos para os problemas do planeta.

Name: Next Gen Tories
Description:
Age is the new dividing line of politics - as voters reach their thirties and forties they are no longer turning to the Conservatives. 

To win these voters back, the party must tackle the root cause of the Generational Divide which is pushing younger generations to other parties - expensive housing, the rising cost of living, and unaffordable childcare. 

Conservative policies can and must deliver for these generations - the principles of a freer markets, nimble regulation and fairer economics are Conservative principles - and the right solution to these crises.

Name: The Davis System, LLC
Description:
The Davis System LLC was founded in 2021 to provide grassroots organizing strategy to candidates, organizations and communities across the country. Educated and seasoned in grassroots organizing and strategy, founder, Anthony Davis Jr., had a vision to equip the next generation of organizers, activists and elected officials with grassroots organizing skills and strategies.

After sharing his vision with his now Fiancée, Errin Davis, whose professional expertise is in business entrepreneurship and political operations, a once vision became a reality. The Davis System is honored to offer to its clients a dedicated team of high-quality, fast paced, passion driven people, who are ready to work to see your vision turn into reality.

We empower organizations and campaigns with the SYSTEM to organize on a grassroots level to enact social change in their communities. We specialize in working with campaigns and organizations to develop their plans to engage communities; train their staff and volunteers; and assist with developing messaging to their community.

Name: Green Institute
Description:
The Green Institute’s mission is to support green politics through education, action, research and debate. Green politics means broad community-wide change grounded in the principles of ecology, social justice, democracy, non-violence, sustainability and respect for diversity (see the Global Greens Charter). We work with a wide range of people and organisations across Australia and globally.

The Green Institute is an Australian non-profit organisation, established formally in October 2008. We are supported by a grant-in-aid from the Commonwealth government, earned income from events and activities, and by donations and volunteer help. Donations to support our work are welcome (and tax deductible for Australian citizens).

Name: Radikal Ungdom
Description:
Radikal Ungdom is the Danish name for the Social-Liberal Youth of Denmark. Social-liberalism combines social consciousness with traditional liberal viewpoints. 

Radikal Ungdom is an independent, political youth organization. It intends to gather young people who share social-liberal beliefs. The organization was founded in 1994, but it belongs to a movement that goes back to 1911. Radikal Ungdom is the official youth organization for Det Radikale Venstre - the Danish Social-Liberal Party.

Name: Cidadania 23
Description: Precisamos de instituições políticas inovadoras, transparentes, atentas e preparadas para os novos desafios que se colocam a todo momento. Venha fazer parte do Cidadania23!

Name: Pro-Choice Minnesota
Description:
The mission of NARAL Pro-Choice Minnesota is to develop and sustain a constituency that uses the political process to guarantee every woman the right to make personal decisions regarding the full range of reproductive choices, including preventing unintended pregnancy, bearing healthy children, and choosing legal abortion.
 
The NARAL Pro-Choice Minnesota Foundation is a 501 C(3) tax-deductible non-profit organization. The Foundation's mission is to support and protect, as a fundamental right and value, a woman's freedom to make personal decisions regarding the full range of reproductive choices through education, training, organizing, legal action and public policy.

Name: Svenska folkpartiet i Finland
Description:
In the Swedish People’s Party the person is a priority. We believe in the individual and that a person is able and willing to be responsible to themselves and to others. We cherish a society that is built on compassion and solidarity. We will always look after those who are vulnerable or are at risk of being excluded.

A responsible, sustainable long-term economic policy is vital in order to be able to guarantee and develop Finland as a welfare state. The most important issue is the creation of new jobs, as work is what funds welfare. Through improved tax and employment policies we can make it possible for companies to invest in Finland, and enable them to develop their business and employ new people.

The Swedish People’s Party says no to racism and hostility towards foreigners. Finland needs immigration and will accept its humanitarian responsibility for refugees. We do not tolerate discrimination based on sex, skin colour, religion, language, sexual orientation or background.

Name: Associated Students of Colorado State University
Description: ASCSU is the voice of CSU students, advocating for them at campus, local and state levels. This means fighting for affordable textbooks, negotiating a clean-energy option in campus residence halls, and overseeing $31 million in student fees. As well, we serve students through programs like RamRide, Student Funding Board, and the Collegiate Readership Program.

Name: Sosialistisk Venstreparti
Description: Sosialistisk Venstreparti jobber for miljø og rettferdighet på Stortinget, og i kommuner og fylkeskommuner i hele Norge.

Name: Debt Justice Norway
Description:
Debt Justice Norway is an umbrella organization with 34 affiliated Norwegian organisations. Working with our domestic and global partners, we gather information on debt related problems as well as the mechanisms that cause them. We work to illuminate these issues, place them on the political agenda and exert pressure on decision makers to address them.

For more information on DJNs work, visit www.slug.no

Name: New Jersey Republican State Committee
Description: New Jersey Republican State Committee

Name: Permanent Delegation of Denmark to UNESCO
VVD Limburg
Description:
VVD Limburg – Liberale politiek voor een sterk en veilig Limburg
Wij zijn de provinciale afdeling van de Volkspartij voor Vrijheid en Democratie (VVD) in Limburg. Vanuit liberale waarden zetten wij ons dagelijks in voor veiligheid, economische groei, goed onderwijs, een duurzame toekomst en een betrouwbare overheid.

Of het nu gaat om provinciale politiek, veiligheidsbeleid, regionale economie, of ondersteuning van ondernemers en innovatie, wij doen wat nodig is – in Maastricht, Venlo, Roermond en daarbuiten.

 Wij bouwen aan een Limburg waar mensen veilig zijn, kansen krijgen en vooruit kunnen.
 Samen met inwoners, bedrijven en gemeenten realiseren wij praktische oplossingen.
 Volg ons voor updates over liberaal beleid in Limburg, actuele thema’s en lokale initiatieven.

Name: 20e30
Description: 20e30 è un'Associazione di Promozione Sociale impegnata nella promozione della partecipazione civica giovanile che, indagando sulle radici dell’astensionismo civico e collaborando con le istituzioni, si pone l’obiettivo di attivare percorsi innovativi di riavvicinamento per trasformare la diffusa disaffezione giovanile in partecipazione attiva.

Name: Partido de la Red
Description:
We are a group of entrepreneurs, politicians, artists, teachers, writers aiming to hack the political system and broaden the access to participate in the democratic game, anywhere around the globe. 

We are building a #NetDemocracy software that can effectively validate online identities with a legal identity and enable its users to vote directly on any kind of issue or delegate the vote to other trusted citizens in any given topic. We want to test and iterate this system until it becomes a stable social thinking tool. 

Our goal is to insert "trojan" legislators in congresses that will have the explicit commitment to always vote and resolute according to the net.

Name: Die Deutsche Automatenwirtschaft e.V.
Description: Wir vertreten als Dachverband Die Deutsche Automatenwirtschaft e. V. die ideellen, politischen, rechtlichen und wirtschaftlichen Interessen der gesamten Branche gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung und Medien.

Name: The 3H Movement
Description: The 3H Movement (3H Hareketi or Hürriyet Hukuk Hoşgörü Hareketi in Turkish) is a liberal youth organization with more than a 2,000 members and volunteers that has been active since December 2006, when it was first founded under the name Liberalofis. Since then, the 3H Movement has been arguing against illiberal ideologies such as socialism, conservatism, fascism, and nationalism in Turkey. The movement has a daily-updated website where the members publish their articles on various economic and political issues with a liberal viewpoint.

Name: Comitês da Bacia do Rio Doce
Description:
Os Comitês da Bacia do Rio Doce são os responsáveis pela gestão dos recursos hídricos no território, que possui 86.715 Km2, abrangendo os Estados de Minas Gerais e Espírito Santo. Nossa missão é articular os diversos atores sociais para garantir a oferta de água, em quantidade e qualidade, visando o desenvolvimento sustentável e a melhoria da qualidade de vida nessa Bacia. 

Nosso foco é sermos referência na interlocução entre os atores sociais na busca de soluções que elevem o Comitê ao status de instância regional indutora do desenvolvimento sustentável e da inclusão social.

Atuamos juntos (poder público, usuários e sociedade civil) na resolução de conflitos, na deliberação sobre os usos da água do Rio Doce, na valorização do nosso território, no trabalho, dia a dia, pela qualidade e quantidade de água da bacia. 

Para tanto, nos comprometemos a transformar diariamente a Bacia do Rio Doce em um território sustentável, cheio de vida, com quantidade e qualidade de água para os diversos usos, prezando pelo equilíbrio entre meio ambiente e desenvolvimento. 

 +R$120 milhões investidos no Rio Vivo

+R$500 milhões já investidos em ações de recuperação da qualidade ambiental do território

+R$1 Milhão para monitoramento das cheias

+R$ 38 milhões investidos nos mananciais de captação

Name: ChristenUnie Bunschoten
Description:
Veel inwoners van Bunschoten zetten zich in om de missie van de ChristenUnie in de praktijk te brengen. Allereerst onze kiezers, die het mogelijk maken dat de ChristenUnie een stabiele rol in Bunschoten kan vervullen. Bijna 250 van deze kiezers zijn lid van onze vereniging en zijn aangesloten bij de lokale afdeling van de ChristenUnie. Vijf bestuursleden geven leiding aan deze vereniging. Vanuit het bestuur is er ook een pr-commissie actief, die zich bezig houdt met publiciteit in Bunschoten en het organiseren van verkiezingscampagnes.
De ChristenUniefractie in de gemeenteraad van Bunschoten bestaat uit 7 leden. In het begin van de periode 2018-2022 heeft de ChristenUnie deel uit gemaakt van de coalitie. Namens de ChristenUnie waren Bert Koops en Alice Kok - van de Geest wethouder in het college. In 2019 is er een nieuw college gekomen waar de ChristenUnie geen deel van uitmaakt. 

Jaarlijks organiseert het bestuur een algemene ledenvergadering (in het voorjaar) en een openbare najaarsvergadering. Ook verschijnt er ongeveer na elke raadsvergadering een (digitale) nieuwsbrief voor de leden en geinteresseerden.

Name: Die Grünen Wien
Description:
Verändern wir gemeinsam die Stadt!

Du willst gemeinsam mit Gleichgesinnten die Welt ein Stück besser machen? Super! Wir Grüne suchen Menschen mit Talenten oder Spezialwissen, Menschen die gerne an Türen klingeln und denen keine Aktion zu spontan ist. Werde Teil unseres engagierten Teams an Freiwilligen!
