Name: Catholics for Catholics
Description:
Founded in 2022, Catholics for Catholics specializes in supporting frontline culture warriors who love God and the USA with the power of the Catholic Faith. 
Called by opposition media, "a new combative faith group", in just 3 years, they have shaken the Catholic political landscape as noted in the New York Times, Newsmax, and Vanity Fair. They partnered with Turning Point Action in the last election to run an aggressive ballot chasing operation which the Federalist noted as the "Catholic Difference Maker". 
For their outstanding work, President Donald J. Trump wrote a public letter thanking Catholics for Catholics. Board of Advisors includes Christopher Yep, Founder of Triune Health Group, Bishop Joseph Strickland, General Michael Flynn, (ret) Former Director of National Security, and others. Catholics for Catholics is on track to be the most effective Catholic group influencing the political and cultural arena in the years ahead. We aim to work with Our Lady, the Mother of God in her mission to bring all souls to know and love her son Jesus Christ!

Name: All-Party Parliamentary Group for Events
Description:
Founded in 2011, the All-Party Parliamentary Group for Events (APPG) is a cross-party group made up of members from both Houses of Parliament, and acts as the event industry’s voice in Westminster.

The APPG for Events provides a forum for the highly diverse and valuable UK events sector in Parliament, engaging with representatives from across the political spectrum.

The APPG plays a key role in keeping the events industry high on the Parliamentary agenda. Its formal purpose is to:

- Represent the UK events industry in Parliament
- Highlight the value of the industry to the UK economy and society
- Engage with politicians and industry representatives
- Ensure that the UK remains a competitive and leading destination for major international events

The All Party Parliamentary Group is managed by The Business of Events, an independent Think Tank and Advocacy Network for the UK events sector.

Name: OCAD Student Union
Description:
The OCAD Student Union is an independent, democratically-run student organization with approximately 5000 members, incorporated as a not‐for‐profit corporation. The OCAD Student Union operates a variety of programs and services on campus at OCAD University including: legal services, a student advocate, Student Pantry (our campus food bank), Union Coffee (our coffee shop and snack bar), Hot Lunch (our community pay-what-you-can drop‐in lunch), student grants, social events, and workshops.

The OCAD Student Union is also a representative body, advocating for the best interests of the OCAD U Student body at large with OCAD U administration, governance bodies, and with all levels of government. The OCAD Student Union represents the OCAD University student population within the Canadian Federation of Students. Within the Toronto art and design community, the OCAD Student Union is represented by its subsidiary, Xpace Cultural Centre. Xpace Cultural Centre is a membership driven artist‐run centre supported by the OCAD Student Union and dedicated to providing emerging and student artists with the opportunity to showcase their work in a professional setting.

The OCAD Student Union is committed to ensuring that the University campus and broader OCAD U community are inclusive spaces where all members are treated with respect and dignity. OCADSU encourages applications from everyone, including but not limited to women, Aboriginal peoples, visible minorities, people with disabilities, and persons of all sexual orientations or gender identity.

Name: Ruth's List Florida
Description: Ruth’s List is the only organization dedicated to electing Democratic, pro-choice women to state and local office in Florida. We recruit, train and help women run inspiring campaigns that WIN. Since 2008, we have raised more than $7,500,000, elected nearly 250 women to state and local office, and trained over 2,500 candidates and staff.

Name: The Asexual Visibility and Education Network
Description:
The Asexual Visibility and Education Network hosts the world's largest online asexual community as well as a large archive of resources on asexuality. AVEN strives to create open, honest discussion about asexuality among sexual and asexual people alike.

Unlike celibacy, which is a choice, asexuality is a sexual orientation. Asexual people have the same emotional needs as everybody else and are just as capable of forming intimate relationships. To find out more about asexuality, click here.

Name: Tulchin Research
Description:
Tulchin Research is a leading polling and strategic consulting firm.  The company conducts public opinion research for a wide range of clients.  We specialize in providing research and consulting services to candidates for elected office, ballot measure campaigns, labor unions, non-profits, corporations, and foundations.

Through the use of traditional public opinion research, such as focus groups and telephone surveys, as well as new and emerging research technologies, including on-line focus groups and testing advertisements over the Internet, Tulchin Research delivers insights that give our clients a winning edge.

Name: Shivsena
Description: Years back, the voices that had come together to form a united Maharashtra, had scattered as soon as Maharashtra state was established. During this time, 105 locals were martyred in the struggle to get Mumbai to be a part of Maharashtra. But eventually, people from other states kept on migrating, creating discord and disrespecting the community and culture of the locals, therefore creating an environment of lawlessness in the state. This evoked Prabhodhankar Thackeray’s son, Bal Thackeray to start ‘Marmik’, a political weekly with cartoons and sketches which spoke in detail of the grave injustice towards the people. But the thought didn’t end just there. He wanted to take the anger against this inequality, especially the outrage coming from the youth, to do something against the abuse towards the local people of the state. After seeing the tremendous support towards his thoughts in the weekly, he decided to establish Shivsena on 19th June 1966, to bring the people together, to fight against the oppression of the Marathi people.

Name: NARAL Pro-Choice Maryland
Description:
As the political leader of the pro-choice movement, NARAL Pro-Choice Maryland works to expand the full range of reproductive rights and protect safe, legal abortion for women regardless of age, race or income.  NARAL Pro-Choice Maryland is a state affiliate of NARAL Pro-Choice America.

NARAL Pro-Choice Maryland uses the political process to guarantee every woman the right to make personal decisions regarding the full range of reproductive choices, including preventing unintended pregnancy, bearing healthy children, and choosing legal abortion. 

NARAL Pro-Choice Maryland works to educate Americans and officeholders about the broad range of issues encompassing a woman’s right to choose and elect pro-choice candidates at all levels of government.

Name: APPG for Industrial Hemp & CBD Products
Description:
The All-Party Parliamentary Group for Industrial Hemp and CBD Products 
The APPG for Industrial Hemp and CBD Products is a cross party group focused on encouraging the development of UK regulation on industrial hemp and CBD products that reflects evidence-based policy, clear regulation, and the most certain basis for investors and entrepreneurs to safely serve the public and wider national interests engaged in environment, wellness and economy. 

APPG Co-chairs and Secretariat
The group was launched in November 2019, and is co chaired by Crispin Blunt MP and Ronnie Cowan MP, with secretariat services provided by Tenacious Labs. The group meets in Westminster every two months, and is devoted to assisting MPs and peers to have a better understanding of the rapidly growing Industrial Hemp and CBD sectors. 

Tenacious Labs was selected by the Officers of the APPG to act as its secretariat. Tenacious Labs is an independent company that owns retail brands in the CBD sector, and provides information and analysis on the sector. 

Tenacious Labs have no direct or indirect financial arrangements with any political figures in any territory or country.

NB This is not an official website or feed of the House of Commons or the House of Lords. It has not been approved by either House or its committees. All-Party Parliamentary Groups are informal groups of Members of both Houses with a common interest in particular issues. The views expressed in these webpages or feeds are those of the group.

Name: VVD Buren
Description: De VVD Buren staat voor transparantie, een overheid die klaarstaat voor haar inwoners, zelfredzaamheid, inwonersparticipatie en betrouwbaarheid. We vinden het belangrijk om het eerlijke verhaal te vertellen.

Name: Merge Zambia
Description: Merge Zambia Party is dedicated to bridging gaps in national development, promoting youth leadership, gender equality, and integrating agriculture with technology. Follow us for updates on our initiatives and join us in creating a prosperous and unified Zambia.

Name: Animal Rights Switzerland
Description:
Wir engagieren uns für eine Schweiz, in der Menschen und Tiere friedlich zusammenleben. Das heisst ohne Gewalt und Ausbeutung. Alle Gesellschaftsbereiche – allen voran die Produktion von Lebensmitteln und die Forschung – sollen ohne Gewalt an Tieren auskommen. In Zukunft sollen alle Tiere den rechtlichen Schutz erhalten, den jedes fühlende Wesen braucht: Grundrechte, besonders die Rechte auf Leben und Unversehrtheit. 

Dafür bauen wir eine durchsetzungsfähige Bewegung für Tiere auf, leisten Aufklärungs- und Meinungsarbeit und sind politisch aktiv.

Name: Ja zur Schweizer e-ID
Description: Ja zur e-ID am 28. September 2025. ja zu einer Schweizer Lösung: Freiwillig, Praktisch. Gut.

Name: VVD Gorinchem
Description:
VVD-Gorinchem: Lokaal Liberaal!

Wij als lokale liberalen willen dat Gorinchem een stad is waar  inwoners met plezier wonen, waar mensen zich vrij voelen en waar ze hun eigen leven vorm kunnen geven. VVD-Gorinchem wil dat bedrijven alle kansen krijgen en dat er werkgelegenheid is voor de inwoners van de stad en uit de nabije omgeving. We zetten in op een gemeente, die de samenwerking zoekt met alle spelers en inspeelt op de initiatieven uit de stad.

Name: Pinkpolitiek
Description:
PINK! is de politieke jongerenorganisatie van de Partij voor de Dieren. Ons doel is om jongeren tussen de 14 en 28 jaar de mogelijkheid te geven om meer betrokken te raken bij politiek en werk te maken van hun idealen. Door workshops, excursies, lezingen en andere activiteiten te organiseren en de samenwerking te zoeken met allerlei organisaties, helpen wij jongeren zichzelf ontwikkelen te ontwikkelen tot kritische en betrokken burgers die het verschil kunnen maken.

PINK! staat voor een andere samenleving, waarin de mens meer is dan een consument, de natuur meer is dan een buffet en het dier meer is dan een product. Een samenleving die uitgaat van mededogen, duurzaamheid, persoonlijke vrijheid en persoonlijke verantwoordelijkheid in plaats van de economische korte termijnbelangen van de (westerse) mens. Help mee het groene bewustzijn te vergroten!

Name: Junge SVP Schweiz
Description:
Die Junge SVP setzt sich...
… unmissverständlich und mutig für eine konsequent bürgerliche Politik ein und bekämpft Missbräuche im Asyl-, Drogen- und Fürsorgebereich. Ebenso energisch kämpfen wir gegen den Beitritt in die Europäische Union (EU). Wir stehen für eine unabhängige und neutrale Schweiz ein, die über eine einsatzbereite Armee verfügt, welche Land und Bevölkerung im Ernstfall wirkungsvoll verteidigen kann. Wir stehen für ein hartes Vorgehen gegen Kriminelle und fordern eine eigenständig steuerbare Einwanderungspolitik. Wir fordern zudem einen rigorosen Staatsabbau, damit Steuersenkungen und Deregulierungen für Unternehmen und Private nachhaltig realisierbar werden. Dank dieser klaren Linie ist die Junge SVP mit über 6’500 Mitgliedern nicht nur die grösste Jungpartei der Schweiz, sondern auch die einzig richtig bürgerliche Jungpartei unseres Landes.

Name: Saikat for Congress
Description:
Saikat is a community organizer, political strategist, and former tech professional running for Congress to bring bold, future-focused leadership to the Democratic Party. 

After starting his career in San Francisco’s tech sector, Saikat joined Bernie Sanders’ 2016 presidential campaign and went on to help recruit and elect a new generation of leaders—including Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, where he served as her first Chief of Staff in Congress.

During his time in Washington, Saikat played a key role in launching the Green New Deal, a visionary plan that helped lay the foundation for the largest climate investment in American history. He has consistently championed policies that prioritize working families, environmental justice, and a more inclusive, accountable democracy.

Saikat is now leading a campaign to reimagine what Democratic leadership can look like—one rooted in integrity, urgency, and the courage to take on corporate power and status quo politics. He’s building a grassroots movement to deliver real progress on climate, housing, healthcare, and democratic reform.

Name: Ron DeSantis for President
Description:
Official LinkedIn of Ron DeSantis for President 
Text FREEDOM to 512345 for exclusive campaign updates. #OurGreatAmericanComeback

Name: Andy Kim for Congress
Description: Fighting hard for you, your family, and the American people.

Name: John Mannion for Congress
Description: Dad. Husband. Teacher. Home in Syracuse. Running for Congress to deliver for CNY & the Mohawk Valley.

Name: Skattebetalarna
Description:
Skattebetalarna arbetar för lägre skatter och mindre slöseri med skattepengar. Det gör vi genom opinionsbildning och policyutveckling. Vi producerar rapporter, driver kampanjer och påverkar beslutsfattare. Dessutom avslöjar vi slöseri med skattepengar genom vår Slöseriombudsman (SlösO). 

Våra skattejurister ger kostnadsfri juridisk rådgivning till den som blir medlem. De företräder också privatpersoner och företag som har tecknat vårt Skatterättsskydd, om de hamnar i tvist med Skatteverket.

Name: Warwick Politics Society
Description:
Based at the University of Warwick, the Politics Society is a student-run organisation fostering political discussion and debate. The Society hosts engaging talks from prominent journalists, politicians, academics, opinion leaders and speakers with extra-political backgrounds. Bringing together student-led debates and general election hustings alongside socials and informative panels; political discussion is informed by views across the political spectrum.

Warwick Politics Society is also home to Perspectives Magazine and Perspectives Radio Show on RAW. Our active membership is made up of hundreds of talented undergraduate and postgraduate students – regular contributors to the Perspectives media outlets.

Name: PvdA Limburg
Description: Samen maken we Limburg mooier. Dat doen we met onze drie fractieleden, met ons gewestbestuur, én met onze bijna 2000 Limburgse leden.

Name: Die Mitte Kanton Luzern
Description: Wir halten den Kanton Luzern zusammen!

Name: National Resistance Movement-NRM
JUNOS - Junge liberale NEOS
Description: Freiheit, Generationengerechtigkeit & Aufstiegschancen

Name: Bishop's University Students' Representative Council
Description: The Bishop’s University Students Representative Council is a non-profit student-run organization whose mandate is to represent students, not only at the university, but also at the provincial and national level. We strive to make the Bishop's University experience the best it can be from the first day of Orientation Week to the last day of Convocation weekend.

Name: Urbanet
Description:
Since 2016, URBANET fosters international dialogue on development activities worldwide and shares expertise in the areas of municipal and local governance, sustainable urban development and decentralisation. Designed as a digital blog, URBANET addresses international experts and works with multiple renowned authors from around the globe 

- to promote the exchange of knowledge and experiences, especially with regard to the implementation of global agreements such as the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development, the New Urban Agenda and the Paris Agreement; 
- spur debates on key challenges and opportunities regarding sustainable urban development, municipal and local governance and decentralisation; and
- build opinions on urbanisation and sustainable urban development.

Our authors represent a wide range of stakeholders such as practitioners, academia, representatives of civil society organisations, international organisations, think tanks, development institutes, private sector and many more. URBANET’s articles revolve around the following issues:

    Governance & Finance
    Basic Infrastructure & Housing
    Green & Smart Development
    Global Urban Debates

URBANET is supported and implemented by GIZ’s Advisory Project Cities on behalf of the German Federal Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development (BMZ).

Name: ChristenUnie-SGP Dordrecht
Description: De ChristenUnie-SGP zoekt het goede voor de stad. Onze gids daarbij is de Bijbel, het Woord van God. De zorg voor onze naaste, verantwoorde omgang met geld en de schepping zijn voorbeelden van Bijbelse waarden. Deze waarden zijn niet alleen goed voor iedereen persoonlijk, maar voor de hele samenleving.

Name: Australian Services Union (Vic/Tas Branch)
Description:
The Australian Services Union has members in diverse industries: united for a stronger voice for workers.

ASU members work across local government, social and community services, water and statutory authorities like Parks Victoria and VicRoads, energy, transport, shipping, travel, info tech and, in Tasmania, airlines and clerical/administration.

We are a union for members that deliver services Australia depends on every day.

The ASU protects, promotes and improves the working conditions and entitlements of our members.

We help you and your co-workers deal with issues as they arise at your workplace – either individually or as a group – and campaign to improve the conditions for workers.  We provide workplace information, services and individual support to members.

We are not-for-profit, member-owned and run.  We exist only for the benefit of our members.

The ASU has local representation and delegates across Tasmania and Victoria, backed up by full-time officials of the Union.

Name: Elect Black Women PAC
Description: In the midst of this uncertainty, black women must continue to run for office.  There are simply not enough PAC’s that are focused specifically on investing early in black women candidates running for public office.  We need strong candidates at every level — think school board, county commission, state executive committee women, judges, tax assessor, attorney general, sheriff, alderman, and general clerks to name a few. When we say early, we mean once a woman’s name is printed on the ballot. We know how much a small investment that early becomes the difference-maker when trying to demonstrate viability.  We are focusing on supporting black women running for office in 2021 and 2022.

Name: Texas Royalty Council
Description: The Texas Royalty Council (TRC) is a grassroots entity dedicated to representing and advancing the interests of Texas royalty owners and energy professionals. The TRC was organized to monitor, advocate and educate royalty owners, elected officials, and the energy industry on issues affecting royalty owners in Texas. Our primary focus is to promote the exploration and production of Texas oil, gas, and minerals while maximizing the return on the value of the Lone Star State's natural resources.

Name: Veterans Education Project
Description: As Veterans serving Veterans, we amplify the voices of all Servicemembers. We are committed to nonpartisan research, engagement, and policy implementation in our efforts to support all institutions that meet the needs of Student Veterans. Our mission is to highlight innovation across the spectrum of higher education. We’re a part of EANGUS, a national association supporting the National Guard.

Name: Lebanese National Bloc - حزب الكتلة الوطنيّة اللبنانيّة
Description:
Our goal is a prosperous, green and fair Lebanon, and to achieve it we must together eliminate the five wounds (Political Sectarianism, Corruption, Feudalism, Clientelism and Dependency) and express the virtues that correspond to them:
- Citizenship: is based on considering the nationality as the first identity; it is an identity that has been carved over history and that stems from experience. Its principle is that “The stronger the country grows, so does the citizen and the principle of citizenship, and vice versa". It is the sole guarantor of equality and justice.
- Integrity: is based on a moral conviction to respect the public interests and abide by the rules and regulations. Hence, the public funds become protected and used properly, the practices of corrupt employees and political intervention in their work are ended, and the judiciary prosecutes those who have embezzled public funds. In addition, the sources of illegal external financing are uncovered.
- Democracy: liberates citizens from all inherited restrictions, promotes equality among citizens, achieves efficiency in public sector jobs, and eliminates illegal immunities and class discrimination.
- Rule of law: leads each person to fulfill his duties and access his rights without the need to obey anyone. It draws boundaries for the rulers’ authority while monitoring them, isolating and bringing them to trial if they abuse it. The rule of law gives the employee due consideration on moral and financial levels and is considered as a prerequisite for productive investments.
- Sovereignty: is the independence of political and security decisions from any interference outside constitutional institutions. The sovereign state reassures citizens and preserves the nation’s sovereignty. It also restores the connection between the Lebanese people based on citizenship.

Name: Kernachtig Wijchen
Description:
Kernachtig Wijchen is een onafhankelijke lokale partij met haar wortels diep in de samenleving van Wijchen en de acht kernen. Kernachtig Wijchen neemt verantwoordelijkheid, heeft ideeën en gaat voor oplossingen. Bij elk belangrijk onderwerp organiseren we een denktank waarbij we de inwoners van Wijchen gebruiken als adviseur. De partij en de denktankleden zijn een afspiegeling van de samenleving, met verschillende sociale achtergronden. Kernachtig Wijchen heeft Wijchen in de afgelopen periode een eigen gezicht gegeven in de regio en we hebben voor ieder probleem Wijchense oplossingen gezocht. Het is altijd Wijchen wat ons bindt.
In de gemeenteraad van Wijchen heeft Kernachtig Wijchen 12 zetels. Daarnaast zijn er 2 commissieleden.
In het college voor Burgemeester en Wethouders is Kernachtig Wijchen vertegenwoordigd met 2 wethouders.

Name: Conservatives in Energy
Description:
At Conservatives in Energy (CIE), our mission is to secure a stable and sustainable energy future for the United Kingdom, while addressing the critical issue of affordability. We focus on building a deeper understanding for all of the energy industry and its markets, fostering a transparent dialogue between energy providers, policymakers, businesses, and the public.
We believe that the energy transition is a long-term process, requiring a balanced approach that includes renewables, fossil fuels, nuclear, and advanced energy technologies. Our goal is to ensure that energy prices remain stable and predictable, protecting consumers—whether individuals, families, or businesses—from harmful volatility and excessive pricing.
CIE is committed to resetting the conversation on energy policy. We advocate for pragmatic, fact-based solutions that reflect the realities of supply and demand, while promoting economic growth and competitiveness. By engaging with industry leaders and policymakers, we aim to create a framework that supports investment, innovation, and trust in the UK’s energy future.
Our vision is clear: energy policies that are economically viable, environmentally sustainable, and beneficial to all.

Name: Charles Garrison, Democrat, for Jacksonville City Council, At-Large Group 5
Description:
Charles Garrison is a veteran and lifelong First Coast resident. Born in Middleburg, he was raised by working class parents; his dad a salesman and his mom a flower shop owner.

Over the last ten years, Charles has advocated for communities across Jacksonville. He began his work as a Big Brother through Duval’s Big Brother/Big Sister program. In 2015, he joined the board directors of JASMYN, Jacksonville’s LGBTQ youth services organization, where he soon became Chair of their property board of directors. Working in the private sector, Charles oversaw and helped families find affordable housing and access to mortgages helping eliminate barriers to homeownership, including working with his employer to change their policy as it related to applicants with prior felony convictions. 

Charles is running for Jacksonville City Council because he knows he can be the leader the City needs to build us forward. When Charles is not advocating for his communities, he can be found spending time with his family and friends, enjoying all Jacksonville has to offer. He currently resides in Springfield with his partner, Matt, and two rescue pups, Scrappy and Bailey.

Name: Handwerksjunioren Deutschland
Description: Wir sind das junge Handwerk. Wir tragen die Themen, Sorgen und Forderungen der nächsten Generation im Handwerk selbstbewusst in die Öffentlichkeit. Bei uns sind junge Handwerkerinnen und Handwerker aller Gewerke willkommen, die Zukunft des Handwerks aktiv mitzugestalten. Wir sind die Stimme der #craftgeneration!

Name: Danske Forlag
Description:
Danske Forlag er de danske forlags brancheforening. Vi repræsenterer både de små og de store forlag og dem midt imellem.

Vores medlemmer udgiver indenfor alle genrer; skøn- og faglitteratur, børnelitteratur og læremidler og indenfor både trykte og digitale formater.

Vi arbejder for et bogmarked med et mangfoldigt udbud af litteratur og læremidler af høj kvalitet. Det sker ved at dele viden og indsigter og være i dialog med interessenter og beslutningstagere både nationalt samt via vores europæiske forening Federation of European Publishers (FEP) og den internationale forlæggerforening (IPA).

Name: SGK NRW
Description:
Die Sozialdemokratische Gemeinschaft für Kommunalpolitik in Nordrhein-Westfalen ist der Zusammenschluss der Kommunalpolitikerinnen und Kommunalpolitiker in der SPD. Die SGK hat das Ziel, sozialdemokratische Grundsätze in der Kommunalpolitik zu verwirklichen.

Die SGK NRW wurde im Jahr 1972 in Düsseldorf gegründet und hat zur Zeit rund 10.000 Mitglieder. Dazu zählen Mitglieder aus 580 Fraktionen der Räte, Kreistage, Bezirksvertretungen, der Landschaftsversammlungen sowie der  Regionalräte. Neben den sozialdemokratischen (Ober-)Bürgermeisterinnen und (Ober-)Bürgermeistern sowie Landräten gehören zahlreiche weitere Personen, die in der öffentlichen Verwaltung ein Amt oder in der SPD eine Funktion mit kommunalpolitischem Bezug haben, der SGK NRW an.

Name: Orizzonte Italia
Description:
Orizzonte Italia vuole mettere in rete le energie e le competenze dei giovani e farli contribuire alla vita civile, economica, politica e sociale del nostro Paese.
Abbiamo bisogno di te e del tuo contributo! 
Iscriviti compilando il questionario sul nostro sito orizzonteitalia.eu.

Name: SGP-ChristenUnie Hendrik-Ido-Ambacht
Description: Koersvast omdat we van Ambacht houden!

Name: Fundación Bunny Lovers Chile
Description:
Bunny Lovers Chile es una organización sin fines de lucro que busca educar y promover la tenencia responsable de conejos domésticos en el país.

Nuestro objetivo es llegar a quienes ya tienen uno de estos animalitos formando parte de su vida, pero también acercarnos a quienes están evaluando la posibilidad de sumar a uno de ellos a su familia y hogar.

Buscamos formar una gran comunidad, siendo un apoyo concreto y constante para quienes deseen aprender más sobre ellos, bajo el respaldo y asesoría de veterinarios especializados en animales exóticos, como son los conejos.

Estos pequeños animales tienen derechos individuales que merecen ser respetados, además de ser reconocidos como excelentes compañeros de vida, tal como ocurre con animales más tradicionales.

Name: Capitalista
Description: Capitalista es un partido político transnacional con sede en Santa Bárbara (CA) y Ciudad de México.

Name: National Party of Australia
Description:
What The Nationals Stand For

We believe the future of regional Australia is critical to the future of our nation.

Our priorities are building stronger regional economies and secure communities, delivering opportunity and prosperity for all regional Australians, and ensuring a sustainable environment.

Stronger, more secure, sustainable local communities that provide the opportunity for everyone to prosper will deliver a stronger, more secure and sustainable nation.

The Nationals commitment to the national interest does not stop there. The Nationals provide a considered and commonsense perspective on all elements of Government policy and a balance between Australia’s political extremes.

Name: DVTM - Deutscher Verband für Telekommunikation und Medien e.V.
Description:
Gemeinsam Stark. Individuell Erfolgreich.

Als einer der drei größten Verbände unserer Branche vertreten wir Ihre Interessen nicht nur in der Politik, sondern auch gegenüber anderen Gestaltern unseres gesamtgesellschaftlichen Lebens, wie Behörden und Unternehmen. Dank unseres hervorragenden Netzwerks sind wir mit allen relevanten Stakeholdern verbunden.
Der DVTM spricht einheitlich mit einer Stimme gegenüber der Politik und Meinungsbildnern, und positioniert sich klar.

Wir arbeiten mit unserem bedeutenden Netzwerk von Vertretern aus Politik, Ministerien, Regulierungsbehörden sowie Wirtschaft, Medien und Verbänden auf nationaler und internationaler Ebene zusammen.

Name: Die Mitte Thurgau
Description: Wir sind die politische Kraft der Mitte. Wir machen bürgerliche Politik mit sozialer Verantwortung.

Name: Pedagogy and Theatre of the Oppressed, Inc.
Description:
Pedagogy & Theatre of the Oppressed, Inc. (PTO) supports people whose work challenges oppressive systems by promoting critical thinking and social justice through liberatory theatre and popular education. Our vision is to create global access to popular education pedagogy and liberatory theatre of the oppressed methods to support a world based on radical love and social justice in stead of oppression and violence.

Our approaches stem from the theories and practices of Paulo Freire and Augusto Boal. We foster collaborative connections to share, develop, promote, and document liberatory theatre, popular education, and other revolutionary actions. PTO serves as a resource for oppressed peoples and their allies in diverse communities, contexts, and traditions around the world.

PTO promises activists and social change agents, our members, and actors and non-actors alike that you can count on us to provide global and expanding connections to PTO practitioners, access to updated PTO tools, resources, and research, and support for your liberatory education and theatre efforts.

Join our listserv: http://eepurl.com/glBmK9
Visit us on facebook @PTOinc
Visit us on twitter @PTOtweets

Name: Der Mittelstand.BVMW e.V. - Kreisverband Rhein-Kreis Neuss  - Stephan Moritz
Description: Mittelstandsverband - Unternehmensnetzwerk, dass die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit des deutschen Mittelstandes stärkt. DIE Stimme des Mittelstands.

Name: Telugu Professionals Wing
Description:
Vision:
Telugu Professionals Wing envisions a platform for skilled professionals to implement radical innovations towards growth of the economy, public welfare, and party organization. We support new ways of thinking, mobilizing, and reaching out to the people. Through this wing, Telugu Desam offers a state-wide canvas for any dedicated professional with worthy ideas to put them in action.

Mission:
To assist, inform and inspire next gen leaders around the globe through the power of sharing knowledge and expertise, reflecting the leadership skills, creative minds and innovative technologies that make ours the team of Visionaries for the visionary leaders .

Values:
Our core values encompass social responsibility, integrity, inclusivity & team work. We believe in transforming the lives of Telugus in India and the world through the pursuit of liberal ideas and policies, expanding welfare for the worthy, and creating an environment for every individual to grow as per her/his talents.

Name: DNC Environment and Climate Crisis Council
Description: Bold, ambitious action to address the climate crisis, environmental injustice, and other environmental issues. Working to center urgent climate action and policies in the Democratic Party through advocacy, promoting participation, and organizing with Democratic Party organizations throughout the country.

Name: apropolis e.V.
Description:
Freiheit und Demokratie brauchen starke Persönlichkeiten – und genau hier setzen wir an! 

Mit spielerischen und interaktiven Workshops fördern wir die nächste Generation und vermitteln "Future Skills für Demokratie". Unser Ziel ist es, Jugendliche zu sensibilisieren, motivieren und befähigen, unsere demokratischen Werte zu schützen und aktiv an der Gesellschaft mitzuwirken. 
Wir zeigen jungen Menschen, wie sie sich für das Gemeinwohl und in der Politik engagieren können – sei es in Schulen, in ihrer Freizeit oder in ihrem Alltag. Zusätzlich bieten wir Sommercamps und weitere Bildungsangebote an, die über den Schulkontext hinausgehen.
Unsere Mission endet nicht bei den Jugendlichen: Wir schulen auch Lehrkräfte, um diese wichtigen Konzepte nachhaltig im Bildungsbereich zu verankern. Gemeinsam gestalten wir die Zukunft!

Name: European Centre for Workers' Questions (EZA)
Description:
We have a social conscience, we advocate education, we are Europeans – we are the European Centre for Workers’ Questions. In more than 30 European countries, we are committed to the education of workers together with our 71 member centres. We unite workers’ organisations, unions and educational institutions. We are guided by Christian-social values, and approximately 70 international seminars a year are our platform.
If you are interested in exciting content and are curious, then feel free to sign up for our offers.  https://www.eza.org/de/eza-magazine

Name: Ampersand Strategies
Description:
Ampersand Strategies is a nationally recognized Democratic messaging firm that produces award-winning Direct Mail, TV, and Digital advertising for political clients.
We aim to be the most creative firm winning elections for Democratic candidates all over the country. 

With our background in speechwriting and strategic communications, as well as in campaign management, we bring a unique, client-centered approach to our work. Our candidates and clients tell us we're able to capture their voices in a way that feels empowering when they're in front of an audience.

In addition to our campaign services, we remain one of the premiere speechwriting firms working in the education, advocacy and non-profit arenas. We have written for some of the top names in entertainment, business, and the law...but you'll have to talk to us if you want to know for whom.

Name: Grüne Wirtschaft Wien
Description:

Name: Emerge Vermont
Description:
Emerge Vermont is changing the face of Vermont politics by identifying, training and encouraging Democratic women to run for office, get elected, and to seek higher office. Our intensive, cohort based, 70+ hour training program is unique. As the number of elected Democratic women remains flat or even declines, the need for our work is growing.

In the 230 years since its statehood, Vermont has never elected a women to the U.S. House of Representatives, or to the U.S. Senate, and only 1 woman has served as Governor of Vermont. Of 180 State Legislators, only 42% are women.

A pool of highly qualified Democratic candidates is being left untapped. Too often, women do not see themselves running for office—they assume they aren’t experienced enough or they don’t know where to begin.

Emerge Vermont is changing that! Emerge Vermont is part of a national network currently working in 27 states. We are dedicated to changing the face of representation at every level of government.

Name: Viante New Mexico
Description:
Viante New Mexico holds elected officials accountable for making New Mexico a better place to live, work, and play. Through our grassroots, nonpartisan, educational platform, we will unite New Mexicans and provide information to our members about how legislators are performing on three key issues:  Education, Crime, and Quality of Life.

Purpose: Uniting the people of New Mexico to take pride in their state and move New Mexico forward.

Mission: Viante New Mexico will hold public officials accountable by working on behalf of its citizens, providing empowerment and promoting awareness through an educational platform.

Vision: New Mexico will be ranked in the top 5% of all 50 states in education, low crime, and high quality of life by 2048.

Values: Trust. Pride. Transparency. Transformative. Influential. Accountable.

How: All members of Viante New Mexico will clearly know which officials enhance and which officials erode common ground. Viante New Mexico will transparently monitor legislation that has an effect on education, crime, and quality of life that will directly impact New Mexico’s rankings on national lists and metrics. The member exclusive, web based, educational platform will analyze and simplify legislator voting records on these three focus areas in order to help people make an informed voting decision. 

Who Can Join: Only Individuals can join

Management Structure: Viante New Mexico is governed by a nonpartisan volunteer board of 10 directors ensures that Viante New Mexico is respectful, ethical, balanced, and consistent. The board is made up of a variety of political affiliations with 5 New Mexicans who are under the age of 40 and 5 New Mexicans who are over the age of 40 to promote a diversity of thoughts and interests. The board will give the shared direction and make decisions to be acted upon by the Executive Director. If an issue is not voted unanimously by the board, it will not be pursued as a common ground principle.

Name: Commission-Jeunesse du PLQ
Description:
Bien que née officiellement en 1970, la Commission-Jeunesse du Parti libéral du Québec trouve ses racines au sein de mouvements beaucoup plus anciens gravitant autour du Parti libéral du Québec.

Au fil des années, les Jeunes libéraux ont pris une place de plus en plus prépondérante au sein du Parti libéral du Québec. Les prises de position audacieuses ont amené la Commission-Jeunesse à jouer un rôle-clé dans d’importants débats publics sur la constitution et le fédéralisme, sur l’éducation et la jeunesse, sur l’économie et les finances publiques, sur l’environnement, et plusieurs autres enjeux sociaux.

Plus récemment, les Jeunes libéraux ont travaillé sur l’économie du partage et sur la mise en place d’une commission d’enquête publique sur le racisme systémique. 

Depuis maintenant plus de 45 ans, plusieurs générations de jeunes libéraux ont pu influencer directement les plates-formes du Parti libéral du Québec et participer activement au façonnement de l’histoire politique du Québec moderne.

C’est maintenant à notre tour de prendre notre place!

Name: Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion Kreis Olpe (MIT)
Description:
Mehr Raum für Leistung und Risikobereitschaft, für Verantwortung und Fleiß!

Mehr Freiheit und weniger Staat für alle Bürger!


Gemeinsame Interessen für mehr politische Eigenverantwortung

Die Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion (MIT) ist eine Gliederung der CDU und versteht sich als Mittler zu Unternehmern in Industrie, Handel, Handwerk und freien Berufen sowie leitenden Angestellten in Wirtschaft und Verwaltung und denjenigen, die sich dem Mittelstand zugehörig fühlen.


Die Mitgliedschaft in der Mittelstands- und Wirtschaftsunion garantiert Ihnen einen ständigen Kontakt zu den Abgeordneten in den Parlamenten auf Bundes-, Landes- und Kommunalebene. In unseren Arbeitskreisen und Kommissionen können Sie als Mitglied praktische Politik in Fragen der Mittelstands-, Wirtschafts- und Gesellschaftspolitik mitgestalten. Helfen Sie durch Ihre aktive Mitarbeit - Werden Sie jetzt Mitglied der MIT.

 

Keine andere Gruppe beweist gleichermaßen täglich aufs Neue ihren Einfallsreichtum, ihre Anpassungsfähigkeit, ihren Unternehmungsgeist. Es ist also sicher nicht die Trägheit des Mittelstandes, die ihn schweigen lässt. Der Unternehmer, der Arzt, der Prokurist, der Landwirt, der Professor, der Handwerker, der Kaufmann..., sie alle haben zu wenig Zeit, sich politisch zu betätigen. Daher sind sie auf eine wirkungsvolle politische Interessenvertretung angewiesen.


Diese Interessenvertretung ist die MIT! Steuern zahlen und arbeiten genügt nicht. Wenn in den Parlamenten der Städte, der Länder und des Bundes Gesetze beraten und verabschiedet werden, muss die Stimme des Mittelstandes zu hören sein. Die MIT ist diese Stimme. Gleichzeitig aber haben sie ein Anrecht auf Information aus erster Hand. Daher beziehen alle MIT-Mitglieder kostenlos das "Mittelstands-Magazin. Berichte aus dem Landesverband gibt es als Beileger unter „MIT vor Ort“.


Rund zwei Drittel der Bevölkerung zählen sich selbst zum Mittelstand. Es sind mittelständische Unterne

Name: Leadership Program of the Rockies
Description:
The Leadership Program of the Rockies is America’s premier institute to develop, strengthen, train and equip emerging leaders to reach new heights.

LPR identifies and brings together emerging leaders from the legal, economic, business, university, and political, nonprofit and civic professions to learn how visionary, principle-centered leadership can positively impact their community.

LPR provides a thorough education and grounding for emerging leaders on the principles of American civilization – free enterprise; the rule of law; a vigorous national defense; free speech, elections; limited government – that will continue to be the basis for our prosperity, freedom and well-being in the decades ahead.

LPR gives emerging leaders unique access to current state and national leaders to learn about today’s public policy challenges and what can be done to solve them.

LPR trains emerging leaders in the practical skills – grassroots organizing, media relations, electoral politics, pressure group organization – they will need to effectively bring about solutions to their communities’ top challenges.

Name: Obama for America
Description:
Few presidents have walked a more improbable path to the White House. Born in Hawaii to a mother from Kansas and a father from Kenya, Obama was raised with help from his grandparents, whose generosity of spirit reflected their Midwestern roots. The homespun values they instilled in him, paired with his innate sense of optimism, compelled Obama to devote his life to giving every child, regardless of his or her background, the same chance America gave him.

After working his way through college with the help of scholarships and student loans, Obama moved to Chicago, where he worked with a group of churches to help rebuild communities devastated by the closure of local steel plants. That experience honed his belief in the power of uniting ordinary people around a politics of purpose, in the hard work of citizenship, to bring about positive change. In law school, he became the first African-American president of the Harvard Law Review, then he returned to Illinois to teach constitutional law at the University of Chicago and begin a career in public service, winning seats in the Illinois State Senate and the United States Senate.

On November 4, 2008, Barack Obama was elected the 44th President of the United States, winning more votes than any candidate in history. He took office at a moment of crisis unlike any America had seen in decades – a nation at war, a planet in peril, the American Dream itself threatened by the worst economic calamity since the Great Depression. And yet, despite all manner of political obstruction, Obama’s leadership helped rescue the economy, revitalize the American auto industry, reform the health care system to cover another twenty million Americans, and put the country on a firm course to a clean energy future – all while overseeing the longest stretch of job creation in American history.

Name: YOUNGO Climate Peace and Security Working Group
Description: The YOUNGO Climate Peace and Security Working Group focuses on the prevention, preparation, mitigation and adaptation of climate-specific destabilization that directly affects youth populations—from food, water and energy access to supply chain security, forced migration/displacement and human security issues. Youth are disproportionately affected by climate-related security issues around the world. As a result, our work centers around three key pillars: climate-related security threats, climate initiatives as peacebuilding, and sustainability in the defense and space sectors and supply chains. We advocate for the recognition of youth representation in climate diplomacy and youth-led action across these sectors.

Name: Landesverband Erneuerbare Energien Berlin Brandenburg e. V. (LEE BB)
Description:
Wer wir sind:

Der LEE Berlin Brandenburg organisiert als Verband die Akteure Erneuerbarer Energien auf der Landesebene.Wir bündeln die Interessen und die fachliche Kompetenz unserer Mitglieder, fördern ihre Vernetzung und vertreten sie gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung und Öffentlichkeit.

Unser Ziel: 100 % Erneuerbare Energien. Wir wollen die Energiewende in der Metropolregion Berlin Brandenburg voranbringen und setzen uns für die vollständige Umstellung der Energieversorgung auf regenerative Energieträger ein.

Die Erzeuger Erneuerbarer Energien sind in der Lage, für die Versorgungssicherheit die Verantwortung zu übernehmen. Daher machen wir uns für einen ungehinderten Marktzugang für Erneuerbare Energien stark.

Dabei kann die Energiewende nur im Zusammenspiel der erneuerbaren Energiequellen gelingen. So ergänzen regelbare Bioenergie und verlässliche Geothermie die Lastpferde Wind und Sonne, Wasserstoff bildet das Brückenglied zwischen allen Sektoren.

Was wir machen: 

Als Verband informieren wir Politik, Öffentlichkeit und Medien über das Leistungspotenzial unserer Mitglieder.

Als politische Interessenvertretung der Erneuerbaren in Brandenburg  beziehen wir Stellung zu aktuellen Gesetzesvorhaben. Mit der Fachkompetenz unserer Mitglieder beraten wir bei strategischen Entscheidungen der Energiewende. Wir informieren unsere Mitglieder über aktuelle Entwicklungen in der Landespolitik, über wichtige Änderungen in der Regulierung und Neues aus der Förderlandschaft. Wir vernetzen unsere Mitglieder und schaffen Synergien.

Name: Alliance For A Stronger FDA
Description:
The Alliance for a Stronger FDA, created in 2007, is a multi-stakeholder organization with 150+ members devoted to advocating for increased appropriations for the FDA and educating policymakers and the public about the FDA's mission and responsibilities. The Alliance’s unique coalition of patient and consumer groups and industry mirrors FDA’s unique role in public health, safety, and commerce.

A science-based, predictable, and efficient FDA is essential, but can only carry out its core mission and responsibilities if it has sufficient resources to do so. As FDA’s responsibilities have grown, so must its budget. If FDA lacks funding, there is no backstop, no other agency, that performs the critical work of the FDA.

The U.S. Food & Drug Administration (FDA) oversees products and services that comprise more than 20% of all national consumer spending, exceeding $2.7 trillion per year. Every American is touched multiple times each day by FDA-regulated products and services and relies on FDA for safe foods and safe and effective medical products. Not only is FDA pivotal to public health and safety, but it is also vital to our nation’s growth and prosperity and our national defense.

Name: U.S. Transhumanist Party
Description:
Technological and medical innovation is developing rapidly, and its momentum and speed are only increasing. Current political entities, however, are hopelessly behind in both legislation and knowledge regarding such progress, making these entities inherently reactive.

The U.S. Transhumanist Party wants to bring change to this situation, supporting informed and proactive policies and behaviors based on scientific evidence, reason, and secular values.

These are the Core Ideals of the U.S. Transhumanist Party:

Ideal 1. The Transhumanist Party supports significant life extension achieved through the progress of science and technology.

Ideal 2. The Transhumanist Party supports a cultural, societal, and political atmosphere informed and animated by reason, science, and secular values.

Ideal 3. The Transhumanist Party supports efforts to use science, technology, and rational discourse to reduce and eliminate various existential risks to the human species.

Name: Občanská demokratická strana
Description:
Principy
ODS je liberálně-konzervativní stranou navazující na tradice evropské křesťanské civilizace, na humanitní a demokratický odkaz první republiky a na zkušenosti západních demokracií. Ve svém programu proto prosazujeme svobodu jednotlivce, vládu práva a volný trh, který je nejlepším předpokladem všeobecné prosperity. Stejně tak se zasazujeme o standardní fungování liberální demokracie západního typu, odmítáme proto věčné pokusy o hledání třetích cest, kolektivistické ideologie i naivní pokusy o nepolitickou politiku.

Základem naší praktické politiky je důraz na soukromé vlastnictví, nízké daně, podnikavost, solidaritu zodpovědných, snižování byrokracie, malý a bezpečný stát, ochranu soukromí, individuální zodpovědnost, zdravé veřejné finance a nezadluženou budoucnost.

Pro zahraniční orientaci České republiky považujeme za klíčové silné transatlantické vazby, a to jak pro zajištění naší vlastní bezpečnosti, tak i pro rozšiřování prostoru svobody a demokracie ve světě.

Ve vztahu k Evropské unii zastáváme střízlivý a racionální postoj zdůrazňující nutnost zvyšování konkurenceschopnosti a rozvíjení efektivní spolupráce a zároveň hájící národní zájmy České republiky a jejích obyvatel.

Struktura a členové
Od svého vzniku v roce 1991 dokázala ODS vybudovat moderní čtyřstupňovou strukturu tvořenou místními, oblastními a regionálními sdruženími a pokrývající území celé České republiky. ODS tak je a v celých polistopadových dějinách i vždy byla nejsilnější a největší pravicovou stranou na české politické scéně, jejíž reprezentanti aktivně působí na všech úrovních samosprávy.

Name: League of Women Voters of San Diego
Description: The League of Women Voters is a non-partisan political grassroots organization founded nearly 100 years ago to educate voters and promote civic engagement.

Name: Team LPAC
Description:
LPAC is the only organization whose mission is to elect lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, and queer women and nonbinary people.

LPAC was founded in 2012 by a group of LGBTQ women seeking to create a place, and voice, at the power table for our community. At the time of our founding, the scarcity of queer women and nonbinary candidates prompted LPAC to also support staunch allies who championed LGBTQ rights nationwide. These allies have been pivotal in shaping a political environment where queer candidates are now empowered and feel safe to pursue office.

We do this by endorsing and investing in candidates directly and supporting them through independent expenditure campaigns. We’ve raised more than $7.1 million and endorsed more than 255 candidates. And we’re just getting started.

LPAC’s focus is on electing LGBTQ women and nonbinary candidates who share our values: LGBTQ and women’s equality, women’s health, and social justice, while helping coalesce LGBTQ women as a concrete and powerful political demographic. 

If you are running for office and would like to find out more about our endorsement process, please contact us.

Name: DENK Zuid-Holland
Description: De officiële LinkedIn-pagina van DENK Zuid-Holland. Voor rechtvaardigheid en gelijkwaardigheid. #DENK mee en word lid! #ZuidHollandisvanonsallemaal

Name: Unternehmervereinigung Uckermark e.V.
Description:
Die Unternehmervereinigung Uckermark e. V.

vertritt die Interessen ihrer Mitglieder gegenüber

den kommunalen Vertretungen, Verwaltungen und den politischen Parteien, 
den Landes-, Bundes- und europäischen Parlamenten und Behörden, 
den Verbänden und Kammern, 
der Wirtschaftsfördergesellschaft Uckermark GmbH.
Sie setzt sich für die wirtschaftliche Entwicklung der Teilregionen Schwedt, Angermünde, Prenzlau und Templin sowie des gesamten Landkreises Uckermark ein.

Sie tritt ein für eine Verständigung mit unseren polnischen Nachbarn und die Entwicklung der gesamten Oder-Region.

zu Themen Betriebswirtschaft und Recht, 
Diskussionsrunden mit kompetenten Partnern aus Wirtschaft und Politik, 
interne Diskussionsrunden.

Name: Democratic Party of Arkansas
Description: Working to elect Democrats in Arkansas to build better, brighter, safer and fairer communities.

Name: Generation Ratify
Description: GenERAtion Ratify, the youth-led movement to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, was founded in July of 2019 by a few 15-year-old kids at a public library in Arlington, Virginia. Our mission is to correct the historical exclusion of women and people beyond the binary from our Constitution by mobilizing youth across the country to take action to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment and advance gender equality. To do this, we educate around and advocate for gender equality legislation, elect officials who support our mission, and empower women-identifying, non-binary, gender nonconforming, and femme folx to uplift their political voices.

Name: Labour Campaign for Human Rights
Description:
LCHR believes that human rights are core Labour values. Our campaigns aim to foster debate and discussion within the Party about human rights and ensure they remain at the heart of Labour’s policy and practice.

Our main activities are:

Discussion: through events, blogs, social media, advocacy, and campaigning, LCHR serves as a forum and platform for Labour members and others who have an interest in human rights. We foster dialogue between civil society, academia, the public, and the Labour Party on human rights issues.

Advocacy: the group engages with Labour Party policy and Labour politicians to ensure that human rights are at the heart of Labour’s foreign and domestic policy agendas.

Policy work: LCHR generates policy proposals for the Labour Party that ensure the protection and promotion of human rights.

Information: We bring human rights issues closer to Labour MPs by facilitating contact with human rights defenders and providing information on human rights concerns.

Public, grassroots campaigning and awareness raising: the group raises the profile of human rights issues in the wider Party, including in CLPs and Labour student groups, by holding local events connecting local Labour MPs, civil society, and members, and by encouraging Labour members to take up human rights issues with their MPs.

Name: Gestaltungszentrale Politik
Description:
Wir brauchen eine neue politische Gestaltungskultur für unsere Demokratie.

Als Gestaltungszentrale Politik stellen wir fest, dass wir im Design ebenso, wie die Politik, den Anspruch haben, zu gestalten. Allerdings verstehen wir darunter sehr Unterschiedliches. Die Politik meint damit in der Regel das Herbeiführen einer Entscheidung, uns geht es mehr um das Entwerfen von Ideen. 

Dagegen ist grundsätzlich nichts einzuwenden, denn als Bürger:innen erwarten wir von der Politik, dass sie Entscheidungen trifft. Problematisch wird es, wenn unter latentem Zeitdruck die Entwicklung von Lösungen vorschnell auf eine Entscheidung verengt wird, ohne das Problem richtig verstanden zu haben. Im Gestaltungsprozess bleibt dann kein Raum für die Exploration alternativer Lösungsoptionen. Wir wollen daher das Verständnis von Gestaltung in der Politik um eine Entwurfspraxis erweitern, Kompetenzen des Entwerfens bündeln und in Form einer intervenierenden Gestaltungsbegleitung zur Verfügung stellen.

Wenn Ihr mehr über die Gestaltungszentrale oder unsere aktuellen Projekte erfahren wollt, folgt uns hier und schaut auf unserer Website vorbei!

Name: Table des préfets de Lanaudière
Description: Instance politique de concertation et d'échange sur des enjeux communs aux MRC du territoire. La Table a aussi pour mandat de maintenir un lien avec les organismes socioéconomiques du territoire et d'assumer la gestion d'ententes à caractère régional.

Name: Oui à la Loi climat
Description:
Le 18 juin 2023, nous protégerons ce qui compte. Nous prenons ainsi nos responsabilités vis-à-vis des générations futures. C'est ce que choisit la Suisse en adoptant la loi climat, c'est-à-dire le contre-projet à l'initiative pour les glaciers.

Des étés caniculaires, des hivers extrêmes, des récoltes perdues : voilà ce qu'apporte la crise climatique. Le changement climatique est un fait. Si nous ne faisons rien, les dommages et les coûts augmenteront.

La loi climat montre la voie vers l'obectif « zéro émission nette » et assure une protection efficace du climat. Grâce à des investissements dans des technologies innovantes, dans le remplacement des chauffages et dans l'assainissement des bâtiments, la loi climat favorise la création de valeur en Suisse et offre offre de nouvelles opportunités économiques. Le climat, les particuliers et les entreprises en profitent.

Si vous voulez protéger les conditions nécessaires à la vie et prendre vos responsabilités pour l'avenir, dites OUI à la loi climat.

Name: All-Party Parliamentary Group for Women in Transport
Description:
The purpose of the APPG for Women in Transport is to discuss and overcome the under-representation of women in the transport industry and promote best practice by employers leading the way in gender diversifying their workforce. 

Women in Transport, the leading professional network for women in transport, is the APPG Secretariat, supported by JFG Communications.

Name: Lektorlaget
Description:
Norsk Lektorlag er en fagforening for universitets- og høyskoleutdannede lektorer og andre akademikere med tilsvarende utdannelse. Våre medlemmer har mastergrad eller hovedfag. De fleste arbeider med undervisning, kulturformidling, personalledelse eller veilednings- og informasjonsarbeid. 

Vi jobber for å:
• bedre lektorenes lønns- og arbeidsvilkår
• øke verdsetting av akademisk arbeidskraft i samfunnet generelt og innen offentlig sektor spesielt
• være en pådriver i utdanningspolitiske spørsmål
• heve kvaliteten på undervisningen i norske skoler og høyskoler/universiteter

Name: Bundesverband in den Gewerken Trockenbau und Ausbau e.V.
Description:
Der Bundesverband in den Gewerken Trockenbau und Ausbau e.V. vertritt seit 1998 die Interessen der Trockenbaubranche in Deutschland. Gegründet von führenden Unternehmen, vereint er Trockenbaubetriebe, Fachhandel und Baustoffindustrie. Ziel ist es, die Branche zu vernetzen und gemeinsam eine starke Marktposition zu schaffen.

Der Verband unterstützt Mitglieder aktiv bei der Ansprache von Investoren und Architekten, bietet wertvolle Netzwerke und vertritt die Interessen der Branche professionell und zukunftsorientiert. Eine Mitgliedschaft stärkt Unternehmen und eröffnet neue Chancen in einer dynamischen Bauindustrie.

Name: The Plurals Party
Description:
“Plurals” is contesting the upcoming Bihar Assembly Elections to form the government and to transform Bihar in 2020-2030. Pushpam Priya Choudhary, a graduate from LSE and IDS is the founder President of the party whereas Anupam Suman, Ex-Civil Servant and also a graduate from LSE and University of Wales is the General Secretary. Thousands of grassroots workers are working day and night for the party.

“NEW DECADE NEW BIHAR”

Plurals agenda is complete transformation of Bihar. Bihar ranks the last in all development indices in the country. These ranks are not just numbers but evidently reflect the inhuman and unacceptable conditions in which the populace is forced to live. This plight can be solely attributed to the inefficient and incompetent government.

Plurals aims to be elected to office as a responsible government that substantively represents and is genuinely accountable to the people. Thereafter, it will build strong institutions and design better policies to provide efficient public services to everyone regardless of their socio-economic status. Plurals will strive against the contrived economic, social and political conditions to build a Bihar where every life is unquestionably equally valuable.

Our mission is to revive the moribund economy of Bihar; to create a new Bihar that produces, innovates and invests to become the most well governed and developed state in the country by 2025 and one of the best liveable places in the world by 2030. Plurals will do so through evidence based policy making that stems from positive and programmatic politics.

“Build institutions not power-brokers”

Solution : “Move from ‘band-aid’ solutions to ‘Fix the causes of problems’!”

Means : Complete abolition of clientelism, corruption and VIP culture and Zero tolerance towards crime and discrimination.

Motto : Kantian philosophy that “Act so as to treat people always as ends in themselves, never as mere means

Name: Siembra NC
Description: We are a grassroots organization focused on defending our communities from abusive employers and landlords, ICE, and bad políticos. With and without papers, we build power to win el buen vivir and dignity for our communities by recruiting thousands of Latines who are “on the sidelines” to become active members of our multiracial social justice movements.

Description: New York State Nurses Association is a political organization company based out of 21 Horseshoe Cir # 5, Ossining, New York, United States.

Name: Wirtschaftsrat der CDU e.V. - Landesverband Thüringen
Description:
Der Wirtschaftsrat ist ein parteiunabhängiger Wirtschaftsverband mit rund 12.000 Mitgliedern, der die Interessen der unternehmerischen Wirtschaft gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung und Öffentlichkeit auf regional-kommunaler, nationaler und europäischer Ebene vertritt. Durch seine deutlichen Positionierungen sowie die starke Präsenz von Top-Entscheidungsträgern aus Politik und Wirtschaft in seinen Gremien und bei Leuchtturmveranstaltungen ist der Wirtschaftsrat als wichtiger wirtschaftspolitischer Impulsgeber seit 1963 etabliert.

Die 7 Sektionen des Wirtschaftsrates Thüringen sind ein regionales Forum und bieten seinen 300 Mitgliedern eine Plattform für das Mitwirken an standortpolitischen Themen. In jährlich landesweit über 90 Veranstaltungen ermöglichen wir unseren Mitgliedern die Gelegenheit zu einem direkten Gedankenaustausch mit den politischen Entscheidungsträgern. Die verschiedenen Formate verschaffen Informationsvorsprung und generieren wertvolle Kontakte. Im aktiven Dialog mit der Politik weisen die Mitglieder auf Entwicklungen hin und bringen Sichtweisen der Wirtschaft ein.

Zudem verfügt der Landesverband Thüringen aktuell über sechs Landesfachkommissionen, in denen die Mitglieder ihr Fachwissen einbringen können.

Je weiter Wirtschaft und Politik sich inhaltlich entfernen, umso größer wird die Bedeutung des Wirtschaftsrates, der auf beiden Seiten wirkt, und zwar als Stimme des Mittelstandes und als Anwalt für eine klare Ordnungspolitik.

Werden auch Sie ein Teil des Wirtschaftsrates und lassen Sie uns gemeinsam die unternehmerischen Interessen gegenüber den Entscheidungsträgern der Politik vertreten.

Name: Democratic Party of Orange County
Description:
The Democratic Party of Orange County (DPOC) is the official organization for Democrats in the sixth-largest county in the nation.

We’re the third largest Democratic county in California (behind Los Angeles and San Diego) with more than 450,000 registered Democrats.

The Democratic Party is focused on building an economy that lasts — an economy that lifts up all Americans. That’s why Democratic leaders in Washington and here in California are working to advance issues like job creation, education, health care, and clean energy.

We believe that we’re greater together than we are on our own — that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, when everyone does their fair share, when everyone plays by fair rules.

Name: Nowoczesna
Description:
Nowoczesna to polska partia polityczna, reprezentowana w Sejmie RP przez szóstkę parlamentarzystów. Jesteśmy częścią Koalicji Obywatelskiej.
Od czerwca 2016 należymy do Porozumienia Liberałów i Demokratów na rzecz Europy (ALDE).

Pomóż nam zmienić Polskę na bardziej nowoczesną, przedsiębiorczą i sprawiedliwą.

Dziś Polsce potrzebny jest nowy impuls do rozwoju. Kropka postawiona przed nazwą Nowoczesna oznacza nowy początek. Zamykamy pewien rozdział w naszej historii i kierujemy wzrok w przyszłość. Mamy potencjał i aspiracje – aby to w pełni wykorzystać, musimy stworzyć odpowiednie warunki. My naprawdę możemy więcej. Jesteśmy innowacyjni i kreatywni. Nasza gospodarka może być nowoczesna, a rynek pracy nastawiony na wykwalifikowanych pracowników. Dlatego stawiamy przed Polską nowe cele, które realizować będą nowi ludzie, bo nasze państwo można zorganizować lepiej za te same pieniądze.

Przyłącz się, bo Polskę trzeba zacząć zmieniać już teraz!

Name: DI Bornholm
Description: DI Bornholm arbejder for at fremme vækst og sikre de bedst mulige forhold for virksomhederne på Bornholm.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Wetterau e.V.
Description:
Wir sind die Junge Wirtschaft.

Wir Wirtschaftsjunioren: Das sind rund 10.000 #Unternehmer und #Führungskräfte unter 40 Jahren. Wir sind global vernetzt und als größtes Netzwerk junger Wirtschaft in Deutschland mit rund 215 Mitgliedskreisen vor Ort präsent. 

Wer bei uns mitmacht, engagiert sich im Beruf und will darüber hinaus auch etwas bewegen.

Mit unserem wirtschaftspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Engagement übernehmen wir #Verantwortung für die #Zukunft und geben der jungen Wirtschaft eine Stimme. Wir fördern den #Austausch und die #Entwicklung junger Unternehmer und #Führungskräfte.

Wir sind die junge Wirtschaft.
Wer bei uns mitmacht, engagiert sich im Beruf und will darüber hinaus auch etwas bewegen. Mit unserem wirtschaftspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Engagement übernehmen wir Verantwortung für die Zukunft und geben der jungen Wirtschaft eine Stimme. Wir fördern den Austausch und die Entwicklung junger Unternehmer und Führungskräfte.

Mehrwerte der Mitgliedschaft sind ein belastbares #Netzwerk, gesellschaftliches #Engagement, internationaler #Austausch, politische #Beteiligung und die persönliche #Weiterentwicklung.

Name: EuropeanPublicAffairs.eu
Description:
EuropeanPublicAffairs.eu is a knowledge sharing platform founded by alumni of the EPA MA programme at Maastricht University, in the Netherlands. The founders are now professionals in the arena of public affairs and communications. They have been joined by a spectrum of contributors from across Europe, keen to make a difference in accessible, well founded political discussions.

EPA was created as an accessible platform to provide specialised political analysis and commentary in the area of European politics, policy, as well as strategically related developments.

Please note that the views expressed in a post are the views of the individual who wrote that particular piece. An individual author’s views does not necessarily express the views of other group members. Nor does the views in a post reflect the views of any particular organization or institution, including Maastricht University.

Name: LSAP -  Luxembourg Socialist Workers' Party
Description:
Le Parti ouvrier socialiste luxembourgeois (LSAP) est un parti politique du Luxembourg de type social-démocrate, membre du Parti socialiste européen, de l'alliance progressiste et de l'Internationale socialiste.

Le LSAP est le troisième parti le plus représenté à la chambre des députés, avec 10 sièges sur 60 après les élections législatives de 2018 et a un siège sur six au parlement européen après les élections européennes de 2014.

Name: Mittelstands-Union Oberpfalz
Description:
Sie wollen etwas bewegen und mitentscheiden? Dann machen Sie mit!

Die Mittelstands-Union setzt sich für eine freiheitliche, zukunftsorientierte Wirtschafts- und Gesellschaftsordnung auf dem Fundament der Sozialen Marktwirtschaft ein. Wir vertreten den Mittelstand und die Mittelschicht auf allen politischen Ebenen und vereinen Unternehmer, Selbstständige sowie leitende Angestellte, wobei wir immer auch die Interessen der Arbeitnehmer im Blick haben.

Wir stehen für eine verantwortungsbewusste, solide, rational sachliche und ordnende Politik. Wir wollen, dass der Wirtschaftsstandort zukunftsfähig und innovationsstark bleibt. Wir fordern Entlastungen hinsichtlich Bürokratie und Steuer, um unternehmerische Freiheit zu sichern. Wir sind der Kümmerer und Ansprechpartner für den Mittelstand.
Gemeinsam sind wir stark!

Die Mittelstands-Union vereint als Arbeitsgemeinschaft der CSU knapp 4.000 Unternehmer, Gewerbetreibende, Hauseigentümer, freiberuflich Tätige und leitende Persönlichkeiten in Wirtschaft und Verwaltung. Wir sind durch unsere Abgeordneten und Regierungsmitglieder auf allen politischen Ebenen vertreten - kommunal, in ganz Bayern, Deutschland und Europa.

Wir sind in jedem bayerischen Regierungsbezirk start vernetzt. In unseren Fachausschüssen behandeln wir gemeinsam mit externen Experten spezifische Themen und bringen diese auf verschiedenen Wegen in den parlamentarischen Prozess ein.

Name: New York State Youth Leadership Council (NYSYLC)
Description: The NYSYLC was the first undocumented youth led organization in New York. We work to empower immigrant youth through leadership development, grassroots organizing, educational advancement, and self-expression. Our goal is to give undocumented youth the tools and space to organize and create change in our communities.

Name: Courage California
Description:
Courage California is a California-based political advocacy organization. We work alongside our partners in the largest and most diverse state to create equitable and representative models for the country. Powered by 1.4 million members, Courage California's proven strategy combines digital tools with community organizing, strategic partnerships, and powerful messaging. We are a statewide, independent, and multi-issue, digital organization. Courage California supports and leads legislative, electoral, and issue-based campaigns. 

We at Courage California speak truth to power, create tools, and provide a progressive digital community to help Californians effectively and courageously engage in the democratic process. Our most recognized programs include our Courage Voter Guide, a down-ballot and customizable voter guide, and Courage Score, a tool to help Californians hold their elected officials accountable. 

California -- the 5th largest economy in the world, and the United States’ largest and most diverse state -- is uniquely positioned to serve as a model for the country.

Courage starts in California! With Courage, we can build a more equitable and representative democracy.

Description: Die Bundesvereinigung Recycling-Baustoffe (BRB) e. V. vertritt bundesweit die Interessen der Recycling-Baustoff-Industrie. Name: National Youth Parliament Pakistan
Description:
National Youth Parliament Pakistan is an A-Political (Political), non-profit organization that has been formed to inculcate and harness the essence of democracy within the society. The organization aims to indoctrinate the democratic norms and values among the youth to broaden their horizon and knowledge on Parliamentary Politics and Democracy. Furthermore, to seek out the attributes of pioneers that rest within themselves as the future diplomats of Pakistan.

Our Objective is to work for the Sovereignty and Integrity of our country, forbearance, tolerance as well as inter-religious harmony among the masses with unity even within diversity. Additionally, to lay emphasis and understanding the National issues in a broadened Spectrum with consensus, and to inculcate the capability of rejecting the conspiracy theories which are mere illusions.

The organization is tailored with a keen exuberance to help the under privileged children to provide them with a better life and education.

It is clearly proclaimed in the manifesto of NYPP and emphasis has been given on it that the organization will extend its helping hand to the inhabitants of Pakistan during natural calamities, disasters or unfortunate incidents.

National Youth Parliament Pakistan is (A-Political) Political Organization initiated in order to contribute to the Nation by a process of learning and exploring the Political system in Pakistan. The members have willingly generated the idea to a National level with the objective of highlighting the optimistic approach in the youth by providing opportunities and passing on their experience that may help the younger generation to participate with constructive and productive efforts at their end for a brighter and better future of Pakistan’s political system.

Name: Stem Jong
Description: Wij maken ons hard voor meer jongeren in alle lagen van de politiek. Wij geloven in een wereld waarin jongeren meedoen in de politiek en zo hun eigen toekomst vorm kunnen geven. Wij willen jongeren motiveren om hun stem te gebruiken en een verschil te maken.

Name: JA21 Brabant
Description: Welkom bij JA21 Brabant! Wij zijn een hard-groeiende, conservatief-liberale partij vertegenwoordigd in de Provinciale Staten van Noord-Brabant. JA21 staat voor een realistische conservatief-liberale koers voor iedereen die de schouders onder Nederland wil zetten. Positieve keuzes voor een welvarender, veiliger en herkenbaarder land waarin we criminaliteit keihard aanpakken, behouden wat ons bindt en macht terughalen uit Europa. Met een overheid die er voor de burgers is en goed weet wat ze wel, maar ook juist niet moet doen. JA21 is het juiste antwoord

Name: Lori Lightfoot for Chicago
Description:
It’s time to unite.

My name is Lori Lightfoot and I’m running for mayor of Chicago.

In order for Chicago to remain a world-class city, we need to create a new path. A path in which fairness and inclusion are our guiding principles. As our mayor, I will respect the experiences of all Chicagoans and ensure our city government works to uplift the quality of life for everyone. 

We can, and we must, do better. We must do better to address the taxes and fees that burden middle- and low-income families. We must do better to halt the declining conditions of our neighborhood schools. We must do better to change an education policy that does not view parents, teachers, principals, staff or other stakeholders as valued partners. We must do better by insisting on a comprehensive plan to invest in families and neighborhoods, and to end the violence that plagues too many communities. We can do this, together. This is my commitment and my promise to you. Please join me.

Name: CHANKRUT
Description: Chankrut operates as a statecraft forge where ideology, organisation, and strategy are systematically developed. The institution works closely with political leaders, cadres, and organisations to strengthen grassroots mobilisation, narrative building, leadership development, and campaign strategy.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Konstanz-Hegau
Description:
Wir sind die junge Wirtschaft. 

Mit unserem wirtschaftspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Engagement übernehmen wir Verantwortung für die Zukunft und geben der jungen Wirtschaft eine Stimme. Wir fördern den Austausch und die Entwicklung junger Unternehmer und Führungskräfte.

Wir befassen uns mit den Themen Gründung & Unternehmertum, Bildung & Wirtschaft, Beruf & Familie und Digitalisierung & Innovation. 

Die Mehrwerte für unsere Mitglieder sind ein belastbares regionales, nationales und internationales Netzwerk, persönliche Weiterentwicklung, gesellschaftliches Engagement, politische Beteiligung und internationaler Austausch. 

Wir Wirtschaftsjunioren: Das sind rund 10.000 Unternehmer und Führungskräfte unter 40 Jahren. Wir sind global vernetzt und als größtes Netzwerk junger Wirtschaft in Deutschland mit rund 215 Mitgliedskreisen vor Ort präsent. Wer bei uns mitmacht, engagiert sich im Beruf und will darüber hinaus auch etwas bewegen.

Description:

BPW Karlsruhe ist eine Plattform für die gegenseitige Unterstützung, für die berufliche und private Weiterentwicklung und für das gezielte gesellschaftliche Engagement von und für Frauen.
