Name: Junger Wirtschaftsrat Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Der Junge Wirtschaftsrat bietet die Plattform für den Dialog zwischen Wirtschaft und Politik – von Anfang an. Junge Unternehmer und Führungskräfte bringen die Themen ihrer Generation auf den Tisch.


Für Führungskräfte und Unternehmer bis 35 Jahre, die gesellschaftliches Engagement in enger Anbindung an politische Entscheidungsträger umsetzen wollen, ist der Junge Wirtschaftsrat die erste Adresse. Bei Veranstaltungen auf Bundesebene wie dem Jungen Wirtschaftstag und der Arbeitsgruppentagung sowie auf Landesebene bei Workshops, Unternehmensbesichtigungen und politischen Diskussionsrunden debattieren die über 800 Mitglieder aktuelle wirtschafts- und gesellschaftspolitische Fragestellungen mit Vertretern aus Parlament, Regierung, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft.


Als Denkfabrik erarbeiten die Mitglieder des Jungen Wirtschaftsrates Lösungsvorschläge und Forderungen der jungen Generation und kommunizieren diese an politischen Entscheidungsträger aller Parteien. Neben der persönlichen Vernetzung der verschiedenen Generationen innerhalb des Wirtschaftsrates fungiert die Jugendorganisation des Wirtschaftsrates vor allem als kreative Ideenschmiede.

Name: Northern Ontario Service Deliverer's Association (NOSDA)
Description:
The Northern Ontario Service Deliverers Association is an incorporated body that brings together ten District Social Services Administration Boards (DSSABs) and one Consolidated Municipal Service Manager (CMSM). NOSDA was formed to develop a cooperative and collaborated approach with municipalities and municipal organizations to facilitate the consolidated municipal delivery of services in Northern Ontario. 

NOSDA is intended to create a political forum for reviewing and developing both policy and pro-gram issues from a Northern perspective. The group attempts to achieve the effective and efficient delivery of services in Northern Ontario through joint action and information sharing. NOSDA members are primarily responsible for the service system management of Land Ambulance, Social Housing, Child Care Management and Ontario Works.

“We plan and coordinate the delivery of public services and infrastructure programs that result in measurable gains to the quality of life of Northerners”

Name: Veterans for Responsible Leadership
Description: We are a group of U.S. military veterans dedicated to promoting integrity and civility in public office by supporting candidates from all parties for local, state, and federal office who are committed to defending our democracy.

Name: SSU
Description:
SSU är Socialdemokraternas och LO:s ungdomsförbund. Vi kämpar för människans frigörelse. Alla som anstränger sig ska få samma möjligheter att uppnå sina drömmar i livet. Ingen ska begränsas av föräldrarnas ekonomi och utbildningsnivå, kön, sexuell läggning, hudfärg och annat vi själva inte kan påverka.

Vi håller inte med Socialdemokraterna i allt, därför engagerar vi oss för att få igenom viktiga satsningar för oss unga. Om vi är många i SSU måste Socialdemokraterna lyssna på oss när vi föreslår politik som minskar klassklyftorna och växthusutsläppen. 

SSU är till för alla unga som delar våra värderingar om jämlikhet, frihet och solidaritet. Även om vi ibland tycker olika. Vi samlar fler genom kampanjer, vi skolar oss i hur politiken fungerar och vi påverkar samhället tillsammans.
 
Sverige och världen har allt för länge dominerats av idéer om privatiseringar och skattesänkningar. Det har försvagat välfärden, ökat klyftorna, spätt på segregationen och försvårat klimatomställningen. Nu ser vi behovet av ett starkare samhälle som håller ihop. Därför måste vi stärka välfärden och investera i vår gemensamma trygghet. Vi ska bygga bort segregationen, stoppa brottsligheten, se till att alla klarar skolan och anställa fler inom vården och omsorgen. Vi ska påskynda klimatomställningen genom stora statliga investeringar och skapa nya jobb när vi blir världens första klimatneutrala välfärdsland. Då kan vi också ställa högre krav på omvärlden och exportera våra gröna lösningar.

Solidariskt och efter förmåga ska samhället stå starkt inför en osäker framtid. Vi har inte råd med alternativet.

Name: Washington Community Action Network
Description:
With over 35,000 members, Washington CAN! is the state's largest grassroots community organization. Together we work to achieve racial, social, and economic justice in our state and nation. Our strength as an organization depends on our members' involvement. We believe that we can only achieve our goals when people take action for justice.

Washington CAN! has a long history of achieving victories for low and moderate-income people in our state. Washington CAN! was born in the 1970's out of the Seattle/Tacoma Light Brigade, which fought against shutting off electricity for low-income families and against the taxpayer subsidization of nuclear power. During the 1980s, the Light Brigade became Washington Fair Share, joining a national network of organizations fighting for consumer justice and achieving statewide victories such as raising the minimum wage. From the early 1990s until 2006 we have fought for justice under the name Washington Citizen Action. Throughout our history, Washington CAN! accomplishments have included establishing the nation's highest inflation-indexed minimum wage, passing one of the strongest Patient's Bill of Rights in the country, ensuring that seasonal farm workers receive the same health benefits as other workers, and spearheading the largest voter registration drive in Washington state history.

Name: Elevate Strategies
Description: Founded in 2022, Elevate Strategies is a women-owned and operated strategic political consulting firm. We support progressive candidates, elected officials, causes, and organizations who are ready to rise to the next level. Committed to elevating a bench of professionally trained candidates and campaign staff, we take an all-hands-on-deck approach to campaigns. With over 35 years of campaign experience spanning the country, we are focused on advancing this vision through our shared values. From the School Board to the Senate, this is next-level politics.

Name: Palestine Advocacy Project
Description:
Palestine Advocacy Project creates public media and education campaigns that expose Americans to the Palestinian struggle and advocate for an end to Israeli human rights abuses.

*We Support*

Equal rights: All people living in Palestine/Israel have the right to live under a government that is accountable to them, serves them equally, and provides them equal treatment under the law.

Security: Palestinians and Israelis deserve to live free from fear of traditional and structural violence against them and their property.

Democracy: Civil society-led action, including the Boycott, Divestment, and Sanctions campaign (BDS) and popular struggle, is fundamental to meaningful change.

*We Oppose*

Apartheid: The indefinite occupation of the West Bank, the siege of Gaza, and inequitable application of law within Israel, which deny Palestinians the political rights to which Israeli Jews are entitled, constitute apartheid.

Ethnic cleansing: The use of military force and brutalization, home demolitions, deportations, and bureaucratic violence to remove Palestinians from their historic homeland and establish Israeli control of this land constitutes ethnic cleansing. 

Violence against civilians: Attacks by state or non-state actors against civilians are violations of international humanitarian law.

Name: Orthodox Union Advocacy Center
Description:
The OU Advocacy Center is the non-partisan public policy arm of the nation’s largest Orthodox Jewish organization‚ representing nearly 1,000 congregations nationwide, and leads the OU’s advocacy efforts in Washington, DC, and state capitals.

Formerly known as the Institute for Public Affairs, OU Advocacy engages leaders at all levels of government as well as the broader public to promote and protect the Orthodox Jewish community’s interests and values in the public policy arena.

The OU Advocacy Center:

Protects and strengthens the Orthodox Jewish community by ensuring that government laws and programs (federal and state) support the life of the Orthodox Jewish individuals and our institutions.
Addresses the challenge of the affordability of Jewish day school education through securing public sector support and funding.
Serves as the voice of Orthodox Judaism regarding the concerns and interests of our community in the media.
Trains community leaders to be advocates on critical issues.
Convenes Orthodox Jewish community leaders to discuss critical issues and develop strategies to address them.
Serves as the Orthodox community’s link to the Conference of Presidents of Major American Jewish Organizations, the Jewish Council for Public Affairs, the World Jewish Congress, and other umbrella entities.
In addition to its day-to-day activities, OU Advocacy sponsors an annual National Leadership Mission to Washington, D.C., and the Legislative Fellowship Program, training the next generation of Orthodox Jewish policymakers and activists.

Become an active participant in our programs and a partner in working for the advancement of our community and our values.

Name: Europaverband der Selbständigen - Deutschland (ESD) e.V.
Description:
Der Europaverband der Selbständigen - Deutschland (ESD) e.V. ist die parteiunabhängige Interessenvertretung der Selbständigen, Angehörigen der freien Berufe, kleinen und mittleren Unternehmen, Gewerbe-, Branchen- und Wirtschaftsverbände sowie Innungen.

Der ESD tritt branchenunabhängig auf allen Ebenen dafür ein, dass die Politik im Besonderen die Interessen der kleinen und mittelständischen Unternehmen stärker berücksichtigt. Im ESD haben sich speziell kleine Unternehmen organisiert, um ihre Kräfte effizient zu bündeln und ihre Interessen durch eine starke Gemeinschaft gegenüber der Politik überzeugend durchzusetzen.

Name: Avançons Ensemble - 2026
Description:
❱❱  Pour une Métropole de Lyon progressiste, écologiste, tournée vers l'avenir - Avançons Ensemble. 

  Avec Bruno Bernard et l'Union de la Gauche.

Name: SPÖ-Rathausklub
Description:
Der SPÖ-Rathausklub im Wiener Rathaus setzt sich aus den sozialdemokratischen Mitgliedern des Wiener Gemeinderates/ Landtages zusammen.

Mit beratender Stimme gehören dem SPÖ-Klub weiters an:

Die Mitglieder des Wiener Vorstandes der SPÖ
die in Wien gewählten Mitglieder des Klubs der sozialdemokratischen Nationalratsabgeordneten und Bundesräte
die Landesparteisekretärin der SPÖ Wien
die Sekretärin der Wiener SPÖ-Frauen
Im Mittelpunkt der Arbeit des Klubs im Wiener Rathaus steht das Bestreben, die Rahmenbedingungen für eine positive Entwicklung unserer Stadt zu schaffen. Dabei gilt es, neuen gesellschaftlichen, politischen und ökologischen Werten Rechnung zu tragen und die Rolle Wiens in Europa zu definieren und zu gestalten.

Die Aufgabe des SPÖ-Rathausklubs ist, die Arbeit der SPÖ im Wiener Landtag und Gemeinderat zu beraten und vorzubereiten. Grundlage dafür bilden die Beschlüsse der Organe und Gremien der SPÖ-Landesorganisation Wien.

Weiters koordiniert der SPÖ-Klub die Arbeit der sozialdemokratischen Fraktionen in den Wiener Bezirksvertretungen und stellt den organisatorischen Rahmen für den Verband der sozialdemokratischen Gemeinde- und BezirksvertreterInnen zur Verfügung.

Das oberste Organ des SPÖ-Klubs im Wiener Rathaus ist das Klub-Präsidium.

Name: Mișcarea SENS
Description:
Împreună vrem să formăm o nouă forță politică care să adreseze lipsa unei mișcări politice progresiste în România. Împreună luptăm pentru locuințe sociale, terapie decontată, dreptul femeii de a alege, dreptul minorităților sexuale și etnice, alături de combaterea schimbărilor climatice.

Românii își doresc o societate progresistă și armonioasă, care prioritizează crizele ecologice și sociale. Generația Egalitate alături de Nicu Ștefănuță și SENS își asumă misiunea de a construi un program politic comun, propunând candidați pentru alegerile parlamentare, reprezentând grupurile vulnerabile ignorate timp de 35 de ani.


O nouă cale pentru România la viitoarele alegeri parlamentare include justiția socio-economică, protecția mediului și solidaritatea. Ne opunem ferm extremei drepte, promovând o schimbare radicală a status quo-ului pentru a proteja democrația și coeziunea socială.

Name: Botschaft des Staates Israel | Berlin
Description:
Die Botschaft des Staates Israel in Deutschland fördert den Dialog und die enge Zusammenarbeit zwischen Israel und Deutschland in den Bereichen Wirtschaft, Kultur und Wissenschaft. 

Unter der Leitung von Botschafter Ron Prosor, der seit August 2022 im Amt ist, setzen wir uns für gemeinsame Werte wie Demokratie und Innovation ein und unterstützen den kulturellen Austausch.

Unser Ziel ist es, das Verständnis und die Partnerschaft zwischen den Gesellschaften beider Länder zu vertiefen. Darüber hinaus bieten wir konsularische Dienstleistungen für israelische Staatsbürger und unterstützen deutsche Bürger bei Anliegen rund um Israel. Durch vielfältige Veranstaltungen, Informationsangebote und Partnerschaften leisten wir einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Stärkung der deutsch-israelischen Beziehungen.

Name: ConnCAN - Connecticut Coalition for Achievement Now
Description: The Connecticut Coalition for Achievement Now (ConnCAN) is an advocacy organization leading a movement to improve public education for kids. We bring parents, educators, policymakers, and advocates together to help ensure that all kids have access to great schools regardless of race, wealth, or zip code. To learn more about ConnCAN, visit: www.conncan.org.

Name: Young Liberals
Description:
We are the youth and student wing of the Liberal Democrats; we exist to fight for a Britain that is fair, free and tolerant based on our own values and principles of liberty and equality. We have a proud history dating back to the early 20th century championing radical and liberal thought.

Today you’ll find Young Liberals societies up and down the country tirelessly campaigning on issues such as civil liberties and human rights. Our societies can be found in almost any town or university; wherever you go there'll be young people fighting to protect the poorest and most vulnerable in our society.

What separates us from the other youth and student groups? Other groups protest, Young Liberals shapes policy. As active participants in the policy formation process of the Liberal Democrats, our voices are heard.

Name: Impôt successions 50% NON
Description:
NE BRISONS PAS NOTRE ÉQUILIBRE ÉCONOMIQUE.

Le 30 nov, votons NON à l’initiative «pour l’avenir» de la Jeunesse Socialiste.

À Genève, l’équilibre économique repose sur une minorité de contribuables. Sans eux, nos écoles, nos transports, nos aides sociales, notre santé… vacilleront.
Dans un contexte d’inflation, de tensions géopolitiques et d’incertitudes pour les PME, nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre de fragiliser davantage notre stabilité.
Transmettre, ce n’est pas seulement une question d’impôt. C’est un acte de confiance entre générations, ancré dans la durée, le territoire et les valeurs d’une famille ou d’un métier.
L’initiative «pour l’avenir» veut imposer 50 % sur les successions dès 50 millions. Une mesure extrême, qui menace directement nos entreprises, nos emplois et notre tissu économique.

 Le 30 novembre, Genève dit NON à l’initiative «pour l’avenir» de la Jeunesse Socialiste.

Name: Girl and the Gov
Description:
Girl and the Gov is a new media company helping Democratic campaigns, organizations, and brands connect with audiences through creative digital strategy. Our work spans original content—newsletters, podcasts, and social media channels—and consulting services, including strategic office hours, custom playbooks, and content collaborations. Featured in Teen Vogue, NPR, and The Washington Examiner, we specialize in storytelling at the intersection of politics, culture, and the creator economy.

Tackling the challenges that keep the girlies out of the political space and the challenges that keep political organizations/candidates/electeds from being able to reach us, Girl and the Gov is rebranding politics to make it less intimidating to get involved, be involved, and stay involved. Built out across four newsletters, a viral podcast, robust social media accounts, and a consulting practice, Girl and the Gov is actively bringing new faces [and often missed faces] into the political sphere

Name: Les Jeunes Écologistes
Description:
Les Jeunes Écologistes sont le mouvement de jeunesse de l’écologie politique. Cette organisation, alors appelée Les Jeunes Verts, a vu le jour en juillet 2001. Elle a évoluée pour devenir en janvier 2011 « Les Jeunes Écologistes ». Dynamiques et créatifs, les Jeunes Écologistes sont des lycéens, étudiants ou jeunes actifs sensibles aux idées écolo, désireux de les défendre, de les partager et de les étoffer.

Les Jeunes Écologistes ont pour but d’assurer la promotion de l’écologie politique auprès des jeunes. Ils affirment leur attachement aux concepts d’écologie, d’équité sociale, de solidarité, de démocratie, de féminisme...
Ancrés à gauche, ils sont convaincus que l’écologie politique est une alternative crédible au libéralisme sauvage, au conservatisme politique et à la social-démocratie.

Les Jeunes Écologistes allient l’action de type « associatif » et le travail politique strictement «institutionnel ». Ils s’attachent à ce titre à organiser des actions originales, festives et créatives, sans pour autant négliger le message politique de fond.

> Tu as entre 15 et 30 ans ?
> Tu penses que l’écologie politique apporte des réponses crédibles aux enjeux de notre époque ?
> Tu as envie de t’engager, de militer ou d’échanger avec d’autres jeunes?
> Tu souhaites promouvoir l’écologie par des actions sympas et décalées ?

Rejoins les Jeunes Écologistes sur http://www.jeunes-ecologistes.org/adherer

Name: Belgian Senate
Description:
One of the two Belgian Legislative Chambers (bicameral system)
The Senate works on important legislative and constitutional reforms.
In addition, the Senate is exlusively responsable for the International Treaties the Control on Intelligence Services and the reflects on ethical issues.

Name: John McCain for U.S. Senate
Description:
Senator John McCain has spent his lifetime in unwavering service to America, both in the U.S. Navy and representing the people of Arizona in the U.S. Congress. He has led the fight to strengthen America's national security and our armed forces, eliminate wasteful government spending, and reform government to make it more responsive to the American people.

John has fought zealously to eliminate excessive spending; lower taxes; end loopholes for special interests; bring free market principles to health care and strengthen our nation's armed forces. John’s commitment to eliminating wasteful government spending and cutting taxes have earned him a 92% rating from the American Conservative Union (ACU), a 95% rating from the Citizens Against Government Waste (CAGW), and an 85% rating from the National Taxpayers Union (NTU).

To learn more go to www.JohnMcCain.com

Name: San Francisco Women's Political Committee
Description:
Established in 2002, the San Francisco Women’s Political Committee (SFWPC) is the largest women’s organization in San Francisco with hundreds of active members of all ages and political parties, both female and male. 

SFWPC works to engage women in all dimensions of the political process. We are committed to elevating women into positions of leadership including elected office, boards, commissions and management positions.  We are politically active and engaged through female and male candidate endorsements, initiative endorsements and presenting the only woman’s  slate card in San Francisco. We actively advocate for policy improvements that support our bottomline issues – empowering women, girls and community. We are leading the sustainability of the women’s movement in San Francisco by convening the Annual San Francisco Women’s Policy Summit, hosting networking events and striving to cultivate partnerships with other women’s organizations.  We also host some excellent parties throughout the year. 

Most of all, we seek to elevate the political conversation toward issues important to equality and gender parity.  Women make up over half of society and thus, women must be equal partners in all areas of the political process. See our Policy site for more information. 

SFWPC is multi-party, general purpose committee run by a volunteer Board of Directors that meets every month. 

SFWPC Values

Professionalism
Integrity
Collaboration
Political Pragmatism & Savvy
Inclusion
Equity
Grace
Strength
Vision
Financial Responsibility
Ethical Conduct

Name: DRJUG (e.V.), German-Russian Youth Initiative (NGO)
Description: DRJUG e.V. is a voluntary German-Russian youth association that aims to connect young people from Germany and Russia and thus contribute to long-term European peace. The association was founded in 2011 by the alumni of the German-Russian Youth Parliament and has since developed into one of the central civil society actors in German-Russian relations. It is characterized by bilateral and multilateral youth exchanges with Russia, Poland and Ukraine, organized by young adults for young adults.

Description: Prefeitura Municipal de Paiçandu

Name: California Women's List
Description:
California Women’s List (CWL) is a Political Action Committee that endorses, fundraises for, and elects women to public office in California. Our mission is to elect women who will make California more just and equitable for all.

We endorse, fundraise for, and elect women to public office in California.
We engage a robust network of donors to actively support our endorsed candidates. We energize the next generation of women donors to make their voices heard.

We support candidates who champion policies that dismantle systems of oppression. We seek the perspectives of individuals from diverse cultures and identities, acknowledge and learn from the histories of communities of color, the LGBTQ+ movement, and more.

We are an intersectional feminist organization. All issues are women’s issues; we also continue to advance reproductive rights, equal pay, and equitable representation.

Name: Route66
Description: Route66 is een intensief persoonlijk ontwikkelingsprogramma voor en door nieuwsgierige D66’ers van tussen de 25 en 33 jaar oud. Het programma duurt twee jaar: ieder jaar ronden twintig deelnemers het traject af en stromen twintig nieuwe Routers in. Er zijn in totaal dus veertig Routers en alle activiteiten organiseren zij zelf. De Routers verdiepen zich in politieke onderwerpen, ontwikkelen politieke vaardigheden en verbreden hun sociale netwerk binnen en buiten D66. Lees op de website ervaringen van (oud)Routers of bekijk op Youtube video’s over Route66.

Name: Oregon NORML
Description:
We are dedicated to promoting positive legal, social, and political change with information and action in support of cannabis (marijuana) and the many adults who use it.

At Oregon NORML, we are leading the fight for commonsense regulation of the most useful plant ever known to mankind -- cannabis hemp. We stand for the safe protected medicinal use of marijuana by patients legally enrolled in the Oregon Medical Marijuana Program. We stand for the industrial use of hemp to provide food, fuel, and fiber for America and a viable cash crop for Oregon farmers. We stand for the regulated private use of cannabis by adults. Most importantly, we work to reform state and federal laws regarding marijuana and bring an end to the harassment, arrest, and imprisonment of responsible taxpaying American citizens.

Name: Lone Conservative
Description:
Lone Conservative offers a platform for students, by students, to share their thoughts on politics, current events, and conservative campus culture. Our audience is those in college, just out of college, or even those about to enter college. In an academic world in which liberalism abounds and insanity is a daily occurrence, it can be hard to be a campus conservative. If you've encountered something on campus that you find illogical, nonsensical, or just plain weird, we want to hear about it. Whether you’re a campus conservative feeling insecure about your ideology or repressed from speaking your mind, or a graduate hoping to better network with other young conservatives, we hope to be a new home for you.

Sixty years after William F. Buckley stood athwart history, we intend to create a form of American conservatism for the new millennium: one which is undergirded by principles from time immemorial, but yet responsive to what our nation is confronted by in the present day. Almost two centuries after Benjamin Disraeli conceived of one nation conservatism for the United Kingdom, we work to create a uniquely American one nation conservatism for our nation.

History is made by those who show up, and we invite you to join us in translating timeless principles – respect for life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness – into defining what our generation’s one nation American conservatism will be.

Name: D66 Haarlem
Description: De LinkedIn pagina van D66 Haarlem.

Name: Jersey Alliance
Description:
We are an alliance of like-minded people from diverse & experienced backgrounds.
We have come together with the common aim to make Jersey work better for all sectors of society. Members are experienced sitting Ministers and new candidates.

Name: KSU - Kunsill Studenti Universitarji
Description: The Kunsill Studenti Universitarji (University Students’ Council) is the oldest national student union in Europe. KSU was founded by Arturo Mercieca (later Chief Justice Sir Arturo Mercieca) in 1901, as the Comitato Permanente Universitario. The student union involved itself in student politics as well as national politics. KSU represents all students attending the University, Junior College, the Institute of Health Care, Medical School and the Malta Centre of Restoration – on both a national and international level.

Name: Bordeaux Nouvelle Voie
Description:
Bordeaux Nouvelle Voie : bougeons Bordeaux dans le bon sens. 
Bordeaux Nouvelle Voie est un mouvement indépendant porté par Mickaël Baubonne.
Notre cap : construire une ville fluide, accessible, plus saine — grâce à un métro structurant et un projet de territoire ambitieux.
Une alternative citoyenne, libre, fondée sur le bon sens et la clarté.
 Rejoignez le mouvement : bordeauxnouvellevoie.fr

Name: Centralforeningen for Stampersonel
Description:
Central association of permanent defence personnel

The Danish Central Association of Permanent Defence Personnel – colloquially referred to as CS – is the largest defence personnel organisation with about 7,500 members.


CS holds the collective bargaining rights for permanent personnel employed under the Danish Ministry of Defence, including the army, the air force, the navy and the rescue services. The object of the organisation is to safeguard the professional interests of its members and ensure that the financial, social, employment, training and health and safety conditions of each member comply with the collective agreement concluded with the employer.


In addition, CS must contribute to and ensure that, within the defence, the conditions of permanent personnel undergo a positive development and that the spirit of community is strengthened among CS members.


The work of CS is based on the following core values:
• High level of specialist knowledge and skill to match the demands and level of the surrounding society 
• Visibility in everyday media to promote the interests of CS members
• Solidarity and unity as well as reciprocity in union-related obligations 
• Accountability relative to what members, cooperation partners and employees expect from a professional union


CS is a member of the Central Organisation of 2010 (CO10), which is a negotiating association and umbrella organisation for a large number of professional unions with roughly 40,000 members in total – all employed in or retired from positions under the Danish state. www.coii.dk


CS is a member of the Salaried Employees’ and Civil Servants’ Confederation (in Danish abbreviated FTF). FTF is the central organisation of 81 professional unions, counting more than 450,000 members. www.ftf.dk

Name: Partai Solidaritas Indonesia
Description:
Partai Solidaritas Indonesia adalah kekuatan politik baru yang ingin mengembalikan politik ke tempat yang terhormat. PSI lahir dari kesadaran bahwa politik adalah sebuah tugas mulia untuk mewujudkan kebahagiaan bagi semua orang.

Atas dasar itulah PSI bertekad mengakhiri sengkarut politik hari ini dengan mengembalikan politik kepada nilainya yang luhur. PSI ingin mendekatkan kembali politik dengan nilai-nilai kebajikan agar lahir NEGARAWAN yang seluruh pikiran dan tindakannya didasarkan atas kepentingan yang lebih besar untuk bangsa dan negara Indonesia, bukan sekadar kepentingan pribadi politik jangka pendek.

Name: Young Democrats of Illinois
Description:
YDI is the official youth organization for the Democratic Party of Illinois. Our mission is simple: help elect more Democrats. #YoungDemsIL

Contact Us: youngdemsofillinois@gmail.com

Name: Amaresh Rai (Politics Coach)
Description:
Hello! Do you want to win elections?

Then let's see if we are a quick fit

You want to excel in politics but:

→ You are unsure of how to contest.
→ You struggle to gain a strong support base.
→ You don't know how to campaign and win elections.
→ You follow politicians but are not able to learn from them.
→ Every night you plan to build your plan but don’t take action.

And the list goes on!

Believe me, I've been there and felt that!

That's why I want you to understand that:

 It's not about GAINING A FEW SUPPORTERS

 It's about BUILDING YOUR LOYAL VOTER BASE

So, I'm here to craft a personalized political strategy, so that you can win an election without any challenges.

---

But who am I to help you?

Well, here's my short story. When I was 25, I successfully managed a local campaign, leading to victory in the municipal elections. The campaign generated significant grassroots support and propelled my candidate to office.

Since then, I have been actively involved in politics, consulting and advising numerous political candidates and parties on their campaign strategies. I have helped them secure funding, build effective campaign teams, and engage with voters through targeted messaging.

---

You have two choices now:
Choice 1: Keep trying to figure it out through random advice.
Choice 2: Get a comprehensive political strategy based on your goals.

If you choose the "2nd Option":
→ Book a Qualification Call directly with me.

Cheers to the start of political success :)

Name: Gioventù Federalista Europea - GFE Italy
Description:
La Gioventù Federalista Europea (GFE) è il gruppo giovanile del Movimento Federalista Europeo (MFE) e la sezione italiana degli Jeunes Européens Fédéralistes (JEF). Le sezioni locali della GFE si trovano in tutto il territorio nazionale, con iscritti e militanti di qualsiasi cittadinanza e di età compresa tra i 14 e i 29 anni.

I principi a cui si richiama la GFE sono quelli contenuti nel Manifesto di Ventotene, elaborato nel 1941 dall'antifascista Altiero Spinelli, con la collaborazione di Ernesto Rossi e Eugenio Colorni. L'analisi e le proposte politiche contenute nel Manifesto si basano sulla presa di coscienza della crisi dello stato nazionale - ritenuto la causa principale delle guerre mondiali e dell'affermazione del nazifascismo - e sulla convinzione che solo il superamento della sovranità assoluta degli Stati attraverso la creazione di una Federazione europea avrebbe assicurato la pace in Europa. I valori della pace, della democrazia sovranazionale, dello stato di diritto, della solidarietà e della sussidiarietà ispirano quindi il lavoro della GFE. Ci battiamo per un'Europa unita.

La GFE è un'organizzazione autonoma dalle forze politiche tradizionali e non partecipa direttamente alle elezioni. Si basa sull'autofinanziamento e sul lavoro volontario dei militanti, i quali svolgono un ruolo di iniziativa politica mirante a mobilitare le forze politiche e sociali e tutti i cittadini sugli obiettivi strategici che di volta in volta consentono di avanzare verso la Federazione europea e, in prospettiva, verso la Federazione mondiale.

Name: Foreign Policy Youth Collaborative
Description: The Foreign Policy Youth Collaborative’s mission is to help teens become strong advocates for their unique political opinions and create long-term pathways to bridge the gap between politicians and teens across the political spectrum through a nonpartisan, moderated website created by teens for teens, centered around foreign policy utilizing education, conversation, and motivation.

Name: Taiwan Democratic Progressive Party Mission in the US
Description: U.S. office of Taiwan's Democratic Progressive Party (DPP)

Name: Die Mitte Kanton Zug
Description:
Wir spannen den Bogen - Wir setzen uns für einen erfolgreichen Wirtschaftsstandort ein, der Arbeitsplätze schafft und Wohlstand für alle Bürgerinnen und Bürger im Kanton Zug ermöglicht. Gleichzeitig streben wir einen attraktiven Lebensraum an, der bezahlbaren Wohnraum und eine hohe Lebensqualität bietet.

Unser besonderes Augenmerk gilt der Vereinbarkeit von Familie und Beruf. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, dass Eltern ihre familiären Verpflichtungen erfüllen und erfolgreich im Berufsleben stehen können. Dazu fördern wir flexible Arbeitsmodelle und gute Betreuungsangebote für Kinder.

Mit unserem Slogan "Wir spannen den Bogen" bringen wir unsere Vision und unseren Einsatz für eine florierende und lebenswerte Zukunft im Kanton Zug zum Ausdruck.

Name: Commonwealth Policy Center
Description:
The Commonwealth Policy Center (CPC) is dedicated to preserving the bedrock values of life, marriage, religious liberty, and fiscal responsibility in the Commonwealth of Kentucky. It affirms as stated in the Kentucky Constitution that our civil, political and religious liberties come from God.

To that end, it seeks to educate the general public, work for sound public policies, and influence elections on behalf of conservative candidates.

Name: Eurooppanuoret (JEF-Finland)
Description:
Eurooppanuoret is a politically and religiously unaffiliated youth organisation that unites youth from all over Finland to discuss, debate and influence EU affairs. Our aim is to bring the EU closer to the Finnish youth in a fun and interesting way.

Eurooppanuoret is a member of Young European Federalists Europe (www.jef.eu) and a sister organisation of the European Movement Finland, Eurooppalainen Suomi (www.eurooppalainensuomi.fi).

Our membership is open to all Finns under 35 years of age. We arrange various activities to promote awareness about EU-related issues, take part in the work of JEF-Europe and promote pro-EU campaigns in Finland. Eurooppanuoret is also the publisher of the Finnish EU-magazine "Tähdistö".

Name: ADOS Advocacy Foundation
Description:
ADOS Advocacy Foundation is a grassroots organization with members and chapters nationwide advocating for reparations for American Descendants of Slavery (#ADOS) and a transformative Black agenda to address discrimination against all Black Americans.

Our Black Agenda is data-driven and reflects opportunities to improve the long-standing, dismal outcomes most notably manifested in the racial wealth gap.

Name: Not So Micro
Description:
Our organisation is dedicated to fostering inclusive school environments rooted in anti-racism, starting with addressing racial microaggressions.
#NotSoMicro

Name: City of Melfort
Description:
Melfort is a safe, friendly, and thriving community of 6,000 residents. The residents enjoy the amenities of a much larger city combined with affordable living options, excellent schools, post-secondary educational facilities, a new Wellness Centre.

Melfort has excellent cultural institutions and exceptional recreation and leisure services. The Northern Lights Palace, rink and swimming pool complex is a first-rate facility rivalled by few others. It contains a 1,800-seat arena and a swimming pool with a water slide and wave pool, one of only a few in the entire province. The Kerry Vickar Centre is a multi-purpose facility containing the CJVR Performing Arts Theatre, the Sherven-Smith Art Gallery and Swartout Hall, which doubles as a gymnasium. Spruce Haven Recreation Area comprises a ballpark, 15,000 sf skatepark, walking paths, splash park, accessible playground, regulation soccer pitches, community garden, labyrinth, picnic area. 

Our municipal workforce offers diverse employment opportunities. The City strives to be an employer of choice, offering competitive wages and benefits. Please review our current employment opportunities at www.melfort.ca/p/human-resources

Name: Federación Galega de Municipios e Provincias FEGAMP
Description:
A Federación Galega de Municipios e Provincias (FEGAMP) é unha entidade asociativa constituída polos 313 concellos galegos, as 4 deputacións provinciais e as 9 entidades locais menores existentes no ámbito territorial de Galicia.

A Fegamp naceu en 1988 co obxectivo de promover, representar e defender os intereses dos organismos locais galegos. Con sede única en Santiago de Compostela, a Fegamp conta cun corpo administrativo propio e cuns órganos de goberno que se renovan cada catro anos en función do mapa político municipal galego.

Name: dbb jugend nrw
Description: Die dbb jugend nrw ist ein gewerkschaftlicher Jugenddachverband für junge Beschäftigte im Öffentlichen Dienst von Nordrhein-Westfalen

Name: Team IG Metall MAN
Description: Die IG Metall ist eine starke Gemeinschaft, sie unterstützt und bietet Rückhalt für ihre Mitglieder. Von Rechtsschutz in arbeits- und sozialrechtlichen Angelegenheiten bis zu gerechten Löhnen und Gehältern - wir kümmern uns persönlich und zuverlässig um unsere Mitglieder.

Name: LGBT+ Conservatives
Description: The official affiliated lesbian, gay, bisexual and trans group of the Conservative and Unionist Party.

Name: Labour Society for Sport
Description: The Labour Society for Sport is the place where the Labour Party comes together with anyone seeking to make us a more active nation. Through our events and policy work we want to make sure that the power of sport, recreation and physical activity is fully harnessed to create a healthier and happier nation.

Name: Socialist Party USA
Description: The Socialist Party strives to establish a radical democracy that places people's lives under their own control -- a non-racist, classless, feminist, socialist society in which people cooperate at work, at home, and in the community.

Name: FRI - Foreningen for kjønns- og seksualitetsmangfold
Description:
FRI er en medlems- og interesseorganisasjon  for likestilling og mot diskriminering av personer som bryter med normer for kjønn og seksualitet i Norge og i resten av verden.

FRI har vært en tydelig stemme og en premissleverandør for lesbiske, homofile, bifile og transpersoners rettigheter siden  1950. FRI byttet i 2016 navn fra LLH - Landsforeningen for lesbiske, homofile, bifile og transpersoner. FRIs hovedvirksomhet er interessepolitisk arbeid og kompetansehevende arbeid i Norge. FRI arbeider også internasjonalt for rettighetene til lesbiske, homofile, bifile og transpersoner.

Name: Consulta delle Imprese ed Associazioni Professionali Forza Italia
Description:
La Consulta degli imprenditori e delle associazioni professionali è un organismo consultivo e propositivo mediante il quale Forza Italia rappresenta, valorizza e promuove in ambito politico ed istituzionale le libere organizzazioni impegnate in attività di supporto alle aziende di piccole, medie e grandi dimensioni. Attraverso questo strumento la Consulta intende ridurre la distanza tra politica e mondo delle imprese. 
Dialogo, raccolta delle istanze e rappresentatività sono i valori cardine della Consulta. I settori coinvolti sono:
 
• Industria 
• Servizi e Terziario 
• Turismo 
• Artigianato 
• Agricoltura
• Energia e Gas
 
Lavorando fianco a fianco con imprenditori, associazioni professionali e di categoria siamo in grado di proporre un modello credibile d’interlocuzione e confronto, perseguendo l’obiettivo di offrire un aiuto concreto alle attività imprenditoriali attraverso un sostegno alle loro istanze.

Name: Change Corps
Description:
A one-year immersion in organizing for social change

New organizers need a place to start and make their mark on issues they’re passionate about. That’s why we launched Change Corps, a paid, one-year, full-immersion training program in grassroots organizing. Change Corps organizers will spend their year working on three to five campaigns in as many places around the country. When their training is complete, they’re ready for a social change job with real responsibility, and we help place them into leading organizations and campaigns. Together, we’re building a movement with a pipeline of emerging new organizers and leaders to push and prod our country forward. 

ARE YOU IN?

Name: cd&v Vlaams Parlement
Description: Onze Vlaamse fractie telt 19 leden. Zo zijn we de tweede grootste fractie in het Vlaams Parlement. Dankzij het vertrouwen van de Vlaamse stemmer hebben we zo ook een plaats in de regering. Van onze fractie mag je expertise en een professionele aanpak van het parlementair werk verwachten. Hoewel scherp als het moet, handelen onze volksvertegenwoordigers steeds met het nodige respect voor de gesprekspartner.

Name: De Rotterdamse VVD
Description: Dit is de officiële pagina van de Rotterdamse VVD.  Volg ons om op de hoogte te blijven van onze fractie in de Rotterdamse gemeenteraad.

Name: Ade For Trinity Seanad
Description: Ade Oluborode is a practising Barrister-at-Law, a committee member of Comhshaol, the Climate Bar Association, and a member of the Advisory Committee on the Future of Equality Legislation of the Irish Human Rights and Equality Commission. She stood as an independent candidate in the Trinity Seanad By Election. Further details available on her  website. Please, feel free to get in touch with her directly.

Name: NOVO Paraná
Description:
Página oficial do diretório do Partido Novo no estado do Paraná.
O Partido Novo (NOVO) é resultado da iniciativa de pessoas comuns com um mesmo objetivo: devolver poder ao cidadão e assim melhorar a vida das pessoas.

Name: Europeisk Ungdom
Description: Tverrpolitisk ungdomsbevegelse som kjemper for mer europeisk samarbeid.

Name: Partido NOVO Rio Grande do Sul
Description:
NOVO é um movimento que foi iniciado por cidadãos insatisfeitos com o montante de impostos pagos e a qualidade dos serviços públicos recebidos.

Este grupo de pessoas nunca havia se candidatado a nenhum cargo eletivo, mas concluiu que um partido político seria a ferramenta democrática adequada para realizar as mudanças desejadas e necessárias.

Analisando os partidos políticos existentes, concluíram que nenhum deles defendia claramente a maior autonomia e liberdade do indivíduo, a redução das áreas de atuação do Estado, a diminuição da carga tributária e a melhoria na qualidade dos serviços essenciais, como saúde, segurança e educação.

Em razão desta constatação, optaram pela formação de um novo partido político.

DECLARAÇÃO DE PRINCÍPIOS DO NOVO

A vida em sociedade é necessariamente política, pode-se escolher entre ser governante ou ser governado. Contudo, não se pode fugir da organização política da sociedade, nem deixar de usufruir ou sofrer as consequências dela.

Um Governo Democrático deve defender os direitos individuais, a liberdade de expressão, a transparência, a excelência da administração pública e o desenvolvimento socioeconômico sustentável é a forma adequada de construirmos uma sociedade justa.

Os recursos do Governo são limitados, por isso acreditamos que governar é definir prioridades, sempre buscando a dignidade do governante e do governado. Com direitos e deveres recíprocos e recíprocas prestações de contas.

Para nós a gestão eficiente é a que separa o patrimônio público do privado, respeita a ambos e distribui os respectivos benefícios com medidas de honestidade. E que, sobretudo, seja consciente de que os impostos arrecadados custam caro à sociedade, portanto tudo deve ser planejado a curto, médio e longo prazo, valendo-se do desenvolvimento do conhecimento humano para buscar solução adequada e a custo razoável, para os principais desafios sociais. Gestão eficiente só se faz com gestores eficientes.

Acreditamos que numa sociedade organizada
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Fuse Washington
Description:
Fuse is the state's largest progressive organization - people creating change online, on the ground, and on issues that matter. 

Our goals at Fuse are to help progressives win more often and give ordinary people a strong voice in politics. We aim to provide organizing and communications power that helps progressives win critical issue and electoral campaigns in the present, while strengthening the foundation for increased success over time.

Name: Namdal Næringsforening
Description:
Namdal Næringsforening representerer de ulike bransjene på aktuelle arenaer og er en aktiv medspiller i samarbeidet med Namsos kommune og andre offentlige aktører. Namdal Næringsforening dekker store deler av Namdalen fra kyst til fjell. Vi jobber tett med både politisk og administrativ ledelse i alle Namdalskommunene, og vi har en egen samarbeidsavtale med Namsos kommune. 

Namdal Næringsforening er en frittstående og selvstendig organisasjon som har som formål og fremme næringslivet i regionen, og slik bidra til økt verdiskapning i eksisterende bedrifter og et bedret grunnlag for nyetableringer.

Name: ChristenUnie Barneveld
Description:
De ChristenUnie in Barneveld is een politieke vereniging die als primaire taak en verantwoordelijkheid ziet, het meebesturen en vormgeven van de Barneveldse samenleving. Ze wil dit invullen door samen te werken met lokale organisaties en personen om zo faciliterend te kunnen zijn voor het werk van de fractie en betrokken te zijn op alles wat er in de Barneveldse samenleving leeft.

De ChristenUnie Barneveld doet dit werk vanuit de Bijbelse normen en waarden. De leden en de fractie willen dit uitstralen door actief, dynamisch, betrouwbaar en betrokken te staan in de wereld. De secundaire verantwoordelijkheid van de vereniging is gericht op de provinciale en landelijke politiek, hierin participeert ze conform de landelijk afspraken binnen de ChristenUnie.

Name: PvdA Amsterdam
Description:
De PvdA Amsterdam is een sociaaldemocratische politieke partij. Tijdens de gemeenteraadsverkiezingen van 2022 kleurden we Amsterdam rood met Marjolein Moorman als lijsttrekker.

Wil je meer weten of heb je vragen? Wil je lid worden of je steentje bijdragen aan een socialere stad? Check dan onze website.

Name: Ministry of Economic Development and Poverty Reduction of the Republic of Uzbekistan
Description:
The Ministry of Economic Development and Poverty Reduction is a government body responsible for the development and implementation of long-term strategy and integrated development programs, conducting a well-thought and balanced socio-economic policies

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/mineconomy.uz

Name: MPower Change
Description: MPower Change is a grassroots movement rooted in diverse Muslim communities throughout the United States who are working together to build social, spiritual, racial, and economic justice for all people.

Name: New York State Young Democrats
Description:
The New York State Young Democrats are the official youth arm of the New York State Democratic Committee. The New York State Young Democrats represent young democrats between the ages of 16-36 living in all of New York's 62 counties. Members of the organization strive to make a positive difference in the community by working within the political process and upholding the principles of the Democratic Party. The membership base reflects the broad diversity of New York and the party, including high school students, college students, young workers, professionals and families.
 
NYSYD works to:

          o Elect Democratic Candidates
          o Encourage youth involvement in the Democratic Party
          o Support the ideals of the Democratic Party at all levels of government
          o Instill young people with the values for which the Democratic Party stands
          o Provide young people with the skills and experiences they will need to lead our nation

Name: CDA Vrouwen
Description:
Vrouwen aan tafel bij het CDA – economisch sterk, evenredig vertegenwoordigd, veilig en inclusief.

CDA Vrouwen zet zich in voor gelijkwaardigheid tussen vrouwen en mannen en voor een verantwoordelijke samenleving. Wij ondersteunen vrouwen in hun politieke ambities en persoonlijke ontwikkeling en werken aan:

Economische zelfstandigheid – vrouwen in staat stellen op eigen benen te staan.

Gelijke vertegenwoordiging – vrouwen laten meebeslissen op alle niveaus van politiek en bestuur.

Een veilige en inclusieve samenleving – iedereen een stem en een plek geven.

We onderhouden nauwe banden met andere politieke vrouwenorganisaties, zijn actief in het Politiek Vrouwen Overleg en op internationaal/Europees niveau in EPP Women.

Name: BNHO e.V.
Description: Niedergelassene Ärtzinnen und Ärzte mit der Fachrichtung Hämatologie und Onkologie bieten in ihren Schwerpunktpraxen Spitzenmedizin, sind engagiert für ihre Patientinnen und Patienten da und koordinieren die gesamte Versorgung innerhalb ihres interdisziplinären und sektorübergreifenden Netzwerkes

Name: Conservatives Abroad
Description:
Conservatives Abroad is the British Conservative Party’s global network of members and supporters living overseas.

We foster international engagement to deliver overseas Conservative votes and compliant donations.

We have members in 114 countries and territories and representatives in 54.

#ConservativesAbroad

Name: Ministry of Art, Culture and the Creative Economy
Description: Federal Ministry of Arts, Culture and The Creative Economy of Nigeria

Name: Lokaal Brabant
Description:
Lokaal Brabant is eind 2014 opgericht door een aantal lokale politieke partijen. Zij merkten in de praktijk hoe moeilijk het is voor lokale partijen om onderwerpen onder de aandacht te brengen bij het provinciebestuur. Daaruit is het idee ontstaan om lokale partijen te verenigen en samen een ingang te creëren in het provinciehuis in Den Bosch.

Lokaal Brabant is een paraplu-partij voor lokale, politieke partijen. Vanuit een overkoepelende, niet-sturende rol laat Lokaal Brabant de stem van lokale politieke partijen horen in Provinciale Staten van Noord-Brabant. Lokaal Brabant doet dit vanuit de kracht van onderop, zonder tussenkomst van een landelijke partij in de Tweede Kamer.

Name: New Hampshire Democratic Coordinated Campaign
Description:
For more than 200 years, Democrats have represented the interests of working families, fighting for equal opportunities and justice for all Americans.
 
Our party was founded on the conviction that wealth and privilege shouldn’t be an entitlement to rule and the belief that the values of hardworking families are the values that should guide us.
 
We didn’t become the most prosperous country in the world by rewarding greed and recklessness or by letting those with the most influence write their own rules. We got here by rewarding hard work and responsibility, by investing in people, and by growing our country from the bottom up.
 
Today, Democrats are fighting to repair a decade of damage and grow an economy based on the values of Main Street, not greed and reckless speculation. Democrats are focused on rescuing our economy not just in the short run but also rebuilding our economy for the long run—an economy that lifts up not just some Americans, but all Americans.

Name: Aam Aadmi Party Uttar Pradesh
Description:
A new political alternative in India to give voice to common wo/man who is being cheated, terrorized and looted by all of the current political parties.
The new alternative is about giving power to the people, changing the culture of corrupt politics, promote transparency and pursue grassroots democracy both within and outside the organization.


Facebook Account --https://www.facebook.com/AAPUttarPradesh
Twitter Account -- https://twitter.com/AAPUttarPradesh

Forbundet ble etablert 12. juni 1993, og er tilsluttet hovedorganisasjonen Unio.

Name: Jungfreisinnige Kanton Bern
Description:
Die Jungfreisinnigen Kanton Bern (JFBE) sind die aktivste Jungpartei im Kanton Bern mit über 600 Mitgliedern und Sympathisanten zwischen 16 und 35 Jahren. Wir mischen die Politik auf kantonaler, aber auch eidgenössischer und kommunaler Ebene mit neuen Ideen auf. Wir sind einerseits den Jungfreisinnigen Schweiz angeschlossen, die auf eidgenössischer Ebene politisieren; andererseits sind die JFBE in lokale Sektionen aufgeteilt.

Leider wird Freiheit wird in der Schweiz oft als Selbstverständlichkeit betrachtet. Doch gerade die Entwicklungen in den letzten Jahren zeigen einen klaren Trend weg von mehr Freiheit und Eigenverantwortung zu immer mehr staatlicher Intervention und Bevormundung. Auch die Entwicklungen ausserhalb der Schweiz und Europa zeigen, dass die freie Welt immer stärker unter Druck gerät. Aus diesem Grund braucht es in der Schweiz und speziell im Kanton Bern dringender denn je eine starke liberale Kraft, die sich für eine freie und selbstbestimmte Gesellschaft einsetzt und daran glaubt, dass die Bevölkerung in erster Linie auf sich selbst vertraut und für eigene individuelle Lebensentwürfe einsteht.

Im Zweifel entscheiden wir uns immer für MEHR FREIHEIT und WENIGER STAAT.

Die nächste Generation von freisinnigen Politikerinnen und Politikern will Verantwortung übernehmen und den Kanton Bern der Zukunft mitgestalten. Wir sind die Nachwuchsorganisation und Talentschmiede der Freisinnigen Partei im Kanton Bern. Für uns ist es keine Selbstverständlichkeit, in diesem wunderbaren Land aufzuwachsen und zu leben. Aus diesem Grund wollen wir der Gesellschaft etwas zurückgeben und für die Entwicklung unserer Zukunft einzustehen. Es braucht dringend junge Menschen, die sich politisch engagieren. Denn die direkte Schweizer Demokratie ist einzigartig und ein grossartiges Privileg. Sie basiert allerdings auf freiwilligem Engagement von verantwortungsbewussten Bürgerinnen und Bürgern. Ohne dieses Engagement funktioniert das System nicht mehr.

Name: Delaware Democratic Party
Description:
The Delaware Democratic Party is the affiliate of the Democratic Party in the state of Delaware, headquartered in unincorporated New Castle County.

The Delaware Democratic Party is one of the two biggest parties in the state of Delaware (the other being the Republican Party) and has existed since the Jacksonian Democrats broke away from the Federalists in 1825. Besides their most prominent current political figure, Vice President Joe Biden, the party has occupies all federal seats for the state in Congress and currently has majority control over the state legislative and executive branch.

Through education and awareness, we strive to empower you, the taxpayer, to take control of your rights and influence the momentum of ballots and initiatives supportive of your rights.

Name: Akbayan Party
Description:
After twenty years of dictatorship under the Marcos regime, formal democracy in the Philippines was restored in 1986 through a broad "people power" movement. This democracy, however, proved to favor only the political and economic elite of the country. The moving force behind the anti-dictatorship struggle--concerned citizens and progressive groups--has been relegated to the periphery of decision-making and policy implementation. In response, social movements, trade union groups, and political organizations have emerged to challenge state policies through lobbying and pressure politics.

Despite the dynamism of Philippine movements, formal institutions of democracy remained in the hands of the few and the wealthy. It was within this context that the idea of building an alternative, a citizens' political party, first emerged. Social movement groups wanted to be part of the formal processes of government. Akbayan was thus conceived as an effort to institutionalize people power and thereby deepen Philippine democracy.

Consultations on the party-building project began in 1994. Throughout the country, pro-democracy groups were enjoined to help shape the party concept and strategy. Aspirations of various sectors--labor, peasants, youth, women, gay and lesbians, professionals, overseas Filipino workers, urban poor--were discussed and consolidated into a program of governance, while ad hoc structures were formed in Luzon, Visayas and Mindanao. Four years later, in January 1998, Akbayan was formally established through its Founding National Congress. In May of the same year, the new party tested its strength by participating in the local and party-list elections and won seats in the House of Representatives, and several local government units.

To date, Akbayan is the most vigorous and determined effort from the Philippine progressive community to break the hold of traditional politicians and political parties on Philippine politics.

Name: Deciding Matters
Description:
Deciding Matters is a small, independent, participatory democracy organisation supporting governments, communities and people to re-think power and shape the decisions that will impact them. We do this by running events, processes and workshops that bring policy-makers, experts and ‘typical’ decision makers together with the public and those affected. We are neutral and apolitical, working collaboratively to support inclusive and accessible deliberation. We advocate for longevity, sustainability, and accountability.

Name: Comsefaz
Description: O Comsefaz (Comitê Nacional de Secretários de Fazenda, Finanças, Receita ou Tributação dos Estados e do Distrito Federal) foi instituído pelo Protocolo de Cooperação Técnica de 28 de setembro de 2012, tendo como objetivo principal promover a integração e a articulação entre as Secretarias de Fazenda, Finanças, Receita ou Tributação dos Estados e do Distrito Federal, fortalecendo a gestão fiscal, financeira e tributária das respectivas unidades federativas. Tem por missão promover a integração das Secretarias de Fazenda, Finanças, Receita ou Tributação dos Estados e do Distrito Federal, e a articulação dos Estados com os demais entes federativos, atuando na defesa dos interesses das Fazendas Estaduais e do fortalecimento da gestão fiscal, financeira e tributária das unidades federativas. Tem atuado fortemente na discussão e formulação de ideias para uma Reforma Tributária que simplifique e modernize o modelo tributário, e contribua para um ambiente de negócios que favoreça os investimentos e o crescimento do país. Por meio de seminários, estudos e pesquisas, busca promover o debate, compartilhar experiências e conhecimento e difundir informações de natureza fiscal e tributária, a fim de levar ao aperfeiçoamento federativo fiscal do Brasil.

Name: New Organizing Institute
Description: We're a community of organizers, and we're committed to solving the biggest challenges that stand in the way of change. Our basic belief is simple: if people have the skills to engage others, the tools to build powerful campaigns, and a community of practice to help them learn and grow, they can win real change, make measurable improvements in people's lives, and restore faith in our government and our democracy.

Name: Dansk Træforening
Description:
Dansk Træforening er et branchefællesskab med dybe rødder - de rækker helt tilbage til 1893, da Dansk Træhandlerforening blev etableret. En fusion med Foreningen Danske Trælastimportører i 1991 endte ud i skabelsen af Dansk Træforening. 

Foreningen samler danske og udenlandske virksomheder med væsentlig import af træ til Danmark. Vi er sat i verden for at varetage medlemmernes kollektive interesser, herunder i forhandlinger med danske og udenlandske myndigheder.

Vores medlemmer har alle forpligtet sig til at overholde et sæt grundlæggende principper - en Code of Conduct - som en del af vores miljøpolitik.

Name: InvestHER
Description:
OUR MISSION
We are a network of young professionals who organize fundraising and networking events for pro-choice women running for office.

We aim to empower young people to take part in the democratic process by investing in women candidates.

HOW IT WORKS
InvestHER holds monthly networking events and fundraisers for pro-choice women candidates running for office. These events will take place on the first Thursday of each month. For fundraising events, each attendee agrees to make a $50 donation ($25 for students) directly to the candidates. These events provide a powerful networking opportunity, not just with the women running for office, but also with the other young professionals near you! 

You can also become an InvestHER member by making an annual $120 donation (or $10/month). InvestHERs have special access to InvestHER events and receive exclusive InvestHER gear.

We also share candidate profiles, blogs, sister organization events, and more on our website.

OUR STORY
After the 2016 Presidential Election, InvestHER founders Jennifer Benson and Jordan Henry decided it was time to get involved. Inspired by the work of Electing Women, an organization that raises money for pro-choice women candidates running for Governor, United States Senate, and President, InvestHER was created to build a network of young professionals to raise money for women running for office.

Name: Steven Raga for New York State Assembly
Description:
Steven Raga proudly serves as Assemblymember for District 30, encompassing the neighborhoods of Woodside, Elmhurst, Maspeth, Middle Village, Jackson Heights, and Astoria.

With two decades of public service experience, Steven has served as Executive Director of the non-profit organization Woodside on the Move, as the Northeast Regional Manager for Policy & Advocacy for the Susan G. Komen Breast Cancer Foundation, the Chief of Staff for Assemblymember Brian Barnwell, and Senior Strategist for Multicultural Leadership at AARP.

He has previously sat on the boards of the Western Queens Community Land Trust, Queens LGBT Pride, National Federation of Filipino American Associations (NaFFAA), National Urban Fellows Alumni, and Pilipino American Unity for Progress (UniPro) which he founded in Woodside. Steven also served as a Member of Queens Community Board 2 and the Queens District Attorney’s Advisory Commission for Asian American Affairs.

Steven holds an MBA from Cornell University's S.C. Johnson Graduate School of Management, an MS in Healthcare Leadership from Weill Cornell Medicine, an MPA from CUNY Baruch, a Graduate Diploma in International Human Rights Law from the American University in Cairo, and an MPP and BA in Political Science from SUNY Stony Brook. He also holds a Professional Certificate in Global Affairs from the NYU Institute for Global Affairs, a Certificate in Philippines Studies from the University of the Philippines and graduated from the Harvard University Kennedy School of Government’s Senior Executives in State and Local Government program.

Name: Crossroads Campaigns
Description:
Crossroads Campaign Solutions is a political consulting firm capable of providing most any service a modern campaign or advocacy organization may need. Our staff is experienced in a variety of capacities, from local to national levels of campaigns and party organs. 

At Crossroads, we take care of the details. We do our homework to make sure our proposals will work in your environment. We stay in touch with you through every step of the process so there is constant feedback and strategy refinement to ensure the best result for your project. We dig to find the right tools and ideas for your campaign. We tailor our searches to your needs. 

Our work leads to results and to establishing the groundwork and tools for future projects whether or not Crossroads is involved.

Name: Vote Climate U.S. PAC
Description:
Vote Climate U.S. PAC works to elect candidates to get off fossil fuels, transition to clean, renewable, energy and reduce carbon pollution by putting a fee on carbon, in order to slow climate change and related weather extremes. 

Our national, climate change Voter’s Guide gives every incumbent and challenger for a seat in the U.S. House and U.S. Senate a – Climate Calculation – a score for voters to take to the polls in November. If Americans use and share our Climate Calculations, ranging from Climate Hero to Climate Zero, to vote climate, we could revolutionize the politics of climate change in a single election cycle. 

Including incumbents and challengers makes our Voter’s Guide unique. We include votes, but go beyond that to assess leadership, positions and putting a fee on carbon pollution, making our Voter’s Guide a standout. We will continuously update our Voter’s Guide, with your donation.

DP studerende (DPS) er sektionen for de studerende i Dansk Psykolog Forening. Alle studerende, der er medlem af DP, er automatisk medlem af DPS. Sektionen har ca 1.700 medlemmer fordelt på de fire universiteter i landet; København, Odense, Aarhus og Aalborg.

Name: One Nation
Description: Pauline Hanson's One Nation is a political party in Australia that emerged in 1997, led by the ever-entertaining figure of Pauline Hanson. One Nation presents itself as a right-wing populist party, known for its remarkable ability to stir controversy and generate heated debates. With a focus on immigration and nationalism, the party's platform often veers towards divisive rhetoric and alarmist claims. While advocating for tighter control over immigration and preserving Australian culture, One Nation has managed to spark eye-rolls and disbelief among many who question the feasibility and fairness of their proposals. Despite its penchant for grabbing headlines, the party has faced criticism for its policies and views that are often seen as out of touch with the realities and diverse nature of modern Australia.

La Garanzia Giovani (Youth Guarantee) è il Piano Europeo per la lotta alla disoccupazione giovanile. Con questo obiettivo sono stati previsti dei finanziamenti per i Paesi Membri con tassi di disoccupazione superiori al 25%, che saranno investiti in politiche attive di orientamento, istruzione e formazione e inserimento al lavoro, a sostegno dei giovani che non sono impegnati in un'attività lavorativa, né inseriti in un percorso scolastico o formativo.

Description:
Tėvynės sąjunga - Lietuvos krikščionys demokratai – didžiausia centro dešinės politinė jėga Lietuvoje. Tėvynės sąjunga buvo įkurta 1993 metais. 2008 m. partiją sustiprino prie jos prisijungę Lietuvos krikščionys demokratai.  

Lietuvos nepriklausomybę iškovojusio Sąjūdžio pradėtus darbus tęsia jauni, entuziastingi, idėjų kupini specialistai, įvairių sričių ekspertai ir politikai, kuriantys naują Lietuvą, kurioje gyventi gera visiems.  

Saugome patriotiškumo, pilietiškumo ir tvirtos šeimos vertybes. Tikime laisvu žmogumi, atsakingu už savo sprendimus, mylinčiu Tėvynę, gerbiančiu savo praeitį ir įgyvendinančiu ateities vizijas.

Raadsleden Kirsten Alblas en Bina Chirino zetten zich de komende vier jaar in de raad in voor een waardevol Utrecht. In het college zetelt Rik van der Graaf namens de ChristenUnie als wethouder met de portefeuilles Asiel en Integratie, Maatschappelijke Opvang en Beschermd Wonen, Samen voor Overvecht, Erfgoed (inclusief werven), Personeel en Organisatie en Wijk Overvecht.

Name: Williamson2020
Description:
There is a groundswell of people in America who are seeking higher wisdom. We are rich and poor, progressive and conservative, young and old. And what we share at this moment is deep concern — concern about the direction in which our country is headed, the assaults on our democratic foundations, and the erosion of our human values.

My campaign for the presidency is dedicated to this search for higher wisdom. Its purpose is to create a new political possibility in America — where citizens awaken, our hearts and minds are uplifted, and our democracy once more becomes a thing about which we can all feel proud. It is time for our generation to rise: to end an aberrational chapter in American history and begin a new one: a season of repair.

Twitter - https://twitter.com/marwilliamson

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/mariannewilliamson

Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/williamsonmarianne/

Description: The National Coffee Council (CONACAFE), is responsible to formulate, appove and evaluate the Honduran Coffee Policies and advive the Goverment in all matter of coffee value chain. The Council us a public -private institution, which is the highest regulatory authority in the Honduran Coffee Sector.

Name: Alliance of New York State YMCAs, Inc.
Description:
The Alliance of New York State YMCAs is comprised of 38 independent YMCAs and more than 135 YMCA branches, making up an extraordinary group of dedicated nonprofits working together to strengthen the communities in NY!

We are a grassroots-driven and governed organization that advocates and educates on behalf of the YMCA and its mission to promote youth development, healthy living and social responsibility. We diligently monitor legislative and regulatory issues and educate policymakers on all of the community services provided by YMCAs throughout the Empire State.

The Alliance serves member YMCAs by actively advocating, and functioning as a resource for Ys in the four strategic objectives of:

- Public Policy & External Relations
- Public Funding & Financial Resources
- Member Services
- Statewide Collaborations

Our association links the ambition of advocacy and public policy ingenuity with sound resources and tradition. Statewide YMCA collaboration benefits all YMCAs across the Empire State by providing a cohesive and unified structure established to preserve and enhance the YMCA mission.

Name: Manhattan Young Democrats
Description:

MYD is a member chapter of the New York State Young Democrats and the Young Democrats of America, the youth outreach arm of the Democratic party.

Name: Field Strategies

Name: Crimson Goes Blue
Description:
Crimson Goes Blue is a growing community of Harvard alums and faculty committed to protecting American democracy. Founded in 2019, we’re mobilizing thousands in the Harvard community to elect Democrats, engage voters, and promote election integrity. 

We provide curated, high-impact and rewarding opportunities for activism with the community of Harvard alums. We also deliver fresh, trusted insights about the political landscape and exciting events for our members featuring Harvard's activists, academics and artists. Our community is creating a powerful movement together and having a great time doing it. 

If you're an alum of any Harvard program, please join us by visiting our website: https://www.crimsongoesblue.org

But don’t take it from us — here’s what some of our members have to say:

“Volunteering with CGB showed me how easy (and fun) it is to make a difference… and I got to do it hanging out with a bunch of talented Harvard friends new and old.”

“Crimson Goes Blue had exceptionally well-designed, maximum-impact volunteer opportunities that really utilized all of my skills.  This has been the best experience that I have had volunteering with any political action group.”

“Crimson Goes Blue inspired and fed my political engagement by providing me with well-chosen, well-organized and impactful opportunities to get actively involved in voting rights and campaigns.”

Description: The Save Darfur Coalition is an alliance of over 180 faith-based, advocacy and human rights organizations whose mission is to raise public awareness about the ongoing genocide in Darfur and to mobilize a unified response to the atrocities that threaten the lives of more than two million people in the Darfur region.

We're committed to ending the epidemic of chronic disease, cleaning up our toxic food supply, and ensuring that health policies never infringe on constitutional freedoms. Join us as we build a healthier future for every American.

Name: Mile End Institute
Description:
The Mile End Institute at Queen Mary University of London brings together politicians, policymakers, academics, and the public to discuss the major challenges facing British politics, policymaking and public life.

Established in 2015 under the patronage of Lord Hennessy of Nympsfield, the Mile End Institute has hosted hundreds of public events, produced research papers and policy briefings, and hosted dozens of Visiting and Honorary Research Fellows. 

We host public events at Queen Mary's Mile End campus including our flagship "Hennessy Lectures" which invited distinguished public figures to discuss the most pressing issues of the day. All of our events are free and open to all. You can find out more by visiting our website or subscribing to our mailing list!

Name: NovUM Maastricht
Description:
If you want to be politically active at Maastricht University, NovUM is for you!

If you believe in change, join us!
