Name: LSVD Berlin
Description:
The Lesbian and Gay Federation in Germany (Lesben- und Schwulenverband in Deutschland, or just LSVD) is a civil rights organisation representing the interests of lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and intersex people (LGBTI). Human rights, diversity and respect – we want LGBTI to be accepted and recognized as self-evidently belonging to everSpecific goals of the LSVD include lobbying for Germany’s Basic Law to extend constitutional protection against discrimination on grounds of sexual orientation and gender identity; programmes at federal and state level to promote acceptance and diversity; legal and social recognition of rainbow families; enforcement of the right to sexual self-determination; LGBTI-inclusive school curricula; refugee policies that provide both protection and opportunity to persecuted LGBTI people; and foreign and development policies that promote respect for the human rights of LGBTI people at EU and global level.

Specific goals of the LSVD include lobbying for Germany’s Basic Law to extend constitutional protection against discrimination on grounds of sexual orientation and gender identity; programmes at federal and state level to promote acceptance and diversity; legal and social recognition of rainbow families; enforcement of the right to sexual self-determination; LGBTI-inclusive school curricula; refugee policies that provide both protection and opportunity to persecuted LGBTI people; and foreign and development policies that promote respect for the human rights of LGBTI people at EU and global level.

The LSVD has since 1990 been fighting discrimination on grounds of sexual orientation and gender identity. Our Federation has been a major driver and enabler of changes in Germany: the introduction of same-sex marriage; the General Act on Equal Treatment; the final and complete removal of Section 175 from Germany’s statute books.

Name: APPG on Drones and Modern Conflict
Description: An all-party parliamentary group of MPs and Peers in the UK Parliament examining contemporary warfare, strengthening military oversight and the protection of civilians; chaired by Stewart McDonald MP and Baroness Stern CBE.

Name: Foro Madrid
Description: En defensa de la Libertad, la Democracia y el Estado de Derecho a ambos lados del Atlántico. Una iniciativa de Fundación Disenso.

Name: Donor Organizer Hub
Description: Donor Organizer Hub builds base for our movements through training, coaching, and convening everyday people to fundraise in their communities. We bridge the gap between building and funding the progressive ecosystem through volunteer fundraising teams, peer-to-peer and relational fundraising programs, and communities of practice.

Name: BDE e.V. Brussels Office
Description: BDE is the Federation of the German Waste, Water and Raw Materials Management Industry. Its 750 members account for a large portfolio of activities in the area of environmental services. These activities cover the entire value chain of the circular economy. The activities of BDE members range from the collection, sorting and recycling of waste, to the reintroduction of secondary raw materials and products recovered from recycling into the production cycle. The circular economy plays a significant role for environmental protection and the conservation of important resource. Today, one out of seven tonnes of raw materials used in Germany emanate from recycled materials. Entrepreneurship is at the heart of BDE: SMEs make up for more than 90 per cent of our membership. The industry is driven by highly-specialized family businesses with extensive regional roots.

Name: American Solidarity Party
Description: We are a party that seeks the common good, on common ground, through common sense. We believe in the sanctity of human life, the necessity of social justice, our responsibility to care for the environment, and promotion of a more peaceful world. We cherish the individual rights and separation of government powers protected by the U.S. Constitution, and recognize the need for social supports and community cohesion as modeled by a number of European governments or movements. We seek to bridge the bitter partisan divide with principled and respectful policies and dialog.

Name: Partij voor de Dieren Zuid-Holland
Description:
Een klimaatcrisis, een biodiversiteitscrisis, een stikstofcrisis, een wooncrisis, een watercrisis en een energiecrisis. Samen pakken we ze aan!

Om de grote problemen van deze tijd op te lossen, is lef nodig. Keuzes durven maken voor een planeet waar mens en dier in harmonie met elkaar en de natuur kunnen leven, ook in Zuid-Holland. Doe je mee?

Kies je voor meer natuur én meer betaalbare huizen?

Kies je voor een economie binnen de draagkracht van de Aarde? Kies je voor schoon water en een gezonde lucht? Kies je voor een partij die de natuur in Zuid-Holland koestert en opkomt voor de dieren die daar leven?

Je kunt kiezen voor duurzame keuzes. Voor een fijne, gezonde wereld voor alles en iedereen die nu leeft én voor de generaties daarna. Je kunt kiezen voor hen, die zelf nog niet kunnen kiezen.

Je kunt nu nog kiezen. Kies 6 juni Partij voor de Dieren bij de Europese Parlementsverkiezingen!

Name: Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam
Description: Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) translated asDravidian Progressive Federation is a political party in India, particularly in the state of Tamil Nadu and Union Territory of Puducherry. It is currently the Opposition party in Tamil Nadu and is part of the Indian political front the United Progressive Alliance (United Progressive Alliance). DMK is a Dravidian party, adhering to the social democratic and social justice principles of C. N. Annadurai and Periyar E. V. Ramasamy. It was founded in 1949 by Annadurai as a breakaway faction from the Dravidar Kazhagam (known as Justice Party until 1944) headed by Periyar E.V.Ramasamy.

Name: UnKoch My Campus
Description:
The Kochs and their vast network of front groups they fund work tirelessly to undermine the issues many students today care about: environmental protection, worker’s rights, healthcare expansion, racial justice, and quality public education. UnKoch My Campus partners with student activists to confront undue donor influence in higher education.

The Kochs have donated to hundreds of colleges and universities - 254 from their tax filings from 2005 - 2012 alone, 390 if you include schools listed on their taxes and more recent archives from their website.

But this isn't just philanthropy, we support and understand the critical role charitable donations play in higher education: there is mounting evidence to suggest that the Kochs are giving this money with strings attached. Their donations influence college research, the professors hired, and the coursework being taught, all in service of advancing their ideologies, building their reputation, and increasing their profits.

Of course, it isn’t just about the Kochs - it’s about accountability, transparency, and academic freedom. As unbelievable as it seems, multi-billionaire industrialists (through the power of their purse) are using your university to push their own philosophy, agenda, and economic interests.

But as students begin to recognize what’s happening and to fight back, we know the tide will start to turn. Collectively, you have tremendous power to uphold the principles of academic integrity over a corporate agenda. Whether you're a student or alum, you have a stake in your university and the education it provides.      
Individual campus campaigns have begun to recognize the gravity of corporate influence and the Kochs on their campuses. We are here to provide information, guidance, and support to campus leaders and graduates who would like to get involved in this work.

Name: Water Natuurlijk Hollands Noorderkwartier
Description:
Water Natuurlijk is de landelijke waterschapspartij die zich inzet voor natuur, landschap en recreatie.

In het waterschap Hollands Noorderkwartier is WaterNatuurlijk vertegenwoordigd met 3 bestuurders in het algemeen bestuur. Saskia Borgers is namens de fractie onderdeel van het dagelijks bestuur.

Elke dag weer zetten Water Natuurlijk bestuurders in Hollands Noorderkwartier zich in voor schoon, veilig, gezond en betaalbaar water. Samen werken we aan een betere leefomgeving voor mens en dier.

Name: Aarushi Sundriyal
Description: Mukhye Aacharya - Dhayandeep

Name: Schöne Aussichten Verband selbständiger Frauen
Description:
Vielfalt, Freude, Verbundenheit - das sind die drei Kern-Werte, die unseren Verband ausmachen.

In unserem Verband bringen wir einen großen Schatz an Wissen und Erfahrung zusammen. Hier triffst du Frauen im Alter von 40+ aus vielen Branchen von der Dienstleisterin bis zur Kreativen, Unternehmerinnen mit Gewerbe und Angestellten oder Solo. Alle von uns meistern täglich neue Herausforderungen, treffen Entscheidungen, bewältigen Berge, bringen Familie und Job unter einen Hut. 

Als Solo-Unternehmerin, Selbständige oder Freiberuflerin kämpfen wir oft allein. Es fehlt der Austausch, ein Netzwerk, ein Gegenüber. Suchst du eine kraftvolle Gemeinschaft, die dich ermutigt, in der du auch dein Wissen einbringen kannst? 

Hey, dann bist du bei uns genau richtig!

Genau dafür gibt es unser Netzwerk »Schöne Aussichten«. Wir packen die Themen an und schauen, wie wir neue Horizonte erreichen und unsere Unternehmen mit Tatkraft und Freude weiterentwickeln. Du hörst es schon in unserem Verbandsnamen. Wir gehen positiv ans Werk. Wir wollen richtig was schaffen. Mit viel Power, viel Herz, Seite an Seite voneinander lernen. Unser Fokus liegt auf Sisterhood und female empowerment.

Name: American Blockchain PAC
Description: We are the leading Political Action Committee supporting existing and new Federal candidates who are protecting the blockchain-crypto-digital assets ecosystem.

Name: Maricopa County Democratic Party
Description:
The Maricopa County Democratic Party (MCDP) is the Democratic Party of Maricopa County, Arizona. We represent hundreds of thousands of registered Democrats and over 1,500 Precinct Committee Members (PCs) in Maricopa County. 

MCDP works to elect Democrats to public office who embrace the values of the Democratic Party.

To further this mission, the MCDP:

    * Works to increase the number of registered Democrats
    * Recruits, trains, and promotes registered Democrats as candidates for elected office, support their campaigns and assists them in office
    * Works for and promotes accurate, transparent, and fair elections
    * Raises funds to support the above activities and to advance our mission
    * Conducts other activities as appropriate to strengthen and promote the aims and objectives of the Democratic Party
    * Works to increase voter participation

Name: Connecticut Republicans
Description: The mission of the Connecticut Republican Party is to promote Republican values and ideas, elect candidates that support and promote these values and ideas, and help them lead effectively based on our common principles.

Name: Eestimaa Rohelised | Estonian Greens
Description:
Erakond Eestimaa Rohelised on rohelisel ideoloogial põhinev Eesti erakond, mis asutati Tallinnas 25. novembril 2006. Erakonna moodustamisele eelnes Rohelise erakonna algatusgrupi töö.

Estonian Greens is an Estonian green political party.

Name: Freedom for All Americans
Description:
Our work brings together Republicans and Democrats, businesses large and small, people of faith, and allies from all walks of life to make the case for comprehensive non-discrimination protections that ensure everyone is treated fairly and equally.

With the ultimate goal of securing federal statutory protections for LGBTQ Americans, Freedom for All Americans works at the federal, state, and local level to advance measures and laws protecting from discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity and expression – without allowing overly broad and harmful religious exemptions that will encourage employers, business owners or others to choose to disregard those protections.

Opponents of non-discrimination laws are currently pursuing strategies to chip away at protections for the LGBTQ community and undermine the movement’s gains. We will push against these attempts to codify discrimination. However, it is not enough to merely take a defensive posture – we must take the fight on the offensive, with a multi-year initiative that seizes on our best opportunities to advance local and state-level victories. Throughout all of this work, we must also pursue a broad, ambitious initiative to educate Americans about who LGBTQ people are and why non-discrimination protections are so critical.

By building momentum across the country with state-level victories and comprehensive public education campaigns, we will create pressure nationally for the United States Congress to pass full federal protections for all LGBTQ people.

Name: ASLOCA Suisse
Description:
L'ASLOCA Suisse a son siège à Berne et oeuvre au niveau politique auprès des parlementaires, pour préserver un droit du bail équilibré, qui tienne compte de la réalité et des besoins des locataires.
Elle mène les actions politiques telles que lancement de référendums, pétitions et initiatives.

Name: Denver Families Action
Description: As Denver Families Action, we endorse and support candidates and issues that align with our values - educational equity, student success, and community engagement. Together, we strive to create an inclusive school district that prioritizes the well-being and success of every student.

Name: Accuracy in Media
Description: Accuracy in Media uses citizen activism and investigative journalism to expose media bias, corruption, and public policy failings. Our organization empowers individuals to hold journalists as well as public and private officials accountable, in order to achieve a well informed and free society.

Name: For All Families Oregon (FAFO) Action
Description: At Family Forward, we envision an Oregon where the unpaid and underpaid labor of caregiving is seen and valued. We build collective power and amplify the voices of parents and caregivers. In community, we pass policies for our families as we create more racial, gender and economic justice.

Name: People's Party of Canada
Description: Common sense policies that put Canadians first!

Name: FDP Mecklenburg-Vorpommern
Description: Wir sind die Freien Demokraten aus Mecklenburg-Vorpommern.

Description: Councilwoman Yassamin Ansari represents District 7 residents on Phoenix City Council. She is the youngest woman ever elected to the council and the first Iranian American elected to office in Arizona.

Name: Landschaftsinitiative
Description: Um den Bauboom ausserhalb der Bauzonen zu stoppen hat der Trägerverein «Ja zu mehr Natur, Landschaft und Baukultur» im März 2019 die Landschaftsinitiative lanciert. Der Trägerverein besteht aus Pro Natura, BirdLife Schweiz, dem Schweizer Heimatschutz, der Stiftung Landschaftsschutz Schweiz, casafair und dem VCS Verkehrs-Club der Schweiz. Die Landschaftsinitiative wurde am 8. September 2020 mit 105’000 Unterschriften bei der Bundeskanzlei eingereicht. Die offizielle Bestätigung der 104’487 gültigen Stimmen erfolgte am 16. Oktober. Darüber abgestimmt wird voraussichtlich nicht vor 2024.

Name: Sveriges Ungdomsråd
Description:
Sveriges ungdomsråds grundidé är att ungdomar ska, precis som vuxna, ha möjlighet att påverka sin egen vardag. Detta blir lättare genom att man organiserar sig. Ett ungdomsråd är en organisation av och för ungdomar i en viss kommun eller viss stadsdel. Ungdomsrådets verksamhet syftar till att göra livet bättre för sig själv och andra ungdomar i närsamhället. 

För att förverkliga vår grundidé behöver vi att landets kommuner och regioner är möjliggörare till ungas inflytande och organisering. Vi vet att viljan finns och vi vill hjälpa till! Därför erbjuder vi flera olika stöd till kommuner som vill utveckla sitt arbete med nya verktyg, skapa en annan struktur eller bara vill få inspiration och idéer.

Name: Norsk musikkråd
Description:
Norsk musikkråd er et samarbeidsnettverk og en interesseorganisasjon for musikklivet i Norge. Vi jobber for at alle skal ha mulighet til å utøve og oppleve musikk. Vi arbeider for å sikre bedre rammebetingelser for frivillige lag og organisasjoner i musikklivet lokalt, regionalt og nasjonalt.

Våre viktigste arbeidsområder:
- Å skape samarbeid mellom det frivillige musikklivet og resten av kulturlivet
- Å utvikle norsk musikkliv samtidig som vi sørger for at tradisjoner og kulturarv blir ivaretatt
- Informasjon og samfunnskontakt med det politiske systemet, myndigheter på alle plan, opinion og publikum 

Musikklivet består av mange aktører: Frivillige, offentlige, amatører og profesjonelle bidrar til at det skapes opplevelser i store og små lokalsamfunn over hele landet. Vi jobber for at flere skal få oppleve musikk og at de som utøver og fremfører musikk skal få muligheten til å utvikle seg.

Norsk musikkråd og Musikkens studieforbund er samlokalisert i Møllergata 39 i Oslo. Vi har regionsledd og lokale musikkråd over hele landet. Vi springer ut av det brede, folkelige musikklivet. Vi mener det organiserte musikklivet er en forutsetning for et vitalt og fremtidsrettet musikkliv. 

Organisasjonslivet skaper medvirkning og deltakelse. Musikklivet bidrar også til å fremme forståelse mellom mennesker som ellers ikke ville hatt kontakt. Det frivillige musikklivet er den viktigste rekrutteringskanalen til kultur, i samarbeid med det profesjonelle feltet og offentlige aktører. Sammen skaper vi gode musikkopplevelser. 

Musikk er bra for folkehelsen. Å benytte musikk som metode kan bidra til å finne balanse og mestring. Men først og fremst har musikken en egenverdi.

Name: Landsforeningen Skole & Bøger
Description: Landsforeningen Skole & Bøger er en politisk interesseorganisation, der arbejder for at sætte de pædagogiske læringscentre, læsning og dannelse højt på den politiske dagsorden. Udover foreningens politiske arbejde, afholder den to årlige konferencer om børnelitteratur og et stort årsmøde, hvor relevante emner hvert år tages op. Foreningen udgiver desuden et tidsskrift 'Børn & Bøger' otte gange årligt med inspirations materiale, forskning og debat. Foreningen har også udgivet en lang række andre udgivelser gennem årene og deltager med jævne mellemrum i forskningsprojekter.

Name: Coalition for the Sahel
Description: La gravité de la crise que connait le Sahel, le sentiment d’urgence, l’importance des besoins nécessitaient une action plus forte, plus solidaire. C’est l’objet de la Coalition pour le Sahel. Donner une réponse plus collective aux défis de la région sahélienne, en rassemblant les actions conduites par les Etats du G5 Sahel et leurs partenaires internationaux. Ils forment ensemble une communauté d’intérêts mutuels, respectant les normes et valeurs des Nations unies.

Name: Planned Parenthood Advocates of Oregon
Description: Planned Parenthood Advocates of Oregon's mission is to advocate for public policy changes that will enhance and protect reproductive rights, and build support and accountability among our elected officials in Oregon.

Name: Indian National Congress (Rajasthan)
Description: The Indian National Congress represents the soul of India. In our 130-year journey, we led India's struggle for freedom, laid the foundations of a modern, secular republic, laid the foundations of most vibrant democracy and shaped India's transition into one of the biggest emerging economies of the world. We represent the hopes and aspirations of every Indian and are committed to our core beliefs, Voice, Opportunity and Empowerment of all Indians.

Name: AAPI Victory Alliance
Description:
AAPI Victory Alliance works to empower Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders, connecting AAPI communities and their leaders, to promote awareness and action for progressive AAPI causes.

We build AAPI political power across the country by providing education on progressive issues; creating and advocating for policies that affect our communities; and building alliances with organizations to help AAPIs exert their power and be the margin of victory at the local, state, and national levels.

We believe in a strong and diverse America. We stand up for the protection of civil and immigrant rights, access to quality education and healthcare, opportunities for economic growth that are mutually beneficial for business and labor, and the protection of the environment.

Name: CDU-Bürgerschaftsfraktion Bremen
Description: Die CDU Bürgerschaftsfraktion ist mit 24 Abgeordneten die stärkste Oppositionsfraktion in der Bremischen Bürgerschaft.

Name: MISS POLÍTICA
Description:
MISS POLÍTICA aborda política, sociedad y cultura desde una mirada sociológica, aplicando geopolítica y estrategia para líderes, profesionales y creadores de contenido.
Ofrecemos formaciones, asesorías y contenidos estratégicos para quienes buscan comprender y aplicar el poder en distintos ámbitos.

Name: De Eindhovense VVD
Description: De VVD is de Volkspartij voor Vrijheid en Democratie. Wij maken ons sterk voor veiligheid, werk en ondernemende mensen. Onze politieke ervaring maakt onze ideeën niet alleen goed doordacht, maar ook uitvoerbaar in de praktijk. De VVD streeft naar een kleine, slagvaardige overheid die garant staat voor een veilige en eerlijke samenleving, waar iedereen die hard werkt de ruimte krijgt om zijn of haar ambities te realiseren.

Name: La Politeka
Description:
La política tiene que evolucionar. Todos estamos cansados de los falsos discursos y de los malos políticos que nos representan. 

A través de la formación y capacitación política; trabajamos con diversos perfiles alrededor del mundo que suman a líderes sociales, candidatos o amantes en política, para brindarles bases sólidas en conocimiento práctico y teórico en la materia.

Name: Partido Conservador Colombiano
Description: Es una asociación libre de personas que comparten un pensamiento sobre la función política, una historia y una tradición. El nombre de Conservador, impuesto por Ospina y Caro, significa que quienes pertenecen al Partido desean conservar la civilización, la cultura y los valores esenciales de la nacionalidad.

Name: Onward Together
Description: Founded by Hillary Clinton, Onward Together is dedicated to lifting up emerging organizations and leaders who are fighting for our shared progressive values and defending our democracy. By supporting groups that are mobilizing voters, safeguarding voting rights, and recruiting candidates for office, we are committed to help build a fairer, more inclusive America for generations to come.

Name: Georgia Republican Party
Description:
Believing in the exceptionalism of America, the Republican Party is the party of   smaller, more efficient and accountable government; individual political, economic and religious liberty; fundamental dignity of life; and maximum opportunity for all.

David Shafer was elected State Chairman of the Georgia Republican Party on May 18, 2019.  It is incorporated as the Georgia Republican Party, Inc.  Its mailing address is Post Office Box 550008, Atlanta, Georgia 30355

Name: Young Liberals
Description:
We are the youth and student wing of the Liberal Democrats; we exist to fight for a Britain that is fair, free and tolerant based on our own values and principles of liberty and equality. We have a proud history dating back to the early 20th century championing radical and liberal thought.

Today you’ll find Liberal Youth societies up and down the country tirelessly campaigning on issues such as civil liberties and human rights. Our societies can be found in almost any town or university; wherever you go there'll be young people fighting to protect the poorest and most vulnerable in our society.

What separates us from the other youth and student groups? Other groups protest, Liberal Youth shapes policy. As active participants in the policy formation process of the Liberal Democrats, our voices are heard.

Name: Offentligt Ansattes Organisationer (OAO)
Description:
OAO arbejder for at sikre den størst mulige indflydelse på løn- og arbejdsvilkårene for medarbejderne i den offentlige sektor, gennem samarbejde og fælles udmeldinger.

Offentligt Ansattes Organisationer opstod i 2007 som en fusion af Det Kommunale Kartel (DKK) og Statsansattes Kartel (StK). 

I dag repræsenterer OAO  27 medlemsorganisationer, hovedsageligt LO-forbund, med ansatte på de offentlige arbejdspladser.

Name: Partido Digital
Description: Somos un partido político que busca mejorar la democracia aumentando la participación y transparencia apoyándose en la tecnología.

Name: OndernemendWater
Description:
Nadat de geborgde bedrijven zetels zijn opgeheven door een wetsvoorstel van D66 en Groenlinks (de achterban van Water Natuurlijk), hebben een aantal mensen initiatief genomen om OndernemendWater op te richten. Ondernemend water is niet politiek komt op voor de belangen van ondernemers en zet zich in voor een ondernemend waterschap. Speerpunten zijn:
# verstandig met geld omgaan
# een ondernemend waterschap wat werkt aan een circulaire economie
# slimme samenwerking met ondernemers
# afvalwater wordt grondstof en energie
# een efficiënte organisatie die bedrijfsmatig en doelmatig georganiseerd is
# Kernataken: veiligheid/dijken, en goed waterbeheer voor schoon en voldoende water
# We leven niet op de pof. onze schuldpositie is in balans en we schrijven zeker niet te lang af op ons bezit.
# waar mogelijk samen optrekken met gemeenten/provincie en slim meekopppelen van kansen om klimaatvernadering tegen te gaan. Dit mag niet leiden tot significant hogere waterschapslasten/belasting.
# we doen niet aan inkomenspolitiek. daar is het waterschap niet voor.
# We vinden duurzaamheid belangrijk bij het uitvoeren van onze 3 belangrijke taken: Waterveiligheid, voldoende en schoonwater, waterzuiveringen. vanuit de primaire taken doen we het goede. Hier werken we altijd vanuit een business case gericht op onafhankelijkheid, een terugverdientijd op termijn en productie van energie en grondstoffen die waarde opleveren. Ook water is grondstof.

Name: Texas Forward Party
Description:
We are everyday Texans uniting to create a government that works for the people. 

Are you frustrated with the two party system? Extreme views, ongoing culture wars, like your vote doesn’t matter? 

We feel your pain. Join us as we #TakeBackTexas

Name: San Francisco Democratic Party
Description:
The San Francisco Democratic Party represents voters who want to see fundamental change in our political system. With more than 330,000 members, we are one of the most active communities of Democrats in California. 

Learn more: https://linktr.ee/SFDemocrats

Name: Liberaler Mittelstand Bayern (LiM Bayern)
Description:
Wir fühlen uns dem liberalen Gedankengut verpflichtet und geben dem Mittelstand eine fundierte Stimme in den Kommunen und Bundesländern, in Berlin und auch auf europäischer Ebene in Brüssel.

Dadurch, dass einige unserer Mitglieder auch Funktionsträger und Abgeordnete in Parlamenten sind, können wir Ideen für eine zukunftsfähige und liberale Wirtschaftspolitik gezielt einbringen.

Wobei in erster Linie die freiheitlich-liberale FDP unser parlamentarischer Ansprechpartner darstellt.

Unsere Mitglieder und deren Unternehmen sind mit ihren Mitarbeitern und Auszubildenden die tragende Säule für die Standortsicherheit in Deutschland.

Wir setzen uns dafür ein, dass das auch so bleibt.

WIR WOLLEN ...
Mit unserer Kompetenz politisch etwas für den Mittelstand bewegen.
Unsere Vision
Mittelstandspolitik ist der Kern liberaler Wirtschaftspolitik, der Garant von Wohlstand, Fortschritt, hoher Beschäftigung und einer breiten Mittelschicht als Rückgrat der Gesellschaft. Die Leistungskraft des Mittelstands hat Deutschland stets aus wirtschaftlichen Krisen geführt. Heute wissen wir: Geht es dem Mittelstand gut, dann geht es Deutschland gut. Dafür brauchen politische Entscheidungen mehr Praxisnähe und Entscheidungsträger ein größeres Verständnis für die Bedeutung und die Anforderungen des Mittelstands.

Unser zentrales Leitbild ist dabei Freiheit als Selbstbestimmung und Übernahme von Verantwortung für sich selbst wie auch für Unternehmen und Mitarbeiter sowie die Gesellschaft insgesamt. Die Zusammengehörigkeit von Verantwortung und Haftung sind für uns selbstverständlich.

Name: FDP.Die Liberalen Kanton Bern
Description: Die liberale Kraft für den Kanton Bern.

Name: National Secular Society
Description: NATIONAL SECULAR SOCIETY is a company based out of Dutch House, 307-308 High Holborn, London WC1V 7LL.

Name: SC House of Representatives
Description: The South Carolina House of Representatives is the lower house of the South Carolina General Assembly. It consists of 124 representatives elected to two-year terms at the same time as U.S. congressional elections.

Name: Fugebranchen FSO
Description:
Fugebranchen, (FSO) er et videncenter etableret I 1980 af en kreds af professionelle fugeentreprenører og leverandører med særlig interesse indenfor anvendelse, udvikling og production af fuge-, klæbe- og tætningsprodukter.
FSO´s formål er jvf. FSO´s vedtægter:

Name: Alliance GloBâle
Description:
WER WIR SIND

Alliance GloBâle ist eine Initiative von Verbänden, Organisationen und Einzelpersonen, die sich für den EuroAirport und damit für die trinationale Wirtschafts- und Lebensregion Basel einsetzen. Sie wurde 2019 unter Federführung der Handelskammer beider Basel gegründet. 

Über 100 Destinationen machen uns international erreichbar und befriedigen Mobilitätsbedürfnisse von Millionen von Passagieren, egal ob als Geschäftsreisender oder als Privatperson. Hinzu kommt die wichtige Rolle des EuroAirports in der Logistik: Knapp 120'000 Tonnen hochwertige Güter wurden 2021 über ihn umgeschlagen. 

Im Fokus der Initiative stehen daher der Erhalt und die Weiterentwicklung des drittgrössten Flughafens der Schweiz. 

Denn der EuroAirport:

- ist als Schlüsselinfrastruktur zentral für die Erreichbarkeit der Region auf dem Luftweg,

- ist für die Anbindung des Standorts und daher für Wachstum und Wohlstand essentiell,

- ermöglicht den für unsere Region unabdingbaren internationalen Austausch,

- befriedigt Mobilitätsbedürfnisse von Millionen von Passagieren,

- ist ein unersetzbares Element in der Logistikkette.


UNSERE CHARTA

Als Unterstützer der Initiative setzen wir uns, im Rahmen unserer Möglichkeiten, stets für den Erhalt und die Weiterentwicklung des EuroAirports

1. als binationalen Flughafen, auf Basis des Staatsvertrags von 1949,

2. mit primär kontinentalen und interkontinentalen Verbindungen zu den wichtigen Wirtschaftszentren,

3. mit nachfragegerechten Infrastrukturausbauten,

4. mit einem nachhaltigen und marktorientierten Betriebskonzept ein.


WERDEN SIE TEIL VON ALLIANCE GLOBÂLE: www.alliance-globale.ch/mitmachen

Yukon Employees' Union is a dynamic organization headquartered in Whitehorse Yukon. Our union represents approximately 5000 members in over 20 bargaining units. We are a component of the Public Service Alliance of Canada, one of Canada's largest public sector unions.

We represent workers in every Yukon community, across a wide spectrum of careers. Name: De Bredase VVD
Description:
Liberal Party at the Netherlands with local branches. In Breda the VVD has 10 seats in the city council and heads the coalition. 

The Volkspartij voor Vrijheid en Democratie (People’s Party for Freedom and Democracy, VVD) is a political party founded on the liberal philosophy. Its aim is to further the free intellectual and social development of each individual, without making distinctions according to religious or ideological conviction, nationality, se*, race, colour of skin or language. 
The VVD is the largest political party in the Netherlands. At this moment, the VVD leads the opinion polls again, which bodes well for the forthcoming elections.

The VVD is a purely political grouping, unlike the ‘confessional’ parties whose political objectives are founded on religious convictions. What is more, the VVD also stands apart from the other non-confessional parties because it emphasises the free intellectual and social development of the individual. In its philosophy, the government is regarded as the servant of society.

The VVD believes that the government’s role is important, although not central, and it is not a goal in itself. In other words, the VVD wants everyone to have equal opportunities for development but, at the same time, it believes that those who earn more through hard work and those who develop their talents or take more responsibility upon themselves, should be better rewarded.

The VVD is a people’s party, a party that wishes to serve the interests of the Dutch nation as a whole. It is not, nor does it want to be the political spokesman of a certain segment of the population or special-interest groups. The VVD can therefore be considered as a truly national party, a party for all. During the general election in 2010, the VVD became the largest political party in the Netherlands, It became apparent from the results that VVD supporters can be found in nearly every segment of the population.

Description:
Der Bundesverband für selbständige Wissensarbeit e.V. (vormals ADESW) vereint führende Dienstleister für den projektbasierten Einsatz hochqualifizierter selbständiger Wissensarbeiter sowie hierzu assoziierte Partner. Die Mitgliedsunternehmen beschäftigen intern mehr als 4.500 festangestellte Mitarbeiter. Der Branchenumsatz mit selbständigen Wissensarbeitern beträgt im Jahr 2023 mehr als 15 Mrd. Euro.

Im Jahresdurchschnitt besetzen die Mitglieder des Bundesverbandes für selbständige Wissensarbeit e.V. gemeinsam mehr als 20.000 Projekte bei über 5.000 Unternehmen mit selbständigen Experten. By inspiring and engaging individuals and communities, HRC strives to end discrimination against LGBTQ people and realize the world that achieves fundamental fairness and equality for all.

The Human Rights Campaign envisions the world where lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and queer people are ensured equality and embraced as full members of society at home, at work, and in every community.

Name: Bruin Political Review
Description:
Bruin Political Review is the University of California, Los Angeles’ student-run, nonpartisan political journal. The review was founded in the summer of 2020 by five UCLA students, who realized that the university lacked a forum for students to engage with politics in a scholarly, analytical manner. As the number 1 ranked public university in the nation, UCLA was one of the few schools ranked in the top 50 that did not have a political review.

The Bruin Political Review publishes a quarterly journal that consists of articles split into two sections: US and world politics. The goal of the journal is to give writers and editors the opportunity to dive into political issues they are interested in, improve their writing skills, and elevate the political discourse on campus.

Name: BNC Berufsverband Niedergelassener Chirurgen
Description:
Der BNC ist der Berufsverband der freiberuflichen Chirurginnen und Chirurgen in Deutschland, deren Interessen er durch einen Bundesvorstand sowie 24 regionale Landesverbände (Arbeitsgemeinschaften Niedergelassener Chirurgen, ANC) vertritt. Die rund 1.300 im BNC zusammengeschlossenen Chirurginnen und Chirurgen arbeiten in Einzel- und Gemeinschaftspraxen, Praxiskliniken, ambulanten OP-Zentren oder Medizinischen Versorgungszentren (MVZ).
Der BNC engagiert sich für die Aus- und Weiterbildung seiner Mitglieder. Hierfür organisiert er unter anderem federführend in Kooperation mit anderen Berufsverbänden den jährlichen Bundeskongress Chirurgie in Nürnberg, den mit regelmäßig rund 1.200 Teilnehmern größten Fachkongress für niedergelassene Chirurgen in Deutschland.
Auf politischer Ebene setzt sich der BNC für die politische und finanzielle Förderung der ambulanten chirurgischen Behandlung sowie den interdisziplinären Austausch ein. Er führt hierzu auf Bundesebene den Dialog mit Politikern, ärztlicher Selbstverwaltung, Krankenkassen, Wirtschaft und anderen Berufsverbänden.

Țara are nevoie de resurse, de oameni, de repere.

Partidul REPER este deschis și cu șanse egale pentru toți cei care se înscriu. Name: VdU Landesverband Ruhrgebiet
Description:
Der Verband der Unternehmerinnen in Deutschland e.V. (VdU) vertritt seit 1954 als Wirtschaftsverband branchenübergreifend die Interessen von Unternehmerinnen in Politik und Gesellschaft. In besonderem Maße zeichnet uns die Verbindung von unternehmerischer Interessenvertretung und gleichstellungspolitischer Lobby aus. 

Wir setzen uns ein für verlässliche und zeitgemäße politische Rahmenbedingungen für Unternehmen, die Stärkung weiblichen Unternehmertums, die Förderung von Frauen in Führungspositionen und für bessere Bedingungen für Frauen in der Wirtschaft. Wir vertreten die politischen Belange von rund 1,2 Millionen selbstständigen Frauen aller Branchen und Unternehmensgrößen.

100 Kulturzentren, 120 Theater, 170 Nationalitäten, 200 Museen, 1 Mio. Fußballfans, 5.3 Mio. Einwohner, Kulturhauptstadt Europas 2010 – das ist das Ruhrgebiet, einer der größten Ballungsräume Europas. Rauchende Industrieschlote und Kohlegruben? Dieses Image gehört der Vergangenheit an. Heute ist die Region eine moderne Metropole mit Vorbildcharakter. Die Erfahrungen, die das Ruhrgebiet im Strukturwandel von einer Industrieregion hin zu einer quirligen Metropolregion gemacht hat, machen es fit für die Digitalisierung.

Für diese Zukunftsfähigkeit steht auch unser Landesverband. Unsere Mitglieder beschäftigen mehr als 6.300 Menschen und treffen sich regelmäßig. Monatlich stehen Abendveranstaltungen, Business Breakfast und Business Lunch in verschiedenen Städten auf dem Programm. Zusammenhalten und sich gegenseitig unterstützen, das sind typische Eigenschaften der Menschen im Ruhrgebiet, die wir gerne aus den Kohlegruben mit in die Zukunft nehmen.

Name: Sally Rochester - Candidate for the Guernsey 2025 Election
Description: Sally Rochester is standing for People’s Deputy to deliver collaborative, evidence-based leadership for Guernsey’s long-term success. With a background in finance, governance, and sustainability, she advocates smarter government, better communication, and cross-sector strategies. Her priorities include sustainable public finances, affordable housing, health and wellbeing as economic drivers, and accessible, high-quality education for all ages. She champions inclusive policy-making, long-term vision, and partnerships that benefit community, economy, and environment. Committed to fairness, professionalism, and pragmatism, Sally believes Guernsey needs leaders who listen, plan boldly, and act responsibly to ensure a thriving and resilient future for the island.

Name: LVSV Leuven
Description:
Het Liberaal Vlaams Studentenverbond (LVSV) is een liberale studentenvereniging uit Leuven die al gedurende 45 jaar op een zeer studentikoze manier mensen in contact wil brengen met, en wil interesseren voor het liberale gedachtegoed in Vlaanderen.

Volledig onafhankelijk van alle partij-politiek zijn wij als vereniging uitermate goed gepositioneerd om de echte liberale ideologie, die helaas door de vele concessies van de liberale politieke partijen bij hen erg verwaterd is, te bewaren en te controleren. Het feit dat de vereniging de afgelopen jaren enorm in ledenaantal is gestegen, is een bewijs voor onze juiste en gedreven werking. 
Als liberale vereniging hechten wij belang aan een aantal fundamentele principes: respect voor het individu, het eigendomsrecht , vrijemarkteconomie, rechtvaardigheid en gelijkwaardigheid van ieder individu. Dit zijn voor ons de voorwaarden om een liberale Rechtsstaat te verwezenlijken waarin elke burger zich maximaal kan ontplooien. Wie deze principes onderschrijft zal zich zeker bij ons thuis voelen. Om onze onafhankelijkheid te bewaren, weigeren wij als vereniging alle overheidssubsidie.

Onze vereniging draagt het liberale gedachtegoed uit door het organiseren van een aantal activiteiten en het publiceren van ons ledenblad ‘Blauwdruk’. 
We starten het academiejaar met een groot openingsdebat. Op onze wekelijkse Blauwe Maandagen nodigen we gastsprekers (politici, academici, mensen uit de sociaal-economische sector,…) uit.

[English] The LVSV is the largest political-philosophical organization in Leuven. We received the award of "Student group of the year" in 2011 by Students For Liberty in Washington D.C

Name: Together for Europe - Movement for the European Federal Union
Description:
Together for Europe is a pan-European Movement for the creation of the European Federal Europe as a superpower of Peace, Liberty, Justice, Equality, Safety and Prosperity, both for the Europeans and for All of the World.

The European Union today has a complex institutional architecture which is difficult to understand by the citizens, and fosters distrust vis-à-vis the EU. The current system of governance based on intergovernmentalism is unable to address the challenges facing Europe in an effective and transparent manner.

We therefore call for a new constitutional architecture, designed to simplify Europe’s form of government and improve legitimacy as well as accountability.

Name: Columbus Safety Collective
Description: This coalition exists to create an anti-racist, health-centered emergency response program for the city of Columbus that operates independently of the division of police, is accountable to those impacted, and promotes investment in long-term community supports.

Name: Northern Research Group
Description: Established after the 2019 General Election, the NRG represents constituencies in northern England, Wales and the Scottish borders. Chaired by the former Minister of State for the Northern Powerhouse Jake Berry. The NRG publishes research and puts forward policy proposals to the UK Government.

Name: APPG on Play
Description:
The All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) on Play is a cross-party group of MPs and Peers working in Parliament to champion all children’s right to play.

Play is essential for childhood. It supports children’s health, wellbeing, development, and rights — yet its importance is often overlooked in national policy, planning, and decision-making.

The APPG on Play provides a dedicated forum in Parliament to change that — promoting the value of play, protecting play spaces, and ensuring all children, in all communities, can play freely every day.

The group brings together parliamentarians, experts, charities, and young people themselves to drive action, influence policy, and help embed play in public life across the UK.

Chair: Tom Hayes MP
Secretariat: Play England
Contact: appg@playengland.org.uk

Name: FemmEurope
Description:
FemmEurope is a student-led initiative that seeks to shed light on the social, economic and political issues that women in Europe face. From talking about problems such as domestic violence to discussing abortion, our team will explore each topic through various lenses.

Check out our podcast on 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/2VqbOFCsTmXKeIOCxZwXg5
Anchor: https://anchor.fm/femmeurope
Google Podcasts: https://podcasts.google.com/feed/aHR0cHM6Ly9hbmNob3IuZm0vcy82YjM5YTI0MC9wb2RjYXN0L3Jzcw?sa=X&ved=0CAMQ4aUDahcKEwi4sOCPxa_2AhUAAAAAHQAAAAAQAg&hl=de-NL

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/femmeurope/

Name: ANO
Description: V roce 2013 jsme uspěli ve volbách do Poslanecké sněmovny Parlamentu České republiky, O rok později jsme vyhráli volby do Evropského parlamentu i v mnoha městech a místech naší země volby komunální, a vyslali i své zástupce do Senátu a do vedení krajů. Naši ministři, senátoři, hejtmani, poslanci, europoslanci, primátoři i zastupitelé a europoslanci pracují na naplňování programového prohlášení programu, s nímž jsme šli bojovat společně s frakcí ALDE do Evropského parlamentu. I s vaší pomocí jsme se stali nejdůležitější politickou silou v naší zemi. A jdeme dál. Nekrademe, nelžeme a pracujeme pro vás.

Name: THE PINNA
Description:
The Pinna is an online art gallery and experimental political practice launched by Gloria Campedelli. The project aims to develop a new social business model for arts and focus its research on artists whose backgrounds involve conflict areas, colonialism, statelessness.

The gallery commits to re-invest 50% of its income from each sale in charity and cultural institutions in the artists’ country. The beneficiaries will be selected by the artists themselves. Proofs of the charity will be documented on the gallery website and payment receipts of the donations will be provided to clients upon request. The project’s purpose focuses on social issues such as education, gender equality, human rights violation and access to health care in the country of origin of the artists involved. 

With the hope of a better future, The Pinna believes in a new way to look at the art market, free from speculation and focused on our deepest humanity, making possible a different and sustainable way of collecting artwork.

Name: Yngrelisten - Green Voices
Description:
Green transition:
IDA must take more responsibility in society for the green transition by bringing facts into the public debate, gathering actors to identify concrete solutions, and being a think tank for technology-based visions and constraints. When using the collective experience of our members, we possess the interdisciplinary technical knowledge to identify the crucial necessary actions. IDA must have the courage to raise its voice, even if it is unpopular or controversial.

Ethics in tech:
IDA should safeguard the right to digital privacy and dignified algorithms. Today, practice and regulations are a mayhem. IDA must be an active voice in public debate and through advocacy, analyses, and recommendations for policy improve ethics in technology development.

The future of work-life is more flexible:
To many, the future of working life includes flexibility for family, hobbies, and life-long learning. IDA must continuously support members in shaping their working life, ensuring such flexibility alongside with solid working conditions, including the right to part-time work.

Your life-long career coach:
Many IDA members desire challenges and development opportunities in their work life, whilst very few can oversee the myriad of options. Our association must ensure an ability to present tailor-made suggestions to each individual member, based on dialogue and data. IDA must be your career coach for life, suggesting valuable options you might overlook. 

The Green Voices value being a courageous and visionary enabler in IDA and we're ready to get our hands dirty to innovate:
* We engage qualified individuals for IDA's fora for decision making
* We seek influence by making proactive suggestions and topics for discussion in all fora
* We want a strong common SENSE of identity for ALL IDA's members
* We want diversity in IDA's fora, focusing on young, international and other under-represented members.

Name: הדמוקרטים בראשות יאיר גולן - Israeli Democrats Party
Description:
מפלגת הדמוקרטים היא תנועה ציונית־דמוקרטית גדולה, חזקה וערכית. English to follow
אנחנו פועלים למען #ציונות_ליברלית – ציונות מושרשת בביטחון, מחויבת לדמוקרטיה ולשוויון, ונבנית מתוך אמונה ותקווה לעתיד טוב יותר.
חזוננו פשוט וברור: להבטיח את ביטחונה של ישראל באמצעות צבא חזק ומתקדם, לשקם את מעמדה של ישראל בעולם, להחזיר את הבריתות האסטרטגיות, לקדם הסדרים אזוריים. ובעיקר - להבטיח את הדמוקרטיה הליברלית שלנו כי דמוקרטיה חזקה היא גם ביטחון לאומי, גם ביטחון אישי וגם ביטחון כלכלי.
אנחנו הדמוקרטים מחויבים למדינה שבה השירות הציבורי הוא שליחות ולא פרנסה למקורבים; למדינה שבה שלטון החוק נקי משחיתות; למדינה שבה ערכי הציונות - ביטחון, שוויון, סולידריות וחירות מובילים את החברה.
בישראל שלנו, אזרחים מכל קשת הרקעים חיים יחד בכבוד הדדי, ערבות הדדית, בסובלנות ובחירות אמיתית.
להבטיח את עתיד המדינה שלנו  - בשביל זה אנחנו כאן.

---
The Democrats Party is a large, strong, and values-driven Zionist–Democratic movement.
We are working for #ציונות_ליברלית — Zionism rooted in security, committed to democracy and equality, and built on faith and hope for a better future.
Our vision is simple and clear: to ensure Israel’s security through a strong and advanced military, to restore Israel’s standing in the world, to rebuild strategic alliances, and to advance regional agreements. And above all — to safeguard our liberal democracy, because strong democracy is also national security, personal security, and economic security.
We, the Democrats, are committed to a country where public service is a mission and not a livelihood for cronies; a country where the rule of law is free from corruption; a country where the values of Zionism — security, equality, solidarity, and freedom — guide society.
In our Israel, citizens from all backgrounds live together with mutual respect, solidarity, tolerance, and true freedom.
Ensuring the future of our state — that is why we are here.

Name: Partido PAN - Pessoas-Animais-Natureza
Description: PAN é o partido da oposição que mais propostas aprovou e que mais impostos baixou com uma única deputada. És do PAN e não sabias. #Legislativas2024 #AvançamosPelasCausas #VotoResponsável #PAN2024 #juntateaogrupo

Name: Ateneo Project for Asian and International Relations (APAIR)
Description:
Vision

As the premiere international relations organization of the Ateneo de Manila University, the Ateneo Project for Asian and International Relations envisions itself as the leading organization for global unity that connects various disciplines through the study and practice of international relations while providing its members with a community that forms them into future leaders of the world.

Mission

It is the mission of the Ateneo Project for Asian and International Relations to inform and expose its members to issues pertaining to international relations by building partnerships with related sectors and providing opportunities to empower its members with the goal of igniting action, prompting initiative, and generating public discourse.

Name: Venezuelan American Caucus (VAC)
Description: The Venezuelan-American Caucus (VAC)is a grassroots organization dedicated to building an infrastructure of active and informed Venezuelan-American citizens with the purpose of ensuring our participation and engagement in the drafting and implementation of U.S. domestic and foreign policies. VAC is powered by Latino Victory Fund.

Name: Arthashastra Analytics
Description: We are a political consultancy providing services in the field of politics and beyond. Our services includes political survey, market survey, campaign management, and a lot more.

Name: Hanze Studentenbelangen Vereniging
Description:
"The oldest and largest student interests of the Hanze University of Groningen!"

In January 2002, the Interfaculty Student Group (ISF) was founded by a group of administrators from various study associations of the Hanseatic University of Applied Sciences. The reason for setting up the ISF were the major problems that associations had with the poor facilities for (study) associations at the Hanze University of Applied Sciences. In addition, these administrators had the desire to work for the interests of all students of the Hanze University of Applied Sciences. It soon became apparent that the ISF needed more continuity and facilities. From the group there are regular ideas or proposals arising from further work or research requirements. That is why the Hanze Student Interests Association was founded in June 2004. The board and the group are inextricably linked and have gone into the future under one name, the HSV.

The HSV has a rich history of people involved who have the same goal in mind, namely: to represent all interests for all students of the Hanze University of Applied Sciences and to have fun and coziness. The involvement of active members and alumni is still very large, creating a true HSV family.

Name: IGBCE Bezirk Düsseldorf
Description:
Der IGBCE Bezirk Düsseldorf umfasst die Regionen von Wuppertal bis Grevenbroich und von Solingen bis Ratingen und vertritt die Beschäftigten in den Branchen Bergbau, Chemie, Gas, Glas, Kautschuk, Keramik, Kunststoffe, Leder, Mineralöl, Papier, Pharma, Sanierung/Entsorgung, Steinkohle und Wasserwirtschaft.

 Unser Selbstverständnis und unser Auftrag ist es, die Arbeitsbedingungen unserer Mitglieder zu verbessern. Wir sorgen für die Sicherheit und den Schutz unserer Mitglieder. Hierbei sind Gerechtigkeit und Solidarität die Leitprinzipien unseres täglichen Handelns. Wir sind für Dich vor Ort sowohl mit unserem engagierten Bezirksteam, als auch mit vielen motivierten ehrenamtlichen Kolleg*innen.

Name: Polish Cultural Institute New York
Description:
Polish Cultural Institute New York was founded in 2000. It is a diplomatic mission of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Poland, operating in the area of public diplomacy. PCI NY is one of 25 such institutes around the world. It is also an active member of the network of the European Union National Institutes for Culture (EUNIC) in its New York cluster.

The Institute’s mission is to share Polish heritage and contemporary art with American audiences, and to promote Poland’s contributions to the success of world culture. The Institute does so through initiating, supporting and promoting collaboration between Poland and the United States in the areas of visual art, design, film, theater, dance, literature, music, and in many other aspects of intellectual and social life. The Institute’s main task to ensure Polish participation in the programming of America’s most important cultural institutions as well as in large international initiatives.

The Institute works with renowned cultural and academic centers and opinion leaders operating on the American market. Its main partners include such prestigious organizations as Lincoln Center for the Performing Arts, the Brooklyn Academy of Music, the Museum of Modern Art, PEN American Center, the Poetry Society of America, the National Gallery of Art, Yale University, Columbia University, Princeton University, the Harvard Film Archive, the CUNY Graduate Center, the Julliard School of Music, the New Museum, the Jewish Museum, La MaMa E.T.C. and many others. For more than fifteen years, it has presented Americans the achievements of outstanding Polish artists. The Institute initiates and actively participates in debates around the humanities in the broad sense, including those concerning history and the today’s most important social and political occurrences.

Name: Renovatio Imperii
Description: Associazione storica fondata nel 2015 e depositata legalmente nel 2021. Renovatio Imperii opera nei campi della ricerca, della divulgazione e della sensibilizzazione intorno alla storia romana. Renovatio Imperii si adopera nel campo politico e culturale attraverso il dialogo con istituzioni e società civile.

Name: Family Forward Action
Description: At Family Forward, we envision an Oregon where the unpaid and underpaid labor of caregiving is seen and valued. We build collective power and amplify the voices of parents and caregivers. In community, we pass policies for our families as we create more racial, gender and economic justice.

Name: DENK Rotterdam
Description: In de gemeenteraad maken wij ons hard voor een Rotterdam voor iedereen.

Name: Allianz der öffentlichen Wasserwirtschaft e.V. (AöW)
Description:
Ihre Stimme für Wasser in öffentlicher Hand
Die Allianz der öffentlichen Wasserwirtschaft e.V. (AöW) ist die Stimme der rein öffentlichen Wasserwirtschaft in Deutschland. Sie setzt sich zu 100 Prozent für die Belange der Wasserwirtschaft ein und vertritt ausschließlich Betriebe, Einrichtungen und Verbände in rein öffentlicher Hand.
Als bundesweite, politische Interessenvertretung arbeiten wir engagiert daran, die politischen und rechtlichen Rahmenbedingungen für die öffentliche Wasserwirtschaft zu sichern und weiter zu verbessern – in Deutschland und europaweit.
Die AöW bündelt gegenüber Politik, Verwaltung und Öffentlichkeit Kompetenzen und Interessen und nimmt Stellung zu wasserwirtschaftlich relevanten Themen. Geschäftsstelle und Präsidium halten Kontakt zu politischen Entscheidungsträgern und Ministerien und kooperieren mit anderen Interessensverbänden und Organisationen. Die Landesbeauftragten sorgen für den Informationsfluss aus den und in die Bundesländer.
Ziele der AöW
- das Vertrauen in öffentliche Aufgabenträger in der Wasserwirtschaft erhalten und verbessern
- politische und gesetzliche Rahmenbedingungen für die Wasserwirtschaft in öffentlicher Hand sichern und stärken
- die Nachteile von Privatisierung und Liberalisierung für eine nachhaltige Wasserversorgung und Abwasserentsorgung sowie für die Gewässerunterhaltung aufzeigen
- den Wert des Wassers herausstellen: der Schutz des Wassers muss Vorrang bei allen relevanten Gesetzesvorhaben auf Länder-, Bundes- und EU-Ebene haben und konsequent umgesetzt werden. Die Stärkung des Vorsorge- und des Verursacherprinzips ist dabei unverzichtbar.
- Handlungsspielräume erhalten, um die Erfolgsgeschichte der kommunalen Daseinsvorsorge in Deutschland fortzuschreiben.
Impressum: https://aoew.de/impressum/
Datenschutzerklärung: https://aoew.de/datenschutz/

Name: KOMPETENZNETZ - Transformationsberatung GmbH
Description: Du suchst externe Sachverständige (Beratende, Berater*innen), die Dich und Deinen Betriebsrat im Wandel begleiten. Wir bringen Dich mit hochqualifizierten und durch das KOMPETENZNETZ zertifizierten Beratenden zusammen, die optimal zu deinen Herausforderungen und Anliegen passen.

Name: Marie-Claude Nichols - Députée de Vaudreuil
Description: En 2009, Marie-Claude Nichols a fait le saut en politique d’abord à titre de mairesse de Notre-Dame-de- puis préfet de la MRC de Vaudreuil-Soulanges. C’est maintenant comme députée du comté de Vaudreuil qu’elle contribue, depuis 2014, à la prospérité de la région pour nous, pour vous et pour les générations futures

Name: Innovators for Democracy
Description:
Innovators’ mission is to empower our members through quality programming, engage directly with policymakers and civic leaders, and elect candidates with innovative approaches to solve embedded societal challenges.

http://innovatorsfordemocracy.com/blog

We believe that through conversations, educational symposia, & fundraisers, we empower both innovators and government leaders to share knowledge and networks to solve pressing and future issues facing our country and our democracy.

In addition, IFD members are acutely aware of the urgency of maintaining the majority in the Senate and in the House in 2022 to sustain progress on addressing these challenges.

IFD acknowledges the importance of intersectionality, diversity, and inclusion. 
We are excited to welcome you!

Name: ICAN France
Roskilde Universitet
Description: The most important task of Roskilde University is to contribute to experimental, innovative forms of learning and knowledge creation.

Name: Break Blue Strategies
Description:
Break Blue Strategies is a full service consulting group focused on providing opportunities and services for organizations and campaigns centered on the values we share. The Break Blue team brings rich experience, an inclusive attitude, and a diverse breadth of skills to execute nimble, digitally savvy, and design-first community strategies.

We’ve helped raise over $25 million, powered campaigns with more than 1 million mailers, knocked over 100,000 doors, delivered 150 million+ ad impressions, and supported 80+ clients across 14 states.

Name: K K Sakthivel BE MBA
Description:
மாவட்ட செயலாளர்
தகவல் தொழில்நுட்பப் பிரிவு

Name: Landesfachschaft Jura Nordrhein-Westfalen e.V.
Description: Die Landesfachschaft Jura Nordrhein-Westfalen e.V. (LFS NRW) ist der Zusammenschluss der rechtswissenschaftlichen Fachschaften der Universitäten Bielefeld, Bochum, Bonn, Düsseldorf, Köln und Münster. Als solche ist sie die Interessenvertretung der Jurastudierenden in Nordrhein-Westfalen und vertritt die studentischen Interessen gegenüber der Verwaltung, Politik und weiteren Institutionen in der juristischen Ausbildung. Darüber hinaus unterstützt die LFS NRW die nordrhein-westfälischen Fachschaften bei ihrer Arbeit und fördert die Vernetzung untereinander.

Name: Velferdstinget i Gjøvik, Ålesund og Trondheim
Description:
Velferdstinget jobber for din hverdag mens du studerer, og er sammensatt av 19 representanter fra eierorganene våre: Studenttinget NTNU, Studentparlamentet DMMH, BI, Fotofagskolen, og Fagskolen innlandet.

Vår oppgave er å ivareta og bedre velferdstilbud for studentene. Vi bestemmer hvordan semesteravgiften skal brukes, og uttaler oss om hvordan Studentsamskipnaden i Gjøvik, Ålesund og Trondheim (Sit) skal prioritere.

Vi jobber både på lokalt og nasjonalt nivå med saker som ivaretar dine rettigheter og din økonomi under studiene.

Name: GLP Kanton Zug
Description:
Wir stehen für Freiheit durch Eigenverantwortung. Das ist liberale Politik statt ideologischer Umbau der Gesellschaft durch Bevormundung.
Wir schaffen eine klimaneutrale Wirtschaft um unseren Kindern eine lebenswerte Umwelt und Wohlstand zu ermöglichen.
Wir schaffen Lösungen indem wir Technologien und Digitalisierung zum Wohler der Bevölkerung nutzen.
Wir lassen den Menschen die Freiheit, selber zu entscheiden und eigenverantwortlich zu handeln.
Mit Mut und Optimismus bauen wir beharrlich die Zukunft und hinterfragen den Status quo.

Name: SPM I Strategic Political Marketing
Description: SPM+ provides a variety of services and is a one-stop shop for all your political needs: management, finance, marketing, communication, and community outreach. Our staff has years of experience in public relations, fundraising, marketing, graphic design, web development, and community organizing. We will provide you with a customized campaign and work with you along the way to ensure success. Learn more at SPM-LLC.com

Name: Unite NY
Description:
Putting People Over Party, Unite NY is a movement of Democrats, Republicans, and independents working together to foster a more representative and functional government.
Unite NY invests in reforms and candidates that will focus on a fairer, more open government, that allows New Yorkers to succeed on their own rather than having to rely on the government. We work to support right leaders with the right incentives to solve our state’s greatest problems.

By building collaboration among leaders from all parties and persuasions, Unite NY will seek to address New York’s greatest problems with common sense solutions. For far too long, we’ve been told that to participate in our democracy, it is necessary to choose one of the two major parties, often the lesser of two evils.  That’s simply not true or healthy.

This two-party doom loop leaves New Yorkers out in the cold and diminishes the voices of more than 3 million voters that don’t feel at home enough to register in either party.

Name: Harderwijk Anders
Description:
Gewoon Harderwijk Anders
Harderwijk Anders is een lokale politieke partij. Wij zijn er voor alle inwoners van Harderwijk en Hierden, ongeacht hun opleiding, inkomen, afkomst, seksuele voorkeur en al die andere kenmerken waarop wij van elkaar kunnen verschillen. Harderwijk Anders is onafhankelijk en ongebonden.

Name: #WalkAway Campaign
Description:
The #WalkAway Campaign is the movement bringing Americans together to #WalkAway from intolerance and societal discord; leave identity-politics behind, and walk towards unity, civility, and respect. 

The #WalkAway Campaign is a true grassroots movement of Americans who have come together through our common love for our country. We promote a return to respect, tolerance, individualism, civil discourse and personal-accountability. We value equality thereby we reject identity politics or the victimization of any minority group. We are free thinkers seeking truth and a return to small government. We no longer accept the current ideology advocated by the media and we recognize our power as a collective.  We stand together as united individuals to facilitate peace and prosperity in American society.

Name: CDA Europees Parlement
Description:
Het CDA is een moderne christendemocratische volkspartij. Voor de christendemocratie staat de gemeenschap centraal, de samenleving van mensen die elk voor een stukje van de wereld verantwoordelijk zijn. Het gezin, de school, de wijk, de vereniging; zij vormen de ruggengraat van de samenleving. Wij kiezen voor een sterker en vitaler Europa, dat zich concentreert op haar kerntaken en vaker dan nu samenwerking zoekt in kleinere kopgroepen en oog houdt voor het beleid van nationale staten. In Europa maakt het CDA samen met andere centrum- en centrumrechtse partijen deel uit van de Europese Volkspartij, de grootste fractie binnen het Europees Parlement.

Volg ons ook op

Twitter: https://twitter.com/cdaeuropa?lang=en
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cda_eu/
Website EVP: http://www.eppgroup.eu/nl

Name: Transatlantic Harmonic Foundation
Description:
At the nexus of innovation and global collaboration, THF, a Third Sector Organization born from a strategic alliance between the Transatlantic Investment Committee (TIC), EHT and the Harmonic Innovation Group, is dedicated to nurturing geostrategic innovation processes to foster a harmonic world. 
This alliance represents a concerted effort to pool together diverse expertise, resources, and networks with the shared objective of driving positive change and fostering innovation on a global scale.

Name: DEMVP
Description: The Democratic Voter Project is the leading Democratic group dedicated to activating voters. Everyday we're educating, engaging and developing civic action with special emphasis on new and unlikely voters, including millennials and communities of color.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Memmingen/Unterallgäu
Description:
Die Wirtschaftsjunioren Memmingen-Unterallgäu sind ein Verband für junge Unternehmer, Selbständige und Führungskräfte aus dem Wirtschaftsraum Augsburg. Seit vielen Jahren engagieren wir uns als Verein in vielfältigen Projekten für die Zukunft unserer Region.
Wir sind der Überzeugung, dass wir eine besondere Verantwortung für unsere Gesellschaft haben.

Dabei sind wir nicht nur regional aktiv: Mit rund 10.000 Mitgliedern sind die Wirtschaftsjunioren Deutschland der größte Verband der jungen Wirtschaft und haben zudem ein großes internationales Netzwerk.

Name: European Horizons at KU
Description: European Horizons at KU is a chapter at the University of Copenhagen that’s a part of the international studentled organisation European Horizons. European Horizons is a global network of university students that was founded in 2015 at Yale University. With 60+ active student chapters in Europe, North America and Asia, and with support from the EU Commission, European Horizons guarantees yearly conferences and events all over the world. European Horizons at KU is an unpolitical student organisation, where we disagree a lot, but agree in the fact that international problems can only be solved by including the next generation in coming up with the international solutions in an international forum. Therefore, we will facilitate debates, publish research and host other events with the purpose of putting European cooperation on the agenda. Through this, we wish to nuance the debate around the EU in Denmark. We want the younger generation to have a bigger impact on the future of Europe, and simultaneously raise awareness among students about KU’s and Denmark’s role in the international system. Our organisation consists of both EU federalists and strong EU critics, because we believe that combining disagreement and enthusiasm create nuanced, sustainable and inspiring visions for Europe.

Name: Groupe écologiste, solidaire & citoyen - Région Nouvelle-Aquitaine
Description:
Groupe des 19 élu·es écologistes au Conseil Régional de Nouvelle-Aquitaine

Le groupe s'appuie sur une équipe de 4 salarié·es.

Name: Mind the Gap
Description:
Mind the Gap's mission is to provide research-driven guidance on the most cost-effective strategies for maximizing Democratic victories, using hard evidence to guide political investment decisions.  

Our guiding principles: 
- Independent:  No financial or other stake in the organizations we recommend
- Objective:  We focus solely on impact, measured by quantifiable metrics
- Evidence-Driven:  All recommendations are validated by numerous randomized, controlled trials over multiple election cycles
- Pro Bono:  We never charge for our analyses or recommendations
- Pro Democracy:  Our goal is to win by making the electoral system more representative, just, and fair.

Name: Lone Mountain Strategies
Description:
About Us
Lone Mountain Strategies is a nationwide field operations firm specializing in door-to-door political canvassing, event staffing, and grassroots outreach. Co-founded by father and son, we combine experience and hustle to help campaigns and organizations connect with real people — face to face.

In the past year alone, our team knocked on over 500,000 doors across the U.S., helping candidates build momentum and win tough races. We pride ourselves on deploying clean-cut, motivated, high-integrity canvassers who know how to make a lasting impression.

Whether you're launching a local campaign, scaling up for a national effort, or need rapid deployment in key swing districts, Lone Mountain Strategies brings professionalism, speed, and results.

 Based in Las Vegas | Serving Clients Nationwide

Name: Next CM

Name: Tibet Initiative Deutschland e.V.
Description:
Die Tibet Initiative Deutschland e.V. wurde im August 1989 anlässlich der schweren Unruhen in Tibet und deren gewaltsamer Niederschlagung gemeinsam von Exiltibetern und deutschen Aktivisten gegründet. Sie tritt für das Selbstbestimmungsrecht der Tibeter und die Wahrung der Menschenrechte in Tibet ein. Mit bundesweit über 50 ehrenamtlichen Regionalgruppen/Kontaktstellen und rund 2.000 Mitgliedern unterstützt sie die Tibeter als politisch, ethnisch und religiös Verfolgte.

Tibet Initiative Deutschland (TID) was created in response to the heavy unrest in Tibet in April 1989 that was forcibly put down. TID is a non-partisan, non-religious, and non-profit organisation. Since its creation, TID has been fighting for the Tibetan people's right to self-determination and the protection of their human rights.
TID works to influence the People's Republic of China through nonviolent means to put an end to arbitrary arrests, torture, and political and cultural oppression in Tibet. The central office in Berlin coordinates actions which are carried out by more than 50 volunteer groups as well as up to 2,000 devoted members throughout Germany.

Name: Biju Janata Dal
Description:
Founded on 26th December, 1997, Biju Janata Dal is a regional party based out of the state of Odisha. It is named after the former Chief Minister and the architect of modern Odisha, Shri Biju Patnaik. The work done by the party for the inclusive development of Odisha over the years is an ultimate dedication to the legacy of the stalwart, Shri Biju Patnaik.

NAVEEN PATNAIK 
BJD President

MISSION AND VALUES
Biju Janata Dal is inspired to make the dream of legendary Biju Babu a reality; which aims at building an Odisha that lifts all Odias. It is the mission of BJD, led by Chief Minister Naveen Patnaik, to protect the dignity and self-respect of 4 crores Odias; and to focus on the all-round development and overall welfare of Odisha, and its people. Providing a secular, corruption-free and welfare state, based on the basic tenets of social justice and equality for all, has been guiding principle and values of Shri Naveen Patnaik, the founding President of the party.

At the Ontario High School Conservative Association, we pride ourselves on being an organization uniting all of the early Conservative supporters. We believe that we can achieve greatness by starting off young and strong, to help energize the next generation of Conservative voters. We strive to make this place one for all Conservative youth so we can build a better tomorrow. 

Visit our website for more information about our organization.

Name: The Conservative Mental Health Group
Description:
The Conservative Mental Health Group is an independent group established by Conservative Party members that aim to tackle the causes and impact of mental health problems. Through our community, we work to promote effective mental health action based on Conservative values. 

Our mission is to create a platform to which all members can engage in campaigning, advocacy, and policy work to create a better understanding of mental health issues and support positive policies on mental health from the Conservative Party, UK Parliament, devolved parliaments, local governments and the UK Government.

The CMHG also aims to create stronger support for Conservative Party members and political candidates whose mental health has been impacted by their political involvement. Active political engagement can cause strain on people’s mental health due to online or in-person hate because of their political involvement.

Members of the CMHG engage with senior members of the Conservative Party and elected officials, alongside leaders of the UK’s mental health community, through our policy discussions on mental health.

Name: Personal PAC
Description:
Personal PAC is a non-partisan political action committee dedicated to preserving abortion rights in Illinois by electing pro-choice candidates to state and local office.

Pro-choice forces are currently facing an unprecedented attack on reproductive rights. Anti-choice candidates and legislation, on both the state and national level, are threatening to dangerously restrict and deny access to safe and legal abortions.

This renewed assault on reproductive and abortion rights must be reversed with an electoral strategy designed to defeat anti-choice politicians, and to elect and re-elect pro-choice officials dedicated to protecting a woman's right to choose.

Personal PAC's determination and time-tested strategy for electing solidly pro-choice candidates in Illinois is needed now more than ever for the upcoming elections.

Name: Fairfax County Democratic Committee
Description:
Working to promote the principles of the Democratic Party & elect candidates to the local, county, state and national levels.

Virginia has elections every year and each year the Fairfax County Democratic Committee (FCDC) registers new voters, organizes more than 230 precincts, protects peoples’ Right to Vote, supplies campaigns with important resources, sponsors an internship program with dozens of young people, makes sure our voters know who is on the ballot, how they stand on the issues, where to vote, how to vote absentee, and we get our voters out to vote on Election Days.  FCDC also has a headquarters office in the middle of the County and your contributions pay for rent, utilities, and office supplies so we can help get Democrats elected.  That’s how we win.  That’s how we move Fairfax County forward and your contributions of time and money help make that happen. 

Join us!

Name: Parti Radical
Description:
Le Parti Radical a donné 31 Chefs de Gouvernement , des centaines de ministres et secrétaires d’Etat, des milliers de députés et sénateurs.

Parti de valeurs et de convictions, le Parti Radical est à l’initiative des lois sur les associations et sur la laïcité dont il célèbra en 2005 le centenaire.
Il a toujours été présent lors des événements majeurs qui ont fait l’Histoire : en 14-18 avec Clémenceau, dans l’entre-deux guerres avec Herriot, lors de la décolonisation avec Mendès-France, au moment de la modernisation de la France dans les années 60 et 70.

Membre fondateur de l’UDF en 1978, il participe à tous les gouvernements de la droite républicaine (1986, 1993, 1995 et 2002). Il a officiellement accordé son soutien à la candidature de Jacques Chirac dès le premier tour des élections présidentielles en 2002.
Depuis le 17 novembre 2002, il est membre associé de l’UMP et demeure en tant que tel, parti politique de plein exercice.

Name: Moms Stop the Harm
Description:
Moms Stop The Harm (MSTH) is a network of Canadian families impacted by substance use related harms and deaths.

Our vision is that people who use drugs are not criminalized and that their rights are respected. To this end, we advocate for an end to the failed war on drugs through evidence-based prevention, treatment and policy change. We support a harm reduction approach that is both compassionate and non-discriminatory for people who use substances. 

Through a growing mutual support network, we empower families to use their voices without shame, to advocate for change, and to provide peer-led support to other grieving and affected families in their communities.

Name: Acción Republicana
Description:
“Somos un movimiento que tiene como misión construir un Chile libre; próspero y de oportunidades. Estamos convencidos de que esto se logra con instituciones fuertes y principios sólidos. Valoramos el rol insustituible de la familia; la sociedad civil y el Estado. Promovemos los principios de la libertad individual; la igualdad ante la ley y el estado de derecho. Reivindicamos la meritocracia; el esfuerzo personal y la transparencia. Todo esto con una voluntad propositiva y valiente, con la cual disputaremos todos los espacios donde podamos defender nuestro proyecto de país.
En Acción Republicana buscamos articular a la sociedad civil motivada por las ideas de la libertad y que muchas veces es silenciada por un discurso hegemónico minoritario. Queremos movilizar a los millones de chilenos que comparten nuestros valores; decirles que confíen en sus principios, porque las buenas ideas nacen del sentido común y merecen ser defendidas con claridad y sin rodeos”
Antonio Barchiesi
Director Ejecutivo
