Name: D66 Rijk van Nijmegen
Description: D66 afdeling Rijk van Nijmegen omvat de gemeenten Nijmegen, Wijchen, Beuningen, Heumen en Berg en Dal. Deze afdeling telt per mei 2013 ca. 550 leden en is op dit moment in 3 van de 5 gemeenten in de gemeenteraad vertegenwoordigd. Meer informatie over de afdeling en onze activiteiten kunt u vinden op onze website www.d66nijmegen.nl

Name: Senat Mahasiswa Fakultas Hukum Universitas Diponegoro
Lokaal Betrokken
Description:
Lokaal Betrokken heeft tot doel de inwoners van de gemeente Stadskanaal te betrekken bij de lokale politiek, alsmede het behartigen van de belangen van haar inwoners.

Lokaal Betrokken probeert haar doel onder meer te bereiken door het scheppen van gelegenheid tot vrije en openhartige gedachtewisseling over onderwerpen van algemeen belang en in het bijzonder waar het betreft het gemeentelijk beleid ten aanzien van deze belangen.

Lokaal Betrokken wil de inwoners van de gemeente Stadskanaal via verschillende media continu informeren over lokale kwesties, en nodigt inwoners uit mee te discussiëren.

Lokaal Betrokken onderkent dat veel burgers het vertrouwen in de nationale politiek kwijt zijn. ‘Ze luisteren toch niet naar ons’ is een veel gehoorde kreet. En ze hebben gelijk. Lokaal Betrokken houdt zich verre van Haagse machtspolitiek. Lokaal spelen dan ook hele andere kwesties; het is nog steeds politiek, maar dichter bij huis en veel praktischer.

Lokaal Betrokken gaat uit van eigen kracht. We vinden dat Knoalsters heel goed hun eigen boontjes kunnen doppen!

Lokaal Betrokken tracht zo mogelijk deel te nemen aan het bestuur van de gemeente Stadskanaal. Ze doet voor het eerst mee aan de gemeenteraadsverkiezingen op 21 maart 2018.

Name: SPD-Landtagsfraktion Saarland
Description:
Herzlich willkommen bei der SPD-Landtagsfraktion im Saarland. Wir sind die starke Kraft für ein solidarisches, nachhaltiges und modernes Saarland. Dabei ist uns der regelmäßige Kontakt zu Ihnen besonders wichtig. 

Deshalb: Sprechen Sie unsere SPD-Abgeordneten an. Wenden Sie sich mit Fragen, Ideen und auch Kritik direkt an uns! Besuchen Sie uns bei einer der Plenarsitzungen oder direkt in der Landtagsfraktion.

Name: Tax Justice Aotearoa
Fundação Índigo
Description:
Nós somos o Instituto Índigo.

Formar líderes, pensar e debater o Brasil. Formar para liderar. Liderar para transformar a vida das pessoas. Essa é a nossa missão. Nosso compromisso é com a boa política, a boa gestão, a inovação e visão de futuro. Braço de formação, de estudo, pesquisa e debates do União Brasil, o Instituto Índigo tem como um de seus pilares o preparo de novos líderes políticos, gestores públicos e cidadãos com visão liberal, democrática e crítica de mundo. Educação política, gestão pública, políticas públicas e governança são os quatro pilares que norteiam a nossa atuação.

Name: Georg-von-Vollmar-Akademie e.V.
Description: Die Georg-von-Vollmar-Akademie e.V. ist eine gemeinnützige Institution der politischen Bildung in Bayern.

Name: AU Students for Change
Description:
The Students for Change Initiative (SFC) formerly known as the Women's Initiatve is a non-partisan, student-run organization that helps coordinate and advise campus departments and committees on programming and policy decisions that affect marginalized students, faculty, and staff of American University. 

SFC is responsible for creating and delivering responsive, effective, and educational programming to address a wide range of issues through the lens of gender and sexuality. SFC programming reflects core values of anti-violence, anti-racism, environmental & climate justice, queer & trans inclusion, and wellness. SFC is committed to working in collaboration with other student organizations, academic departments, student services, and off-campus organizations to further this mission.

SFC is committed to progression, inclusivity, and responding to the programming needs of the American University community. Moving forward, the goal of SFC is to exceed these expectations through cross-collaboration. SFC serves as a safe space and resource for grassroots activism and coalition-building.

Name: De Hilversumse VVD
Description:
De VVD is de Volkspartij voor Vrijheid en Democratie. Wij maken ons sterk voor veiligheid, werk en ondernemende mensen. Onze politieke ervaring maakt onze ideeën niet alleen goed doordacht, maar ook uitvoerbaar in de praktijk. De VVD streeft naar een kleine, slagvaardige overheid die garant staat voor een veilige en eerlijke samenleving, waar iedereen die ervoor gaat de ruimte krijgt om zijn of haar dromen en ambities te realiseren.

Stem 21 maart aanstaande VVD, dat werkt!

Name: D66 Zorg&Welzijn
Description:
De thema-afdeling is een afdeling van en voor de leden. Alle leden hebben op een of andere manier kennis van, en affiniteit en ervaring met zorg, gezondheid, welzijn en welbevinden. Zij zetten deze kennis en ervaring in om zorg en welzijn voor burgers te verbeteren. 

De afdeling heeft als ambitie actief in te spelen op politieke agendavorming door middel van het stimuleren van discussie, debat en meningsvorming op veranderingen in de samenleving en de publieke opinie die van invloed zijn op de D66 visie en thema’s gericht op een gezonde toekomst vanuit een sociaal liberaal perspectief. 

Het bestuur geeft hierin richting, legt verbindingen en stimuleert de samenwerking tussen leden en stakeholders buiten de afdeling voor de aanscherping, verdieping en verbreding van standpunten, thema’s en visie op een gezonde toekomst.

Name: Center for Energy Efficiency and Renewable Technologies
Description:
The Center for Energy Efficiency and Renewable Technologies (CEERT) is a partnership of major environmental groups and private-sector clean energy companies.  We design and fight for policies that promote global warming solutions and increased reliance on clean, renewable energy sources for California and the West.

CEERT is a nonprofit public-benefit organization founded in 1990 and based in Sacramento, California. Our team of professional staff, board members, and affiliates includes scientists, attorneys, economists, policy experts, public-interest advocates, and green-technology entrepreneurs. We carry out our technical, policy-making, and policy-implementing work through advocacy programs that focus on key renewable-energy development issues.  We are active as participants and intervenors before the full spectrum of federal, state, regional and local energy agencies.

A crucial underpinning to CEERT’s growing effectiveness has been the recognition and support we have received from enlightened funding partners like the Energy Foundation, the William and Flora Hewlett Foundation, the Resources Legacy Fund, and the Western Clean Energy Campaign.

With the public increasingly demanding that the U.S. cut our contributions to global warming and our dependence on imported fossil fuels, the time has come to build the new energy economy. CEERT is helping lead the way.

Name: IGBCE Nordrhein
Description: IGBCE

Name: Kelly for La Crosse County Board
Description:
I am so excited to be running for La Crosse County Board this year.  I will bring my strong emphasis on community connection, deep passion for civic engagement, and local legislative experience to the District One seat.  Feel free to reach out with questions and I hope you will support this campaign!

This page prepared and paid for by Kelly for County Board.

Name: Samen voor Almere
Description: Samen voor Almere is ontstaan vanuit de overtuiging dat we samen de stad kunnen vormgeven. Samen voor Almere streeft dan ook naar een eerlijke, rechtvaardige, duurzame en vreedzame samenleving, waarin iedere burger meetelt en gelijke kansen krijgt.

Name: KlimaUnion Brandenburg
Description: Wir sind der Landesverband Brandenburg der KlimaUnion. Wie möchten die CDU auf dem Weg zum 1,5 Grad-Ziel unterstützen. Dabei stehen Vernetzung mit Kommunen und Unternehmen im Mittelpunkt sowie best practice Erfahrungen klimaneutraler CDU-geführter Kommunen.

Name: Partido Verde (Colombia)
Description:
El pasado 20 de agosto del 2009 los ex alcaldes de Bogotá Luis Eduardo Garzón, Enrique Peñalosa y Antanas Mockus se unieron para construir un nuevo partido. El anuncio fue recibido por los colombianos y colombianas con sorpresa y esperanza.
Tras meses de conversaciones y de trabajo, la alianza de los tres ex alcaldes unió fuerzas con el Partido Verde Opción Centro creado el 25 de noviembre de 2005 con la representación de 19 departamentos  Colombianos. Este partido, fundado por Carlos Ramón González Merchán y Néstor Daniel García Colorado,  es uno de los 16 partidos con personería jurídica (Res. 1057 del Consejo Nacional Electoral) que adopta los principios de la carta verde de la tierra, representa la opción de Centro y verde ambiental en Colombia.

La unión de esta nueva Fuerza Política se formalizó el 2 de octubre en el V Congreso Extraordinario, donde se acordaron los principios y prioridades del partido. Se aprobó el nombre PARTIDO VERDE y la Dirección Nacional conformada por 10 personas;   la presidencia colegiada por Antanas Mockus, Enrique Peñalosa, Jorge Londoño y Luis Eduardo Garzón, la  Dirección Ejecutiva Nacional  por Carlos Ramón González,  la Secretaria General por  Néstor Daniel García Colorado y el Representante a la Cámara Rodrigo Romero Hernández. Así mismo,  Liliana Caballero, Alfonso Prada y Antonio Sanguino.

Name: South Dakota Democratic Party
Description: Working Hard for Working Families.

Name: Conservatives in Sport
Description:
Conservatives in Sport is a forum dedicated to bringing together Conservative politicians, industry leaders, grassroots organisations, sports professionals, and enthusiasts to celebrate and promote the transformative power of sports. 

Through events, discussions, and collaborative initiatives, Conservatives in Sport aims to:

Advocate for policies that support the growth and accessibility of sports at all levels.
Foster connections between policymakers and stakeholders across the sporting ecosystem.
Highlight the role of sports in improving physical and mental health, building social cohesion, and inspiring excellence.

Founded and managed by NorthPoint Strategy - www.northpointstrategy.co.uk

Name: HART VOOR VEERE
Description: HART VOOR VEERE is een onafhankelijke partij. Inwoners van gemeente Veere dienen zich zoveel mogelijk te kunnen ontplooien en gezamenlijk Veere voor iedere bewoner aantrekkelijk te laten zijn en te blijven.

Name: Sandra Cellarius
Description:
Ursprünglich habe ich ein Studium der Rechtswissenschaften an der Universität Basel absolviert. Aber bereits während meines Studiums bin ich im elterlichen Betrieb CityCellar AG / stadtkellerei.ch eingestiegen. Das war vor 17 Jahren. Mittlerweile habe ich das Unternehmen übernommen und betreue mit meinen Mitarbeiterinnen Weinliebhaber/innen in der ganzen Schweiz. 
2018 wurde ich in Pfaffnau als Gemeinderätin gewählt und betreute anschliessend die Ressorts Finanzen und Bildung. Seit 2020 setze ich mich als Gemeindepräsidentin gemeinsam mit meinem Team für unser Dorf ein.
Ich bin überzeugte Milizpolitikerin und engagiere mich neben meinem Amt als Gemeindepräsidentin in verschiedenen Verbänden und Gremien für unsere Region. 
Meine unternehmerische und politische Erfahrung möchte ich in Zukunft auch als Kantonsrätin für die FDP.Die Liberalen in Luzern einbringen. Mit deinem Eintrag in mein Komitee und deiner Stimme am 2. April kannst auch du gemeinsam mit mir Zukunft machen. Vielen Dank für deine Unterstützung.

Name: Data Targeting INC.
Description:
In politics, winning matters. That's why at Data Targeting, we shut up and let the data do the talking.

Data Targeting is an integrated-service political consulting firm that turns data intelligence into winning strategies. For 30 years, we have innovated within the political industry by developing cutting-edge data solutions, crafting winning strategies, and producing precision communications that win elections. We provide superior technology that gives our clients deep insights into voting behaviors – and the edge of their competition.

We are artists. We are data scientists. We are political experts. And we're wholly committed to delivering our clients the most advanced and effective data-driven solutions possible.

Name: Clubul Oamenilor de Afaceri Liberali
Description:
COAL cuprinde membri ai partidului care activează în sfera întreprinderilor mici şi mijlocii şi în mediul de afaceri.

Scopul COAL este dezbaterea şi analizarea problemelor legate de politica de sprijinire a activităţii întreprinderilor mici şi mijlocii şi a mediului de afaceri, în vederea elaborării de propuneri şi strategii în domeniu.

Liberalismul consideră că inițiativa, spiritul întreprinzător, antreprenoriatul trebuie încurajate și susținute, în așa fel încât fiecare individ să-și atingă potențialul, astfel ca COAL isi propune susținerea capitalului românesc, sprijinirea consolidării economiei funcționale de piață, promovarea și apărarea intereselor legitime și a reputației oamenilor de afaceri din România.

Name: Humanities for the Public PAC
Description:
Humanities for the Public is a federally registered political action committee committed to advancing public investment in history, the arts, literature, philosophy, and cultural education. We support policies and candidates who understand that the humanities are essential to a vibrant, informed, and democratic society. 

Through targeted candidate and political advocacy, strategic resource mobilization, and coalition-building with researchers, educators, artists, cultural institutions, and community organizers, we advance the role of the humanities as a cornerstone of civic life. Our mission is to ensure that the humanities remain accessible to all, equitably supported by public institutions, and prioritized by those who shape policy at every level.

The New Democrat Coalition is a caucus in the House of Representatives with more than 90 Democrats focused on growing the economy and increasing opportunity. Founded in 1997, NewDems advocate within the Democratic Party and Congress for new ideas and new approaches to move America forward. The New Democrat Coalition represents more than forty percent of House Democrats.  

Formed by Members of the New Democrat Coalition, the NewDem Action Fund helps protect and elect House NewDems. In 2018, NewDems delivered the Democratic Majority by flipping 32 of 40 net seats and injecting $18 million into the fight to elect House Democrats. In 2020, NewDems defended it by protecting 22 of our “frontline” Members, flipping 3 seats blue, and injecting over $23 million into the cycle.

Seit 2011 sind die JuLis, nun JUNOS – Junge liberale Studierende, in der ÖH vertreten. Wir leisten konstruktive Vertretungsarbeit und 
verbessern aktiv die Studienbedingungen in ganz Österreich.

Wir wollen liberale Hochschulpolitik weiterentwickeln und somit die Zukunft der individuellen Bildung von über 350.000 Studierenden gestalten. Wir stehen für Freiheit, Eigenverantwortung, Transparenz und Mitbestimmung.

Name: Liga Baselbieter Steuerzahler
Description:
Keine weitere Erhöhung der Staatsquote

Wir wehren uns gegen jede weitere Einführung neuer Steuern. Auch lehnen wir weitere Erhöhungen der Mehrwertsteuer ab.
Vehementer Widerstand gegen schleichende Steuererhöhungen

Wir sind gegen die Einführung neuer Gebühren und Abgaben ohne dass entsprechende Entlastungen bei den Steuern gewährt werden.
Erhalt der kantonalen Steuerhoheit

Die Liga lehnt jede weitere Beschneidung der kantonalen Steuerautonomie unter dem Diktat der eidgenössischen Steuerharmonisierung ab.
Abbau der Regulierungsdichte

Der in der Schweiz wahrhaft undurchdringliche Gesetzes- und Vorschriftendschungel muss gelichtet werden.
Weniger Perfektionismus im öffentlichen Bauwesen

Dem übertriebenen, oft teuren Perfektionismus im öffentlichen Bauwesen muss ein Riegel geschoben werden. Effizienz und Zweckmässigkeit gehen vor.
Kantonale Ausgaben- und Schuldenbremse

Auf kantonaler Ebene soll die Defizitbremse zu einer wirkungsvollen Ausgaben- und Schuldenbremse weiterentwickelt werden. Was beim Bund zur Stabilisierung des Staatshaushaltes dient, muss konsequenterweise auch beim Kanton durchgesetzt werden.
Plafonierung der Abgeltungsbeiträge für Zentrumsleistungen

Der dauernden Erhöhung der Baselbieter Abgeltungsbeiträge an „städtische Zentrumsleistungen“ ist Einhalt zu gebieten.
Reduktion der Vermögenssteuer

Die fiskale Belastung des im Baselbiet – vor allem aus Eigenverantwortung für die Altersvorsorge und für Wohneigentum – gebildeten Vermögens des Mittelstandes muss zumindest auf durchschnittliches Schweizerisches Niveau gesenkt werden.

Name: Phil Weiser for Colorado
Description: Phil Weiser is an innovative, effective leader who has dedicated his life to public service and teaching. He is a lifelong Democrat who has worked on behalf of Democratic candidates in Colorado for almost 20 years. In 1992, Phil first came to Colorado to interview with his future mentor Judge David Ebel. After graduating law school, Phil worked in Denver for Judge Ebel on the Tenth Circuit Court of Appeals. He then went to work at the United States Supreme Court, serving as a law clerk for Justices Byron White and Ruth Bader Ginsburg. He next served in President Clinton’s Department of Justice before coming back to Colorado to teach as a professor at the University of Colorado Law School.  At CU Law, Phil founded the Silicon Flatirons Center for Law, Technology, and Entrepreneurship, co-chaired Governor Bill Ritter’s Innovation Council, and litigated civil rights cases pro bono before the Tenth Circuit. After serving in the Obama Administration as a Deputy Assistant Attorney General and as Senior Advisor for Technology and Innovation at the White House’s National Economic Council, Phil returned home to serve as Dean of CU Law. A leader in the Colorado startup community, he co-founded Startup Colorado and founded the Blackstone Entrepreneurs Network. Phil and Heidi, a physician, are raising their two children, Aviva and Sammy, in Denver.

Name: The Maryland Free Enterprise Foundation
Description:
Maryland Free is a statewide, nonpartisan political research and education organization supported by corporations, trade associations, chambers of commerce, and individuals. Its purpose is to inform Maryland’s business community, elected officials, and the general public about the political and economic environment needed to foster economic development and job creation in Maryland. Annual evaluations of the voting records of Maryland’s state and federal legislators enable Maryland Free and its members to hold politicians accountable for the state’s economic well-being like no other organization.

For more information, visit www.mbrg.org and follow us on Facebook at www.facebook.com/mbrg.fb

Name: Centerpartiets Ungdomsförbund
Description:
Centerpartiets Ungdomsförbund är det gröna liberala alternativet i svensk politik. Vi tror på din rätt att få älska vem du vill, arbeta med vad du vill och bo vart du vill. Vi vill se ett Sverige där tillväxt och klimatsmarta lösningar går hand i hand, ett Sverige där din kompetens och inte ditt utseende avgör om du får ett jobb, ett Sverige där fler kan vakna på morgonen och veta att arbetet väntar. Vi tror inte på att staten eller politiker ska ha för mycket över ditt liv. Vi tror på dig!

Vill du ha mer information om oss kan du maila på cuf@centerpartiet.se.

Name: Høyres Studenter
Description:
Høyres Studenter ble stiftet i 1961, og arbeider for en konservativ  og fremtidsrettet politikk. Våre lokalforeninger organiserer studenter ideologisk, politisk og sosialt. Foreningen fremmer konservative verdier i samfunnet generelt og i det akademiske samfunn spesielt. Vårt primære mål er å nå ut til studentene med en konservativ og liberal ideologi. Vi er sterkt tilknyttet Høyre og får delta i politikkutviklingen i partiet.

Det faglige
Både på nasjonalt og lokalt nivå arrangeres det skoleringer og foredrag med faglig innhold. På skoleringene har medlemmer muligheten til å utvikle seg i alt fra tale og debatt, til eksamensskriving og privatøkonomi. Foredragene går inn på alle tenkelige tema, med mennesker fra organisasjon, politikk, og næringsliv, eller andre med spesiell kompetanse.

Det sosiale
Du får venner for livet i Høyres Studenter. Du trenger ikke være spesielt politisk engasjert for å være medlem hos oss. Å skape et godt nettverk er essensielt for veien videre etter studiene. Ikke minst er det viktig å være en del av et godt studentmiljø mens du studerer. I Høyres Studenter får man raskt et stort nettverk og gode venner for livet.

Lokalforeningene
Den viktigste delen av Høyres Studenter er lokalforeningene. Vi har foreninger knyttet til utdanningsinstitusjoner i Oslo, Bergen, Trøndelag, Stavanger, Tromsø, Akershus, Agder,  Ålesund, Bodø, Buskerud, Innlandet og London. Alle lokalforeningene holder mange ulike arrangementer i løpet av året, og er representert i Landsstyret.

Arbeidsutvalget
Arbeidsutvalget står for den daglige driften av Høyres Studenter og består av fem personer. Disse blir valgt av Landsmøtet hvert 2. år. I dag består Arbeidsutvalget av Erlend Eikeland Uthaug (Leder), Kaia Kjos (Politisk Nestleder), Emilie Nordstrøm (Organisatorisk Nestleder), Ivar Aulie (AU-medlem og internasjonalt ansvarlig) og Mathias Bjørgung (AU-medlem).

Name: Environment Florida
Description:
Environment Florida is a citizen-based environmental advocacy organization and a project of Environment America. We believe there’s something special about Florida— something worth protecting and preserving for future generations. Whether it's exploring in Everglades National Park, enjoying our coastline or swimming in our amazing natural springs network, Florida's natural wonders enrich our lives in countless ways. Yet the places we love and the environmental values so many of us share are too often threatened by powerful industries, shortsighted politicians and more.

Defending our environment requires independent research, tough-minded advocacy and spirited grassroots action. That’s the idea behind Environment Florida. Together with thousands of supporters from all walks of life, we take the kind of action that wins tangible results for our environment.

Name: Jungfreisinnige Kanton Luzern
Description: We believe in the individual freedom of the individual, in which he or she can make his or her own life possible through personal initiative and responsibility. But the liberal path is threatened from all sides. Changing values as well as the dilution of the liberal concept are putting it under severe strain. L’Alliance Solidaire des Français de l’Etranger – ASFE – est un mouvement indépendant dont l'objectif est de défendre exclusivement les intérêts des Français établis à l’étranger.

Notre expertise s’appuie sur un réseau de Français de l’étranger, qui ont décidé de mettre en commun leur expérience au sein de l’Alliance Solidaire dans le but de résoudre les difficultés que vous pouvez rencontrer en tant que Français établis hors de France.

Elle dispose de correspondants locaux dans le monde entier qui relaient les préoccupations de nos concitoyens. L’ASFE entend porter une image positive des Français de l’étranger, fidèle à leur dynamisme et à leur engagement qui en font les meilleurs ambassadeurs de leur pays.

Name: The People's Lobby
Description:
We are a Colorado-based advocacy organization committed to advancing LGBTQ+ rights, equitable education, and economic justice for all. Founded by two lifelong Coloradans with diversified experience in the state legislature, we work in partnership with underserved communities, progressive nonprofits, and labor unions to build power and drive change.
Through diplomatic lobbying, grassroots organizing, targeted issue campaigns, and strategic communications, we aim to shape policies that reflect our shared values of equity, dignity, and justice. In a time of deep national uncertainty, we believe in uniting progressive forces to create a more inclusive and resilient future—for Colorado and the country.

Name: Williams Positive Action Collective
Description: Williams Positive Action Collective exists to confront issues of unfairness on all levels within the State of Mississippi. We are a progressive grassroots movement. Our focus and dedication is on civil rights including voting rights, affordable healthcare, prison reform, religious liberty, education, and economic development.

Name: dbb jugend
Description:
Willkommen bei der dbb jugend! WIR sind die Jugendorganisation des dbb beamtenbund und tarifunion und mit mehr als 150.000 Mitgliedern einer der größten Jugendgewerkschaftsverbände in Deutschland. Wir vertreten die Interessen junger Beschäftigter im öffentlichen Dienst und bei den privatisierten Dienstleistern wie Bahn und Post. Ob Arbeiter*innen, Angestellte oder Beamt*innen – alle im Alter zwischen 16 und 30 Jahren sind bei der dbb jugend bestens aufgehoben.

Als gesellschaftspolitische Kraft befassen wir uns mit genau den Themen, die junge Menschen beschäftigen:  Ob Jugend-, Umwelt- oder Bildungspolitik, die Zukunft Europas, die Digitalisierung der Arbeitswelt oder auch die Frage nach mehr Generationengerechtigkeit – Deine Themen sind unser Anliegen!

Unsere Mitglieder stehen ganz am Anfang ihrer beruflichen Laufbahn, stecken noch mitten in der Ausbildung oder absolvieren gerade ein Studium. Umso wichtiger ist uns das Thema lebenslanges Lernen. In unseren Seminaren bieten wir jungen Menschen die Möglichkeit, sich gezielt weiterzubilden und sich zu vernetzen. Dabei liegt unser Fokus natürlich auf jugend- und gewerkschaftspolitischen Themen, aber genauso wichtig ist uns Deine persönliche Entwicklung.

Ebenfalls ein fester Bestandteil unserer Arbeit ist der Austausch mit unserer Partnergewerkschaft in Israel. Im Rahmen regelmäßiger Begegnungen in Deutschland und in Israel ermöglichen wir Interessierten, in eine fremde Kultur einzutauchen, ein anderes Land und dessen Bewohner kennen zu lernen

Wenn Du mehr über uns und unsere Arbeit erfahren oder Mitglied werden möchtest, dann ruf uns an oder schreib eine Nachricht! Wir freuen uns auf Dich!

Name: Landesverband Berliner Galerien e. V. (lvbg)
Description:
Kompetenz und Qualität für die Kunst

Der Landesverband Berliner Galerien (lvbg) vertritt die Galerien in Berlin und Region und setzt sich auf kultur- und wirtschaftspolitischer Ebene für die nachhaltige Entwicklung des Standortfaktors Kunst in Berlin ein. Er ist in zahlreichen Gremien der Kulturpolitik präsent und pflegt die Netzwerkbildung mit weiteren Partnern der Kunst. 

Der lvbg informiert regelmäßig über das aktuelle Programm  der Galerien und Ausstellungshäuser in Berlin und Region und bietet vielfältige Plattformen für Mitglieder und Interessierte an, z.B. geführte Galerierundgänge und internationale Messepräsenz. 

Seine Mitglieder zeichnen sich durch professionelle Galerietätigkeit im Sinne der durch die europäische Galerienvereinigung F.E.A.G.A. formulierten Standesrichtlinien aus. Sie gewährleisten die kontinuierliche Vermittlungsarbeit der Kunst des 20. und 21. Jh. Darüber hinaus übernehmen die Mitglieder die Förderung lebender Künstler durch Ausstellungen, Publikationen und entsprechende Öffentlichkeitsarbeit.

Description: O SEMCRJ nasceu em dezembro de 1988. Name: Noi, Milano - Social team per Beppe Sala
Description:
L’intera campagna social della candidatura di Beppe Sala per le primarie di Milano 2016 e’ sviluppata da un gruppo di volontari. La sfida è quella di attivare un cosiddetto movimento “bottom-up” (dal basso verso l’alto). 

La funzione principale degli account social di questa campagna non è quello di diffondere un messaggio, quanto piuttosto quello di “ascoltare” il grande popolo dei social. 

Ovviamente esiste la funzione “comunicativa” (informazioni, avvisi, etc.), ma il grosso del lavoro è quello di “ascoltare” e usare i canali ufficiali per diffondere e amplificare i messaggi che arrivano dal basso. 

L’obiettivo della campagna social è quello di attivare un numero significativo di persone, gruppi, communities a supportare la candidatura di Beppe Sala. Gli account di campagna servono come connettore, ma la strategia eè quella di mobilitare il maggior numero di persone, in modalità bottom up.

La presenza online di Beppe Sala è una costellazione di piattaforme, luoghi (virtuali) e persone molto diverse tra loro che a vario titolo mettono energia, impegno nel progetto “Noi, Milano”.

Name: Insieme Per Roma
Description:
Insieme per Roma – Lista Claudio Miglio Presidente nasce con l’obiettivo di rappresentare, tutelare e rilanciare l’ODCEC di Roma nel quadriennio 2026–2030, rimettendo al centro dell’Ordine le persone, il valore delle competenze e i bisogni concreti della categoria.

Il nostro programma si fonda su serietà, inclusione e concretezza. Vogliamo un Ordine più vicino agli iscritti, capace di offrire servizi reali e strumenti utili per affrontare le sfide quotidiane della professione.

Tra gli impegni prioritari:
– tutela della professione e dell’equo compenso
– riduzione dei costi e servizi convenzionati per gli iscritti
– sostegno concreto a giovani professionisti, colleghe in maternità e senior
– formazione gratuita e di alta qualità, con attenzione a digitale, ESG, crisi d’impresa e intelligenza artificiale
– rafforzamento delle Commissioni, dell’OCC e della Fondazione Telos
– trasparenza, partecipazione e dialogo costante con le istituzioni

Crediamo in un Ordine che non sia solo un ente amministrativo, ma una casa comune, autorevole e moderna, capace di ascoltare, rappresentare e valorizzare ogni collega, costruendo opportunità di crescita per tutta la comunità professionale.

Il 15 e 16 gennaio 2026, alle elezioni dell’Ordine dei Dottori Commercialisti e degli Esperti Contabili di Roma, vota Claudio Miglio Presidente | Insieme per Roma.

Name: Confederation of Indian Political Consultants
Description:
The Confederation of Indian Political Consultants (CIPC) is an all-India apex body representing professional political consultants in India. It was formed in 2018 with the primary objective of providing a platform to Indian political consultants to network, collaborate and share best practices. Its members include veteran political strategists, pollsters, media advisors, PR experts, digital marketers, and other professionals from the political consultancy sector.

The CIPC strives to promote the growth of the political consulting sector in India by creating an enabling environment for professional and ethical practices in the sector and providing comprehensive support to its members. It also works with the government and other stakeholders to ensure that the sector gets the recognition and support it deserves.

The CIPC organizes several events and activities throughout the year, such as conferences, workshops, seminars and networking opportunities, to promote the sector and to enable its members to stay abreast of the latest trends and developments in the sector.

The CIPC also provides extensive support to its members, including access to research and information, advice on professional development and marketing, and opportunities to network with other members. It also acts as a platform to facilitate collaboration and partnerships among political consultants in India.

Name: Sosyal Demokrasi Vakfı
Description:
SODEV ( Social Democracy Foundation) has been founded in 1994 by more than 100 people aiming at development and propagation of the social democratic “ideal”. 

Until today, SODEV organized about 1000activities such as meetings, conferences, workshops, symposiums, etc. 
 
It is of a great importance for SODEV to cooperate with similar NGO's for democracy and peace. In this respect, SODEV founded "the Social democracy school" in collaboration with TÜSES, which is a social democratic research institution. 

Since the foundation pays special attention to establishing contact and granting solidarity with young people, special seminars for them are organized. SODEV has also granted scholarships for young students until 2005.  

70 books and booklets have been published up today as "SODEV-publications". The "social democracy library" contains more than 5000 special books, booklets and documents. 

SODEV organises meetings, once a week in average, on its own account or in cooperation with its partners. The subject to be treated and the shape of the activity depend on the national and international conjoncture and the fund allocated for the purpose. Twice a year “weekend seminars” are organized in order to reach among members a common view and terminology concerning main issues. These meetings, conferences, workshops, symposiums are essentially directed to Turkish public opinion, but may include also foreign participation.

Name: Grüne Bezirk Uster
Description:
Unser Bezirk ist reich an Lebensqualität: mit einem See, Bächen, Wäldern, Wiesen, Dörfern und städtischen Zentren wie Uster und Dübendorf. Diese Vielfalt gilt es zu erhalten: Nutzen wir die bereits bebauten Flächen optimal und belassen wir das Umland naturnah! Es braucht weder neue Siedlungen auf der grünen Wiese noch zusätzliche Strassen, auch keine Autobahn zwischen Uster und Hinwil: Wir Grünen wollen nicht den Verkehr der San-Bernardino-Route im Bezirk!

Wir wollen die Eigenständigkeit unseres Bezirks stärken, statt ihn vollends auf die Stadt Zürich auszurichten. Die Agglomeration ist nicht nur zum Schlafen da! Sie bietet auch Arbeitsplätze und eine breite Palette kultureller Angebote für alle Altersgruppen.

Wir unterstützen die Produktion und Vermarktung von lokalen und regionalen Produkten, wie es beispielsweise das Label Uster plus propagiert. Nur kurze Wege sind sinnvolle Wege. Nachhaltige Entwicklung heisst dezentrale, regionale Entwicklung.

Wir unterstützen, dass die öffentliche Hand vermehrt erneuerbare Energie aus der Region fördert. Der Kanton realisiert seine öffentlichen Neubauten nach dem Minergie-P-Standard und übernimmt so Vorbildfunktion für andere Hausbesitzer. Nur mit selbstverantwortlichem Handeln können wir den ungezügelten Energieverbrauch und den globalen Klimawandel stoppen.

Wir wollen Chancenvielfalt bei Chancengleichheit für Familien. Mütter und Väter sollen sich nicht zwischen Familie und Arbeit entscheiden müssen. Beides soll miteinander vereinbar sein. Der Kanton Zürich soll den Ausbau von Tagesstrukturen und die Familien ergänzende Betreuungsmöglichkeiten unterstützen. Damit wird auch ein entscheidender Beitrag für die Integration von sozial und wirtschaftlich Benachteiligten geleistet.

Fördern wir die vielen Qualitäten unseres Bezirks! Denn so wird er zu einem interessanten Wirtschafts- und Wohngebiet – und nicht durch tiefe Steuern!

Danke, dass Sie die Grünen im Bezirk Uster unterstützen.

Name: Ethiopian Citizens for Social Justice (#Ezema)
Description:
Ethiopian Citizens for Social Justice (Ezema) is a political Party established in May 2019 with the vision of instilling citizenship based politics and social justice in Ethiopia. Ezema currently operates in 412 election districts out of the 547 nationwide.

Ezema believes Ethiopian needs a constitutional reform to establish a democratic system that ensures a peaceful and prosperous coexistence . A Federal structure is the only viable state structure that can deliver on promises of good governance, self governance and management of diversity. However, the current ethno-linguistic federal arrangement needs to be reconfigured in such a way that considers issues such as ease for administration and development; culture, psychology and settlement; distribution of natural and other resources as well as in a way that the configuration  promotes peaceful coexistence.

Ezema also believes the system of government should move to a presidential system with proper check and balance between the organs of government.

Social Justice is the political philosophy of Ezema in which the society takes collective responsibility to ensure equal opportunity for all citizens regardless of religion, ethnicity, gender, wealth, disability.

Name: Yuh-Line Niou for New York
Description:
Yuh-Line Niou has spent her life working on legislative and advocacy campaigns. In 2016, Yuh-Line was elected to serve the 65th Assembly District, representing the following Lower Manhattan neighborhoods: the Lower East Side, Chinatown, South Street Seaport, Financial District, and Battery Park City.

Yuh-Line Niou began working on state policy issues while in college, eventually accepting a position with the Washington State House Health Committee Chair. While there, she helped develop policies to expand senior access to prescription medication, improve women’s health care, and expand health coverage for low-income families. Yuh-Line then went on to advocate and organize for anti-poverty issues, where she helped build a broad coalition to fight predatory lending and assist low-income families build financial assets. She then served as Chief of Staff for New York State Assemblymember Ron Kim. Under her leadership, the office assisted thousands of immigrants, seniors, workers, and students. She has fought to expand language access for immigrant communities, and for more affordable housing and expanded services for seniors.

In the Assembly, Yuh-Line has continued her advocacy work around many issues. In financial empowerment, she has pushed to improve financial protections for consumers, particularly for those who do not use banking institutions. On housing, Yuh-Line has worked to secure funding for New York City Housing Authority (NYCHA) repairs, and has stood with tenant rights advocates for better housing regulations. Along with her colleagues, Yuh-Line helped form New York State’s first ever Asian Pacific American Legislative Task Force, which focuses on advancing issues impacting New York’s Asian American community.

Yuh-Line completed her Master’s degree in Public Administration at CUNY Baruch College. She is also an alumna of the National Urban Fellowship program. Yuh-Line lives in the Financial District with her handsome dog, Samson.

Name: Frit Forum
Description:
Frit Forum er et stærkt politisk fællesskab for studerende. Foreningen blev stiftet i 1943 i København, og sidenhen er der blevet stiftet Frit Forum foreninger på de fleste af landets universiteter. Kernen i Frit Forum er den politiske debat. Vi diskuterer en lang række forskellige emner – lige fra traditionel studenterpolitik til velfærdssamfundet, EU, klima og meget mere. I Frit Forum diskuteres ud fra et socialdemokratisk værdigrundlag.

Frit Forum består af seks lokalforeninger. Selvom Frit Forum overordnet dækker over én organisation, er der forskel på lokalforeningerne og deres aktiviteter. Lokalforeningerne er selvstændige og de respektive foreningers medlemmer bestemmer selv, hvad de lægger vægt på.

I Frit Forum lægger vi også vægt på, at lære hinanden at kende på tværs af lokalforeningerne. Bl.a. derfor tager vi hvert år på studietur til udlandet. Her besøger vi internationale organisationer, virksomheder, universiteter eller politiske bevægelser og partier. Derudover mødes medlemmer på tværs af foreningerne flere gange årligt til møder, kurser og til Frit Forums årlige kongres.

Name: Marsy's Law for All
Description:
Marsy’s Law for All is dedicated to the cause of ensuring that crime victims’ rights are codified in law throughout the United States. When it passed in November 2008, Proposition 9, The California Victims’ Bill of Rights Act of 2008: Marsy’s Law, became the strongest and most comprehensive Constitutional victims’ rights law in the U.S. and put California at the forefront of the national victims’ rights movement.

Dr. Henry T. Nicholas, the co-founder of Broadcom Corp., was the key backer and proponent of Marsy’s Law. Marsy's Law is named after Dr. Nicholas’ sister, Marsalee (Marsy) Ann Nicholas, a beautiful, vibrant University of California Santa Barbara student, who was stalked and killed by her ex-boyfriend in 1983. Only a week after Marsy was murdered, Dr. Nicholas and Marsy’s mother, Mrs. Marcella Leach, walked into a grocery store after visiting her daughter’s grave and was confronted by the accused murderer. She had no idea that he had been released on bail.  

Now, Dr. Nicholas is now lending his support to equal crime victims’ rights efforts across the United States. Currently, efforts are underway in Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Kentucky, Maine, New Hampshire, Nevada, North Carolina, Oklahoma, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.

Name: Juventude Livre
Description:
Somos a JL - Juventude e Livre, um movimento estudantil de defesa da liberdade que se originou de um projeto dentro do Students for Liberty. Nosso propósito é promover a diversidade de pensamento no cenário acadêmico, enquanto trabalhamos para combater a hegemonia ideológica de esquerda que prevalece nas nossas universidades e na UNE - União Nacional dos Estudantes.

Impulsionados pelo ideal de liberdade e voluntariado, reunimos estudantes de todos os estados do Brasil e Distrito Federal. Juntos, dedicamo-nos incansavelmente a promover um ensino superior com pluralidade de ideias, comprometido com a liberdade individual e livre mercado.

Una-se a esta causa que transcende fronteiras geográficas e partidárias. Vamos colaborar para construir um ambiente acadêmico mais livre e verdadeiramente democrático. Venha conosco trabalhar por uma educação que valorize e respeite a liberdade!

Name: Federación de Estudiantes Judíos (Chile)
Description:
La Federación de Estudiantes Judíos (FEJ) es una organización amparada bajo el alero de la Comunidad Judía de Chile (CJCh) cuya misión consiste en propender la unidad entre los Estudiantes Judíos en Chile, incentivando su participación en la protección y promoción de los valores e identidad del pueblo Judío e Israel, el Estado Judío, junto con asegurar su continuidad y pleno desarrollo en términos sociales, culturales y espirituales. Asimismo, tiene como objeto el representar y resguardar el respeto de dichos valores frente a la Comunidad Estudiantil en todos sus niveles. De esta manera, la Federación se adjudica las siguientes responsabilidades:

1. Conglomerar y fortalecer los lazos de solidaridad entre los Estudiantes Judíos de Chile.

2. Facilitar el intercambio de ideas e información entre los Estudiantes Judíos de Chile.

3. Informar y preparar a los Estudiantes Judíos sobre los problemas que afectan y amenazan la subsistencia de Israel y el Judaísmo en la diáspora, con el fin de defender y asegurar los derechos e intereses de la Comunidad Judía de Chile. Esto incluye la lucha contra la difamación, racismo, antisemitismo y revisionismo, mediante el esclarecimiento.

4. Representar y actuar a favor de los Estudiantes Judíos de Chile ante las autoridades estudiantiles en todo el país cuando corresponda.

5. Fortalecer los lazos de solidaridad de los Estudiantes Judíos con el resto de la Comunidad Estudiantil, apoyando y asistiendo las distintas iniciativas de carácter social y cultural que busquen dar un aporte positivo a la sociedad.

6. En general, realizar y colaborar en todas aquellas otras iniciativas que puedan ser incidentales o conducentes al logro de los fines anteriormente propuestos.

Name: The Next Generation
Description:
The Next Generation (TNG) is a full-service campaign consulting and management, and issue advocacy firm, specializing in environmental and progressive candidates and issues in the Bay Area and across California.

Whether you are a candidate for elected office, an organization or business, or your issue is a ballot measure, proposed legislation, or simply a public outreach effort, we will help you craft a smart political strategy, organize your operation, develop a winning message, and effectively communicate your ideas.

Name: Progressief Ermelo
Description:
Progressief Ermelo bestaat onder andere uit leden en sympathisanten van GroenLinks, PvdA, D66, SP, Volt en het voormalige Ermelo 2000.
Ook mensen die geen lid zijn van een landelijke politieke partij zijn betrokken bij Progressief Ermelo. De partij is er voor iedereen die vernieuwende oplossingen niet schuwt en staat voor een sociaal, duurzaam en groen Ermelo.
Voor ‘progressieve’ mensen die vinden dat het anders kan en moet in Ermelo.

Name: Unge funksjonshemmede
Description:
Unge funksjonshemmede er en paraplyorganisasjon for 36 organisasjoner og grupperinger av ungdom med funksjonshemning og kronisk sykdom. 

Vårt formål er å sikre deltakelse og samfunnsmessig likestilling for unge med funksjonshemninger og kronisk sykdom. 

Vi jobber med politikk, kunnskap og opplysning, og støtte til medlemsorganisasjonene.

Name: Fundación Internacional para la Libertad
Description:
La Fundación Internacional para la Libertad (FIL), presidida por el Premio Nobel de Literatura D. Mario Vargas Llosa, nace en octubre de 2002 y tiene como principal objetivo la defensa de aquellos principios cuya instauración constituyen las bases de la democracia, la libertad y la prosperidad. Su constitución ha sido una iniciativa de un grupo de intelectuales y referentes de think tanks de ambos lados del Atlántico (Estados Unidos, Iberoamérica y Europa).


Misión: 

La misión de la Fundación Internacional para la Libertad (FIL) es la defensa y promoción de los principios de libertad, democracia y estado de derecho, adoptando estrategias destinadas a luchar, en el campo de las ideas, contra quienes amenazan estos valores.

Visión: 

La visión de la FIL es la de un mundo libre y próspero donde los principios de libertad individual, derechos de propiedad, gobierno limitado y mercados libres estén asegurados por el Estado de Derecho.

Name: De Veerse VVD
Description: Lokale politieke partij in de gemeente Veere, die zich bezig houdt met de onderwerpen die het belang van elke inwoner van Veere dienen. Veere is een unieke gemeente met unieke inwoners en VVD Veere wil er gewoon zijn voor elke inwoner van deze mooie gemeente.

Name: Movimiento Estudiantil por la Psicología Científica
Description:
Organización estudiantil que lucha por el avance de las ciencias psicológicas y el pensamiento crítico en las facultades de psicología de Argentina. Nuestro objetivo es reclamar por una mejora en los programas de estudio, los cuales sufren ciertas deficiencias en torno al contenido de los mismos (desactualización, antigüedad, predominancia de pocos autores, poco contenido científico, etc.) (Catriel, 2018). 

Buscamos aprender sobre diversos temas afínes a las ciencias y al estudio del comportamiento a través de múltiples grupos de estudio, También, nos ocupamos de difundir conocimiento vía redes sociales, transformando nuestras ganas de aprender en difusión de contenido ameno y educativo.

Name: Esquerra
Description:
Benvolgut amic, benvolguda amiga,

Gràcies per visitar el web nacional d'Esquerra Republicana de Catalunya, un espai d'informació sobre el nostre partit i de seguiment de l'actualitat informativa.

A Esquerra Republicana estem convençuts que, en l'objectiu d'assolir un país lliure i més just, hem d'arribar al major nombre de persones possibles i que per aconseguir-ho hem de fer servir tots els canals de comunicació al nostre abast. En aquest sentit, el web nacional hi juga un paper fonamental, no només per trametre informació, sinó per fomentar el diàleg amb tota la bona gent que comparteix els nostres objectius.

Esperem que aquesta eina et permeti conèixer amb més profunditat el projecte polític d'Esquerra Republicana que t'animis a ajudar-nos per construir un futur més pròsper per al nostre país.

Salut i República!

Name: TN Fertility Advocates
Description: TN Fertility Advocates is proposing fertility-friendly legislation in Tennessee, defining statewide industry standards for fertility care, and providing networking opportunities for fertility professionals and advocates in their quest to build a family.

Name: Ένωση Κεντρώων Κύπρου - Union of Centrists Cyprus
Description:
“Η ενασχόληση με τα κοινά (πολιτική) δεν θα πρέπει σε καμία περίπτωση να σχετίζεται με την προσωπική και ατομική προβολή καθώς και οικονομικές και άλλου είδους απολαβές από μέρους του πολιτικού.
Τουναντίον μάλιστα πρέπει να χαρακτηρίζεται από την συνεχή και ακατάπαυστη διάθεση προσφοράς στο κοινωνικό σύνολο και την πατρίδα
Η ανιδιοτέλεια η αυτοθυσία και η αυταπάρνηση η ένταξη του ατομικού στο συλλογικό συμφέρον είναι εκείνα τα χαρακτηριστικά που πρέπει να έχει ένας πολιτικός και ευρύτερα ένας πνευματικός ηγέτης.
Η ιδέα του σοσιαλισμού που δυστυχώς καταπατήθηκε στις ημέρες μας από κάποιους επίδοξους δημαγωγούς και σφετεριστές της δημοκρατίας με εκφράζει απόλυτα.”

Name: National Unity Platform

Description: Nous sommes une organisation basée à Mashteuiatsh, qui vise à rassembler, autour de points communs, des jeunes de 18 à 40 ans de la Nation des Pekuakamiulnuatsh, afin de valoriser notre identité, nos voix dans le respect de notre culture.

Name: CDU Nordrhein-Westfalen
Description:
Die CDU in Nordrhein-Westfalen ist die moderne Volkspartei der Mitte. Zwischen Rhein und Weser, von Aachen bis Minden, von Münster bis Siegen, gestalten wir die Zukunft unseres Bundeslandes aktiv mit. Wir sind der größte Landesverband der CDU Deutschlands. Unsere Fraktion ist die größte im Landtag von Nordrhein-Westfalen und unser Landesvorsitzender Hendrik Wüst MdL ist zugleich der Ministerpräsident des bevölkerungsreichsten deutschen Bundeslandes, Nordrhein-Westfalen.

Mit über 100.000 CDU-Mitgliedern in 8 Bezirksverbänden, 54 Kreisverbänden, 8 Vereinigungen und 4 NRW-weit aktiven Sonderorganisationen bzw. Arbeitskreisen sind wir in unserer Struktur einzigartig und sehr stark aufgestellt, um gemeinsam mit unseren ehrenamtlichen sowie hauptamtlichen Unterstützern und Mitarbeitern stets so nah an den Menschen zu sein, wie es nur geht. Wenn Sie ein Teil unseres Teams werden möchten, ob als Mitglied oder Mitarbeiter (m/w/d), dann schreiben Sie uns gerne, auch initiativ! Die politischen Herausforderungen unsere Zeit brauchen und verdienen Menschen, die mehr machen wollen, als nur zuzuschauen! Und wir wollen genau das: Machen, worauf es ankommt, in einem starken Team!

Name: Sacramento County Young Democrats
Description:
The Sacramento County Young Democrats pledge to pursue the ideas of liberty, justice, and freedom for all regardless of race, religion, sexual orientation, or sex. Our purpose is to stimulate in young people an active interest in government affairs, increase the efficiency of popular government, maintain viability of our free institutions, and contribute to the growth and influence of the ideals and philosophy of the Democratic Party and to have fun and network while achieving these goals.

SCYD is comprised of Democrats ages 18-35 that live or work in Sacramento County and is the largest Young Democrats chapter in California. Predecessor local Young Democrats groups have existed in Sacramento County since at least the 1960s. In the early 2000s, a merger between a Capitol-focused Young Democrats club and a local-focused Young Democrats club gave way to the current organization.

Sacramento County Young Democrats members connect and build community through monthly membership meetings, happy hours, and committee meetings.

Club members are very active; volunteering to walk precincts, phone bank and fund raise for candidates and issues they care about. Throughout the year, club members regularly give back to the Sacramento area through frequent community service opportunities.

In recent years, the Sacramento County Young Democrats has become increasingly involved in the Sacramento County political community and looks forward to continuing to partner with other Democratic clubs, Democratic public officials and candidates, and community leaders and organizations.

Name: College Democrats of New York
Description: College Democrats of New York is the official college outreach wing of the New York State Democratic party. As an affiliate of College Democrats of America, our goal is to empower young progressives one student at a time. We are committed to electing strong progressive Democrats in the state of New York and across the country.

Name: Yung Koprowski for Gilbert
Description: I was appointed to Gilbert Town Council in April 2020 which lasts until the end of the calendar year 2022. As a Gilbert resident since 2008, I’ve watched the Town of Gilbert grow and evolve from the sidelines. As a transportation engineer, I’ve shaped the Town’s infrastructure directly and indirectly, and now I have an opportunity to play a more active role in public works and beyond. I’m honored to serve the community and bring a fresh, diverse perspective to the council.

Name: Leaders for Tomorrow (L4T)
Description:
Leaders for Tomorrow (L4T) PAC is dedicated to supporting elected leaders focused on equity, economic development and strengthening opportunity for marginalized communities. As a nonpartisan PAC, L4T convenes various stakeholders to foster conversation and strengthen progress around key issues to amplify its goals.

Through supporting and endorsing candidates committed to these issues at the local, state and federal level, L4T can help reverse decades of disinvestment in communities across the country.

Name: Labour Friends of Yemen
Description: Labour Friends of Yemen is a forum within the Labour Party for constructive discussions and responsible debates on matters related to Yemen, with the aims to promote and advocate a clear vision for supporting the country to reach peace and help its people to rebuild a modern state based on principles of democracy, human rights and equal citizenship.

Name: CDA Eindhoven
Description:
Het CDA Eindhoven is een moderne volkspartij waarbij de gemeenschap centraal staat; de samenleving van mensen die elk voor een stukje van de wereld verantwoordelijk zijn. Het gezin, de school, de wijk, de vereniging; zij vormen de ruggengraat van de samenleving. 

Vanuit dit gemeenschapsdenken doet het CDA een appèl aan iedereen om op zijn eigen plaats, naar zijn eigen mogelijkheden en talenten, zijn verantwoordelijkheid te nemen. 

Het CDA heeft 6 zetels in de Eindhovense gemeenteraad en levert 2 wethouders in het college van burgemeester en wethouders. Wij zijn een actief, divers en enthousiast team die graag de mouwen opstroopt en voor de Eindhovense inwoners opkomt. 

Volg op deze pagina het laatste nieuws van de partij. Heb je een vraag of idee? App ons op 06-51730977.

Name: Bayerischer Städtetag
Description: Der Bayerische Städtetag ist als kommunaler Spitzenverband eine Körperschaft des öffentlichen Rechts. Er tritt als Anwalt der Städte und Gemeinden gegenüber Parlament und Staatsregierung für die Wahrung der kommunalen Selbstverwaltung ein und vertritt die Belange der Städte gegenüber der Wirtschaft und anderen Interessengruppen.

Description:
Vi vil modarbejde diskrimination og hadforbrydelser mod LGBTQI+ personer i Danmark. 

Målet er 1000 eksempler inden 2021.

Brug din stemme. Sammen dokumenterer vi omfanget af hadet - sammen stopper vi det.

#LevogLadLeve

Name: Associated Builders & Contractors Greater Michigan Chapter
Description:
ABC values economic freedom within a free-market economy, with open and fair competition and diverse participants constantly striving to achieve the highest levels of personal and company performance.

ABC values the highest levels of personal and corporate standards of behavior characterized by responsibility, accountability and integrity, with demonstrated personal and industry professionalism by all participants.

MISSION
ABC will continually strive to be the leading voice promoting free enterprise within the construction industry. ABC will promote and defend the merit shop philosophy. This philosophy encourages open competition and a free-enterprise approach to construction based solely on merit, regardless of labor affiliation.

VISION
The Vision of ABC is an environment in which people and companies succeed based on free-enterprise principles within the free-market system.

CORE PURPOSE
The Core Purpose of ABC is to advance and defend the principles of the merit shop in the construction industry and to provide members and their employees with an opportunity to succeed.

ABC/GMC is also home to Greater Michigan Construction Academy which facilitates opportunities for career growth in the construction industry through continuing education programs. Providing such programs is important to the construction industry to achieve knowledgeable employees and a safe work environment.

Name: Conservation Federation of Missouri
Description: The Conservation Federation of Missouri, CFM, is a working to protect Missouri's natural resources and outdoor heritage. CFM is a private organization made up of thousands of Missourians who work together to better our great state, and represents Missouri’s citizen conservationists. Actively involved in state and national issues that relate to conservation, the Federation has long been a prominent and effective voice before the Missouri general assembly, the Missouri Department of Conservation and the Missouri Department of Natural Resources.

Welcome to the Iowa House Democrats page. We work for the people of Iowa by keeping focused on growing Iowa’s middle class and working together to find common sense solutions.

Find your Representative by visiting https://www.legis.iowa.gov/Legislators/find.aspx and putting in your address or zipcode.

Description:

Name: Heerenveen Lokaal
Description:
Heerenveen Lokaal  is de onafhankelijke lokale partij van Heerenveense en voor Heerenveense inwoners. Eerlijk, direct, met gezond verstand en in beweging.
Wij komen op voor uw belang.
Voor úw Zorg, úw Omgeving, úw Welzijn, úw Jeugd, úw Cultuur, úw Onderneming, úw Sport, vertegenwoordigen wij úw Belangen, onafhankelijk en zonder partij- ideologie, van onder af en met veel ervaring in het Heerenveens bestuur.
Ons doel is een dienstbare, transparant bestuurde gemeente die het gemeenschapsgeld goed (zinvol en verantwoord) besteedt.
Het gaat weer goed met Heerenveen en er is een geweldige slag gemaakt in de afgelopen 8 jaar. Dit moet ook ten goede komen van onze inwoners en ondernemers.
Wij zijn trots op het dynamische Heerenveen en haar buitengebied. Wij hebben aandacht voor wijken en dorpen en koesteren de vrijwilligers die zich inzetten voor de leefbaarheid van onze mooie gemeente.

Name: Young Greens of England and Wales
Description:
Young Greens are the youth and student branch of the Green Party. We aim to harness the energy and ideas of young people, and change the direction of our society towards a sustainable and just future. We believe that our political system must be changed from the inside as well as by wider society.

We exist to combine the principled actions and campaigning we see in our communities with electoral politics  We aim to represent the values that have disappeared from politics and left people disillusioned. We organise within and beyond the Green Party in the interests of young people.

Name: VALERIO BORDONARO
Description:
Ci sono migliaia di cose da fare e che si possono fare.

Description: De thema-afdeling Europa entameert het inhoudelijke debat over de EU, fungeert als klankbord naar D66 op het gebied van Europese zaken. Zij is zichtbaar voor wat betreft Europese onderwerpen en voert permanent een landelijke campagne om Europa dichter bij de D66-leden te brengen.

Description: Liberal. Demokratisch. Pointiert!

Name: B Plus Belgium
Description:
B Plus combat le séparatisme et soutient un fédéralisme adulte, équilibré et efficace, basé sur le respect de la diversité et de la solidarité. Les six précédentes réformes de l'État ont toujours accordé plus d’autonomie aux régions et aux communautés, mais ont accordé trop peu d’importance à l'équilibre de l’ensemble.

B Plus plaide pour une Belgique fédérale et efficace. Nous pensons que toute réforme de l’État doit prendre en compte l’équilibre institutionnel global. La prochaine réforme devra donc renforcer les institutions fédérales afin d’améliorer la gouvernance de l’ensemble du pays. Le transfert continu de compétences aux communautés et aux régions a montré ses limites. L’heure est venue pour une réforme de l'État équilibrée.

B Plus veut être le lieu de rassemblement de tous ceux qui croient à la plus-value de la Belgique en tant qu’État multiculturel au cœur de l’Europe. Nous voulons mettre un terme aux dérives séparatistes ou « confédéralistes ». B Plus veut être un catalyseur pour tous ceux qui, au-delà des frontières partisanes, veulent donner un avenir à la Belgique.

Name: (Hackathon project) UniteUS
Description: Through replacements of outdated statues and modern installations; daily online presentations of influential individuals from diverse backgrounds; and local community support through the promotion of diverse business owners, UniteUS strives to facilitate social good now and far into the future.

Name: EenUtrecht
Description:
Betaalbaar in de stad kunnen wonen, studeren en werken. Gehoord worden. Zelf méér kunnen beslissen en doen. Verschillen waarderen en discriminatie daadwerkelijk aanpakken. Dat is wat de meeste Utrechters willen. 

Maar, dat is nu niet zo. Het huidige stadsbestuur maakt Utrecht onbetaalbaar en jaagt een extreem ongezonde groei van de stad na, luistert niet echt naar de Utrechters én negeert de tweedeling in onze stad. Dat moet stoppen. Utrecht is óók van jou, stem EenUtrecht!

Name: Rising Voices, a Project of Center for Empowered Politics
Description:
About Rising Voices

Asian Americans are the fastest growing racial group in the state of Michigan, and are often the margin of victory in key municipalities and counties in Michigan. From Bengalis in Detroit and Hamtramck through Macomb County, South and East Asians in Oakland and Washtenaw Counties and Burmese in Battle Creek, to Southeast Asians in Kentwood and Holland on the west side of the state, Asian American Michiganders voted in record numbers in 2020. Rising Voices works to keep the momentum going. As the only Asian American organization in the state working to elect progressive candidates and move progressive policy, Rising Voices seeks, in addition to its non- partisan work, to continue to build up the power of Asian American communities in Michigan to have a seat at the policymaking table and be acknowledged as a powerful political force.

Formed in 2019, Rising Voices is a fiscally sponsored 501(c4) nonprofit organization that seeks to organize and develop the leadership of Asian American women (cis, trans, Gender Non- Conforming and femme-identifying) and young people for power around progressive values and issues in the state of Michigan.

Rising Voices is c4-facing, however much of the work is c3 and non-partisan and is funded through Rising Voices Fund.

Name: Unión Cívica Radical - Comité Nacional
Description:
La Unión Cívica Radical (UCR) es un partido político de Argentina fundado el 26 de junio de 1891 por Leandro N. Alem. Gobernó varias veces el país en oportunidad de las presidencias de Hipólito Yrigoyen, Marcelo T. de Alvear, Arturo Frondizi, Arturo Illia, Raúl Alfonsín y Fernando de la Rúa.
La UCR reúne grupos con diversas ideologías como el krausismo, el federalismo, el liberalismo, el nacionalismo, el conservadurismo, el desarrollismo y la socialdemocracia, entre otras. Se ha caracterizado por su ideología defensora del laicismo, de inspiración igualitarista, con raíces en el federalismo tradicional y el autonomismo alsinista, habiendo desempeñado un papel decisivo para la conquista del sufragio universal y secreto masculino y la instalación de una democracia liberal en el país, a la vez de resultar ampliamente representativo de las clases medias argentinas durante el siglo XX. Desde 1996 pertenece a la Internacional Socialista.

Name: Clay Jenkins for Dallas County Judge
Description:
Dallas lawyer Clay Jenkins, virtually unknown to voters six months ago, overwhelmed Larry Duncan Tuesday to win the Democratic nomination for Dallas County judge.

“I’m humbled by it all,” Jenkins said amid a jubilant celebration at the Studio Bar & Grill in Dallas. “Democratic voters in Dallas County showed that it was time for new leadership on the Commissioners Court and that people need to work together.”

He now faces Republican Wade Emmert in a November general election that could determine the balance of power on the court.

The battle lines of the fall campaign are coming into clearer focus as leaders from both parties squabble over a host of issues.

Jenkins, 46, said he would rise above the bickering.

“The choice in November will be between a positive, inclusive vision of economic growth for our county or a backward slide into partisan division and bickering,” Jenkins said.

The hallmark of Jenkins’ positive campaign was his call for unity to confront the county’s myriad problems. That’s an ill-disguised slap at Foster, who finished far out of the running on March 2.

The general election could be a tougher challenge, even as the county continues to tilt Democratic.

Jenkins said he was focused on delivering for Dallas County, not his political friends.

“My bosses are the people of Dallas County,” he said. “ I’m proud of my affiliation with the Democratic Party, but this isn’t about partisanship.”

Jenkins has said he’ll bind the political wounds suffered during the last four years, a promise that could hinge on the Democrats’ ability to wrest control of Commissioners Court from the Republicans.

“To make this county all that it can be, we need leadership that utilizes all the talent of all our people,” he said.
—Dallas Morning News, April 13th, 2010

Name: Bossche VVD
Description: De Bossche VVD werkt aan een liberaal en toekomstgericht ’s-Hertogenbosch. Als lokale partij met een landelijk netwerk, enthousiaste leden en gezellige activiteiten staan wij midden in de samenleving en kijken we met een positieve blik naar de toekomst!

Name: Libertarian Party of Ohio
Description: The Libertarian Party of Ohio is the third largest political party in Ohio, and the only one dedicated to the principles of smaller, limited government, lower taxes, and more personal liberty for the residents of the State of Ohio.  The Libertarian Party of Ohio has the same vision as the Libertarian Party, which is “for a world in which all individuals can freely exercise the natural right of sole dominion over their own lives, liberty and property by building a political party that elects Libertarians to public office, and moving public policy in a libertarian direction.”

Name: Rashtra Connect
Description: Rashtra Connect is a dynamic political consulting firm committed to bridging the gap between political leaders and citizens through innovative engagement strategies. We leverage data-driven insights to empower political campaigns and foster meaningful connections with constituents. At Rashtra Connect, we believe in the power of democracy and strive to make it more vibrant, participative, and representative. Our diverse team of strategists, researchers, communicators, and designers bring a wealth of experience from leading institutions and industries. Our comprehensive suite of services includes strategic campaign management, digital outreach, constituency management, ground intelligence, grassroots mobilization, media relations, research and analytics. We aim to democratise access to sophisticated political research and strategy, level the playing field and empower a wider range of voices in the political arena.

Name: JOVD Rijnmond
Description:
De JOVD Rijnmond is dé liberale jongerenorganisatie van Rotterdam en wijde omstreken en staat open voor alle politiek geïnteresseerden van 14 tot en met 31 jaar. Bij de JOVD Rijnmond horen ook de commissie JOVD Delft. Voor additionele informatie over deze commissies, verwijzen wij u graag door naar hun eigen webpagina.

Als politiek onafhankelijke liberale jongerenorganisatie schromen wij niet om onze mening te delen in de politieke arena van Rotterdam en omstreken. Dat betekent dat wij middels mediaoptredens, persberichten en opiniestukken proberen om ons liberaal geluid gehoord te laten worden

Tevens hebben wij ook een educatieve rol voor de Rijnmondiaanse jongeren. Deze rol uit zich door een breed aanbod aan cursussen en trainingen aan te bieden aan onze leden. Denk daarbij bijvoorbeeld aan discussietechnieken, (de geschiedenis van) politieke stromingen, en spreken in het openbaar.

Naast cursussen en trainingen organiseren wij regelmatig sprekersavonden. Al vele interessante politici hebben wij bij onze prachtige afdeling mogen verwelkomen, waarbij zij van zowel binnen als buiten de VVD afkomstig zijn. Ook niet-politieke thema's proberen wij aan te snijden, door bijvoorbeeld historici, schrijvers of ondernemers uit te nodigen.

Tot slot wisselen wij serieuze activiteiten ook af met meer informele activiteiten, waar politieke inhoud niet de leidraad is. Wij hebben onder andere onze themaborrels, het jaarlijkse kerstdiner en de barbecue. Gemiddeld hebben wij eenmaal per maand zo'n apolitieke activiteit. Verreweg onze beste activiteit, zowel op politiek als apolitiek vlak, is de afdelingsreis. Zo zijn wij vorig jaar naar Bosnië en Herzegovina afgereisd.

Name: Passauer Politiktage
Description: Passauer Politiktage 2025: Deutschland nach der Wahl - Perspektiven eines Neuanfangs

Name: Raad Utrecht
Description:
De gemeenteraad vertegenwoordigt inwoners bij het besturen van de stad. De gemeenteraadsleden hebben contact met inwoners, ondernemers en organisaties. Ze verzamelen ideeën, discussiëren daarover en nemen besluiten.

Vervolgens voert het college van burgemeester en wethouders (het dagelijks bestuur van de stad) dit uit en de gemeenteraad controleert of en hoe de gemaakte afspraken zijn nagekomen. 

Inwoners van Utrecht kiezen iedere 4 jaar 45 raadsleden. De Utrechtse gemeenteraad bestaat uit 17 fracties (politieke partijen).

Description: Wir machen als SPD im Landtag soziale Politik für dich! Deshalb kämpfen wir als Sozialdemokrat:innen für gleichwertige Lebensverhältnisse, gute Gesundheitsversorgung, Klimaschutz und zukunftsfähige Innovationen sowie ein solidarisches Miteinander.

Name: Dansk Storbyturisme
Description: Dansk Storbyturisme er det nationale udviklingsselskab, som samler Destination NORD, Destination Fyn, VisitAarhus og Wonderful Copenhagen. Samarbejdet i Dansk Storbyturisme sigter på at styrke de danske storbyers internationale markedsandele til gavn for de enkelte byer og for hele dansk turisme.

Name: Ontario Young Progressive Conservative Association
Description: The Ontario Young Progressive Conservative Association is the youth wing of the Progressive Conservative Party of Ontario. The organization consists of Ontario Progressive Conservative Party activists between the ages of 14 and 30.

Name: Jeunes MR Bruxelles
Description: Les Jeunes MR de la Régionale de Bruxelles sont une Organisation de Jeunesse politique qui regroupe tous les jeunes de conviction libérale âgés entre 15 et 35 ans. Ils sont constitués en une fédération régionale et en sections locales. Ils développent des activités politiques et festives destinées à accueillir les nouveaux membres, à permettre de mieux comprendre la politique et s'y intégrer, ainsi qu'à formuler des propositions concrètes de réformes à mener.

Name: Point Blank Political
Description:
From making strategic decisions to political organizing, Point Blank Political is a professional political and campaign consulting agency that is here to help design your political strategy.  Using our expertise and deep understanding of the industry, you’ll receive real solutions and experience true results.

We've been in the realm of political consulting firms collectively since 2016.  We believe in maintaining a positive mindset, creating partnerships with a purpose, and always striving for significant outcomes.  When you work with us, you should expect a collaboration with transparency and consistency.

Name: De Deurnese VVD
Description:
De Deurnese VVD is een zelfstandige lokale partij met een eigen bestuur en een eigen politieke afvaardiging (fractie). We maken ons eigen beleid en nemen samen met onze leden uit Deurne onze eigen beslissingen.

De Deurnese VVD heeft natuurlijk nauwe banden met onze collega’s in de regio. We zitten regelmatig samen om zo sterker te staan in beslissingen die de hele regio aangaan, zoals de Peelsamenwerking. We schalen op naar onze collega's in Den Haag wanneer het landelijke thema's zijn, zoals een lobby om de A67 te verbreden of de spoortunnel in Deurne. Ook hebben wij nauwe banden met onze collega’s in Europa waardoor wij op de hoogte zijn over subsidies en de laatste ontwikkelingen over de veehouderij.

De VVD is bovendien de grootste landelijke partij. Dat biedt grote voordelen voor de lokale afdelingen. Onze mensen worden structureel geschoold en kunnen met vragen terecht bij een enorm netwerk. Bovendien biedt een landelijke achterban ook echt de mogelijkheid om gebiedsoverschrijdende problemen aan te pakken.

Name: Grassroots For Sanders
Description:
Grassroots for Sanders is an umbrella group for volunteer efforts for the Bernie Sanders' 2016 presidential election. Grassroots for Sanders is presently focused on social media based e-activism and public outreach on Twitter, Facebook, and Reddit.

GFS has over 130,000 subscribers spread over various websites and has generated over $400,000 in donations to the Sanders campaign since May.

GFS has been mentioned in the press several times: USA Today, The National Journal, The Toronto Star, Mic.com, The Vermont Digger, CNN, NHK, The New York Times, and the Wall Street Journal.

And we are just getting warmed up.

Name: Lokaal Dijk en Waard
Description:
Lokaal Dijk en Waard staat voor een gemeente waar de inwoner centraal staat. De omgeving moet gezond, veilig en door duurzaamheid omgeven worden. Met een gemeentelijke fusie op komst is de nood om te verbinden steeds noodzakelijker. Twee gemeenten verbinden, maar toch de eigen identiteit van de kernen weten te behouden is in onze ogen een moeilijke maar belangrijke ontwikkeling die we moeten inzetten.

We moeten toe naar een toekomstbestendige gemeente waar ruimte is voor wonen, werken en recreëren. We willen veel en vraaggestuurd bouwen waar nodig. Hiermee geven we iedere generatie een eerlijke kans. Daarnaast willen we de recreatieve voorzieningen behouden en versterken voor wie er even uit wil of wil genieten van alles wat Dijk en Waard te bieden heeft. Dit alles kan niet zonder een gezonde economische motor. Bedrijvigheid heeft deze regio grootgebracht, naar die sector moeten we ook luisteren.

Name: Activist Handbook
Description:
The Activist Handbook is a Wikipedia-like site for organisations and individuals to share and find knowledge on activism. We are inviting you to join the project.

Anyone can contribute: We are an open community that empowers activists all over the world. Your knowledge and experiences are valuable to millions of fellow world-changers. Anyone can contribute to the Activist Handbook, you too!

Learn from others: On our site we have guides on how to grow your movement, make a successful petition and organise a protest. All knowledge is complemented by personal experiences of activists. Information is adapted to your local context. And if some content is missing, you can add it yourself to help others.

For activists, by activists: The Activist Handbook was made during a two-day hackathon by young activists from all across Europe. It is an open source, free to use, platform.

Name: Centerpartiet i Västra Götaland
Description:
Centerpartiet arbetar för en nära vård och för att hela Västsverige ska leva. Vi vill skapa ett grönt, företagsamt och tryggt Västsverige där du får bestämma mer över ditt liv själv. 

Centerpartiet i Västra Götaland samlar de fem centerdistrikten i Västra Götaland och ansvarar för vår regionpolitik i Västra Götalandsregionen. 
Centerpartiet för Västsverige Framåt!

Name: Egyptian Diplomatic Club
Description:
Egyptian Diplomatic Club – Est. 1907
The Egyptian Diplomatic Club is one of Egypt’s most historic and prestigious diplomatic institutions. Founded in 1907 as the former Mohamed Ali Club, it has, for more than a century, served as a distinguished space for ambassadors, diplomats, and influential leaders to meet, exchange ideas, and strengthen international relations.

Name: The Campaign for Hong Kong
Description:
Our mission is to advocate for US and international leadership and policies that advance human rights and democracy for all Hong Kongers.

We engage and educate policy-makers and the public on US-Hong Kong relations and how a free and democratic Hong Kong is in America’s best interests.

Leaning on decades of relationships and a well-established reputation, we serve as the “go-to” source on Hong Kong issues for the legislative and executive branches, media, and allies.

We share our lived experience and expertise with policy-makers and Hong Kong and human rights advocates across the globe.

We train individuals and groups with whom we share our core values - on Hong Kong, human rights, democracy, and authoritarian repression - to build political power and connect them to decision-makers in their communities.

Name: D66 Eindhoven
Description:
D66 zet zich in voor gelijke kansen in een duurzame stad die vooruit wil. 

D66  ziet een duurzame, groene, sociale en bruisende, gezellige stad. Een stad waar dingen mogelijk worden, waar de toekomst gemaakt wordt, waar inwoners staan voor elkaar. Een stad waar je niet alleen graag woont en werkt maar waar het ook fijn is om op bezoek te komen. Een verwelkomende stad voor iedereen. Ongeacht wie je bent of waar je vandaan komt. Een stad waarin je mee doet en waar dat gewaardeerd wordt.

Name: Suffolk County Democratic Committee
Description: Over 1,300 Suffolk residents of Suffolk's ten towns are members of the Suffolk County Democratic Committee. We are the volunteers whose grassroots activities give our candidates the edge in tough campaigns. We are united by principles and philosophy and we work together to make sure that our elected officials embody our beliefs.
