Name: Kristdemokraterna Region Stockholm
Description:
Kristdemokraternas arbete i Region Stockholm utgår från alla människors unika och okränkbara värde. Vård och kollektivtrafik är välfärdens kärna och ska präglas av kvalitet, trygghet, jämlikhet och tillgänglighet.

Kristdemokraterna har varit med och styrt Region Stockholm i 16 år. Mellan 2018–2022 styrde vi tillsammans med Moderaterna, Centerpartiet, Liberalerna och Miljöpartiet. Nu är vi i opposition tillsammans med Moderaterna och Liberalerna.
Region Stockholms fullmäktige är Sveriges näst största folkvalda församling med 149 ledamöter. Kristdemokraterna representeras idag av 10 ledamöter.

Vi kristdemokrater står för trygghet och utveckling av vården och kollektivtrafiken i Stockholms län.

Name: Conservative Christian Fellowship
Description:
The CCF builds relationships between the Christian world and the world of politics and government. We are a non-denominational Christian fellowship that inspires and equips believers to go into public life. We seek to be ‘Salt & Light’ in the Conservative Party.

We contribute to the life and thinking of the Conservative Party and seeks to build a strong, relational bridge between the party and the Christian community. We facilitate meetings between the Christian community and the party on various policy areas such as education, international development, home affairs and community cohesion.

Our members range from those who just vote Conservative and want to pray and encourage decision makers to Conservative MPs, Councillors and Peers. The CCF has members all over the UK and is an interdenominational fellowship.

Our Mission

- We are the bridge between the Christian world and Conservatives
- We are Inspiring Christians to go into public life, equipping them when they get there
- We are being ‘salt and light’ in British Politics

Our Values

- We are passionate followers of Jesus Christ
- We are diverse, we’re from different backgrounds and denominations
- We are believers in prayer, the Holy Bible and prayer are foundation to all we do
- We are united in loving God and loving our neighbour
- We are angry about injustice and suffering
- We are committed to high integrity in public life.

Name: Barnmorskeförbundet lokalförening Stockholm
Description:
Svenska Barnmorskeförbundet är den professionella sammanslutningen för legitimerade barnmorskor och barnmorskestuderande i Sverige. Svenska Barnmorskeförbundet är en partipolitiskt obunden självständig facklig organisation inom SRAT. Förbundet främjar barnmorskans professionella utveckling och verkar för kunskapsutveckling och forskning inom barnmorskans kompetens- och verksamhetsområde reproduktiv, perinatal och sexuell hälsa.
Svenska Barnmorskeförbundet är geografiskt indelat i lokalföreningar. Barnmorskeförbundet lokalförening Stockholm arbetar bland annat för:
-	Förbättrad sommarplanering inom förlossningsvården
-	En födande per barnmorska
-	Max 80 inskrivna mammor på BMM/år/barnmorska

Lokalföreningen påverkar genom konferenser, nätverk och arbetsgrupper där vi bidrar med expertkunskap om barnmorskeprofessionen och reproduktiv, perinatal och sexuell hälsa ur ett rättighetsperspektiv, för att förbättra hälso- och sjukvården med fokus på kvinnors och barns hälsa. Vi deltar i samhällsdebatten och har kontakt med myndigheter och beslutsfattare.

Name: Arizona NORML
Description:
The Arizona chapter of NORML was founded in 1990 by Bill Greene. The chapter was involved in several legalization efforts through the 90s including the Prop 200 campaign of 1996 and the successful challenge of the Arizona Marijuana Tax Stamp law. Notable leaders of the era included Greene, Peter Wilson, Chuck Hadd, Stan Wirick, and Will Van Arsdale. Later, under the leadership of Kathy (Tea) Inman Arizona NORML played a key role in the 2010 AMMA ballot measure which created Arizona’s medical marijuana program.

Since 2015 Arizona NORML has played a significant role in shaping cannabis law at the state legislative level and helped draft and campaign for 2016’s Prop 205 initiative. We hold educational presentations and distribute cannabis information to the general public around the state. We organize and connect local activist groups in rural areas, and create projects with volunteer activists in the PHX metro area. We are lead organizers of the annual SWCC Cannabis Conference and Expo in addition to staffing info booths at cannabis events statewide. In addition, AZ-NORML connects Arizona to the national NORML office.

We also help organize court support in PHX metro and host a 24-7 hotline for “cannabis emergencies.”

Name: Asian Crossroads at Yale
Description:
Asian Crossroads at Yale (ACY) is a student-led organization that fosters conversations around Central Asia, a region that has long bridged vibrant cultural traditions and modern growth and trade. Accordingly, ACY seeks to raise the profile of economic, social, and political development in the region, while also providing a space for students to engage with Central Asian culture.

Asian Crossroads at Yale (ACY) serves a dual purpose: we aim to both support discourse on policies in the region as well as the rich fabric of Central Asian culture on campus. ACY looks to connect students with Central Asian leaders and experts on economic development, gender equality, international security, environment, and energy. Similarly, ACY will organize events to promote Central Asian history, traditions, and cuisine. As a result, we hope to create a community of students from all backgrounds interested in starting a dialogue around Central Asia.

Name: New Majority
Description:
NEW MAJORITY MISSION

New Majority California promotes a fiscally responsible philosophy in government and an inclusive mainstream approach towards politics.

Through education and contributions, it seeks to inform its membership and contribute resources to Republican and other philosophically aligned candidates and issues that share its mission.

NEW MAJORITY AND ITS HISTORY
As we move through our second decade, the New Majority stands at the forefront of political change in California and the nation. New Majority members contribute tens of millions of dollars to candidates and causes that create positive change needed to redefine the political landscape both at home in California and nationwide in Washington, DC.

To support its mission, the New Majority Political Action Committee (PAC), now California’s largest Republican PAC, and the Federal Political Action Committee (FEDPAC), support candidates and promote awareness of important political matters. In addition to its leading role in political awareness, New Majority has taken a leading role in educating its members, our elected officials, the business community, and key decision-makers on critical issues.

Although Chapters have their own identities and priorities, New Majority understands the importance of interaction between chapter members. In order to ensure the sharing of information, events, resources, speakers, and ideas, Chapters and our leadership work closely together.

New Majority was founded in Orange County, in 1999 by Julia and George Argyros, Brigette and Donald Bren, Dee and Larry Higby, Gary Hunt, Barbara and Mark Chapin Johnson, Willa Dean and William Lyon, and Joyce and Tom Tucker. Since its creation, New Majority has expanded with Chapters created in Los Angeles and San Diego.

Name: Activate America
Description: Activate America (formerly Flip the West) harnesses grassroots power to help Democrats retain and grow their majorities in the House and Senate. We recruit volunteers and provide them with opportunities for direct voter contact, including phone banking, texting, postcarding, Instagram Direct Messaging, and canvassing.

Name: Schrayer & Associates, Inc.
Description:
At Schrayer & Associates, Inc. we believe your ability to affect public policy hinges on an effective strategy and an energized group of citizen advocates who make their voices heard. Everything we do is designed to empower your supporters and increase your influence in Washington. 

For years, having a strong advocate on Capitol Hill might have been enough, but that’s no longer true. The competition to capture the attention of key policymakers is fierce. 

What resonates most with members of Congress is hearing directly from their constituents. That’s why we focus on your stakeholders as the driving force behind the change you wish to see. 


What We Do
We help you develop winning strategies to capture the attention of policymakers. From crafting a comprehensive strategic plan to making sure you are meeting with the right members of Congress, we provide the services you need to make change happen. 

We apply our expertise to a wide range of domestic and international issues for clients around the country.

Name: ZurzibietRegio
Description:
Der Gemeindeverband ZurzibietRegio ist die Raumplanungsorganisation für die 20 Gemeinden der Umgebung mit erweitertem Auftrag. Er schafft Grundlagen.

Gemäss seinen Satzungen vom 1. Januar 2023 hat der Gemeindeverband „ZurzibietRegio“ als regionaler Entwicklungsträger das Ziel, den Wohn- und Lebensraum, aber auch die Wirtschaft und den Tourismus im Raum Zurzibiet als offizielle Wellnessdestination zu stärken.

So wird die regionale, kantonale und schliesslich auch grenzüberschreitende Vernetzung in vielen Lebensbereichen immer wichtiger. Sie stellt auch laufend höhere Anforderungen an die Behörden und Menschen, die in diesem Raum wohnen, leben, arbeiten und schliesslich auch politisch aktiv sind.

Mit dem Gemeindeverband ZurzibietRegio gibt die Region eine wichtige Antwort zur Bewältigung der anspruchsvollen Zukunft.

Mit dieser Organisation lassen sich die Rahmenbedingungen gestalten, die ein nachhaltiges Wachstum der Region ermöglichen.

Name: Mass Psy News
Description:
Massachusetts for Mental Health Options is a 2024 ballot question committee supporting a voter initiative to enable safe, regulated access to psychedelic-assisted therapy. If approved in the November 2024 election,
our measure will create a program to train psychedelic facilitators and establish psychedelic therapy centers in Massachusetts by 2026. Voters in Oregon (2020) and Colorado (2022) have enacted similar programs.

Name: Project Tinubu

Name: America First Generation
Description:
America First Generation is a civic movement of builders, creators, and entrepreneurs who’ve answered the call to protect liberty.

We are a united group of first-generation American business leaders working to create positive change in our local government.

Our core purpose is to remove the bureaucratic obstacles eroding our free-market system and preventing entrepreneurs from serving their communities and pursuing their passions.

We believe we all have a political duty — and we’ve chosen to act.

Name: House Democratic Campaign Committee
Description: The House Democratic Campaign Committee was incorporated in 1995 as a statewide organization to help Democratic incumbents and candidates win election to the Washington State House of Representatives. Our mission is to provide grassroots, strategic, and monetary support in order to maintain a Democratic majority in the state Legislature.

Name: Partageons Demain!
Description:
La liste Partageons Demain !, menée par David Pereira, est un collectif de citoyennes et de citoyens engagés qui ont décidé de mettre en commun leurs sensibilités politiques pour se rassembler et vous offrir la possibilité de vous exprimer librement sur votre vision de la ville, de la construire collectivement et de s’engager pour son avenir.

Nous sommes résolument optimistes et tournés vers un avenir meilleur. Nous sommes convaincus que les valeurs de rassemblement qui nous animent nous permettront de réussir avec vous et pour vous à surmonter tous ces défis.

Name: Soria YA!
Description:
Este es un espacio para contar lo que hacemos tanto como plataforma, partido político y como agrupación de electores, y también para destacar nuestras apariciones en medios. Para que estés al día de nuestra actividad.

Movimiento ciudadano y agrupación de electores, independiente, transversal y plural que denuncia el olvido de la provincia de Soria.

Tras las elecciones autonómicas del 13 de febrero somos la primera formación política soriana en las Cortes de Castilla y León.

Nos encanta hablar, pero mucho más escuchar, por lo que estaremos encantados de conversar contigo.

 #SoriaTieneFuturo

Name: Republican Leadership Council
Description:
Inspired by a drive to get back to the fundamentals of the Republican Party, Senator John Danforth and Governor Christine Todd Whitman created the Republican Leadership Council, which advocates for the historic Republican principles of liberty, individual responsibility, and personal freedom.

RLC-PAC's vision is a Republican Party that is unified by the basic tenets of fiscal responsibility and personal freedom, but that allows for diverse opinions on social issues by its members.

RLC-PAC members consider themselves True Conservative Republicans. Republicans who believe that our elected officials have a responsibility to their constituents to spend their money wisely. We believe that government should have a limited role in Americans' personal lives. And we believe in a strong national defense.

The Republican Leadership Council PAC or RLC-PAC is a political action committee dedicated to supporting fiscally conservative, socially inclusive Republican candidates at all levels of government. Governor Whitman also created a 527 to advance the issues that help define Real Conservative members of the Republican Party.

RLC-PAC is NOT defined by one issue. We believe, as you can see through our diverse National Board, that people who believe in the core Republican values can find common ground on social issues.

Name: Florida College Democrats
Description:
OUR MISSION

We work to advocate for Democratic values and ideals across the state. Electing Democrats at the local, statewide, and national level is our first priority. Our goal is to mobilize college students across the state in order to effect lasting change in the state of Florida. We seek to provide a network of support, resources, and materials for our chapters and members to organize the participation of all college students in the democratic process.

WHAT WE'VE ACHIEVED

Hundreds of students have been connected with state and local campaigns because of Florida College Democrats.

Recipient of the Janet Reno Grant which aims to increase voter registration numbers.

Over 25 chapters established in Florida.

Over a quarter of Florida's state colleges have an active College Democrats chapter.

Half of the Florida's Historically Black Colleges and Universities have an active College Democrats chapter.

Name: Demokraatit
Description:
Personlig frihed & Personlig ansvar
Et Grønland, hvor den personlige frihed og det personlige ansvar er i højsædet. Et Grønland, der er globalt orienteret, men som aldrig glemmer sin særegne kultur og tradition. Et Grønland for alle, der har lyst til at arbejde og bo i vores elskede og storslåede land. Og ikke mindst et Grønland, hvor vi behandler hinanden ordentligt – hvor vi har respekt for andres holdninger og synspunkter.

Som liberalt tænkende og socialt bevidst parti, ønsker vi mindre stat og mere privat initiativ. Et liberalt samfund vil skabe vækst og velstand og denne velstand skal sikre det finansielle grundlag for samfundets mindsteydelser indenfor sundhed, uddannelse, velfærd og ydelser til livopretholdelse for alle på et højt minimumsniveau.

For Demokraatit har det altid været et kendetegn, at tabuemner skal nedbrydes. Ingen emner er hellige og vi har en holdning til alt. Vi er mindretallenes beskyttere og tør tale alles sag.

Name: Los Angeles County Young Democrats
Description:
Founded more than 30 years ago by Congressman Henry Waxman, Congressman Howard Berman, Supervisor Zev Yaroslavsky, former Los Angeles City Controller Rick Tuttle and others, Los Angeles County Young Democrats is the largest organization in Southern California focused on giving young people a voice and a vehicle for activism in local, state, and federal political issues. 

With more than 1,000 members and supporters and dozens of local, state, and federal candidates either members or helped into office by the Club, LACYD remains at the forefront of keeping Young Democrats engaged, informed, and heard on issues of importance to young people.

Name: BÜNDNIS 90/DIE GRÜNEN Hessen
Description: BÜNDNIS 90/DIE GRÜNEN Hessen ist der hessische Landesverband von BÜNDNIS 90/DIE GRÜNEN mit Sitz in Wiesbaden.

Name: ConVocación por San Isidro
Description:
Somos el partido vecinal más grande del país y desde el 2001 venimos trabajando para que la voz de los sanisidrenses sea siempre el núcleo de las transformaciones que se ven en el Municipio. Queremos construir un política transparente, honesta que priorice la eficiencia y que se anime a abrir más espacios de participación ciudadana. Somos un partido independiente de las estructuras políticas nacionales y provinciales, ya que solo respondemos a los intereses de los vecinos de San Isidro. 

Hoy, trabajamos desde el Concejo Deliberante y el poder ejecutivo para construir el San Isidro con el que soñamos.

Name: Stowarzyszenie KoLiber
Description:
KoLiber is an association of young Poles: students, graduates, doctors and entrepreneurs, who
believe in conservative and free market values. We are people of young generations, who share common values like:
protection of private property, rules of justice, free market, personal inviolability and a strong, safe state.

We are an 18 years old think-tank based in Warsaw (Poland) that focuses on developing future
leaders of polish politics, business and academia. Through our history we have managed to educate and prepare
many leading polish politicians, businessmen and researchers to align their work with the republican values we stand
for: individual responsibility, free market and the common good. 

We believe in conservative and free market values. We hold that living according to these values will tend to
create both the growth of economic welfare and reinforcement of social bonds and reconstruction of the moral base
of our civilization. We have no doubt that a return to capitalism in its pure form is the only way to gain fixed
prosperity and quick economic growth. However, the necessary condition is, in our opinion, complete neutrality of the
state and also abolition of obstacles that close access to the market, hamper employers and entrepreneurs, who may
to a great extent contribute to creating “the strong state of minimum”. We also believe that the development of selfdetermination,
respect for tradition and history with taking family into first place is of high importance.

At the moment KoLiber Association gathers far above 600 people. Among them are 7 Members of Polish
Parliament and one Senator. We are cooperating as analysts with numerous polish institutions.

Name: AK Parti Fatih İlçe Başkanlığı
Description: AK Parti binlerce yıldır aynı coğrafya üzerinde barış, dostluk ve kardeşlik içinde birlikte yaşayan, ortak bir kaderi paylaşan, sevinçleri, kederleri, kıvançları ortak olan tüm halkımızın partisidir.

Name: Libertarian Party of North Carolina
Description:
Dedicated to advancing the Libertarian Party in North Carolina.

The Libertarian Party of North Carolina first appeared on the ballot in 1978. The party has been on the ballot in NC for every presidential and gubernatorial election, except 1988. The party had been on the NC Ballot continuously from 1996–2004. In that period alone the LPNC placed over 300 candidates on the ballot for every office from President of the United States to county soil and water district supervisor.

Name: CDU Hessen
Description: CDU Hessen is a political organization company based out of 6 Frankfurter Straße, Wiesbaden, Germany.

Name: Partido Popular de Aragón
Description:
Bienvenido a la Página oficial del Partido Popular de Aragón en Linkedin.

Encontraréis todo la información necesaria de vuestro Partido y de aquellas personas que lo representan en cada institución. Las posibilidades que nos ofrecen las nuevas tecnologías hacen posible que todos estéis enterados prácticamente al instante de cuáles son nuestros pasos y nuestras afirmaciones.

Name: Pour Annecy 2026
Description:
Pour Annecy 2026 – Un collectif citoyen pour une nouvelle dynamique municipale

En 2026, un choix important s’offrira à nous. Et cette réflexion commence dès aujourd’hui.

Pour Annecy 2026 est un collectif citoyen et politique, porté par Jean-Luc Rigaut, Séverine Grard, Thomas Meszaros et Tony Pessey.

Depuis février 2023, avec une première réunion publique, nous avons engagé un dialogue ouvert entre élus et citoyens pour construire, ensemble, un projet utile, équilibré, fidèle aux valeurs qui nous rassemblent : humanisme, dialogue et responsabilité.

- Notre ambition : préparer l’avenir de notre ville sans renier son identité.
- Nos priorités : logement, mobilités, urbanisme, écologie, culture, vie locale, sécurité et propreté… Des politiques publiques cohérentes, pensées à l’échelle de la Ville et de l’Agglomération.
- Notre force : une équipe engagée, composée de femmes et d’hommes d’horizons variés, unis par la volonté d’agir pour le bien commun.

Sur cette page, nous partageons ce que nous vivons, ce que nous proposons, ce que nous construisons avec les Annéciens.

 Abonnez-vous, commentez, relayez : cette dynamique est aussi la vôtre.
 Et retrouvez-nous sur nos autres réseaux !

Annecy est belle et plurielle, et c’est comme ça qu’on l’aime.

Name: Young Conservatives for Carbon Dividends
Description:
YCCD is a 501(c)(4) advocacy organization that aims to mobilize young conservative leaders in support of the pro-growth, pro-innovation Baker-Shultz Carbon Dividends Plan, renew the GOP’s proud legacy of environmental leadership, and lay the groundwork for a free-market climate breakthrough.

We support a step-by-step plan that was authored by President Reagan’s right-hand men. It's the only climate strategy endorsed by EVERY former Republican Chair of the President's Council of Economic Advisers (representing every GOP administration in the last half-century). It is backed by American industry leaders from across the country.

Name: NextWave
Description: We specialize in empowering businesses, campaigns, and governments to succeed in a rapidly changing world.

Name: Pokret slobodnih građana
Description:
Dosta nam je jaza između političkih elita i građana. Politika pripada građanima jer definiše njihov život. Politika nije sfera društva koja postoji i funkcioniše odvojeno od svih društvenih procesa.

Politika i političari kreiraju našu svakodnevicu i našu budućnost. Svaki zakon koji se donese u Skupštini, svaki podzakonski akt, svaka uredba i odluka nisu prazne reči koje ostaju na papiru. Ovi dokumenti određuju kako se lečimo, kakvo nam je obrazovanje, kako se odnose prema nama na poslu, u državnim institucijama.

Politika kreira naš život, i vreme je da mi kreiramo politiku ove države.

Odluka slobodnih građana Republike Srbije jeste da promene politiku i način na koji se politički procesi odvijaju. Nisu svi političari isti, niti smeju da budu. Razgovaraćemo sa svima koji su pokušali nešto da promene, ali nisu uspeli jer im je bilo teško da sami promene sistem.

Politika mora da bude bazirana na dijalogu, ne na sujetama i ličnim interesima. Slobodni građani države Srbije će uneti promene i u politički dijalog. Saradnju sa svima baziramo na zajedničkim ciljevima, vrednostima i principima rada.

Pokret slobodnih građana je naš, svih nas koji želimo da živimo životima dostojnim čoveka. Svih nas kojima je dosta lošeg obrazovanja, lošeg sistema zdravstva, loše državne administracije.

Name: Madana Kane
Description: Mouhamadou Madana Kane, candidat à l'élection présidentielle du 24 février 2024 au Sénégal. Mouhamadou Madana Kane, avec son expérience internationale et son engagement profond envers le Sénégal, incarne une nouvelle ère de leadership. Sa vision "Dundu Leneen" est un appel à l'unité, au progrès, et à l'innovation, visant à créer un Sénégal où chaque citoyen peut s'épanouir.

Name: Wij Putten
Description: Wij Putten is een partij voor iedereen en sluit niemand uit. Een partij waarin jong en oud, kerkelijk en niet-kerkelijk, gezond of hulp behoevend elkaar ontmoeten. Met elkaar bouwen wij aan de toekomst van onze gemeente, dat is wat ons bindt. Niet de eigen belangetjes, maar het gemeenschappelijk belang staat voorop. Het ‘wij’ in de samenleving versterken, dat is onze opdracht. Want met elkaar bouwen wij Putten, met elkaar besturen wij Putten en met elkaar zijn wij Putten.

Name: GroenLinks Overijssel
Description: Voor verandering. Wij streven naar een duurzame toekomst, emancipatie en gelijke kansen voor iedereen. We brengen onze idealen dagelijks in de praktijk.

Name: Ojo Paritario
Description: Somos un colectivo transversal e interdisciplinario conformado por integrantes de distintos partidos políticos, referentes académicos y periodistas. Llevamos más de 25 años promoviendo la paridad de género en espacios de representación política.

Name: Lokaal Belang Waalwijk
Description: Wij zijn een onafhankelijke lokale politieke partij. Lokaal Belang bestaat uit een sterke combinatie van ervaren bestuurders, positief-kritische ondernemers, maatschappelijk betrokken inwoners en ook nieuwe talenten met een frisse kijk. Met als gemene deler: een groot hart voor Waalwijk, Sprang-Capelle en Waspik. Wij zijn trots op onze gemeente met haar diversiteit aan kernen. Ons beleid dient de belangen van de burgers, stelt de kernen centraal en sluit aan bij wat er leeft onder onze inwoners. Wij staan voor een duurzame, solidaire en veilige samenleving, waar het bovenal prettig leven is. Wij betrekken als grootste lokale politieke partij iedereen in Waalwijk bij onze gemeenschap, onze welvaart en ons welzijn. Op deze manier spelen wij een activerende rol in onze maatschappij. Niet vanuit een luie stoel of met het idee dat we alle wijsheid in pacht hebben. Wij hebben wel ambities, maar geen pretenties. Onze partij bestaat uit betrokken burgers uit onze gemeente. Hierdoor weten wij wat er speelt in Waalwijk, Sprang-Capelle en Waspik en zijn wij toegankelijk voor iedereen.

Name: Cal Berkeley Democrats
Description:
Cal Berkeley Democrats was founded in 1960 and is the official arm of the Democratic Party at the University of California, Berkeley. We have the largest active membership of any chapter of the California College Democrats, and one of the most active chapters of the California Young Democrats. We have a strong tradition of being involved in Democratic politics at both the local and state levels – our members have worked in city council races, presidential campaigns, government offices, and everything in between. In addition to working to get Democratic officials elected, our annual events include the California Democratic Party Convention, community service projects, campus debates against the Republicans and Libertarians, and a variety of other social and professional events.

Cal Berkeley Democrats is committed to making the goals of the Democratic Party realities; these include but are not limited to – affordable higher education, good jobs with good pay, responsible environmental use, and affordable health care for every American.

Name: Student Democracy of South-Eastern Norway
Description:
Studentdemokratiet i Sørøst-Norge (SDSN) er studentenes interesseorganisasjon ved Universitetet i Sørøst-Norge (USN).

Vi representerer rundt 17 000 studenter gjennom kulltillitsvalgte, studentråd, campusstyrer, ledergruppa og arbeidsutvalget!

SDSN ble grunnlagt da studentorganisasjonene ved tidligere Høgskolen i Telemark, og Høgskolen i Buskerud og Vestfold ble slått sammen 1. januar 2016, men har røtter tilbake til slutten av 1800-tallet. 

SDSN organiserer USNs studenter gjennom kulltillitsvalgte, studentråd, campusstyrene, Semestermøtet og arbeidsutvalget (AU).

Alle studenter ved USN er en del av SDSN, og SDSN representerer studentene lokalt, regionalt og nasjonalt. SDSN samarbeider med USN og Studentsamskipnaden i Sørøst-Norge (SSN) for en bedre studenthverdag.

Name: List LEX
Description:
List LEX has a plan. We represent your interests and always strive for good representation and better education. Our goals? Sustainability, transparency, digitalization and student wellbeing.

Over the past years, we have been your voice in both the Faculty and the University Council, representing all Law Students at Maastricht University. We listen to you through the General Students Assembly and always strive to bridge the gap between Faculty and students. Do you have any concerns or questions? We'd be happy to help. You can contact us through Facebook (Listlexmaastricht) or Instagram (@listlexmaastricht), or send an email to info@jfvouranos.nl. 

List LEX is the political party founded by JFV Ouranos.

Name: EndEndoSilence
Description: Wir von EndEndoSilence sind eine Gruppe von Aktivist*innen, die sich für eine bessere Versorgung der Betroffenen von Endometriose einsetzen. Gemeinsam launchen wir Petitionen, schaffen Awareness und empowern Betroffene.

Name: Women Who Run Nebraska
Description:
We recruit, support and promote progressive women running for office in Nebraska through a combination of candidate training programs, voter outreach events, financial assistance, campaign publicity and more. 

Women Who Run Nebraska PAC is established and administered by She’s Electable Nebraska, LLC, which provides contract campaign services.

Name: BÜNDNIS 90/DIE GRÜNEN Rheinland-Pfalz
Description: Wir machen GRÜNE Politik in Rheinland-Pfalz: Als Landesverband BÜNDNIS 90/DIE GRÜNEN Rheinland-Pfalz unter der Leitung des Landesvorstandes bringen wir Menschen aus dem ganzen Land zusammen, die sich für GRÜNE Politik engagieren. Von unseren über 7000 Mitgliedern bis hin zu unseren Abgeordneten in Landtag, Bundestag und Europaparlament und unseren beiden GRÜNEN Ministerinnen im Land.

Name: University of Puget Sound Democracy Advocates
Description: Working to restore democracy, lobbying for climate action, and engaging our fellow young voters

Name: Veganerpartiet
Description:
Veganerpartiet er Danmarks nye grønne parti, funderet i den veganske tankegang; at alle arter har lige rettigheder med mennesker til at leve et liv i frihed. Bærekraftige, holdbare indbyrdes forhold mellem alle arter og fokus på etisk genopretning og pleje af arternes naturlige habitater til gavn for alle.
Gennem lovgivning og information fokuseres der også på de sundhedsgavnlige gevinster for folkesundheden ved en plantebaseret kost.
Vores formål er således at arbejde for et bedre klima og miljø, bedre folkesundhed, rettigheder for dyr, forsvarlig brug af ressourcer og for at afvikle menneskelig udnyttelse af dyr. Dette gør vi med udgangspunkt i følgende værdier: Empati, fred, frihed, etik, mod, kreativitet, fremsynethed, altruisme, troværdighed, respekt, forandring. 

Støt vores kamp for et grønnere Danmark (gratis)
Giv en vælgererklæring hér https://mailchi.mp/vgpt/vp

Name: Conservative Friends of CANZUK
Description:
C.A.NZ.UK, an old idea, a new opportunity. 

Conservatives Friends of CANZUK is a grassroots organisation aiming to build support for a post-Brexit realignment of British foreign policy among Conservative Party members, MPs, peers and policy makers. 

Our objective is to expand the understanding of the benefits and objectives of the CANZUK movement among Conservative Party supporters. In doing this we seek to demonstrate to key policy makers the widespread and deep-rooted support for greater bonds between Canada, Australia, New Zealand and the United Kingdom that exist across large sections of the centre-right in this country. 

As the United Kingdom enters the post-Brexit era and opens its arms to the world there has never been a better time to rekindle old bonds. Bonds that were so ignominiously severed with our entry into the European Economic Community.  

Polls across all four CANZUK realms have demonstrated widespread public support for the concept and with Brexit secured there has never been a better opportunity to deliver upon this. CANZUK’s time has come and this opportunity must be seized.

https://linktr.ee/conservativefriendsofcanzuk for our social media

Name: Elect Conservatives
Description:
What do we stand for?
 
Conservatism at its core is about a deep understanding of tradition, economics, and ultimately realistic choices. We believe that way forward is through personal responsibility and ultimately a society which those of us who work hard can succeed. 
 
We believe that Canada also has a culture that is deeply worth protecting. We accept per capita more immigrants than any other country and have done so with far fewer problems. 
 
That has occurred for generations due to Canadian culture.
 
We lastly believe that a nation is meant to become strong. The Canadian government must therefore also build towards meeting the protection requirements for all citizens. 
 
We promote these core values and hope that with your help we can make them everyday values at the election box.

Name: GroenLinks Tynaarlo
Description: Voor een groen, sociaal en duurzaam Tynaarlo. Meer weten? Kijk dan op tynaarlo.groenlinks.nl

Name: New Hampshire Young Democrats
Description:
The New Hampshire Young Democrats is a statewide organization with over 500 active members. Our mission is to engage and involve young people in New Hampshire’s political community.

We’re here to empower a new generation of New Hampshire leaders, and advance progressive ideals and values.

Name: Міністерство аграрної політики та продовольства України
NSW Young Labor
Description: Youth wing of the Australian Labor Party (NSW Branch).

Name: Oltener Kreis linker SozialdemokratInnen - Cercle d’Olten des socialistes de gauche
Description:
Der Oltener Kreis linker SozialdemokratInnen ist das Diskussionsforum des linken Flügels der Sozialdemokratischen Partei der Schweiz.

Le Cercle d'Olten des socialistes de gauche est le forum de discussion de l'aile gauche du Parti socialiste suisse.

Name: VVD Zaanstad
Description: VVD Zaanstad is de lokale VVD afdeling in de gemeente Zaanstad.

Name: Force Multiplier
Description:
Force Multiplier is an all volunteer fundraising organization committed to winning Democratic majorities in the House and Senate and supporting voter empowerment groups who work to strengthen our democracy.

Force Multiplier focuses on fundraising and connects members of our community with volunteer opportunities for the candidates and groups we support.

Force Multiplier never touches the money. All funds go directly to the candidates through Act Blue, a user-friendly donation processing platform. (Act Blue has a 3.95% credit card processing fee.) When payment is made by check, the 
contribution goes directly to the candidate or group being supported.

Name: Espectro
Description: Coletivo de esquerda radical que busca organizar e conscientizar os trabalhadores.

Name: Michigan College Democrats
Description: As the chartered arm of the College Democrats of America in Michigan and a caucus of the Michigan Democratic Party, we work to help represent students in our state government through capitol advocacy in the policy-making process and in elections to ensure progressive candidates win.

Name: Erie County Democratic Committee
Description: We envision an Erie Country Democratic Committee that seeks and embraces broad community and workforce input to formulate its platform, a Democratic Party that establishes a strong and inspirational voice to communicate our message of expectation and empowerment, and a Democratic Party that strives to align our values and beliefs with our actions. Our success will recruit and elect candidates to office, form the political conscience of those who participate in government and attract a vast number of women and men to serve the Democratic Party ideals and process.

Name: Angie Craig for Congress
Description:
Angie Craig is running for re-election to Congress because the opportunities she was lucky enough to have are disappearing for too many working families. Angie grew up in a mobile home park, one of three kids raised by a single mom who worked while going to school to earn her college degree. Angie worked two jobs to keep up with the cost of her education, and graduated from a state college. She began her career as a newspaper reporter then worked her way up in business over 15 years to eventually lead a workforce of 16,000 employees for a major Minnesota manufacturer.

As a leader in the Minnesota business community, Angie has been a powerful advocate for marriage equality in the state. Our country had never before had an out lesbian mother in the House, and Angie’s 2018 victory gave LGBTQ families a new voice in the halls of power. She and her wife are proud to have raised their four sons in Minnesota and embrace this state’s values of family, community, and caring for each other — values Angie is proud to bring to Congress. Angie now faces a tough re-election fight against Republicans doing everything in their power to retake this seat.

Name: Ensemble pour nos entreprises
Description:
La liste "Ensemble pour nos entreprises" conduite par Pascal Plante, c'est un collectif d'entrepreneurs engagés.
Ensemble, nous mobiliserons les énergies et les compétences pour faire gagner La Réunion.

Name: FOMOSO - Forum für Mittelost- und Südosteuropa
Description: As an independent and non-profit organisation, FOMOSO promotes the opinion-forming about East-Central and Southeast Europe. Furthermore, the aim of FOMOSO is to promote social political knowledge and interests about that region.

Name: Verband Innovativer Fahrschulen e.V.
Description: Der Verband Innovativer Fahrschulen Deutschland hat es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht, das Fahrschulwesen in der Bundesrepublik weiterzuentwickeln und zukunftssicher zu gestalten. Wir wollen den zahlreichen guten Ideen für ein fortschrittliches, nachhaltiges und krisenfestes Fahrschulwesen eine starke Stimme verleihen.

Name: DSAU | Computer Science Student Association at Aarhus University
Description: The Computer Science Student Association at Aarhus University is a student-run organization for CS students at AU. We represent student ideas and suggestions to the department and organize social and academic activities.

Name: Graduate Students' Association - Carleton University
Description:
The Graduate Students’ Association (GSA) offers services, advocacy, and community for over 3,900 graduate students at Carleton University.

We work to ensure graduate student representation throughout the university, and advocate at the municipal, provincial and federal levels on issues including affordable education, accessible public transit, research funding, academic freedom, and ending rape culture. Several of these campaigns, as well as lobbying, are done in partnership with other students’ unions across Canada through the Canadian Federation of Students (CFS), a pan-Canadian student union representing over 500,000 students from over 80 universities and colleges.

The GSA is administered by 5 part-time executive members (a president and 4 vice-presidents), whom are elected by graduate students each spring for a one-year term. The executive and staff carry out the business of the GSA Council, which is the legislative authority of the GSA and has the final word on all matters.

Name: Labour African Network
Description:
The UK Labour African Network (LAN) is a collective of Labour Party Politicians pf African descent, committed to amplifying Africa's and African voices in shaping party policy, strategy and engagement.

We advocate for key issues affecting African communities in the UK and globally, working to ensure they are represented at every level of the political discourse.

Through strategic partnerships with stakeholders across the UK, internationally, and within the African diaspora, we drive forward inclusive and progressive change and development.

Name: Governing Group
Description:
The well-being of Utahns across all ages is significantly enhanced by the presence of legislators and elected officials who prioritize responsiveness and thoughtfulness in their service. Unfortunately, many of our elected officials, regardless of party affiliation, seem more focused on scoring points in the court of public opinion than on pursuing substantive legislative action. 

Governing Group PAC was established in December 2023. The PAC is dedicated to supporting candidates who are committed to civil discourse and sound policy over divisive and heated rhetoric. 

Governing Group PAC aims to establish relationships and partner with organizations across the state to shift electoral incentive structures. Its goal is to promote civil discourse and implement sound policy through legislators who are committed to thoughtful conservatism and discourse.

Name: Die Sächsische Union
Description:
Die Sächsische Union ist die Stimme Sachsens innerhalb der Christlich Demokratischen Union Deutschlands und damit die Sächsische Volkspartei der Mitte. Zusammen mit den Bürgern Sachsens wollen wir, die Sächsische Union, unseren Freistaat gestalten und weiter voranbringen. Wir wollen, dass Sachsen auch in Zukunft für alle Menschen, ob jung oder alt, hier geboren oder zugezogen, eine lebens- und liebenswerte Heimat bleibt. Die Grundlage unserer Politik ist das christliche Verständnis vom Menschen und seiner Verantwortung vor Gott und dem eigenen Gewissen. Unsere Grundwerte Freiheit, Solidarität und Gerechtigkeit sowie unser spezielles Augenmerk auf eine nachhaltige Entwicklung sind daraus abgeleitet.

Die Sächsische Union ist mit der friedlichen Revolution und der Wiedervereinigung Deutschlands eng verbunden, denn diese Ereignisse haben vollendet, was im Jahre 1989 mit den Montagsdemonstrationen, als Funke der Freiheit, in Sachsen seinen Anfang genommen hat. Und genau diesen Werten und Idealen fühlen wir uns, als Sächsische Union, ganz besonders verpflichtet, denn viele Menschen hier in Sachsen sind der CDU bewusst – als die Partei der Deutschen Einheit – beigetreten.

Name: Christendemocraat.nl
Description:
ChristenDemocraat wil bijdragen aan de ontwikkeling van het christendemocratische gedachtegoed in Nederland. We vinden het belangrijk om onderwerpen die (nog) niet op de politieke agenda staan te verkennen en om CDA’ers aan te moedigen om daar over mee te praten. Dit omdat we geloven dat je als politieke beweging continue moet bedenken hoe je de ontwikkeling in de wereld van vandaag moet beoordelen vanuit je vertrouwde gedachtegoed. Op ChristenDemocraat kan dus “out of the box” gedacht worden.

Redactie:
- Berend van der Kolk (hoofdredactie)
- Rogier Havelaar (hoofdredactie)
- Geert Meijering
- Jan Scheele
- Marieke van der Werf
- Matthijs Buijs

Name: File Hills Qu’Appelle Tribal Council
Description: FHQTC consists of 11 First Nations in the Treaty 4 Territory and represents over 15,000 First Nations citizens both on and off reserve.

Name: Ergoterapeuter i Arbejdsliv
Description:
Ergoterapeuter i Arbejdsliv arbejder først og fremmest for medlemmernes faglige udvikling og for det  kollegiale og tværfaglige sammenhold. Dette sker via afholdelse af fx egne fagspecifikke temadage og fællesarrangementer med Dansk Selskab for Fysioterapi i sundhedsfremme, forebyggelse og ergonomi. Selskabet fungerer også som rådgivere for Ergoterapeutforeningen vedr. interne og eksterne spørgsmål indenfor selskabets fag- og interesseområder.

Bestyrelsen samarbejder med bestyrelsen for Dansk Selskab for Fysioterapi i sundhedsfremme, forebyggelse og ergonomi. Dette samarbejde prioriteres højt, fordi de to faggrupper til dagligt ofte varetager de samme arbejdsopgaver og stillinger indenfor fx ergonomi, arbejdsmiljø og sundhedsfremme.

Bestyrelsen bidrager endvidere med at formulere behov både ift. grunduddannelserne til ergoterapeut og for efter- og videreuddannelse indenfor hele arbejdslivsområdet.

Name: Khartoum University Students Union
Description: The official students' union of the University of Khartoum. It is better known in the University under the branding KUSU. It exists to represent University of Khartoum students in the University's decision-making, to act as the voice for students in the Sudanese society, and to provide direct services to the student body.

Name: Brady PAC
Description: BradyPAC works to elect gun violence prevention champions.

Name: Jonk Demokraten (JDL)
Description:
Welcome to the Young Democrats of Luxembourg!

We, the JD, are Luxembourg's liberal youth organization.

With over 200 dedicated members between the ages of 14 and 35, we offer young people a platform to take action and actively shape society. Together, we give the young generation a strong voice and advocate for fresh ideas to be heard and implemented!

The partners at Revolvis Consulting are focused on one thing: winning.

Other firms stress how many ads they’ve produced, the awards they’ve received, and who their clients are – we stress that we win and that is what you hire a consultant to do.

We are campaign veterans with experience ranging from presidential and statewide campaigns to congressional and legislative.  Each partner brings an impressive background of success and has served at the top levels of state and federal government. We understand how to take advantage of opportunities throughout the policy debate to position our clients to shape that debate.

Revolvis can assist clients with every element of the campaign and build a winning team. We conduct thorough research and analysis and then work with the client and management to develop a comprehensive plan including field organizing, finance, voter contact, online communications, and detailed media strategy.

Every candidate has the same number of hours in the day. Our goal is to simplify the job of the candidate so that you can focus on reaching out to voters and winning on Election Day

Name: Dakotah Smith for Assessor / Register of Deeds
Description:
Dakotah Smith is running to represent all property owners and tenants as the next Assessor / Register of Deeds.

The Assessor’s Office determines the value of homes and properties in Douglas County so that taxes are shared fairly. Accurate valuations make sure no one pays more than their fair share, and that homeowners and businesses can trust the process. 

The Register of Deeds department maintains the official records for property—deeds, mortgages, and documents that show who owns what. Accurate and well-organized records make buying, selling, and refinancing property simple and reliable.

Dakotah brings a unique blend of experience in real estate, public service, management, and public policy. This includes 10+ years of real estate brokerage, having specialized in residential for 7 years and ran his brokerage’s sales and business operations for 3 states. In commercial brokerage he has earned the CCIM designation for real estate valuations/ investment analysis. He's served on the Douglas County Planning Commission for 5 years and has volunteered as a firefighter / EMT for 15 years, currently at Waterloo VFD. He has experience managing large budgets and teams, and has taught 3 different real estate courses as an adjunct at UNO. He's served as an executive officer on the board of multiple local nonprofits. Before real estate he worked on public policy in Washington, DC, where he earned his Masters.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Kulmbach
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen!

Entdecken und auskundschaften. Anpacken und verändern. Wagen und gewinnen. Erleben und spüren. Sich selbst verwirklichen, sein eigener Herr sein. Ein Stück vom eigenen Glück abgeben. Das ist unsere Generation. Das ist die Generation WJ.


Gehörst auch du dazu?

- Du bist Unternehmer oder Führungskraft?
- Du willst deine Fußspuren in der Gesellschaft hinterlassen?
- Du entdeckst gern neue Menschen?
- Du möchtest dein Wissen und deine Erfahrungen weitertragen?

Hast du die meisten Fragen mit JA beantwortet, bist du zweifelsohne Teil der Generation WJ! Wir wollen dich kennen lernen! Zeig dich und besuche eine unserer Veranstaltungen.

Trifft bei dir nicht alles zu, brauchst du zum Thema WJ vielleicht einfach noch mehr Informationen, um dich damit identifizieren zu können. Dann bist du hier schon mal richtig. Schau dich auf unserer Seite um, stelle uns deine Fragen. Als einer der aktivsten Kreise heißen die Wirtschaftsjunioren Kulmbach dich auch jederzeit gern beim nächsten monatlichen WJ Update willkommen.

Beyond his work with CASA and Child Protective Services Department, he is constantly looking for new and innovative ideas to help keep families together and improve children’s lives. He has been involved in the planning and building of a national model Bexar County Children’s Court in the historic Bexar County Courthouse, the implementation of a Family Drug Treatment Court for parents with addiction issues who have children in the foster care system and the implementation of the Family Group Conferencing Model to bring families together to promote healing by families. Most recently, he planned and developed the Early Intervention Program of the Bexar County Children’s Courts Division and Programs, also known as the Infants and Toddlers Court.

Description:
Business for Britain is an independent, non-partisan campaign involving people from all parties and none, run by business for business. The campaign is calling for a leave vote in the forthcoming referendum on the UK's membership of the EU. The renegotiation delivered by the Prime Minister falls well short of fundamental change and specifically does nothing to help businesses in UK who face a barrage of EU regulation, pushing up the cost of doing business. Business for Britain led the way in seeking fundamental reform but as this has not been delivered, Business for Britain is united in calling for businesses to vote leave. 

The voice of business is central the debate on the UK's membership of the EU. As such, Business for Britain has launched regional councils across the UK to ensure that companies of all sizes and sectors have their say on our membership of the EU. If you are a businessperson and support our aims, please join other businessman in your region http://businessforbritain.org/regional/.

Business for Britain is supporting Vote Leave, which is campaigning for a ‘Leave’ vote in the EU referendum. You can also show your support by registering on their website http://www.voteleavetakecontrol.org/join.

Name: East Bay Young Democrats
Description:
The East Bay Young Democrats is the East Bay’s largest Democratic organization for young progressive Democrats. We are shaping the Democratic Party for the next generation and promoting the interests of young progressives in local, state, and national politics.

OUR MISSION!

EBYD works to encourage young people (from 14 to 35 years old) in Alameda and Contra Costa counties to take an active role in their community through activism, policy, and politics and contribute to the growth and influence of the ideals and philosophy of the Democratic Party. 

We strive to promote candidates, ballot measures, and policies that:

Advance economic, environmental, and social justice in all East Bay communities;

Help and empower young people and members of marginalized communities to be able to afford to live and thrive in the Bay Area;

Ensure that the East Bay remains a vibrant, diverse, and welcoming community;

Continue the Bay Area’s leadership in environmental protection and accessible and affordable transit; and

Defend the civil/human rights and civil liberties of everyone in our community.

HOW IS EBYD RUN?

EBYD is lead by an elected executive board. This board is tasked with carrying out the will of the general membership and promoting the organization pursuant to its bylaws.

Description:
The IFM-SEI is the federation of left wing children's organisations. Links to trade unions, social democrat parties and progressives movements it runs camps and seminars promoting children's rights, environmentalism and equality.

The International Falcon Movement – Socialist Educational International is an international educational movement working to empower children and young people and fight for their rights. 

We are an umbrella movement for children and youth-led organisations all over the world, educating on the basis of our values of equality, democracy, peace, co-operation and friendship.

Through our member organisations and the activities of our international, we aim to ensure children and young people are well informed about their rights and are empowered to ensure they are respected. Description:
We are a private humanitarian organization that performs sea rescue in the Mediterranean and operates in the Search and Rescue Zone nearby Libya, an area where medical support and distress rescue are deeply needed. We locate the people in need, pick them up and provide help to them in our ship's hospital. 

The second part of our organization is our pan-european network of ambassadors, former crewmembers and volunteers that represent the association in public to draw attention to the importance of sea rescue. They collect donations and host events in order to make our shared values civic. Our members interact with the help of our internetplattform "Jugend Rettet Europe" to overcome long distances from one country to another and to take active part in the organizations political process. 

Our organization is independent of parties or political foundations and is financed exclusively by donations from private individuals who wish to support our strong belief in human rights.

Name: REACH! Asian & Asian Diaspora Retention & Recruitment Center
Description:
REACH! is the Asian/Pacific Islander Recruitment and Retention Center at the University of California, Berkeley.

In 1994, REACH! began with a handful of committed folks, as a program under the Asian Student Union (ASU) at UC Berkeley to target “Asian Pacific American, high school students, especially those who are underrepresented, low-income, and non-college tracked”. Its goals were two-fold: 1) promoting higher education as an attainable goal and 2) empowering students through “building ethnic pride and programs that foster community activism and support APA youth culture”.

As REACH! grew organizationally, the vision and purpose of REACH! grew with it. While the mission remained, “the service and empowerment of recent immigrant and urban Asian Pacific Americans living in at-risk life situations,” we added on that “Our goal is to promote higher education as a means to empower ourselves and improve the economic and social conditions facing our communities.” We saw that REACH! had a unique role on campus and in the API community at large, because REACH! was not just going to increase the numbers of underrepresented Asians at Berkeley but REACH! would be a training ground for future educators, activists, and leaders who would address society’s injustices through their life’s work. Thus, we created programs to raise political awareness, build coalitions, develop youth leaders, and build leadership in ourselves.

Each year, programs have been refined and recreated by (insanely) dedicated and intelligent coordinators, who look for a better way to do things. However, our single most important legacy is the steady stream of community leaders we have and will produce.

REACH! Mission Statement:

"Committed to the service, empowerment, and mobilization of immigrant, refugee, and underserved Asian/Pacific Islanders by promoting higher education to empower ourselves and challenge the economic and social inequalities facing our communities"

Educate, Empower, Change.

Name: Reclaim The Campus Campaign
Description:
Reclaim the Campus is a campaign designed to address the widespread issue of sexual harassment, assault and rape on university campuses across the UK. The name Reclaim the Campus is inspired by the well-known Reclaim the Night campaign, which demanded night-time safety and access for women across the UK.

Recent statistics have shown students could be at more than double the risk of sexual assault than the wider population average, an indication of the increasingly dangerous environment at UK institutions. Our campaign is an inclusive one, acknowledging that anyone is at risk of sexual violence, regardless of factors of gender identity or sexual orientation, whilst recognising that is an issue predominately affecting young women, as well as other lived experiences at intersections.

Medlemsbedriftene står for over 3000 årsverk og bidrar vesentlig for Trøndelags samlede eksportverdi.

3 kommuner med et felles arbeidsmarked, et vekstområde med god utbyggingstakt på boliger, gode grunnskoler, to videregående skoler og et rikholdig utvalg av barnehager. Næringslivet har satt et mål om å skape mer enn 1000 nye arbeidsplasser. Det er et aktivt idretts- og kulturliv med idrettshall, svømmehall, kulturskole, kino, kafé- og restaurantliv med navngjetne sjømatkokker. Namdalskysten er et godt utfartssted for båtliv og fiske, jakt og friluftsliv med kort vei til både skog, fjell og skjærgård. Hver kveld møtes de nord- og sørgående hurtigruteskipene i Rørvik havn, og det er flyforbindelse til Værnes, Gardermoen og Namsos. Det går også hurtigbåt til Namsos.

Name: Isemann for New Jersey
Description:
Candidate for U.S. Congress (NJ-07)

Who's John...

A Jersey guy, who like you is tired of seeing our state come out on the losing end, and is running for Congress to give voters a choice and our district a chance. A choice for something more than "The Worst Contest of All Time", a pre-ordained rematch of political elites. A chance to change the all too predictable result, and bring common sense conservative leadership back to our state.

Born and raised in the 7th district of New Jersey, John descended from public servants not political dynasties. Generations of Isemann immigrants, veterans, and factory workers built a family and a name in New Jersey on the values of freedom, liberty, strength, and opportunity.

When John returned home after a decade of study, service, and work - from New York City to Guatemala City - that American promise and Jersey grit which built his hometown had faded. Liberal politicians ruled his home state making it the most over taxed, over regulated, and under represented place in the country. 

This is not simply the story of a singular state in decline, but the dark reality of an America where our values are in question, extreme Democrats control D.C., and complacent career politicians fail to do anything about it.

Name: DOS - Democratisch Onafhankelijken Stein
Description:
DOS is vooral een vereniging van mensen met hart voor de gemeenschap, niet alleen op papier, maar ook in de praktijk. Onze mensen zijn meestal behalve in DOS ook actief in andere verenigingen in de gemeente.De kernpunten van DOS zijn opgesloten in de naam: Democratisch Onafhankelijken Stein.
Denk daarbij aan de wijze van besluitvorming: de meerderheid beslist. Wij vinden echter dat de meerderheid rekening moet houden met de wensen van de minderheid. DOS is daarom steeds bereid tot overleg en samenwerking met andere partijen.
Een bijzonder aspect van democratie is openheid en transparantie. Dat begint met open staan voor de opvattingen van de inwoners. Wij hebben steeds een open oor voor de mening van anderen. Dat wil echter niet zeggen, dat DOS met alle winden meewaait. In tegendeel, DOS heeft duidelijke opvattingen over hetgeen in en door de gemeente gedaan en gelaten moet worden. Er zijn immers grenzen aan de mogelijkheden. DOS maakt die keuzes echter op een transparante wijze en is altijd bereid tot uitleg.
DOS heeft geen enkele binding met partijen op regionaal, provinciaal of landelijk niveau. Wij richten onze politiek puur en alleen op onze eigen gemeente. Hierdoor kunnen wij dicht bij de medebewoners staan, goed naar hen luisteren, hun taal spreken en hun belangen verdedigen. Voor het goed uitvoeren van onze politieke opvattingen staan de mensen van DOS echter niet alleen midden in de eigen gemeenschap, zij weten wat er in de wereld op allerlei terreinen speelt, en wat de consequenties van ontwikkelingen elders kunnen zijn voor de eigen gemeente.
Met behoud van de onafhankelijkheid is DOS al jaren met coalitie-partners verantwoordelijk voor het bestuur van onze gemeente. Die verantwoordelijkheid zien de mensen van DOS als een verplichting, omdat de bewoners recht hebben op een open en transparant bestuur, dat de leefbaarheid en het welzijn in de gemeente hoog in het vaandel heeft staan, zonder dat er geld over de balk wordt gesmeten.

Name: Partia Zieloni - The Green Party of Poland
Description:
Partia Zieloni istnieje od 2003 r. 
Od początku zajmujemy się sprawami, które inne partie ignorują lub uważają za „zbyt trudne”. 

Konsekwentnie walczymy o takie sprawy jak:
*zdrowa żywność
*równouprawnienie
*czyste powietrze
*zrównoważony transport publiczny
*wspieranie lokalnej przedsiębiorczości
*rozwój infrastruktury drogowej
*partycypacyjny model polityki
*wspieranie odnawialnych źródeł energii i energetyka obywatelska
*właściwe zarządzanie odpadami 
*utrzymanie i rozwój zieleni
*mieszkalnictwo
*żłobki/przedszkola/szkolnictwo

Jesteśmy częścią Europejskiej Partii Zieloni, najbardziej postępowej siły politycznej w Europie. 

To właśnie europejskim Zielonym zawdzięczamy program Gwarancja dla Młodych, którego celem jest zwalczanie bezrobocia wśród osób poniżej 25. roku życia. 
W Parlamencie Europejskim walczymy o to, żeby środki unijne trafiały do małych i średnich gospodarstw rolnych, a nie tylko wielkich gospodarstw przemysłowych. 
To m.in. dzięki naszym działaniom zablokowano w Parlamencie Europejskim ACTA.
Chcemy otwartej, zjednoczonej i solidarnej Europy, która będzie dbać o potrzeby Polek i Polaków. 

Chcemy europejskich standardów w Polsce: takiej samej płacy jak w Europie, bezpieczeństwa zatrudnienia i ochrony przed dyskryminacją.

Description:

Name: Junge Union Oberbayern
Description:
Der Bezirksverband Oberbayern ist der größte der zehn Bezirksverbände der JUNGEN UNION Bayern und gleichzeitig der größte JU-Bezirksverband in Deutschland.

Wir sind damit Teil von rund 100.000 junge Menschen, die in der JUNGEN UNION Deutschland ihre politische Heimat finden. Die JUNGE UNION ist damit die größte politische Jugendorganisation Europas und die größte demokratische politische Jugendorganisation der Welt.

Als Teil der Unionsfamilie bekennen wir uns zu den christlich-demokratischen und sozialen Grundwerten, Überzeugungen und Zielen. Und doch sind wir selbstständig und weder programmatisch, organisatorisch noch finanziell an CDU und CSU gebunden. Wir verstehen uns als Antriebsfeder und kraftvollen Motor einer ständigen personellen und inhaltlichen Erneuerung in den Unionsparteien; und zwar auf allen politischen Ebenen, von der Kommunalpolitik, über die Landes- und Bundespolitik bis hin zur Europapolitik. Unser Schwerpunkt liegt hierbei auf dem Bezirk Oberbayern. 

Wir stehen für eine ehrliche und offene politische Auseinandersetzung und leben die Diskussionskultur in unseren Verbänden und Gremien.

Name: Celestial Commons
Description:
Our primary mission is to ensure that decisions made about humanity’s future in space are representative of our shared interests.

Our Flagship Project – The Citizens' Space Policy Initiative

We invite citizens around the world to share their hopes for the future and priorities for the present. These inputs are aggregated, synthesised and transformed into a shared vision, and a dynamic Citizens’ Policy Platform that becomes a foundational resource for civil society groups, political parties, and other organisations where agendas are still forming and who are seeking inclusive, foresighted policies in emerging frontiers. In addition to channelling citizen voices straight into the grassroots of policymaking, we also offer those in both the public and private sectors authentic insights on shifting public sentiments, aspirations and priorities.

Our Broader Work – Comms, Advocacy and Governance

In addition to the Citizens' Space Policy Initiative, Celestial Commons engages in a range of activities to democratize space and promote the public good:

Strategic communications: We provide non-profits, individuals, and grassroots projects engaged in civil space activities with pro-bono assistance on communications strategies and connections that amplify their impact and reach. If you have a project that deserves attention - get in touch!

Amplifying marginalized voices: We connect with and advocate for communities often excluded from space discourse, ensuring their perspectives are integrated into policy and governance.

Collective governance and ownership: We design peaceful, inclusive and democratic approaches to space development – championing universal access, interoperability and long-term benefits for all of humanity.

For more detailed information, see our website.

Description:
Jong Nissewaard is een nieuwe politieke partij met vooruitstrevende standpunten. Wij willen enerzijds de nieuwe generatie een stem geven in de gemeenteraad en anderzijds onze gemeente naar een hoger niveau tillen.

Onze partij bestaat uit een diverse groep jongeren met een breed scala aan interesses en expertises. Met deze variatie willen wij de kaders van politiek links en rechts doorbreken.

Wij geloven dat de beste oplossingen gevormd worden door discussie en debat, vooral met de inwoners. Daarom zijn wij een partij voor íédere inwoner. We bestaan wellicht vooral uit jongeren, maar we staan niet alleen voor jongeren. Voor ons is er uiteindelijk maar één groep waar het om draait en dat zijn de inwoners!

Name: The Loktantra
Description:
The Loktantra is a youth-driven political initiative committed to creating the next generation of responsible political leaders in India.

We aim to educate, empower, and engage young minds to actively participate in the democratic process—not just as voters, but as decision-makers, changemakers, and future leaders.

From grassroots training to leadership mentoring, we provide a structured path for youth to understand governance, master strategy, and become voices of change.

 Mission:
To make politics more inclusive, visionary, and youth-centric.

 We Focus On:

Political awareness & education

Youth engagement & leadership

Ground-level campaigns & civic responsibility

Policy understanding & strategic development


 Starting from Gujarat, growing across India.

Join The Loktantra — Where Political Leaders Begin.

Name: Women's Political Academy
Description:
Women’s Political Academy, Sri Lanka (WPASL) was established in 2010 with the overall goal of ensuring women’s effective participation in decision-making in governance and peace-building efforts in Sri Lanka.

The main objective of the academy is to develop leadership abilities among women to ensure their effective participation in decision-making in governance and peacebuilding.  

WPASL is committed to building women’s capacity to effectively participate in politics,  promoting women’s equal right to representation, enhancing gender justice and democracy at all levels, and to promoting women’s role in peace-building.

WPASL promotes the human rights of women in the formation of new governing paradigms, lobbies for gender-sensitive Constitutional development, calls for legal reforms, and challenges patriarchal politics in Sri Lanka.

We support progressive candidates and advance policies that promote equity and tackle the climate crisis - particularly as it relates to climate justice. We help build a sustainable economic recovery with a focus on vulnerable communities - including communities of color and those who have been most impacted by environmental degradation and the current pandemic  - these communities have been historically underfunded.

Description:
The Colorado Women’s Alliance Foundation provides educational training and networking events to support women on their leadership journeys.

The Colorado Women’s Alliance Foundation (CWAF) is a non-partisan, non-profit organization that supports women in Colorado through comprehensive and innovative leadership development programs that help them meaningfully engage with the political process.

CWAF’s goal is to amplify the important role women play in policymaking, locally & beyond. We believe women are unique in building relationships and common ground, and that our voices must be represented in the decisions that
affect our community and our state. CWAF’s network includes women interested in and already in elected and appointed positions as well as women business leaders.

Name: DADAFO Dansk e-Damper Forening
Description:
The Danish Vaping Association (DADAFO) is a private association, that informs and advocates about vaping and handles the interests of the Danish vapers.

The association was created on february 10th 2013, and has since that time had a large increase in members.

DADAFO is a non-profit consumerassociation, working for the interests and welfare of the consumers of e-vaping. As an association we are completely independent from tobacco-, medicinal- or e-cigaret-industry. The association is as economically independent. The association is run by a board, chosen by the members of the association. Members pay a yearly subscription of 120 DKK. All boardmembers and members in committees etc. work pro-bono/free, without any form of payment for the services/effort/work.

Purpose
To acquire correct knowledge about vaping and keep this knowledge updated and disseminate it to the community through civic education be it negative or positive, and to cooperate with others working for correct information on vaping both domestically and internationally.

Name: UNC Young Democrats
Description:
UNC Young Democrats is the College Democrats chapter at the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill. Founded in 1939 as the “Young Democrat Club,” UNC YD is one of the oldest organizations of its kind in the nation. Over the years, our organization has become a statewide leader by hosting conventions, providing campaign trainings and working to elect Democrats around North Carolina. We have hosted numerous progressive speakers, including President John F. Kennedy and President Barack Obama. Today, our organization provides students with numerous ways to become more engaged and active in the political process, including opportunities in community service, political lobbying, campaign internships, policy research, issue advocacy, and more. We are proud to count Governor Roy Cooper and NCDP State Party Chair Wayne Goodwin among our alumni. In March 2017, we were named College Democrats of North Carolina Chapter of the Year.

Connect with us:
Website - https://uncyoungdemocrats.org
Email - uncyoungdemocrats@gmail.com
Twitter - @UNCYoungDems
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/uncyd/
Instagram - @UNCYoungDemocrats

Acuity is a national political compliance firm that combines industry expertise and leading technical solutions to provide unparalleled client support.
