Description: The Columbia Political Union, organized for and by the students of Columbia University, seeks to enhance involvement in the political process, domestic and international, and draw every member of the campus community into an ongoing discussion of political ideas. As a non-partisan group, we strive to incorporate all points of view, and voices from a variety of political backgrounds.

Name: Point of Information
Description:
Every debate deserves a reply

The news today is biased across the board. Although most would shy away from this, we embrace it. It is only through this acceptance of biased media can we truly promote civil, healthy and fair debate which we strive to do with every article.

Point of Information is a news site which takes the biased media that we have today, and turns it into a playground for civil political debate.

Each article has an unbiased introduction with statistics and quotes from the original source.

You will then find what POI’s main purpose is – the debate. Everything in this segment will be biased, opinionated and involve open debate. Different writers from across the political spectrum have a chance to write and challenge a reader’s way of thinking. These opinion articles will not go unchecked though, as all our political editors will have the chance to not only write their own opinion on a political event, but also produce a short rebuttal, or point of information, to each editor’s article.

Name: Godsalliansen
Description:
Godsalliansen er en sammenslutning av 12 aktører innen jernbane-, sjø- og veitransport som arbeider for løfte gods fra vei til sjø og bane. Den lange grenseoverskridende transporten bør komme sjøveien eller med tog av hensyn til klima, miljø, veislitasje og veisikkerhet. Det vil også redusere antallet utenlandske aktører som kommer til Norge for å kjøre kabotasje, og sikre at seriøse lokale aktører får oppdragene. 

Våre medlemmer er: CargoNet, Det norske maskinistforbund, Kystrederiene, Maritimt Forum, Norske Havner, Norsk Jernbaneforbund, Norsk Lokomotivmannsforbund, Norsk Sjømannsforbund, Norsk Sjøoffisersforbund, Sjømat Norge, Yrkestrafikkforbundet - YTF og Vy.

Name: Capitol Compliance Associates, Inc.
Description:
The mission of Capitol Compliance Associates, Inc. is to be the trusted partner to political organizations and Democratic candidates, empowering them to focus on their mission by providing them with expert compliance and financial management services. CCA provides comprehensive compliance solutions and individually tailored service packages to meet the requirements of any Democratic political organization. We ensure that all of our clients abide by FEC/state compliance regulations throughout the election cycle. 

We have gone to great lengths to implement company-wide policies that adhere to the industry’s best practices with rigorous checks and balances, which go above and beyond safe harbor recommendations. 

Each client is assigned a dedicated team, so you will get professional support, quick responses, and excellent coverage when you need it most. 

Founder and CEO, Judy Zamore brings with her on the ground campaign experience. Her specialty is supporting clients with their cash flow projections. Non-Connected Managing Director and Partner, Josh Myles has worked at the intersection of organizing, politics, and operations, and brings a multidisciplinary approach to compliance. Connected Managing Director, Melissa Nissen began her career in campaign compliance in 2006, working with campaign committees, both state and federal, PACs, joint fundraising committees and 527 political organizations.  

CCA is proudly unionized, represented by IBEW Local 1900. Together we work to create an inclusive environment where employees thrive. We are centered and grounded by living our values. When you’re at CCA, expect to see us exemplifying these values: 

Earn trust and demonstrate integrity 
Build meaningful relationships 
Value continuous learning and growth 
Be creative and resilient 
Be intentional 

We are eager to partner with those who share our vision to create a fairer and more compassionate society by supporting Democrats who will put our values and democratic ideals.

Name: State Freedom Caucus Network
Description: Building on the success of the House Freedom Caucus (HFC), the SFCN will help establish State Freedom Caucuses (SFC) and provide the high-level staff, strategy, and community conservatives need to take ground across the country.

Name: Project Democracy
Description: Project Democracy seeks to dismantle the barriers that prevent data driven insight generation cultivating a more informed and engaged electorate whether you align to the left, right or middle of the political spectrum.  We saw a convergence of opportunity formed by the rise of political activism amongst conservatives and liberals, the current state of politics as well as the unprecedented  advances in data, technology & innovation.   Capitalizing on this, our hope is to shift the focus of political discourse amongst Democrats and Republicans towards data driven debates & greater accountability for our elected officials.

Name: DorpsVisie
Description:
Al meer dan 50 jaar zetten de leden van DorpsVISIE zich in voor ‘ons’ Son en Breugel.

Wij werken voor en met iedereen samen aan het Son en Breugel waarin we met plezier veilig wonen en zorg hebben voor elkaar. En met goede, betaalbare en bereikbare voorzieningen. Waar lokale en internationale ondernemers hun activiteiten kunnen ontplooien.

Name: Embajada de Guatemala en los Estados Unidos
Description: Representación diplomática del Gobierno de Guatemala ante el Gobierno de los Estados Unidos.

Name: FRIE SKOLERS LEDERE
Description:
FRIE SKOLERS LEDERE – en politisk organisation.

FRIE SKOLERS LEDERE er en selvstændig faglig organisation for ledere på de frie grund- og efterskoler. Som selvstændig forening har lederne direkte indflydelse i overenskomst spørgsmål og sikkerhed for, at der kontinuerligt er fokus på lederrollen. 

FRIE SKOLERS LEDERE arbejder for at forbedre medlemmernes løn- og arbejdsforhold. Vi rådgiver i pædagogiske og ledelsesfaglige spørgsmål samt i personsager. Desuden arbejder foreningen på at varetage medlemmernes skole- og ledelsespolitiske interesser samt at være synlig i den skolepolitiske debat.

FRIE SKOLERS LEDERES højeste myndighed er bestyrelsen. Bestyrelsen består af øvrige og øverste ledere på tværs af geografi og skoleformer. Generalforsamling afholdes hvert forår i forbindelse med vores lederdage.

Name: FNF Global Security Hub
Description: The FNF Global Security Hub is a foundation-wide expertise centre for security and defence policy. We work with experts and decision-makers to develop new policy solutions to security challenges, build global networks and provide a platform for political discussions. Together with partners from all over the world, we promote forward-looking and innovative approaches to engage in a rapidly changing geopolitical environment. Located in Brussels, we connect these insights with the EU institutions and NATO and facilitate dialogues with other policy actors. By developing better ideas, stronger connections and clearer messages, we aim to prepare liberal forces around the world for the security challenges of the future.

Name: American University Students for a Just Society
Description: Our organization was borne out of frustration and a sense of overwhelming unfairness. Many of us are students studying justice and law at American University, and we found ourselves angry with the state of the criminal justice system as we learned about it in our classes. We wanted a way to truly enact change in our community and beyond. Students for a Just Society is an organization fighting for criminal justice reform in the United States by educating our peers, amplifying the work of other justice organizations, and encouraging in-depth dialogue between academics in the field, students with passion and ideas, and officials in the justice system. We hope to make complicated issues in the American justice system more accessible to the general public, so that everyone can better understand the root of the existing problems and the proposed methods of solving those problems.

Name: Europaregion Donau-Moldau
Description:
Die Europaregion Donau-Moldau (EDM) ist eine trilateral tätige Arbeitsgemeinschaft, die am 30. Juni 2012 in Linz gegründet wurde. Ihr gehören sieben Partnerregionen an: Oberösterreich, das niederösterreichische Most- und Waldviertel, Niederbayern, die Oberpfalz sowie die tschechischen Bezirke Pilsen, Südböhmen und Vysočina.

Die Europaregion Donau-Moldau zielt darauf ab, durch die Förderung der Zusammenarbeit ihrer Mitglieder wesentlich zur Weiterentwicklung des ganzen EDM-Raumes sowie zur Umsetzung des europäischen Gedankens beizutragen. Ab dem Jahr 2019 widmet sich die EDM der neuen mittelfristigen strategischen Ausrichtung unter dem Motto „EDM - Raum für Gesellschaft 4.0" mit den Unterthemen:

Industrie 4.0,
Gesundheit,
Tourismus.

Bei jedem Unterthema sind Experten aller sieben EDM-Regionen beteiligt. Ihre Aufgabe ist es, auf Basis ihres Fachwissens und ihrer Kontakte konkrete Maßnahmen im Rahmen der EDM-Strategie zu entwickeln und zu planen.

Name: D66 Raalte
Description: D66 Raalte is actief in de gemeente Raalte. Niet alleen in Raalte en Heino, maar ook in Heeten, Nieuw-Heeten, Mariënheem, Luttenberg, Laag Zuthem, Lierderholthuis en Broekland.

Name: Agora
Description: La politique par et pour les jeunes

Name: Bildungswende JETZT!
Description: Als Graswurzelbewegung sind wir die Stimme derjenigen, die direkt von den Problemen unseres Bildungssystems betroffen sind. Getrieben von Idealismus und unabhängig von wirtschaftlichen Interessen setzen wir uns für ein Bildungssystem ein, das von Grund auf erneuert wird und die Bedürfnisse aller berücksichtigt.

Name: Team Freiheit
Description: In der heutigen Parteienlandschaft findet sich keine freiheitliche Kraft mehr, was insofern schlimm ist, dass sie als Reaktion auf die heutige Zeit unabdingbar ist. Wir sind keine Fans von Parteien oder Politikern, daher haben wir Team Freiheit als Verein gegründet, und nur um wählbar zu sein proforma eine Anti-Partei gegründet - in die allerdings niemand von uns eintritt. Wir glauben, dass der Staat die Probleme die er verursacht hat nicht lösen wird, und werden daher dem Bürger seine Freiheiten zurückgeben, damit er die Probleme lösen kann. Weniger Staat, mehr Freiheit! Weil wir an euch glauben!

Name: College Democrats of Massachusetts
Description: College Democrats of Massachusetts (CDMA) is the official youth outreach arm of the Democratic National Committee's operations in Massachusetts and the college-outreach wing of the Massachusetts Democratic Party. CDMA operates as a student-run membership organization and political action committee (PAC) within the Commonwealth of Massachusetts to help elect Democratic candidates, promote progressive initiatives up and down the ballot and to engage young people in the political process on campuses statewide.

Name: Oxfordshire Leaders Joint Committee
Description:
The growing local economy will create challenges and opportunities for
Oxfordshire related to housing, infrastructure, public services and the
environment. These issues will best be addressed through joined up planning
between local councils which prioritises sustainable development and quality
of life. Collective planning where it makes sense to do so will be the most
effective means of minimising the unwanted impacts of a growing economy,
whilst leveraging the maximum benefit from the opportunities it brings for our
existing and future communities.
The Future Oxfordshire Partnership will:
a) Coordinate local efforts to manage economic, housing and infrastructure
development in a way that is inclusive and maximises local social and
environmental benefits;
b) Support the development of local planning policy that moves towards zero
carbon and carbon positive development, and contributes to biodiversity
gain, embracing the changes needed for a low carbon world; and,
c) Coordinate local efforts to secure funding in the pursuit of these aims.

Name: Representative Spencer Frye Fellowship
Description:
Our mission is to cultivate a coalition of aware and active leaders that will use their knowledge to impact our future; not only on a state level, but also on a global scale by bringing local relevance to the national and global community.

The Spencer Frye Fellowship provides an ongoing opportunity for students to actively see their impact in local and state politics. 

Fellows work on one of two teams: legislative and public relations. The legislative team supports Rep. Frye's  priorities through researching current legislation, other solutions and drafting bill memos. The public relations team is responsible for social media on all platforms, curating content for the radio show, sending out a newsletter to constituents and producing content for the blog. 

Both teams come together for professional development and to give back to the local community through volunteer work. 

The Fellowship Program usually accepts around 25 students each year who are given the opportunity to grow as young professionals and leaders.

Name: Citizens for Dr. Anju Singh
Description: I was born and raised in India, where I obtained my medical degree and completed my residency in ophthalmology. I migrated to the US, and earned a Ph.D. in molecular medicine a Masters in Health Administration, started a small business, & a nonprofit "Unity in Diversity". I have been an educator for about 8 years, & am running for State Representative, District 106, PA.

Name: PvdA Eindhoven
Description:
Samen Vooruit
Een samenleving waarin we niet alleen aan onszelf denken maar naar elkaar omkijken. Dat is wat de Partij van de Arbeid wil, ook voor Eindhoven.

Name: Liberalerna Stockholm
Description: Vi är Stockholms liberala parti som alltid tar strid för din frihet. När vi liberaler engagerar oss för att fler ska få jobba, för kunskap och arbetsro i skolan, för fler och bättre villkor för startup-företag eller i kampen mot hederskultur - då handlar det alltid om samma sak: varje människa ska vara fri att forma sitt liv.

Name: NMUN HSG
Description:
Model United Nations (MUN) is a simulation of the United Nations in which students typically role play delegates of UN member countries at various MUN conferences all over the world. NMUN is one of the largest and oldest MUN conferences, taking place in New York every spring.

The University of St. Gallen has been sending successful delegations to NMUN since 2006, allowing the delegates to improve their skills regarding public speaking, debating and writing as well as critical thinking, teamwork and leadership abilities.

Name: Kathryn Garcia for Mayor
Description:
A LIFELONG NEW YORKER
At my core, I love New York City. This is and always has been my home. I grew up as an adopted kid in a mixed race family, and It was in this environment that my parents raised the five of us to embrace public service and social justice. 
 
A LEADER IN CRISIS
For the past 14 years, I’ve gotten up at 5 AM to make sure that by the time most New Yorkers wake up, their trash has been collected and they have clean water in their tap. I haven’t done it for the glamour, but because I care deeply, fiercely, and obsessively about this city.
 
I’ve responded to water main breaks in the middle of the night, the destruction of pump stations by Hurricane Sandy. I’ve managed an operating budget during the Great Recession, led teams to clean up debris storm after storm, and made sure that thousands of workers could safely continue to pick up garbage even during a pandemic.
 
Over the years I have become a go-to leader, someone who can and will take on projects that seem impossible to others. I developed and executed a plan to reduce childhood lead poisoning annually by an additional 21%. I stepped up to lead the New York City Housing Authority when no one else would. In March, when we were the epicenter of a pandemic and the world felt like it was crashing around us, I stood up a food operation that provided one million meals per day to hungry New Yorkers.
 
A PLAN FOR OUR FUTURE
We cannot waste this crisis. Climate change, failing infrastructure, and dilapidated subway and buses are not going away just because there’s a pandemic. As we plan for the revival of this great City we must plan for a place that will be equitable, more just and climate resilient. I believe we must and we can streamline bureaucracy and be more nimble to support new ideas.

This will require not just the work of the City government itself, but a Mayor that can galvanize all the City's talents, and get to work on day one.

Name: League of Women Voters of Ohio
Description: League of Women Voters of Ohio, a nonpartisan political organization, encourages informed and active participation in government, works to increase understanding of major public policy issues, and influences public policy through education and advocacy.

Name: Judge Jennifer Fleet
Description:
The district court belongs to the people of Mecklenburg County.  It's where the most important parts of our lives are handled -our family, our money, and our freedom.  Jennifer's professional and personal experiences as a litigator, child advocate and parent make her uniquely qualified to serve as a District Court Judge

Jennifer started her career with the guardian ad litem program in Florida as a court advocate for abused and neglected children.  She followed that work with time as a juvenile court case manager working directly with families involved with the juvenile court system.

In 2014, Jennifer became a member of the North Carolina State Bar.  She handles family law, appellate advocacy, and serves as a parent coordinator in high conflict divorce cases.  In her legal practice she has successfully represented clients in trial and in the North Carolina Court of Appeals.

As an attorney, guardian ad litem and case worker, Jennifer has spent years working to make sure the voices of families and children are heard in our courts.

Jennifer lives in Charlotte, she is the proud parent of four young men and most importantly, their dog Sam.  Ray, nick, Ty and Daniel all attended East Mecklenburg High School.

Name: International Centre for Relations & Diplomacy (ICRD)
Description:
The International Centre for Relations & Diplomacy (ICRD) is an independent, non-profit and non-partisan think tank with offices in London and Brussels. The centre promotes progressive dialogue between government entities, civil society and grassroots movements. Its strategic mission is to ensure rights and democracy are at the heart of international diplomacy and domestic government relations.

The centre works with national and international parliaments, government and non-government entities. While it collaborates globally, it primarily works in Western Europe. ICRD projects involve research, policy recommendations and information dissemination campaigns in order to inform decision-makers to create a fairer and more stable world.

How We Work
The International Centre for Relations & Diplomacy (ICRD) strategy is to promote policy ideas to national and international governmental entities that reflect public want and just outcomes.

The centre will always push recommendations based on research and evidence, whether gathered through civil society and grassroots organisations or commissioned by the ICRD.

To ensure a fair and stable world, ICRD are currently working with:

The United Nations.
The European Union.
UK Parliament.
The Bundestag.
ICRD carries out its mission by:

Carrying out research.
Putting forward policy papers.
Creating fact sheets.
Organising workshops and conferences.
Coordinating public affairs activities including meetings and delegations with key states persons.

Name: VVD Waalwijk
Description: De lokale en liberale partij voor een vrij, veilig en welvarend Waalwijk, Sprang-Capelle en Waspik

Name: Osons le Renouveau - OR
Description:
Nous, membres de Osons le Renouveau,

Conscients des défis du peuple ivoirien de notre époque, de notre responsabilité face à nos contemporains et de notre devoir vis-à-vis des générations futures,

Conscients que l’expression démocratique, par les partis politiques ou les initiatives personnelles, reste le gage unique de la consolidation de la stabilité du pays,

Sachant l’histoire de notre pays, ses moments de gloire et d’errements et soucieux de nous servir de l’ensemble de ces péripéties pour bâtir une Nation unie et intégrant toutes les composantes et réalités des populations qui peuplent le territoire, sans exclusion,

Désireux de nous doter d’un cadre politique satisfaisant les besoins et aspirations profonds du peuple ivoirien à la paix, à la démocratie, à la cohésion nationale, à la dignité, à l’intégrité, à l’intégration de tous, à la justice, au progrès social et à la solidarité entre tous,

Considérant la recomposition rapide du paysage politique qui justifie d’ouvrir le jeu politique à tous les Ivoiriennes et Ivoiriens et la nécessité de son adaptation aux besoins du moment et à venir et ainsi offrir à tous, quelles que soient leurs sensibilités, de meilleures alternatives citoyennes, 

Considérant la volonté des membres du Mouvement d’exprimer leur adhésion et de préserver les valeurs fondamentales de l’Humanité, d’égalité et de respect de tous les peuples sans discrimination quelconque, 

Nous inscrivant dans l’histoire de l’Humanité et y revendiquant nos droits et ceux de l’ensemble de nos Concitoyens sur un strict pied d’égalité aux autres peuples,

Avons décidé de nous organiser dans le cadre du fonctionnement d'un Parti Politique.

Name: SGP ChristenUnie Goes
Description: Onze fractie bedrijft politiek vanuit een christelijke levensvisie. Het goede behouden, verbeteren wat beter kan. Dat doen we vanuit liefde voor God en onze naaste.

Name: BO Vakbond voor BeroepsOnderwijs
Description:
Wij zijn een vakbond die de belangen behartigt van werknemers in het beroepsonderwijs. We weten hoe geweldig het is om in het beroepsonderwijs te werken! Maar we weten ook dat het niet altijd even makkelijk is. Werkdruk, salaris, pensioen, inschaling en je (tijdelijke) contract maken het écht moeilijk om je op je kerntaken te richten. Daarom onderhandelen wij met werkgevers en colleges van bestuur om arbeidsvoorwaarden in het beroepsonderwijs te verbeteren.

Maar we helpen jou ook persoonlijk bij zaken als: ziekte, arbeidsongeschiktheid en afkeuringsprocedures; ontslaguitkeringen en andere berekeningen; controle van salarisberekeningen; pensioenzaken; Opname DI uren; geschillen over de arbeidsovereenkomst; problemen met betrekking tot taakbelasting; verhuiskostenregelingen; vragen over het carrièrepatroon; beroepszaken bij ontslag; advies bij medezeggenschap; Dus word snel lid van BO!

Name: Lotus Brigade AP - కమలదళం అంధ్ర ప్రదేశ్
Description: కమల దళం :AP లో కమల వికాసం కొరకు భాజపా సమర్ధకులచే నడపబడుతున్నది...

Name: Done Waiting
Description:
Done Waiting is a disruptive army of young people fighting to elect Progressives and bend the establishment to the will of the people.

We are an entirely volunteer-run organization and we are using our immense people power to endorse progressive candidates across the country. We help them win by making hundreds of thousands of calls for them. We will also use our army to pressure centrist politicians so they start valuing basic human rights over the will of corporations and the elite.

We are using our working class platform to educate the youth on the untold people’s history rather than the narrative pushed by the ruling class, and we advocate for candidates and policies that defend the interests of ordinary people.

We are sick and tired of being told to wait for changes that are long overdue. We are Done Waiting.

Name: Allianz gegen die Uferinitiative
Description: Überparteiliche Allianz gegen die Uferinitiative im Kanton Zürich

Name: Steve Barclay MP
Description:
Steve is the Member of Parliament for North East Cambridgeshire and the Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster and Minister for the Cabinet Office

He spent his first four years in Parliament as a member of the Public Accounts Committee. He became a Government Whip in 2015 covering a range of departments over two years including the Treasury, Dept for Business, Department for Exiting the European Union and the Scotland Office. He was appointed Economic Secretary to the Treasury responsible for financial services in 2017 and then Minister of State for the Department of Health and Social Care in 2018. In November 2018, Steve accepted the position of Secretary of State for Exiting the European Union.

Prior to being an MP, Steve was an insurance company lawyer, a regulator for the Financial Services Authority, and then Head of Anti-Money Laundering and Sanctions at Barclays Retail Bank.

He lives just outside Wisbech in Cambridgeshire with his wife and two children.

Name: High School Republican National Federation
Description: The next generation of conservatives.

Name: Instituto Francisco Sá Carneiro
Description:
O Instituto Francisco Sá Carneiro é um espaço de discussão e reflexão aberto e livre.
O Instituto tem como missão gerar novos modos de pensar a sociedade portuguesa e novas formas de intervir na sua transformação e desenvolvimento, identificando problemas e propondo soluções, formar quadros políticos, especialmente jovens, comunicar e publicar as principais ideias debatidas, preservar e divulgar o legado e memória de Francisco Sá Carneiro.

Description: Wir setzen uns für ein vereintes, starkes Europa ein und möchten Hamburg gerechter, nachhaltiger und vielfältiger gestalten.

Name: Zentralverband der Augenoptiker und Optometristen (ZVA)
Description:
Der Zentralverband der Augenoptiker und Optometristen (ZVA) ist die Interessenvertretung des deutschen Augenoptiker-Handwerks.

Als Bundesinnungsverband nimmt er die Gesamtinteressen des Berufsstandes wahr.
Die Arbeit des ZVA ist in vier große Arbeitsfelder untergliedert: Berufspolitik, Betriebswirtschaft, Öffentlichkeitsarbeit & Marketing und Recht.

Name: Federación Argentina de Mutuales de Salud (FAMSA)
Description:
Desde 1991 defendiendo a mutuales y cooperativas de salud en Argentina. Somos 36 entidades asociadas, que representamos a más de 1 millón de personas.

Somos una entidad de segundo grado, que lleva más de 20 años defendiendo y representando los intereses de mutuales y cooperativas dedicadas a brindar servicios de salud en la República Argentina.

Queremos ser la Federación de la Economía Social que represente a todas las entidades sin fines de lucro, que en forma solidaria trabajan como prestadores y/o financiadores del sistema de salud, fomentando su crecimiento y articulación con las políticas sanitarias de la Nación y las provincias, y así ejercer un accionar coherente y proactivo en pos de la preservación, promoción y cuidado de la salud.
Location: San Nicolás, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Montana Republican Party
Description: The Montana Republican Party is our state's leading advocate for lower taxes, smaller government, strong families and a strong nation. We organize conservative voters, inform the public about the benefits of conservative policies, and serve Republican officeholders as they serve the people of Montana.

Name: Collin Thompson for NYC City Council
Description:
Collin Thompson is a public servant, educator, and problem solver who has spent his career working to improve New York City’s schools and communities.

Collin’s platform redefines what city leadership can achieve. Thompson’s campaign, centered around his “Solid Six” priorities, stresses reinvestment in education and infrastructure and making the city safer and more livable for all.

Name: British Influence
Description:
British Influence is the campaign to keep Britain in a reformed EU. We are a cross-party organisation who believes that Britain is better off in a better Europe.

We believe that British membership of the EU makes us a stronger, more secure, more influential and richer country.

Europe is changing and if we work with allies to reform the EU we can make even more of our membership. Britain must remain engaged and work within the EU for change. Taking the defeatist and self-defeating route would leave other countries to set the agenda in Europe and then impose it on us.

An independent organisation, we are not affiliated with, nor do we receive any funding from, any Government, political party or European institution. Our activities are entirely funded by donations from the private sector.

Name: Personalverband des Bundes PVB
Description: Der PVB ist mit seinen rund 8’000 Mitgliedern der wichtigste Interessenvertreter der Angestellten des Bundes, der bundesnahen Betriebe und des ETH-Bereichs. Die Aktivitäten des PVB basieren auf den zentralen Werten Solidarität, Gleichstellung und der Wahrnehmung der individuellen und kollektiven Interessen seiner Mitglieder. Der PVB engagiert sich für einen starken Service public und die Erhaltung und Verbesserung der persönlichen und rechtlichen Situation seiner Mitglieder. Er wirkt aktiv beim Gestalten eines fortschrittlichen Personalrechts mit und sorgt dafür, dass die Mitwirkungsrechte der Mitarbeitenden ausgebaut werden.

SPOLU - občianska demokracia je proeurópska stredopravá strana. Pracujeme na tom, aby sme boli najlepšie pripravení priniesť na Slovensko zmenu, ktorú si ľudia želajú. Nestačí vymeniť figúrky, ponúkame program radikálnych zmien. 

Sme pripravení spraviť zo Slovenska skutočne spravodlivý a sociálny štát, aby sa ľuďom darilo a oplatilo žiť poctivo. Nechceme sa hanbiť za rozbité nemocnice ani sa obávať toho, či sú naše deti pripravené na budúcnosť. Lesy, vodu, pôdu a ovzdušie chceme zachovať čisté a použiteľné aj pre ďalšie generácie. 

Snažíme sa spájať kvalitných ľudí, ktorým sa dá dôverovať, že štát dokážu spravovať dobre a slušne. Len s nimi je zmena možná. 
Pridajte sa k nám.

The Xaqsoor Party is committed to fostering a strong and dignified Somali nation, rooted in justice and social equality.

Name: People's Democratic Party (PDP)
Description: People's Democratic Party PDP is a major contemporary political party in Nigeria. Its policies generally lie towards the centre-right of the political spectrum. It won every Presidential election between 1999 and 2011, and was until the 2015 elections, the governing party in the Fourth Republic although in some cases, amid a few controversial electoral circumstances. Currently, PDP controls 15 states out of 36 states in Nigeria.

Name: Expedition Grundeinkommen
Description:
Das bedingungslose Grundeinkommen wird heiß diskutiert. Es gibt Pilotexperimente, Modellversuche und Feldstudien in Modellregionen. Allerdings gibt es noch kein staatlich finanziertes Grundeinkommensexperiment in Deutschland.

Wir sagen: Genug geredet. Lasst es uns endlich ausprobieren – wissenschaftlich fundiert mit einem großangelegten staatlichen Grundeinkommensversuch!

Name: ASEAN Regional Mine Action Center
Description:
ASEAN Regional Mine Action Centre (ARMAC) is a centre of excellence under the ASEAN Security Cooperation to encourage the efforts to address explosive remnants of war (ERW) for interested ASEAN Member States (AMS). Inaugurated on 25 May 2016, this centre aims to collectively tackle the humanitarian aspects of the landmines and ERW through an integrated approach of experiences sharing, skills training and other capacity building activities.

In accordance of ASEAN Leaders’ recognition on the presence of landmines and other ERW as the threat to people’s safety, the constraint to the socio-economic development, and humanitarian problem in the ASEAN region, ARMAC was formed to facilitates the cooperation within AMS and between AMS and relevant institutions to: (i) enhance awareness programs on the dangers of ERW among affected communities; (ii) facilitate appropriate medical and rehabilitation assistance for victims of ERW, upon request from the affected ASEAN Member States; and (iii) assist interested ASEAN Member States (AMS) in research and knowledge sharing on the effects of ERW and efforts to address them, including through writing proposals for technical assistance projects and funding, at their specific and individual request.

Movimenta è un’organizzazione politica che guarda alle sfide della nostra società. Lo facciamo con tutti coloro che vogliono mettersi in gioco, non solo “dire la propria”, ma anche “fare la propria parte”. 

Lavorare assieme vuol dire definire assieme le soluzioni nelle quali crediamo, capire le risorse di cui c’è bisogno, creare capacità, rimboccarsi le maniche e fare quello che si può anche nel proprio piccolo. Lavorare assieme è un processo continuo di fare, valutare, correggere il tiro e adattarsi ai tempi. 

Per maggiori informazioni: www.movimenta.info 

Movimenta is a political organisation that works to tackle the main current political challenges in Italy. We look forward to engaging all those people who are ready to take an active role, not only by “saying what they think”, but also “doing their part”.

Working together means defining the solutions we believe are necessary, finding and building the capacities to implement them and working hard, any of us in his/her community. Working together is a process: it’s about doing, monitoring, improving our work and adjust as needed.

For more information: www.movimenta.info

Het CDA heeft een vast geloof in democratische waarden. Wij gebruiken het Evangelie als grondslag en inspiratiebron als we zoeken naar oplossingen voor problemen van deze tijd. In onze statuten is deze grondslag vastgelegd. Vanuit deze grondslag is het Program van Uitgangspunten geschreven. Hierin staan vier begrippen centraal: publieke gerechtigheid, gespreide verantwoordelijkheid, solidariteit en rentmeesterschap. Name: United Expats of The Netherlands Stichting
Description:
United Expats of the Netherlands formed in April 2018 in response to a proposal of the Ministry of Finance to reduce the term length of the 30% tax rule to 5 years for all recipients – both current and new – beginning January 2019. This proposal breaks an existing deal between the Dutch government and highly skilled expats who are current recipients of policy.

We accept and support the right of the Dutch government to amend its tax legislation as it deems necessary. However, enforcing this policy change on current recipients will have significant and severe consequences for recipients and their families, the businesses that employ these professionals, and on the long term financial health of the Netherlands.

United Expats is working to encourage the government to stand by the deal they made with current recipients of the 30% tax ruling so that any changes apply to future expats, not to those already here.

Afspraak is Afspraak.

Description:
SAFE (Science and Families Engaging) Communities Coalition supports pro-vaccine legislation and lawmakers. We empower everyday people, the often silent pro-vaccine majority, to advocate for health and safety alongside medical and public health professionals. 

Since 2O2O, SAFE has helped to establish and sustain nine Families for Vaccines chapters in states across the nation. We work closely with allies including healthcare providers, scientists, nonprofits, industry partners, advocates for children and health, and legislators to go the final mile in pro-vaccine advocacy. 

Together, we recruit and train the pro-vaccine majority to stand on the shoulders of the experts, educating lawmakers about science and the imperative to protect public health.

Name: Beweging-FCG
Description:
Wij zijn een beweging voor met name jonge geesten en nieuwe ideeën die mensen en partijen verbind die samen willen werken aan doelen die een positieve impact hebben op onze samenleving en leefomgeving, dit door kansen en veranderingen met en voor elkaar te creëren.
Onze basis en vertrouwen ligt in onderwijs, cultuur en sport, de plekken waar men zich altijd en blijvend kan ontwikkelen, herpakken en vooruitgaan. Alles om met kennis, creativiteit en een gezonde geest en lichaam positief staande in onze best ingewikkelde maatschappij te kunnen blijven. 


Wij ondersteunen de politiek en die organisaties die waakzaamheid zijn voor de jeugd hun leefomgeving en zijn toekomst en die toekomst met lef en visie durven aan te gaan, die niet afwachten maar doorpakken...
Desnoods met eigen acties en initiatieven als we dat nodig vinden...

Wij creëren en geven kansen, ondersteunen en geven ruimte en bouwen middels onze Atelier-FCG door aan de mogelijkheden om je te kunnen uiten middels creatieve processen in welke vorm dan ook.

Ons eigen Eempodium gebruiken we om dat wat podia nodig heeft, in beeld te brengen in samenwerking met de podia die onze regio rijk is... 

Idealisme als uitgangspunt en met forse realisme er direct achteraan om daar uit te komen waar we onze stipjes zetten. We sluiten niets en niemand uit en gaan met iedereen die dat wil blijvend in gesprek. 

En Jij, ja jij hoort er vast gewoonweg al bij!

#Verbinden #Kansen #Creëren #Ruimte #Samen #VoorIedereen 
#VoorDeToekomst #Gelijkwaardigheid #AlleenMaarLiefde #FCG

Name: DriveElectricND
Description:
DriveElectricND is a collaborative group of citizens, businesses, utilities and stakeholders who support electric vehicle usage in North Dakota, by encouraging awareness and sound policies. DEND is organized for the promotion, advancement and growth of electric vehicle use in North Dakota using locally sourced energy. We believe in the environmental and economic benefits of driving electric vehicles, and we aim to bring these benefits to drivers.

 
We operate on the principals of Education, Communication, and Advocacy.

EDUCATE – the public at large of the relative advantages of electric vehicles, noteworthy developments, and the availability of all sources of electricity
COMMUNICATE – to be a resource for citizens, organizations and stakeholders for electric vehicle expertise in North Dakota, including technical, scientific and policy development
ADVOCATE – fair and equitable policies to encourage the operation of electric vehicles on North Dakota roadways, allowing the private sector and free market to drive the demand.
 

DriveElectricND works to educate and advocate for drivers of electric vehicles. It is important to advocate in government so that we can help give lawmakers the information they need to create policies that foster innovation in electricity and electric vehicles. We want drivers to enjoy significant transportation savings while creating a more sustainable future. North Dakota’s broad variety of energy resources allow drivers stable and reliable power for transportation. We will continue working with drivers and government to communicate the benefits of driving electric.

Name: Haley Stevens for Congress
Description:
Haley Stevens has dedicated her career to saving and growing good-paying jobs in Michigan. During the Great Recession, Haley served as chief of staff on the Auto Task Force inside of the U.S. Treasury Department, the team responsible for returning the auto industry to financial stability and saving 211,000 Michigan jobs.

Most recently she led a national workforce development program and created the country’s first online training program for digital manufacturing, which is already changing lives. She has led innovation programs across the country, helping small and medium sized manufacturers grow. Haley is a frequent speaker on job creation by way of harnessing new technology. She launched a STEM education program which has exposed over 200 middle and high school students to digital manufacturing concepts and processes with hands-on teaching.

Earlier in her career, Haley played a key role in setting up two federal offices critical in creating new Michigan jobs: The Office of Recovery for Automotive Communities and Workers and the White House Office of Manufacturing Policy. She also served as a policy advisor in the Economic Development Administration, where she helped create advanced manufacturing job opportunities located around southeastern Michigan.

Haley was born and raised in Oakland County where she graduated from Seaholm High School. She earned a master’s degree in social policy and philosophy and a bachelor’s degree in political science from American University.

Name: Project 50 PAC
Description:
Project 50 is a national political committee (PAC), which was formed in 2022 in anticipation of the U. S. Supreme Court overturning the 1973 Roe v. Wade decision and the resulting vulnerability of abortion rights at the state level. 

Everyone, everywhere must have the right to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions to chart their future.  Project 50 is building that reality.

Project 50 is a non-partisan PAC that invests in and grows state-based organizations to build political and electoral power at the local level to secure abortion rights in all 50 states.

Name: Vermont Democratic Party
Description:
The Vermont Democratic Party believes in the values of opportunity, fairness, equity and equality, community, safety, stewardship and democracy.

We believe the role of responsible, responsive and accountable government is to protect and empower people. We believe in a government with opportunities for Vermonters to participate and have their voices heard.

The mantra on lower taxes and less government doesn’t contribute to just distribution of wealth. It is possible to create a fair taxation system that leads to ways where everyone benefits. The Vermont Democratic Party stands for the public good.

We understand that state government can and must take the lead against the policies of a divisive Republican President, Governor, and Congress, and an increasingly right-wing federal judiciary.

We hold these principles, goals and commitments in common as members of the Vermont Democratic Party and will work together and individually to promote them as the guiding philosophy of a just and fair government.

Name: Welsh Conservatives
Description:
Campaigning across Wales on the issues that matter to the people of Wales.

We support building the movement necessary to implement a publicly-funded, single-payer healthcare system that is universal, equitable, transparent, accountable, comprehensive, and that removes financial and other barriers to the right to health.

Name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher for Congress
Description:
Fierce Advocate
Trusted Partner
Proud Houstonian

A fifth-generation Houstonian, Fletcher is a partner at Ahmad, Zavitsanos, Anaipakos, Alavi & Mensing P.C. (AZA), a Houston-based law firm. Fletcher has been recognized by attorneys across the country as one of the Best Lawyers in America for commercial litigation and has been included on the 2016 Texas Super Lawyers list and the 2012-2016 Texas Rising Stars lists.

Fletcher graduated from St. John's School in 1993, Kenyon College in 1997, where she was elected to Phi Beta Kappa, and from the School of Law at The College of William & Mary in Virginia in 2006, where she was Editor-in-Chief of the William and Mary Law Review.

Fletcher and her husband Scott live in the district where they enjoy taking advantage of all Houston has to offer and spending time with their family.

Name: Mexican American Legislative Caucus (MALC)
Description: MALC is a 501(c)(6) non-profit organization and the oldest and largest Hispanic/Latino legislative caucus in the United States. MALC is composed of members of the Texas House of Representatives who are of Mexican American descent and/or who represent districts with a majority Hispanic/Latino voting population. MALC's purpose is to represent the interests of a united Hispanic/Latino constituency across the State of Texas.

Name: APPG Media
Description:
The All-Party Parliamentary Media Group is a forum for discussion within Parliament on public policy as it affects the media sector, formed in 1992.

Its membership is drawn from all political parties and both Houses of Parliament. It meets regularly to receive an address and have a short discussion with key players from the media industry, its regulatory agencies, and government ministers.

It is an impartial, efficiently-run organisation, which provides a useful interface between Parliament, the industry and other key stakeholders.

It makes a valuable contribution to raising the quality of debate on media policy in Parliament and is greatly valued both by ministers and by industry.

Name: Beers And Politics
Description:
"Bienvenidos a Beers and Politics! Somos un espacio para los amantes de la cerveza y la política. Acá exploramos la interesante relación entre estas dos temáticas, promoviendo debates constructivos y mientras disfrutamos de una cerveza. Unite a nuestra comunidad y descubrí las últimas noticias políticas, análisis profundos, debates de expertos e inexpertos.

Nuestro objetivo es crear un ambiente para intercambiar ideas, aprender y conectarnos con todos los que  comparten nuestro interés por el mundo de la política y la cerveza. Salud y bienvenidos a Beers and Politics!"

Name: Young Americans Coalition for Unity
Description:
The Young Americans Coalition for Unity (YACU) is a registered nonprofit organization dedicated to engaging youth in politics and promoting unity and bipartisanship.

The YACU fulfills this mission through a variety of activities that fit into our three pillars of:

    Empowering youth to engage in bipartisan discussion and become politically engaged;
    Providing opportunities for members to become involved on a local, state, and national level through our partnership network as well as internal volunteer opportunities; and
    Establishing chapters in educational institutions and communities across the nation that serve as an extension of the YACU.

As one of the US's only youth-led nonpartisan & bipartisan organization focused on this unique combined mission of youth and unity, the YACU seeks to give everyone -- no matter their party, ideology, or background -- a chance to share their political beliefs, get involved, and find common ground.

Name: Parliamentary Budget Office of NSW
Description:
The Parliamentary Budget Office (PBO) provides costings of proposed or publicly announced election policies in response to requests by parliamentary leaders. Costings of election policies are provided in the lead-up to NSW general elections. The next NSW election is scheduled to occur on 25 March 2023. 

The PBO also prepares budget impact statements for each parliamentary leader, which provide a summary of the total net financial impact of all of the costed policies for each leader. 

The Parliamentary Budget Officer is an apolitical role requiring adherence to the strictest levels of impartiality, confidentiality and sensitivity.

For more information on the Parliamentary Budget Officer, please see the Parliamentary Budget Officer Act 2010 or view the 2022 - 2023 Parliamentary Budget Office Operational Plan.

Historical material
For Parliamentary Budget Office costings and other materials from previous elections please see the Historical Material page on our website.

Com esse intuito a Ordem organiza a sua actividade no sentido da dignificação e do prestígio da profissão, tendo em conta as vertentes de valorização técnica e das funções ética e social da sua actividade.

Name: ACCIÓN TÉCNICA SOCIAL
Description:
En Acción Técnica Social (ATS) trabajamos para transformar las políticas de drogas con un enfoque basado en derechos humanos, regulación y reducción de daños. Creemos en una sociedad que conviva en paz con las sustancias psicoactivas y en la transformación de los discursos políticos, mediáticos y de opinión pública.

A través de la Metodología para la Acción Técnica Social (MATS), integramos investigación, comunicación y movilización social para fortalecer comunidades y generar cambios en política pública. 
Nuestros proyectos incluyen:

 Échele Cabeza: Prevención y reducción de riesgos en el consumo de sustancias.
 Cambie: Innovación en modelos de regulación de drogas.
 Nicotina: Estrategias para la reducción de daños en el consumo de tabaco y nicotina.
 Festival de Cortos Psicoactivos: Espacio cultural para repensar la relación de la sociedad con las drogas.

¿Cómo lo hacemos?
Investigación y asesoría en políticas de drogas y salud pública.
Diseño e implementación de campañas de comunicación y movilización.
Acompañamiento y capacitación a comunidades, activistas y tomadores de decisiones.
Incidencia en la transformación de políticas y discursos sobre drogas.
Trabajamos en alianza con el Estado, el sector privado, la cooperación internacional y la sociedad civil para impulsar soluciones basadas en evidencia y justicia social.

 Un futuro sin guerra contra las drogas es posible. Construyámoslo juntos.

Name: Republican National Hispanic Assembly of Florida
Description:
Mission

The mission of the RNHA is to increase Hispanic-Americans participation in electoral politics at all levels as well as boost Hispanic-Americans membership in the Republican Party. Furthermore, the RNHA seeks to promote the philosophy and political ideology of the Party within the Hispanic-American community. Finally, the RNHA desires to create and sustain an association of Hispanic-Americans Republican leaders. To that end, a series of objectives- as posted on their official web site- were formulated:

Objectives
-To promote the core principles and values of Republicanism throughout the Hispanic-American community in the United States
-To develop and maintain a strong, effective and informed Republican Hispanic-American constituency throughout the country.
-To recruit and encourage qualified, Hispanic-Americans, as registered Republicans, to seek office at all levels of government.
-To ensure candidates who represent the true values of Republicanism are elected to office and continue to represent those values.
-To adopt resolutions and policy positions on local, state and national issues and to seek to implement these resolutions and policy positions through networks of the Republican Party and other appropriate means.
-To promote and encourage civic participation.
-To ensure the participation of citizens of Hispanic heritage in the American political process and in all levels of the Republican Party.
-To Make America Great Again

Name: Virginia Review of Politics
Description:
The Virginia Review of Politics (VRoP or the Review) is an undergraduate-run political review at the University of Virginia. The Review seeks to publish engaging political content for both the University population and the local community at-large. The Review focuses on publishing high-quality student content aiming at a middle range between undergraduate academic journals and student newspaper opinion sections. By doing so, the Review wishes to engage discussion amongst politically and civically-minded individuals in the community.

In particular, the Review seeks to publish a variety of perspectives by individuals who come from diverse intellectual and political backgrounds. By giving otherwise politically disengaged individuals a platform with which to express their ideas and suggestions regarding politics, the Review hopes to foster an environment in which people of diverse interests may all contribute to the study of politics.

Name: Indonesia Singapore Foreign Policy Youth Talks
Thiru Vignarajah for Baltimore
Description:
Our city is at a crossroads. The most difficult jobs in public service took Thiru face to face with how violence, a lack of opportunity, generations of disinvestment, and drug addiction tear communities apart. The time for letting career politicians play musical chairs has passed. Baltimore needs real leadership. Thiru is the only candidate who will enter the race that has served as a federal and city prosecutor. The only candidate who has managed complex issues, from multinational mergers to leading on the legalization of gay marriage between his time as Deputy Attorney General and a Partner at DLA Piper. Thiru embodies the story of Baltimore, and is the one who can and will do what needs to be done to help this city.

As mayor, Thiru will lead the charge against crime and corruption. He will give our children a fair shot, ensuring universal pre-k and free college at any Maryland institution - from private to trade. Thiru will lead the city into a new economy, one that creates new jobs and attract new industry. One that stimulates growth across the region and one that spends new resources on treating addiction. Our issues in Baltimore are deep rooted and can’t be fixed overnight, but together, we can make Baltimore a city that not only attracts the best talent in the world, but produces the best talent in the world.

And if this sounds like the future for Baltimore you know this city deserves, this isn’t just our campaign, it’s your campaign too.

Description:
Founded as the Alabama League of Environmental Action Voters in 1999, AlaLEAVs became Conservation Alabama in 2007. Our mission is to make sound environmental policy a political reality in Alabama.
 
Since Conservation Alabama's founding, no bad environmental legislation has passed the Alabama State Legislature. As we move forward, we're looking to elect a conservation-minded majority in both Houses to enact legislation that will benefit the citizens, economy, and environment of the state.
 
Our family of organizations complete the "cycle of accountability" for government officials. Through the Conservation Alabama Foundation, we focus on fundamental environmental issues and educate citizens on how to effectively engage government officials and the public. Through Conservation Alabama, we work with conservation partners to achieve our policy priorities through legislative and administrative lobbying. Through the Conservation Alabama Action Fund, we work to elect conservation-minded candidates for state and local offices.

Name: Michelle Steel for Congress
Description:
Michelle Steel is a public servant, mother, and proven tax-fighter who wants to make a difference and help those in need.

As a young adult, Michelle came to America with her mother and two younger sisters from South Korea. Like so many before her and many more after, her family came to America searching for opportunities with the hope for a better future.

She first became interested in public service at an early age when she watched her single working mother struggle to fight an unwarranted tax bill from the California State Board of Equalization. As an immigrant who owned a small business, her mother lacked the resources she needed to appeal the state agency and reluctantly acquiesced to the board’s demands.

After watching her own mother struggle, Michelle knew that she needed to help those who couldn’t help themselves and be a strong voice for the voiceless.

Michelle successfully ran for the California State Board of Equalization, the very agency that showed her how broken our political system is, and she worked tirelessly to make much needed, common-sense reforms.

At the California State Board of Equalization, Michelle became the country’s highest ranking Korean American officeholder and California’s highest-ranking Republican woman, which gave her a unique platform to give back to her country by empowering the next generation of women and minority leaders in our community.

Michelle currently serve as the Chairwoman of the Orange County Board of Supervisors where she works tirelessly on behalf of Orange County families fighting higher taxes, reducing traffic congestion in our communities, and ensuring our bays and coastlines are clean.

Michelle is running for Congress because Orange County needs a strong voice in Washington, D.C. who will honor promises made and stand up for us and our values.

Name: Norsk medisinstudentforening | Norwegian Medical Students' Association
Description:
Norsk medisinstudentforening er en partipolitisk uavhengig organisasjon og en underavdeling av Den norske legeforening. Foreningen er en fagforening og interesseorganisasjon for medisinstudenter og har som hovedoppgave å arbeide for sine medlemmers faglige, økonomiske og sosiale interesser.

Norsk medisinstudentforening tar sikte på å være en aktiv part i utviklingen av den medisinske grunnutdanningen, samt en medvirkende part i saker som vedrører medisinfaget.

Foreningen formidler humanitære idealer blant medisinstudenter, og ønsker å bidra til utviklingen av fremtidige leger. I denne sammenheng ønsker foreningen å bidra til at medisinstudenter får større forståelse for andre kulturer, samfunn, samt nasjonale- og internasjonale helseproblemer. Foreningen gjør dette gjennom sitt bredspekteret arbeid, og ved å stimulere til debatt og skape engasjement blant medisinstudenter.

Norsk medisinstudentforening arbeider blant annet med:
- kvaliteten på den medisinske grunnutdanningen ved de medisinske fakultetene i Norge
- turnusordningen
- lønn og arbeidsvilkår for medisinstudenter med og uten midlertidig lisens
- utvekslingsmuligheter for medlemmene til andre land
- lokale, nasjonale og globale helsespørsmål gjennom prosjekter, seminarer og foredrag
- Medisinstudentens Humanitæraksjon (MedHum) arrangeres hvert andre år.

Norsk medisinstudentfordeling er norges medlemsorganisasjon i International Federation of Medical Students’ Associations – IFMSA, og er en medlemsorganisasjon av Landsrådet for Norges barne- og ungdomsorganisasjoner (LNU).

Name: The Sexton Group
Description:
The Sexton Group is an innovative grassroots communications company with extensive experience working with political campaigns and committees, non-profit organizations, and labor organizations. From an Education Bond Referendum in Wilmette, IL to the election of President Barack Obama, we have a history of groundbreaking success in the electoral and legislative arenas. 

As your strategic partner, we will help identify your communication needs and provide grassroots solutions to help you effectively interact with your target audience, whether they are voters, legislators, or members. 

We are able to implement live programs and automated calls on a moment's notice and are available 24/7 to meet your needs. We also offer remote off-site monitoring, so you can listen to our calls. 

The Sexton Group began as a political telemarketing firm and has prospered in the competitive campaign arena by emphasizing exceptional program quality and outstanding customer service at a reasonable price. TSG has retained these same qualities as we expanded into the association, non-profit, labor and corporate arenas. We invite you to learn about what The Sexton Group can do for you.

Name: Monroe County Democratic Committee
Description:
The Monroe County Democratic Committee is the official governing body for the County Party. It aims to help Democrats combine their efforts to elect representatives to local, state, and national government. These candidates and elected officials, whatever their views on specific issues, are united in their general Democratic philosophy of striving to benefit the general welfare with special attention to those who need it. The Party, at all levels, is an inclusive one, striving for the greatest possible public participation in our society. The committee’s foundation is the base of registered Democratic voters.

Interested voters can join Town and Ward committees, which then unite to form the County Committee. The County Committee then elects members to the New York State Democratic Committee, and the State Committee elects members to

Each Democratic committee member represents an election district, and can participate on the committees that include that district at the town, ward, city, or county level. Each election district can elect from two to four committee members, depending on the Democratic share of the vote in the last race for
governor.

The County Committee includes most of the members of the Town and Ward committees, bringing them together to work on countywide, state, and national races as well as on issues. The County Committee also helps coordinate the different local committees, helping raise funds, find candidates, and share their
knowledge.

It promotes the idea that an abolition of inheritance or a high inheritence tax rate regime is a precondition for equal opportunities. It provides useful analysis and collections of articles to contribute to the debate of how to close the ever growing divide.

Name: Conservative Young Women
Description:
Conservative Young Women (CYW), is part of the Conservative Women’s Organisation (CWO), dedicated to encouraging and supporting young women in the Conservative Party. For imprint please visit our website

We are on a mission to get more Conservative women into public office at every level and to support Conservative women to play a full part in the Party.

Our membership age range is 18-35. We welcome members from around the country and from every walk of life.

CYW wants to see equal representation and voice for women within the Conservative Party, as well as within Parliament, devolved nations and local governments.

We organise regular events to provide training, development and networking opportunities. We are also a social organisation and organise activities to help get to know other members. Our leadership committee is based in London and we have regional Chairmen around the country helping to organise events and connect CYW members.

Name: Unlock the Grid
Description: Hi all and welcome to this social media campaign! Our goal is to publicize many bipartisan bills and solutions that both major parties support, and decrease the amount of gridlock in Congress. With today's political climate, the tensions are extreme between Democrats and Republicans, and we believe that progress can be achieved if we just talk and work together. Sign up below to join our organization and we'll contact you shortly right after!

Name: Foreningen af Frie Fagskoler (FaFF)
Description:
Frie Fagskoler har nytænkt højskoletraditionen i et virkelighedsnært perspektiv, hvor blandingen af erhvervsrettede fag og livsstilsundervisning udgør grundkernen skoleformen. Eleverne bor på skolen og  undervisningen er mindre ”tavle” og mere ”hands on” på alle fag, hvor eleverne fx lærer dansk og matematik i værkstedet eller i køkkenet. Frie Fagskoler skal være ”erhvervslivets kostskole".

I 2015 blev Frie Fagskoler grundlagt som en helt ny kostskoleform i Danmark. Det skete som et modtræk til den store akademiseringsbølge, der i alt for lang tid har domineret det danske uddannelsessystem. Stoltheden omkring det gode håndværk blev omdrejningspunktet for Frie Fagskoler, fordi samfundet har brug for kloge hænder. Målet med Frie Fagskoler er derfor at udfylde det store behov for tilbud til unge, der ønsker en praktisk og kreativ vej til en ungdomsuddannelse. 

Frie Fagskoler arbejder med koncepter, som findes i grænselandet mellem højskoletraditionen og den formelle sektor, hvor friheden til at tilrettelægge undervisningen går hånd i hånd med de krav og forventninger, som de unge, deres forældre, arbejdsmarkedet og ikke mindst det formelle uddannelsessystem stiller til en erhvervsrettet kostskole. Og det er netop her styrken ligger i forhold til at tænke nyt i uddannelsesverdenen. 

Som ”fri kostskoleform” har frie fagskoler dermed frihed til at tilrettelægge undervisningen på en måde, der i højere grad er værkstedsbaseret og inddrager erhvervslivet. Derfor er Frie Fasgskolers tilbud i dag og i fremtiden et helt unikt kostskolealternativ og -supplement til det formelle uddannelsessystem, hvor unge kan prøve elementer af erhvervsuddannelser af i et trygt kostskolemiljø uden at friheden til at vælge ungdomsuddannelse indsnævres.

Name: Liste Indépendante des Français de l’Etranger
Description:
Si 2014 avait donné la tendance, 2021 a confirmé le désir des Français de l'Etranger de ne pas être prisonniers de l'idéologie des partis politiques de tout bord, mais d’être représentés AUTREMENT par des conseillers français de l'étranger, femmes et hommes LIBRES, compétents, reconnus et intégrés depuis très longtemps dans la communauté économique, sociale et associative en Espagne. 

LIFE, comme vous l’avez compris est une liste INDÉPENDANTE de Français de l´Etranger qui est proche de vous lorsque vous êtes loin de chez vous.
En tête de liste, Pascal Bourbon, entrepreneur et conseiller du Commerce Extérieur de la France. Pascal Bourbon a été élu Conseiller des Français de l'Étranger en mai 2014 et réélu en mai 2021.
Karine Martin a été élue Déléguée Consulaire en mai 2021.

Description: Representante a la Cámara por Bogotá 2022-2026. Meditador, Instructor de Yoga, Animalista, Vegano, Melómano, Activista y enviciado al ser (ser-vicio).

Name: Elect Women NJ
Description: Elect Women NJ is an anti-racist, feminist organization.  We are a political action committee focused on raising money to invest in viable, diverse, Democratic women to run for local office in NJ races.  Elect Women NJ is doing what no other women-focused political organization in NJ is doing.  It is giving campaign donations and building a network to support strong candidates who need the investment in local races.  Having access to funds can be the critical difference between a successful race and an unsuccessful race.  Elect Women NJ is helping to build the pipeline of strong, viable women candidates.  Elect Women NJ wants to increase the representation of women in elected offices in New Jersey.

Name: POLIS Society
Description: The POLIS society is dedicated to creating an interdisciplinary space for the historical, contemporary and future study of public policy, international relations, and political thought at the University of Cambridge. The society aims to host an multidisciplinary agenda of thought-provoking in-person and virtual talks and discussions throughout the year with speakers from government, international and regional organisations, NGOs, academia, and the private sector. It also incorporates POLIS’ extensive part-time student and alumni network to encourage connected ways of working and thinking. Whether you study politics or just love talking about it - EVERYONE is welcome.

Name: Lorient en Commun
Description:
Lorient en Commun est un mouvement citoyen engagé pour construire une ville plus solidaire, écologique et démocratique.
Nous rassemblons des habitantes et habitants, des associations et des acteurs locaux qui souhaitent imaginer et mettre en œuvre un projet collectif pour l'avenir de Lorient.

Notre action s'articule autour de trois priorités:
- une transition écologique ambitieuse et accessible à toutes et tous,
- une justice sociale renforcée pour réduire les inégalités,
- une vie démocratique vivante, fondée sur la participation citoyenne.

Sur cette page LinkedIn, nous partageons nos actualités, nos analyses, nos initiatives locales et les projets que nous faisons émerger dans le territoire lorientais.

Ensemble, faisons de Lorient une ville dynamique, résiliente et accueillante pour toutes et tous.

Name: Lietuvos liberalus jaunimas
Description: Lithuanian Liberal Youth is a political, non-profit, non-governmental, volunteer youth organisation, established in 1991, currently gathering more than 2500 young liberal people all over Lithuania. The objectives of LLJ are political education, promotion of classical liberal and libertarian values among young people, training its members for political activity and encouragement of the creation of open and democratic civil society in Lithuania.

Name: Prefeitura Municipal de Itatira
Description:
Missão do órgão

II - Prestar ao Prefeito o apoio administrativo necessário para o desempenho de suas atribuições; III  Receber, distribuir, redigir, expedir e controlar a correspondência oficial do Prefeito, organizando e mantendo atualizado o arquivo de correspondência; IV - Analisar processos, convénios e contratos a serem submetidos a despacho do Prefeito; V - Despachar com o Prefeito os assuntos que dependam de decisão superior; VI - Compor a pauta de despachos do Prefeito com Secretários, acompanhando-a com precisão; VII - Organizar a agenda do Prefeito e coordenar o roteiro de suas audiências; VIII - Atender as partes interessadas que procuram o Prefeito; IX - Promover contatos com entidades públicas e privadas, quando do interesse do Prefeito; X - Zelar pela manutenção, uso e guarda do material de expediente e dos bens patrimoniais do Gabinete; XI - Autorizar o uso de veículos do Gabinete para serviços locais e para viagens; XII - Acompanhar as atividades da Junta de Serviço Militar; XIII - Diligenciar sobre outros assuntos correlates que lhe sejam encaminhados pelo Prefeito; XIV - Executar as estratégias de articulação interna com as Secretarias; XV - Organizar cerimonial de eventos, bem como, recepcionar visitas, autoridades e hóspedes da Prefeitura Municipal; XVI - Executar outras atribuições correlatas.
Visão do órgão

Art. 6.° - Ao Gabinete do Prefeito compete a assistência imediata e assessoramento direto ao Chefe do Poder Executivo

Description: Slingshot Strategies is a political consulting firm serving candidates, organizations, and causes at the local, state, and federal levels. We love a challenge, and we’re committed to working with campaigns that aim to change the status quo and move the country forward—even, or especially, in the face of overwhelming odds. A full-service firm led by experts in our respective disciplines, we can run every aspect of a campaign—and we know what it takes to win.

Name: Arizona List
Description:
Arizona List provides its members access to the women they help to elect to learn about what they can do to create change. Membership is more than a contribution. It is being part of a movement with a single focus of progressive change.
Arizona List recognizes that we still have far to go to build a community where diverse perspectives are put to work creating a more progressive state. Diversity is a strategic goal as well as a just one. Diversity creates better policies. As a multi-generational community committed to progress, every year we understand better that progress will not be fast enough, or reach its potential, unless we include the voices of everyone who shares our common values.

Name: Adhiinitee Organisation
Description:
Adhiinitee Organisation empowers political leaders and campaigns with data-driven strategies and
expert execution. We specialize in: Strategic Campaign Planning & Execution, Constituency Profiling & Management, Voter Outreach & Mobilization, Data Analytics &Polling, Digital Media Strategy &Content. Our team of experienced professionals leverages a deep understanding of the political landscape, cutting-edge technology, and a proven track record of success.
By combining rigorous research, innovative strategies, and a client-centric approach, Adhiinitee Organisation helps clients achieve their electoral goals and make a lasting impact on their communities. We have successfully managed campaigns across India for over 7 years, consistently delivering increased voter turnout, successful candidate wins, positive policy outcomes and many more.

Name: Lambesc Le Renouveau
Description:
Redonner à Lambesc un soufflé nouveau, en faire une ville dynamique, solidaire et respectueuse de son cadre de vie.
Nous croyons en l'avenir de Lambesc. 
Nous savons qu'ensemble, avec vous, nous pouvons construire une commune où il fait bon vivre, travailler et grandir.
La candidature de Valérie LOUBEYRE et Philippe RAZEYRE repose sur une conviction forte; La Politique Municipale doit être au service de l'ensemble des habitants car trop souvent, les décisions sont prises sans réelle concertation avec la population. Name: Oxford University Labour Club
Description:
Oxford University Labour Club is the largest university Labour club in the UK. Founded in 1919, OULC has been promoting democratic socialism and progressive politics in Oxford for nearly a hundred years.

We’re an active campaigning force; at the 2017 General Election, we helped our local CLP hold Oxford East with an increased majority of 65.2%, and organised campaigning trips to the nearby marginals of Battersea, Kensington, Hampstead, and Croydon Central. As well as getting our members out on the #labourdoorstep, we take positive action to promote social justice and equality within the universities and the wider Oxford community. Whether you’re a fresher or a finalist, Oxford or Brookes, OULC welcomes any member of the university who’s interested in the aims and values of the Labour movement.

All Georgetown students are welcome to join us! We host weekly meetings in ICC 115 at 6 PM every Sunday night.

Name: Don Huffines Campaign
Description:
Don Huffines is a proud fifth-generation Texan, husband, father, grandfather, and self-made businessman.

Don is a strong Christian and fought fearlessly for fiscal restraint and government accountability in the Texas State Senate while representing Dallas County’s District 16.

During his two legislative sessions, Don earned a reputation for being one of Texas’ most conservative lawmakers and served as the Vice-Chair of the Texas Senate Border Security, Veteran Affairs, and Transportation committees.

The only Texas state senator in history to never accept a penny of government money during his tenure, Don was disgusted by the corruption, backroom deals, and flagrant disregard for Texas taxpayers he witnessed plaguing the Austin swamp.

Do you think Texas taxpayers deserve to know how Texas spends money, awards contracts, and if there is any fraud, waste and abuse? Don Huffines does. He knows it.

Don is recognized for authoring legislation uncovering the largest government corruption scandal in Texas history: Don’s work resulted in eliminating a crooked and wasteful government agency, called Dallas County Schools, that stole tens of millions of dollars from Texas taxpayers.

Six people were thrown in prison after being exposed for their roles in the scheme.
Texas spends more than $450 million a day, seven days a week. It’s time Texas taxpayers get a look at how their money is being spent.

As Texas Comptroller, Don will implement DOGE for Texas by cutting government waste and increasing efficiency, putting every penny we save into property tax relief.

Name: AroraForSG
Description: Arora Akanksha is a 34 year-old Indian origin Canadian citizen employee of the UN running for the position of UN Secretary General. Arora invites you to this journey of creating a New UN. The election is in Oct 2021.

Wirtschaft, die der FDP des Kantons Schwyz verbunden sind.

Name: Hamilton County Republican Party
Description:
The Hamilton County Republican Party is the largest Political Party Organization inside Hamilton County, Indiana. Named as the 5th most Conservative Friendly County in America by DailyCaller.com, Hamilton County includes Carmel, Fishers, Noblesville, and Westfield. The HCRP’s main mission is to identify potential candidates and help elect Republicans to all offices inside Hamilton County as well as the 5th Congressional District and Statewide.

Description: Die FDP Buttisholz setzt sich für ein starkes und lokal verankertes Gewerbe ein. Dabei unterstützen wir das bestehende Gewerbe und wollen mit unserer Vorwärtsstrategie neue Firmen ansiedeln und damit die Diversifikation vorantreiben, mit dem Ziel interessante und nachhaltige Arbeitsplätze zu schaffen. Name: Vasemmistonuoret - Vänsterunga - The Left Youth of Finland
Description:
Vasemmistonuoret on poliittinen nuoriso- ja kansalaisjärjestö, jonka keskeiset arvot ovat sosialismi, demokratia, feminismi, punavihreys ja kansainvälisyys. Nämä tavoitteet eivät ole toisistaan erillisiä, vaan ne muodostavat kokonaisvaltaisen näkemyksen vapaammasta, inhimillisemmästä ja tasa-arvoisemmasta maailmasta.

Toimintatapamme vaihtelevat mielenosoituksista, tempauksista ja kampanjoista pitkäjänteiseen vaikuttamiseen. Järjestämme myös koulutuksia ja leirejä, joiden kautta jäsenet saavat tietoa yhteiskunnasta, viettävät vapaa-aikaa ja tutustuvat uusiin ihmisiin. Vaikutamme politiikassa kunnallisella, valtakunnallisella ja kansainvälisellä tasolla.

Vasemmistonuorten jäseneksi voivat liittyä 13–30-vuotiaat nuoret. Alle 15-vuotiaat tarvitsevat huoltajan luvan liittyäkseen Vasemmistonuoriin. Yli 30-vuotiaat voivat liittyä kannattajajäseneksi. Jäsenenä saat Libero-lehden postitettuna kotiisi, pääset vaikuttamaan yhteiskuntaan järjestön toiminnan kautta ja tutustut uusiin hmisiin. Jäsenyys on ilmainen!

---

The Left Youth of Finland is a political youth organization and a civil organization. Its core values are socialism, democracy, feminism, red-green environmentalism and internationalism. These goals are not considered to be separate, but rather form a comprehensive view of a freer, more humane and more equal world.

---

Vänsterunga (Vasemmistonuoret på finska) ett politiskt ungdosmförbund och en medborgarorganisation vars centrala värden är socialism, demokrati, feminism, rödgrön miljörättvisa och internationalism. Dessa mål är inte separata, utan bildar en helhetssyn av en friare, mänskligare och jämlikare värld.
