Name: Polk County Supervisor of Elections
Description: The Polk County Supervisor of Elections Office administers all elections and provides support for municipal elections; secures polling places; hires and trains poll workers; and provides information and statistics on voter registration, voters, and elections. The Supervisor of Elections is elected for a four-year term.

Name: Christian Democratic Youth of Slovakia | Kresťanskodemokratická mládež Slovenska | KDMS
Description:
KDMS is the oldest and the largest youth political organization in Slovakia. We are bringing together and empowering the voices of active conservative young people since 1990. Promoting values of freedom and Christian democracy, cooperating with Christian Democratic Movement (KDH). We are member organization of the Young of European People's Party (YEPP). Our focus is put on informal education, discussions and workshops.
#bethedrop

Name: U.S. Campaign for Palestinian Rights
Description:
Freedom, justice, and equality for the Palestinian people in a world without racism and oppression. We support a just and lasting peace for Palestinians and Israelis based on human rights, international law, equality, and relevant UN resolutions.

We stand in solidarity with the Palestinian struggle to achieve freedom from Israeli military occupation, justice for refugees through the implementation of their right of return, full equality for Palestinian citizens of Israel, and the right to self-determination.

We stand opposed to Islamophobia, antisemitism, all forms of racism, and any other expressions of bigotry directed at any person or group. We undertake our work for freedom, justice, and equality for the Palestinian people with the understanding that all forms of oppression are interconnected and that none can be fought in isolation.

Name: Tarrant County Democratic Party
Description:
In the biggest battleground state, the largest county to historically vote red is changing its color. Now more than ever, Texas needs strong Democratic leadership to build on the progress we’ve made and move our state forward. When Tarrant County turns blue, Texas will follow. And when Texas turns blue, the White House will follow.

We made excellent progress in the 2018 midterms, and we’re already preparing for 2020! Under the leadership of our county chair, we are moving upward and onward. 

Our values are embodied in the preamble of the Texas Democratic Party platform. "Texas Democrats believe government exists to achieve together what we cannot achieve as individuals; and government must serve all people. A representative democracy is only truly representative if every single citizen is guaranteed the inalienable right to vote in fair and open elections."

Name: D66 Limburg
Description:
Welkom op de LinkedIn-pagina van D66 Limburg! Via deze pagina zullen we u af en toe op de hoogte houden van nieuws en activiteiten van D66 in Limburg.

--- Provincie ---
D66 heeft in de Provinciale Staten van Limburg 3 zetels. Marlou Jenneskens (fractievoorzitter), Leon Vaessen en Anne Wesseling zijn sinds maart 2023 onze Statenleden.
Daarnaast hebben we ook twee burgercommissieleden, Matthijs Stocks en Japhet Stone, en twee fractiemedewerkers; Harald Barendse en .....
--- Gemeenten ---
In 15 Limburgse gemeenten is D66 vertegenwoordigd in de gemeenteraad. In 4 gemeenten zit D66 via een samenwerkingsverband ook in de raad. In 6 gemeenten (Horst aan de Maas, Leudal, Maastricht, Nederweert, Roermond en Venray) levert D66 een eigen wethouder.
--- Regiobestuur ---
Het bestuur van D66 Limburg bestaat uit Björn Bonten (voorzitter), Soumia Elhatab (penningmeester), en 3 algemene bestuursleden (Marc Vervuurt (ook interim secretaris), Miriam Elfassi en Michel Weerepas).
Voor meer informatie en contactgegevens kunt u kijken op: http://limburg.d66.nl/

Name: Dixon For Sheriff
Description: Lieutenant Dustin Dixon brings over 20 years of law enforcement experience to his candidacy for Sheriff.

Name: American Seniors Association
Description:
American Seniors Association is the fastest growing seniors' advocacy in the nation and an emerging conservative voice on the national issues that impact seniors.

At American Seniors, we believe that America's seniors deserve respect, admiration and support for the contributions they made throughout their lives building families and the enhancing the quality of American life.

We believe that you deserve choices when selecting who best represents your interests in Washington, D.C.; and we believe you deserve choices when selecting benefits that help you live a healthier and wealthier life.

We also believe that our members are individuals. That is why our benefits are structured to allow you to make choices based on your individual needs.

If you believe in individual liberty and the importance of having choices in your life, then you are an "American Senior."

Name: PC Alberta
Description:
The Progressive Conservative Association of Alberta was originally founded as the Conservative Party of Alberta.   Since 1905, the organization has been committed to being a Party for all Albertans; where member's thoughts, efforts and support of the principles of progressive conservativism are welcome and valued. 

The first six Progressive Conservative MLAs were elected to the Alberta Legislature in 1967.  In 1971, under the Leadership of the Honourable Peter Lougheed those six MLAs grew to a team of 49 as Alberta elected their first Progressive Conservative Government.  Since 1971 Progressive Conservatives have formed government under the Leadership of the Honourable Don Getty, the Honourable Ralph Klein, the Honourable Ed Stelmach, and most recently the Honourable Alison Redford, elected as Premier in 2011.

We are a Party that takes pride in both our conservative and progressive roots.  We are volunteer driven and dedicated to continuing to evolve, adapt and listen to Albertans about what matters most to them.  

Visit www.pcalberta.org for more information about the Progressive Conservative Association of Alberta.

Name: Zusammenleben Willkommen - Zimmer für geflüchtete Menschen
Description:
ZUSAMMENLEBEN WILLKOMMEN bringt Wohnraumgebende und geflüchtete Menschen zusammen, um ein privates Zusammenleben zu initiieren. Wir sind Ansprechpartner*innen für Fragen des Zusammenlebens in WGs und bereiten die Kostenübernahme durch Ämter vor. Außerdem bieten wir eine Beratung für geflüchtete Menschen zur WG-Suche an – die einzige, die sich deutschlandweit und in den Sozialen Medien an Geflüchtete richtet.

ZUSAMMENLEBEN WILLKOMMEN kritisiert die zentrale Unterbringung in Lagern, die Menschen stigmatisiert und ausgrenzt, und setzt sich politisch für eine dezentrale Unterbringung ein. Langfristig wollen wir dazu beitragen, eine offene Gesellschaft zu gestalten, in der ein solidarisches Miteinander und ein Zusammenleben auf Augenhöhe als selbstverständlich gelten.

ZUSAMMENLEBEN WILLKOMMEN wurde mit dem Deutschen Integrationspreis 2017 ausgezeichnet, sowie mit dem Smart Hero Award, dem Preis "Aktiv für Demokratie und Toleranz" der Bundeszentrale für politische Bildung und dem Schwarzkopf-Europa-Preis. Gefördert wurden wir bisher von der UNO Flüchtlingshilfe, Aktion Mensch, dem Bundesministerium für wirtschaftliche Zusammenarbeit und Entwicklung, Engagement Global, Der Paritätische, Advocate Europe und der Stiftung:do.

Alle Informationen zum Ablauf der Vermittlung und natürlich die Anmeldemöglichkeit für freie Zimmer finden sich auf unserer Website https://zusammenleben-willkommen.de/. Weitere Informationen zum gemeinnützigen Trägerverein MENSCH MENSCH MENSCH e.V. finden sich auf http://menschmenschmensch.de/.

Name: Bündnis Eine Welt Schleswig-Holstein e.V.
Description:
Wir sind Bündnis Eine Welt Schleswig-Holstein e.V. (BEI) - der Dachverband entwicklungspolitischer Nichtregierungsorganisationen in Schleswig-Holstein. Seit unserer Gründung 1994 wir dafür ein, bessere Voraussetzungen für die Verwirklichung entwicklungspolitischer Anliegen zu schaffen. 

Unsere über 100 Mitgliedsgruppen setzen sich mit unterschiedlichen Schwerpunkten und politischen Ausrichtungen für Gerechtigkeit und Solidarität in der Einen Welt ein. Dazu gehören entwicklungspolitische Bildungs- und Öffentlichkeitsarbeit, interkulturelle Verständigung, Menschenrechte, Entwicklungszusammenarbeit und Partnerschaften mit Ländern des Globalen Südens, Fairer Handel, Unterstützung von Geflüchteten und Migrant*innen sowie Klima- und Umweltschutz. Einer unserer Schwerpunkte liegt in der Stärkung der Belange der Eine-Welt-Akteur*innen. Außerdem orientiert sich unsere Arbeit am Konzept der Nachhaltigen Entwicklung und an der Globalen Gerechtigkeit. 
 
In unterschiedlichen Projekten und Veranstaltungen ermöglichen und unterstützen wir den Austausch und die Zusammenarbeit unserer Mitgliedsgruppen mit anderen gesellschaftlichen Akteur*innen. 

Zudem sind wir bundesweit u.a. über unseren Dachverband - die Arbeitsgemeinschaft der Eine-Welt-Landesnetzwerke (agl) - und über Arbeitsgruppen des Verbands Entwicklungspolitik Deutscher Nichtregierungsorganisationen e.V. (VENRO) vernetzt.

Name: La voix citoyenne - La Réunion
Description:
La Voix citoyenne est un mouvement politique citoyen né à Saint-Denis de la Réunion. qui offre la parole à tou.te.s..
Le mouvement s’engage à révéler et défendre l’intérêt général contre les intérêts particuliers.
La Voix citoyenne défend les valeurs de la République française, la liberté, l’égalité et la fraternité. 
La Voix citoyenne s’engage en faveur de la protection de la nature et des biens communs.  

La Voix citoyenne pose la question de comment faire société au-delà de ce qui peut nous différencier, comment composer un NOUS de toutes les voix individuelles. Il ne s’agit pas de dire qui je suis, de me déclarer, mais ce que nous, collectivement, pourrons faire si nous nous nouons. 
La Voix citoyenne est convaincue que la diversité des voix est une force pour La Réunion.

Chacun par son engagement, ses actions quotidiennes, ses différentes activités a une place, une responsabilité et une voix dans le projet de la société réunionnaise. Pour  cela  nous  devons  collectivement  agir  pour  l'intérêt  général  et  les  biens communs, qui sont une source infinie de bonheur, et donner de l’énergie et de la force à tous ceux qui prennent soin et protègent toutes les formes du vivant sur notre île. Car chaque individu a une voix à porter et des responsabilités à assumer. Pour encourager la participation à la "chose publique", 

La Voix citoyenne souhaite créer de nouveaux espaces de débats fondés sur le respect de nous-même, le respect des autres et le respect de la nature. Le respect et la considération de chacune des aspirations citoyennes sont les liens vivants du futur contrat social et écologique que La Voix citoyenne souhaite mettre au cœur des débats.

Name: SP Kanton Zürich
Description:
Die SP Kanton Zürich feierte im Jahr 2002 ihren 100. Geburtstag Die Bedingungen von heute sind nicht mehr vergleichbar mit denjenigen von 1902. Seither hat sich zum Glück einiges getan. Ein junger Arbeiter, der in den 30er Jahren nach Spanien fuhr, um dort für seine Überzeugung zu kämpfen hatte eine andere Lebensgeschichte und Motivation als eine mittelständische Frau, die heute aus Sorge um die Umwelt oder um die Sicherheit ihrer Kinder in die SP eintritt.

So hat sich die SP in den vergangenen mehr als 100 Jahren gewandelt. Immer wieder standen neue Fragen im Zentrum des politischen Engagements. Vor der Industrialisierung zur Vor- und Nachkriegszeit, dem wirtschaftlichen Aufschwung und den gesellschaftlichen Veränderungen, die politischen Forderungen haben sich gewandelt.

Eines jedoch ist geblieben: Das Engagement von Menschen, welche die Verhältnisse – bei uns und anderswo – nicht einfach so hinnehmen wollen, und bereit sind sich einzusetzen: für Rahmenbedingungen welche Mensch und Natur gerecht werden. Die SP Kanton Zürich zählt aktuell rund 6000 Mitglieder und 3000 SympathisantInnen.

National parties are powerless in front of these challenges, because they go beyond national borders and need to be tackled by us as Europeans, as one people. Name: Wake Up Jerusalem (התעוררות בירושלים)
Description:
The "Awakening In Jerusalem" movement first began operating in May 2008 as an independent gathering of young Jerusalemites who decided to act in the wake of the city's deteriorating state and the growing negative immigration trend of young adults from Jerusalem.

The organization's objectives have been and still are to secure Jerusalem's future by means of incorporating young adults in particular and the population in general in activism and involvement, both in the social sphere and the local and national political arena.

 

In November of 2008 the movement ran for the Jerusalem municipal elections in cooperation with the "Yerushalmim" party and in an astonishing underdog campaign gathered some 17,000 votes which awarded it with 2 representatives in the city council.

Today the movement's political representatives are working in cooperation with the movement's members with the aim of fulfilling the old-new vision of a sustainable pluralistic Jerusalem.


To wake up, get involved and volunteer or ask questions, contact us at: Awakening@in-jerusalem.org This e-mail address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it

Name: North Carolina Federation of Young Professional Republicans
Description:
The Young Republicans (YRs) are the oldest political youth organization in the United States. Important to the growth of the Republican Party, the YRs reach out to registered Republicans, 18 to 40 years of age, and provide them with better political knowledge and understanding of current issues.

The North Carolina Federation of Young Professional Republicans (NCFYPR) was formally known as the North Carolina Federation of Young Republicans, Inc. until May 2010 when the organization changed its name in order to delineate itself as a professional association for people ages 18-40 years old.  The NCFYPR is an official chartered state of the Young Republican National Federation (YRNF), which has been the official auxiliary of the Republican Party for over 80 years.

Name: Meu Recife
Description:

O Meu Recife faz parte da Rede Nossas Cidades, uma rede ativismo e mobilização que começou em 2011 com o Meu Rio, para que nós, cidadãos, voltemos a participar das decisões políticas das nossas cidades. Em 2015, após uma campanha de crowdfunding, fizemos uma residência de seis semanas para aprender as metodologias e tecnologias de mobilização da Rede Nossas Cidades com o laboratório de ativismo @Nossas. De 2016 a 2018, fomos incubados pelo Nossas enquanto consolidávamos nossa atuação na cidade. E desde 2019, somos uma organização autônoma e atuante no campo da democracia e da participação.  

Para continuar um trabalho árduo de mobilização, fiscalização da cidade e conquistar vitórias, o Meu Recife não aceita dinheiro de governo, político, partido ou empresa pública. Acreditamos que as mudanças que a nossa cidade precisa podem ser causadas por pessoas.

Name: Suvendu Adhikari ,, Leader of the Opposition, 17th West Bengal Legislative Assembly
Description:
Suvendu Adhikari (born 15 December 1970) is an Indian politician from the Bharatiya Janata Party who is the current Leader of the Opposition in the West Bengal Legislative Assembly from 10 May 2021. He is a member of the West Bengal Legislative Assembly from Nandigram since 2 May 2021. He previously served as the Minister of Transport, Irrigation and Water resource in West Bengal. He was a member of the 15th Lok Sabha and the 16th Lok Sabha (2014-2016), as an All India Trinamool Congress candidate, from Tamluk.

He is the son of Sisir Adhikari, former Union Minister of State for Rural Development in the Manmohan Singh government.

Credited as the man who galvanised the people of Nandigram under the umbrella of the Bhumi Uchhed Pratirodh Committee, when rumours of land acquisition for a chemical hub had triggered a movement, Suvendu Adhikari was a member of the Legislative Assembly from Contai. Suvendu defeated CPI(M)’s strongman Lakshman Seth by a margin of 1,72,958 votes. He resigned from the primary membership of All India Trinamool Congress and joined Bharatiya Janata Party in presence of Home Minister Amit Shah on 19 December 2020. He won the Nandigram assembly seat against TMC's supremo and Chief Minister of West Bengal of West Bengal Mamata Banerjee in 2021 by a margin of 1956 votes.

Name: Ógra Fianna Fáil
Description:

Members actively participate in debating and developing policy on a range of issues which affect young people and their communities.

We run a host of different political and social events throughout the year, including the National Youth Conference and Markievicz Summer School, as well as many other regional and local events.

Ógra’s core role is to engage in political activities such as campaigning, lobbying and promoting our policies and values. Socialising is important too and Ógra is a great place to make new friends and meet new people!

Door deel te nemen aan de verkiezingen voor de Universitaire Studentenraad laten we de stem van de actieve student luid en constructief horen. V.O.S. representeert de koepels CODC, NSSR, SOFv, BOS, en CSN en is zo geworteld in alle studentenverenigingen die onze mooie stad rijk is. V.O.S. is er voor en door de actieve student.

Name: Joe Sestak for U.S. Senate
Description:
Born and raised in Delaware County, Pennsylvania, where he attended Cardinal O’Hara High school prior to graduating from the U.S. Naval Academy, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak is an experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years and then as the highest ranking military officer ever elected to Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District from 2007-2010, during which the National Journal identified him as “at the ideological center of the House.” He commanded an aircraft carrier battle group that conducted combat operations in Afghanistan and Iraq, served as President Clinton’s Director for Defense Policy on the National Security Council in the White House, the first Director of the Navy’s anti-terrorism unit (Deep Blue) after 9/11, and the Deputy Chief of Naval Operations responsible for the Navy’s five year $350 billion warfare requirements.

Joe ran for U.S. Senate in 2010, bucking the entire Democratic Party leadership. Against all odds, he overcame a 40 point deficit to win the nomination over a 30-year incumbent, Senator Specter. After the primary, Joe continued to run as the candidate with a pragmatic, independent approach in a Senate election decided by only two points in a year where the party lost the Pennsylvania governor’s race and five Congressional seats by an average of 11 points – all despite being outspent more than any other Senate or Governor’s race (except one) in America that year.

Description:

Name: CPIM West Bengal
Description:
The CPI(M) was formed at the 7th Congress of the Communist Party of India held in Calcutta from Oct 31 to Nov 7, 1964. The CPI(M) was born in the struggle against revisionism and sectarianism in the communist movement at the international and national level, in order to defend the scientific and revolutionary tenets of Marxism-Leninism and its appropriate application in the concrete Indian conditions. Over the years, the Party has emerged as the foremost Left force in the country. The CPI(M) has grown steadily since its formation in 1964. The Party has sought to independently apply Marxism-Leninism to Indian conditions and to work out the strategy and tactics for a people's democratic revolution, which can transform the lives of the Indian people. The CPI(M) as the leading Left party is committed to build a Left and democratic front which can present a real alternative to the existing bourgeois-landlord policies.
The CPI(M) is currently heading one state government – Kerala. The Left Front government headed by the CPI(M) was uninterruptedly in power in West Bengal since 1977 up to May 2011.The Left Front headed by CPI(M) was heading government in Tripura till 2018. The CPI(M) has representation in the following Legislative assemblies in the states of Kerala, Tripura, Bihar, Rajasthan, HP, Odisha , TN,  Maharashtra & Assam. 
On behalf of CPIM West Bengal State Committee here we are looking mainly for: 
1.	Politically motivated activist who are enthusiastically willing to contribute to Left Alternative Politics for the betterment of the society & future.
2.	The contribution can be made in the area of digital campaign, accounts handling, office management, field reporting and other works. 
3.	We are a Political organisation with specific ideology which work for common people. Don’t consider your contribution as ‘Job’

Name: National Right to Work Committee
Description:
The National Right to Work Committee is the only national grass-roots organization in America dedicated exclusively to combatting the evils of compulsory unionism.

As part of a coalition of 2.8 million workers, small business owners and freedom-loving Americans, National Right to Work Committee members bring the power of grassroots pressure to bear on their elected officials in Congress and all 50 state legislatures.

Their message is simple: No worker should be forced to join or pay dues to a labor union in order to get or keep a job — a belief shared by more than eight in ten Americans.

Since 2012, six new states have passed Right to Work laws, protecting millions of workers from the threat of being fired from their jobs for refusing to support a union.

But much work remains to be done.

Despite all the recent victories by Right to Work supporters, there are still more than 10 million workers in America who are forced to pay union dues – or be fired. These workers pay more than $9 billion in forced union dues every year, just to a have a job and feed their families.

The battle against Big Labor’s multi-billion dollar forced dues political machine is the ultimate David versus Goliath fight.

And, thanks to citizens just like you, David is winning.

Now is the time to take this fight to Washington DC to end compulsory unionism in America once and for all with the National Right to Work Act.

Name: Heinrich Böll Stiftung Pakistan
Description:
The Pakistan Office of Heinrich-Böll-Foundation was established in 1993 and was the only office responsible for Asia. It was one of the first international offices of the foundation established outside Germany. In 1997, a new office was established in Chiang Mai which then took the responsibilities of projects and programs for Southeast Asia.

Pakistan office from 1997 then concentrated its activities and remained a regional office for South Asia until 2004. From 2005- 2007 our office became the regional office for Pakistan and Afghanistan, and some of the themes we worked on were Traditional Societies and Democracy, Peace and Security, Political Participation of Women and Traditional Societies and Women Rights. From 2009-11 and 2012-14 our work has focused on Democratization, Ecology and Climate Change and last but not least on Peace and Security.

Our Objectives

Supporting and strengthening participation, pluralism and the rule of law in the region.

Our Role and Mandate

» Working as a catalyst and enabler.
» Providing a forum for dialogue and exchange.
» Being a platform for Green Ideas and sustainable projects.
» Granting intellectual and financial support for research, conflict mediation and political awareness.

Our Partners

Within the scope of our mandate and to attain the objectives we cooperate with social initiatives and public bodies, civil society organizations and academic institutes.

Sie sind Unternehmer, Selbständige, Freiberufler und Führungs- und Führungsnachwuchskräfte aus allen Bereichen der Wirtschaft. Mit unserem Kreis sind wir Mitglied bei den Wirtschaftsjunioren Deutschland (WJD). Die Wirtschaftsjunioren Deutschland bilden mit mehr als 10.000 Mitgliedern den größten deutschen Verband von Unternehmern und Führungskräften unter 40 Jahren.

Neben den ordentlichen Mitgliedern unter 40, gehören zu uns auch unsere Fördermitglieder. Diese sind über 40 Jahre, unterstützen und netzwerken mit uns zusammen. Vielen von ihnen waren zuvor als ordentliches Mitglied aktiv. Mit 40 muss die Tätigkeit in dem Jungunternehmerverband also nicht vorbei sein.

Name: Debbie Spielberg for County Council District 1
Description:
I’m running for Montgomery County Council because our community deserves a representative who will listen, lead with compassion, and deliver real results. For more than 25 years, I’ve devoted my career to public service — championing policies that expand health care access, protect the environment, and make housing more affordable.

Early in my career, I was honored to serve as Legislative Director for Congressman John Lewis, where I learned the power of “good trouble” and the importance of fighting for justice. Since then, I’ve worked as a senior staffer in Montgomery County government, dealing with the issues that affect residents every day — from the minimum wage to land use, from economic development to environmental protection.

As a Democrat, I believe in transparency, accountability, and respect for all voices. I’ve lived in Montgomery County for more than 25 years, raised two children who attended MCPS, and volunteered as a PTA leader, campaign chair, and community advocate.

Now, I’m ready to bring that experience to the Council. On day one, I’ll get to work on the challenges and opportunities we face as a county — from affordable housing and education to economic growth and sustainability.

 Candidate for Montgomery County Council, District 1 — Democratic Primary, June 23, 2026

Name: Josh Gottheimer for Congress
Description:
Josh Gottheimer ran for the House of Representatives in New Jersey's 5th congressional district, a seat held by Republican Scott Garrett, in the 2016 elections. After Garrett said that the National Republican Congressional Committee should not support gay candidates, Gottheimer began raising funds for his challenge with the help of Clinton allies and Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee chair Ben Ray Luján.

Gottheimer attracted more attention than previous challengers to Garrett due to his fundraising ability and ties to the Clintons. His campaign's 2015 financial filings, in which Gottheimer reported raising around $1 million through the end of September, showed that "about one dollar in six came directly from fellow alumni of the Clinton White House and campaigns...or from major donors and employees of consulting firms tied closely to the Clintons."

Gottheimer defeated Garrett, and was sworn in January 2017. He is the first Democrat to represent what is now the 5th since 1981 (most of this district was the 7th District prior to the 1980 Census). He is the Democratic co-chair of the bipartisan Problem Solvers Caucus.

Name: Rev Wendy Hamilton
Description:
Rev. Wendy is an ordained minister, social justice advocate, and mother of one, who currently resides in Washington, DC. She is originally from a small town in southern Ohio (Portsmouth).

Rev. Wendy proudly received her Bachelor’s Degree from Howard University (B.S. Human Development, in 1991) and her Master's Degree from Howard University School of Divinity ( M.A. Religious Studies, 2006.) She credits her educational experiences and single motherhood as being two of the most transformative of her life.

Having worked professionally in communications on Capitol Hill, as an adjunct professor of Communications (the University of Phoenix and Community College of Baltimore County) and recently as an Executive Assistant to Benjamin Jealous, former President and CEO of the NAACP at the headquarters in Baltimore, Rev. Wendy participated in initiatives on criminal justice reform, civic engagement, economic inequality, and environmental justice. Her professional background includes work in the areas of education, human services/non-profit advocacy, communications, and chaplaincy.

Rev. Wendy was a part-time pastor of Open Door Metropolitan Community Church in Germantown, Maryland, and most recently served as Director of Spiritual and Cultural Outreach for 2020 Presidential Candidate Andrew Yang.

Reverend Wendy is committed to manifesting justice for all.

Name: Traguardi Movimento Civico
Description:
Vogliamo costruire una proposta alternativa per Verona, capace di superare le contrapposizioni ideologiche e di portare nuove idee e soluzioni a una città che da troppo tempo boccheggia, impantanata nell’immobilismo.

È questo l’obbiettivo per cui, nel 2017, è nato Traguardi, che negli anni ha costruito un progetto politico per Verona attorno a tre valori fondamentali: sostenibilità, attrattività economica e inclusione. Parole e valori che stanno alla base di un programma condiviso da chi sostiene e fa parte del nostro movimento civico. Una comunità traversale per età, competenze e percorsi professionali che ha accolto la sfida di proporre alla città un nuovo modo di fare politica, una visione a lungo termine che non si limiti a cercare soluzioni facili a problemi contingenti, ma che ragioni su proposte e progetti concreti.

La vera sfida per Traguardi è restituire ai cittadini la passione per la partecipazione attiva senza passare dall’antipolitica, convinti che le energie investite alla ricerca di soluzioni e proposte per migliorare la qualità della vita di chi abita e lavora a Verona non debbano essere disperse in polemiche inutili e sterili scontri ideologici.

Un movimento fatto di persone che vogliono riportare Verona a essere una città competitiva, strategica e culturalmente vivace.
La Verona del futuro che abbiamo imparato a immaginare e che non vediamo l’ora di costruire.

Name: NIKH Δημοκρατικό Πατριωτικό Κίνημα -Democratic Patriotic Movement
Description:
Ούτε αριστερά, ούτε δεξιά – αλλά μπροστά. 

Σεβόμαστε τις ρίζες μας και γι’ αυτό δεν θα μπορούσαμε να είμαστε ριζοσπαστικοί. Αρνούμαστε να συντηρήσουμε τον παλαιό άνθρωπο –τον βολεμένο, τον ασελγή, τον πονηρό- και γι’ αυτό νιώθουμε αληθινά προοδευτικοί και βαθιά επαναστατικοί.
Με σκοπό τη ΝΙΚΗ του Ελληνισμού και της Ανθρώπινης Αξιοπρέπειας, συστρατευόμαστε σε έναν ποιοτικό, σύγχρονο, σοβαρό και ενωτικό πολιτικό οργανισμό, καλοπροαίρετοι άνθρωποι από όλα τα στρώματα της κοινωνίας, από όλες τις τάξεις και τα επαγγέλματα: εργάτες και επιχειρηματίες, φοιτητές και συνταξιούχοι, καλλιτέχνες και στρατιωτικοί, εκπαιδευτικοί και αθλητές, αγρότες και επιστήμονες, εκλεκτοί άνθρωποι της Διασποράς. Ο ενωτικός μας χαρακτήρας ωστόσο, έχει διάκριση: στην προσπάθειά μας δεν γίνονται δεκτοί πρώην βουλευτές και θητεύσαντες πολιτικοί, ανεξαρτήτως χώρου.

Name: Faith in Virginia PAC
Description:
Faith in Virginia Political Action Committee (FIV PAC) seeks to support common sense Conservatives in Virginia. We aim to promote political engagement that is faith-based but not faith-biased. We have more that unites us, and strong leadership forges such unity.

Faith in Virginia Political Action Committee (FIV PAC) was established in 2024 by Pastor Will Archer and a team of concerned Virginians. Pastor Archer is a common-sense conservative leader committed to bringing our Commonwealth together. We believe this begins by mobilizing and empowering concerned Virginians to engage like never before. As Chairman of FIV PAC, Will Archer will utilize his 30 years of leadership experience to fight for Virginians and galvanize conservative majorities across our Commonwealth.

Name: Centro Acadêmico XI de Agosto
Description:
O Centro Acadêmico XI de Agosto é a entidade estudantil mais antiga e tradicional do País. Fundado em 1903, o XI, como é carinhosamente chamado, tem superado os limites de ser apenas um órgão representativo dos alunos da Faculdade de Direito do Largo de São Francisco: sempre foi, e ainda é, um agente ativo nas transformações político-sociais do Brasil, agindo em prol dos interesses democráticos e dos direitos humanos.

Em 116 anos de existência, o XI de Agosto foi palco de conquistas que só seriam vistas muitos anos depois no plano nacional, como a adoção do voto secreto e do sufrágio feminino. Envolveu-se em campanhas cruciais, tais como "Diretas Já!", "Fora Collor!", "O petróleo é nosso!" e "Sou da Paz". Não só na história recente do Brasil, mas desde o começo do século 20, quando foi criado, o XI de Agosto mostra-se um centro propagador de ideais republicanos e de igualdade, concretizados, por exemplo, nas Escolas Proletárias do XI de Agosto e na resistência incansável à ditadura de Vargas.

Preocupado com as necessidades sociais, o XI de Agosto encabeçou iniciativas como o "Departamento Jurídico XI de Agosto" – entidade que, desde 1919, presta assistência jurídica gratuita à população carente –, o "SAJU" – Serviço de Assessoria Jurídica Universitária – o "Cursinho do XI" – curso pré-vestibular popular – e o "Juizado Especial Cível da São Francisco", além de ter exercido papel vital, mais recentemente, na criação da Defensoria Pública do Estado de São Paulo.

Por todos esses motivos, o XI é motivo de orgulho para quem dele fez parte, para os alunos da Faculdade de Direito do Largo de São Francisco e para todos os cidadãos brasileiros. Como entidade de tradição secular cuja história se confunde com a do Brasil, o XI continua a abrigar a juventude que não deixa de se inquietar frente às injustiças de seu tempo.

Name: FDP.Die Liberalen Stadt Bern

Dedicated to mitigating political polarization, we are a youth-led lobbying organization advocating for civility, compromise, and respect in politics.

Nosso trabalho está concentrado em dois campos de atuação: a) estímulo e ações de acompanhamento do Poder Legislativo, com ênfase nas esferas locais (estados e municípios) e; b) estímulo e ações de educação política suprapartidária.

Name: American Sheriff
Description:
Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot who served as the Sheriff of Pinal County from 2017 to 2024. Known as “America’s Sheriff,” Lamb earned national recognition for his unwavering dedication to protecting freedom, defending constitutional rights, and standing up for his community.

Lamb worked tirelessly on the frontlines at the Southern Border, combating the criminal cartels and fighting to prevent the flow of deadly fentanyl and human trafficking. In 2020, he took a courageous stand against COVID lockdowns and mask and vaccine mandates, ensuring businesses stayed open, children remained in school, and the people of Pinal County lived free.

Throughout his career, Lamb has been a staunch advocate for law and order, the Second Amendment, and the timeless values of God, family, and freedom. As he transitions into the next chapter of his life, Lamb remains committed to serving his community and country, continuing to fight for the principles that make America strong.

Name: Ready Colorado
Description:
We are Colorado conservatives dedicated to ensuring that every kid in Colorado receives the education they deserve.

The touchstone of our education system must be parent choice. No one system of schooling should have a monopoly over opportunity. Parents should have the ability to send their kids to the school that will help their children thrive, regardless of type—public, private, charter, traditional, magnet, virtual, or home school.

The education system needs to focus more attention on the needs of students and families; and less on the needs of the system itself. Learning loss due to closed schools has been profound and we need to prioritize helping all kids get back on track in reading, writing, and math.

Colorado’s education system should be accountable to parents and taxpayers.

Teachers, schools, and districts must be held accountable for student performance outcomes. Parents are the backbone of our education system, but our education system shuts their voices out in favor of the opinions of central office bureaucrats and teachers’ union bosses.

True parent choice requires meaningful, comparable information about school districts, schools, and teachers. In the absence of good information about teachers and schools, school choice is just a guessing game for parents. A fair and easy-to-understand school ratings system based on a statewide assessment is necessary for informed school choice.

Name: Brushfire Strategies LLC
Description: Brushfire was founded by campaign experts to be the spark that ignites your movement. From electing candidates to shifting public opinion on causes that matter to nonprofits, trade associations or businesses, our comprehensive phones services create an echo chamber to help you win. Name: Armijo4Mayor
Description:
As a lifelong New Mexican and a proud daughter of an immigrant and a Hispanic veteran small business owner, I understand the challenges we face. I’m Mayling Armijo, and I’m running to be Albuquerque’s first female, minority mayor.

My commitment to fighting for the people of Albuquerque comes from my lived experience. I know about the issues and the impact of substance abuse and homelessness firsthand within my own family and have witnessed the effects of mass incarceration. These realities have shaped my passion for ensuring Albuquerque residents have the resources and opportunities they deserve. 

With 20 years of experience across the private, public, and military sectors, I’ve worked behind the scenes to push for progress. As the Executive Director of the Elevated Lending Community Development Company (ELCDC), I help small businesses access the capital they need to grow and create jobs. In the public sector I served as Director of Economic Development for Bernalillo County and Deputy County Manager for Sandoval County. In the U.S. Navy Reserve, I hold the rank of Lieutenant Commander and have led teams in operations and deployments here at home and abroad.

I am not a career politician. I’m a veteran, a businessperson, and someone who genuinely cares about Albuquerque. I’m ready to lead the way to a better city—one where policies support small businesses, improve public safety, invest in education, and create opportunities for all. As a gay woman of color, I’m committed to bringing diverse perspectives into leadership to ensure every voice is heard.

Together, we can aspire for more, and build a city where all families, businesses, and communities prosper. Will you join me?

Name: BlueWave Campaigns
Description: BlueWave Campaigns is a boutique style political consulting firm that has been built around the idea of disrupting campaigns and empowering real people through the collective experience of our current and future team. At BWC we believe in working for progressive clients who truly believe our values aren’t just something we talk about; we should actually live them. We help our clients build strategies that put them in the best position to win, whatever that win looks like for our clients. In our eyes a win could be losing better in a district to deliver statewide victories or getting legislation into a hearing. Every win doesn’t necessarily have to be an electoral victory. We believe in moving the needle and making progress towards our ultimate goals.

Name: Washington Interfaith Network
Description:
Washington Interfaith Network (WIN), founded in 1996, is a broad-based, multi-racial, multi-faith, strictly non-partisan, District-wide citizens’ power organization, rooted in local congregations and associations.

WIN seeks to create long-term power: a broad and united front of organized institutions—organized people and organized money--acting consistently and persistently for change on multiple issues at the local and city-wide levels. WIN engages leaders across the divides of race, culture, income, faith, and/or neighborhood to initiate public action on their issues (e.g. affordable housing, public safety, youth, etc.) and to partner with and hold the government and corporate sectors accountable for addressing these issues.

WIN is an affiliate of the Industrial Areas Foundation (IAF), the nation’s first and largest coalition of multi-faith and citizen organizations—and we have seven decades of experience winning tough battles across the nation. IAF member organizations have a deep grassroots presence in the political and financial power centers in the United States, Canada, and Europe.

Mit einer zukunftsorientierten Stadtplanung und -entwicklung gewinnt Dübendorf als Wohngemeinde sowie als Lebensraum für Familien an Qualität.

Nous nous engageons pour un libéralisme global; pas seulement pour un libéralisme économique mais également pour un libéralisme de société, de santé et de politique extérieure.

Unsere Projektarbeit im Ausland verbinden wir mit unserer Bildungs- und Kampagnenarbeit in Deutschland und kämpfen so für einen Perspektivwechsel in der Entwicklungszusammenarbeit.

Danske Artist Managers (DAM) er en ny organisation der samler artist managers i Danmark for første gang nogensinde. DAM har i sinde at løfte og organisere feltet - og skal synliggøre managers arbejde overfor artister, organisationer og politikere. Behovet for at stå sammen, støtte, styrke og lære af hinanden blev intensiveret under de seneste års restriktioner og nedlukning af kulturlivet - og det ønsker den nye organisation DAM at skabe en platform for. DAM er opstået på baggrund af en ny generation af artist managers, der har sat fokus på bedre økonomiske vilkår og diversitet i branchen, der underbygges af en rapport om artist management i Danmark. En branche og et felt, der ofte undervurderes eller misforstås.



DAM vil styrke management som felt på 3 områder:

Synlighed på tværs af branchen og politisk
Professionalisering af feltet
Mangfoldighed – køn, alder, etnicitet og musikgenrer/former

As the party of Abraham Lincoln, Teddy Roosevelt, Ronald Reagan and Hawaii's own Prince Jonah Kuhio Kalaniana'ole, Hawaii Republicans seek to unite people around a set of commonly held ideals and not divide them according to their differences. Our vision is to perpetuate the beauty, people and culture of Hawaii by applying the L.L.I.F.E. values of:

•	Liberty
•	Limited Government
•	Individual Responsibility
•	Fiscal Accountability
•	Equality of Opportunity

We aim to elect Republicans to all offices across the state and, in doing so, restore balance in Hawaii's political system. E Komo Mai!

Name: Gabriel Kio
Description:
Me chamo Gabriel Kio, tenho 29 anos, sou engenheiro químico ambientalista e pós-graduado em gerenciamento de projetos pela FGV.

Em 2020 fizemos 2348 votos, ficando entre os 5% mais votados de Curitiba e agora é a hora de expandir esse movimento.

Nasci e cresci em Curitiba, rodeado por uma grande família matriarcal. No rap eu encontrei a uma forma de me expressar, assim como na palhaçaria que faço em hospitais. No samba eu encontrei uma paixão que já dura 1 década e que hoje me possibilita conduzir uma ala inteira de agogôs em minha escola de samba!

Sou defensor da natureza não apenas por achá-la bonita, mas por necessidade, o que inclusive me influenciou tanto a ponto de hoje ser vegano.

Atuo no terceiro setor em várias ONGs (já cheguei inclusive a fundar uma), como forma de buscar reduzir as desigualdades sociais. Fruto do período que passei presidindo o Diretório Central dos Estudantes da PUCPR em que por 2 mandatos fui responsável por representar 25 mil estudantes em 4 cidades do Paraná!

E já pensando em um futuro melhor, na Curitiba de 2050, apresento meu projeto que será dividido em 4 eixos: Emergência Climática, Justiça Social, Cultura e Política com Seriedade. 

Vamos juntos construir uma sociedade ambientalmente equilibrada e socialmente justa, no ritmo que Curitiba precisa!

Son bureau exécutif est constitué de 21 étudiants qui chapeautent les 5 conseils de classe au premier cycle, le conseil des étudiants aux cycles supérieurs, le café étudiant ainsi que quinze clubs étudiants. Konkret innebär det att vi arbetar med utvecklings och samverkansfrågor över gränsen. Vi bidrar med nätverk och arenor för gränsöverskridande samverkan. Fellesrådet samverkar i sitt uppdrag med offentliga organisationer, näringsliv, civilsamhälle och akademi. 

Fellesrådet är en ideell allmännyttig förening och medlemmar är kommuner i Tröndelag och Jämtland Härjedalen samt Tröndelag fylkeskommune och Region Jämtland Härjedalen. Som gränskommittee verkar vi också på uppdrag av Nordiska ministerrådet och är en aktiv del av Nordiska ministerrådets samlade gränskommittéer. 

Varmt välkommen att höra av er till oss!

Name: Groupe Changer Paris
Description:
Nos valeurs : 

Le groupe Changer Paris, coprésidé par Rachida Dati et David Alphand, réunit des élus les Républicains, centristes et indépendants, au Conseil de Paris.

Au cours des 20 dernières années de municipalité socialiste, les Parisiens ont été dépossédés de leur espace public : explosion de l’insécurité, ville dégradée, insalubre, abîmée. Ce n’est d’ailleurs pas pour rien que la ville se vide de ses habitants, avec plus de 12.000 Parisiens – dont beaucoup de familles – qui quittent la capitale tous les ans. Paris est devenue une carte postale, un magasin de souvenirs, où ceux qui y vivent n’y trouvent plus leur place, ne retrouvent plus l’âme de leurs quartiers.

Ce que nous voulons : un Paris où il fait bon vivre, où peuvent habiter les familles, les classes moyennes, un Paris dynamique mais apaisé ; en un mot, un Paris qui ferait la fierté des Parisiennes et Parisiens. C’est ce pour quoi nous nous battons, à vos côtés.

Notre rôle au Conseil de Paris : 

Huit fois par an, pendant quatre jours, nous siégeons au Conseil de Paris, de 9h à 21h, pour défendre une autre vision de la capitale. Face à la majorité d'Anne Hidalgo, nous refusons de rester silencieux : nous contestons les choix qui abîment Paris et défendons une ville agréable et sûre pour les Parisiens. 

Chaque séance, nous déposons des propositions, amendons les textes, dénonçons les dérives de la gestion actuelle et faisons entendre la voix des Parisiens qui refusent le déclin de leur ville.

We are the only large urban Republican county in Texas.  The work we do locally helps keep Texas strong, free and prosperous.

We maintain a year round Headquarters at 7524 Mosier View Ct., Ste. 230 in Ft. Worth that provides services and resources for voters, candidates and  local  Republicans. Additionally we oversee the Republican Primary election, and recruit and train Republicans to work at the polls in the November general election.

We receive no funding from the Republican National Committee or the Republican Party of Texas. Our work is funded by contributions. We are legally classified as a political action committee whose structure is determined by State law and by Party rules.

Local political parties in Texas are made up of a County Chair and Precinct Chairs who are elected by the voters in the Primary Election.

Name: EMPODERAR: CONOCIMIENTO, ECONOMIA CREATIVA, POLITICAS CULTURALES E INNOVACIÓN
Description:
Argentina needs a creative transformation, one that may help sort out a chaotic present and introduce a horizon of basic predictability, requirements needed to restore hope and confidence.

It is evident that no one has ever found a solution by following fundamentalist ideas, or by seeking to corroborate obscure or alternative theories that subject societies to a constant sense of frustration. We are convinced that the answers to most of the problems that ail us will be found by actively working together, supported by values that unite us, and above all else, as free individuals.

That is why we believe that the search for solutions should be holistic and organic. The answers today tend to be cross-sectional and are based on foundations and actions that not only restore a certain logical order to things, but also enable for the wasted energies of society to be channeled towards the individual and collective construction of an equitably shared future.

We also see culture as a cross-cutting concept, broad and strongly influenced by the transformation we are experiencing today. Art, popular music, theater and literature are cultural acts, but so are showing respect for others and respecting people´s freedoms to act within the laws of the land. How we learn to work and even to play with others, are all shared cultural factors. This transversality means that cultural values in a society are not only affected by external factors, but they also influence everything they touch by promoting change from within.

Hence its strategic importance. If we want a fairer society, with more opportunities, security and inclusion, we must work on these issues. It is difficult to obtain the long-term economic sustainability that we yearn for Argentina, without a social ethos that fosters merit, that is proud of individual and collective success, and one that also teaches us how to build on the achievements attained and then to sustain growth as culturally shared accomplishments.

Name: International Young Democrat Union
Description:
The International Young Democrat Union (IYDU) is the official youth organization of the International Democracy Union (IDU). IYDU is an alliance of conservative, classical liberal, Christian Democrat and center-right youth political organizations.

Established in 1991, the IYDU has over 100 full and observer members from over 80 countries and is the youth wing of the International Democracy Union (IDU). The IYDU is a global alliance of center-right political youth organiztions united by a common desire for greater freedom and less government.

The parent organization to IYDU, the International Democracy Union (IDU), is a working association of over 80 center-right parties. Formed in 1983, founder members included Britain's Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher; then US Vice-President George Bush Sr.; Mayor of Paris, and later French President, Jacques Chirac; and the German Chancellor Helmut Kohl.

The IYDU holds key events throughout the year, where participants from member organizations can meet to exchange ideas, learn about different political systems, network, and help fight for freedom and democracy.

Name: United For Change
Description:
Politics is broken.

Westminster has become unrepresentative, undemocratic and divided. We have lost faith and trust in politicians and political parties to act in the best interests of our country. 

It's time to create a new politics.

We are bringing together the best people to fix the problems our politicians can't solve. United for Change is building a movement to bring fresh faces and new ideas to Westminster. 

Help us build a movement.

We welcome everyone who wants to be part of the solution. We are united by shared values and a belief that together we can build a better future for the UK. We are a community of civic leaders, public servants, students, members of the armed forces, entrepreneurs, business people and many others from across the UK. We are aligned by a common purpose and decency. We will prioritise actions not words. We will build a movement powered by people.

Join the movement to fix broken politics today.

Name: IG Metall Bodensee
Description:
Die IG Metall in Baden-Württemberg ist die Gewerkschaft für Beschäftigte der Metallindustrie und des Metallhandwerks, der Elektroindustrie und des Elektrohandwerks, des Kfz-Handwerks, der Textilindustrie, der Bekleidungsindustrie, der Holz- und Kunststoffindustrie sowie der Edelmetallindustrie im Südwesten. Die Bezirksleitung vertritt in Zusammenarbeit mit vielen anderen die Interessen von rund 425.000 Mitgliedern (Stand: Dezember 2022). Viele davon kommen traditionell aus dem Fahrzeug- und Maschinenbau sowie der Zulieferindustrie.

In über 2.000 Betrieben, betreut von 27 Geschäftsstellen mit rund 180 hauptamtlichen GewerkschaftssekretärInnen, arbeiten die IG Metall-Mitglieder im Land. Viele von ihnen sind als FunktionärInnen in der IG Metall aktiv. Insgesamt hat die IG Metall Baden-Württemberg mehr als 14.000 gewerkschaftliche Vertrauensleute und in den IG Metall-Branchen im Bezirk sind fast 14.000 gewählte BetriebsrätInnen aktiv.
 
In Tarifauseinandersetzungen verhandeln die Tarifexperten der IG Metall Baden-Württemberg höhere Einkommen und bessere Arbeitsbedingungen für die Beschäftigten. Darüber hinaus kümmert sich die IG Metall im Südwesten um Arbeitszeiten und -bedingungen, Gesundheit, Arbeitsplatzerhaltung, berufliche Qualifizierung, fairen Wechsel in die Rente sowie ein Gelingen der Transformation und Konzepte für die Arbeitswelt von morgen.

Name: Australians for Constitutional Monarchy
Description:
We are committed to preserving, protecting, and defending our rich Australian heritage, the robust Australian constitutional system, the significant role of the Crown, and our beloved flag.

We firmly believe that Australia's system of government is not just amongst the best in the world, but also a pillar of stability. Any ill-conceived change would not only disrupt this stability but also plunge the country into a period of Constitutional instability.

The primary argument in the current campaign for a change to a republic is that the Head of State should be Australian. However, constitutional monarchists argue that we already have an Australian Head of State in the form of the Governor-General. A pivotal High Court decision holds the key to resolving this dispute.

Name: Droite de Demain
Description:
Droite de Demain considère que la la droite ne peut manquer le rendez-vous avec l’Histoire. Le Think-tank travaille donc à l’élaboration de propositions issues d’une expérience de réalité dont le cadre premier est l’intérêt supérieur de la Nation.

Droite de Demain considère que les idées ne sont rien sans l’action. Nous préparons et soutenons l’engagement politique au service d’un intérêt commun : celui de la France. Cela passe par un réseau soudé dans un espace que nous favorisons pour réaliser de grandes œuvres ensemble demain.

Droite de Demain considère que la droite paie aujourd’hui ses renoncements successifs. Le Think-tank travaille donc à la construction d’une pensée cohérente qui s’inspire d’hier pour gagner demain.

Nous favorisons l'engagement politique au service de nos idées.

Name: Sindicato dos Arquitetos de São Paulo
Description:
O SASP – Sindicato dos Arquitetos no Estado de São Paulo foi fundando em 1971, tendo sido o primeiro sindicato da categoria no país. Foi um importante impulsionador da criação de outros sindicatos estaduais e da fundação da Federação Nacional dos Arquitetos e Urbanistas – FNA, que deu-se em março de 1979. 

O SASP pode representar o conjunto dos profissionais em exercício no Estado de São Paulo – 21.885 ( 2003 ), associados ou não a entidade. A direção do SASP é eleita a cada 03 anos pelo voto direto dos seus associados. As instâncias de deliberação são as Assembléias Gerais Ordinárias e Extraordinárias e as Reuniões de Diretoria. As instancias de representação são: a Diretoria, as representações regionais e representações na Federação Nacional dos Arquitetos e Urbanistas - FNA, na Central Única dos Trabalhadores - CUT e no Conselho Regional de Engenharia, Arquitetura e Agronomia - CREA/SP. 

Em 1992 a entidade reformou seus Estatutos, admitindo a condição de sócio aspirante para os estudantes de arquitetura e urbanismo nos cursos instalados no Estado. 

O papel do sindicato se torna mais importante ainda em nosso contexto de retirada de direitos dos trabalhadores. Estejamos unidos, filie-se e apoie o seu sindicato e a sua classe trabalhista!

Name: Volt Nijmegen
Description: De lokale afdeling van Volt Europa en Volt Nederland in Arnhem-Nijmegen

Name: Alice B. Toklas LGBTQ Democratic Club
Description:
The Alice B. Toklas LGBT Democratic Club is the oldest LGBT focused Democratic Club in the nation, having originally formed in 1972.


Celebrating more than 40 years of public service, Alice is the first registered LGBT Democratic Club in the nation, forming shortly after the Stonewall riots. Alice trains LGBT activists to become political professionals and elected leaders, analyzes campaigns and candidates before every election to help our community be fully informed, and supports those that have fought for the issues that are important to the LGBT community. 

Zoe Dunning and Ron Flynn are co-chairs of the Alice B. Toklas LGBT Democratic Club in San Francisco. More information on Alice can be found at http://www.alicebtoklas.org/.

Name: UvASociaal
Description:
UvAsocial is a student party that focuses on improving education by organizing debates, actions and submitting candidates for the student councils. UvAsocial supplies candidates at both central level for the Central Student Council (CSR) and faculty for the Faculty Student Councils (FSRs). UvAsocial is committed through student councils and through active lobbying for students and their academic development. Our aim is to organize education as much as possible according to the ideals and principles of freedom, equality, quality and involvement. Ideals such as accessibility and diversity are also high on the agenda.

UvAsocial has been in existence since 2005. A group of students decided to set up this student party in order to achieve a democratic system in which students could be elected for student councils based on their views and competences, instead of being nominated by one party without any a democratic choice.

Name: ORGANIZING FOR AMERICA
Description: ORGANIZING FOR AMERICA is a political organization company based out of 1167 E Florence Ave, Los Angeles, California, United States.

Name: Verein für gentechnikfreie Lebensmittel
Description: Wir setzen uns als Konsument:innen, Landwirt:innen und engagierte Bürger:innen für gentechnikfreie Lebensmittel ein. Um die gentechnikfreie Landwirtschaft zu schützen und Risiken für Mensch und Umwelt abzuwenden, planen wir eine eidgenössische Volksinitiative.

Name: Every Voice
Description: Americans know our democracy fails to live up to its promise when our political influence is measured by our net worth. Changing this game won't be easy. The courts have allowed more big money in politics and rolled back protections for voters. Too many politicians offer lip service on the issue of money in politics while some even support handing our elections entirely over to big donors. The big banks, energy companies, and other industries and special interests act as if they own Washington, D.C. and our state capitals.

Name: Tampa Bay Young Republicans
Description:
Tampa Bay Young Republicans are Young Professionals from across the Bay Area. Bringing together those who are 18-41 in having their voice heard in local and national politics.

Republican Leadership Starts with the Tampa Bay Young Republicans

Like us on Facebook at http://fb.com/tampabayyr

Name: University of Waterloo Model United Nations
Description: UWMUN is the official Model United Nations group at the University of Waterloo which engages participants in meaningful and interesting debate on international issues. UWMUN specializes in training delegates in MUN procedures, and also sending UW delegations to MUN conferences around Canada to represent the school. UWMUN also hosts various in-house conferences to help get delegates more experience and foster an engaging debate atmosphere. UWMUN also hopes to host an inaugural national conference and invite delegates from all across Canada and the United States to it.

Name: Fundação Maurício Grabois
Description: Casa do pensamento marxista e progressista. A fonte segura de estudos e pesquisas que envolvem política, economia, sociedade e cultura, sempre rumo a um Brasil mais justo!

Name: Represent PA
Description:
Represent PA is committed to powering progressive women in races for the PA House and Senate: To influence Harrisburg, we need to elect more women.
 
Our goal is flipping the PA Legislature to Democratic majorities with strong progressive women. 

OUR PROGRESSIVE VALUES:
Reproductive rights and access
Equality and LGBTQ+ rights
Public education
Economic equality
Community health & safety
Worker's rights
Balancing environmental protection and energy opportunities 
Criminal justice reform

Name: KlimalisteBW
Description:
Erklärtes Ziel der Klimaliste ist die Einhaltung des Pariser Abkommens und die Begrenzung der Erderwärmung auf 1,5 Grad Celsius gegenüber der vorindustriellen Zeit.
Dies geschah aus der Notwendigkeit heraus, dass keine der derzeitig in den Landtagen und im Bundestag vertretenen Parteien das wissenschaftlich Gebotene tut, um die Klimakatastrophe aufzuhalten.

Name: Raskin for Congress
Description:
The campaign to elect Jamie Raskin to Congress.

Facebook: www.facebook.com/raskin.jamie

Name: Pfeffinger Forum
Description:
Als öffentliche überparteiliche Veranstaltung richtet sich das Pfeffinger Forum an alle Personen, die an aktuellen Themen aus Wirtschaft und Politik interessiert sind.

Beim Pfeffinger Forum handelt es sich um einen Anlass der FDP Sektion Pfeffingen. Die Veranstaltung ist jährlich wiederkehrend, öffentlich, überparteilich und kostenlos. Sie verfolgt den Zweck, einen Beitrag zur Meinungsbildung zu einem nationalen und aktuellen Thema zu leisten.

Das Forum wurde 1991 durch Paul Schär, e Landrat und e Fraktionspräsident der FDP BL, gegründet und wird heute von einem ehrenamtlichen Organisations-Team geführt.

Name: Nevada Democratic Victory
Description: Nevada Democratic Victory is committed to helping build the coordinated campaign working to elect Sen. Cortez Masto, Gov. Sisolak, and Democrats up and down the ballot in November 2022.

Name: Wake County Democratic Party
Description: The mission of the Wake County Democratic Party is to elect Democrats to office in Wake County. We actively recruit and help elect candidates who believe, as we do, in our platform.  Our local party includes over 229,919 registered Democrats, elected officials, party officers, and an army of volunteers organized into 42 groups, clubs and committees dispersed across the county’s 200 precincts and 13 municipalities.

Name: FNF Central Europe
Description:
In 2004, the Central European countries joined the European Union as new members. Democratic, pluralistic and free market oriented institutional structures were established in all of these countries after 1990. However, their achievements are now endangered by nationalistic and populist tendencies. 
At the same time, many of these countries are demonstrating remarkable reforms in their economies and societies. Our task is to strengthen liberal forces, both political and intellectual, in the region.

Our project office in Prague particularly supports the 4Liberty.eu network, which serves as a center of competence and a platform for dialogue. Its members develop reform concepts and policy papers that are relevant for national as well as European decision makers and aim at fostering free and open societies.

Name: IsarMUN
Description: Isar Model United Nations (IsarMUN) is a four day MUN-conference located in Munich, Germany. Its first edition took place in 2008 organized by MUNAM e.V. Since 2022 the conference is fully co-organized by MUNAM e.V. and MUNTUM e.V., the MUN societies in Munich. After having to move IsarMUN 2020 online and having to cancel IsarMUN 2021, IsarMUN finally made its grand return in 2022!After permanently moving IsarMUN into Spring, the next edition of IsarMUN will take place in April 2024.

Name: Maine Republican Party
Description: The Maine Republican Party is the state’s premier political organization with members holding the State’s highest office, a U.S. Senator, a U.S. Congressman, and a chamber of the Maine State Legislature as well as many local elected town, county, and city official offices.

Name: Virginia Coalition for Sex Ed Reform
Description:
VACSER (pronounced "vasser") is a coalition of parents, advocates, public health professionals, and public policy experts who are committed to ensuring that Virginia students receive comprehensive, medically accurate, inclusive, and age-appropriate sexual health & relationships education. 

 Founded in 2018, VACSER has been on the frontlines of the fight for equitable sex education in Virginia. By bringing together issue advocacy organizations, community groups, lawmakers, and everyday citizens, VACSER is the strongest coalition in Virginia working every day to make comprehensive sex education a reality.

Name: FDP Rostock

Freie Demokraten Rostock | Deine Stadt. Deine Stimme.

Description: نحن نهدِف في فريقنا إلى تعزيز الوَعي السياسي وتطويرِ المهارات الأكاديمية والمهنيّة للطلّاب بجامعة الملك عبد العزيز، من خلالِ الأنشطة والفعاليات التي تدعم التواصل المهني وتُحفّز البحث والتفكير النقدي.

Name: Libertarian Party of Canada
Description: The mission of the Libertarian Party of Canada is to reduce the responsibilities and expense of government. This, so that we may each manage our lives to mutually fulfill our needs by the free and voluntary exchange of our efforts and property for the value that best realizes our happiness.

Name: Maison commune de la décroissance
Description: La Maison commune de la décroissance, créée en 2017, est un laboratoire d'idées en faveur de la décroissance, dont l'objet est de produire et de consolider un corpus idéologique commun : solide, radical, cohérent et enthousiasmant, pour le mouvement social en faveur de la décroissance et de mettre à disposition ce corpus auprès de toutes celles et ceux qui souhaitent faire advenir des sociétés  écologiques,  soutenables,  justes,  solidaires et sereines. La MCD est un think-tank de portée nationale, et pas un tiers-lieu local. La MCD ne « pratique » pas la décroissance en portant des alternatives concrètes, mais s'attache à réfléchir et à définir ce concept pour en faire une véritable matrice de transition politique, sociale et écologique.

Name: VVD Veldhoven
Description:
De Veldhovense VVD is Trots Op Veldhoven! Dat willen we graag zou houden.
Kijk voor meer informatie op de website van VVD Veldhoven.

Name: Schule trifft Wirtschaft Aargau
Description:
Schule trifft Wirtschaft - Wir schaffen Perspektiven.

Schulen und das lokale Gewerbe vernetzen und so das Potenzial vor Ort für Jugendliche und Gewerbetreibende transparenter aufzeigen.

Zweck von «Schule trifft Wirtschaft»

Das Engagement von «Schule trifft Wirtschaft» basiert auf einer gemeinsamen Initiative des Aargauischen Gewerbeverbands (AGV) sowie des Aargauischen Lehrerinnen- und Lehrerverbands (alv) aus dem Jahr 2014. Schon damals bestand die Absicht, die Berufslehre durch eine engere Zusammenarbeit zwischen Schule und Gewerbe zu stärken und Jugendliche nachhaltig für eine berufliche Grundausbildung zu begeistern. Erfreulicherweise wurden aufgrund dieses Engagements diverse lokale Aktivitäten, wie beispielsweise Berufswahltage oder Tischmessen, umgesetzt. Allerdings konnten die hochgesteckten Ziele (noch) nicht wunschgemäss erfüllt werden.

Daher wurde das Projekt «Schule trifft Wirtschaft» 2021 erneut aufgegriffen und konzeptionell neu aufgegleist. Nach diversen Gesprächen mit allen involvierten Interessensgruppen entstand daraus eine breit abgestützte Initiative mit klarem Bekenntnis zur Berufslehre. Am 16. Mai 2024 wurde der Verein «Schule trifft Wirtschaft» offiziell gegründet und im Rahmen der Woche der Berufsbildung offiziell vorgestellt.

Name: Essydo Politics
Description: Essydo Politics is an independent political analysis and publication house with readers in over 80 nations. Home to various innovations in the political space, Essydo Politics has contributed to the expansion of knowledge borders in this important field.

Name: CHC BOLD PAC
Description:
As the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus (CHC), BOLD PAC is a leading voice for Latinos and Latinas in national politics. It was founded in 2001 to increase Latino representation in the House and Senate. Since then, it has doubled the size of the CHC, including getting the first Latina ever elected to the Senate.

We are the largest caucus led PAC in DC and are on the cutting edge of mobilization and outreach to Latino voters nationwide.

Name: Council for a Livable World
Description:
Council for a Livable World (CLW) is a Washington, D.C.-based 501 (c)(4) non-profit, non-partisan advocacy organization dedicated to reducing the danger of nuclear weapons and increasing national security. Our mission is to advocate for sensible national security policies and to help elect congressional candidates who support them.

We believe that security in the 21st century requires not just the exercise of military might, but the active use of diplomacy to solve emerging security threats. We believe that new international challenges require new approaches. As Council Chairman Sen. Gary Hart said, "you must properly understand what security is and how it is to be achieved, or all the military spending in the world will not make you more secure."

Name: Courageous Leaders
Description:
The world needs Courageous Leaders more than ever.  

If you are a business or non-profit looking to scale, you need courageous leaders.

And we all need more courageous leaders in the United States Congress to drive positive change.

If you want to be a courageous leader, scale an organization with courageous leadership at the core, or be a courageous leader in Congress - check out lexireese.com for support!

Name: BARCELONA ETS TU
Description: BCN ETS TU (abans Barcelona Com Tu) neix fa cinc anys de la mà del nostre fundador i president Daniel Vosseler com una plataforma professional, cívica i social amb l'objectiu d'agrupar les millors propostes i solucions per a fer de Barcelona, una gran metròpolis pionera i líder tant en l'àmbit econòmic com en drets socials, tot i veient com durant els últims anys la ciutat ha sofert una fugida constant d'empreses i d'inversions, un augment significatiu d'actes delictius, un greu problema residencial a causa de la falta d'habitatge social i l'abandó del manteniment de les instal·lacions i espais públics convertint Barcelona en una ciutat caòtica i bruta on les desigualtats econòmiques i socials ens porten a la deriva.

Name: Associated Students of the University of California, Merced
Description:
Mission:
We, the students of the University of California, Merced, as an independent body, do ordain and establish this Constitution in order to provide an efficient and equal representation for the expression of students’ views, clarity of opinions, and interests in recognition of the rights of the students in this university community; to encourage effective student participation by providing services and coordinating activities; to support, promote and celebrate the diversity of culture, lifestyle, and beliefs for the breadth of ideas and perspectives they bring; to advance the development of leaders that will serve and make a difference in the present and future; and to promote the general educational welfare and enhancement of the academic benefits and opportunities offered for the continued success of the students of the University of California, Merced.

About:
The Associated Students of the University of California, Merced (ASUCM) is the undergraduate student government of UC Merced and it derives its power from the UC Office of the President, UC Merced Office of the Chancellor and the ASUCM Constitution.

Modeled after the United States Federal Government, the ASUCM consists of an executive, legislative and judicial branch. The mission of the ASUCM is to improve student life at UC Merced.

Associated Students are here for the students!

We want to hear their concerns and questions. We want to make their experience at UC Merced the best it can possibly be! 

Come check out some of our awesome events!!!

We are available in the Office of Student Life for your convenience. :)

Name: Human Rights Campaign Greater Washington DC
Description:
Working across The Greater DMV region (from Richmond, Virginia to the District of Columbia, to Baltimore, Maryland), HRC Greater Washington DC works to secure equal rights for LGBTQ individuals and families at the federal and state level by lobbying elected officials, mobilizing grassroots supporters, educating Americans, investing strategically to elect fair-minded officials and partnering with other LGBTQ organizations. 

The Greater Washington DC Steering Committee is a diverse volunteer group of individuals. Join us! 

Nationally, the Human Rights Campaign serve as America's largest civil rights organization working to achieve lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and queer equality. By inspiring and engaging individuals and communities, HRC strives to end discrimination against LGBTQ people and realize a world that achieves fundamental fairness and equality for all.

The Human Rights Campaign envisions a world where lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender and queer people are ensured equality and embraced as full members of society at home, at work, and in every community.

Name: Quando eu for presidente
Description:
O NOVO é um partido fundado por cidadãos ficha-limpa, que nunca haviam se envolvido com política e resolveram sair da indignação para a ação.

O grupo percebeu que a política é o caminho para mudar o Brasil. E este caminho deve ser percorrido por gente qualificada e íntegra, através de uma instituição com princípios, valores e visão de longo prazo.

Só assim é possível mudar o modelo de Estado e construir um NOVO Brasil, com mais oportunidades e menos privilégios.

Name: Danske Slagtermestre
Description:
Danske Slagtermestre (DSM) er branche-, arbejdsgiver- og markedsføringsorganisation for slagterbutikker, private slagterier og kødforædlende virksomheder.

Som brancheorganisation varetager DSM/OfD medlemmernes faglige og politiske interesser i relation til politikere, myndigheder, presse, andre organisationer m.v.
DSM’s rolle som brancheorganisation betyder bl.a., at vi stædigt søger at påvirke politikerne til at lovgive på en måde, så der også tages hensyn til detailhandelen og de små og mellemstore virksomheder. Det er en af DSM’s fornemste opgaver at være ”vagthund” på lovgivningsområdet, så branchen ikke stilles over for krav, der er urimelige eller urealistiske at gennemføre.

Dette foregår gennem kontakt til alle, som bestemmer eller præger de rammer, som virksomhederne har at arbejde indenfor. Det sker både på det overordnede, generelle plan og med de konkrete udfordringer, der møder de enkelte butikker eller virksomheder.

DSM varetager også interesserne for Ostehandlerforeningen for Danmark (OfD).
Som arbejdsgiverforening har DSM/OfD indgået overenskomster med NNF, HK og 3F. Organisationen orienterer og bistår medlemmerne i deres forhold til deres ansatte, både generelt og i konkrete sager, hvor DSM/OfD repræsenterer medlemmerne ved mæglingsmøder og i eventuelle retssager. DSM/OfD lægger vægt på samarbejde med fagforeningerne om at skabe og fastholde gode arbejdspladser inden for branchen.

Som markedsføringsorganisation driver DSM butikskæden ”mad med mere” samt det noget løsere kampagnesamarbejde i ”Mesterslagteren”. Ca. halvdelen af DSM’s butiksmedlemmer et tilknyttet et af disse koncepter.

DSM blev stiftet i 1915, da slagterbutikker kunne tælles i tusindetal. I dag har DSM ca. 400 medlemmer som omfatter private slagtermestre, slagtehuse og fødevareindustrien.
Vi har 9 lokalforeninger over hele landet, der bl.a. mødes i erfa-grupper, arrangerer studieture og virksomhedsbesøg. 

DSM er en del af paraplyorganisationen FødevareDanmark.

Name: College Democrats of Ohio
Description: College Democrats of Ohio (CDO) is the official student outreach arm of the Ohio Democratic Party.  We work to promote Democratic and progressive values on college campuses across the state.  This includes ensuring that CDO chapters have the resources they need to help Democrats get elected up and down the ballot.  Join the movement by following us @CollegeDemsOhio.

Name: CNA Industria Chieti-Pescara
Description:
La CNA, Confederazione Nazionale dell'Artigianato e della Piccola e Media Impresa, da settant'anni rappresenta e tutela gli interessi delle micro, piccole e medie imprese, operanti nei settori della manifattura, costruzioni, servizi, trasporto, commercio e turismo, delle piccole e medie industrie, ed in generale del mondo dell’impresa e delle relative forme associate, con particolare riferimento al settore dell’artigianato; degli artigiani, del lavoro autonomo, dei professionisti  nelle sue diverse espressioni, delle imprenditrici e degli imprenditori e dei pensionati.
Il Gruppo CNA Industria è un raggruppamento di interessi “trasversale” che la CNA, nell’intento di estendere il proprio ambito di rappresentanza, ha istituito per dare risposte a tutte le imprese maggiormente strutturate, in genere organizzate in forma industriale e che, proprio in ragione di ciò, manifestano specifiche esigenze condividendo i temi e le problematiche su cui CNA Industria lavora:

- Accesso al mercato
- Contrattualistica
- Credito e finanza
- Innovazione e investimenti
- Internazionalizzazione
